instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight down by your sides. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend your torso to one side, lowering your hand towards your knee. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，慢慢将躯干向一侧弯曲，同时将手部向膝盖方向下放。在最低点稍作停顿后，缓慢回到起始位置。换另一侧重复动作，按照所需的次数交替进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight down by your sides.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend your torso to one side, lowering your hand towards your knee.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，慢慢将躯干向一侧弯曲，同时将手部向膝盖方向下放。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
换另一侧重复动作。
按照所需的次数交替进行。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your hands placed behind your head. Lift your legs off the ground and bend your knees at a 90-degree angle. Bring your right elbow towards your left knee while simultaneously straightening your right leg. Return to the starting position and repeat the movement on the opposite side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee while straightening your left leg. Continue alternating sides in a pedaling motion for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，双手放在头后。将双腿抬离地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。将右肘靠近左膝，同时伸直右腿。回到起始位置，换另一侧重复动作，将左肘靠近右膝，同时伸直左腿。以踩踏动作交替两侧，持续进行所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your hands placed behind your head.
Lift your legs off the ground and bend your knees at a 90-degree angle.
Bring your right elbow towards your left knee while simultaneously straightening your right leg.
Return to the starting position and repeat the movement on the opposite side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee while straightening your left leg.
Continue alternating sides in a pedaling motion for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，双手放在头后。
将双腿抬离地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
将右肘靠近左膝，同时伸直右腿。
回到起始位置，换另一侧重复动作，将左肘靠近右膝，同时伸直左腿。
以踩踏动作交替两侧，持续进行所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 四足跪姿股四头肌拉伸

aliases: 四足跪姿大腿前侧拉伸

instructions.en: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips. Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed. Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads. Hold this position for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为四足跪姿，双手位于肩膀正下方，膝盖位于髋关节正下方。将一条腿向后伸直，保持膝盖弯曲且脚面绷直。慢慢将髋部向下降低，感受大腿前侧的拉伸。保持这个姿势20-30秒，然后换腿在另一侧重复同样的拉伸动作。

en: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Extend one leg straight back, keeping your knee bent and your foot flexed.
Slowly lower your hips towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your quads.
Hold this position for 20-30 seconds.
Switch legs and repeat the stretch on the other side.
zh: 四足跪姿，双手位于肩膀正下方，膝盖位于髋关节正下方。
将一条腿向后伸直，保持膝盖弯曲且脚面绷直。
慢慢将髋部向下降低，感受大腿前侧的拉伸。
保持这个姿势20-30秒。
换腿在另一侧重复同样的拉伸动作。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground. Engaging your abs, lift your shoulders off the ground and reach your right hand towards your right heel. Return to the starting position and repeat on the left side, reaching your left hand towards your left heel. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双臂向两侧伸展，与地面平行。收紧腹部，将肩膀抬离地面，同时用右手去触碰右脚跟。回到起始姿势后，换到左侧重复相同的动作，用左手去触碰左脚跟。继续两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Engaging your abs, lift your shoulders off the ground and reach your right hand towards your right heel.
Return to the starting position and repeat on the left side, reaching your left hand towards your left heel.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双臂向两侧伸展，与地面平行。
收紧腹部，将肩膀抬离地面，同时用右手去触碰右脚跟。
回到起始姿势后，换到左侧重复相同的动作，用左手去触碰左脚跟。
继续两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the cable machine with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索器械上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手采用正握方式握住手柄，握距略宽于肩宽。身体微微后仰，将手柄向胸部方向拉近，同时将肩胛骨向中线收紧挤压。在动作的最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将手柄放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the cable machine with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean back slightly and pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索器械上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手采用正握方式握住手柄，握距略宽于肩宽。
身体微微后仰，将手柄向胸部方向拉近，同时将肩胛骨向中线收紧挤压。
在动作的最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将手柄放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Lift one leg off the ground and rotate your ankle in a circular motion. Perform the desired number of circles in one direction, then switch to the other direction. Repeat with the other leg.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。抬起一条腿离开地面，以画圈的方式转动踝关节。先按一个方向完成所需圈数，然后换到相反方向。换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Lift one leg off the ground and rotate your ankle in a circular motion.
Perform the desired number of circles in one direction, then switch to the other direction.
Repeat with the other leg.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。
抬起一条腿离开地面，以画圈的方式转动踝关节。
先按一个方向完成所需圈数，然后换到相反方向。
换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. As you pull yourself up, bend one arm and bring your elbow towards your side, while keeping the other arm straight. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar and your bent arm is fully flexed. Lower yourself back down with control, straightening the bent arm and repeating the movement on the other side. Alternate sides with each repetition.
instructions.zh: 双手略宽于肩正握单杠，身体自然悬挂。收紧核心，将肩胛骨下沉后收。向上拉起时，弯曲一只手臂，将肘部拉向身体一侧，同时保持另一只手臂伸直。继续向上拉直到下巴超过杠铃，弯曲的手臂完全屈肘。然后有控制地下降，伸直弯曲的手臂，换另一侧重复动作。每一次反复交替两侧进行。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
As you pull yourself up, bend one arm and bring your elbow towards your side, while keeping the other arm straight.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar and your bent arm is fully flexed.
Lower yourself back down with control, straightening the bent arm and repeating the movement on the other side.
Alternate sides with each repetition.
zh: 双手略宽于肩正握单杠，身体自然悬挂。
收紧核心，将肩胛骨下沉后收。
向上拉起时，弯曲一只手臂，将肘部拉向身体一侧，同时保持另一只手臂伸直。
继续向上拉直到下巴超过杠铃，弯曲的手臂完全屈肘。
然后有控制地下降，伸直弯曲的手臂，换另一侧重复动作。
每一次反复交替两侧进行。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Push back up to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, extending the opposite arm out to the side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩部。将一只手臂向侧方伸直，与地面保持平行。屈肘缓缓降低身体，同时保持背部挺直、核心收紧。通过手臂发力向上推起身体，恢复到起始姿势。然后换另一侧手臂向侧方伸展，重复上述动作。继续交替两侧进行，直到完成所需的重复次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Push back up to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, extending the opposite arm out to the side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩部。
将一只手臂向侧方伸直，与地面保持平行。
屈肘缓缓降低身体，保持背部挺直、核心收紧。
向上推起身体，恢复到起始姿势。
换另一侧手臂向侧方伸展，重复动作。
交替两侧进行，直到完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: arm slingers hanging bent knee legs

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, bringing them as close to your elbows as possible. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，双臂完全伸直，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，尽量贴近手肘位置。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, bringing them as close to your elbows as possible.
Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，双臂完全伸直，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。
收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，尽量贴近手肘位置。
慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight down. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground. Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，双腿自然下垂。收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前抬起至与地面平行的位置。在最高点保持片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight down.
Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，双腿保持伸直并自然下垂。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前抬起至与地面平行的位置。
在最高点保持片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

name.zh: 双臂分开触脚画圈（男性）

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended to the sides. Keeping your legs straight, bend forward at the waist and reach down towards your toes with your right hand. As you reach down, simultaneously lift your left leg straight up behind you, maintaining balance. Return to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left hand reaching towards your toes and your right leg lifting up behind you. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向两侧伸展。保持双腿伸直，身体前倾弯腰，右手去触碰右脚脚尖。在弯腰的同时，左腿向后伸直抬起以保持身体平衡。恢复起始姿势，然后换左手触碰左脚脚尖，同时右腿向后抬起。按照要求的次数，两侧交替进行此动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended to the sides.
Keeping your legs straight, bend forward at the waist and reach down towards your toes with your right hand.
As you reach down, simultaneously lift your left leg straight up behind you, maintaining balance.
Return to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left hand reaching towards your toes and your right leg lifting up behind you.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向两侧伸展。
保持双腿伸直，身体前倾弯腰，右手去触碰右脚脚尖。
在弯腰的同时，左腿向后伸直抬起以保持身体平衡。
恢复起始姿势，然后换左手触碰左脚脚尖，同时右腿向后抬起。
按照要求的次数，两侧交替进行此动作。

name.zh: 手臂上举完整仰卧起坐（男性）

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms overhead, keeping them straight. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is upright. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双臂向上伸展举过头顶，保持手臂伸直。收紧腹肌发力，缓慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直到躯干直立。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复进行至目标次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Extend your arms overhead, keeping them straight.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is upright.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。
双臂向上伸展举过头顶，保持手臂伸直。
收紧腹肌发力，缓慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直到躯干直立。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复进行至目标次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad. Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到合适的高度，然后将膝盖稳固地跪在垫子上。双手握住手柄，掌心向下，手臂完全伸直。通过弯曲手肘将身体下压，直到上臂与地面平行。保持片刻后，将身体推回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad.
Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到合适的高度，然后将膝盖稳固地跪在垫子上。
双手握住手柄，掌心向下，手臂完全伸直。
通过弯曲手肘将身体下压，直到上臂与地面平行。
保持片刻后，将身体推回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core muscles and lift your knees towards your chest, bending at the hips and knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，髋关节和膝关节弯曲。在动作的最高点停顿片刻，收紧腹肌，然后慢慢将双腿降回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core muscles and lift your knees towards your chest, bending at the hips and knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 悬挂在引体向上杆上，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。
收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，髋关节和膝关节弯曲。
在动作的最高点停顿片刻，收紧腹肌。
慢慢将双腿降回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

name.en: assisted hanging knee raise with throw down

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, keeping your legs together. Once your knees are at chest level, explosively throw your legs down towards the ground, extending them fully. Allow your legs to swing back up and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住引体向上杆，双臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部抬起，双腿保持并拢。当膝盖抬至胸部高度时，用力将双腿向下甩出，完全伸展。接着让双腿自然摆回，重复上述动作至所需次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, keeping your legs together.
Once your knees are at chest level, explosively throw your legs down towards the ground, extending them fully.
Allow your legs to swing back up and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住引体向上杆，双臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。
收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部抬起，双腿保持并拢。
膝盖抬至胸部高度后，用力将双腿向下甩出，完全伸展。
让双腿自然摆回，重复动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Bend one knee and place your foot flat on the ground. Using your hands or a towel, gently pull your toes towards your body, feeling a stretch in your calf. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat on the other leg.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，双腿伸直。弯曲一侧膝盖，将该侧脚平放在地面上。双手握住脚趾或使用毛巾，轻轻向身体方向拉动脚趾，感受小腿部的拉伸。保持拉伸姿势20-30秒。松开拉伸，换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

en: Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Bend one knee and place your foot flat on the ground.
Using your hands or a towel, gently pull your toes towards your body, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release the stretch and repeat on the other leg.
zh: 平躺在地上，双腿伸直。
弯曲一侧膝盖，将该侧脚平放在地面上。
双手握住脚趾或使用毛巾，轻轻向身体方向拉动脚趾，感受小腿部的拉伸。
保持拉伸姿势20-30秒。
松开拉伸，换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee. Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release and repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在地面上，双腿伸直。弯曲右膝，将右脚踝放在左大腿上，刚好位于膝盖上方。双手握住左大腿，轻轻向胸部方向拉动。保持拉伸20-30秒。换另一侧重复动作。

en: Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee.
Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release and repeat on the other side.
zh: 仰卧在地面上，双腿伸直。
弯曲右膝，将右脚踝放在左大腿上，刚好位于膝盖上方。
双手握住左大腿，轻轻向胸部方向拉动。
保持拉伸20-30秒。
换另一侧重复动作。

name.en: assisted lying gluteus and piriformis stretch
name.zh: 辅助仰卧臀肌和梨状肌拉伸

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee. Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，双腿伸直。弯曲右膝，将右脚踝放在左大腿上，刚好位于膝盖上方。双手握住左大腿，将其轻轻向胸部方向拉。保持拉伸20-30秒。放松拉伸，换另一侧重复。

en: Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee.
Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.
zh: 平躺在地上，双腿伸直。
弯曲右膝，将右脚踝放在左大腿上，刚好位于膝盖上方。
双手握住左大腿，将其轻轻向胸部方向拉。
保持拉伸20-30秒。
放松拉伸，换另一侧重复。

name.en: assisted lying leg raise with lateral throw down

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. While keeping your legs together, lower them to one side until they are a few inches above the ground. Pause for a moment, then lift your legs back to the starting position. Repeat the movement to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂放于身体两侧。将双手放在臀部下方起支撑作用。收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。在保持双腿并拢的同时，将双腿向一侧放下，直到离地面几英寸的高度。稍作停留，然后将双腿抬回起始位置。向另一侧重复该动作。继续交替两侧进行所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
While keeping your legs together, lower them to one side until they are a few inches above the ground.
Pause for a moment, then lift your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂放于身体两侧。
将双手放在臀部下方起支撑作用。
收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。
在保持双腿并拢的同时，将双腿向一侧放下，直到离地面几英寸的高度。
稍作停留，然后将双腿抬回起始位置。
向另一侧重复该动作。
继续交替两侧进行所需的重复次数。

name.en: assisted lying leg raise with throw down

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Raise your legs until they are perpendicular to the ground. Lower your legs back down to the starting position. Simultaneously, throw your legs down towards the ground, keeping them straight. Raise your legs back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放于身体两侧。将双手放在臀部下起到支撑作用。收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面，保持伸直状态。将双腿抬至与地面垂直的位置，然后慢慢放回起始位置。同时，将双腿用力向下甩向地面，保持双腿伸直。再将双腿抬回起始位置。重复以上动作至所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Raise your legs until they are perpendicular to the ground.
Lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Simultaneously, throw your legs down towards the ground, keeping them straight.
Raise your legs back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放于身体两侧。
将双手放在臀部下起到支撑作用。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面，保持伸直状态。
将双腿抬至与地面垂直的位置。
慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
同时，将双腿用力向下甩向地面，保持双腿伸直。
再将双腿抬回起始位置。
重复以上动作至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Hold the medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest. Lean back slightly, engaging your abs and keeping your back straight. Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the medicine ball towards the right side of your body. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the medicine ball towards the left side of your body. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住药球，放在胸前。身体微微向后倾斜，收紧腹肌，保持背部挺直。慢慢将躯干向右侧扭转，将药球移向身体右侧。暂停片刻，然后将躯干向左侧扭转，将药球移向身体左侧。交替进行两侧动作，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Hold the medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest.
Lean back slightly, engaging your abs and keeping your back straight.
Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the medicine ball towards the right side of your body.
Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the medicine ball towards the left side of your body.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住药球，放在胸前。
身体微微向后倾斜，收紧腹肌，保持背部挺直。
慢慢将躯干向右侧扭转，将药球移向身体右侧。
暂停片刻，然后将躯干向左侧扭转，将药球移向身体左侧。
交替进行两侧动作，完成所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 辅助窄握平行引体向上

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height. Place your hands on the parallel bars with a close grip, palms facing each other. Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先根据自身情况调整器械的配重和高度，然后双手采用窄握方式握住平行杠，手掌相对。双臂伸直支撑起身体，双脚离地悬空。收紧肩胛骨，发力将身体向上拉起，始终保持肘部贴近身体两侧。当下巴超过横杠时稍作停顿，然后缓慢有控制地将身体降回起始位置。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height.
Place your hands on the parallel bars with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据自身情况调整器械的配重和高度。
双手采用窄握方式握住平行杠，手掌相对。
双臂伸直支撑身体，双脚离地悬空。
收紧肩胛骨发力向上拉起身体，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
继续向上拉直到下巴超过横杠。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按所需次数重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended. Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles. Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 俯卧在垫子或长凳上，双腿完全伸展。让搭档配合或使用弹力带固定脚踝。收紧腘绳肌，将双腿向臀部方向抬起，保持膝盖伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended.
Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles.
Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 俯卧在垫子或长凳上，双腿完全伸展。
让搭档配合或使用弹力带固定脚踝。
收紧腘绳肌，将双腿向臀部方向抬起，保持膝盖伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 俯卧辅助股四头肌拉伸

instructions.en: Lie face down on the ground with your legs extended. Bend your left knee and reach back with your left hand to grab your left foot or ankle. Gently pull your left foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your left quad. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release. Repeat with your right leg.
instructions.zh: 俯卧在地面上，双腿伸直。弯曲左膝，左手向后伸抓住左脚或脚踝。轻轻将左脚向臀部方向拉，感受左腿股四头肌的拉伸。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后放松。换右腿重复相同的动作。

en: Lie face down on the ground with your legs extended.
Bend your left knee and reach back with your left hand to grab your left foot or ankle.
Gently pull your left foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your left quad.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Repeat with your right leg.
zh: 俯卧在地面上，双腿伸直。
弯曲左膝，左手向后伸抓住左脚或脚踝。
轻轻将左脚向臀部方向拉，感受左腿股四头肌的拉伸。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后放松。
换右腿重复相同的动作。

instructions.en: Lie face down on the ground with your legs straight. Bend your right knee and reach back with your right hand to grab your right foot or ankle. Gently pull your right foot or ankle towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in the front of your right thigh. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release and repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 俯卧在地面上，双腿伸直。弯曲右膝，用右手向后伸去抓住右脚或脚踝。轻轻将右脚或脚踝向臀部方向拉，感受右大腿前侧的拉伸。保持拉伸20-30秒。释放并换另一侧重复。

en: Lie face down on the ground with your legs straight.
Bend your right knee and reach back with your right hand to grab your right foot or ankle.
Gently pull your right foot or ankle towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in the front of your right thigh.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release and repeat on the other side.
zh: 俯卧在地面上，双腿伸直。
弯曲右膝，用右手向后伸去抓住右脚或脚踝。
轻轻将右脚或脚踝向臀部方向拉，感受右大腿前侧的拉伸。
保持拉伸20-30秒。
释放并换另一侧重复。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 根据自身情况调整器械的重量和高度设置。双手握住手柄，采用比肩稍宽的正握姿势。双臂完全伸直，双脚离地悬垂。收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉向手柄位置，保持肘部靠近身体。持续向上拉直至下巴超过手柄。在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体下降至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据自身情况调整器械的重量和高度设置。
双手握住手柄，采用比肩稍宽的正握姿势。
双臂完全伸直，双脚离地悬垂。
收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉向手柄位置，保持肘部靠近身体。
持续向上拉直至下巴超过手柄。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体下降至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: assisted seated pectoralis major stretch with stability ball
name.zh: 辅助坐姿胸大肌拉伸（健身球）

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，背部保持挺直。双手握住健身球，双臂向前伸直。慢慢将健身球向胸部方向下放，感受胸肌的拉伸。保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。根据需要重复完成规定次数。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a stability ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Slowly lower the stability ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your pectoral muscles.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，背部保持挺直。
双手握住健身球，双臂向前伸直。
慢慢将健身球向胸部方向下放，感受胸肌的拉伸。
保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
根据需要重复完成规定次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other. Bend your bottom leg slightly for stability. Place your top foot on a stable surface, such as a bench or step. Keeping your top leg straight, slowly lower it towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your inner thigh. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿伸直并上下叠放。略微弯曲下方腿部以保持身体稳定。将上方脚的脚掌放在稳定的支撑面上，例如训练凳或台阶。保持上方腿部伸直，缓缓将其向地面方向下放，感受大腿内侧肌肉的拉伸。保持这个拉伸姿势20-30秒。然后回到起始姿势，换另一侧重复相同的动作。

en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Bend your bottom leg slightly for stability.
Place your top foot on a stable surface, such as a bench or step.
Keeping your top leg straight, slowly lower it towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your inner thigh.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿伸直并上下叠放。
略微弯曲下方腿部以保持身体稳定。
将上方脚的脚掌放在稳定的支撑面上，例如训练凳或台阶。
保持上方腿部伸直，缓缓将其向地面方向下放，感受大腿内侧肌肉的拉伸。
保持这个拉伸姿势20-30秒。
回到起始姿势，换另一侧重复相同的动作。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench or have someone hold your feet down. Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子边缘或让人按住你的脚。平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，脚掌平放在地面。双手放在头后，手肘向外张开。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench or have someone hold your feet down.
Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子边缘或让人按住你的脚。
平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，脚掌平放在地面。
双手放在头后，手肘向外张开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level. Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees. Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到适合自己的助力档位。双脚站在脚踏平台上，采用正握方式握住把手，握距比肩稍宽。保持胸部挺起、肩部向后打开，收紧核心，膝盖略微弯曲。通过弯曲手肘并将肘部向下拉向身体两侧来将身体向上拉起。持续向上拉直到下巴超过横杆。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the machine to your desired assistance level.
Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your chest up and shoulders back, engage your core, and slightly bend your knees.
Pull your body up by flexing your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your sides.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到适合自己的助力档位
双脚站在脚踏平台上，采用正握方式握住把手，握距比肩稍宽
保持胸部挺起、肩部向后打开，收紧核心，膝盖略微弯曲
通过弯曲手肘并将肘部向下拉向身体两侧来将身体向上拉起
持续向上拉直到下巴超过横杆
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your lats and biceps, and pull yourself up towards the handles. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your back muscles. Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 根据个人需求调整器械的重量和高度设置。面对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用正握方式，比肩宽稍宽地握住把手。收缩背阔肌和肱二头肌，将身体向上拉向把手。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压背部肌肉。缓慢控制下放身体，恢复至起始姿势。按照目标次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height settings.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your lats and biceps, and pull yourself up towards the handles.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your back muscles.
Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械的重量和高度至适宜状态
面对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽
采用正握方式，比肩宽稍宽地握住把手
收缩背阔肌和肱二头肌，将身体向上拉向把手
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压背部肌肉
缓慢控制下放身体，恢复至起始姿势
按照目标次数重复练习

name.zh: 辅助站姿肱三头肌伸展（用毛巾）

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head. Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary. Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手在头后握住一条毛巾。保持肘部紧贴耳朵，上臂固定不动。慢慢将前臂向上伸展，在动作顶端用力挤压肱三头肌。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将毛巾降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel with both hands behind your head.
Keep your elbows close to your ears and your upper arms stationary.
Slowly extend your forearms upward, squeezing your triceps at the top.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the towel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手在头后握住毛巾。
保持肘部紧贴耳朵，上臂固定不动。
慢慢将前臂向上伸展，在动作顶端挤压肱三头肌。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将毛巾降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height. Kneel down on the pad facing the machine, with your hands gripping the handles. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and close to the machine. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到您想要的重量和高度。跪在垫子上，面向器械，双手握住把手。通过弯曲肘部降低身体，保持背部挺直并靠近器械。在底部稍作停顿，然后将自己推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Adjust the machine to your desired weight and height.
Kneel down on the pad facing the machine, with your hands gripping the handles.
Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and close to the machine.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到您想要的重量和高度。
跪在垫子上，面向器械，双手握住把手。
通过弯曲肘部降低身体，保持背部挺直并靠近器械。
在底部稍作停顿，然后将自己推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 跪姿辅助宽握双杠臂屈伸

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad. Grasp the handles with a wide grip and keep your elbows slightly bent. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到合适的高度，然后跪在垫子上固定好膝盖。双手采用宽握方式握住把手，肘部保持微微弯曲。通过弯曲肘部逐渐下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行。然后通过伸展手臂将自己从器械上推起，恢复到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the machine to your desired height and secure your knees on the pad.
Grasp the handles with a wide grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到合适的高度，然后跪在垫子上固定好膝盖。
双手采用宽握方式握住把手，肘部保持微微弯曲。
通过弯曲肘部逐渐下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行。
通过伸展手臂将自己从器械上推起，恢复到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position. Jump explosively upwards, extending your legs and arms. While in the air, spread your legs apart and bring your arms out to the sides. Land softly with your feet shoulder-width apart, bending your knees to absorb the impact. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，降低身体至深蹲姿势。爆发力向上跳跃，同时伸展双腿和双臂。在空中时，将双腿分开，双臂向两侧展开。落地时双脚与肩同宽，弯曲膝盖以缓冲冲击力。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Jump explosively upwards, extending your legs and arms.
While in the air, spread your legs apart and bring your arms out to the sides.
Land softly with your feet shoulder-width apart, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。
弯曲膝盖，降低身体至深蹲姿势。
爆发力向上跳跃，同时伸展双腿和双臂。
在空中时，将双腿分开，双臂向两侧展开。
落地时双脚与肩同宽，弯曲膝盖以缓冲冲击力。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step forward with your right foot, bending your knee and lowering your body into a lunge position. Push off with your right foot and step back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left foot, alternating legs with each step. Continue stepping back and forth, maintaining a steady pace. Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈出，弯曲膝盖，身体下降成弓步姿势。右脚用力蹬地，回到起始位置。左脚重复相同的动作，两腿交替迈步。保持稳定的节奏，持续进行来回跨步。根据设定的时长或次数重复此动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step forward with your right foot, bending your knee and lowering your body into a lunge position.
Push off with your right foot and step back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement with your left foot, alternating legs with each step.
Continue stepping back and forth, maintaining a steady pace.
Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
右脚向前迈出，弯曲膝盖，身体下降成弓步姿势。
右脚用力蹬地，回到起始位置。
左脚重复相同的动作，两腿交替迈步。
保持稳定的节奏，持续进行来回跨步。
根据设定的时长或次数重复此动作。

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall or other stable surface. Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地面上，俯卧在球上，髋部置于球上，双脚靠墙或其他稳定表面支撑。双手可置于头后或交叉放于胸前。收紧核心肌群，缓慢将上半身抬离球面，伸展背部直至从头到脚跟形成一条直线。在顶端短暂停顿后，缓慢将上半身降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall or other stable surface.
Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest.
Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球放在地面上，俯卧在球上，髋部置于球上，双脚靠墙或其他稳定表面支撑。
双手置于头后或交叉放于胸前。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢将上半身抬离球面，伸展背部直至从头到脚跟形成一条直线。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将上半身降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest. Slowly lift your legs up, keeping them straight, until your body is parallel to the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双手采用正握握住引体向上杆，手距略宽于肩宽。收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后拉动。弯曲膝盖并将膝盖收向胸部。缓慢抬起双腿，保持双腿伸直，直至身体与地面平行。保持该姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始姿势。按所需次数重复。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest.
Slowly lift your legs up, keeping them straight, until your body is parallel to the ground.
Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手采用正握握住引体向上杆，手距略宽于肩宽
收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后拉动
弯曲膝盖并将膝盖收向胸部
缓慢抬起双腿，保持双腿伸直，直至身体与地面平行
保持该姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始姿势
按所需次数重复

instructions.en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm over your left arm. Interlock your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body. Slowly raise your arms up and away from your body, feeling a stretch in your back and chest. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the opposite side.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽，笔直站立。双臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。将双臂交叉在身体前方，右手臂放在左手臂上方。双手手指交叉，然后翻转手掌使其朝向身体外侧。慢慢将双臂向上抬起并远离身体，感受背部和胸部的拉伸感。保持该拉伸姿势15-30秒，然后放松。换另一侧重复相同的动作。

en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm over your left arm.
Interlock your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body.
Slowly raise your arms up and away from your body, feeling a stretch in your back and chest.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Repeat on the opposite side.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽，笔直站立。
双臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。
将双臂交叉在身体前方，右手臂放在左手臂上方。
双手手指交叉，然后翻转手掌使其朝向身体外侧。
慢慢将双臂向上抬起并远离身体，感受背部和胸部的拉伸感。
保持该拉伸姿势15-30秒，然后放松。
换另一侧重复相同的动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and jump backwards, pushing off with both feet. Land softly on the balls of your feet, bending your knees to absorb the impact. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。膝盖略微弯曲，双脚同时发力向后跳。落地时用前脚掌轻轻着地，弯曲膝盖以缓冲冲击力。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and jump backwards, pushing off with both feet.
Land softly on the balls of your feet, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
膝盖略微弯曲，双脚同时发力向后跳。
落地时用前脚掌轻轻着地，弯曲膝盖以缓冲冲击力。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Place the balance board on a flat surface. Step onto the balance board with one foot, ensuring it is centered. Slowly shift your weight onto the foot on the balance board, keeping your core engaged. Maintain your balance and stability as you hold the position for a desired amount of time. Repeat the exercise with the other foot.
instructions.zh: 将平衡板放置在平整的地面上。双脚踏上平衡板，确保双脚位于板面中心位置。缓慢将重心转移至站在平衡板上的那只脚，同时收紧核心肌群以保持稳定。在保持平衡的状态下维持动作至规定时间。换另一侧脚重复相同动作。

en: Place the balance board on a flat surface.
Step onto the balance board with one foot, ensuring it is centered.
Slowly shift your weight onto the foot on the balance board, keeping your core engaged.
Maintain your balance and stability as you hold the position for a desired amount of time.
Repeat the exercise with the other foot.
zh: 将平衡板放置在平整的地面上。
单脚踏上平衡板，确保脚位于板面中心。
缓慢将重心转移至站在平衡板上的那只脚，同时保持核心肌群收紧。
在保持平衡与稳定的状态下维持动作至规定时间。
换另一侧脚重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your sides and slowly curl one arm up towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps at the top. Lower the arm back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带，采用反握姿势（掌心向上）。将上臂紧贴身体两侧，然后缓慢将一只手臂向肩部方向弯举，在动作顶峰位置充分收缩肱二头肌。将手臂放回起始位置，换另一只手臂重复相同的动作。持续交替进行规定次数的练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and slowly curl one arm up towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps at the top.
Lower the arm back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带，采用反握姿势（掌心向上）。
保持上臂紧贴身体两侧，缓慢将一只手臂向肩部方向弯举，在动作顶峰位置充分收缩肱二头肌。
将手臂放回起始位置，换另一只手臂重复相同的动作。
持续交替进行规定次数的练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band. Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes. As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other. Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition. Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，双腿伸直，双手握住弹力带举过头顶。收紧腹肌，同时将双腿和上半身抬离地面，双手向脚尖方向伸展。当双腿和上半身下落时，交换双腿的位置，一条腿交叉在另一条腿上。继续重复这个动作，每次重复时交替双腿的位置，直到完成目标次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
As you lower your legs and upper body back down, switch the position of your legs, crossing one over the other.
Repeat the movement, alternating the position of your legs with each repetition.
Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，双腿伸直，双手握住弹力带举过头顶。
收紧腹肌，同时将双腿和上半身抬离地面，双手向脚尖方向伸展。
当双腿和上半身下落时，交换双腿的位置，一条腿交叉在另一条腿上。
继续重复这个动作，每次重复时交替双腿的位置。
持续进行直到完成目标次数。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a pull-up bar or sturdy anchor point. Step onto the band and grip the bar with your palms facing away from you, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your core engaged and your shoulders down and back. Pull your body up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together and driving your elbows down towards your hips. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在引体向上杆或坚固的锚点上。踏上弹力带，双手握住单杠，掌心朝外，双手距离略宽于肩。悬挂时手臂完全伸直，保持核心收紧，肩部向下向后。通过夹紧肩胛骨并将肘部向下拉向臀部，将身体向上拉起。持续向上拉直到下巴过杆，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按所需重复次数重复动作。

en: Attach the band to a pull-up bar or sturdy anchor point.
Step onto the band and grip the bar with your palms facing away from you, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your core engaged and your shoulders down and back.
Pull your body up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together and driving your elbows down towards your hips.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在引体向上杆或坚固的锚点上。
踏上弹力带，双手握住单杠，掌心朝外，双手距离略宽于肩。
悬挂时手臂完全伸直，保持核心收紧，肩部向下向后。
通过夹紧肩胛骨并将肘部向下拉向臀部，将身体向上拉起。
持续向上拉直到下巴过杆，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数重复动作。

name.zh: 弹力带辅助滚轮腹肌滚出

instructions.en: Kneel on the floor and hold the handles of the band with both hands, palms facing down. Place the band on the ground in front of you and position your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and slowly roll the wheel forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control. Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双膝跪地，双手握住弹力带手柄，手掌向下。将弹力带平铺在身体前方的地面上，双手间距与肩同宽。收紧核心肌群后，缓慢将滚轮向前推出，在保持身体控制的前提下尽可能伸展。到达最远端时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将滚轮回滚至膝盖处，恢复到起始姿势。按所需次数重复进行。

en: Kneel on the floor and hold the handles of the band with both hands, palms facing down.
Place the band on the ground in front of you and position your hands shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and slowly roll the wheel forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control.
Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双膝跪地，双手握住弹力带手柄，手掌向下放置。
将弹力带平铺于身体前方的地面上，双手间距与肩同宽。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢将滚轮向前推出，在保持控制的前提下尽可能延伸身体。
在最远端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将滚轮回滚至膝盖处，恢复起始姿势。
按所需次数重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the band handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, pushing the bands away from your chest. Slowly lower the bands back down to your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手握住弹力带把手，采用正握姿势，握距略宽于肩宽。将手臂完全伸展，将弹力带从胸前推开。缓慢将弹力带放回胸部位置，保持肘部呈90度角。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the band handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms fully, pushing the bands away from your chest.
Slowly lower the bands back down to your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手握住弹力带把手，采用正握姿势，握距略宽于肩宽。
将手臂完全伸展，将弹力带从胸前推开。
缓慢将弹力带放回胸部位置，保持肘部呈90度角。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at ankle height. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent. Hinge at the hips and lean forward, maintaining a neutral spine. Extend your right leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top. Lower your right leg back down and repeat with the left leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在脚踝高度的稳固锚点上。背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。向后迈步使弹力带产生适当张力，膝盖保持微屈。以髋关节为轴向前俯身，注意维持脊柱中立。将右腿向后伸直，在动作顶端充分挤压臀肌。然后将右腿放下还原，换左腿进行相同的动作。持续交替双腿，完成所需次数。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at ankle height.
Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Hinge at the hips and lean forward, maintaining a neutral spine.
Extend your right leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Lower your right leg back down and repeat with the left leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在脚踝高度的稳固锚点上。
背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。
向后迈步使弹力带产生张力，膝盖保持微屈。
以髋关节为轴向前俯身，维持脊柱中立。
将右腿向后伸直，在动作顶端充分挤压臀肌。
将右腿放下还原，换左腿重复相同动作。
持续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your hands behind your head and your knees bent. Lift your feet off the ground and bring your right knee towards your chest while simultaneously twisting your torso to bring your left elbow towards your right knee. Straighten your right leg while bringing your left knee towards your chest and twisting your torso to bring your right elbow towards your left knee. Continue alternating the twisting motion, as if you are pedaling a bicycle, while keeping your core engaged throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双手放在头后，膝盖弯曲。双脚离地，将右膝向胸部靠拢，同时扭转身体使左肘接近右膝。然后伸直右腿，同时将左膝向胸部靠拢，扭转身体使右肘接近左膝。继续交替进行扭转动作，就像骑自行车一样，同时保持核心肌群全程收紧。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your hands behind your head and your knees bent.
Lift your feet off the ground and bring your right knee towards your chest while simultaneously twisting your torso to bring your left elbow towards your right knee.
Straighten your right leg while bringing your left knee towards your chest and twisting your torso to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Continue alternating the twisting motion, as if you are pedaling a bicycle, while keeping your core engaged throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双手放在头后，膝盖弯曲。
双脚离地，将右膝向胸部靠拢，同时扭转身体使左肘接近右膝。
伸直右腿，同时将左膝向胸部靠拢，扭转身体使右肘接近左膝。
继续交替进行扭转动作，就像骑自行车一样，同时保持核心肌群全程收紧。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam. Stand facing the anchor point and grab the band with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your back straight as you pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在一个高的锚点上，例如引体向上杆或坚固的横梁。面向锚点站立，采用反握方式握住弹力带，双手与肩同宽。后退一步使弹力带产生张力，双脚分开与髋同宽。保持核心收紧、背部挺直，将弹力带向下拉向胸部，同时夹紧肩胛骨。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放弹力带回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Stand facing the anchor point and grab the band with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your feet hip-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your back straight as you pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在一个高的锚点上，例如引体向上杆或坚固的横梁。
面向锚点站立，采用反握方式握住弹力带，双手与肩同宽。
后退一步使弹力带产生张力，双脚分开与髋同宽。
保持核心收紧、背部挺直，将弹力带向下拉向胸部，同时夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放弹力带回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Place a band around your upper arms, just above the elbows. Assume a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to heels. Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带套在上臂肘部上方，摆好俯卧撑姿势，双手垂直于肩膀下方，身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线。弯曲手肘，将胸部向地面靠近，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。通过手掌发力向上推，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Place a band around your upper arms, just above the elbows.
Assume a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带套在上臂肘部上方。
摆好俯卧撑姿势，双手垂直于肩膀下方，身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线。
弯曲手肘，将胸部向地面靠近，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。
通过手掌发力向上推，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground. Hold one end of the band in your hand and step on the other end with your foot on the same side. Lean forward slightly and rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. With your palm facing up, slowly curl your hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hand back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，双腿分开，脚掌平放在地面上。一只手握住弹力带的一端，同侧的脚踩住弹力带的另一端。身体微微前倾，将肘部靠在大腿内侧，膝盖上方位置。手掌朝上，保持上臂不动，慢慢将手向肩膀方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手放回起始位置。重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold one end of the band in your hand and step on the other end with your foot on the same side.
Lean forward slightly and rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
With your palm facing up, slowly curl your hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hand back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，双腿分开，脚掌平放在地面上。
一只手握住弹力带的一端，同侧的脚踩住弹力带的另一端。
身体微微前倾，将肘部靠在大腿内侧，膝盖上方位置。
手掌朝上，保持上臂不动，慢慢将手向肩膀方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

name.en: band fixed back close grip pulldown

instructions.en: Attach the band to a fixed point above you, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam. Sit down on a bench or chair facing the band, with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Grasp the band with a close grip, palms facing towards you. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats. Slowly release the band back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在上方的固定点上，如引体向上杆或坚固的横梁。坐在面向弹力带的凳子或椅子上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。双手窄握弹力带，掌心朝向身体。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。将弹力带向下拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作底部稍作停顿，感受背阔肌的收缩。缓慢释放弹力带回到起始位置，全程保持控制。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the band to a fixed point above you, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Sit down on a bench or chair facing the band, with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Grasp the band with a close grip, palms facing towards you.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats.
Slowly release the band back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在上方的固定点上，如引体向上杆或坚固的横梁。
坐在面向弹力带的凳子或椅子上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。
双手窄握弹力带，掌心朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将弹力带向下拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作底部稍作停顿，感受背阔肌的收缩。
缓慢释放弹力带回到起始位置，全程保持控制。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your arms fully extended. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pull the band down towards your chest, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats. Slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在头部上方的牢固锚点上。站立面对锚点，双脚与肩同宽。反手握住弹力带，双手比肩稍宽。向后移动身体，使手臂在完全伸展的状态下产生张力。收紧核心肌群并挤压肩胛骨。将弹力带向下拉向胸部，以肘部引导发力。运动到底部时稍作停顿，感受背阔肌的收缩。慢慢释放弹力带的张力，回归起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step back to create tension in the band, keeping your arms fully extended.
Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Pull the band down towards your chest, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats.
Slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在头部上方的牢固锚点上。
站立面对锚点，双脚与肩同宽。
反手握住弹力带，双手比肩稍宽。
向后移动身体，在手臂完全伸展的状态下产生张力。
收紧核心肌群并挤压肩胛骨。
将弹力带向下拉向胸部，以肘部引导发力。
运动到底部时稍作停顿，感受背阔肌的收缩。
慢慢释放弹力带的张力，回归起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and lift the band up in front of you until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带置于大腿前侧，掌心向下。保持手臂伸直，将弹力带向前上方举起，直至手臂与地面平行。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将弹力带降回起始位置。重复至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down.
Keep your arms straight and lift the band up in front of you until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带置于大腿前侧，掌心向下。
保持手臂伸直，将弹力带向前上方举起，直至手臂与地面平行。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将弹力带降回起始位置。
重复至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and slowly raise them forward until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带握在两大腿前侧，手掌向下。保持手臂伸直，缓慢向前抬起直至与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing down.
Keep your arms straight and slowly raise them forward until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带握在两大腿前侧，手掌向下。
保持手臂伸直，缓慢向前抬起直至与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place a resistance band just above your knees. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。将弹力带套在膝盖上方位置。收紧臀部肌肉和核心肌群。将脚后跟用力压向地面，同时将臀部抬离地面，在最高点处充分挤压臀部肌肉。在顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢地将臀部放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place a resistance band just above your knees.
Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Press your heels into the ground and lift your hips off the floor, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
将弹力带套在膝盖上方位置。
收紧臀部肌肉和核心肌群。
将脚后跟用力压向地面，同时将臀部抬离地面，在最高点处充分挤压臀部肌肉。
在顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢地将臀部放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 弹力带水平帕洛夫推压

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Stand perpendicular to the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the band handle with both hands and step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band. Bring your hands to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body. Engage your core and maintain a stable stance. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, pushing the band away from your body. Hold the extended position for a few seconds, focusing on maintaining tension in your core. Slowly bring your hands back to your chest, resisting the pull of the band. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部齐平的稳固锚点上。双脚与锚点垂直站立，间距与肩同宽。双手握住弹力带手柄，向后退步使弹力带产生张力。将双手收至胸部位置，肘部微屈并贴近身体。收紧核心肌群，保持身体稳定。双臂向前伸直，将弹力带向外推开。在推出的位置保持几秒钟，专注于保持核心肌群的张力。缓慢将双手收回胸部位置，对抗弹力带的拉力。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Stand perpendicular to the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the band handle with both hands and step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band.
Bring your hands to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body.
Engage your core and maintain a stable stance.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, pushing the band away from your body.
Hold the extended position for a few seconds, focusing on maintaining tension in your core.
Slowly bring your hands back to your chest, resisting the pull of the band.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部齐平的稳固锚点上。
双脚与锚点垂直站立，间距与肩同宽。
双手握住弹力带手柄，向后退步使弹力带产生张力。
将双手收至胸部位置，肘部微屈并贴近身体。
收紧核心肌群，保持身体稳定。
双臂向前伸直，将弹力带向外推开。
在推出的位置保持几秒钟，专注于保持核心肌群的张力。
缓慢将双手收回胸部位置，对抗弹力带的拉力。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band. Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, bringing your hands towards your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂在头顶上方握住弹力带。收紧腹部，同时抬起双腿和上半身，双手向双脚方向移动。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿和上半身放回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Engage your abs and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, bringing your hands towards your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂在头顶上方握住弹力带。
收紧腹部，同时抬起双腿和上半身，双手向双脚方向移动。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿和上半身放回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head. Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down. Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在头顶上方的牢固锚点上。跪下，用一只手握住弹力带，掌心向下。将手臂完全伸展举过头顶，保持肘部略微弯曲。收紧背阔肌，将弹力带向下拉向身体一侧，将肘部朝向肋骨方向移动。在底部停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力并返回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复动作，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down.
Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 将弹力带固定在头顶上方的牢固锚点上。
跪下，用一只手握住弹力带，掌心向下。
将手臂完全伸展举过头顶，保持肘部略微弯曲。
收紧背阔肌，将弹力带向下拉向身体一侧，将肘部朝向肋骨方向移动。
在底部停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力并返回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复动作，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Kneel down facing away from the anchor point and hold the band with both hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides. Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, bringing your hands towards your opposite hip. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部高度相齐的稳固锚点上。背对锚点跪下，双手握住弹力带，肘部弯曲并贴近身体两侧。收紧腹肌，慢慢将躯干向一侧扭转，双手向对侧臀部方向移动。稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。换另一侧重复动作。继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Kneel down facing away from the anchor point and hold the band with both hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides.
Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, bringing your hands towards your opposite hip.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部高度相齐的稳固锚点上。
背对锚点跪下，双手握住弹力带，肘部弯曲并贴近身体两侧。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将躯干向一侧扭转，双手向对侧臀部方向移动。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
换另一侧重复动作。
继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your legs straight and a resistance band looped around your feet. Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet together. Slowly rotate your knees outwards, away from each other, while keeping your feet together. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在地面上，双腿伸直，将弹力带套在双脚上。屈膝并将膝盖向胸部方向靠拢，同时保持双脚并拢。在双脚保持并拢的状态下，慢慢将膝盖向外旋转打开。旋转至最大幅度时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie on your back with your legs straight and a resistance band looped around your feet.
Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet together.
Slowly rotate your knees outwards, away from each other, while keeping your feet together.
Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在地面上，双腿伸直，将弹力带套在双脚上。
屈膝并将膝盖向胸部方向靠拢，同时保持双脚并拢。
在双脚保持并拢的状态下，慢慢将膝盖向外旋转打开。
旋转至最大幅度时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your feet together. Place the band around the arches of your feet and hold the ends of the band with your hands. Engaging your abs, lift both legs off the ground until they are perpendicular to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直并拢。将弹力带套在双脚脚背上，双手握住弹力带的两端。收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，直至双腿与地面垂直。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复动作至所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your feet together.
Place the band around the arches of your feet and hold the ends of the band with your hands.
Engaging your abs, lift both legs off the ground until they are perpendicular to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直并拢。
将弹力带套在双脚脚背上，双手握住弹力带的两端。
收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，直至双腿与地面垂直。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复动作至所需次数。

name.en: band one arm overhead biceps curl
name.zh: 单臂弹力带头上肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place one end of the band under your foot. Hold the other end of the band with your arm fully extended overhead, palm facing forward. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl your forearm towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将弹力带一端踩在脚下。手臂完全向上伸展握住弹力带另一端，掌心朝前。保持上臂固定不动，将小臂向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将小臂放回起始位置。完成所需次数后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place one end of the band under your foot.
Hold the other end of the band with your arm fully extended overhead, palm facing forward.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl your forearm towards your shoulder, squeezing your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将弹力带一端踩在脚下。
手臂完全向上伸展握住弹力带另一端，掌心朝前。
保持上臂固定不动，将小臂向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将小臂放回起始位置。
完成所需次数后换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: band one arm single leg split squat
name.zh: 弹力带单臂单腿分腿蹲

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles. Extend one leg forward and rest the top of your foot on a bench or step behind you. Hold onto a support with one hand for balance. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your knee in line with your toes. Push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，将阻力带套在脚踝处。一条腿向前伸直，脚背搭在身后方的长凳或台阶上。一只手握住支撑物以保持平衡。弯曲支撑腿，下蹲至适当位置，保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致。通过脚后跟发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。重复所需的次数，然后换腿进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles.
Extend one leg forward and rest the top of your foot on a bench or step behind you.
Hold onto a support with one hand for balance.
Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your knee in line with your toes.
Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚踝处。
将一条腿向前伸，脚背搭在身后的长凳或台阶上。
单手握住支撑物保持平衡。
弯曲支撑腿，身体下降至蹲姿，保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致。
通过脚跟发力回到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行，然后换腿。

name.en: band one arm standing low row
name.zh: 弹力带单臂站立低位划船

instructions.en: Attach the band to a stable anchor point at waist height. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the band with one hand, palm facing inward, and step back to create tension in the band. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pull the band towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部同高的稳定锚点上。双脚与肩同宽站立，面对锚点。单手握住弹力带，手掌朝内，然后向后退步以产生张力。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。将弹力带向腰部方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将弹力带释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Attach the band to a stable anchor point at waist height.
Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the band with one hand, palm facing inward, and step back to create tension in the band.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Pull the band towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the band back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部同高的稳定锚点上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面对锚点。
单手握住弹力带，手掌朝内，然后向后退步以产生张力。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
将弹力带向腰部方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将弹力带释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: band one arm twisting chest press

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at chest height. Stand with your side facing the anchor point and grab the band with one hand. Step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees. Bring your hand holding the band across your body, towards the opposite shoulder. While maintaining tension in the band, push your hand forward and away from your body, extending your arm. Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other hand.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在与胸部齐平的稳固锚点上，侧身站立面向锚点，单手握住弹力带。向后退步以在弹力带中产生张力，双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。将握住弹力带的手沿身体交叉移向对侧肩膀。在保持弹力带张力的同时，将手向前推并远离身体，伸展手臂。慢慢回到起始位置，按要求的重复次数进行练习。换另一侧手重复此练习。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at chest height.
Stand with your side facing the anchor point and grab the band with one hand.
Step away from the anchor point to create tension in the band.
Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Bring your hand holding the band across your body, towards the opposite shoulder.
While maintaining tension in the band, push your hand forward and away from your body, extending your arm.
Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other hand.
zh: 将弹力带固定在与胸部齐平的稳固锚点上。
侧身站立面向锚点，单手握住弹力带。
向后退步以在弹力带中产生张力。
双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
将握住弹力带的手沿身体交叉移向对侧肩膀。
在保持弹力带张力的同时，将手向前推并远离身体，伸展手臂。
慢慢回到起始位置，按要求的重复次数进行练习。
换另一侧手重复此练习。

name.en: band one arm twisting seated row
name.zh: 单臂扭转坐姿弹力带划船

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold the band with one hand and extend your arm fully in front of you. Keeping your back straight, pull the band towards your body by bending your elbow and squeezing your shoulder blades together. At the same time, twist your torso towards the side of the pulling arm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地上，背部保持挺直。用一只手握住弹力带，将手臂完全伸直在身前。保持背部挺直，通过弯曲肘部并将肩胛骨夹紧，将弹力带拉向身体。同时，向拉臂一侧扭转躯干。在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放弹力带的张力，恢复到起始位置。按所需次数重复后，换另一只手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold the band with one hand and extend your arm fully in front of you.
Keeping your back straight, pull the band towards your body by bending your elbow and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
At the same time, twist your torso towards the side of the pulling arm.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension in the band and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地上，背部保持挺直。
用一只手握住弹力带，将手臂完全伸直在身前。
保持背部挺直，通过弯曲肘部并将肩胛骨夹紧，将弹力带拉向身体。
同时，向拉臂一侧扭转躯干。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放弹力带的张力，恢复到起始位置。
按所需次数重复后，换另一只手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a resistance band to a sturdy anchor point at ground level. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step forward to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent. Hinge at the hips and push your glutes back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Drive your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在地面高度的稳固锚点上。背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。向前迈步使弹力带产生张力，膝盖保持微屈。屈髋向前，臀部向后推，同时保持膝盖略微弯曲。将躯干下倾直至与地面平行，感受腘绳肌的拉伸。通过向前驱动髋部并用力收紧臀肌回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a resistance band to a sturdy anchor point at ground level.
Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step forward to create tension in the band, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Hinge at the hips and push your glutes back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees.
Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Drive your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在地面高度的稳固锚点上。
背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。
向前迈步产生弹力带张力，膝盖保持微屈。
屈髋向前，臀部向后推，同时保持膝盖略微弯曲。
将躯干下倾直至与地面平行，感受腘绳肌的拉伸。
通过向前驱动髋部并用力收紧臀肌回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point. Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带牢固地固定在一个稳定的锚点上。仰卧平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住弹力带，双臂向上伸直指向天花板。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲，直到躯干呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降低回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach the band securely to a stable anchor point.
Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the band with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带牢固地固定在一个稳定的锚点上。
