仰卧平躺，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住弹力带，双臂向上伸直指向天花板。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲，直到躯干呈45度角。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降低回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a stationary object at chest height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands in front of you. Keep your arms straight and lift them out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在与胸部齐高的固定物体上。双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带放在身体前方。保持手臂伸直，向身体两侧平举至与地面平行。在动作顶端时用力挤压肩胛骨。缓慢将手臂放下恢复至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the band to a stationary object at chest height.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands in front of you.
Keep your arms straight and lift them out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在与胸部齐高的固定物体上。
双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带放在身体前方。
保持手臂伸直，向身体两侧平举至与地面平行。
在动作顶端时用力挤压肩胛骨。
缓慢将手臂放下恢复至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the band with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and wrap it around your fingers. Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上。握住弹力带，采用正握姿势（掌心向下），将其绕过手指。将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬空在膝盖边缘。慢慢向上弯曲手腕，同时用力挤压前臂。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手腕降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold the band with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and wrap it around your fingers.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上。
握住弹力带，采用正握姿势（掌心向下），将其绕过手指。
将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬空在膝盖边缘。
慢慢向上弯曲手腕，同时用力挤压前臂。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手腕降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Place a resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees. Keep your knees bent at a 90-degree angle and your feet shoulder-width apart. Engage your glutes and slowly rotate your knees outward, pushing against the resistance of the band. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。将弹力带套在大腿上方、膝盖上方位置。保持膝盖弯曲90度，双脚与肩同宽。收紧臀部肌肉，缓慢地将膝盖向外旋转，对抗弹力带的阻力。在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Place a resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Keep your knees bent at a 90-degree angle and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Engage your glutes and slowly rotate your knees outward, pushing against the resistance of the band.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
将弹力带套在大腿上方、膝盖上方位置。
保持膝盖弯曲90度，双脚与肩同宽。
收紧臀部肌肉，缓慢地将膝盖向外旋转，对抗弹力带的阻力。
在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight. Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands. Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿伸直于身前，背部保持挺直。将弹力带绕在腰部，双手握住两端。收紧腹肌，身体慢慢向一侧扭转，保持背部挺直，双脚踩在地面上。在扭转末端稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。重复向另一侧扭转，交替进行两侧扭转，完成目标次数。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your back straight.
Wrap the band around your waist and hold the ends with both hands.
Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight and your feet on the ground.
Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat the twist to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿伸直于身前，背部保持挺直。
将弹力带绕在腰部，双手握住两端。
收紧腹肌，身体慢慢向一侧扭转，保持背部挺直，双脚踩在地面上。
在扭转末端稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
重复向另一侧扭转。
交替进行两侧扭转，完成目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet. Hold the band with your palms facing forward and raise your hands to shoulder height, elbows bent. Press the band overhead, fully extending your arms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下。双手握住弹力带，掌心朝前，将双手举至肩高，手肘弯曲。将弹力带向上推举，手臂完全伸展。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将弹力带降至肩高。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Hold the band with your palms facing forward and raise your hands to shoulder height, elbows bent.
Press the band overhead, fully extending your arms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下。
双手握住弹力带，掌心朝前，将双手举至肩高，手肘弯曲。
将弹力带向上推举，手臂完全伸展。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将弹力带降至肩高。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet, holding the ends with your hands. Keep your arms straight and relaxed, and let the band hang in front of your thighs. Engage your traps by shrugging your shoulders upward, lifting the band as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下，双手握住带子两端。保持手臂伸直放松，让弹力带自然垂于大腿前方。通过向上耸肩来激活斜方肌，将弹力带尽可能抬高。保持收缩片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet, holding the ends with your hands.
Keep your arms straight and relaxed, and let the band hang in front of your thighs.
Engage your traps by shrugging your shoulders upward, lifting the band as high as possible.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下，双手握住带子两端。
保持手臂伸直放松，让弹力带自然垂于大腿前方。
通过向上耸肩来激活斜方肌，将弹力带尽可能抬高。
保持收缩片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 弹力带侧向肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground. Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still. Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带，掌心向下。将双臂向两侧伸直，与地面保持平行。保持上臂静止，缓慢弯曲肘部，将双手向肩部方向收回。稍作停顿后，缓慢将双臂伸展回起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down.
Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground.
Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still.
Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带，掌心向下。
将双臂向两侧伸直，与地面保持平行。
保持上臂静止，缓慢弯曲肘部，将双手向肩部方向收回。
稍作停顿后，缓慢将双臂伸展回起始姿势。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your left foot. Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed. Slowly raise your left heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your left heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the right leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，将弹力带套在左脚前脚掌。如需要，可握住稳固物体以保持平衡。缓慢将左脚后跟抬离地面，将身体重量支撑在前脚掌上。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将左脚后跟放回起始位置。重复所需次数后，换右腿进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your left foot.
Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Slowly raise your left heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your left heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the right leg.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，将弹力带套在左脚前脚掌。
如需要，可握住稳固物体以保持平衡。
缓慢将左脚后跟抬离地面，将身体重量支撑在前脚掌上。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将左脚后跟放回起始位置。
重复所需次数后，换右腿进行。

name.en: band single leg reverse calf raise

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your foot. Hold onto a stable object for balance. Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚掌前侧。抓住一个稳固的物体以保持平衡。慢慢将脚跟抬离地面，将身体重量提至前脚掌。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下回到起始位置。按要求的次数重复，然后换另一条腿进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place the band around the ball of your foot.
Hold onto a stable object for balance.
Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the ball of your foot.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚掌前侧。
抓住一个稳固的物体以保持平衡。
慢慢将脚跟抬离地面，将身体重量提至前脚掌。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下回到起始位置。
按要求的次数重复，然后换另一条腿进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles. Take a big step forward with your right foot and a smaller step back with your left foot. Bend your knees and lower your body until your right thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your left knee slightly above the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚踝处。右脚向前大步迈出，左脚向后小步撤回。弯曲膝盖并下蹲，直到右大腿与地面平行，左膝略微悬空于地面之上。通过右脚跟发力推动身体返回起始姿势。换另一侧重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place a resistance band around your ankles.
Take a big step forward with your right foot and a smaller step back with your left foot.
Bend your knees and lower your body until your right thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your left knee slightly above the ground.
Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚踝处。
右脚向前大步迈出，左脚向后小步撤回。
弯曲膝盖并下蹲，直到右大腿与地面平行，左膝略微悬空于地面之上。
通过右脚跟发力推动身体返回起始姿势。
换另一侧重复进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, with the band placed just above your knees. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, push your hips back and bend your knees to lower into a squat position. Make sure your knees are tracking over your toes and your weight is in your heels. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在膝盖上方。保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，将臀部向后推并屈膝下蹲至深蹲姿势。注意确保膝盖方向与脚尖一致，重心落在脚后跟上。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将自己推回起始姿势。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, with the band placed just above your knees.
Keeping your chest up and core engaged, push your hips back and bend your knees to lower into a squat position.
Make sure your knees are tracking over your toes and your weight is in your heels.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在膝盖上方。
保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，将臀部向后推并屈膝下蹲至深蹲姿势。
确保膝盖方向与脚尖保持一致，重心落在脚后跟上。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力推回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you. Bend your knees and lower into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest lifted. From the squat position, pull the band handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部同高的牢固锚点上。双脚与肩同宽站立，面对锚点。双手握住弹力带手柄，掌心相对，手臂向前伸直。屈膝下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。从深蹲姿势开始，将弹力带手柄拉向身体，收缩肩胛骨。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，回到起始位置。按要求的次数重复练习。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you.
Bend your knees and lower into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest lifted.
From the squat position, pull the band handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在与腰部同高的牢固锚点上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面对锚点。
双手握住弹力带手柄，掌心相对，手臂向前伸直。
屈膝下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。
从深蹲姿势开始，将弹力带手柄拉向身体，收缩肩胛骨。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，回到起始位置。
按要求的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the band with both hands and bring it up to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body. Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在腰部高度的稳固锚点上。背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住弹力带，将其拉至胸部位置，保持肘部弯曲并贴近身体。收紧腹肌，慢慢向前卷腹，将胸部向膝盖方向靠近。在卷腹的最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point at waist height.
Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the band with both hands and bring it up to your chest, keeping your elbows bent and close to your body.
Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在腰部高度的稳固锚点上。
背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住弹力带，将其拉至胸部位置，保持肘部弯曲并贴近身体。
收紧腹肌，慢慢向前卷腹，将胸部向膝盖方向靠近。
在卷腹的最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet. Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pull the band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下。双手握住弹力带手柄，掌心相对，双臂向前伸展。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。将弹力带拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨。在顶部短暂停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Hold the band handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended in front of you.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Pull the band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下。
双手握住弹力带手柄，掌心相对，双臂向前伸展。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
将弹力带拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在顶部短暂停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper back, crossing it in front of your chest. Hold the ends of the band with your hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides. Engage your abs and twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带绕过背的上部，在胸前交叉。双手握住弹力带的两端，保持肘部弯曲并靠近身体两侧。收紧腹肌，将躯干向一侧扭转，同时将肘部向对侧膝盖方向靠近。稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。另一侧重复同样的动作。继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper back, crossing it in front of your chest.
Hold the ends of the band with your hands, keeping your elbows bent and close to your sides.
Engage your abs and twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带绕过背部上方，在胸前交叉。
双手握住弹力带的两端，保持肘部弯曲并贴近身体两侧。
收紧腹肌，将躯干向一侧扭转，同时将肘部向对侧膝盖方向靠近。
稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。
另一侧重复同样的动作。
继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Place a band around your thighs, just above your knees. Stand facing a step or platform with your feet hip-width apart. Step up onto the platform with your right foot, pushing through your heel. Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight. Lower your left foot back down to the ground. Repeat with your left foot stepping up onto the platform. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带套在大腿膝部上方，双脚与髋同宽站立，面向踏板或平台。右脚踏上平台，通过脚跟发力将身体撑起，左腿向后伸直并保持。然后左脚落回地面。换左脚踏上平台继续上述动作。左右腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Place a band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Stand facing a step or platform with your feet hip-width apart.
Step up onto the platform with your right foot, pushing through your heel.
Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Lower your left foot back down to the ground.
Repeat with your left foot stepping up onto the platform.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带套在大腿膝部上方
双脚与髋同宽站立，面向踏板或平台
右脚踏上平台，通过脚跟发力
左腿向后伸直并保持
左脚落回地面
换左脚踏上平台继续上述动作
左右腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your ankles. Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground. As you lower, push your hips back and allow your knees to bend slightly. Lower the band towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your upper body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚踝处。双手在双腿前握住弹力带，掌心朝向身体。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，以髋关节为轴心，慢慢将上半身向前下方下降。下降过程中，将臀部向后推，同时膝盖略微弯曲。将弹力带下放至接近地面，感受腘绳肌的拉伸。在最低点稍作停顿，然后收紧臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将上半身抬起回到起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your ankles.
Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground.
As you lower, push your hips back and allow your knees to bend slightly.
Lower the band towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your upper body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚踝处。
双手在双腿前握住弹力带，掌心朝向身体。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，以髋关节为轴心，慢慢将上半身向前下方下降。
下降过程中，将臀部向后推，同时膝盖略微弯曲。
将弹力带下放至接近地面，感受腘绳肌的拉伸。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后收紧臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将上半身抬起回到起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: band straight back stiff leg deadlift

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs. Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground. Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在大腿上部。双手在身体前方握住弹力带，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，膝盖微屈，以髋关节为轴心俯身，将弹力带向地面方向下降。下降过程中感受腘绳肌的拉伸。通过臀肌和腘绳肌的发力，将身体抬起回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs.
Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body.
Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground.
Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在大腿上部。
双手在身体前方握住弹力带，手掌朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，膝盖微屈，以髋关节为轴心俯身，将弹力带向地面方向下降。
下降过程中感受腘绳肌的拉伸。
通过臀肌和腘绳肌的发力，将身体抬起回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet. Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight. Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees. Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted. Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚部。双手握住弹力带，手掌朝内，手臂保持伸直。收紧核心，膝盖保持微微弯曲。以髋关节为轴心缓慢前倾，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。腿部保持伸直，将弹力带向地面方向下放。在最低点稍停，然后通过臀部和腘绳肌的发力返回起始姿势。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet.
Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight.
Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees.
Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted.
Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带套在脚部。
双手握住弹力带，手掌朝内，手臂保持伸直。
收紧核心，膝盖保持微微弯曲。
以髋关节为轴心缓慢前倾，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。
腿部保持伸直，将弹力带向地面方向下放。
在最低点稍停，然后通过臀部和腘绳肌的发力返回起始姿势。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet. Hold the band handles at shoulder height with your palms facing forward. Engage your core and press the band overhead, fully extending your arms. As you press, twist your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable. Pause for a moment at the top, then return to the starting position. Repeat the press and twist on the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下。双手握住弹力带把手，置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。收紧核心，将弹力带向上推举，手臂完全伸直。推举的同时，身体向一侧扭转，保持髋部稳定。在顶端稍作停留，然后回到起始位置。换另一侧重复推举和扭转动作。继续交替进行直到完成目标重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Hold the band handles at shoulder height with your palms facing forward.
Engage your core and press the band overhead, fully extending your arms.
As you press, twist your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable.
Pause for a moment at the top, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the press and twist on the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带踩在脚下。
双手握住弹力带把手，置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。
收紧核心，将弹力带向上推举，手臂完全伸直。
推举的同时，身体向一侧扭转，保持髋部稳定。
在顶端稍作停留，然后回到起始位置。
换另一侧重复推举和扭转动作。
继续交替进行直到完成目标重复次数。

name.en: band two legs calf raise - (band under both legs) v. 2

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a resistance band under both feet. Hold the ends of the band with your hands for stability. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带置于双脚下方，双手握住弹力带末端以保持身体稳定。用小腿肌发力，尽可能将脚跟抬离地面，在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟降回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a resistance band under both feet.
Hold the ends of the band with your hands for stability.
Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带置于双脚下方。
双手握住弹力带两端以保持身体稳定。
用小腿肌发力，尽可能将脚跟抬离地面。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your lats and pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在高处的锚点上，例如引体向上杆或牢固的横梁。面对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。反手握住弹力带，双手间距略宽于肩。双臂完全上举，肘部略微弯曲。收缩背阔肌，将弹力带向胸部方向下拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始姿势。重复进行所需次数。

en: Attach the band to a high anchor point, such as a pull-up bar or sturdy beam.
Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the band with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Engage your lats and pull the band down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将弹力带固定在高处的锚点上，例如引体向上杆或牢固的横梁。
面对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。
反手握住弹力带，双手间距略宽于肩。
双臂完全上举，肘部略微弯曲。
收缩背阔肌，将弹力带向胸部方向下拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始姿势。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band. Engaging your abs, lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂举过头顶握住弹力带。收紧腹肌，同时将双腿和上半身抬离地面，双手向脚尖方向伸展。在顶峰位置稍作停留，然后慢慢将双腿和上半身放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs straight and your arms extended overhead, holding the band.
Engaging your abs, lift your legs and upper body off the ground simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂举过头顶握住弹力带。
收紧腹肌，同时将双腿和上半身抬离地面，双手向脚尖方向伸展。
在顶峰位置稍作停留，然后慢慢将双腿和上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 弹力带垂直站姿帕洛夫推压

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height. Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band. Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height. Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms. Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带缠绕在胸口高度的牢固物体上。双手握住弹力带，向锚点方向移动产生张力。身体侧对锚点站立，侧面朝向弹力带。双臂向前伸直，双手保持在胸口高度。收紧核心，将弹力带从胸口向外推出，双臂完全伸直。保持姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将弹力带回至胸口。重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and wrap the band around a sturdy object at chest height.
Hold the band with both hands and step away from the anchor point, creating tension in the band.
Position yourself perpendicular to the anchor point, with your side facing the band.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your hands at chest height.
Engage your core and press the band away from your chest, fully extending your arms.
Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly bring the band back towards your chest.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将弹力带缠绕在胸口高度的牢固物体上。
双手握住弹力带，向锚点方向移动，产生弹力带的张力。
身体侧对锚点站立，侧面朝向弹力带。
双臂向前伸直，双手保持在胸口高度。
收紧核心，将弹力带从胸口向外推出，双臂完全伸直。
保持姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将弹力带回至胸口。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the band with both hands, palms facing up, and rest your forearms on your thighs. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住弹力带，掌心朝上，将前臂放在大腿上。慢慢向上弯曲手腕，同时用力挤压前臂。在顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢将手腕放回起始位置。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold the band with both hands, palms facing up, and rest your forearms on your thighs.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上
双手握住弹力带，掌心朝上，将前臂放在大腿上
慢慢向上弯曲手腕，同时用力挤压前臂
在顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢将手腕放回起始位置
重复进行所需的次数

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing inwards. Keep your arms straight and lift them up and out to the sides, forming a 'Y' shape with your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带置于大腿前侧，手掌朝向身体内侧。保持手臂伸直，向身体两侧向上举起，形成Y字形。在动作最高点时用力收紧肩胛骨，然后缓慢将手臂放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing inwards.
Keep your arms straight and lift them up and out to the sides, forming a 'Y' shape with your body.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带置于大腿前侧，手掌朝向身体内侧
保持手臂伸直，向身体两侧向上举起，形成Y字形
在动作最高点时用力收紧肩胛骨
缓慢将手臂放回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the barbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双脚与肩同宽，双手各持一个杠铃，掌心朝前。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌将杠铃弯起。继续将杠铃举起，直至肱二头肌完全收缩且杠铃达到肩部高度。在动作顶端稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓缓将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数交替双臂进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the barbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the barbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
zh: 身体直立，双脚与肩同宽，双手各持一个杠铃，掌心朝前。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌将杠铃弯起。
继续将杠铃举起，直至肱二头肌完全收缩且杠铃达到肩部高度。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓缓将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数交替双臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, just below your collarbone. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, keeping your elbows up and your upper arms parallel to the ground. Lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上胸部锁骨下方位置。双手采用正握握住杠铃，保持肘部向上抬起，上臂与地面平行。通过弯曲膝盖和髋部将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。在深蹲底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, just below your collarbone.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, keeping your elbows up and your upper arms parallel to the ground.
Lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上胸部锁骨下方位置。
双手采用正握握住杠铃，保持肘部向上抬起，上臂与地面平行。
通过弯曲膝盖和髋部将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。
在深蹲底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。将杠铃从架子上取下，置于胸部正上方，双臂完全伸直。慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部略微内收。当杠铃轻触胸部时稍作停顿，然后通过伸直双臂将杠铃推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。
将杠铃从架子上取下，置于胸部正上方，双臂完全伸直。
慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部略微内收。
当杠铃轻触胸部时稍作停顿。
通过伸直双臂将杠铃推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up a barbell on a squat rack at chest height. Stand facing away from the rack, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and step back, ensuring your feet are still shoulder-width apart. Lower your body down into a squat, keeping your knees in line with your toes. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃放置在胸部高度的深蹲架上。背对深蹲架站立，双脚与肩同宽。弯曲膝盖，身体下蹲呈深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部向上。用正握握杠，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架上取下并向后迈一步，确保双脚仍与肩同宽。下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力站起回到起始位置。重复进行至所需的重复次数。

en: Set up a barbell on a squat rack at chest height.
Stand facing away from the rack, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and step back, ensuring your feet are still shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body down into a squat, keeping your knees in line with your toes.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃放置在胸部高度的深蹲架上
背对深蹲架站立，双脚与肩同宽
弯曲膝盖，身体下蹲呈深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部向上
用正握握杠，握距略宽于肩宽
将杠铃从架上取下并向后迈一步，确保双脚仍与肩同宽
下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力站起回到起始位置
重复进行至所需的重复次数

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest. Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在健身凳上，头部位于一端，双脚放在地面上。用与肩同宽的握距握住杠铃，将双臂伸直举至胸部上方。将杠铃下降至头后方，同时保持手臂略微弯曲。暂停片刻，然后将杠铃举回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Lower the barbell behind your head while keeping your arms slightly bent.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，头部在一端，脚放在地板上。
用与肩同宽的握距握住杠铃，将手臂伸直举至胸部上方。
将杠铃降低至头后，同时保持手臂微微弯曲。
暂停片刻，然后将杠铃举回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Bend forward at the hips while keeping your back straight and chest up. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Pull the barbell towards your lower chest by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。髋关节前屈，保持背部挺直，胸部向上。双手以正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。通过收缩肩胛骨并充分挤压背部肌群，将杠铃拉向胸部下方。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Bend forward at the hips while keeping your back straight and chest up.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Pull the barbell towards your lower chest by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
髋关节前屈，保持背部挺直，胸部向上。
双手以正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
通过收缩肩胛骨并充分挤压背部肌群，将杠铃拉向胸部下方。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 杠铃二头肌弯举（臂托辅助）

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping your elbows close to your torso. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽笔直站立，双手握住杠铃，掌心向上，采用反握姿势。将上臂靠在臂托上，手肘贴近身体两侧。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯曲杠铃，并收缩肱二头肌。继续将杠铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部水平。保持收缩姿势片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping your elbows close to your torso.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽笔直站立，双手握住杠铃，掌心向上，采用反握姿势。
将上臂靠在臂托上，手肘贴近身体两侧。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯曲杠铃，并收缩肱二头肌。
继续将杠铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部水平。
保持收缩姿势片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the floor in front of you. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Drive through your heels and extend your hips and knees to lift the barbell off the floor, keeping it close to your body. As the barbell reaches your thighs, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the barbell up towards your chest. As the barbell reaches chest height, quickly drop under it and catch it at shoulder level, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up. From the catch position, press the barbell overhead by extending your arms and pushing the barbell straight up. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃放在身前地面上。屈膝并以髋部为铰链点俯身，双手采用正握握法握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。脚后跟发力蹬地，伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃提离地面，保持杠铃贴近身体。当杠铃上升至大腿高度时，迅速伸展髋关节，耸肩，将杠铃向上拉向胸部。当杠铃到达胸部高度时，快速下蹲钻入杠铃下方，在肩部高度接住杠铃，肘部指向前方，掌心向上。从承接位置开始，通过伸展手臂将杠铃向上推举过头顶。将杠铃放回起始位置，重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the floor in front of you.
Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Drive through your heels and extend your hips and knees to lift the barbell off the floor, keeping it close to your body.
As the barbell reaches your thighs, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the barbell up towards your chest.
As the barbell reaches chest height, quickly drop under it and catch it at shoulder level, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up.
From the catch position, press the barbell overhead by extending your arms and pushing the barbell straight up.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃放在身前地面上。
屈膝并以髋部为铰链点俯身，双手采用正握握法握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。
脚后跟发力蹬地，伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃提离地面，保持杠铃贴近身体。
当杠铃上升至大腿高度时，迅速伸展髋关节，耸肩，将杠铃向上拉向胸部。
当杠铃到达胸部高度时，快速下蹲钻入杠铃下方，在肩部高度接住杠铃，肘部指向前方，掌心向上。
从承接位置开始，通过伸展手臂将杠铃向上推举过头顶。
将杠铃放回起始位置，重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, with your elbows pointing forward. Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, as if you are sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower down, making sure your knees do not go past your toes. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先，双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上胸部前方，手肘向前支撑以固定杠铃。屈膝同时向后推送臀部，身体下降如同坐在椅子上。下降过程中保持胸部挺起和背部平直，确保膝盖不超过脚尖。继续下蹲直到大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力蹬地起身，伸展髋关节和膝关节。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper chest, with your elbows pointing forward.
Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, as if you are sitting back into a chair.
Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower down, making sure your knees do not go past your toes.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上胸部前方，手肘向前支撑固定杠铃。
屈膝同时向后推送臀部，身体下降如同坐在椅子上。
下降过程中保持胸部挺起和背部平直，确保膝盖不超过脚尖。
继续下蹲直到大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力蹬地起身，伸展髋关节和膝关节。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手以窄握姿势握住杠铃，握距略窄于肩宽。将杠铃从架上取下，慢慢下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿。然后将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手以窄握姿势握住杠铃，握距略窄于肩宽。
将杠铃从架上取下，慢慢下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿。
将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，身体保持直立，双手采用反握方式握杠，手掌朝前。将肘部贴近身体两侧，呼气的同时向上弯举杠铃并收缩肱二头肌。继续将杠铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩且杠铃达到肩部高度。保持收缩姿势稍作停顿，充分感受肱二头肌的挤压。然后吸气，缓慢将杠铃放下回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing forward.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale as you slowly begin to lower the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握方式握住杠铃，手掌朝前，身体保持直立。
将肘部贴近身体两侧，呼气的同时向上弯举杠铃，收缩肱二头肌。
继续将杠铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部高度。
保持收缩姿势稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃放下回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower your torso and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and chest lifted as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees. As you stand up straight, squeeze your glutes and keep your core engaged. Lower the barbell back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于身前地面上。屈膝并以髋关节为铰链点俯身，用正握方式握杠，双手间距略宽于肩。保持背部挺直、胸部挺起，通过脚跟发力将杠铃从地面拉起，同时伸展髋关节和膝关节。当身体完全直立时，用力收紧臀部并保持核心肌群激活。通过屈髋屈膝将杠铃放回地面，始终保持背部平直。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower your torso and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and chest lifted as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
As you stand up straight, squeeze your glutes and keep your core engaged.
Lower the barbell back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于身前地面上。
屈膝并以髋关节为铰链点俯身，用正握方式握杠，双手间距略宽于肩。
保持背部挺直、胸部挺起，通过脚跟发力将杠铃从地面拉起，同时伸展髋关节和膝关节。
当身体完全直立时，用力收紧臀部并保持核心肌群激活。
通过屈髋屈膝将杠铃放回地面，始终保持背部平直。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺于下斜凳上，双脚固定好，头部位置低于髋部。双手采用正握，握距略宽于肩部握住杠铃。将杠铃从架子上取下，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺于下斜凳上，双脚固定好，头部位置低于髋部。
双手采用正握，握距略宽于肩部握住杠铃。
将杠铃从架子上取下，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 杠铃下斜弯臂仰卧上拉

instructions.en: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured. Hold a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest. Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms slightly bent. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by contracting your lats. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，头部低于臀部，双脚固定以保持稳定。用正握（掌心朝下）握住杠铃，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。控制地将杠铃下放至头后方的位置，保持手臂略微弯曲。稍作停顿，然后通过收缩背阔肌将杠铃拉回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Hold a barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by contracting your lats.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，头部低于臀部，双脚固定以保持稳定。
用正握（掌心朝下）握住杠铃，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。
控制地将杠铃下放至头后方的位置，保持手臂略微弯曲。
稍作停顿，然后通过收缩背阔肌将杠铃拉回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell decline close grip to skull press
name.zh: 杠铃下斜窄距颅骨推举

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a barbell with a close grip. Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to press the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，确保头部低于脚部，双手以窄距握杠。通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃下放至前额附近，同时保持上臂位置固定。稍作停顿后，伸展手臂将杠铃推回起始位置。重复至目标次数。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a barbell with a close grip.
Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to press the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，头部低于脚部，双手以窄距握住杠铃。
通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃下放至前额附近，同时保持上臂位置固定。
稍作停顿后，伸展手臂将杠铃推回起始位置。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured. Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, feeling a stretch in your chest and shoulders. Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧于下斜凳上，将头部置于低于臀部的位置，双脚固定以保持稳定。双手以正握方式握住杠铃（掌心朝下），手间距略宽于肩宽。将双臂伸直举至胸部上方，肘部保持轻微弯曲。然后沿弧线轨迹将杠铃下移至头后，同时感受胸部和肩部的拉伸。稍作停顿后，沿原路径将杠铃返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, feeling a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the motion.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧于下斜凳上，确保头部低于臀部位置，双脚固定在凳上。
双手正握杠铃（掌心朝下），手间距略宽于肩宽。
将双臂伸直举至胸部上方，保持肘部轻微弯曲。
沿弧线轨迹将杠铃下移至头后，感受胸部和肩部的拉伸感。
稍作停顿后，沿原路径将杠铃返回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复以上动作。

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定好，确保头部位置低于髋部。采用比肩宽的握距握住杠铃。将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持手肘向身体两侧展开。将杠铃向上推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定好，确保头部位置低于髋部。
采用比肩宽的握距握住杠铃。
将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持手肘向身体两侧展开。
将杠铃向上推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 杠铃下斜宽握仰卧上拉

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured. Hold a barbell with a wide grip and extend your arms straight above your chest. Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，头部低于臀部位置，双脚固定好。双手以宽握方式握住杠铃，双臂向上伸直举至胸部正上方。保持手臂伸直，缓慢将杠铃下放至头后。在最低点稍作停顿，然后用力将杠铃拉回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips and your feet secured.
Hold a barbell with a wide grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner, keeping your arms straight.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，头部低于臀部位置，双脚固定好。
双手以宽握方式握住杠铃，双臂向上伸直举至胸部正上方。
保持手臂伸直，缓慢将杠铃下放至头后。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃拉回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell up towards your chest by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握姿势握住杠铃，手掌朝上。让杠铃在手臂伸直的状态下悬垂于大腿前侧。保持上臂固定不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向胸部方向弯举。在顶端短暂停顿后，缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。重复进行至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the barbell up towards your chest by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握姿势握住杠铃，手掌朝上。
让杠铃在手臂伸直的状态下悬垂于大腿前侧。
保持上臂固定不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向胸部方向弯举。
在顶端短暂停顿后，缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
重复进行至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Place a barbell on the floor in front of you. Stand with the balls of your feet on the edge of the barbell, with your heels hanging off. Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed. Raise your heels as high as possible, using your calves to lift your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃放在身前的地板上。站立时双脚前脚掌踩在杠铃边缘，脚跟悬空。如需保持平衡，可握住稳定的物体。用小腿发力尽可能高地抬起脚跟，在最高点稍停，然后缓慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复至所需的重复次数。

en: Place a barbell on the floor in front of you.
Stand with the balls of your feet on the edge of the barbell, with your heels hanging off.
Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Raise your heels as high as possible, using your calves to lift your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃放在身前的地板上。
站立时双脚前脚掌踩在杠铃边缘，脚跟悬空。
如需保持平衡，可握住稳定的物体。
用小腿发力尽可能高地抬起脚跟。
在最高点稍停，然后缓慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in front of your chest with your hands shoulder-width apart, elbows pointing forward. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖微微外展站立。将杠铃置于胸前，双手间距与肩同宽，手肘向前伸直。收紧核心并保持胸部挺起，屈膝屈髋向下蹲，臀部向后坐。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能下蹲。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力站起，回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell in front of your chest with your hands shoulder-width apart, elbows pointing forward.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖微微外展站立。
将杠铃置于胸前，双手间距与肩同宽，手肘向前伸直。
收紧核心并保持胸部挺起，屈膝屈髋向下蹲，臀部向后坐。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能下蹲。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力站起，回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃，位于大腿前方。保持手臂伸直，将杠铃向前上方举起至肩部高度。顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。按所需次数重复完成动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃置于大腿前方。
保持手臂伸直，将杠铃向前上方举起至肩部高度。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 杠铃前平举和仰卧上拉

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and raise the barbell in front of you until it reaches shoulder height. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Next, lower the barbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃，掌心向下。保持手臂伸直，将杠铃向前举起至肩膀高度。顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃放下回到起始位置。接下来，将杠铃从头后方放下，保持手臂伸直。底部稍作停留，然后将杠铃举回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your arms straight and raise the barbell in front of you until it reaches shoulder height.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Next, lower the barbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃，掌心向下。
保持手臂伸直，将杠铃向前举起至肩膀高度。
顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃放下回到起始位置。
接下来，将杠铃从头后方放下，保持手臂伸直。
底部稍作停留，然后将杠铃举回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and shoulders. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外旋。双手握住杠铃放在肩部前方，杠铃置于锁骨和肩部上方。收紧核心，保持胸部挺起，同时身体下蹲，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适范围内尽可能低。底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟用力蹬地回到起始姿势。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and shoulders.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先，双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外旋。
将杠铃放在肩部前方，杠铃置于锁骨和肩膀上。
收紧核心，保持胸部挺起，身体向下蹲成深蹲姿势，臀部向后推并弯曲膝盖。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适范围内尽可能低。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟用力蹬地回到起始姿势。
根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down. Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。将杠铃置于上背部，杠铃靠在斜方肌或后三角肌上。收紧核心，保持胸部挺起，开始屈膝屈髋下蹲。膝盖和髋关节同时弯曲，臀部向后向下坐，仿佛坐在椅子上。一直蹲到大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚后跟上。通过脚后跟发力向上蹲起，伸展髋关节和膝关节。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。
将杠铃置于上背部，杠铃靠在斜方肌或后三角肌上。
收紧核心，保持胸部挺起，开始屈膝屈髋下蹲。
膝盖和髋关节同时弯曲，臀部向后向下坐，仿佛坐在椅子上。
一直蹲到大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。
保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚后跟上。
通过脚后跟发力向上蹲起，伸展髋关节和膝关节。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down. Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。将杠铃横跨放在上背部，杠铃支撑在斜方肌或后三角肌上。收紧核心，下降身体时保持胸部抬起。膝盖和髋部弯曲，将臀部向后向下推，就像坐在椅子上一样。下蹲直到大腿与地面平行或略低。保持膝盖与脚尖对齐，重心落在脚后跟上。通过脚后跟发力站起身，伸展髋部和膝盖。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
将杠铃横跨放在上背部，杠铃支撑在斜方肌或后三角肌上。
收紧核心，下降身体时保持胸部抬起。
膝盖和髋部弯曲，将臀部向后向下推，就像坐在椅子上一样。
下蹲直到大腿与地面平行或略低。
保持膝盖与脚尖对齐，重心落在脚后跟上。
通过脚后跟发力站起身，伸展髋部和膝盖。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down. Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。将杠铃横跨置于上背部，支撑于斜方肌或后三角肌位置。收紧核心肌群，保持挺胸，开始向下蹲。膝关节和髋关节同时弯曲，臀部向后向下移动，如同坐在椅子上一般。继续下蹲直到大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚跟处。通过脚跟发力向上起身，伸展髋关节和膝关节至起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
将杠铃横跨置于上背部，支撑于斜方肌或后三角肌位置。
收紧核心肌群，保持挺胸，开始向下蹲。
膝关节和髋关节同时弯曲，臀部向后向下移动，如同坐在椅子上一般。
继续下蹲直到大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。
保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚跟处。
通过脚跟发力向上起身，伸展髋关节和膝关节至起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the barbell for stability. Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。将杠铃置于双肘弯处，双手握住杠铃以保持稳定。收紧核心肌群，挺胸，将臀部向后向下坐入深蹲姿势。保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚后跟上。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能下蹲。通过脚后跟发力站起，在动作顶端收紧臀部。重复至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the barbell for stability.
Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position.
Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
将杠铃置于双肘弯处，双手握住杠铃以保持稳定。
收紧核心肌群，挺胸，将臀部向后向下坐入深蹲姿势。
保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚后跟上。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能下蹲。
通过脚后跟发力站起，在动作顶端收紧臀部。
重复至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by lying flat on your back on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands. Engage your glutes and core muscles, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。将杠铃横放在髋部上方，双手握紧杠铃。收紧臀肌和核心肌群，然后将髋部抬离地面，直至身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，同时用力收缩臀肌。缓慢将髋部降回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Start by lying flat on your back on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands.
Engage your glutes and core muscles, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地上。
将杠铃横放在髋部上方，双手握紧杠铃。
收紧臀肌和核心肌群，然后将髋部抬离地面，直至身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
在顶端稍作停顿，同时用力收缩臀肌。
缓慢将髋部降回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: barbell glute bridge two legs on bench (male)
name.zh: 杠铃臀桥（双脚在凳上）男性版

instructions.en: Start by sitting on the edge of a bench with your upper back resting against it and your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart. Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands. Engage your glutes and core muscles, then press through your heels to lift your hips off the bench, creating a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为坐在凳子边缘，上背部靠在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，间距与髋同宽。将杠铃横放在髋部上方，双手牢固握持。收缩臀肌和核心肌群，然后通过脚跟发力将髋部抬离凳子，使膝盖到肩膀呈一条直线。在最高点稍作停顿，充分挤压臀肌。缓慢将髋部下放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by sitting on the edge of a bench with your upper back resting against it and your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands.
Engage your glutes and core muscles, then press through your heels to lift your hips off the bench, creating a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子边缘，上背部靠在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，间距与髋同宽。
将杠铃横放在髋部上方，双手牢固握持。
收缩臀肌和核心肌群，然后通过脚跟发力将髋部抬离凳子，使膝盖到肩膀呈一条直线。
在最高点稍作停顿，充分挤压臀肌。
缓慢将髋部下放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your buttocks back as if you were trying to touch the wall behind you with your glutes. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by squeezing your glutes and pushing your hips forward. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，臀部向后推出，仿佛要用臀部去触碰身后的墙壁。继续下放躯干直至与地面平行，此时应感受到腘绳肌的拉伸。稍作停顿后，通过收紧臀肌和向前推髋的方式回到起始姿势。重复完成所需次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your buttocks back as if you were trying to touch the wall behind you with your glutes.
Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by squeezing your glutes and pushing your hips forward.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，臀部向后推出，仿佛要用臀部去触碰身后的墙壁。
继续下放躯干直至与地面平行，此时应感受到腘绳肌的拉伸。
稍作停顿后，通过收紧臀肌和向前推髋的方式回到起始姿势。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell slowly towards your neck, keeping your elbows pointed outwards. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your neck. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。缓慢将杠铃下放至颈部位置，同时保持肘部向外展开。当杠铃下放至颈部上方时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell slowly towards your neck, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your neck.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部宽度。
缓慢将杠铃下放至颈部位置，同时保持肘部向外展开。
当杠铃下放至颈部上方时稍作停顿。
将杠铃向上推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell behind your legs, resting it on your upper thighs. Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展站立。将杠铃置于双腿后方，搭在上大腿上。通过弯曲膝盖和髋部来下降身体，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。继续下降直到大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能下蹲。稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell behind your legs, resting it on your upper thighs.
Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展站立。
将杠铃置于双腿后方，搭在上大腿上。
通过弯曲膝盖和髋部来下降身体，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。
继续下降直到大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能下蹲。
稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖微微外展。将杠铃置于上背部，正好架在斜方肌上。收紧核心并保持胸部挺直，开始下蹲，臀部向后推同时膝盖弯曲。一直蹲到大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适范围内尽可能低。通过脚后跟发力站起，髋关节和膝关节同时伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖微微外展。
将杠铃置于上背部，正好架在斜方肌上。
收紧核心并保持胸部挺直，开始下蹲，臀部向后推同时膝盖弯曲。
一直蹲到大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适范围内尽可能低。
通过脚后跟发力站起，髋关节和膝关节同时伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板凳调整至45度角，仰卧于凳上，双脚平放地面。双手采用比肩稍宽的正握方式握住杠铃，从架上取下后将杠铃缓慢下降至胸部位置，同时保持肘部45度角。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板凳调整至45度角
仰卧于凳上，双脚平放地面
双手采用比肩稍宽的正握方式握住杠铃
从架上取下杠铃，缓慢下降至胸部位置，同时保持肘部45度角
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置
按所需重复次数进行练习

name.en: barbell incline close grip bench press

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳设置成45度角。躺在凳子上，双脚平放在地面上。用窄握握住杠铃，握距略窄于肩宽。将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢地向胸部下放，保持肘部贴近身体。当杠铃触碰到胸部时，稍作停顿。将杠铃向上推回起始位置，充分伸展手臂。重复至所需重复次数。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳设置成45度角。
躺在凳子上，双脚平放在地面上。
用窄握握住杠铃，握距略窄于肩宽。
将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢地向胸部下放，保持肘部贴近身体。
当杠铃触碰到胸部时，稍作停顿。
将杠铃向上推回起始位置，充分伸展手臂。
重复至所需重复次数。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie back on the bench and grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳设置为45度角。躺在凳子上，反握杠铃，双手比肩宽略宽。从架上取下杠铃，将其降低至上胸部位置，同时保持肘部内收。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie back on the bench and grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳设置为45度角
躺在凳子上，反握杠铃，双手比肩宽略宽
从架上取下杠铃，将其降低至上胸部位置，同时保持肘部内收
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置
重复完成所需的次数

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜凳角度设置为45度。俯卧在凳子上，胸部贴在垫子上，双脚平放在地面。用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将杠铃拉向胸部，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie face down on the bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
