Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜凳角度设置为45度。
俯卧在凳子上，胸部贴在垫子上，双脚平放在地面。
用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将杠铃拉向胸部，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Slowly raise the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板凳调至45度角。坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住杠铃，采用正握，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃举至肩部高度，保持肘部微屈。慢慢将杠铃举过头顶，充分伸直手臂。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃降回肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Slowly raise the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板凳调至45度角。
坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住杠铃，采用正握，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃举至肩部高度，保持肘部微屈。
慢慢将杠铃举过头顶，充分伸直手臂。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃降回肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your body, just below your waist. Step your left foot forward and your right foot back, keeping your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position. Repeat the movement, alternating your forward and back foot with each repetition.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外旋。双手正握杠铃，将其置于身体前侧腰部下方。左脚向前迈出，右脚向后撤，保持双脚间距与肩同宽。屈膝下蹲，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。通过脚跟发力站起身，回到起始姿势。换脚重复动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your body, just below your waist.
Step your left foot forward and your right foot back, keeping your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, alternating your forward and back foot with each repetition.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外旋。
双手正握杠铃，将其置于身体前侧腰部下方。
左脚向前迈出，右脚向后撤，保持双脚间距与肩同宽。
屈膝下蹲，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。
通过脚跟发力站起身，回到起始姿势。
换脚重复动作。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手以正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃缓慢下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。发力将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手以正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃缓慢下放至胸部位置，保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。
将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Once you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upwards by jumping off the ground. As you jump, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, pushing through your toes. Land softly back into the squat position and immediately repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。屈膝同时向后推髋，身体下沉进入深蹲姿势。到达深蹲底部后，双脚蹬地向上爆发性跳起。跳起时，伸展髋、膝、踝关节，通过脚趾发力。轻柔落地回到深蹲姿势，立即重复动作至目标次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Once you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upwards by jumping off the ground.
As you jump, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, pushing through your toes.
Land softly back into the squat position and immediately repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
屈膝同时向后推髋，身体下沉进入深蹲姿势。
到达深蹲底部后，双脚蹬地向上爆发性跳起。
跳起时，伸展髋、膝、踝关节，通过脚趾发力。
轻柔落地回到深蹲姿势，立即重复动作至目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted. Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your left leg straight. Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping with your left foot.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃放在上背部。右脚向侧面大步迈出，左脚保持不动。弯曲右膝，身体向下蹲成弓步姿势，左腿保持伸直。用右脚发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复，用左脚迈步。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your left leg straight.
Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, stepping with your left foot.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃放在上背部。
右脚向侧面大步迈出，左脚保持不动。
弯曲右膝，身体向下蹲成弓步姿势，左腿保持伸直。
用右脚发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复，用左脚迈步。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，屈膝的同时将臀部向后推，缓慢下蹲身体。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行。保持片刻，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始姿势。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell resting on your upper back.
Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，屈膝的同时将臀部向后推，缓慢下蹲身体。
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行。
保持片刻，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始姿势。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright. Lower your body by bending your right knee until your thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg, alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃放置在上背部。右脚向前迈出一步，同时保持躯干直立。通过弯曲右膝来降低身体，直到大腿与地面平行。然后通过右脚脚跟发力，将身体推回起始位置。换左腿重复上述动作，双腿交替进行至目标重复次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright.
Lower your body by bending your right knee until your thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with your left leg, alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃放置在上背部。
右脚向前迈出一步，同时保持躯干直立。
弯曲右膝降低身体，直到大腿与地面平行。
通过右脚脚跟发力，将身体推回起始位置。
换左腿重复上述动作，双腿交替进行至目标重复次数。

name.en: barbell lying back of the head tricep extension

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳端。将杠铃置于头上方，采用正握握法，双手与肩同宽，手臂伸直。上臂保持静止不动，通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃缓慢下放至头后。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳端。
将杠铃置于头上方，采用正握握法，双手与肩同宽，手臂伸直。
上臂保持静止不动，通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃缓慢下放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing towards your feet. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手窄握杠铃，间距与肩同宽，掌心朝向脚的方向。将杠铃从支架上取下，双臂完全伸展，将其举至胸部正上方。慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部贴近身体。当杠铃触胸时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing towards your feet.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手窄握杠铃，间距与肩同宽，掌心朝向脚的方向。
将杠铃从支架上取下，双臂完全伸展，将其举至胸部正上方。
慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
当杠铃触胸时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 杠铃仰卧窄握肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing up. Extend your arms fully, lifting the barbell above your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳端。双手以窄握方式握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽，掌心向上。将双臂完全伸展，将杠铃举至胸部正上方。保持上臂固定不动，缓慢弯曲肘关节，将杠铃下放至前额位置。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始姿势。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing up.
Extend your arms fully, lifting the barbell above your chest.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳端。
双手以窄握方式握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽，掌心向上。
将双臂完全伸展，将杠铃举至胸部正上方。
保持上臂固定不动，缓慢弯曲肘关节，将杠铃下放至前额位置。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始姿势。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放地面，头部位于长凳边缘。双手正握杠铃，间距与肩同宽，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。保持上臂固定不动，弯曲肘关节缓慢将杠铃下放至额前。稍作停顿后，伸直双臂恢复起始姿势。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放地面，头部位于长凳边缘。
双手正握杠铃，间距与肩同宽，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。
保持上臂固定不动，弯曲肘关节缓慢将杠铃下放至额前。
稍作停顿后，伸直双臂恢复起始姿势。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip and position it on your hips. Engaging your glutes, lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲。双手正握杠铃，将其放置于髋部位置。收缩臀肌发力，将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶峰位置保持片刻，然后缓慢将髋部放下回到起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on your back on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip and position it on your hips.
Engaging your glutes, lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲。
双手正握杠铃，将其放置于髋部位置。
收缩臀肌发力，将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
在顶峰位置保持片刻，然后缓慢将髋部放下回到起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended over the edge, holding a barbell with an underhand grip. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，胸部贴紧垫面，手臂伸直悬于凳缘外，双手反握杠铃。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌向上弯举杠铃。继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃与肩同高的位置。在顶峰位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended over the edge, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，胸部贴紧垫面，手臂伸直悬于凳缘外，双手反握杠铃。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌向上弯举杠铃。
继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃与肩同高的位置。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 杠铃仰卧肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部位于凳子一端。双手以正握姿势握住杠铃，双手距离与肩同宽，将手臂伸直举至胸部正上方。保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘关节慢慢将杠铃下放至额头前方。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部位于凳子一端。
双手以正握姿势握住杠铃，双手距离与肩同宽，将手臂伸直举至胸部正上方。
保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘关节慢慢将杠铃下放至额头前方。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: barbell lying triceps extension skull crusher

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your forehead, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于长凳边缘。双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽，双臂向上伸直并垂直于胸部。保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃缓慢下放至额头前方的位置。当杠铃接近额头时稍作停顿，然后伸展手臂回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your forehead, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于长凳边缘。
双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽，双臂向上伸直并垂直于胸部。
保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃缓慢下放至额头前方的位置。
当杠铃接近额头时稍作停顿，然后伸展手臂回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。将杠铃横置于上背部，落在斜方肌或后三角肌上。收紧核心并保持胸部挺起，通过屈膝和臀部向后推的方式缓慢下蹲，持续下降至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
将杠铃横置于上背部，落在斜方肌或后三角肌上。
收紧核心并保持胸部挺起，通过屈膝和臀部向后推的方式缓慢下蹲。
持续下降至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。
稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell one arm bent over row

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with one hand using an overhand grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head in a neutral position. Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，单手正握杠铃。臀部为轴向前屈体，保持背部平直，头部保持自然中立位。将杠铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体两侧，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。然后在控制下将杠铃缓慢放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with one hand using an overhand grip.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head in a neutral position.
Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，单手正握杠铃。
以髋关节为轴向前屈体，保持背部平直，头部保持自然中立位。
将杠铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体两侧，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在控制下将杠铃缓慢放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with one hand, palm facing up, and extend your arm straight up over your chest. Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。单手握住杠铃，掌心向上，将手臂伸直举至胸部正上方。慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。按要求的次数重复完成后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the barbell with one hand, palm facing up, and extend your arm straight up over your chest.
Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。
单手握住杠铃，掌心向上，将手臂伸直举至胸部正上方。
慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复完成后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Bend at the hips and lower the barbell towards the outside of your leg, keeping your arm straight and your chest up. Lower the barbell as far as you can while maintaining good form. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手正握杠铃。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。屈髋俯身，将杠铃沿腿外侧下放，保持手臂伸直、胸部挺起。在保持良好姿势的前提下，尽可能将杠铃下放至最大幅度。稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置。按所需重复次数进行，然后换另一侧重复。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Bend at the hips and lower the barbell towards the outside of your leg, keeping your arm straight and your chest up.
Lower the barbell as far as you can while maintaining good form.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手正握杠铃。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
屈髋俯身，将杠铃沿腿外侧下放，保持手臂伸直、胸部挺起。
在保持良好姿势的前提下，尽可能将杠铃下放至最大幅度。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行，然后换另一侧重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the barbell upwards. As the barbell reaches chest level, pull it upwards with your arm, keeping it close to your body. Rotate your elbow under the barbell and extend your arm fully overhead, locking out your elbow. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。采用正握握住杠铃，双手间距比肩略宽。屈膝降低臀部进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起。爆发性地伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节，将杠铃向上推起。当杠铃到达胸部高度时，用手臂将其向上拉起，并保持杠铃贴近身体。旋转肘部到杠铃下方，完全伸展手臂过头顶，锁住肘关节。控制地将杠铃降低回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the barbell upwards.
As the barbell reaches chest level, pull it upwards with your arm, keeping it close to your body.
Rotate your elbow under the barbell and extend your arm fully overhead, locking out your elbow.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
采用正握握住杠铃，双手间距比肩略宽。
屈膝降低臀部进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起。
爆发性地伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节，将杠铃向上推起。
当杠铃到达胸部高度时，用手臂将其向上拉起，并保持杠铃贴近身体。
旋转肘部到杠铃下方，完全伸展手臂过头顶，锁住肘关节。
控制地将杠铃降低回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back. Lift one foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair, keeping your chest up and your back straight. Lower yourself until your thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。抬起一只脚离开地面并向前伸展，保持该腿与地面平行。弯曲支撑腿，像坐在椅子上一样向后下蹲，保持胸部挺起和背部挺直。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行，然后换腿重复。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Lift one foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground.
Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Lower yourself until your thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
抬起一只脚离开地面并向前伸展，保持该腿与地面平行。
弯曲支撑腿，像坐在椅子上一样向后下蹲，保持胸部挺起和背部挺直。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行，然后换腿重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell with a wide grip, positioning it overhead with your arms fully extended. Engage your core and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。双手宽握杠铃，将其举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。收紧核心肌群，身体下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持胸部挺起，膝盖与脚尖方向一致。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell with a wide grip, positioning it overhead with your arms fully extended.
Engage your core and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
双手宽握杠铃，将其举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。
收紧核心肌群，身体下蹲至深蹲姿势，保持胸部挺起，膝盖与脚尖方向一致。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell palms down wrist curl over a bench
name.zh: 杠铃掌心向下坐姿腕弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, palms facing down. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell towards the ground by flexing your wrists, keeping your forearms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the barbell back up by extending your wrists. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，前臂放在大腿上，掌心向下。双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽。通过弯曲手腕将杠铃向地面方向下放，保持前臂不动。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手腕缓慢将杠铃抬起回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, palms facing down.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell towards the ground by flexing your wrists, keeping your forearms stationary.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the barbell back up by extending your wrists.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，将前臂放在大腿上，掌心向下。
双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽。
通过弯曲手腕将杠铃向地面方向下放，保持前臂固定不动。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手腕缓慢将杠铃抬起。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell palms up wrist curl over a bench
name.zh: 杠铃坐姿腕弯举（掌心向上）

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，反手握住杠铃，掌心向上。将前臂放在凳子上，让手腕悬在边缘。保持前臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯曲到最大程度。在顶峰收缩位置保持短暂停顿，然后吸气，缓慢地将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，反手握住杠铃，掌心向上。
将前臂放在凳子上，让手腕悬在凳子边缘。
保持前臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯曲到最大程度。
在顶峰收缩位置保持短暂停顿，然后吸气，缓慢地将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。采用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。将杠铃拉向腹部上方，同时用力收紧肩胛骨。然后将杠铃控制下放回起始位置。重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。
屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。
采用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。
将杠铃拉向腹部上方，同时用力收紧肩胛骨。
将杠铃控制下放回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Set up a barbell on a power rack at chest height. Stand facing the barbell and position yourself underneath it, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest, with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃放置在力量架上，高度与胸部齐平。面向杠铃站立，身体置于杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽站立。采用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。将杠铃从架上抬起，双臂完全伸展，置于胸部正上方。将杠铃向胸部方向下放，保持肘部贴近身体。当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿。将杠铃向上推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Set up a barbell on a power rack at chest height.
Stand facing the barbell and position yourself underneath it, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest, with your arms fully extended.
Lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃放置在力量架上，高度与胸部齐平
面向杠铃站立，身体置于杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽站立
采用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩
将杠铃从架上抬起，双臂完全伸展，置于胸部正上方
将杠铃向胸部方向下放，保持肘部贴近身体
当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿
将杠铃向上推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展
按照所需的重复次数重复进行

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support. Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，上臂放在垫子上，胸部抵住支撑垫。掌心朝上握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气并慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，上臂放在垫子上，胸部抵住支撑垫。
掌心朝上握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气并慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on a mat with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on your chest. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在瑜伽垫上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。双手握住杠铃，手掌向下，将其置于胸部上方。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复上述动作至目标次数。

en: Lie flat on your back on a mat with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on your chest.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在瑜伽垫上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
双手握住杠铃，手掌向下，将其置于胸部上方。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复上述动作至目标次数。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it. Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板凳调至45度角。面部朝下躺在凳子上，胸部和腹部贴靠凳面。双手握杠铃，采用反握姿势，握距与肩同宽。手臂完全伸展，使杠铃垂向地面。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时向上弯举，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续举起杠铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩同高。在顶峰位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms fully, allowing the barbell to hang down towards the floor.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板凳调至45度角。
面部朝下躺在凳子上，胸部和腹部贴靠凳面。
双手握杠铃，采用反握姿势，握距与肩同宽。
手臂完全伸展，使杠铃垂向地面。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时向上弯举，同时收缩肱二头肌。
继续举起杠铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃与肩同高。
在顶峰位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner until you feel a stretch in your lats. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳子一端，双脚稳稳地踩在地面上。双手与肩同宽握住杠铃，双臂向前伸直举至胸前。保持手臂伸直，控制杠铃沿头部后方缓缓下移，直至背阔肌有明显的拉伸感。稍作停顿后，将杠铃举回起始位置。按要求的次数重复练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Hold a barbell with a shoulder-width grip and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in a controlled manner until you feel a stretch in your lats.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳子一端，双脚稳稳地踩在地面上。
双手与肩同宽握住杠铃，双臂向前伸直举至胸前。
保持手臂伸直，控制杠铃沿头部后方缓缓下移，直至背阔肌有明显的拉伸感。
稍作停顿后，将杠铃举回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the ground. Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in an arc-like motion until you feel a stretch in your lats. Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and press the barbell back to the starting position above your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳子一端，双脚踩在地面。双手正握杠铃，手臂伸直举至胸部上方。保持手臂伸直，将杠铃沿弧线从头顶后方缓慢下放，直至感觉背阔肌有充分的拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后反方向将杠铃推回至胸部上方的起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the ground.
Hold the barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Keeping your arms straight, lower the barbell behind your head in an arc-like motion until you feel a stretch in your lats.
Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and press the barbell back to the starting position above your chest.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳子一端，双脚踩在地面。
双手正握杠铃（掌心朝下），手臂伸直举至胸部上方。
保持手臂伸直，将杠铃沿弧线从头顶后方缓慢下放，直至感觉背阔肌有充分的拉伸感。
稍作停顿，然后反方向将杠铃推回至胸部上方的起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards. Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, pulling your shoulders back and squeezing your glutes at the top. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃放在膝盖高度的架子上。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖微微向外。屈髋屈膝下蹲，双手采用正握握住杠铃，握距与肩同宽。收紧核心肌群，通过伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃提起，同时将肩部向后拉，在顶端充分收缩臀肌。然后通过屈髋屈膝将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, pulling your shoulders back and squeezing your glutes at the top.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃放在膝盖高度的架子上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖微微向外。
屈髋屈膝下蹲，双手正握握住杠铃，握距与肩同宽。
收紧核心肌群，通过伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃提起，同时将肩部向后拉，在顶端充分收缩臀肌。
通过屈髋屈膝将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise the barbell out to the sides, keeping your arms straight, until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃，采用正握方式，手掌向下。膝盖微微弯曲，以髋关节为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。将杠铃向身体两侧举起，保持手臂伸直，直到手臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Raise the barbell out to the sides, keeping your arms straight, until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃，采用正握方式，手掌向下。
膝盖微微弯曲，以髋关节为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。
将杠铃向身体两侧举起，保持手臂伸直，直到手臂与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双手以反握方式握住杠铃，手间距略宽于肩。上身向前俯身，保持背部挺直，胸部向上。 将杠铃拉向胸部，同时收缩肩胛骨。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手以反握方式握住杠铃，手间距略宽于肩。
臀部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，胸部向上。
将杠铃拉向胸部，同时收缩肩胛骨。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back. Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot. Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。右脚向后迈出一步，以前脚掌着地。双膝弯曲降低身体，直到左大腿与地面平行。通过左脚后跟发力，回到起始位置。换另一条腿重复动作。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with the other leg.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
右脚向后迈出一步，以前脚掌着地。
双膝弯曲降低身体，直到左大腿与地面平行。
通过左脚后跟发力，回到起始位置。
换另一条腿重复动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back. Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot. Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。右脚向后迈步，以前脚掌着地。双膝弯曲，下蹲直至左大腿与地面平行。通过左脚跟发力推地，回到起始姿势。换另一侧腿重复动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Take a step backward with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Bend both knees to lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with the other leg.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
右脚向后迈步，以前脚掌着地。
双膝弯曲，下蹲直至左大腿与地面平行。
通过左脚跟发力推地，回到起始姿势。
换另一侧腿重复动作。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。双手握住杠铃，采用反握姿势（掌心向下），双手与肩同宽。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬在边缘之外。保持前臂固定不动，呼气并将手腕向上弯举到最大幅度。在收缩位置保持短暂停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。
双手握住杠铃，采用反握姿势（掌心向下），双手与肩同宽。
将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬在边缘之外。
保持前臂固定不动，呼气并将手腕向上弯举到最大幅度。
在收缩位置保持短暂停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Slowly lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。反握握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。将杠铃从架上举起，双臂完全伸直，位于胸部正上方。慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，保持肘部贴近身体。当杠铃在胸部上方时稍作停顿。将杠铃向上推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数重复动作。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Slowly lower the barbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
反握握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。
将杠铃从架上举起，双臂完全伸直，位于胸部正上方。
慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，保持肘部贴近身体。
当杠铃在胸部上方时稍作停顿。
将杠铃向上推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数重复动作。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the barbell upward, contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, keeping your upper arms stationary. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，双手采用正握（掌心向下）握住杠铃。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯举杠铃，充分收缩肱二头肌。继续向上举起杠铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部高度。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，同时保持上臂不动。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the barbell upward, contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，双手采用正握（掌心向下）握住杠铃。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯举杠铃，充分收缩肱二头肌。
继续向上举起杠铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部高度。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，同时保持上臂不动。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell reverse grip bent over row

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor. Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。采用正握（掌心向下）握住杠铃，双手比肩略宽。髋部前屈，保持背部挺直、胸部向上，直到躯干几乎与地面平行。将杠铃拉向胸部下方，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放下回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。
采用正握（掌心向下）握住杠铃，双手比肩略宽。
髋部前屈，保持背部挺直、胸部向上，直到躯干几乎与地面平行。
将杠铃拉向胸部下方，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放下回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell reverse grip decline bench press

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，双脚固定，头部低于臀部位置。采用反握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢向下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，双脚固定，确保头部位置低于臀部。
采用反握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢向下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

name.en: barbell reverse grip incline bench press

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜凳调整至45度角，仰卧在凳子上，双脚平放在地面。双手反握杠铃，间距略宽于肩部。从架上取下杠铃，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜凳调整至45度角
仰卧在凳子上，双脚平放在地面
双手反握杠铃，间距略宽于肩部
从架上取下杠铃，缓慢下放至胸部，保持肘部内收
杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿
将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展
按所需重复次数进行练习

name.en: barbell reverse grip incline bench row

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench facing the backrest with your chest against it. Grab the barbell with a reverse grip (palms facing down) and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板角度调至45度。坐在斜板上，胸部紧贴靠背， face朝向靠背。反手握住杠铃，掌心向下，双手间距略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将杠铃向腹部上方拉起，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶点稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench facing the backrest with your chest against it.
Grab the barbell with a reverse grip (palms facing down) and hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Pull the barbell towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板角度调至45度。
坐在斜板上，胸部紧贴靠背。
反手握住杠铃，掌心向下，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将杠铃向腹部上方拉起，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶点稍作停留。
慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the barbell with a reverse grip, palms facing towards your face, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows in and your wrists straight. Slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳端。双手反握杠铃，掌心朝向你面部，双手间距与肩同宽。将手臂伸直举至胸部上方，保持肘部内收、手腕挺直。通过弯曲肘部慢慢将杠铃下放至额前，在此过程中上臂保持静止。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Hold the barbell with a reverse grip, palms facing towards your face, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows in and your wrists straight.
Slowly lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳端。
双手反握杠铃，掌心朝向你面部，双手间距与肩同宽。
将手臂伸直举至胸部上方，保持肘部内收、手腕挺直。
通过弯曲肘部慢慢将杠铃下放至额前，在此过程中上臂保持静止。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，胸部紧贴靠垫，双臂向下伸直，反握杠铃。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将杠铃向上弯举。继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃与肩同高的位置。在顶峰位置短暂停顿，同时用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复上述动作至所需次数。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arms extended straight down, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，胸部紧贴靠垫，双臂向下伸直，反握杠铃。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将杠铃向上弯举。
继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃与肩同高的位置。
在顶峰位置短暂停顿，同时用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，采用正握（手掌向下）握住杠铃。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬空垂在膝盖边缘。然后缓缓将手腕向上弯举，将杠铃拉向身体。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，再慢慢将杠铃放回起始姿势。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，采用正握握住杠铃，手掌向下。
将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬空垂在膝盖边缘。
缓缓将手腕向上弯举，将杠铃拉向身体。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，再慢慢将杠铃放回起始姿势。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Kneel on the floor and hold a barbell with both hands, shoulder-width apart. Roll the barbell forward, extending your arms and keeping your core engaged. Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your knees, maintaining control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 跪在地板上，双手握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽。将杠铃向前滚动，伸直手臂并保持核心收紧。继续向前滚动直到身体完全伸展，手臂举过头顶。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃滚回膝盖位置，保持控制。重复所需的次数。

en: Kneel on the floor and hold a barbell with both hands, shoulder-width apart.
Roll the barbell forward, extending your arms and keeping your core engaged.
Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your knees, maintaining control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 跪在地板上，双手握住杠铃，间距与肩同宽。
将杠铃向前滚动，伸直手臂并保持核心收紧。
继续向前滚动直到身体完全伸展，手臂举过头顶。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃滚回膝盖位置，保持控制。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start by kneeling on the floor with a barbell placed on a bench in front of you. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly roll the barbell forward, extending your arms in front of you. Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your body, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 跪在地板上，将杠铃放置在前方的长凳上。双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。保持核心收紧、背部挺直，慢慢向前滚动杠铃，同时将手臂向前伸展。继续滚动杠铃直至身体完全伸展、双臂举过头顶。在最高点稍作停顿，然后控制速度将杠铃滚回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Start by kneeling on the floor with a barbell placed on a bench in front of you.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly roll the barbell forward, extending your arms in front of you.
Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your body, returning to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 跪在地板上，将杠铃放置在前方的长凳上。
双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
保持核心收紧、背部挺直，慢慢向前滚动杠铃，同时将手臂向前伸展。
继续滚动杠铃直至身体完全伸展、双臂举过头顶。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后控制速度将杠铃滚回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body. Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell. Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight. Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖朝前站立。双手正握杠铃，手间距略宽于肩宽。屈髋向前，躯干保持平直，膝盖略微弯曲。将杠铃沿身体缓缓下放。当杠铃下放时，感受腘绳肌的拉伸。当腘绳肌有明显的拉伸感时，臀部向前推，恢复直立姿势。在动作顶端用力收紧臀部。然后将杠铃缓慢下放回起始位置，按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell.
Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight.
Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖朝前站立。
双手正握杠铃，手间距略宽于肩宽。
屈髋向前，躯干保持平直，膝盖略微弯曲。
将杠铃沿身体缓缓下放，贴近身体移动。
杠铃下放时感受腘绳肌的拉伸。
当腘绳肌有拉伸感时，臀部向前推，恢复直立姿势。
在动作顶端用力收紧臀部。
将杠铃缓慢下放回起始位置，按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell seated behind head military press

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, behind your head. Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。双手采用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起，下降至肩部高度，杠铃位于颈后。向上推举杠铃，直至手臂完全伸直。将杠铃缓慢下降回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, behind your head.
Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。
双手采用正握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃从架子上抬起，下降至肩部高度，杠铃位于颈后。
向上推举杠铃，直至手臂完全伸直。
将杠铃缓慢下降回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 杠铃坐姿布莱德福德推举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and pointing forward. Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上,背部挺直,双脚平放在地面。双手采用正握握住杠铃,握距略宽于肩部。将杠铃举起至肩部高度,肘部略微弯曲并指向前方。将杠铃向上推举,手臂完全伸展。将杠铃降回肩部高度并重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and pointing forward.
Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上,背部挺直,双脚平放在地面。
双手采用正握握住杠铃,握距略宽于肩部。
将杠铃举起至肩部高度,肘部略微弯曲并指向前方。
将杠铃向上推举,手臂完全伸展。
将杠铃降回肩部高度并重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs. Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step. Position the barbell across your thighs and hold it securely with your hands. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, lift your heels off the ground by extending your ankles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，杠铃置于大腿上。将双脚前脚掌放在一个升高的平台上，如木块或踏板。将杠铃横放在大腿上，双手牢固握住。保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧，通过伸展踝关节将脚跟抬离地面。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs.
Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step.
Position the barbell across your thighs and hold it securely with your hands.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, lift your heels off the ground by extending your ankles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，杠铃置于大腿上。
将双脚前脚掌放在一个升高的平台上，如木块或踏板。
将杠铃横放在大腿上，双手牢固握住。
保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧，通过伸展踝关节将脚跟抬离地面。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs. Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step. Lower your heels as far as possible, feeling a stretch in your calves. Raise your heels as high as possible, contracting your calves. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，杠铃置于大腿上方。将双脚前脚掌置于升高的平台（如哑铃块或踏板）上。尽量降低脚后跟，感受小腿的拉伸。然后将脚后跟尽量抬高，收缩小腿。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and a barbell resting on your thighs.
Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform, such as a block or step.
Lower your heels as far as possible, feeling a stretch in your calves.
Raise your heels as high as possible, contracting your calves.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，杠铃置于大腿上方。
将双脚前脚掌置于升高的平台（如哑铃块或踏板）上。
尽量降低脚后跟，感受小腿的拉伸。
将脚后跟尽量抬高，收缩小腿。
重复所需次数。

name.en: barbell seated close grip behind neck triceps extension
name.zh: 杠铃坐姿颈后窄握肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with a close grip behind your neck, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your head and slowly lower the barbell towards the back of your head. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手以窄握方式在颈后握住杠铃，掌心朝前。保持肘部紧贴头部两侧，缓慢将杠铃下放至头后。保持片刻，然后手臂发力将杠铃向上伸直回到起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the barbell with a close grip behind your neck, palms facing forward.
Keep your elbows close to your head and slowly lower the barbell towards the back of your head.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手以窄握方式在颈后握住杠铃，掌心朝前。
保持肘部紧贴头部两侧，缓慢将杠铃下放至头后。
保持片刻，然后手臂发力将杠铃向上伸直回到起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.zh: 杠铃坐姿窄握集中弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your upper arms against your inner thighs, just above your knees, and let the barbell hang down in front of you. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，双手采用反握方式握住杠铃，握距与肩同宽。将上臂靠在大腿内侧、膝盖上方的位置，让杠铃自然垂于身前。保持上臂固定不动，呼气并将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向，充分收缩肱二头肌。在顶峰位置略微停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Rest your upper arms against your inner thighs, just above your knees, and let the barbell hang down in front of you.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，双手采用反握方式握住杠铃，握距与肩同宽。
将上臂靠在大腿内侧、膝盖上方的位置，让杠铃自然垂于身前。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气并将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向，充分收缩肱二头肌。
在顶峰位置略微停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a barbell resting on your upper back. Keep your back straight and your chest up. Slowly hinge forward at the hips, lowering your torso towards the ground. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，将杠铃放置在上背部。保持背部挺直，胸部向上。慢慢地以髋关节为轴向前倾，让躯干向地面方向下沉。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Keep your back straight and your chest up.
Slowly hinge forward at the hips, lowering your torso towards the ground.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，将杠铃放置在上背部。
保持背部挺直，胸部向上。
慢慢地以髋关节为轴向前倾，让躯干向地面方向下沉。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手正握杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起至肩部高度，手肘弯曲，手掌朝前。通过完全伸展手臂将杠铃向上推举。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃降回肩部高度。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手正握杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃从架子上抬起至肩部高度，手肘弯曲，手掌朝前。
通过完全伸展手臂将杠铃向上推举。
在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃降回肩部高度。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and raise it overhead. Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your head. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to raise the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放于地面。双手正握杠铃，握距与肩同宽，将杠铃举至头上方。通过屈肘将杠铃下放至头后，保持上臂靠近头部。稍作停顿，然后伸臂将杠铃举回起始位置。重复至所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and raise it overhead.
Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your head.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms to raise the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放于地面。
双手正握杠铃，握距与肩同宽，将杠铃举至头上方。
通过屈肘将杠铃下放至头后，保持上臂靠近头部。
稍作停顿，然后伸臂将杠铃举回起始位置。
重复至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a barbell with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your core and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly rotate back to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平坦的长凳上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。双手在胸前握住杠铃，手肘略微弯曲。收紧核心肌群，慢慢将躯干向一侧扭转，保持背部挺直。在扭转末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢转回起始位置。换另一侧重复扭转动作。按照所需的重复次数交替两侧进行。

en: Sit on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Hold a barbell with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Engage your core and slowly twist your torso to one side, keeping your back straight.
Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly rotate back to the starting position.
Repeat the twist to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平坦的长凳上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。
双手在胸前握住杠铃，手肘略微弯曲。
收紧核心肌群，慢慢将躯干向一侧扭转，保持背部挺直。
在扭转末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢转回起始位置。
换另一侧重复扭转动作。
按照所需的重复次数交替两侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of you with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and your back straight throughout the exercise. Lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible, squeezing your traps at the top. Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，正握杠铃置于身前。练习全程保持手臂和背部挺直。将肩膀向上耸起，尽可能高地向耳朵方向靠拢，在顶端充分挤压斜方肌。保持片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀放下回到起始位置。重复至目标次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of you with an overhand grip.
Keep your arms straight and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible, squeezing your traps at the top.
Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，正握杠铃置于身前。
练习全程保持手臂和背部挺直。
将肩膀向上耸至耳朵高度，在顶端充分挤压斜方肌。
保持片刻，然后缓慢放下肩膀回到起始位置。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with both hands, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Slowly bend your torso to the right side, lowering the barbell towards your right knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the movement on the left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃，掌心向下。保持背部挺直，核心肌群全程收紧。身体缓慢向右侧弯曲，将杠铃沿腿部向下移动。稍作停留后回到起始位置，然后换左侧重复相同动作。两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with both hands, palms facing down.
Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Slowly bend your torso to the right side, lowering the barbell towards your right knee.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the movement on the left side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃，掌心向下。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群全程收紧。
身体缓慢向右侧弯曲，将杠铃向右侧膝盖方向下放。
稍作停顿后回到起始位置。
换左侧重复相同的动作。
继续两侧交替进行，直到完成预期的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, bending at the knees and hips. As you lower, push your knees out to the sides and keep your weight on your heels. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开站立，间距略宽于肩宽，脚尖略微外展。将杠铃置于上背部三角肌位置支撑好。收紧核心并保持胸部挺起，同时屈膝屈髋将身体下蹲。下蹲过程中，膝盖向外侧打开，重心放在脚后跟上。下蹲至大腿与地面平行后，通过脚后跟用力蹬地回到起始姿势。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, bending at the knees and hips.
As you lower, push your knees out to the sides and keep your weight on your heels.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开站立，间距略宽于肩宽，脚尖略微外展。
将杠铃置于上背部三角肌位置进行支撑。
收紧核心并保持胸部挺起，同时屈膝屈髋下蹲。
下蹲过程中，膝盖向外侧打开，重心放在脚后跟上。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，然后通过脚后跟用力蹬地回到起始姿势。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 杠铃侧向分腿深蹲 v. 2

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards. Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders. Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted. Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your back straight. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping out with your left foot. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。将杠铃置于上背部，平稳地支撑在肩部。右脚向侧面大步迈出，左脚保持固定。右膝弯曲，身体下沉进入深蹲姿态，确保胸部挺起、背部平直。通过右脚跟发力推动身体回归起始位置。换边重复，左脚迈出，交替执行所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders.
Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, stepping out with your left foot.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。
将杠铃置于上背部，平稳地支撑在肩部。
右脚向侧面大步迈出，左脚保持固定。
右膝弯曲，身体下沉进入深蹲姿态，确保胸部挺起、背部平直。
通过右脚跟发力推动身体回归起始位置。
换边重复，左脚迈出。
交替执行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Shift your weight onto your left foot and lift your right foot slightly off the ground. Hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your right leg extended behind you for balance. Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body and your left leg slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，双手正握杠铃置于大腿前侧。将重心转移至左脚，右脚轻轻抬离地面。保持背部挺直，髋部向前倾，右腿向后伸展以保持平衡。杠铃贴近身体下放，左腿保持微屈。在最低点稍作停顿，然后收缩臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将躯干抬起回到起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Shift your weight onto your left foot and lift your right foot slightly off the ground.
Hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your right leg extended behind you for balance.
Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body and your left leg slightly bent.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，双手正握杠铃置于大腿前侧。
将重心转移至左脚，右脚轻轻抬离地面。
保持背部挺直，髋部向前倾，右腿向后伸展以保持平衡。
杠铃贴近身体下放，左腿保持微屈。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后收缩臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将躯干抬起回到起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Take a large step forward with one leg, keeping your torso upright. Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, while keeping your back leg straight. Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将杠铃架在上背部。一条腿向前迈出一大步，保持躯干直立。通过弯曲前腿的膝盖和髋关节来降低身体，同时保持后腿伸直。继续下降直到前大腿与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后通过前脚脚跟发力回到起始位置。重复所需的重复次数，然后换腿。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Take a large step forward with one leg, keeping your torso upright.
Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, while keeping your back leg straight.
Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将杠铃架在上背部。
一条腿向前迈出一大步，保持躯干直立。
通过弯曲前腿的膝盖和髋关节来降低身体，同时保持后腿伸直。
继续下降直到前大腿与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后通过前脚脚跟发力回到起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数，然后换腿。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs. Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping the other leg on the ground. Lower the raised leg back down and repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
