instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，背部保持挺直，将杠铃横放在大腿根部。保持双腿伸直，将一条腿尽可能高地抬起，同时另一条腿平放在地面上。将抬起的腿缓缓放下，然后换另一条腿重复相同的动作。持续交替进行双腿练习，完成所需的目标次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping the other leg on the ground.
Lower the raised leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，将杠铃横放在大腿根部。
保持双腿伸直，将一条腿尽可能高地抬起，同时另一条腿平放在地面上。
将抬起的腿缓缓放下，然后换另一条腿重复相同的动作。
持续交替进行双腿练习，完成所需的目标次数。

name.zh: 杠铃坐姿交替抬腿（女性）

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs. Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support. Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground. Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，背部保持挺直，将杠铃横放在大腿上。双手放在长凳两侧以保持身体平衡。保持双腿伸直，将一条腿尽量向上抬起，同时保持腿部与地面平行。将腿放下后，换另一条腿重复动作。持续交替双腿完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a barbell across your thighs.
Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Keeping your legs straight, lift one leg up as high as possible while keeping it parallel to the ground.
Lower the leg back down and repeat with the other leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，将杠铃横放在大腿上。
双手放在长凳两侧以保持身体平衡。
保持双腿伸直，将一条腿尽量向上抬起，同时保持腿部与地面平行。
将腿放下，换另一条腿重复同样的动作。
持续交替双腿完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Simultaneously lift the barbell up towards your shoulders while jumping slightly off the ground. As you reach the top of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃置于大腿前方。膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直、胸部向上。在将杠铃向上提拉至肩部位置的同时，轻轻跃起离开地面。当动作达到顶端时，迅速反向运动，将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Simultaneously lift the barbell up towards your shoulders while jumping slightly off the ground.
As you reach the top of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃置于大腿前方。
膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直、胸部向上。
将杠铃向上提拉至肩部位置的同时，轻轻跃起离开地面。
当动作达到顶端时，迅速反向运动，将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾微微外展。将杠铃横置于上背部，稳固地放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，同时将臀部向后向下降低，仿佛要坐到椅子上。一直下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。通过脚跟发力向上站起，在动作顶端用力收缩臀肌。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips back and down, as if sitting into a chair.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚趾微微外展。
将杠铃横置于上背部，稳固地放在斜方肌或后三角肌上。
收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，同时将臀部向后向下降低，仿佛要坐到椅子上。
一直下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。
通过脚跟发力向上站起，在动作顶端用力收缩臀肌。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Take a large step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright. Lower your body by bending your knees and hips until your right thigh is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg forward for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。右脚向前大步迈出，保持躯干直立。屈膝屈髋降低身体，直至右大腿与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后通过右脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。换左腿向前重复以上动作，完成所需次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Take a large step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright.
Lower your body by bending your knees and hips until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with your left leg forward for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
右脚向前大步迈出，保持躯干直立。
屈膝屈髋降低身体，直至右大腿与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后通过右脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
换左腿向前重复以上动作，完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先双膝跪于地面，膝盖间距与髋同宽，脚尖朝前。将杠铃置于肩部后方，采用正握方式握杠，双手间距略宽于肩宽。收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，通过屈膝缓慢下放身体，同时保持背部挺直。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或降至舒适的最大幅度。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先双膝跪于地面，膝盖间距与髋同宽，脚尖朝前。
将杠铃置于肩部后方，采用正握方式握杠，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，通过屈膝缓慢下放身体，同时保持背部挺直。
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或降至舒适的最大幅度。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

name.en: barbell squat jump step rear lunge

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Explode upwards, jumping off the ground as high as you can. Land softly on your feet and immediately step back with one leg into a reverse lunge. Lower your body down until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight. Push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat the jump and lunge sequence on the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 这个复合动作结合了杠铃深蹲跳和后撤弓步。首先，双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。弯曲膝盖并向后推髋部，身体下沉进入深蹲姿势。然后垂直向上跳起，尽量跳到最高点。落地后立即向后撤一条腿形成反弓步，前腿弯曲直到大腿与地面平行，同时保持背部挺直。通过前脚跟发力蹬地回到起始姿势。换另一条腿重复跳跃和弓步的动作，连续交替进行，直到完成目标次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Explode upwards, jumping off the ground as high as you can.
Land softly on your feet and immediately step back with one leg into a reverse lunge.
Lower your body down until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight.
Push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat the jump and lunge sequence on the other leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
弯曲膝盖并向后推髋部，身体下沉进入深蹲姿势。
垂直向上跳起，尽可能跳到最高处。
轻柔地落地后，立即向后撤一条腿形成反弓步。
身体下沉直到前侧大腿与地面平行，保持背部挺直。
通过前脚跟发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。
换另一条腿重复跳跃和弓步的动作。
连续交替双腿进行，直到完成目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your thighs. Engage your core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your arms extended. Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your hands are directly above your head. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your thighs, maintaining control and keeping your core engaged. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在大腿前握住杠铃。收紧核心肌群，缓慢将杠铃向地面方向滚出，保持背部挺直，双臂伸直。继续向前滚动杠铃，直到身体完全伸展，双手位于头部正上方。稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃滚回大腿方向，保持控制并持续收紧核心。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your thighs.
Engage your core and slowly roll the barbell down towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your arms extended.
Continue rolling the barbell forward until your body is fully extended and your hands are directly above your head.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the barbell back towards your thighs, maintaining control and keeping your core engaged.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在大腿前握住杠铃。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢将杠铃向地面方向滚出，保持背部挺直，双臂伸直。
继续向前滚动杠铃，直到身体完全伸展，双手位于头部正上方。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃滚回大腿方向，保持控制并持续收紧核心。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Rest the barbell on the back of your hands with your palms facing down and your fingers pointing towards your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，双手正握杠铃，将杠铃置于手背上，手掌朝下，手指指向身体方向。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯曲至极限位置。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放下恢复至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Rest the barbell on the back of your hands with your palms facing down and your fingers pointing towards your body.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upwards as far as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，双手正握杠铃。
将杠铃置于手背上，手掌朝下，手指指向身体方向。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯曲至最大幅度。
在顶峰位置保持短暂停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 站姿杠铃布拉德福德推举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with an overhand grip. Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃，将杠铃置于肩部前侧位置。将杠铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。然后将杠铃缓慢下落回至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with an overhand grip.
Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃，将杠铃置于肩部前侧位置。
将杠铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。
将杠铃缓慢下落回至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。仅用脚尖发力，将脚跟尽可能高地抬离地面。在最高点处稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放下回到起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using only your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
仅用脚尖发力，将脚跟尽可能高地抬离地面。
在最高点处稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放下回到起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands close together. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement. Exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用反握姿势双手窄握杠铃。动作过程中保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。呼气的同时弯举杠铃并收缩肱二头肌，继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃与肩齐平的位置。在肱二头肌完全收缩的状态下短暂停顿，用力挤压肌肉。然后吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands close together.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the bar until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用反握姿势双手窄握杠铃。
动作过程中保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
呼气的同时弯举杠铃并收缩肱二头肌，继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃与肩齐平的位置。
在肱二头肌完全收缩的状态下短暂停顿，用力挤压肌肉。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: barbell standing close grip military press

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly closer than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows close to your body. Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握握住杠铃，双手间距略窄于肩宽。将杠铃提拉至肩部高度，手肘贴近身体两侧。将杠铃垂直向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。然后将杠铃缓慢下放至肩部高度。重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly closer than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Lower the barbell back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握握住杠铃，双手间距略窄于肩宽。
将杠铃提拉至肩部高度，手肘贴近身体两侧。
将杠铃垂直向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
将杠铃缓慢下放至肩部高度。
重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 杠铃站姿单臂集中弯举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in one hand, palm facing up. Rest your opposite hand on your thigh for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住杠铃，掌心向上，另一只手扶在大腿上以保持身体稳定。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向。在顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按要求的次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Rest your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住杠铃，掌心向上。
另一只手扶在大腿上以保持身体稳定。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向。
在顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: barbell standing front raise over head

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Slowly raise the barbell in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Continue lifting until the barbell is slightly above shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃置于大腿前侧，采用正握方式。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。慢慢将杠铃在身体前侧向上举起，保持手臂伸直且手掌向下。继续上举直至杠铃略高于肩部。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃下落回至起始位置。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Slowly raise the barbell in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Continue lifting until the barbell is slightly above shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃置于大腿前侧，采用正握方式。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
慢慢将杠铃在身体前侧向上举起，保持手臂伸直且手掌向下。
继续上举直至杠铃略高于肩部。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃下落回至起始位置。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，将杠铃放置在上背部。用小腿肌发力，尽可能高地抬起脚跟。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚跟降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place a barbell across your upper back.
Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，将杠铃放置在上背部。
用小腿肌发力，尽可能高地抬起脚跟。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚跟降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.zh: 杠铃站姿过头肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃。将杠铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。上臂紧贴头部，缓慢弯曲肘部，将杠铃下放至头后。短暂停顿，然后通过手臂伸展将杠铃举回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃。
将杠铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。
上臂紧贴头部，缓慢弯曲肘部，将杠铃下放至头后。
短暂停顿，然后通过手臂伸展将杠铃举回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握（掌心向上）握住杠铃。保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将杠铃尽可能靠近肩膀位置。在动作顶峰保持短暂停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the barbell as close to your shoulders as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握（掌心向上）握住杠铃。
保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将杠铃尽可能靠近肩膀位置。
在动作顶峰保持短暂停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: barbell standing rocking leg calf raise

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, balancing on the balls of your feet. Slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。尽可能高地抬起脚跟，用脚掌支撑身体保持平衡。然后缓慢地将脚跟放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell across your upper back.
Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, balancing on the balls of your feet.
Slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于上背部。
尽可能高地抬起脚跟，用脚掌支撑身体保持平衡。
缓慢地将脚跟放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing down. Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise. Slowly twist your torso to the right, pivoting on your feet and hips, while keeping your lower body stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the left side. Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前握住杠铃，手掌朝下。在整个动作过程中收紧核心并保持背部挺直。双脚和髋部为轴心，躯干慢慢向右侧扭转，同时保持下身稳定。在扭转末端稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。向左侧重复扭转动作。按照所需的重复次数交替进行扭转。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing down.
Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Slowly twist your torso to the right, pivoting on your feet and hips, while keeping your lower body stable.
Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat the twist to the left side.
Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前握住杠铃，手掌朝下。
在整个动作过程中收紧核心并保持背部挺直。
双脚和髋部为轴心，躯干慢慢向右侧扭转，同时保持下身稳定。
在扭转末端稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
向左侧重复扭转动作。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行扭转。

name.en: barbell standing wide grip biceps curl

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧。呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩膀高度，保持上臂固定不动。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。
保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧。
呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩膀高度，保持上臂固定不动。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly in front of the bar. Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩。将杠铃提拉至肩部高度，手肘略微位于杠铃前方。将杠铃垂直向上推举，手臂完全伸直。将杠铃下放回肩部高度，按所需重复次数进行训练。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly in front of the bar.
Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩。
将杠铃提拉至肩部高度，手肘略微位于杠铃前方。
将杠铃垂直向上推举，手臂完全伸直。
将杠铃下放回肩部高度，按所需重复次数进行训练。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing away from your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward by contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，笔直站立，双手采用正握姿势握住杠铃，握距比肩宽。让杠铃在身体前方自然下垂，手臂充分伸展，手掌朝向身体外侧。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向上弯举。继续向上举起杠铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部高度。在最高点保持片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃降回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing away from your body.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell upward by contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽笔直站立，双手采用正握姿势握住杠铃，握距比肩宽。
让杠铃在身体前方自然下垂，手臂充分伸展，手掌朝向身体外侧。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向上弯举。
继续向上举起杠铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部高度。
在最高点保持片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，慢慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand in front of a bench or step with a barbell resting on your upper back. Place one foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface. Push through your heel and step up onto the bench or step, fully extending your hip and knee. Pause briefly at the top, then lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat with the opposite leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握杠铃立于凳前，确保杠铃稳定地放置在上背部。将一只脚全脚掌稳稳地踏在凳面上，脚跟着力向上推进，充分伸展髋关节和膝关节，完成登凳动作。在顶端短暂停顿后，缓慢下降回起始姿势。换另一侧腿重复动作，两侧腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand in front of a bench or step with a barbell resting on your upper back.
Place one foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Push through your heel and step up onto the bench or step, fully extending your hip and knee.
Pause briefly at the top, then lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat with the opposite leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握杠铃置于上背部，站在凳或台阶前
将一只脚全脚掌稳稳地踏在凳面上，确保整个脚底都与支撑面接触
脚跟着力向上推进，充分伸展髋关节和膝关节，登上凳面
在顶端短暂停顿后，缓慢下降回起始姿势
换另一侧腿重复上述动作
两侧腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your glutes back. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。将杠铃横置于上背部，搭在斜方肌上。保持背部挺直，以髋关节为轴向前屈髋，同时将臀部向后推。当躯干与地面平行时停止，此时应能感受到腘绳肌的拉伸。通过激活臀肌和腘绳肌的力量将身体恢复至起始姿势。重复完成所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your glutes back.
Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
将杠铃横置于上背部，搭在斜方肌上。
保持背部挺直，以髋关节为轴向前屈髋，同时将臀部向后推。
当躯干与地面平行时停止，此时应能感受到腘绳肌的拉伸。
通过激活臀肌和腘绳肌的力量将身体恢复至起始姿势。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖向前。双手握住杠铃，采用正握握法，双手间距比肩略宽。屈髋向下，将杠铃向地面方向下降，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。下放杠铃直至感觉到腘绳肌被拉伸。然后收缩腘绳肌和臀肌，将杠铃拉起回到起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend at your hips and lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Lower the barbell until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.
Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖向前。
双手握住杠铃，采用正握握法，双手间距比肩略宽。
屈髋向下，将杠铃向地面方向下降，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。
下放杠铃直至感觉到腘绳肌被拉伸。
收缩腘绳肌和臀肌，将杠铃拉起回到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards. Place a barbell on the ground in front of you, centered between your feet. Bend your knees and lower your hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, to grip the barbell with an overhand grip. Engage your core and drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees simultaneously. As you lift, keep your chest up and back straight, and push your hips forward to fully engage your glutes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开站立，距离比肩宽，脚尖向外展开。将杠铃放在身体前方的地面上，位于双脚之间中央位置。弯曲膝盖并下降臀部，同时保持背部挺直、胸部上抬，用正握握住杠铃。收紧核心肌群，通过脚跟发力将杠铃从地面拉起，髋关节和膝关节同时伸展。在向上拉起的过程中，保持胸部抬起和背部挺直，并将髋部向前推以充分激活臀肌。在顶部稍作停顿，然后控制好身体，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Place a barbell on the ground in front of you, centered between your feet.
Bend your knees and lower your hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, to grip the barbell with an overhand grip.
Engage your core and drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees simultaneously.
As you lift, keep your chest up and back straight, and push your hips forward to fully engage your glutes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开站立，距离比肩宽，脚尖向外展开。
将杠铃放在身体前方的地面上，位于双脚之间中央位置。
弯曲膝盖并下降臀部，同时保持背部挺直、胸部上抬，用正握握住杠铃。
收紧核心肌群，通过脚跟发力将杠铃从地面拉起，髋关节和膝关节同时伸展。
在向上拉起的过程中，保持胸部抬起和背部挺直，并将髋部向前推以充分激活臀肌。
在顶部稍作停顿，然后控制好身体，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell at shoulder height with an overhand grip. Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the barbell overhead. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height as you lower back into the squat position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手正握将杠铃置于肩部高度。弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推，蹲下至深蹲姿势。在达到深蹲底部时，通过脚后跟发力爆发性地站起，同时将杠铃向上推举过头顶。当下蹲回至深蹲姿势时，将杠铃降低回至肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell at shoulder height with an overhand grip.
Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the barbell overhead.
Lower the barbell back to shoulder height as you lower back into the squat position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手正握将杠铃置于肩部高度。
弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推，蹲下至深蹲姿势。
在达到深蹲底部时，通过脚后跟发力爆发性地站起，同时将杠铃向上推举过头顶。
当下蹲回至深蹲姿势时，将杠铃降低回至肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight and core engaged, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握握住杠铃，手距略宽于肩。杠铃自然垂于大腿前方，双臂完全伸直。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上提起，肘部领先。当杠铃接近下巴位置时稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Keeping your back straight and core engaged, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握握住杠铃，手距略宽于肩。
杠铃自然垂于大腿前方，双臂完全伸直。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上提起，肘部领先。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手正握杠铃，手间距略宽于肩。杠铃自然垂于大腿前侧，双臂完全伸直。保持背部挺直，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上拉起至下巴位置，以肘部为先导。到达顶峰位置后稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手正握杠铃，手间距略宽于肩。
杠铃自然垂于大腿前侧，双臂完全伸直。
保持背部挺直，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上拉起至下巴位置，以肘部为先导。
到达顶峰位置后稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your core engaged and back straight, exhale as you lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握握法握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。杠铃自然垂于大腿前方，手臂完全伸直。保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上提拉至下巴位置，手肘带动发力。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气的同时将杠铃缓慢下放至起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Keeping your core engaged and back straight, exhale as you lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握握法握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。
杠铃自然垂于大腿前方，手臂完全伸直。
保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上提拉至下巴位置，手肘带动发力。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气的同时将杠铃缓慢下放至起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly flared out. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手采用比肩宽稍宽的握距握住杠铃。将杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸直，置于胸部正上方。控制速度将杠铃缓缓下放至胸部，同时保持肘部略微外展。当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿，然后发力将其推回起始位置。按要求的次数重复完成此动作。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly flared out.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手采用比肩宽稍宽的握距握住杠铃。
将杠铃从架子上抬起，双臂完全伸直，置于胸部正上方。
控制速度将杠铃缓缓下放至胸部，同时保持肘部略微外展。
当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿，然后发力将其推回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数完成此动作。

name.en: barbell wide reverse grip bench press

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the barbell with a wide reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in and your wrists straight. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在平板凳上，双脚踏实地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手采用比肩宽稍宽的反手握法握住杠铃。将杠铃从架上举起，手臂完全伸直，使其位于胸部正上方。控制速度慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收、手腕挺直。当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿，然后发力将其推回起始位置。按要求重复完成相应次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the barbell with a wide reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in and your wrists straight.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在平板凳上，双脚踏实地面，背部紧贴凳面。
采用比肩宽稍宽的反手握法握住杠铃。
将杠铃从架上举起，手臂完全伸直，使其位于胸部正上方。
控制速度慢慢将杠铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收、手腕挺直。
杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿，然后发力将其推回起始位置。
按要求重复完成相应次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开站立，距离略宽于肩部，脚尖略微向外。将杠铃横跨在上背部，杠铃杆放置在斜方肌或三角肌后束上。收紧核心肌群，保持挺胸，同时下蹲，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。在底部暂停片刻，然后通过脚后跟发力，恢复到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开站立，距离略宽于肩部，脚尖略微向外。
将杠铃横跨在上背部，杠铃杆放置在斜方肌或三角肌后束上。
收紧核心肌群，保持挺胸，同时下蹲，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。
在底部暂停片刻，然后通过脚后跟发力，恢复到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用正握姿势握住杠铃，双手间距比肩宽。将杠铃垂放于大腿前方，手臂完全伸直。保持背部挺直，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上拉起，靠近下巴位置，注意肘部引导。到达顶峰位置时稍作停顿，然后吸气并慢慢将杠铃降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用正握姿势握住杠铃，双手间距比肩宽。
将杠铃垂放于大腿前方，手臂完全伸直。
保持背部挺直，呼气的同时将杠铃垂直向上拉起，靠近下巴位置，注意肘部引导。
到达顶峰位置时稍作停顿，然后吸气并慢慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, holding a barbell with an underhand grip. Allow the barbell to roll down to your fingertips, keeping your wrists straight. Slowly curl the barbell up towards your forearms by flexing your wrists. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，前臂放在大腿上，反握杠铃。杠铃向下滚至指尖，手腕保持伸直。通过屈腕慢慢将杠铃弯举向小臂方向。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your forearms resting on your thighs, holding a barbell with an underhand grip.
Allow the barbell to roll down to your fingertips, keeping your wrists straight.
Slowly curl the barbell up towards your forearms by flexing your wrists.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，前臂放在大腿上，反握杠铃。
杠铃向下滚至指尖，手腕保持伸直。
通过屈腕慢慢将杠铃弯举向小臂方向。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.zh: 杠铃手腕弯举 第二式

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。双手握杠铃，采用反握姿势（掌心向上），手距与肩同宽。将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬空垂下。缓慢向上弯曲手腕，将杠铃向前臂方向卷起。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲。
双手握杠铃，采用反握姿势（掌心向上），手距与肩同宽。
将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬空垂下。
缓慢向上弯曲手腕，将杠铃向前臂方向卷起。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the bar for stability. Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position. Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外旋站立。将杠铃放置在双肘弯处，双手握住杠铃以保持稳定。收紧核心肌群，挺胸，保持身体正直，屈髋屈膝向下蹲至深蹲姿势。保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚后跟上。在深蹲底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推起回到起始姿势。按所需次数重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Hold the barbell in the crooks of your elbows, with your hands gripping the bar for stability.
Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you lower your hips back and down into a squat position.
Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外旋站立。
将杠铃放置在双肘弯处，双手握住杠铃以保持稳定。
收紧核心肌群，挺胸，保持身体正直，屈髋屈膝向下蹲至深蹲姿势。
保持膝盖与脚尖方向一致，重心落在脚后跟上。
在深蹲底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力将身体推起回到起始姿势。
按所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Reach down towards your toes with your hands, keeping your legs as straight as possible. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。保持背部挺直，膝盖微弯，从腰部向前弯曲身体。尽可能保持腿部伸直，用手去触碰脚趾。在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Reach down towards your toes with your hands, keeping your legs as straight as possible.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。
保持背部挺直，膝盖微弯，从腰部向前弯曲身体。
尽可能保持腿部伸直，用手去触碰脚趾。
在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。
根据需要的重复次数重复动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other. Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm. Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。双手各握绳索一端，掌心相对。将手臂抬起至肩部高度，手肘保持微屈。通过快速上下交替抬放双臂来制造交替波浪。持续做满设定的时长或次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold one end of the rope in each hand, with your palms facing each other.
Raise your arms to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Begin making alternating waves with the ropes by rapidly raising and lowering each arm.
Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。
双手各握绳索一端，掌心相对。
将手臂抬起至肩部高度，手肘保持微屈。
通过快速上下交替抬放双臂来制造交替波浪。
持续做满设定的时长或次数。

instructions.en: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips. Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged. Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot. Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements. Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise. Continue for the desired distance or time.
instructions.zh: 四肢撑地起始，双手位于双肩正下方，双膝位于髋关节正下方。微微抬起双膝离地，保持背部平直，核心肌群收紧。右手与左脚同时向前移动，随后左手与右脚跟进。继续向前爬行，交替进行手脚配合移动。保持稳定的节奏，全程收紧核心。根据需要的距离或时间持续进行。

en: Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Continue for the desired distance or time.
zh: 四肢撑地起始，双手位于双肩正下方，双膝位于髋关节正下方。
微微抬起双膝离地，保持背部平直，核心肌群收紧。
右手与左脚同时向前移动，随后左手与右脚跟进。
继续向前爬行，交替进行手脚配合移动。
保持稳定的节奏，全程收紧核心。
根据需要的距离或时间持续进行。

instructions.en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Interlace your fingers behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Slowly squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat as desired.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽，站立挺直。双手在头后交叉，双肘向外展开。慢慢将肩胛骨向中间靠拢，同时向前挺胸。保持这个拉伸姿势15-30秒。放松拉伸，可根据需要重复进行。

en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Interlace your fingers behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Slowly squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Release the stretch and repeat as desired.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽，站立挺直。
双手在头后交叉，双肘向外展开。
慢慢将肩胛骨向中间靠拢，同时向前挺胸。
保持这个拉伸姿势15-30秒。
放松拉伸，可根据需要重复进行。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips. Slide your butt off the bench and straighten your legs in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子边缘，双手握住臀部旁边的边缘。将臀部滑离凳面，腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。弯曲肘部使身体向地面方向下降，保持背部尽量贴近凳子。在最低点稍作停顿，然后用力向上推回起始位置。按照目标重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Slide your butt off the bench and straighten your legs in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子边缘，双手握住臀部旁边的凳沿。
将臀部滑离凳面，腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。
弯曲肘部使身体向地面方向下降，保持背部尽量贴近凳子。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后用力向上推回起始位置。
按照目标重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子的边缘，双手握住边缘，手指朝前。将臀部滑出凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。通过弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子的边缘，双手握住边缘，手指朝前。
将臀部滑出凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。
通过弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。
通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back against the bench and your feet flat on the ground. Place your hands on the bench for support. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，背部靠在凳面上，双脚平放在地面。双手撑在凳子上以保持身体稳定。收紧臀肌和腘绳肌，然后将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将髋部降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back against the bench and your feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands on the bench for support.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，背部靠在凳面上，双脚平放在地面。
双手撑在凳子上以保持身体稳定。
收紧臀肌和腘绳肌，然后将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将髋部降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Position yourself under a bar or a sturdy horizontal surface that is at chest height. Grab the bar or surface with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Pull your chest towards the bar or surface by squeezing your shoulder blades together and bending your elbows. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar or surface. Lower yourself back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 站在杠铃或稳固的水平面下方，将身体置于杠下，保持手臂完全伸展，身体呈直立姿势，双手采用正握，间距略宽于肩宽。通过挤压肩胛骨并弯曲手肘，将胸部向杠铃方向拉起。持续向上拉直至下巴超过杠铃高度。然后控制好速度，慢慢将身体下降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Position yourself under a bar or a sturdy horizontal surface that is at chest height.
Grab the bar or surface with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Pull your chest towards the bar or surface by squeezing your shoulder blades together and bending your elbows.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar or surface.
Lower yourself back down to the starting position with control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 站在杠铃或稳固的水平面下方，将身体置于杠下。
双手采用正握，间距略宽于肩宽。
保持手臂完全伸展，身体呈直立姿势。
通过挤压肩胛骨并弯曲手肘，将胸部向杠铃方向拉起。
持续向上拉直至下巴超过杠铃高度。
控制好速度，慢慢将身体下降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms out to the sides, perpendicular to your body. Keeping your knees together, slowly lower them to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your knees. Pause for a moment, then engage your core and slowly lift your knees back to the starting position. Repeat the movement to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。将双臂向身体两侧伸展，与身体呈垂直角度。保持双膝并拢的同时，慢慢将膝盖向一侧放下，目标是让膝盖触碰地面。保持片刻，然后收紧核心肌群，慢慢将膝盖抬回起始位置。换另一侧重复动作。继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Extend your arms out to the sides, perpendicular to your body.
Keeping your knees together, slowly lower them to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your knees.
Pause for a moment, then engage your core and slowly lift your knees back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
将双臂向身体两侧伸展，与身体呈垂直角度。
保持双膝并拢，慢慢将膝盖向一侧放下，目标是让膝盖触碰地面。
保持片刻，然后收紧核心肌群，慢慢将膝盖抬回起始位置。
换另一侧重复动作。
继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 腿部支撑哑铃集中弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. With your palm facing up, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary. Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双腿分开，脚掌平放于地面。一只手握住哑铃，将肘部放置在大腿内侧、膝盖上方位置。手掌朝上，在保持上臂固定不动的状态下，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端充分收缩肱二头肌，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

en: Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
With your palm facing up, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双腿分开，脚掌平放于地面。
一只手握住哑铃，将肘部放置在大腿内侧、膝盖上方位置。
手掌朝上，在保持上臂固定不动的状态下，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端充分收缩肱二头肌，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

name.zh: 肱二头肌窄距引体向上

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull yourself up towards the bar, focusing on using your biceps to lift your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手以掌心朝向自己的方式握住引体向上杠，间距与肩同宽。收紧核心肌群，将身体向上拉起，集中注意力用肱二头肌发力。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体放下回到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull yourself up towards the bar, focusing on using your biceps to lift your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手以掌心朝向自己的方式握住引体向上杠，间距与肩同宽。
收紧核心肌群，将身体向上拉起，集中注意力用肱二头肌发力。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体放下回到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull yourself up by bending your elbows, bringing your chest towards the bar. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手反握单杠，与肩同宽悬挂，收紧核心。通过弯曲肘部向上拉，将胸部靠近单杠。在动作最高点停顿，然后缓慢下降回到起始位置。重复进行所需的重复次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull yourself up by bending your elbows, bringing your chest towards the bar.
Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手反握单杠，与肩同宽悬挂。
收紧核心，通过弯曲肘部向上拉，将胸部靠近单杠。
在动作最高点停顿，然后缓慢下降回到起始位置。
重复进行所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by placing your hands on a raised surface, such as a bench or parallel bars, with your palms facing down and fingers pointing forward. Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides, until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手撑在凳子、椅子或双杠等高于地面的平面上，手指向前，手掌朝下。将双腿向前方伸直，脚跟着地，身体保持一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将身体向下降低，手肘贴近身体两侧，直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后双手用力推地，将手臂伸直，身体回到起始姿势。重复完成所需次数。

en: Start by placing your hands on a raised surface, such as a bench or parallel bars, with your palms facing down and fingers pointing forward.
Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground and your body straight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides, until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手撑在高于地面的平面（如凳子或双杠）上，手指朝前，手掌向下。
将双腿向前伸直，脚跟着地，身体从头到脚保持一条直线。
弯曲手肘将身体向下降低，手肘贴近身体两侧，直至上臂与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后双手用力推地，伸直手臂，将身体抬回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Jump up explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles. While in mid-air, quickly bring your feet together. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately drop back into a squat position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推，使身体下降至深蹲姿势。通过伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节向上爆发性跳起。在空中迅速将双脚靠拢。轻柔地落在前脚掌，并立即回到深蹲姿势。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Jump up explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
While in mid-air, quickly bring your feet together.
Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately drop back into a squat position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推，使身体下降至深蹲姿势。
通过伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节向上爆发性跳起。
在空中迅速将双脚靠拢。
轻柔地落在前脚掌，并立即回到深蹲姿势。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. Hold this position for the desired amount of time. Lower your hips back down to the ground and repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 首先侧卧在地面上，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。将支撑侧的前臂放在肩膀正下方，肘部弯曲成90度角。收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使身体从头到脚呈一条笔直的线。保持这个姿势至所需时间，然后缓慢将髋部降回地面，换另一侧重复动作。

en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Lower your hips back down to the ground and repeat on the other side.
zh: 首先侧卧，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。
将前臂放在肩膀正下方的地面上，肘部弯曲成90度角。
收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使从头到脚呈一条直线。
保持此姿势至所需时间。
将髋部降回地面，换另一侧重复动作。

name.zh: 自重跪姿肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Kneel down on the ground with your knees hip-width apart. Place your hands on the ground in front of you, shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward. Extend your legs straight behind you, balancing on your toes and hands, forming a straight line from head to heels. Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 跪在地面上，双膝与髋同宽。双手撑地，与肩同宽，手指朝前。将双腿向后伸直，用脚尖和双手支撑身体，保持从头到脚跟呈一条直线。弯曲手肘，将上半身向地面方向降低，手肘贴近身体两侧。在最低点停顿片刻，然后通过双手用力推地，将手臂伸直，回到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Kneel down on the ground with your knees hip-width apart.
Place your hands on the ground in front of you, shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Extend your legs straight behind you, balancing on your toes and hands, forming a straight line from head to heels.
Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 跪在地面上，双膝与髋同宽。
双手撑地，与肩同宽，手指朝前。
双腿向后伸直，用脚尖和双手支撑身体，保持从头到脚跟呈一条直线。
弯曲手肘，将上半身向地面方向降低，手肘贴近身体两侧。
在最低点停顿片刻，然后通过双手用力推地，将手臂伸直，回到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm. Hold your upper arm against your side and bend your elbow to curl your forearm towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 侧卧在地上，双腿伸直，头部靠在手臂上支撑。将上臂贴近身体侧边，弯曲肘部将前臂向肩膀方向弯举。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm.
Hold your upper arm against your side and bend your elbow to curl your forearm towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 侧卧在地上，双腿伸直，头部靠在手臂上支撑。
将上臂贴近身体侧边，弯曲肘部将前臂向肩膀方向弯举。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding onto a sturdy object or suspension trainer with your arms extended. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and your knees behind your toes. From the squat position, pull your body up towards the object or suspension trainer, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手抓住牢固的物体或悬挂训练器，手臂伸直。身体下蹲成深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，膝盖不要超过脚尖。从深蹲姿势开始，将身体向上拉向物体或悬挂训练器，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体降回起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding onto a sturdy object or suspension trainer with your arms extended.
Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and your knees behind your toes.
From the squat position, pull your body up towards the object or suspension trainer, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手抓住牢固的物体或悬挂训练器，手臂伸直。
身体下蹲成深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，膝盖不要超过脚尖。
从深蹲姿势开始，将身体向上拉向物体或悬挂训练器，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将身体降回起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 毛巾辅助自重深蹲划船

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a towel in front of you with your palms facing down. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and your chest up. As you lower into the squat, simultaneously pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then slowly return to the starting position while extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住毛巾垂于身前，掌心向下。弯曲膝盖并将身体下蹲成深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。在下蹲的同时，将毛巾向胸部方向拉近，收缩肩胛骨。在深蹲最低处稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置，同时伸展手臂。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a towel in front of you with your palms facing down.
Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
As you lower into the squat, simultaneously pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then slowly return to the starting position while extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住毛巾垂于身前，掌心向下。
弯曲膝盖并下蹲成深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部挺起。
在下蹲的同时，将毛巾向胸部方向拉近，收缩肩胛骨。
在深蹲最低处稍作停顿，然后慢慢回到起始位置，同时伸展手臂。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Place your hands on a wall or stable surface for balance. Slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。将双手放在墙上或其他稳固的表面上以保持平衡。慢慢将脚跟抬离地面，将身体重量转移到脚前掌。在最高点稍作停留，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Place your hands on a wall or stable surface for balance.
Slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。
将双手放在墙上或其他稳固的表面上以保持平衡。
慢慢将脚跟抬离地面，将身体重量转移到脚前掌。
在最高点稍作停留，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.en: bodyweight standing close-grip one arm row
name.zh: 自重站立窄握单臂划船

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，单手以中立握法握住哑铃。屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体，同时挤压肩胛骨。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，单手以中立握法握住哑铃。
屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arms straight in front of you, gripping the bar or handles with a close grip. Pull the bar or handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。身体从腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。双臂向前伸直，窄握横杆或手柄。将横杆或手柄向身体方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放并返回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Extend your arms straight in front of you, gripping the bar or handles with a close grip.
Pull the bar or handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
从腰部向前弯曲身体，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
双臂向前伸直，窄握横杆或手柄。
将横杆或手柄向身体方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放并返回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let the dumbbell hang straight down in front of you, with your arm fully extended. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，单手持哑铃。屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。手臂完全伸直，让哑铃垂直悬于身体前侧。将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体。动作顶端时挤压肩胛骨。将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Let the dumbbell hang straight down in front of you, with your arm fully extended.
Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，单手持哑铃。
屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。
手臂完全伸直，让哑铃垂直悬于身体前侧。
将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体。
动作顶端时挤压肩胛骨。
将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数，然后换另一侧进行。

name.en: bodyweight standing one arm row (with towel)

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，单手握住毛巾。髋关节前屈，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将毛巾向胸部方向拉，感受肩胛骨的夹紧。在顶点稍作停留，然后慢慢将毛巾放回起始位置。重复所需的次数，然后换另一只手臂进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，单手握住毛巾。
髋关节前屈，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将毛巾向胸部方向拉，感受肩胛骨的夹紧。
在顶点稍作停留，然后慢慢将毛巾放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一只手臂进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Grasp a bar or handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Pull the bar or handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement. Slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。双手握住把手或横杆，采用正握方式，手掌朝下。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将把手向身体方向拉近，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢放下手臂回到起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Grasp a bar or handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Pull the bar or handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲
双手握住把手或横杆，采用正握方式，手掌朝下
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧
将把手向身体方向拉近，同时用力挤压肩胛骨
在动作最高点稍作停顿
慢慢放下手臂回到起始位置
重复完成所需的次数

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel in front of you with both hands. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住毛巾置于身前。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。将毛巾向胸部方向拉，感受肩胛骨用力夹紧。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始姿势。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a towel in front of you with both hands.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住毛巾置于身前。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
将毛巾向胸部方向拉，感受肩胛骨用力夹紧。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始姿势。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet off the ground. Engaging your abs, lift your hips off the ground, bringing your knees towards your head. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放在身体两侧。弯曲膝盖，将膝盖向胸部方向收起，同时保持双脚离地。收紧腹肌发力，将臀部向上抬起，使膝盖尽量靠近头部。在动作顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢地将臀部放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Bend your knees and bring them towards your chest, keeping your feet off the ground.
Engaging your abs, lift your hips off the ground, bringing your knees towards your head.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放在身体两侧。
弯曲膝盖，将膝盖向胸部方向收起，同时保持双脚离地。
收紧腹肌发力，将臀部向上抬起，使膝盖尽量靠近头部。
在动作顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢地将臀部放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: box jump down with one leg stabilization

instructions.en: Stand in front of a box or platform with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and jump onto the box, landing softly with one foot on the box and the other foot hanging off the edge. Stabilize yourself on the box with the foot that is on it, while keeping the other foot off the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, engaging your calf muscles to maintain balance. Slowly step down with the foot that is on the box, returning to the starting position. Repeat the exercise with the other leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站在跳箱或平台前。屈膝跳上箱子，一只脚轻柔地落在箱子上，另一只脚悬在箱子边缘外。用落在箱子上的那只脚在箱子上保持稳定，同时另一只脚保持离地状态。保持这个姿势几秒钟，收紧小腿肌群以维持平衡。用箱子上的那只脚慢慢下到地面，回到起始位置。换另一条腿重复这个动作。

en: Stand in front of a box or platform with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and jump onto the box, landing softly with one foot on the box and the other foot hanging off the edge.
Stabilize yourself on the box with the foot that is on it, while keeping the other foot off the ground.
Hold this position for a few seconds, engaging your calf muscles to maintain balance.
Slowly step down with the foot that is on the box, returning to the starting position.
Repeat the exercise with the other leg.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站在跳箱或平台前。
屈膝跳上箱子，一只脚轻柔地落在箱子上，另一只脚悬在箱子边缘外。
用落在箱子上的那只脚在箱子上保持稳定，同时另一只脚保持离地。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，收紧小腿肌群以维持平衡。
用箱子上的那只脚慢慢下到地面，回到起始位置。
换另一条腿重复这个动作。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and lift your right foot off the ground, bringing your right knee towards your left elbow. Return your right foot to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left foot towards your right elbow. Continue alternating sides, moving at a controlled pace. Keep your hips level and avoid lifting your hips too high or sagging them too low. Maintain a steady breathing pattern throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手位于肩部正下方，身体呈一条直线。收紧核心肌群，将右脚抬离地面，将右膝向左侧手肘方向靠拢。将右脚放回起始位置，然后换左脚向右侧手肘方向重复同样的动作。继续交替进行两侧动作，保持节奏稳定可控。保持臀部水平，避免抬得过高或过低。保持稳定的呼吸节奏。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Engage your core and lift your right foot off the ground, bringing your right knee towards your left elbow.
Return your right foot to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left foot towards your right elbow.
Continue alternating sides, moving at a controlled pace.
Keep your hips level and avoid lifting your hips too high or sagging them too low.
Maintain a steady breathing pattern throughout the exercise.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手位于肩部正下方，身体呈一条直线。
收紧核心肌群，将右脚抬离地面，将右膝向左侧手肘方向靠拢。
将右脚放回起始位置，然后换左脚向右侧手肘方向重复同样的动作。
继续交替进行两侧动作，保持节奏稳定可控。
保持臀部水平，避免抬得过高或过低。
保持稳定的呼吸节奏。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and placing your hands on the floor in front of you. Kick your feet back into a push-up position. Perform a push-up, keeping your body in a straight line. Jump your feet back into the squat position. Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead. Land softly and immediately lower back into a squat position to begin the next repetition.
instructions.zh: 从双脚与肩同宽的站立姿势开始。弯曲膝盖，双手放在身体前方的地面上，身体下降进入深蹲姿势。双脚向后跳至俯卧撑姿势。完成一个俯卧撑，保持身体呈一条直线。双脚跳回深蹲姿势。爆发性向上跳起，双臂向上伸展过头顶。轻盈落地后立即降低身体进入深蹲姿势，开始下一次重复。

en: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and placing your hands on the floor in front of you.
Kick your feet back into a push-up position.
Perform a push-up, keeping your body in a straight line.
Jump your feet back into the squat position.
Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Land softly and immediately lower back into a squat position to begin the next repetition.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽，保持站立姿势。
弯曲膝盖，双手放在身体前方的地面上，身体下降进入深蹲姿势。
双脚向后跳至俯卧撑姿势。
完成一个俯卧撑，保持身体呈一条直线。
双脚跳回深蹲姿势。
爆发性向上跳起，双臂向上伸展过头顶。
轻盈落地后立即降低身体进入深蹲姿势，开始下一次重复。
