instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down. Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest. At the top of the movement, squeeze your abs and pause for a moment. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平贴地面。双手放在身体两侧，掌心向下。收缩腹肌，将双腿抬起，膝盖向胸部靠拢。在动作最高点时，用力收缩腹肌并保持短暂停顿。然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down.
Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
At the top of the movement, squeeze your abs and pause for a moment.
Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平贴地面。
双手放在身体两侧，掌心向下。
收缩腹肌，将双腿抬起，膝盖向胸部靠拢。
在动作最高点时，用力收缩腹肌并保持短暂停顿。
缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your knees and bring the soles of your feet together, allowing your knees to fall out to the sides. Hold onto your ankles or feet with your hands. Sit up tall and lengthen your spine. Gently press your knees down towards the floor, feeling a stretch in your inner thighs. Hold this position for a few breaths. To release, slowly bring your knees back up and extend your legs.
instructions.zh: 坐在地板上，双腿向前伸直。弯曲膝盖，将双脚底相对靠拢，让膝盖自然向两侧展开。双手握住脚踝或双脚。挺直身体，脊柱向上延伸。轻轻将膝盖向下压向地板，感受大腿内侧的拉伸。保持这个姿势呼吸几次。释放时，慢慢将膝盖抬回原位，然后伸直双腿。

en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Bend your knees and bring the soles of your feet together, allowing your knees to fall out to the sides.
Hold onto your ankles or feet with your hands.
Sit up tall and lengthen your spine.
Gently press your knees down towards the floor, feeling a stretch in your inner thighs.
Hold this position for a few breaths.
To release, slowly bring your knees back up and extend your legs.
zh: 坐在地板上，双腿向前伸直。
弯曲膝盖，将双脚底相对靠拢，让膝盖自然向两侧展开。
双手握住脚踝或双脚。
挺直身体，脊柱向上延伸。
轻轻将膝盖向下压向地板，感受大腿内侧的拉伸。
保持这个姿势呼吸几次。
释放时，慢慢将膝盖抬回原位，然后伸直双腿。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the handles of the cable machine with an overhand grip. Position your hands at shoulder height, with your palms facing forward. Keep your core engaged and your back straight. Press one handle up and forward until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住绳索器械的手柄，采用正握方式。将双手置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。保持核心肌群收紧，背部挺直。将一只手臂的手柄向上向前推举，直至手臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。换另一只手臂重复动作。交替双臂完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the handles of the cable machine with an overhand grip.
Position your hands at shoulder height, with your palms facing forward.
Keep your core engaged and your back straight.
Press one handle up and forward until your arm is fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm.
Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住绳索器械的手柄，采用正握方式。
将双手置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。
保持核心肌群收紧，背部挺直。
将一只手臂的手柄向上向前推举，直至手臂完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复动作。
交替双臂完成所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 绳索交替肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with your right hand and bring your arm up so that your upper arm is parallel to the ground and your elbow is bent at a 90-degree angle. Keep your upper arm stationary and extend your forearm backward, fully straightening your arm. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat with your left arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。右手握住绳索手柄，将手臂抬起，使上臂与地面保持平行，肘部弯曲呈90度角。保持上臂固定不动，将前臂向后伸展，完全伸直手臂。稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。换左手重复上述动作。继续双手交替进行至目标次数。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable handle with your right hand and bring your arm up so that your upper arm is parallel to the ground and your elbow is bent at a 90-degree angle.
Keep your upper arm stationary and extend your forearm backward, fully straightening your arm.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat with your left arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
右手握住绳索手柄，将手臂抬起，使上臂与地面保持平行，肘部弯曲呈90度角。
保持上臂固定不动，将前臂向后伸展，完全伸直手臂。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
换左手重复上述动作。
继续双手交替进行至目标次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle attachment is at the lowest setting. Lie face down on the bench with your legs straight and the ankle attachment secured to your ankles. Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability. Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings. Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械的脚踝固定器调整到最低位置。俯卧在长凳上，双腿伸直，将脚踝固定器固定在脚踝处，并握住长凳把手以保持身体稳定。保持上半身固定不动，呼气时通过弯曲膝盖将双腿向臀部方向卷起。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压腘绳肌。然后吸气，缓慢地将双腿放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle attachment is at the lowest setting.
Lie face down on the bench with your legs straight and the ankle attachment secured to your ankles.
Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings.
Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械的脚踝固定器调整到最低位置。
俯卧在长凳上，双腿伸直，将脚踝固定器固定在脚踝处。
握住长凳把手以保持身体稳定。
保持上半身固定不动，呼气时通过弯曲膝盖将双腿向臀部方向卷起。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压腘绳肌。
吸气，缓慢地将双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable pulley to a high position and attach a straight bar. Sit facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the bar down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索滑轮调整到高位，并安装直杆。面对绳索器械坐好，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。采用正握方式握住横杆，握距比肩略宽。身体微微后倾，挺起胸部，下背部保持轻微的弧度。将横杆向下拉向胸部，以肘部为主导，同时将肩胛骨向一起夹紧。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将横杆返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable pulley to a high position and attach a straight bar.
Sit facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Pull the bar down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索滑轮调整到高位，并安装直杆。
面对绳索器械坐好，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。
采用正握方式握住横杆，握距比肩略宽。
身体微微后倾，挺起胸部，下背部保持轻微的弧度。
将横杆向下拉向胸部，以肘部为主导，同时将肩胛骨向一起夹紧。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将横杆返回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine to chest height and attach the handles. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step forward to create tension in the cables. Position your feet firmly on the ground and engage your core. Bend your elbows and bring your hands to shoulder level, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the handles forward, extending your arms fully in front of you. Pause for a moment, then slowly reverse the movement, bringing your hands back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械调整至胸部高度并连接把手。背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。握住把手采用正握方式，然后向前迈步以产生绳索张力。双脚稳固踩实地面，收紧核心肌群。弯曲肘部将双手抬起至肩部高度，保持肘部呈90度角。向前推动把手，将手臂完全伸展于身体正前方。稍作停顿，然后缓慢还原动作，将双手收回至肩部高度。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the cable machine to chest height and attach the handles.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step forward to create tension in the cables.
Position your feet firmly on the ground and engage your core.
Bend your elbows and bring your hands to shoulder level, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Push the handles forward, extending your arms fully in front of you.
Pause for a moment, then slowly reverse the movement, bringing your hands back to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械调整至胸部高度并连接把手。
背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
握住把手采用正握方式，然后向前迈步以产生绳索张力。
双脚稳固踩实地面，收紧核心肌群。
弯曲肘部将双手抬起至肩部高度，保持肘部呈90度角。
向前推动把手，将手臂完全伸展于身体正前方。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢还原动作，将双手收回至肩部高度。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接到低位滑轮绳索器械上。双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。反手握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。在整个动作过程中，保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。呼气时将杆向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶端稍停片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气时缓慢将杆下放回起始位置，充分伸展双臂。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接到低位滑轮绳索器械上。
双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
反手握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。
在整个动作过程中，保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
呼气时将杆向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶端稍停片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气时缓慢将杆下放回起始位置，充分伸展双臂。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。握住绳索手柄，采用反握姿势，将肘部靠在大腿内侧。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢地将绳索手柄放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成练习后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and rest your elbow against the inside of your thigh.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。
握住绳索手柄，采用反握姿势，将肘部靠在大腿内侧。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢地将绳索手柄放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数完成练习后，换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the cable handle with your right hand and place your elbow on the inside of your right knee. Extend your arm fully, keeping your elbow stationary and close to your knee. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。右手握住绳索手柄，将肘部放在右膝内侧。手臂完全伸展，保持肘部固定并靠近膝盖。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the cable handle with your right hand and place your elbow on the inside of your right knee.
Extend your arm fully, keeping your elbow stationary and close to your knee.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
右手握住绳索手柄，将肘部放在右膝内侧。
手臂完全伸展，保持肘部固定并靠近膝盖。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Attach a cable handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height. Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cables. Lean forward slightly from the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Pull the handles down and across your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接在龙门架每侧的肩部高度位置。双脚分开与肩同宽，站在器械中央。双手握住手柄，手掌朝下，向后退步以在绳索中产生张力。髋部微微前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。将手柄向下拉并横过身体，收缩肩胛骨。在动作底部暂停片刻，然后缓慢返回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Attach a cable handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cables.
Lean forward slightly from the hips, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Pull the handles down and across your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接在龙门架每侧的肩部高度位置。
双脚分开与肩同宽，站在器械中央。
双手握住手柄，手掌朝下，向后退步以在绳索中产生张力。
髋部微微前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。
将手柄向下拉并横过身体，收缩肩胛骨。
在动作底部暂停片刻，然后缓慢返回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Attach a D-handle to each low pulley cable and stand in the middle of the cable crossover machine. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and take a step forward, positioning your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and lean forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged. With your arms extended out to the sides and slightly bent at the elbows, exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the cables back and upward in a reverse fly motion. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将D型手柄分别安装在两侧低位滑轮上，站在绳索交叉机的中央位置。掌心向下握住手柄，向前迈出一步，双脚与肩同宽站立。膝盖微微弯曲，身体前倾约45度，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。双臂向身体两侧伸展，肘部微屈，呼气的同时将肩胛骨向脊柱中央夹紧，将绳索向上拉起做反向飞鸟动作。在动作顶点停顿片刻，感受肌肉的强烈收缩，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a D-handle to each low pulley cable and stand in the middle of the cable crossover machine.
Grasp the handles with a pronated grip (palms facing down) and take a step forward, positioning your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and lean forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged.
With your arms extended out to the sides and slightly bent at the elbows, exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the cables back and upward in a reverse fly motion.
Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将D型手柄分别安装在两侧低位滑轮上，站在绳索交叉机的中央位置。
掌心向下握住手柄，向前迈出一步，双脚与肩同宽站立。
膝盖微微弯曲，身体前倾约45度，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
双臂向身体两侧伸展，肘部微屈，呼气的同时将肩胛骨向脊柱中央夹紧，将绳索向上拉起做反向飞鸟动作。
在动作顶点停顿片刻，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable pulleys to chest height. Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot in front of the other. Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides. Take a step forward, keeping your arms slightly bent. With a slight bend in your elbows, bring your hands together in front of your chest. Pause for a moment, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索滑轮调整至胸部高度，双脚前后站立于龙门架中央位置。掌心向下握住手柄，双臂向两侧伸展。向前迈出一步，同时保持双臂略微弯曲。肘部微屈，将双手在胸前合拢。稍作停顿后，缓慢将双臂放回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Adjust the cable pulleys to chest height.
Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot in front of the other.
Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Take a step forward, keeping your arms slightly bent.
With a slight bend in your elbows, bring your hands together in front of your chest.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索滑轮调整至胸部高度。
双脚前后站立于龙门架中央位置。
掌心向下握住手柄，双臂向两侧伸展。
向前迈一步，保持双臂略微弯曲。
肘部微屈，将双手在胸前合拢。
稍作停顿后，缓慢将双臂放回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索训练器站立，双脚与肩同宽。用反握的方式握住绳索附件，手心朝上。将肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持固定。呼气的同时将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置。根据需要的次数重复练习。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
用反握的方式握住绳索附件，手心朝上。
将肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持固定不动。
呼气的同时将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend at the hips and knees, lowering your torso until your back is parallel to the ground. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your shoulders back. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift the cable handles, extending your hips and standing up straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索训练器站立，双脚分开与肩同宽。屈髋屈膝降低躯干，直至背部与地面平行。反手握住绳索手柄，保持手臂伸直，肩部向后收紧。通过臀肌和腘绳肌发力向上提拉手柄，伸展髋关节直至身体直立。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend at the hips and knees, lowering your torso until your back is parallel to the ground.
Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your shoulders back.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift the cable handles, extending your hips and standing up straight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handles back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索训练器站立，双脚分开与肩同宽。
屈髋屈膝降低躯干，直至背部与地面平行。
反手握住绳索手柄，保持手臂伸直，肩部向后收紧。
通过臀肌和腘绳肌发力向上提拉手柄，伸展髋关节直至身体直立。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索机调整至下斜位置。背对机器站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住手柄，掌心向前，双臂向前伸直。肘部保持轻微弯曲，控制性地将双臂向两侧打开。在完全伸展位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索机调整至下斜位置。
背对机器站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住手柄，掌心向前，双臂向前伸直。
肘部保持轻微弯曲，控制性地将双臂向两侧打开。
在完全伸展位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position. Stand facing away from the machine and grab the handle with one hand. Position yourself with your back against the decline bench and your arm extended straight in front of you. Bend your elbow and lower the handle towards your chest while keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handle back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械调整至下斜位置。背对器械站立，单手握住把手，背部靠在下斜凳上，手臂向前伸直。弯曲肘部，将把手向胸部方向下压，同时保持上臂固定。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将把手推回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂继续。

en: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Stand facing away from the machine and grab the handle with one hand.
Position yourself with your back against the decline bench and your arm extended straight in front of you.
Bend your elbow and lower the handle towards your chest while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handle back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 将绳索器械调整至下斜位置
背对器械站立，单手握住把手
将背部贴靠在下斜凳上，手臂向前伸直
弯曲肘部，将把手向胸部方向下压，同时保持上臂固定
在底部稍作停顿，然后将把手推回起始位置
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position. Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position them at chest level. Keep your feet flat on the ground and your back firmly against the bench. Exhale and push the handles away from your body, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, squeezing your chest muscles. Inhale and slowly return the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械调整至下斜位置。坐在下斜凳上，面朝绳索器械。手掌朝下握住手柄，将其置于胸部高度。双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。呼气时将手柄向前推出，手臂完全伸直。在动作末端稍作停顿，充分挤压胸部肌肉。吸气时缓慢将手柄恢复至起始位置。按所需次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position them at chest level.
Keep your feet flat on the ground and your back firmly against the bench.
Exhale and push the handles away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, squeezing your chest muscles.
Inhale and slowly return the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械调整至下斜位置。
坐在下斜凳上，面朝绳索器械。
手掌朝下握住手柄，将其置于胸部高度。
双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。
呼气时将手柄向前推出，手臂完全伸直。
在动作末端稍作停顿，充分挤压胸部肌肉。
吸气时缓慢将手柄恢复至起始位置。
按所需次数重复进行。

name.zh: 绳索下斜坐姿宽握划船

instructions.en: Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine with your feet securely placed on the footrests. Grasp the cable attachment with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在下斜凳上，面向绳索器械，双脚稳固地踩在脚踏板上。双手采用宽握方式握住绳索连接把手，掌心向下。身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将绳索向胸部下方拉动，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶峰稍作停顿，感受背部肌肉的充分收缩，然后缓慢地将绳索释放回初始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine with your feet securely placed on the footrests.
Grasp the cable attachment with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the cable towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在下斜凳上，面向绳索器械，双脚稳固地踩在脚踏板上。
双手采用宽握方式握住绳索连接把手，掌心向下。
身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将绳索向胸部下方拉动，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶峰稍作停顿，感受背部肌肉的充分收缩，然后缓慢地将绳索释放回初始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械。采用反握方式抓住绳索附件，掌心向上，双臂完全伸展。保持上臂静止，呼气时通过收缩肱二头肌将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气时缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械。
采用反握方式抓住绳索附件，掌心向上，双臂完全伸展。
保持上臂静止，呼气时通过收缩肱二头肌将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气时缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 绳索地板坐姿宽握划船

instructions.en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended and your back straight. Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and position the cable machine behind you. Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted. Pull the handle towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地面上，双腿伸直，背部保持挺直。将绳索手柄连接至低位滑轮，并将绳索器械置于身体后方。双手采用宽握正握方式握住手柄，掌心朝下。身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。将手柄向腰部方向拉动，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。在动作最高点短暂停顿，然后缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended and your back straight.
Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and position the cable machine behind you.
Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted.
Pull the handle towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地面上，双腿伸直，背部保持挺直。
将绳索手柄连接至低位滑轮，并将绳索器械置于身体后方。
双手采用宽握正握方式握住手柄，掌心朝下。
身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。
将手柄向腰部方向拉动，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
在动作最高点短暂停顿，然后缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your arms fully extended in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, raise the cable handle up to shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。正握绳索手柄，手掌向下，双臂在身前完全伸直。保持手臂伸直，将绳索手柄向上举至肩部高度。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄降回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Keeping your arms straight, raise the cable handle up to shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。
正握绳索手柄，手掌向下，双臂在身前完全伸直。
保持手臂伸直，将绳索手柄向上举至肩部高度。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄降回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将绳索手柄在身体前侧举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心向下。继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄降回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将绳索手柄在身体前侧举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心向下。
继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将绳索手柄在身体前侧举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心向下。继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄下降至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Raise the cable handle in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Continue lifting until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将绳索手柄在身体前侧举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心向下。
继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄下降至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the cable rope attachment back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双手握住绳索握把，采用反握姿势（掌心相对），手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将绳索向上弯举。继续提升绳索握把，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，绳索达到肩部水平位置。在肱二头肌充分收缩的状态下短暂停顿。吸气，然后慢慢将绳索放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Hold the cable rope attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing each other, and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the cable rope attachment until your biceps are fully contracted and the rope is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the cable rope attachment back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手握住绳索握把，采用反握姿势（掌心相对），手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将绳索向上弯举。
继续提升绳索握把，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，绳索达到肩部水平位置。
在肱二头肌充分收缩的状态下短暂停顿。
吸气，然后慢慢将绳索放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable high pulley overhead tricep extension
name.zh: 绳索高位过头肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine. Grasp the rope with both hands and extend your arms overhead. Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary. Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接至高滑轮器械，背对器械站立。双手握住绳索两端，双臂向上伸直。保持肘部贴近头部，上臂位置固定不动。通过弯曲肘部慢慢将绳索下放至头后。稍作停顿，然后肱三头肌发力将双臂伸直回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a rope to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Grasp the rope with both hands and extend your arms overhead.
Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary.
Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索连接至高滑轮器械，背对器械站立。
双手握住绳索两端，双臂向上伸直。
保持肘部贴近头部，上臂位置固定不动。
通过弯曲肘部慢慢将绳索下放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后肱三头肌发力将双臂伸直回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height. Kneel down in front of the cable machine and grab the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Sit back on your heels, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the bar towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接至绳索器械，高度调至胸部水平。跪在绳索器械前，采用肩同宽的正握握住直杆。臀部向后坐在脚后跟上，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将直杆向腹部上方拉近，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将直杆放回起始位置。重复至目标次数。

en: Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height.
Kneel down in front of the cable machine and grab the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Sit back on your heels, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the bar towards your upper abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接至绳索器械，高度调至胸部水平。
跪在绳索器械前，采用肩同宽的正握握住直杆。
臀部向后坐在脚后跟上，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将直杆向腹部上方拉近，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将直杆放回起始位置。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Attach the ankle cuff to your ankle and stand facing the cable machine. Position yourself far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable. Place your hands on the machine for support. Keeping your leg straight, slowly move your leg across your body towards the midline. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将踝部护具连接至踝部，背对绳索器械站立。调整与器械的距离，使绳索保持张力。将双手放在器械上支撑。保持腿部伸直，缓慢将腿部向身体中线方向移动。在动作末端停顿片刻，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach the ankle cuff to your ankle and stand facing the cable machine.
Position yourself far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Place your hands on the machine for support.
Keeping your leg straight, slowly move your leg across your body towards the midline.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将踝部护具连接至踝部，背对绳索器械站立
调整与器械的距离，使绳索保持张力
将双手放在器械上支撑
保持腿部伸直，缓慢将腿部向身体中线方向移动
在动作末端停顿片刻，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置
重复所需次数

instructions.en: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline. Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys. Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them to shoulder height. Push the handles forward and upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜凳调整至45度角。将绳索手柄连接至高滑轮位置。面对绳索器械坐在凳子上，双脚平放于地面。双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，将其拉至肩部高度。向前向上推动手柄，直至手臂完全伸直。稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄降回起始位置。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys.
Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them to shoulder height.
Push the handles forward and upward until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜凳调整至45度角。
将绳索手柄连接至高滑轮位置。
面对绳索器械坐在凳子上，双脚平放于地面。
双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，将其拉至肩部高度。
向前向上推动手柄，直至手臂完全伸直。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄降回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley. Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you. Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将上斜凳设置在45度角，并将绳索手柄连接至低位滑轮。坐在凳子上，面向绳索器械，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。正握手柄，将双臂完全伸展至身体前方。从髋部向前倾斜，同时保持背部挺直并收紧核心。通过后收肩胛骨和弯曲手肘，将绳索手柄拉向胸部。在动作顶部挤压背部肌肉，然后缓慢将手臂伸展回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable handle to the low pulley.
Sit on the bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Lean forward from your hips while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the cable handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将上斜凳设置在45度角，并将绳索手柄连接至低位滑轮。
坐在凳子上，面向绳索器械，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。
正握手柄，将双臂完全伸展至身体前方。
从髋部向前倾斜，同时保持背部挺直并收紧核心。
通过后收肩胛骨和弯曲手肘，将绳索手柄拉向胸部。
在动作顶部挤压背部肌肉，然后缓慢将手臂伸展回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles. Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械调整至低位并连接把手。坐在上斜凳上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放于地面。双手正握把手，双臂向前伸直。保持肘部微屈，双臂向两侧缓缓打开。到达完全伸展位置时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Adjust the cable machine to a low position and attach the handles.
Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械调整至低位并连接把手。
坐在上斜凳上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放于地面。
双手正握把手，双臂向前伸直。
保持肘部微屈，双臂向两侧缓缓打开。
在完全伸展位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.zh: 绳索斜板飞鸟（健身球上）

instructions.en: Set up a stability ball at an incline angle. Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys of a cable machine. Sit on the stability ball facing away from the machine, with your feet firmly planted on the ground. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward. Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged. With a controlled motion, bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Continue the motion until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球设置为斜板角度，将绳索手柄连接至龙门架的高位滑轮。背对龙门架坐在健身球上，双脚稳固地踩在地面。采用正握方式握住绳索手柄，掌心朝前。身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。控制动作幅度，将双臂向身体两侧展开，肘部保持微曲。继续运动直到双臂与地面平行。短暂停顿后，缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Set up a stability ball at an incline angle.
Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys of a cable machine.
Sit on the stability ball facing away from the machine, with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
With a controlled motion, bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Continue the motion until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球设置为斜板角度。
将绳索手柄连接至龙门架的高位滑轮。
背对龙门架坐在健身球上，双脚稳固地踩在地面。
采用正握方式握住绳索手柄，掌心朝前。
身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
控制动作幅度，将双臂向身体两侧展开，肘部保持微曲。
继续运动直到双臂与地面平行。
短暂停顿后，缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean forward slightly and keep your back straight. Pull the bar down towards your thighs by extending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接到高滑轮绳索器械上。背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用正握握住直杆，双手距离比肩略宽。身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直。通过伸展肘关节将杆向下拉向大腿。在最低点暂停片刻，然后缓慢将杆回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean forward slightly and keep your back straight.
Pull the bar down towards your thighs by extending your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接到高滑轮绳索器械上。
背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
采用正握握住直杆，双手距离比肩略宽。
身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直。
通过伸展肘关节将杆向下拉向大腿。
在最低点暂停片刻，然后缓慢将杆回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position. Attach a straight bar to the cable. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead. Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Bend your elbows and lower the bar behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械调整到低位滑轮位置，将直杆连接到绳索上。背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽站立。双手握住直杆，手掌朝下，手臂向上伸展举起。身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。弯曲肘部，将杆子从头后放下，上臂紧贴耳朵两侧。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸展回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Attach a straight bar to the cable.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Bend your elbows and lower the bar behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械调整到低位滑轮位置
将直杆连接到绳索上
背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽
双手握住直杆，手掌朝下，将手臂向上伸展举起
身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧
弯曲肘部，将杆子从头后放下，上臂紧贴耳朵两侧
稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸展回到起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down. Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body. As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally. Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder. Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center. Repeat the movement on the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索手柄，置于胸部高度，掌心向下。收紧核心肌群，向右旋转躯干，同时将绳索拉向身体对侧。旋转时，转动后脚并让髋部自然旋转。手臂完全伸展，最后将绳索手柄翻转过肩完成动作。通过反向动作回到起始位置，躯干旋转回到正中。换边重复动作，两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable handle with both hands at chest level, palms facing down.
Engage your core and rotate your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
As you rotate, pivot your back foot and allow your hips to rotate naturally.
Extend your arms fully and finish the movement by flipping the cable handle over your shoulder.
Return to the starting position by reversing the movement, rotating your torso back to the center.
Repeat the movement on the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索手柄，置于胸部高度，掌心向下。
收紧核心肌群，向右旋转躯干，同时将绳索拉向身体对侧。
旋转时，转动后脚并让髋部自然旋转。
手臂完全伸展，最后将绳索手柄翻转过肩完成动作。
通过反向动作回到起始位置，躯干旋转回到正中。
换边重复动作。
两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with your right hand and step back to create tension in the cable. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Keep your upper arm close to your body and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your forearm backward, straightening your arm fully. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 面对绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。右手握住绳索手柄，向后退一步使绳索产生张力。膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。上臂贴近身体，肘部弯曲呈90度角。将前臂向后伸展，完全伸直手臂。保持片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。按所需次数重复动作，然后换边进行。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable handle with your right hand and step back to create tension in the cable.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Keep your upper arm close to your body and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your forearm backward, straightening your arm fully.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械
右手握住绳索手柄，向后退一步使绳索产生张力
膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直
上臂贴近身体，肘部弯曲至90度角
前臂向后伸展，完全伸直手臂
保持片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置
按所需次数重复，然后换边进行

instructions.en: Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine. Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides. Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄固定在高滑轮上，背对器械跪下。双手握住绳索手柄并置于头后，保持肘部向两侧展开。保持髋部固定，收缩腰部，将躯干向下卷曲至大腿方向。在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing away from the machine.
Hold the rope handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Keeping your hips stationary, flex your waist and crunch your torso down towards your thighs.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄固定在高滑轮上，背对器械跪下。
双手握住绳索手柄并置于头后，保持肘部向两侧展开。
保持髋部固定，收缩腰部，将躯干向下卷曲至大腿方向。
在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: cable kneeling rear delt row (with rope) (male)
name.zh: 绳索跪姿后三角肌划船（男）

instructions.en: Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine. Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you. Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause. Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接到底部滑轮，面朝器械跪下。用中立握法（掌心相对）握住绳索，将双臂完全向前伸展。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，通过收缩肩胛骨将绳索向身体方向拉。在动作末端将肩胛骨夹紧，短暂停留。缓慢释放张力，回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a rope handle to a low cable pulley and kneel down facing the machine.
Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend your arms fully in front of you.
Keeping your back straight and core engaged, pull the rope towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement and hold for a brief pause.
Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接到底部滑轮，面朝器械跪下。
用中立握法（掌心相对）握住绳索，将双臂完全向前伸展。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，通过收缩肩胛骨将绳索向身体方向拉。
在动作末端将肩胛骨夹紧，短暂停留。
缓慢释放张力，回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 绳索跪姿肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing the cable machine. Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and bring your hands to the sides of your head. Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Extend your forearms by contracting your triceps until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by bending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接至高滑轮装置，然后面对绳索器械跪下。用中立握法（掌心相对）握住绳索，将双手置于头部两侧。在整个动作过程中，保持肘部紧贴头部，上臂固定不动。通过收缩肱三头肌伸展前臂，直至手臂完全伸直。稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲肘部缓慢回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a rope handle to a high pulley and kneel down facing the cable machine.
Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and bring your hands to the sides of your head.
Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Extend your forearms by contracting your triceps until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by bending your elbows.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接至高滑轮装置，然后面对绳索器械跪下。
用中立握法（掌心相对）握住绳索，将双手置于头部两侧。
在整个动作过程中，保持肘部紧贴头部，上臂固定不动。
通过收缩肱三头肌伸展前臂，直至手臂完全伸直。
稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲肘部缓慢回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable lat pulldown full range of motion
name.zh: 绳索高位下拉全程动作

instructions.en: Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads. Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐于高位下拉器械上，将膝盖固定在护垫下方。双手采用正握方式握住绳索杆，握距略宽于肩。身体略微后倾，保持挺胸姿态，下背部维持轻微弓形。将杆向下拉至上胸部位置，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杆释放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads.
Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐于高位下拉器械上，将膝盖固定在护垫下方。
双手采用正握方式握住绳索杆，握距略宽于肩。
身体略微后倾，保持挺胸姿态，下背部维持轻微弓形。
将杆向下拉至上胸部位置，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杆释放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly back. Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement. Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索附件安装在绳索器械的高位位置。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。手掌相对，反手握住绳索。保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜。将绳索向下拉向身体两侧，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作底部稍作停顿。缓慢释放张力，让绳索返回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Attach a rope attachment to the cable machine at a high position.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly back.
Pull the rope down towards your sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Slowly release the tension and allow the rope to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索附件安装在绳索器械的高位位置。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。
手掌相对，反手握住绳索。
保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜。
将绳索向下拉向身体两侧，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作底部稍作停顿。
缓慢释放张力，让绳索返回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit down on the cable pulldown machine and grab the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip. Adjust the knee pad so that your thighs are secured under it. Keep your back straight and lean back slightly. Pull the v-bar down towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body. Squeeze your back muscles at the bottom of the movement. Slowly return the v-bar to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索下拉器械上，双手握住V杆，采用正握姿势。调整护膝垫，使其固定住大腿。保持背部挺直，身体微微后仰。将V杆向下拉向胸部上侧，同时保持肘部靠近身体两侧。在动作底部充分挤压背部肌肉。缓慢将V杆恢复至起始位置，并按设定的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit down on the cable pulldown machine and grab the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip.
Adjust the knee pad so that your thighs are secured under it.
Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Pull the v-bar down towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body.
Squeeze your back muscles at the bottom of the movement.
Slowly return the v-bar to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索下拉器械上，双手握住V杆，采用正握握法。
调整膝垫，使大腿固定在垫子下方。
保持背部挺直，身体微微后仰。
将V杆向下拉向胸部位置，同时保持肘部靠近身体两侧。
在动作底部充分挤压背部肌肉。
缓慢将V杆恢复至起始位置，并按设定的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and your core engaged. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，采用正握方式握住绳索手柄。保持手臂伸直，核心肌群收紧。将双臂向身体两侧平举，直至与地面平行。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip.
Keep your arms straight and your core engaged.
Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，采用正握方式握住绳索手柄。
保持手臂伸直，核心肌群收紧。
将双臂向身体两侧平举，直至与地面平行。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight. Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles. Reverse the motion and slowly return your arms to the starting position, keeping tension on your chest muscles throughout. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将手柄安装在绳索器械的低位滑轮上，并选择合适的重量。站在器械中央，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。掌心向下握住手柄，双臂向身体两侧伸展，肘部保持微曲。控制好动作力度，慢慢将双臂向前挥动，在胸前交叉。到达动作顶点时稍作停顿，感受胸肌的拉伸。然后反方向慢慢将双臂回到起始位置，全程保持对胸肌的持续张力。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight.
Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Maintaining control, slowly bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion, crossing them in front of your body.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, feeling the stretch in your chest muscles.
Reverse the motion and slowly return your arms to the starting position, keeping tension on your chest muscles throughout.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将手柄安装在绳索器械的低位滑轮上，并选择合适的重量。
站在器械中央，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
掌心向下握住手柄，双臂向身体两侧伸展，肘部保持微曲。
控制好动作力度，慢慢将双臂向前挥动，在胸前交叉。
到达动作顶点时稍作停顿，感受胸肌的拉伸。
反方向慢慢将双臂回到起始位置，全程保持对胸肌的持续张力。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。采用正握握住手柄，掌心向下。保持背部挺直，身体略微前倾，手肘保持轻微弯曲。将手柄向身体方向拉回，同时将肩胛骨用力夹紧。在动作的最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手柄释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows.
Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。
采用正握握住手柄，掌心向下。
保持背部挺直，身体略微前倾，手肘保持轻微弯曲。
将手柄向身体方向拉回，同时将肩胛骨用力夹紧。
在动作的最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手柄释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接到低位滑轮绳索器械上。仰卧在平板凳上，双脚平放在地面上。采用反握方式握住直杆，双手与肩同宽。完全伸展手臂，保持肘部靠近身体两侧。保持上臂固定，呼气并将直杆向肩部方向弯举。在顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气并缓慢将直杆放回起始位置，完全伸展手臂。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接到低位滑轮绳索器械上。
仰卧在平板凳上，双脚平放在地面上。
采用反握方式握住直杆，双手与肩同宽。
完全伸展手臂，保持肘部靠近身体两侧。
保持上臂固定，呼气并将直杆向肩部方向弯举。
在顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气并缓慢将直杆放回起始位置，完全伸展手臂。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar towards your chest by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接到底部滑轮的绳索器械上。仰卧在平凳上，双脚平放在地面上。采用反握方式握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。将手臂完全伸展，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。保持上臂固定不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向胸部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Lie face up on a flat bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar towards your chest by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接到底部滑轮的绳索器械上。
仰卧在平凳上，双脚平放在地面上。
采用反握方式握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。
将手臂完全伸展，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
保持上臂固定不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向胸部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable lying extension pullover (with rope attachment)
name.zh: 绳索仰卧伸展拉力（绳索附件）

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set the pulley at the highest position. Lie down on a bench with your head towards the cable machine. Hold the rope with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the rope behind your head while maintaining control. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the rope back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索固定在绳索器械的高位滑轮上。仰卧于训练凳上，头部朝向绳索器械。双手握住绳索，双臂伸直举至胸部正上方。保持双臂伸直，在控制下缓慢将绳索下放至头部后方。到达最低点时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索抬回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set the pulley at the highest position.
Lie down on a bench with your head towards the cable machine.
Hold the rope with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the rope behind your head while maintaining control.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise the rope back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索固定在绳索器械上，并设置最高位置的滑轮
仰卧于训练凳上，头部朝向绳索器械
双手握住绳索，双臂伸直举至胸部正上方
保持双臂伸直，缓慢控制地将绳索下放至头部后方
在最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索抬回起始位置
重复所需的重复次数

instructions.en: Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将把手固定在绳索上，平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面。双手握住把手，掌心相对，双臂向上伸直垂直于胸部。保持肘部微屈，双臂向两侧以弧形轨迹缓慢下降，直至感受到胸肌的拉伸。稍作停顿，然后收缩胸肌发力，将双臂回到起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将把手固定在绳索上，平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面。
双手握住把手，掌心相对，双臂向上伸直垂直于胸部。
保持肘部微屈，双臂向两侧以弧形轨迹缓慢下降，直至感受到胸肌的拉伸。
稍作停顿，然后收缩胸肌发力，将双臂回到起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 绳索仰卧肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine. Lie down on a flat bench facing up, with your head towards the cable machine. Grasp the rope handle with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the rope handle towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接至低位滑轮绳索器械上。仰卧在平凳上，头部朝向绳索器械方向。双手握住绳索手柄，掌心相对，将手臂向上伸展至胸部上方。保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将绳索手柄下放至额头位置。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将手臂向上伸直回到起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Lie down on a flat bench facing up, with your head towards the cable machine.
Grasp the rope handle with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the rope handle towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接至低位滑轮绳索器械上。
仰卧在平凳上，头部朝向绳索器械方向。
双手握住绳索手柄，掌心相对，将手臂向上伸展至胸部上方。
保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将绳索手柄下放至额头位置。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将手臂向上伸直回到起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach cables to both sides of a cable machine at chest height. Stand in the center of the machine with one foot slightly in front of the other. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a slight forward lean. Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion. Pause for a moment at the center, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索固定在龙门架的两侧，高度调整至与胸部平齐。站在器械正中央，双脚前后分开站立，保持身体平衡。双手握住手柄，掌心向下，手臂向身体两侧伸展。肘关节保持微屈状态，身体略微前倾。发力时集中收紧胸肌，双臂向前做一个弧形收拢的动作，在胸前中央位置停顿片刻，然后有控制地缓缓返回起始位置。按照要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach cables to both sides of a cable machine at chest height.
Stand in the center of the machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides.
Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a slight forward lean.
Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion.
Pause for a moment at the center, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索固定在龙门架的两侧，高度调整至与胸部平齐。
站在器械正中央，双脚前后分开站立，保持身体平衡。
双手握住手柄，掌心向下，手臂向身体两侧伸展。
肘关节保持微屈状态，身体略微前倾。
发力时集中收紧胸肌，双臂向前做一个弧形收拢的动作。
在胸前中央位置停顿片刻，然后有控制地缓缓返回起始位置。
按照要求的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable one arm bent over row

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the cable handle with one hand, palm facing inward, and extend your arm fully. Pull the cable handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side, until your hand reaches your lower chest. Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾俯身，保持背部挺直。单手握住绳索手柄，掌心朝内，手臂完全伸直。将绳索手柄向身体方向拉，肘部贴近身体侧面，直到手接近下胸部。稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂伸直回到起始位置。按要求的次数重复动作，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Grasp the cable handle with one hand, palm facing inward, and extend your arm fully.
Pull the cable handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side, until your hand reaches your lower chest.
Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。
膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾俯身，保持背部挺直。
单手握住绳索手柄，掌心朝内，手臂完全伸直。
将绳索手柄向身体方向拉，肘部贴近身体侧面，直到手接近下胸部。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
按要求的次数重复动作，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up. Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。掌心朝上，反手握住绳索手柄。保持肘部贴近身体，慢慢将前臂向肩部方向弯举。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up.
Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
掌心朝上，反手握住绳索手柄。
保持肘部贴近身体，慢慢将前臂向肩部方向弯举。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将前臂放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: cable one arm decline chest fly

instructions.en: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle. Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand. Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder. Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to your left arm and repeat the exercise.
instructions.zh: 将D型手柄连接至低位滑轮绳索器械上，并将训练凳设置为下斜角度。躺在凳上，头部朝向器械方向，用右手握住手柄。将手臂向上伸直举至胸部上方，保持肘部微屈。控制动作速度，将手臂向侧方缓缓下放，直至手部与肩部齐平。保持片刻，然后反向上举，将手臂恢复至起始位置。完成所需次数后，换至左手重复训练。

en: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle.
Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand.
Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to your left arm and repeat the exercise.
zh: 将D型手柄连接至低位滑轮绳索器械上，并将训练凳设置为下斜角度。
躺在凳上，头部朝向器械方向，用右手握住手柄。
将手臂向上伸直举至胸部上方，保持肘部微屈。
控制动作速度，将手臂向侧方缓缓下放，直至手部与肩部齐平。
保持片刻，然后反向上举，将手臂恢复至起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换至左手重复训练。

name.en: cable one arm fly on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward. Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。一只手握住绳索手柄，将手臂向身体侧面伸展，与地面保持平行。保持肘部微屈，掌心朝前。手臂沿身体前方缓慢内收，此时要充分感受胸部肌肉的收缩。在动作末端稍作停顿，然后控制力量缓慢回到起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧重复练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a cable handle in one hand and extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Keep your elbow slightly bent and your palm facing forward.
Slowly bring your arm across your body, squeezing your chest muscles.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。
一只手握住绳索手柄，将手臂向身体侧面伸展，与地面保持平行。
保持肘部微屈，掌心朝前。
手臂沿身体前方缓慢内收，充分感受胸部肌肉的收缩。
在动作末端稍作停顿，然后控制力量缓慢回到起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧重复练习。

name.en: cable one arm incline fly on exercise ball
name.zh: 绳索单臂斜板健身球飞鸟

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back against an incline bench. Hold a cable handle in one hand with your arm extended and palm facing inward. Keeping a slight bend in your elbow, slowly lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部靠住斜凳。单手握住绳索手柄，手臂伸直，掌心朝向身体内侧。保持肘部微屈，慢慢将手臂向侧下方放下，直至手部与肩部齐平。稍作停顿，然后收缩胸部肌肉，将手臂拉回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back against an incline bench.
Hold a cable handle in one hand with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbow, slowly lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部靠住斜凳。
单手握住绳索手柄，手臂伸直，掌心朝向身体内侧。
保持肘部微屈，慢慢将手臂向侧下方放下，直至手部与肩部齐平。
稍作停顿，然后收缩胸部肌肉，将手臂拉回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position. Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine. Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height. Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position. Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械调整至低位滑轮位置。坐在斜板凳上，背对绳索器械。单手握住手柄，将其拉至肩部高度。双脚稳稳踩在地面上，保持身体稳定。将手柄向前上方推举，手臂充分伸展。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height.
Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 将绳索器械调整至低位滑轮位置。
坐在斜板凳上，背对绳索器械。
单手握住手柄，将其拉至肩部高度。
双脚稳稳踩在地面上，保持身体稳定。
将手柄向前上方推举，手臂充分伸展。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

name.en: cable one arm incline press on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back resting against an incline bench. Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at a 90-degree angle with your elbow bent. Press the cable handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部靠住倾斜的长凳。双手握住绳索手柄，将手臂置于90度角位置，肘部弯曲。将绳索手柄向前向上推举，手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄降至起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back resting against an incline bench.
Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at a 90-degree angle with your elbow bent.
Press the cable handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部靠住倾斜的长凳
单手握住绳索手柄，将手臂置于90度角位置，肘部弯曲
将绳索手柄向前向上推举，手臂完全伸展
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索手柄降至起始位置
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练

name.zh: 绳索单臂侧向俯身侧平举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing a cable machine. Grasp the handle with one hand and step back to create tension on the cable. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with a slight bend in your elbow. Slowly bring your arm back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械。单手握住手柄，向后退一步以产生绳索张力。腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。手臂向侧面伸展，与地面平行，肘部略微弯曲。缓慢将手臂带回起始位置，全程保持控制。按照所需的次数重复，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing a cable machine.
Grasp the handle with one hand and step back to create tension on the cable.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Extend your arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with a slight bend in your elbow.
Slowly bring your arm back to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械。
单手握住手柄，向后退一步以产生绳索张力。
腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
手臂向侧面伸展，与地面平行，肘部略微弯曲。
缓慢将手臂带回起始位置，全程保持控制。
按照所需的次数重复，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable. Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。单手握住绳索手柄，手掌向下，身体与器械保持一定距离以确保绳索有张力。保持手臂伸直，慢慢将手臂向侧方举起，直至与地面平行。在顶端短暂停顿后，缓慢将手臂降回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。
单手握住绳索手柄，手掌向下，身体与器械保持足够距离以确保绳索有张力。
保持手臂伸直，慢慢将手臂向侧方举起，直至与地面平行。
在顶端短暂停顿后，缓慢将手臂降回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械的牧师椅弯举垫调整至胸部高度。面对绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。反握住绳索手柄，将上臂靠在牧师椅弯举垫上。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。上臂紧贴垫子，缓慢将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。按照要求的次数重复练习。换另一侧手臂重复该动作。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
zh: 将绳索器械的牧师椅弯举垫调整至胸部高度。
面对绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
反握住绳索手柄，将上臂靠在牧师椅弯举垫上。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
上臂紧贴垫子，缓慢将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。
按照要求的次数重复练习。
换另一侧手臂重复该动作。

name.en: cable one arm press on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent. Place your other hand on your hip for stability. Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
