instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。单手握住绳索手柄，将手臂置于胸部高度，肘部弯曲。另一只手放在髋部以保持身体稳定。将绳索手柄向前推出手臂，直至手臂完全伸展。稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at chest height, elbow bent.
Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Press the cable handle forward, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
单手握住绳索手柄，将手臂置于胸部高度，肘部弯曲。
另一只手放在髋部以保持身体稳定。
将绳索手柄向前推出手臂，直至手臂完全伸展。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your lat muscle. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.
instructions.zh: 将单个手柄连接到高位滑轮器械上。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。用手握住手柄，手掌向下，完全伸直手臂。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将手柄向身体侧下方拉动，同时保持肘部贴近身体。在动作底部稍作停顿，挤压背阔肌。慢慢将手柄释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复。换另一侧手臂重复练习。

en: Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your lat muscle.
Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.
zh: 将单个手柄连接到高位滑轮器械上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。
用手握住手柄，手掌向下，完全伸直手臂。
保持背部挺直，核心收紧。
将手柄向身体侧下方拉动，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
在动作底部稍作停顿，挤压背阔肌。
慢慢将手柄释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复。
换另一侧手臂重复练习。

name.en: cable one arm reverse preacher curl
name.zh: 绳索单臂反向牧师凳弯举

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械的滑轮调整到最低位置。双脚分开与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。反手握住绳索手柄，将上臂靠在牧师凳垫上。练习过程中保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。慢慢将前臂向肱二头肌方向弯曲，上臂保持紧贴垫面不动。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。然后缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习，换臂重复同样的动作。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position.
Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
zh: 将绳索器械的滑轮调整到最低位置。
双脚分开与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。
反手握住绳索手柄，将上臂靠在牧师凳垫上。
练习过程中保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
慢慢将前臂向肱二头肌方向弯曲，上臂保持紧贴垫面不动。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
然后缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。
换臂重复同样的动作。

name.en: cable one arm straight back high row (kneeling)
name.zh: 绳索单臂直背高位划船（跪姿）

instructions.en: Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height. Kneel down facing the cable machine and grab the handle with one hand. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the handle towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.
instructions.zh: 将把手连接到腰部高度的绳索训练器上。面对绳索训练器跪下，单手握住把手。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将把手向胸部方向拉动，同时挤压肩胛骨。动作顶端稍作停顿。缓慢释放把手回到起始位置。按所需次数重复。换另一侧手臂重复练习。

en: Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Kneel down facing the cable machine and grab the handle with one hand.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the handle towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.
zh: 将把手连接到腰部高度的绳索训练器上。
面对绳索训练器跪下，单手握住把手。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将把手向胸部方向拉动，同时挤压肩胛骨。
动作顶端稍作停顿。
缓慢释放把手回到起始位置。
按所需次数重复。
换另一侧手臂重复练习。

name.zh: 绳索单臂肱三头肌下压

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar attachment at chest height. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cable. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Start with your arm fully extended and perpendicular to the floor. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and push the bar down until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 面对绳索训练器站立，将直杆附件调整至胸部高度。掌心向下握住直杆，后退一步使绳索产生张力。双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。从手臂完全伸展且垂直于地面的姿势开始。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时下压直杆，直至手臂完全伸展。稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar attachment at chest height.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cable.
Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Start with your arm fully extended and perpendicular to the floor.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and push the bar down until your arm is fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 面对绳索训练器站立，将直杆附件调整至胸部高度。
掌心向下握住直杆，后退一步使绳索产生张力。
双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
从手臂完全伸展且垂直于地面的姿势开始。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时下压直杆，直至手臂完全伸展。
稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接至高滑轮绳索器械上。面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。掌心向下握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。呼气时将直杆向下弯举至额头高度，上臂保持固定。在动作最低点稍作停顿，用力收缩肱二头肌。吸气后慢慢将直杆返回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接至高滑轮绳索器械上。
面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
掌心向下握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。
保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
呼气时将直杆向下弯举至额头高度，上臂保持固定。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，用力收缩肱二头肌。
吸气后慢慢将直杆返回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable overhead curl on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold the cable handle with an underhand grip. Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears. Slowly curl the cable down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，反握绳索手柄。将双臂完全举过头顶，手肘靠近耳朵。慢慢将绳索向下弯举至额头位置，保持上臂固定。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold the cable handle with an underhand grip.
Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Slowly curl the cable down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，反握绳索手柄。
将双臂完全举过头顶，手肘靠近耳朵。
慢慢将绳索向下弯举至额头位置，保持上臂固定。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.zh: 绳索过头肱三头肌伸展（绳索附件）

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a cable machine at a high position. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and bring your hands above your head. Keep your upper arms close to your head and your elbows pointing forward. Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索固定在器械的高位位置。背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索，手掌相对，将双手举过头顶。保持上臂贴近头部，肘部指向前方。弯曲肘部，将绳索缓慢下放至头后。稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a rope to a cable machine at a high position.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and bring your hands above your head.
Keep your upper arms close to your head and your elbows pointing forward.
Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索固定在器械的高位位置。
背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索，手掌相对，将双手举过头顶。
保持上臂贴近头部，肘部指向前方。
弯曲肘部，将绳索缓慢下放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Step back to create tension on the cable, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent. Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your palms to face upwards as you do so. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将手柄固定在腰部高度的绳索器械上。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。正握手柄，掌心向下。向后退一步产生绳索张力，保持背部挺直，膝盖微屈。将手柄向身体方向拉，同时旋转手腕使掌心向上。在动作末端挤压肩胛骨。缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a handle to a cable machine at waist height.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step back to create tension on the cable, keeping your back straight and knees slightly bent.
Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your palms to face upwards as you do so.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将手柄固定在腰部高度的绳索器械上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。
正握手柄，掌心向下。
向后退一步产生绳索张力，保持背部挺直，膝盖微屈。
将手柄向身体方向拉，同时旋转手腕使掌心向上。
在动作末端挤压肩胛骨。
缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height. Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip. Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides. Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械的牧师椅垫调整至胸部高度。坐在牧师椅上，将上臂置于垫子上，反握握住绳索把手。保持背部挺直，肘部紧贴身体两侧。缓慢将绳索把手向上弯举至肩部方向，在动作顶端充分收缩肱二头肌。稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索把手放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip.
Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides.
Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械的牧师椅垫调整至胸部高度。
坐在牧师椅上，将上臂置于垫子上，反握握住绳索把手。
保持背部挺直，肘部紧贴身体两侧。
缓慢将绳索把手向上弯举至肩部方向，在动作顶端充分收缩肱二头肌。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索把手放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees at a 90-degree angle. Hold the cable handles at chest height with your palms facing down and your elbows bent. Engage your core and press the cable handles forward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly release the tension and bring the cable handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖呈90度角。双手握住绳索手柄，置于胸部高度，掌心向下，手肘弯曲。收紧核心肌群，将绳索手柄向前推直，直到手臂完全伸展。保持片刻，然后缓慢释放张力，将绳索手柄回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees at a 90-degree angle.
Hold the cable handles at chest height with your palms facing down and your elbows bent.
Engage your core and press the cable handles forward until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then slowly release the tension and bring the cable handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖呈90度角。
双手握住绳索手柄，置于胸部高度，掌心向下，手肘弯曲。
收紧核心肌群，将绳索手柄向前推直，直到手臂完全伸展。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，将绳索手柄恢复至起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grab the rope attachment with both hands and step forward, creating tension in the cable. Bend at the hips and lower your upper body until it is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to pull your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 背对绳索器械站立，双脚分开与肩同宽。双手握住绳索手柄，向前迈步使绳索产生张力。屈髋俯身，上半身与地面平行，保持背部挺直。收缩臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将身体拉回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grab the rope attachment with both hands and step forward, creating tension in the cable.
Bend at the hips and lower your upper body until it is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings to pull your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 背对绳索器械站立，双脚分开与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索手柄，向前迈步使绳索产生张力。
屈髋俯身，上半身与地面平行，保持背部挺直。
收缩臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将身体拉回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured. Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly and engage your core. Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整绳索高位下拉机，将座椅调至舒适高度并固定好膝垫。端坐在座椅上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放于地面。双手握住绳索拉杆，采用正握握法，双手间距略宽于肩宽。身体微微后倾，收紧核心肌群。将拉杆用力向下拉至胸部位置，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后控制速度缓慢将拉杆释放回起始位置。按照设定的次数重复完成训练。

en: Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured.
Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean back slightly and engage your core.
Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整绳索高位下拉机，使座椅高度舒适并固定好膝垫。
挺直背部端坐在座椅上，双脚平放于地面。
双手采用正握握法握住绳索拉杆，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
身体微微后倾，收紧核心肌群。
将拉杆用力向下拉至胸部位置，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后控制速度缓慢将拉杆释放回起始位置。
按照设定的重复次数进行训练。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor. Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight. Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，使大腿与地面平行，双脚平放在地面上。双手采用正握方式握住高位下拉杆，握距略宽于肩宽。坐下后上半身微微后倾，保持挺胸直背的姿态。将杆向下拉向胸部位置，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杆释放回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor.
Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，使大腿与地面保持平行，双脚平放在地面上。
双手采用正握方式握住高位下拉杆，握距略宽于肩宽。
坐下后上半身微微后倾，保持挺胸直背的姿态。
将杆向下拉向胸部位置，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杆释放回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接至绳索器械的最高位置。面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。反手握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。将肘部紧贴身体两侧，上臂保持不动。呼气时慢慢将杠铃向大腿方向弯举，保持手腕挺直。在动作最低点稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气时慢慢将杠铃恢复至起始位置，手臂完全伸直。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接至绳索器械的最高位置。
面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
反手握住直杆，双手间距与肩同宽。
将肘部紧贴身体两侧，上臂保持不动。
呼气时慢慢将杠铃向大腿方向弯举，保持手腕挺直。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气时慢慢将杠铃恢复至起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接至高滑轮绳索器械上。面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。双手采用正握方式握住直杆，间距与肩同宽。将肘部紧贴身体两侧，上臂保持不动。呼气的同时将杆向下推，直至肘部完全伸直。保持片刻，然后吸气并缓慢将杆返回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接至高滑轮绳索器械上。
面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手采用正握方式握住直杆，间距与肩同宽。
将肘部紧贴身体两侧，上臂保持不动。
呼气的同时将杆向下推，直至肘部完全伸直。
保持片刻，然后吸气并缓慢将杆返回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Engage your core and keep your back straight as you exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position while inhaling. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接至高位滑轮绳索器械上。面向器械站立，双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微屈。双手正握直杆，双臂伸直，掌心朝下。收紧核心，保持背部平直，呼气时将直杆下压至大腿位置。在最低点稍作停顿，然后吸气时缓慢将直杆还原至起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Engage your core and keep your back straight as you exhale and push the bar down towards your thighs.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接至高位滑轮绳索器械上。
面向器械站立，双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微屈。
双手正握直杆，双臂伸直，掌心朝下。
收紧核心，保持背部平直，呼气时将直杆下压至大腿位置。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后吸气时缓慢将直杆还原至起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley on a cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Exhale and push the rope downward by extending your elbows until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position by allowing your elbows to flex. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索附件安装到绳索器械的高位滑轮上。面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微屈。双手握住绳索，采用正握方式，掌心相对。练习过程中保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。呼气时，通过伸展肘关节向下推动绳索，直至手臂完全伸直。稍作停顿，然后吸气，缓慢屈肘返回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Attach a rope attachment to a high pulley on a cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Exhale and push the rope downward by extending your elbows until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position by allowing your elbows to flex.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索附件安装到绳索器械的高位滑轮上。
面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽，膝盖微屈。
双手握住绳索，采用正握方式，掌心相对。
练习过程中保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
呼气时，通过伸展肘关节向下推动绳索，直至手臂完全伸直。
稍作停顿，然后吸气，缓慢屈肘返回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.zh: 绳索后三角肌划船（马镫把手）

instructions.en: Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine. Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.
instructions.zh: 将马镫形把手连接至低位滑索装置，面向器械站立。左手握住把手，右脚向后迈一步，身体略微倾斜成角度。膝盖微屈，髋关节前倾，保持背部平直，核心肌群收紧。左手臂向前伸直，掌心朝下，通过收缩肩胛骨将把手拉向胸部位置。在动作最高点稍作停顿，充分挤压肩胛骨。然后缓慢将把手释放回起始位置，完成目标次数。换另一侧手臂重复同样的动作。

en: Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine.
Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade.
Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.
zh: 将马镫形把手连接至低位滑索装置，面向器械站立。
左手握住把手，右脚向后迈一步，使身体略微倾斜成角度。
膝盖微屈，髋关节前倾，保持背部平直，核心肌群收紧。
左手臂向前伸直，掌心朝下，通过收缩肩胛骨将把手拉向胸部位置。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，充分挤压肩胛骨。
缓慢将把手释放回起始位置，完成目标次数后换边。
换另一侧手臂（右手）重复上述动作步骤。

instructions.en: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接到低位滑轮绳索器械上。双脚分开与肩同宽，面对器械站立。掌心相对，采用反握方式握住绳索手柄。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部向前铰接，保持背部挺直。保持肘部略微弯曲，将绳索拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接到低位滑轮绳索器械上。
双脚分开与肩同宽，面对器械站立。
掌心相对，采用反握方式握住绳索手柄。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部向前铰接，保持背部挺直。
保持肘部略微弯曲，将绳索拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a handle to a low pulley cable machine and stand facing away from the machine. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Keeping your elbows stationary, pull the handle back towards your body, squeezing your triceps at the end of the movement. Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将把手连接至低位滑轮器械上，背对器械站立。双手握住把手，掌心向下，手臂向前伸直。保持肘部固定不动，将把手向身体方向后拉，在动作末端用力收缩肱三头肌。慢慢将把手放回起始位置，按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a handle to a low pulley cable machine and stand facing away from the machine.
Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Keeping your elbows stationary, pull the handle back towards your body, squeezing your triceps at the end of the movement.
Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将把手连接至低位滑轮器械上，背对器械站立。
双手握住把手，掌心向下，将手臂向前伸直。
保持肘部固定不动，将把手向身体方向后拉，在动作末端用力收缩肱三头肌。
慢慢将把手放回起始位置，按所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position. Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up. Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the cable back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整绳索器械，将滑轮置于最高位置。面向器械坐下，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。双手采用正握方式握住绳索手柄，间距略宽于肩部。身体略微后倾，保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。将绳索手柄向胸部方向下拉，同时用力收缩肩胛骨。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放绳索，缓慢返回起始位置。按需求重复上述动作至目标次数。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position.
Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the cable back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整绳索器械，将滑轮置于最高位置。
面向器械坐下，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手采用正握方式握住绳索手柄，间距略宽于肩部。
身体略微后倾，保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。
将绳索手柄向胸部方向下拉，用力收缩肩胛骨。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放绳索返回起始位置。
按需求重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down facing up on a mat. Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your thighs towards your chest. While keeping your upper body stable, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the mat. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索固定在低滑轮上，仰卧于垫子上，双手握住绳索并将手臂伸直指向天花板。弯曲膝盖并将双腿抬起，使大腿靠向胸部。保持上半身稳定，将骨盆向上卷起靠向胸部，使髋部离开垫子。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢地将髋部放回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down facing up on a mat.
Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
While keeping your upper body stable, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the mat.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索固定在低滑轮上，仰卧于垫子上。
双手握住绳索，将手臂伸直向上指向天花板。
弯曲膝盖并抬起双腿，使大腿靠向胸部。
保持上半身稳定，将骨盆向上卷向胸部，使髋部离开垫子。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将髋部放回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接到底部滑轮的绳索器械上。双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，面向器械站立。用反握方式握住直杆，双手与肩同宽。在整个动作过程中，保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持固定。呼气时，将直杆向肩膀方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气时，慢慢将直杆放回起始位置，完全伸展手臂。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接到底部滑轮的绳索器械上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，面向器械站立。
用反握方式握住直杆，双手与肩同宽。
在整个动作过程中，保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持固定。
呼气时，将直杆向肩膀方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气时，慢慢将直杆放回起始位置，完全伸展手臂。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable reverse grip triceps pushdown (sz-bar) (with arm blaster)
name.zh: 绳索反握肱三头肌下压（SZ杆）（带臂托）

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Engage your triceps and slowly push the bar down until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆安装在绳索器械的最高档位。面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。用反握握住杆，手掌向上，双手与肩同宽。在整个动作过程中，将肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持固定。收紧肱三头肌，慢慢将杆下压至手臂完全伸直。在底部位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杆还原至起始位置。重复上述动作至所需次数。

en: Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Engage your triceps and slowly push the bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆安装在绳索器械的最高档位。
面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
用反握握住杆，手掌向上，双手与肩同宽。
在整个动作过程中，将肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持固定。
收紧肱三头肌，慢慢将杆下压至手臂完全伸直。
在底部位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杆还原至起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down. Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索训练器站立，双脚与肩同宽。反握握住绳索手柄，掌心向下。保持肘部贴近身体侧，慢慢将前臂向肩部方向弯举。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。重复至所需的次数。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down.
Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索训练器站立，双脚与肩同宽。
反握握住绳索手柄，掌心向下。
保持肘部贴近身体侧，慢慢将前臂向肩部方向弯举。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将前臂放回起始位置。
重复至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height. Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended. Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械的托臂垫调整至胸部高度。坐在托臂凳上，将上臂放在垫子上，手掌向下，手肘完全伸展。采用反握姿势握住绳索手柄，握距与肩同宽。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手柄向肩膀方向弯举，感受肱二头肌的收缩。在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后缓慢地将手柄放回起始位置，手肘完全伸展。重复至所需的重复次数。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended.
Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械的托臂垫调整至胸部高度。
坐在托臂凳上，将上臂放在垫子上，手掌向下，手肘完全伸展。
采用反握姿势握住绳索手柄，握距与肩同宽。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手柄向肩膀方向弯举，感受肱二头肌的收缩。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后缓慢地将手柄放回起始位置，手肘完全伸展。
重复至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine. Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接在低位滑轮上，坐在凳子上，面对绳索器械。双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握姿势，掌心向下。将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬垂在膝盖边缘。保持前臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯举至最高点。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢地将手腕放回起始位置。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine.
Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索连接在低位滑轮上，坐在凳子上，面对绳索器械。
双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握姿势，掌心向下。
将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬垂在膝盖边缘。
保持前臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯举至最高点。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢地将手腕放回起始位置。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Using your triceps, push the bar down until your arms are fully extended and your triceps are contracted. Pause for a moment, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接到高位滑轮绳索器械上。双脚分开与肩同宽，面对器械站立。反手握住直杆，掌心向上，双手间距与肩同宽。在整个动作过程中，保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。用肱三头肌的力量将直杆下压，直至手臂完全伸展，肱三头肌收缩。短暂停顿后，慢慢将直杆回到起始位置。根据所需的重复次数重复这个动作。

en: Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Using your triceps, push the bar down until your arms are fully extended and your triceps are contracted.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接到高位滑轮绳索器械上。
双脚分开与肩同宽，面对器械站立。
反手握住直杆，掌心向上，双手间距与肩同宽。
在整个动作过程中，保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
用肱三头肌的力量将直杆下压，直至手臂完全伸展，肱三头肌收缩。
短暂停顿后，慢慢将直杆回到起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复这个动作。

name.en: cable reverse-grip straight back seated high row
name.zh: 绳索反握直背坐姿高位划船

instructions.en: Sit on the seat facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from your hips. Pull the cable towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索器械的座位上，双脚平放于地面。双手采用反握方式握住绳索把手，掌心向上，双手间距与肩同宽。保持背部挺直，身体从髋部开始微微前倾。通过收缩肩胛骨并挤压背部肌肉，将绳索向身体方向拉起。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the seat facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from your hips.
Pull the cable towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索器械的座位上面对器械，双脚平放于地面。
双手采用反握方式握住绳索把手，掌心向上，双手间距与肩同宽。
保持背部挺直，身体从髋部开始微微前倾。
通过收缩肩胛骨并挤压背部肌肉，将绳索向身体方向拉起。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable ropes towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在划船器上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。双手握住绳索，采用正握方式，手掌相对。身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将绳索拉向胸部，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the cable ropes towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在划船器上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手握住绳索，采用正握方式，手掌相对。
身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将绳索拉向胸部，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the elevated seat facing the cable machine. Grab the cable rope handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees. Pull the cable towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the fully contracted position. Slowly release the tension and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在面向绳索器械的高位座椅上，双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式，掌心相对。保持背部挺直，身体略微后倾，膝盖保持微微弯曲。通过收缩肩胛骨并夹紧背部肌肉，将绳索向身体方向拉起。在动作最高点完全收缩的位置停顿片刻。然后缓慢释放张力，将手臂伸直回到起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行训练。

en: Sit on the elevated seat facing the cable machine.
Grab the cable rope handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees.
Pull the cable towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Pause for a moment at the fully contracted position.
Slowly release the tension and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在面向绳索器械的高位座椅上。
双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式，掌心相对。
保持背部挺直，身体略微后倾，膝盖保持微微弯曲。
通过收缩肩胛骨并夹紧背部肌肉，将绳索向身体方向拉起。
在动作最高点完全收缩的位置停顿片刻。
缓慢释放张力，将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行训练。

name.en: cable rope extension incline bench row

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable machine to the low pulley. Attach a rope handle to the cable machine and sit on the incline bench facing the machine. Grab the rope handle with an overhand grip and lean forward, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms fully, pulling the rope towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement. Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将一台斜凳设置为45度角，并将绳索器械连接到低滑轮上。将绳索手柄连接到绳索器械上，然后坐在斜凳上面对器械。用正握抓住绳索手柄，身体前倾保持背部挺直。完全伸展双臂，将绳索拉向上胸部，同时保持肘部靠近身体。在动作结束时挤压肩胛骨。缓慢释放张力并回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable machine to the low pulley.
Attach a rope handle to the cable machine and sit on the incline bench facing the machine.
Grab the rope handle with an overhand grip and lean forward, keeping your back straight.
Extend your arms fully, pulling the rope towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将一台斜凳设置为45度角，并将绳索器械连接到低滑轮上。
将绳索手柄连接到绳索器械上，然后坐在斜凳上面对器械。
用正握抓住绳索手柄，身体前倾保持背部挺直。
完全伸展双臂，将绳索拉向上胸部，同时保持肘部靠近身体。
在动作结束时挤压肩胛骨。
缓慢释放张力并回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the rope back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索附件连接到低配重滑轮器械上。双脚与肩同宽，面对器械站立。采用中立握法握住绳索（掌心相对）。将上臂靠在牧师凳垫上，保持肘部略微弯曲。上臂保持不动，呼气并通过收缩肱二头肌将绳索向肩部方向弯举。在挤压肱二头肌的状态下保持收缩位置短暂停顿。吸气并缓慢将绳索放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the rope back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索附件连接到低配重滑轮器械上。
双脚与肩同宽，面对器械站立。
采用中立握法握住绳索（掌心相对）。
将上臂靠在牧师凳垫上，保持肘部略微弯曲。
上臂保持不动，呼气并通过收缩肱二头肌将绳索向肩部方向弯举。
在挤压肱二头肌的状态下保持收缩位置短暂停顿。
吸气并缓慢将绳索放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

name.en: cable rope high pulley overhead tricep extension
name.zh: 高位绳索过头三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the weight accordingly. Stand facing away from the pulley machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down, and bring your hands above your head. Keep your upper arms close to your head and perpendicular to the floor. Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接至高滑轮，并相应调整重量。背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索，掌心向下，将双手举过头顶。保持上臂靠近头部并与地面垂直。通过弯曲肘部，将绳索缓慢下放至头后。短暂停顿后，将手臂伸回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the weight accordingly.
Stand facing away from the pulley machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down, and bring your hands above your head.
Keep your upper arms close to your head and perpendicular to the floor.
Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索连接至高滑轮，并相应调整重量。
背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索，掌心向下，将双手举过头顶。
保持上臂靠近头部并与地面垂直。
通过弯曲肘部，将绳索缓慢下放至头后。
短暂停顿后，将手臂伸回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

name.zh: 绳索斜板肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle. Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead. Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接至高滑轮上，并调整斜板至舒适的角度。背对滑轮站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用正握握住绳索，双臂向上伸直举过头顶。动作全程保持肘部紧贴头部，上臂固定不动。通过弯曲肘关节将绳索下放至头后侧，直到前臂触碰到肱二头肌。稍作停顿，然后用力伸展双臂回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle.
Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索连接至高滑轮上，并调整斜板至舒适的角度。
背对滑轮站立，双脚与肩同宽。
采用正握握住绳索，双臂向上伸直举过头顶。
动作全程保持肘部紧贴头部，上臂固定不动。
通过弯曲肘关节将绳索下放至头后侧，直到前臂触碰到肱二头肌。
稍作停顿，然后用力伸展双臂回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable rope lying on floor tricep extension
name.zh: 仰卧绳索肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set it to the lowest position. Lie on the floor facing up, with your head towards the cable machine. Hold the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Keep your upper arms stationary and slowly lower the rope towards your forehead, bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接到龙门架的最低位置。仰卧在地板上，头部朝向器械方向。双手握住绳索，掌心相对，将手臂向上伸直指向天花板。保持大臂固定不动，缓慢将绳索下放至额头前方，弯曲手肘。稍作停顿，然后将手臂向上伸直回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Attach a rope to a cable machine and set it to the lowest position.
Lie on the floor facing up, with your head towards the cable machine.
Hold the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Keep your upper arms stationary and slowly lower the rope towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索连接到龙门架的最低位置。
仰卧在地板上，头部朝向器械方向。
双手握住绳索，掌心相对，将手臂向上伸直指向天花板。
保持大臂固定不动，缓慢将绳索下放至额头前方，弯曲手肘。
稍作停顿，然后将手臂向上伸直回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.en: cable rope one arm hammer preacher curl
name.zh: 绳索单臂锤式牧师椅弯举

instructions.en: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Slowly curl the rope handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the rope handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接到低滑轮器械上。双脚与肩同宽站立，面对器械。用反握（手掌向上）抓住绳索手柄。将上臂靠在牧师凳垫板上，手肘保持微弯。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。整个动作过程中，缓慢将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举，上臂保持固定。在动作顶端充分收缩肱二头肌，然后缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂练习。

en: Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Slowly curl the rope handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the rope handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接到低滑轮器械上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面对器械。
用反握（手掌向上）抓住绳索手柄。
将上臂靠在牧师凳垫板上，手肘保持微弯。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
缓慢将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举，上臂保持固定。
在动作顶端充分收缩肱二头肌，然后缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows. Pull the cable ropes towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。双手握住绳索，采用正握方式，掌心相对。保持背部挺直，身体略微前倾，手肘保持轻微弯曲。将绳索向身体方向拉拢，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and knees slightly bent.
Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows.
Pull the cable ropes towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手握住绳索，采用正握方式，掌心相对。
保持背部挺直，身体略微前倾，手肘保持轻微弯曲。
将绳索向身体方向拉拢，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.zh: 绳索俄式转体（坐于稳定球上）

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Twist your torso to the right, bringing the cable handle towards your right hip. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the cable handle towards your left hip. Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手握住绳索手柄，双臂向前伸直。保持背部挺直，核心收紧，微微向后倾斜。向右侧旋转躯干，将绳索手柄移向右侧髋部。短暂停顿后，向左侧旋转躯干，将绳索手柄移向左侧髋部。继续交替进行转体动作，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Twist your torso to the right, bringing the cable handle towards your right hip.
Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the cable handle towards your left hip.
Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
双手握住绳索手柄，双臂向前伸直。
保持背部挺直，核心收紧，微微向后倾斜。
向右侧旋转躯干，将绳索手柄移向右侧髋部。
短暂停顿后，向左侧旋转躯干，将绳索手柄移向左侧髋部。
继续交替进行转体动作，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and cable handles to a comfortable position. Sit on the bench with your back straight and feet flat on the floor. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip at shoulder height. Push the handles forward and away from your body, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度和绳索手柄至舒适位置。坐在训练椅上，背部挺直，双脚平放于地面。正握绳索手柄，与肩部同高。将手柄向前推出远离身体，充分伸直手臂。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手柄恢复至起始位置。重复至目标次数。

en: Adjust the seat height and cable handles to a comfortable position.
Sit on the bench with your back straight and feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip at shoulder height.
Push the handles forward and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和绳索手柄至舒适位置。
坐在训练椅上，背部挺直，双脚平放于地面。
正握绳索手柄，与肩部同高。
将手柄向前推出远离身体，充分伸直手臂。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手柄恢复至起始位置。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it behind your head. Engage your abs and slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索器械上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲。双手握住绳索手柄，将其置于头后。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身向前卷曲，使胸部靠近膝盖。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it behind your head.
Engage your abs and slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索器械上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲。
双手握住绳索手柄，将其置于头后。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身向前卷曲，使胸部靠近膝盖。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索器械上，双脚平放于地面，躯干挺直。掌心朝上，采用反握方式握住绳索附件，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶峰稍作停顿，感受肱二头肌的持续收缩。吸气，然后缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索器械上，双脚平放于地面，躯干保持挺直。
掌心朝上，采用反握方式握住绳索附件，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶峰稍作停顿，感受肱二头肌的持续收缩。
吸气，然后缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 绳索坐姿高位划船（V形握把）

instructions.en: Sit on the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing each other, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips. Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索器械上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖微微弯曲。双手握住V形握把，采用正握方式，掌心相对，双手间距与肩同宽。保持背部挺直，身体从髋部开始微微前倾。通过收缩肩胛骨并夹紧背部肌肉，将V形握把向身体方向拉动。在动作顶峰停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing each other, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索器械上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手握住V形握把，采用正握方式，掌心相对，双手间距与肩同宽。
保持背部挺直，身体从髋部开始微微前倾。
通过收缩肩胛骨并夹紧背部肌肉，将V形握把向身体方向拉动。
在动作顶峰停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: cable seated one arm alternate row
name.zh: 绳索坐姿单臂交替划船

instructions.en: Sit on a bench facing a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and knees slightly bent. Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your arm fully extended in front of you. Pull the handle towards your body, retracting your shoulder blade and keeping your elbow close to your side. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your back muscles. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，面朝绳索器械，双脚平放于地面，膝盖略微弯曲。单手握住手柄，手臂在身前完全伸展。将手柄向身体方向拉，收缩肩胛骨，手肘靠近身体一侧。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩背部肌肉。缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。换另一侧手臂重复相同动作，两侧手臂交替进行，完成目标次数。

en: Sit on a bench facing a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and knees slightly bent.
Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your arm fully extended in front of you.
Pull the handle towards your body, retracting your shoulder blade and keeping your elbow close to your side.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your back muscles.
Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm.
Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，面朝绳索器械，双脚平放于地面，膝盖略微弯曲。
单手握住手柄，手臂在身前完全伸展。
将手柄向身体方向拉，收缩肩胛骨，手肘靠近身体一侧。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩背部肌肉。
缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。
换另一侧手臂重复相同动作。
两侧手臂交替进行，完成目标次数。

name.en: cable seated one arm concentration curl
name.zh: 绳索坐姿单臂集中弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight. Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。单手握住绳索手柄，将肘部置于大腿内侧，膝盖上方位置。上臂保持固定，呼气时将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气时缓慢将绳索手柄还原至起始位置。重复至预定次数后，换臂进行。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight.
Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。
单手握住绳索手柄，将肘部置于大腿内侧，膝盖上方位置。
上臂保持固定，呼气时将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气时缓慢将绳索手柄还原至起始位置。
重复至预定次数后，换臂进行。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides. Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，面对绳索器械。反手握住绳索附件，掌心向上，双手与肩同宽。保持上臂固定不动，肘部贴近身体两侧。呼气，将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶峰稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气，缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides.
Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，面对绳索器械。
反手握住绳索附件，掌心向上，双手与肩同宽。
保持上臂固定不动，肘部贴近身体两侧。
呼气，将绳索附件向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶峰稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将绳索附件放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，面对绳索器械，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握姿势，将双臂向前伸直。保持手臂伸直，慢慢将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，面对绳索器械，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住绳索手柄，采用正握姿势，将双臂向前伸直。
保持手臂伸直，慢慢将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。用正握握住手柄，保持背部挺直，肩部放松。将手柄拉向身体，收缩肩胛骨。在动作的最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手柄释放回到起始位置。根据所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索划船机上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。
用正握握住手柄，保持背部挺直，肩部放松。
将手柄拉向身体，收缩肩胛骨。
在动作的最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手柄释放回到起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground. Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down. Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，面对绳索训练器，双脚平放在地面上。握住绳索手柄，将手臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。保持肘部略微弯曲，肩胛骨向后向下收紧。缓慢地将手臂向内旋转，将绳索手柄拉向身体中线。在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢地回到起始位置。按照要求的次数重复完成后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down.
Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，面对绳索训练器，双脚平放在地面上。
握住绳索手柄，将手臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。
保持肘部略微弯曲，肩胛骨向后向下收紧。
缓慢地将手臂向内旋转，将绳索手柄拉向身体中线。
在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢地回到起始位置。
按照要求的次数重复完成后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight in front of you. Keeping your core engaged, slowly rotate your torso to one side, pulling the cable across your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the range of motion, then slowly rotate back to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索训练器上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖略微弯曲。双手握住绳索手柄，双臂向前伸直。保持核心肌群收紧，躯干向一侧缓慢转动，同时将绳索拉过身体。在动作末端稍作停留，然后缓慢转回起始位置。另一侧重复相同动作。持续交替进行直至完成目标次数。

en: Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Hold the cable handle with both hands and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Keeping your core engaged, slowly rotate your torso to one side, pulling the cable across your body.
Pause for a moment at the end of the range of motion, then slowly rotate back to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索训练器上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手握住绳索手柄，双臂向前伸直。
保持核心收紧，躯干向一侧缓慢转动，同时将绳索拉过身体。
在动作末端稍作停留，然后缓慢转回起始位置。
另一侧重复相同动作。
持续交替进行直至完成目标次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips. Pull the handle towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索划船器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。双手采用宽握正握的方式握住把手，手掌向下。保持背部挺直，从髋部开始微微前倾。将把手向身体下胸部的位置拉去，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。在动作顶点稍作停顿，感受收缩。然后缓慢将把手放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Pull the handle towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction.
Slowly release the handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索划船器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手采用宽握正握的方式握住把手，手掌向下。
保持背部挺直，从髋部开始微微前倾。
将把手向身体下胸部的位置拉去，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，感受肌肉收缩。
缓慢将把手放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the handles are at shoulder height. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them up to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and pointing outwards. Press the handles upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械的把手调整至肩部高度。背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用正握握住把手，将把手拉至肩部高度，手肘弯曲并向外展开。将把手向上推举直至手臂完全伸直位于头顶上方。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将把手下降回至肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the handles are at shoulder height.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them up to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and pointing outwards.
Press the handles upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械的把手调整至肩部高度。
背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
采用正握握住把手，将把手拉至肩部高度，手肘弯曲并向外展开。
将把手向上推举直至手臂完全伸直位于头顶上方。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将把手下降回至肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and let your arms hang down in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索手柄，掌心向下，让双臂自然下垂于身体前方。保持手臂伸直，将肩膀向上耸起至耳朵高度。保持收缩片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and let your arms hang down in front of you.
Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索手柄，掌心向下，让双臂自然下垂于身体前方。
保持手臂伸直，将肩膀向上耸起至耳朵高度。
保持收缩片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住绳索手柄。保持背部挺直，收紧核心。慢慢向侧方屈腰，将绳索手柄下放至膝盖方向。停顿片刻，然后回到起始位置。换另一侧重复。交替两侧完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the cable handle with one hand.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Slowly bend sideways at the waist, lowering the cable handle towards your knee.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Alternate sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住绳索手柄。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心。
慢慢向侧方屈腰，将绳索手柄下放至膝盖方向。
停顿片刻，然后回到起始位置。
换另一侧重复。
交替两侧完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a cable handle in one hand. Place the other hand on your hip. Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the hand holding the cable, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一只手握住绳索手柄，另一只手放在髋部。收紧核心，身体向握绳索的手侧缓慢侧屈，保持背部挺直。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a cable handle in one hand.
Place the other hand on your hip.
Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the hand holding the cable, keeping your back straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，一只手握住绳索手柄。
另一只手放在髋部。
收紧核心，身体向握绳索的手侧缓慢侧屈，保持背部挺直。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand sideways to the machine. Grasp the handle with the hand furthest from the machine and place your other hand on your hip. Keep your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. With your abs engaged, bend sideways at the waist, bringing your elbow down towards your hip. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄固定在低位滑轮上，然后侧身站立于器械旁。握住离器械最远的那只手的手柄，另一只手叉腰。双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。收紧腹肌，身体向侧方弯曲，将肘部拉向同侧髋部。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

en: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand sideways to the machine.
Grasp the handle with the hand furthest from the machine and place your other hand on your hip.
Keep your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
With your abs engaged, bend sideways at the waist, bringing your elbow down towards your hip.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 将绳索手柄固定在低位滑轮上，然后侧身站立于器械旁。
握住离器械最远的那只手的手柄，另一只手叉腰。
双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
收紧腹肌，身体向侧方弯曲，将肘部拉向同侧髋部。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

name.zh: 绳索深蹲划船（配绳索附件）

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接到腰部高度的绳索器械上。双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械。弯曲膝盖，降低身体进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。用正握方式握住绳索，双手与肩同宽。收紧核心，将绳索向身体方向拉，收缩肩胛骨。保持肘部靠近身体，继续拉动直到双手到达胸部。在动作最高点暂停片刻，然后缓慢释放绳索，将手臂伸展回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height.
Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索连接到腰部高度的绳索器械上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械。
弯曲膝盖，降低身体进入深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。
用正握方式握住绳索，双手与肩同宽。
收紧核心，将绳索向身体方向拉，收缩肩胛骨。
保持肘部靠近身体，继续拉动直到双手到达胸部。
在动作最高点暂停片刻，然后缓慢释放绳索，将手臂伸展回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Attach a cable handle to the lowest setting on a cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and knees behind your toes. As you squat down, curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the top of the curl, squeezing your biceps. Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将缆绳手柄固定在缆绳机的最低档位上。面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。反手握住缆绳手柄，掌心向上，手臂完全伸直。将身体下降至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直，膝盖不超过脚尖。下蹲的同时，将缆绳手柄向肩膀方向弯举，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。在弯举顶点停顿片刻，收缩肱二头肌。慢慢将缆绳手柄放回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a cable handle to the lowest setting on a cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and knees behind your toes.
As you squat down, curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Pause for a moment at the top of the curl, squeezing your biceps.
Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄安装在绳索器械的最低位置。
双脚与肩同宽站立,面向器械。
用反握握住绳索手柄,掌心向上,手臂完全伸展。
身体下降进入深蹲姿势,保持背部挺直,膝盖位于脚尖后方。
下蹲的同时,将绳索手柄向肩膀方向弯举,肘部贴近身体两侧。
在弯举顶峰位置暂停片刻,收缩肱二头肌。
慢慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置,手臂完全伸展。
根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。掌心向下握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式。保持手臂伸直，肘部贴近身体两侧。缓慢向上弯曲手腕，将绳索手柄拉向身体。在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。
掌心向下握住绳索手柄，采用正握方式。
保持手臂伸直，肘部贴近身体两侧。
缓慢向上弯曲手腕，将绳索手柄拉向身体。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles. Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。握住器械手柄或将绳索踝束带固定在脚踝处。通过尽可能高地伸展踝关节来将脚跟抬离地面。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles.
Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。
握住绳索器械的手柄，或将绳索踝束带固定在脚踝处。
通过尽可能高地伸展踝关节，将脚跟抬离地面。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复进行所需的重复次数。

name.en: cable standing cross-over high reverse fly
name.zh: 高位绳索交叉反向飞鸟

instructions.en: Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height. Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
