Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将D型手柄分别连接在龙门架两侧与肩同高的位置。双脚分开与肩同宽，站在龙门架正中间。双手握住手柄，采用正握姿势将双臂向身体两侧伸展，掌心朝前。保持肘部微屈，背部挺直。发力时收缩肩部肌肉，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，将手柄拉向身体前方。当动作达到顶峰时稍作停顿，然后缓慢还原至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward.
Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将D型手柄分别连接在龙门架两侧与肩同高的位置。
双脚分开与肩同宽，站在龙门架正中间。
双手握住手柄，采用正握姿势将双臂向身体两侧伸展，掌心朝前。
保持肘部微屈，背部挺直。
发力时收缩肩部肌肉，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，将手柄拉向身体前方。
当动作达到顶峰时稍作停顿，然后缓慢还原至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine. Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接至高滑轮装置，背对器械站立。双手握住手柄置于头后，手肘保持微屈。双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。收紧腹肌，呼气的同时将躯干向下卷曲至膝盖方向，使手肘朝向大腿靠近。在动作底部稍作停顿后，缓慢返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接至高滑轮装置，背对器械站立。
双手握住手柄置于头后，保持手肘微屈。
双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。
收紧腹肌，呼气的同时将躯干向下卷曲至膝盖方向，使手肘朝向大腿靠近。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢返回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent. Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄固定在高位滑轮上，面对器械反方向站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索两端，将其置于头后，保持肘部微屈。收紧腹肌，慢慢向前卷腹，将手肘向膝盖方向靠拢。在卷腹顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索手柄固定在 cable 高位滑轮上，调整到胸部高度。
面对器械反方向站立，双脚与肩同宽站立。
双手握住绳索两端，将其置于头后，保持肘部弯曲。
收紧腹肌，慢慢向前卷腹，将手肘向膝盖方向靠拢。
在卷腹顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward. Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables. Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise. With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest. Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement. Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将手柄挂在与胸部同高的绳索上。两脚分开与肩同宽，背对绳索器械站立。用手掌朝前的正握方式握住手柄，略微向前迈步以在绳索中产生张力。保持核心收紧、背部挺直。肘部微屈，慢慢将双臂向前并拢至胸前，在动作的最高点用力收缩胸肌。然后慢慢还原至起始位置，重复所需次数。

en: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables.
Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest.
Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将手柄挂在与胸部同高的绳索上。
两脚分开与肩同宽，背对绳索器械站立。
用手掌朝前的正握方式握住手柄。
略微向前迈步以在绳索中产生张力。
保持核心收紧、背部挺直。
肘部微屈，慢慢将双臂向前并拢至胸前。
在动作的最高点用力收缩胸肌。
慢慢还原至起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine. Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise. Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat with the other leg.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接到底部滑轮上，背对器械站立。将绳索套在脚踝上，双脚与肩同宽站立。在整个动作过程中保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直。慢慢将腿向后伸直，在动作顶端用力收缩臀部肌肉。稍作停顿，然后返回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。换另一侧腿重复相同的动作。

en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat with the other leg.
zh: 将绳索连接到底部滑轮上，背对器械站立。
将绳索套在脚踝上，双脚与肩同宽站立。
在整个动作过程中保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直。
慢慢将腿向后伸直，在动作顶端用力收缩臀部肌肉。
稍作停顿，然后返回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。
换另一侧腿重复相同的动作。

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。反手握住绳索手柄，掌心向上。将肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。呼气时，将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气时，缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。
反手握住绳索手柄，掌心向上。
将肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持静止。
呼气时，将绳索手柄向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气时，缓慢将绳索手柄放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it at waist height. Engage your core and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise. Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the cable handle up towards your opposite shoulder, rotating your torso. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械。双手握住绳索手柄，将其置于腰部高度。收紧核心肌群，在整个动作过程中保持背部挺直。保持手臂伸直，呼气的同时将绳索手柄向对侧肩膀方向提起，同时旋转躯干。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将绳索手柄降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧重复。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it at waist height.
Engage your core and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the cable handle up towards your opposite shoulder, rotating your torso.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对绳索器械
双手握住绳索手柄，将其置于腰部高度
收紧核心肌群，在整个动作过程中保持背部挺直
保持手臂伸直，呼气的同时将绳索手柄向对侧肩膀方向提起，同时旋转躯干
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将绳索手柄降回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧重复

name.en: cable standing one arm triceps extension
name.zh: 绳索单臂站姿肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body. Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索训练器。右手握住绳索手柄，掌心向下，将手臂伸直并与地面保持平行。保持肘部固定并贴近身体。慢慢弯曲肘关节，将绳索手柄向头后下方降低。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。按所需次数重复后，换另一侧用左手进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索训练器。
右手握住绳索手柄，掌心向下，将手臂伸直并与地面保持平行。
保持肘部固定并贴近身体。
慢慢弯曲肘关节，将绳索手柄向头后下方降低。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸回起始位置。
按所需次数重复后，换另一侧用左手进行练习。

name.en: cable standing one leg calf raise

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold onto the cable machine for support. Lift one leg off the ground and balance on the other leg. Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 面向龙门架站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住龙门架以保持身体平衡。将一条腿抬离地面，单腿支撑保持平衡。慢慢将支撑腿的脚跟抬离地面，身体向上提起，用脚尖支撑。在最顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一条腿继续练习。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold onto the cable machine for support.
Lift one leg off the ground and balance on the other leg.
Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 面向龙门架站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住龙门架以保持身体平衡。
将一条腿抬离地面，单腿支撑保持平衡。
慢慢将支撑腿的脚跟抬离地面，身体向上提起，用脚尖支撑。
在最顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一条腿继续练习。

instructions.en: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the rope back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索连接在绳索器械的最高位置。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。反手握住绳索，手掌朝下。在整个动作过程中保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧。将绳索向下拉向大腿方向，同时用力收缩肱二头肌。在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索释放回原位。重复所需的次数。

en: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the rope back up.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索连接在绳索器械的最高位置。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。
反手握住绳索，手掌朝下。
在整个动作过程中保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧。
将绳索向下拉向大腿方向，同时用力收缩肱二头肌。
在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索释放回原位。
重复所需的次数。

name.en: cable standing rear delt row (with rope)
name.zh: 绳索站姿三角肌后束划船（绳索附件）

instructions.en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable attachment with both hands, palms facing each other, and step back to create tension in the cable. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the cable towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索附件，掌心相对，向后退一步使绳索产生张力。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将绳索向身体方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索释放回起始位置。按所需重复次数重复练习。

en: Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable attachment with both hands, palms facing each other, and step back to create tension in the cable.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the cable towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the cable back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索附件，掌心相对，向后退一步使绳索产生张力。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将绳索向身体方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将绳索释放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数重复练习。

name.en: cable standing reverse grip one arm overhead tricep extension
name.zh: 绳索反握单臂过头臂屈伸

instructions.en: Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and extend your arm overhead, keeping your elbow close to your head. Keep your upper arm stationary and slowly lower the cable handle behind your head by bending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 背对绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。反握绳索手柄，将手臂举过头顶，肘部靠近头部。保持上臂固定，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将手柄降低到头部后方。在底部稍作停顿，然后伸展手臂回到起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂继续。

en: Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip and extend your arm overhead, keeping your elbow close to your head.
Keep your upper arm stationary and slowly lower the cable handle behind your head by bending your elbow.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 背对绳索器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
反握绳索手柄，将手臂举过头顶，肘部靠近头部。
保持上臂固定，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将手柄降低到头部后方。
在底部稍作停顿，然后伸展手臂回到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数练习，然后换另一侧手臂继续。

instructions.en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the v-bar towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。双手握住V把，手掌向下，采用正握方式。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将V把向身体方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶峰短暂停留，然后缓慢释放阻力，恢复到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the v-bar towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械
双手握住V把，手掌向下，采用正握方式
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧
将V把向身体方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨
在动作顶峰短暂停留，然后缓慢释放阻力，恢复到起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle with your arm extended in front of you, parallel to the ground. Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back. Slowly rotate your arm outward, away from your body, while keeping your elbow in the same position. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。握住绳索手柄，手臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。保持肘部微屈，肩胛骨向后收紧。在保持肘部位置不变的前提下，慢慢将手臂向外侧旋转，远离身体。到达动作末端时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Hold the cable handle with your arm extended in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back.
Slowly rotate your arm outward, away from your body, while keeping your elbow in the same position.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。
握住绳索手柄，手臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。
保持肘部微屈，肩胛骨向后收紧。
在保持肘部位置不变的前提下，慢慢将手臂向外侧旋转，远离身体。
到达动作末端时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.zh: 绳索站姿扭转划船（V型杆）

instructions.en: Attach a v-bar attachment to a cable machine at chest height. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Take a step back to create tension in the cable. Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows. As you pull, twist your torso to one side, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your upper back. Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position, untwisting your torso. Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, alternating the twisting direction with each rep.
instructions.zh: 将V型杆连接在龙门架上，调整至胸部高度。面向龙门架站立，双脚与肩同宽站立。用正握（手掌向下）抓住V型杆。后退一步，使绳索产生张力。保持背部挺直，整个动作过程中核心肌群保持收紧。通过收缩肩胛骨和弯曲手肘，将V型杆向身体方向拉。在拉动的同时，向一侧扭转躯干，将肩胛骨夹紧。在动作顶端稍作停顿，感受上背部的收缩。缓慢释放张力，躯干回旋至起始位置。重复所需次数的练习，每次重复交替扭转方向。

en: Attach a v-bar attachment to a cable machine at chest height.
Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Take a step back to create tension in the cable.
Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
As you pull, twist your torso to one side, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your upper back.
Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position, untwisting your torso.
Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, alternating the twisting direction with each rep.
zh: 将V型杆连接在龙门架上，调整至胸部高度。
面向龙门架站立，双脚与肩同宽。
用正握（手掌向下）抓住V型杆。
后退一步，使绳索产生张力。
保持背部挺直，整个动作过程中核心肌群保持收紧。
通过收缩肩胛骨和弯曲手肘，将V型杆向身体方向拉。
在拉动的同时，向一侧扭转躯干，将肩胛骨夹紧。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，感受上背部的收缩。
缓慢释放张力，躯干回旋至起始位置。
重复所需次数的练习，每次重复交替扭转方向。

instructions.en: Stand in the middle of a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the handles of the cables with your palms facing down and your arms extended straight out to the sides. Keeping your arms straight, bring your hands together in front of your body, crossing them over each other. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position, keeping your arms extended. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽，站在绳索器械的中央。双手握住绳索手柄，掌心向下，双臂向身体两侧伸直。保持手臂伸直，将双手在身体前侧收拢并相互交叉。短暂停顿后，在保持手臂伸直的状态下缓慢回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand in the middle of a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the handles of the cables with your palms facing down and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Keeping your arms straight, bring your hands together in front of your body, crossing them over each other.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position, keeping your arms extended.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽，站在绳索器械的中央。
双手握住绳索手柄，掌心向下，双臂向身体两侧伸直。
保持手臂伸直，将双手在身体前侧收拢并相互交叉。
短暂停顿后，在保持手臂伸直的状态下缓慢回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down. Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接在绳索器械的高滑轮上。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。手掌向下，反手握住杠铃，保持手臂伸直。收紧背阔肌，将杠铃向下拉向大腿位置，手臂自始至终保持伸直。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃回到起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接到绳索器械的高滑轮上。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向器械。
手掌向下，反手握住杠铃，保持手臂伸直。
收紧背阔肌，将杠铃向下拉向大腿位置，手臂保持伸直。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃回到起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down. Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索扣挂在器械最高位置。面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索，掌心向下。将双臂向前完全伸直，肘部保持微屈。收紧背阔肌，将绳索缓慢下拉至大腿位置，同时保持手臂伸直。在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down.
Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索扣挂在器械最高位置。
面向器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索，掌心向下。
将双臂向前完全伸直，肘部保持微屈。
收紧背阔肌，将绳索缓慢下拉至大腿位置，同时保持手臂伸直。
在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips. Pull the cable handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在绳索划船器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。采用正握方式握住绳索手柄，掌心向下。保持背部挺直，髋关节微微前倾。将绳索手柄拉向身体方向，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。在动作的最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将手柄释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Pull the cable handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在绳索划船器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖微微弯曲。
采用正握方式握住绳索手柄，掌心向下。
保持背部挺直，髋关节微微前倾。
将绳索手柄拉向身体方向，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
在动作的最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将手柄释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench. Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将D型把手连接在低位滑轮绳索器械上，俯卧在平凳上。每只手握住D型把手，掌心向下，将双臂向前伸直。保持手臂伸直，向两侧抬起直至与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。重复至所需的重复次数。

en: Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench.
Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将D型把手连接在低位滑轮绳索器械上，俯卧在平凳上。
每只手握住D型把手，掌心向下，将双臂向前伸直。
保持手臂伸直，向两侧抬起直至与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。
重复至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handle with your right hand and extend your arm fully, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged. Pull the handle towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blade and bending your elbow, keeping your arm close to your body. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your left arm.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接在低滑轮上，坐在器械前，双脚平放在地面上。右手握住手柄，手臂完全伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。髋关节前倾，背部保持挺直，腹部收紧。通过收缩肩胛骨并弯曲肘部，将手柄拉向身体，手臂贴近身体。动作顶端时挤压背部肌肉，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换另一侧用左手进行练习。

en: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handle with your right hand and extend your arm fully, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged.
Pull the handle towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blade and bending your elbow, keeping your arm close to your body.
Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your left arm.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接在低滑轮上，坐在器械前，双脚平放在地面上。
右手握住手柄，手臂完全伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。
髋关节前倾，背部保持挺直，腹部收紧。
通过收缩肩胛骨并弯曲肘部，将手柄拉向身体，手臂贴近身体。
动作顶端时挤压背部肌肉，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数后，换另一侧用左手进行练习。

name.zh: 绳索肱三头肌下压（V型杆）

instructions.en: Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps. Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将V型杆连接至龙门架滑轮的最高位置。双脚分开与肩同宽，面向龙门架站立。掌心向下，采用正握的方式握住V型杆，双手间距与肩同宽。动作过程中保持大臂贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。发力时收紧肱三头肌，同时呼气，将V型杆下压至手臂完全伸直。在动作底部稍作停顿，充分挤压肱三头肌。吸气时缓慢将V型杆恢复至起始位置，保持对重量的控制。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将V型杆连接至龙门架滑轮的最高位置。
双脚分开与肩同宽，面向龙门架站立。
掌心向下，采用正握的方式握住V型杆，双手间距与肩同宽。
动作过程中保持大臂贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
发力时收紧肱三头肌，同时呼气，将V型杆下压至手臂完全伸直。
在动作底部稍作停顿，充分挤压肱三头肌。
吸气时缓慢将V型杆恢复至起始位置，保持对重量的控制。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 绳索肱三头肌下压（V型杆）（配臂部固定器）

instructions.en: Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting. Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps. Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将V型杆连接到高位滑轮绳索器械上。双脚分开与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。双手采用正握（掌心向下），握住V型杆，双手间距与肩同宽。保持大臂贴近身体两侧，在整个动作过程中上臂保持不动。发力收缩肱三头肌，同时呼气，将V型杆下压至手臂完全伸直。在动作底部稍作停顿，充分挤压肱三头肌。吸气时缓慢将V型杆还原至起始位置，保持控制。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将V型杆连接到高位滑轮绳索器械上。
双脚分开与肩同宽，面对绳索器械站立。
双手采用正握（掌心向下），握住V型杆，双手间距与肩同宽。
保持大臂贴近身体两侧，在整个动作过程中上臂保持不动。
发力收缩肱三头肌，同时呼气，将V型杆下压至手臂完全伸直。
在动作底部稍作停顿，充分挤压肱三头肌。
吸气时缓慢将V型杆还原至起始位置，保持控制。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down on a mat facing up. Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest. Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest. At the same time, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索固定在低滑轮上，仰卧于垫子上。双手握住绳索，双臂向上伸直于胸部上方。弯曲膝盖并抬起双腿，使膝盖靠近胸部。同时，屈髋将骨盆卷向胸部，抬起臀部离地。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿和臀部放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down on a mat facing up.
Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
At the same time, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索固定在低滑轮上，仰卧于垫子上。
双手握住绳索，双臂向上伸直于胸部上方。
弯曲膝盖并抬起双腿，使膝盖靠近胸部。
同时，屈髋将骨盆卷向胸部，抬起臀部离地。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿和臀部放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent. Engage your core and twist your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling the contraction in your abs and obliques. Slowly return to the starting position, resisting the cable's pull. Repeat the movement to the left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。双手握住绳索手柄置于胸前，手臂保持微屈状态。收紧核心肌群，躯干向右旋转，将绳索拉过身体。在动作末端稍作停顿，感受腹肌和腹斜肌的强烈收缩。慢慢回到起始位置，同时对抗绳索的拉力。重复向左旋转的动作，继续两侧交替进行至目标次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Engage your core and twist your torso to the right, pulling the cable across your body.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling the contraction in your abs and obliques.
Slowly return to the starting position, resisting the cable's pull.
Repeat the movement to the left side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械
双手握住绳索手柄置于胸前，手臂保持微屈
收紧核心肌群，躯干向右旋转，将绳索拉过身体
在动作末端稍作停顿，感受腹肌和腹斜肌的收缩
慢慢回到起始位置，对抗绳索的拉力
重复向左旋转的动作
继续两侧交替进行至目标次数

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine. Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent. Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the rotation to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。双手握住绳索手柄置于胸前，手臂略微弯曲。收紧核心，躯干缓慢向一侧旋转，保持臀部和腿部稳定。旋转末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。向另一侧重复旋转动作。按照所需的重复次数交替进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Hold the cable handle with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat the rotation to the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向绳索器械。
双手握住绳索手柄置于胸前，手臂略微弯曲。
收紧核心，躯干缓慢向一侧旋转，保持臀部和腿部稳定。
旋转末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
向另一侧重复旋转动作。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行。

instructions.en: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand facing the machine. Grasp the handle with your left hand and step away from the machine, extending your arm fully. Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your knees slightly bent. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your torso to the right as you do so. Squeeze your back muscles at the end of the movement. Slowly return to the starting position, keeping tension on the cable. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your right hand.
instructions.zh: 将绳索手柄连接在低位滑轮上，面向器械站立。左手握住手柄，向后退步将手臂完全伸直。两脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。保持背部挺直，在整个动作过程中收紧核心肌群。将手柄向身体方向拉，同时旋转躯干向右。动作结束时挤压背部肌肉。慢慢回到起始位置，保持对绳索的张力。按所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换侧用右手完成动作。

en: Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand facing the machine.
Grasp the handle with your left hand and step away from the machine, extending your arm fully.
Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your knees slightly bent.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Pull the handle towards your body, rotating your torso to the right as you do so.
Squeeze your back muscles at the end of the movement.
Slowly return to the starting position, keeping tension on the cable.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your right hand.
zh: 将绳索手柄连接在低位滑轮上，面向器械站立。
左手握住手柄，向后退步将手臂完全伸直。
两脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
保持背部挺直，在整个动作过程中收紧核心肌群。
将手柄向身体方向拉，同时旋转躯干向右。
动作结束时挤压背部肌肉。
慢慢回到起始位置，保持对绳索的张力。
按所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换侧用右手完成动作。

name.en: cable two arm curl on incline bench

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the cable handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders while contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在倾斜的凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面。掌心向上握住绳索手柄，采用反握姿势，双臂完全伸直。保持上臂不动，呼气时将手柄向肩部方向弯举，同时收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气时缓慢将手柄放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。根据所需次数重复此动作。

en: Sit on an incline bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the cable handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders while contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在倾斜的凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面。
掌心向上握住绳索手柄，采用反握姿势，双臂完全伸直。
保持上臂不动，呼气时将手柄向肩部方向弯举，同时收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气时缓慢将手柄放回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。
根据所需次数重复此动作。

name.zh: 绳索双臂肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle. Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微弯。双手握住绳索手柄，掌心相对，手臂弯曲成90度。保持上臂固定不动，将前臂向后伸展至手臂完全伸直。稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微弯。
双手握住绳索手柄，掌心相对，手臂弯曲成90度角。
保持上臂固定不动，将前臂向后伸展至手臂完全伸直。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢恢复至起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head. Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and lean back slightly. Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索下拉器械的横杆调整到头部上方的位置。坐在座椅上，采用反握方式握住横杆，双手间距略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直并轻微向后倾斜。将横杆向下拉向胸部，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将横杆放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索下拉器械的横杆调整到头部上方的位置。
坐在座椅上，采用反握方式握住横杆，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
保持背部挺直并轻微向后倾斜。
将横杆向下拉向胸部，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将横杆放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height. Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other. Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides. Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core. Pull the cables together in front of your chest, crossing them over each other. Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement. Slowly release the cables back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将把手固定在绳索器械上与胸部齐平的高度。站在器械中心，一只脚略微在前。掌心向下握住把手，双臂向两侧伸展。保持肘部微弯，收紧核心肌群。将绳索在胸前相互交叉挤压，在动作顶点充分收缩胸肌。然后缓慢释放绳索回到起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Keep a slight bend in your elbows and engage your core.
Pull the cables together in front of your chest, crossing them over each other.
Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Slowly release the cables back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将把手固定在绳索器械上与胸部齐平的高度。
站在器械中心，一只脚略微在前。
掌心向下握住把手，双臂向两侧伸展。
保持肘部微弯，收紧核心肌群。
将绳索在胸前相互交叉挤压。
在动作顶点充分收缩胸肌。
缓慢释放绳索回到起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the bar towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement. Slowly release the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接在胸部高度的绳索器械上。双脚分开与肩同宽，面对器械站立。采用反握方式握住直杆，双手间距略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将直杆向胸部上方拉近，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将直杆放回起始位置。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the bar towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接在胸部高度的绳索器械上。
双脚分开与肩同宽，面对器械站立。
采用反握方式握住直杆，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将直杆向胸部上方拉近，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作顶端稍作停顿。
缓慢将直杆放回起始位置。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold the cable attachment with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Pull the cable attachment straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，双手握住绳索把手，采用正握。保持背部挺直，核心肌群全程收紧。将绳索把手垂直向上拉至下巴高度，手肘带动。顶峰时停顿片刻，挤压肩胛骨。慢慢将绳索把手放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold the cable attachment with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Pull the cable attachment straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，双手握住绳索把手，采用正握。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群全程收紧。
将绳索把手垂直向上拉至下巴高度，手肘带动。
顶峰时停顿片刻，挤压肩胛骨。
慢慢将绳索把手放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: cable wide grip rear pulldown behind neck

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head. Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with a wide overhand grip. Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lean back slightly. Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整绳索器械的高度，使下拉杆位于头部上方。坐在座椅上，采用宽握正握方式握住下拉杆。保持背部挺直、胸部挺起，身体略微后倾。将杆向下拉至胸部上方位置，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杆释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with a wide overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lean back slightly.
Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整绳索器械的高度，使下拉杆位于头部上方。
坐在座椅上，采用宽握正握方式握住下拉杆。
保持背部挺直、胸部挺起，身体略微后倾。
将杆向下拉至胸部上方位置，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杆释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on a bench or pad, with your wrists hanging off the edge. Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将直杆连接在低滑轮绳索机上。双脚分开与肩同宽，面对机器站立。用反握的方式握住杆，手掌朝上，双手间距与肩同宽。将前臂放在凳子或垫子上，手腕悬在边缘外。保持前臂静止不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯举至最大限度。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杆放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Rest your forearms on a bench or pad, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将直杆连接在低滑轮绳索机上。
双脚分开与肩同宽，面对机器站立。
用反握的方式握住杆，手掌朝上，双手间距与肩同宽。
将前臂放在凳子或垫子上，手腕悬在边缘外。
保持前臂静止不动，呼气的同时将手腕向上弯举至最大限度。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杆放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: calf push stretch with hands against wall
name.zh: 靠墙手撑小腿推拉伸展

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart. Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height. Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight. Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
instructions.zh: 面对墙壁站立，双脚与髋同宽。双手撑在墙上，与肩同高。一只脚向后迈一步，保持脚跟着地，腿伸直。微微弯曲前腿膝盖，身体前倾，感受小腿部位的拉伸。保持这个姿势20-30秒。换另一条腿进行相同的拉伸动作。

en: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step back with one foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, feeling a stretch in your calf.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
zh: 面对墙壁站立，双脚与髋同宽。
双手撑在墙上，与肩同高。
一只脚向后迈一步，保持脚跟着地，腿伸直。
微微弯曲前腿膝盖，身体前倾，感受小腿部位的拉伸。
保持这个姿势20-30秒。
换另一条腿进行相同的拉伸动作。

name.en: calf stretch with hands against wall

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart. Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height. Step your right foot back, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight. Bend your left knee and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight and your heel on the ground. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
instructions.zh: 面向墙壁站立，双脚与髋同宽。双手放在与肩同高的位置撑在墙上。将右脚向后迈一步，保持脚后跟着地和腿部伸直。弯曲左膝并向前倾斜，保持后腿伸直且脚后跟着地。保持拉伸姿势20-30秒。换另一侧腿重复拉伸动作。

en: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step your right foot back, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Bend your left knee and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight and your heel on the ground.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
zh: 面向墙壁站立，双脚与髋同宽。
双手放在与肩同高的位置撑在墙上。
将右脚向后迈一步，保持脚后跟着地和腿部伸直。
弯曲左膝并向前倾斜，保持后腿伸直且脚后跟着地。
保持拉伸姿势20-30秒。
换另一侧腿重复拉伸动作。

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall or sturdy object with your feet hip-width apart. Hold the ends of the rope in each hand and place the middle of the rope around the ball of your right foot. Step back with your left foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight. Lean forward, keeping your back straight, and gently pull on the rope to stretch your calf. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other leg.
instructions.zh: 面对墙壁或其他稳固的物体站立，双脚分开与髋同宽。双手各握住绳索的两端，将绳索中部套在右脚前脚掌处。左脚向后迈出一步，保持脚跟着地和腿部伸直。身体向前倾斜，背部保持挺直，轻轻拉动绳索来拉伸小腿。保持拉伸姿势20-30秒，然后放松。换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

en: Stand facing a wall or sturdy object with your feet hip-width apart.
Hold the ends of the rope in each hand and place the middle of the rope around the ball of your right foot.
Step back with your left foot, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Lean forward, keeping your back straight, and gently pull on the rope to stretch your calf.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Repeat on the other leg.
zh: 面对墙壁或其他稳固的物体站立，双脚分开与髋同宽。
双手各握住绳索的两端，将绳索中部套在右脚前脚掌处。
左脚向后迈出一步，保持脚跟着地和腿部伸直。
身体向前倾斜，背部保持挺直，轻轻拉动绳索来拉伸小腿。
保持拉伸姿势20-30秒，然后放松。
换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

instructions.en: Set up a barbell on the floor and lie face down on a bench with your chest just off the edge. Reach down and grab the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. With your legs straight and feet on the ground, lift the barbell off the floor by extending your arms. Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃放在地面上，俯卧在训练凳上，使胸部略微悬空于凳边。伸手向下握住杠铃，采用正握方式，双手间距比肩略宽。双腿保持伸直，双脚踏实地面，通过手臂伸展将杠铃从地面提起。将杠铃向胸部方向拉起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。然后将杠铃缓慢下放回起始位置，重复完成所需次数。

en: Set up a barbell on the floor and lie face down on a bench with your chest just off the edge.
Reach down and grab the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
With your legs straight and feet on the ground, lift the barbell off the floor by extending your arms.
Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃放置在地面上，俯卧在训练凳上，使胸部略微悬于凳边。
身体俯下，用正握方式握住杠铃，双手间距比肩略宽。
双腿保持伸直，双脚踏实地面，通过伸展手臂将杠铃从地面提起。
将杠铃向胸部方向拉起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
将杠铃缓慢下放回起始位置，重复完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the captain's chair with your back against the backrest and your forearms resting on the arm pads. Keep your upper body stable and your back straight. Engage your abs and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在举腿架上，背部贴紧靠背，前臂放在扶手上。保持上半身稳定，背部挺直。收紧腹肌，将双腿向前上方抬起，保持腿部伸直。继续向上举腿至与地面平行或在自己舒适范围内尽可能高的位置。在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放下回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the captain's chair with your back against the backrest and your forearms resting on the arm pads.
Keep your upper body stable and your back straight.
Engage your abs and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在举腿架上，背部贴紧靠背，前臂放在扶手上。
保持上半身稳定，背部挺直。
收紧腹肌，将双腿向前上方抬起，保持腿部伸直。
继续向上举腿至与地面平行或在自己舒适范围内尽可能高的位置。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放下回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground. Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps. Hold this position for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子边缘，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。将一条腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。轻轻向前倾，感受股四头肌的拉伸。保持这个姿势20-30秒。换另一条腿重复拉伸。

en: Sit on the edge of a chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground.
Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your quadriceps.
Hold this position for 20-30 seconds.
Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
zh: 坐在椅子边缘，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
将一条腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。
轻轻向前倾，感受股四头肌的拉伸。
保持这个姿势20-30秒。
换另一条腿重复拉伸。

name.en: chest and front of shoulder stretch

instructions.en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height. Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm. Interlace your fingers and press your palms together. Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，站立挺直。将双臂向前平伸，与肩同高。将双臂交叉在身前，右臂压在左臂上方。十指交扣，双手合拢。轻轻内收肩胛骨，同时向前推动双手，感受到胸部和肩部前侧的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后放松。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height.
Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm.
Interlace your fingers and press your palms together.
Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，站立挺直。
将双臂向前平伸，与肩同高。
将双臂交叉在身前，右臂压在左臂上方。
十指交扣，双手合拢。
轻轻内收肩胛骨，同时向前推动双手，感受到胸部和肩部前侧的拉伸感。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后放松。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手撑在双杠上，双臂伸直，身体保持直立。通过弯曲手臂使身体下降，直到肩膀低于手肘位置。然后用力伸直手臂，将身体推回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手撑在双杠上，双臂完全伸直，身体保持直立。
通过弯曲手肘使身体下降，直到肩膀低于手肘位置。
用力伸直手臂，将身体推回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.zh: 双杠臂屈伸（在双杠引体架上）

instructions.en: Adjust the dip bars to a height that allows you to comfortably grip them. Stand between the bars and place your hands on each bar, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Jump up and straighten your arms, supporting your body weight on the bars. Bend your knees and cross your ankles behind you. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your chest up and your shoulders down. Continue lowering until your shoulders are below your elbows or until you feel a stretch in your chest. Push through your palms and extend your elbows to raise your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将双杠调整到合适的高度，使你能够舒适地握住。站在双杠之间，双手分别握住两侧杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。跳起并将手臂伸直，用双臂支撑身体重量。弯曲膝盖，将脚踝在身后交叉。通过弯曲肘关节降低身体，同时保持胸部挺起、肩部下沉。继续下降直到肩膀低于肘关节，或直到你感到胸部有拉伸感。然后通过手掌向上推，伸展肘关节将身体抬起回到起始位置。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the dip bars to a height that allows you to comfortably grip them.
Stand between the bars and place your hands on each bar, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Jump up and straighten your arms, supporting your body weight on the bars.
Bend your knees and cross your ankles behind you.
Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your chest up and your shoulders down.
Continue lowering until your shoulders are below your elbows or until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Push through your palms and extend your elbows to raise your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将双杠调整到合适的高度，使你能够舒适地握住。
站在双杠之间，双手分别握住两侧杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。
跳起并将手臂伸直，用双臂支撑身体重量。
弯曲膝盖，将脚踝在身后交叉。
通过弯曲肘关节降低身体，同时保持胸部挺起、肩部下沉。
继续下降直到肩膀低于肘关节，或直到你感到胸部有拉伸感。
通过手掌向上推，伸展肘关节将身体抬起回到起始位置。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Grab the parallel bars with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Bend your knees and cross your ankles. Lower your body by bending your arms until your shoulders are below your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 握住平行杠，双手掌心向下，双臂完全伸直。弯曲膝盖，脚踝交叉。通过弯曲手臂降低身体，直到肩膀低于肘部。通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复。

en: Grab the parallel bars with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Bend your knees and cross your ankles.
Lower your body by bending your arms until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住平行杠，手掌向下，手臂完全伸直。
弯曲膝盖并交叉脚踝。
通过弯曲手臂降低身体，直到肩膀低于肘部。
通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行重复。

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。双手握住健身球，双臂向前伸直。慢慢将健身球拉向胸部位置，感受胸部肌肉的拉伸。保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
双手握住健身球，双臂向前伸直。
慢慢将健身球拉向胸部位置，感受胸部肌肉的拉伸。
保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand. Push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始动作为高位平板支撑姿势，双手比肩宽略宽，身体保持一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将身体下降至地面，手肘贴近身体两侧。下降过程中用右手轻触胸部。然后推起身体回到起始姿势。换用左手轻触胸部重复动作。交替进行两侧动作，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand.
Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩宽略宽，身体保持一条直线。
弯曲手肘将身体下降至地面，手肘贴近身体两侧。
下降过程中用右手轻触胸部。
推起身体回到起始姿势。
换用左手轻触胸部重复动作。
两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，掌心朝向自己，双手与肩同宽。收紧核心，将身体向上拉起，胸部朝前引导。继续向上拉直到下巴超过单杠。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将身体降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，掌心朝向自己，双手与肩同宽。
收紧核心，将身体向上拉起，胸部朝前引导。
继续向上拉直到下巴超过单杠。
在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将身体降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with a narrow parallel grip, palms facing towards you. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手采用窄距平行握（掌心朝向你）握住单杠悬垂。收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉起，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。持续向上拉直到下巴超过单杠。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将身体下放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with a narrow parallel grip, palms facing towards you.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 采用窄距平行握（掌心朝向你）握住单杠悬垂。
收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉起，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
持续向上拉直到下巴超过单杠。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将身体下放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips. Bend your knees slightly and lift your heels off the ground, balancing on the balls of your feet. Keeping your knees bent, rotate your knees in a circular motion, first clockwise and then counterclockwise. Perform the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手叉腰。微微弯曲膝盖并抬起脚后跟，用脚尖保持平衡。保持膝盖弯曲，画圈旋转膝盖，先顺时针后逆时针。重复此动作至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Bend your knees slightly and lift your heels off the ground, balancing on the balls of your feet.
Keeping your knees bent, rotate your knees in a circular motion, first clockwise and then counterclockwise.
Perform the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手叉腰。
微微弯曲膝盖，抬起脚后跟，用脚尖保持平衡。
保持膝盖弯曲，画圈旋转膝盖，先顺时针后逆时针。
重复此动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged. Push through your palms explosively to propel your body off the ground. While in mid-air, clap your hands together before landing back in the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩。弯曲手肘将身体向地面下降，保持核心收紧。通过手掌快速发力，将身体向上推起腾空。在空中击掌后，落回起始姿势。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Push through your palms explosively to propel your body off the ground.
While in mid-air, clap your hands together before landing back in the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩。
弯曲手肘将身体向地面下降，保持核心收紧。
通过手掌快速发力，将身体向上推起腾空。
在空中击掌后，落回起始姿势。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side. Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center. Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side. Continue alternating sides with each repetition.
instructions.zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手垂直于肩膀下方，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。通过弯曲手臂将身体向地面降低，保持手肘靠近身体两侧。在下降过程中，身体向左侧旋转，同时将左臂向侧面伸直。然后推起身体回到起始位置，同时将身体转回中心。再次完成俯卧撑动作，这次身体向右侧旋转，将右臂向侧面伸直。每次重复交替两侧进行。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side.
Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center.
Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side.
Continue alternating sides with each repetition.
zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手垂直于肩膀下方，身体呈一条直线。
通过弯曲手臂将身体向地面降低，保持手肘靠近身体两侧。
在下降过程中，身体向左侧旋转，左臂向侧面伸直。
推起身体回到起始位置，同时将身体转回中心。
再次完成俯卧撑动作，身体向右侧旋转，右臂向侧面伸直。
每次重复交替两侧进行。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手反握单杠，握距与肩同宽。将身体悬挂在单杠上，双臂完全伸直，双脚离地。收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，同时保持手肘贴近身体两侧。继续向上拉动，直到下巴超过单杠。在动作最高点短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手反握单杠，握距与肩同宽。
将身体悬挂在单杠上，双臂完全伸直，双脚离地。
收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，同时保持手肘贴近身体两侧。
继续向上拉动，直到下巴超过单杠。
在动作最高点短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为高位平板支撑，双手紧贴放置于肩部正下方。收紧核心肌群，将身体向地面方向下降，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。通过手掌发力推起身体，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders.
Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为高位平板支撑，双手紧贴放置于肩部正下方。
收紧核心肌群，将身体向地面方向下降，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
通过手掌发力推起身体，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by getting on your hands and knees, with your hands shoulder-width apart and your knees hip-width apart. Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground. Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为四肢着地，双手与肩同宽，膝盖与髋同宽。通过弯曲肘部将上半身向地面降低，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。当胸部刚刚高于地面时稍作停顿。然后通过手掌发力伸直手臂，回到起始姿势。重复所需次数。

en: Start by getting on your hands and knees, with your hands shoulder-width apart and your knees hip-width apart.
Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground.
Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为四肢着地，双手与肩同宽，膝盖与髋同宽。
通过弯曲肘部将上半身向地面降低，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
当胸部刚刚高于地面时稍作停顿。
通过手掌发力伸直手臂，回到起始姿势。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，缓慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，缓慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by sitting on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Place your hands behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet, and lift your hips off the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you while simultaneously reaching your opposite hand towards your toes. Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始动作为坐姿，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手置于身后支撑，手指朝向脚的方向，同时将臀部向上抬起使身体离开地面。一条腿向前伸直，同时对侧手臂向脚趾方向伸展，触碰脚趾。然后回到起始姿势，换另一侧重复动作。持续交替两侧进行至目标重复次数。

en: Start by sitting on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Place your hands behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet, and lift your hips off the ground.
Extend one leg straight out in front of you while simultaneously reaching your opposite hand towards your toes.
Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
将双手放在身后，手指指向脚的方向，同时将臀部抬离地面。
将一条腿向前伸直，同时用对侧的手去触碰脚趾。
回到起始位置，换另一侧重复以上动作。
继续交替两侧进行，直至完成目标重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground and twist to bring your right elbow towards your left knee. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平贴地面。双手放在头后，肘部向外展开。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，同时向一侧扭转，使右肘靠近左膝。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。换另一侧重复动作，左肘靠近右膝。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground and twist to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平贴地面。
双手放在头后，肘部向外展开。
收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，同时向一侧扭转，使右肘靠近左膝。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
换另一侧重复动作，左肘靠近右膝。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend your arms straight above your head. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双臂伸直举过头顶。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，向膝盖方向卷曲。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Extend your arms straight above your head.
Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双臂伸直举过头顶。
收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，向膝盖方向卷曲。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso forward. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。向后躺在健身球上，直到下背部得到支撑，上半身与地面平行。将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹肌，将上半身向膝盖方向抬起，躯干向前卷起。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor.
Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso forward.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
向后躺在健身球上，直到下背部得到支撑，上半身与地面平行。
将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。
收紧腹肌，将上半身向膝盖方向抬起，躯干向前卷起。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ball, curling your shoulders towards your hips. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度。向后靠在球上，直到下背部得到支撑，上半身与地面平行。将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹肌，将上半身向上卷起，肩膀向髋部方向卷动。在顶峰位置稍作停留，然后缓慢地将上半身降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor.
Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ball, curling your shoulders towards your hips.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度。
向后靠在球上，直到下背部得到支撑，上半身与地面平行。
将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。
收紧腹肌，将上半身向上卷起，肩膀向髋部方向卷动。
在顶峰位置稍作停留，然后缓慢地将上半身降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lift your shoulders off the ground, curling forward towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。将双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。收缩腹肌，将肩膀抬离地面，身体向前卷曲靠近双膝。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engage your abs and lift your shoulders off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。
将双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。
收缩腹肌，将肩膀抬离地面，身体向前卷曲靠近双膝。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将肩膀放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹，直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹，直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step diagonally behind and across your body with your right foot, crossing it behind your left leg. Bend both knees as if you were curtsying, lowering your body towards the ground. Keep your torso upright and your weight on your front foot. Push through your front foot to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping diagonally behind and across your body with your left foot.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚向后斜向迈步，绕过身体置于左腿后方，如同行屈膝礼般弯曲双膝，将身体下压。保持躯干直立，重心放在前脚上。前脚发力蹬地，恢复到起始姿势。换另一侧重复，左脚向后斜向迈步，绕过身体置于右腿后方。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Take a step diagonally behind and across your body with your right foot, crossing it behind your left leg.
Bend both knees as if you were curtsying, lowering your body towards the ground.
Keep your torso upright and your weight on your front foot.
Push through your front foot to return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, stepping diagonally behind and across your body with your left foot.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
右脚向后斜向迈步，绕过身体置于左腿后方。
如同行屈膝礼般弯曲双膝，将身体下压。
保持躯干直立，重心放在前脚上。
前脚发力蹬地，恢复到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复，左脚向后斜向迈步，绕过身体置于右腿后方。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the cycle cross trainer. Place your feet on the pedals and grip the handlebars. Start pedaling in a smooth and controlled motion. Maintain a steady pace and increase the resistance if desired. Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，坐在椭圆交叉训练器上。将双脚放在踏板上，双手握住把手。开始以平稳、可控的动作踩踏。保持稳定的节奏，如有需要可增加阻力。继续踩踏直至完成所需的有氧训练时长。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the cycle cross trainer.
Place your feet on the pedals and grip the handlebars.
Start pedaling in a smooth and controlled motion.
Maintain a steady pace and increase the resistance if desired.
Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
zh: 调整座椅高度，坐在椭圆交叉训练器上。
将双脚放在踏板上，双手握住把手。
开始以平稳、可控的动作踩踏。
保持稳定的节奏，如有需要可增加阻力。
继续踩踏直至完成所需的有氧训练时长。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling. Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees. Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground. Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left arm and right leg. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂向上伸直指向天花板。弯曲膝盖并抬起双腿，使髋关节和膝关节均呈90度角。收紧核心肌群和下背部，将下背部牢牢压向地面。缓慢放下右臂和左腿向地面方向移动，保持四肢伸直，并使其悬停在接近地面的位置。保持片刻，然后回到起始姿势。换左臂和右腿重复上述动作。继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling.
Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees.
Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground.
Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the movement with your left arm and right leg.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂向上伸直指向天花板。
弯曲膝盖并抬起双腿，使髋关节和膝关节均呈90度角。
收紧核心肌群和下背部，将下背部牢牢压向地面。
缓慢放下右臂和左腿向地面方向移动，保持四肢伸直，并使其悬停在接近地面的位置。
保持片刻，然后回到起始姿势。
换左臂和右腿重复上述动作。
继续交替进行所需的重复次数。
