instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧于下斜凳上，双脚固定，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。双手置于头后或交叉放于胸前。收紧腹肌，将上半身向膝盖方向卷起，弯曲躯干。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧于下斜凳上，双脚固定，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。
双手置于头后或交叉放于胸前。
收紧腹肌，将上半身向膝盖方向卷起，弯曲躯干。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Place your hands on the ground slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, with your feet elevated on a stable surface. Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core muscles. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将双脚放在稳固的平台上，双手放在地面上，间距略宽于肩部。保持身体从头到脚呈一条直线，收紧核心肌群。弯曲肘部，将胸部向地面方向下压，肘部紧贴身体两侧。通过掌心施力推起身体，伸直手臂恢复至起始姿势。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Place your hands on the ground slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, with your feet elevated on a stable surface.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core muscles.
Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将双脚放在稳固的平台上，双手放在地面上，间距略宽于肩部。
保持身体从头到脚呈一条直线，收紧核心肌群。
弯曲肘部，将胸部向地面方向下压，肘部紧贴身体两侧。
通过掌心施力推起身体，伸直手臂恢复至起始姿势。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定，膝盖弯曲。双手置于头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离凳面，向膝盖方向卷起。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent.
Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定，膝盖弯曲。
双手置于头后或交叉放在胸前。
收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离凳面，向膝盖方向卷起。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手间距略宽于肩，身体保持一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将胸部向地面方向下降，手肘贴近身体两侧。然后通过手掌发力推地，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。按照所需次数重复完成。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手间距略宽于肩，身体保持一条直线。
通过弯曲手肘将胸部向地面方向下降，手肘贴近身体两侧。
通过手掌发力推地，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。
按照所需次数重复完成。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers. Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes. Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手靠近并拢，拇指和食指形成菱形。保持从头到脚成一条直线，收紧核心肌群和臀部。将胸部向双手形成的菱形方向下降，手肘贴近身体。在最低点停顿片刻，然后推起身体回到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes.
Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手靠近并拢，拇指和食指形成菱形。
保持从头到脚成一条直线，收紧核心肌群和臀部。
将胸部向双手形成的菱形方向下降，手肘贴近身体。
在最低点停顿片刻，然后推起身体回到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block. Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚站在台阶或平台等 elevated 表面上，双手扶住墙壁或栏杆等稳固物体以保持平衡。将脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量提至前脚掌。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟降至起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block.
Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance.
Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚站在台阶或平台等 elevated 表面上。
双手扶住墙壁或栏杆等稳固物体以保持平衡。
将脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量提至前脚掌。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟降至起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始动作为高位平板支撑，双手略宽于肩宽。胸部向地面方向下压，手肘贴近身体两侧。当胸部接近地面时，迅速将膝盖降至地面。通过手臂伸展将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩宽。
将胸部向地面方向降低，手肘贴近身体两侧。
当胸部接近地面时，迅速将膝盖放下接触地面。
通过手臂伸展将身体推回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂自然下垂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、哑铃达到肩部高度的位置。保持这个收缩姿势短暂停顿片刻，充分感受肱二头肌的收缩。然后吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，两臂交替进行。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂自然下垂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、哑铃达到肩部高度的位置。
保持这个收缩姿势短暂停顿片刻，充分感受肱二头肌的收缩。
吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，两臂交替进行。

name.en: dumbbell alternate biceps curl (with arm blaster)
name.zh: 哑铃交替肱二头肌弯举（配合手臂固定器）

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Place the arm blaster on your upper arms, ensuring a secure fit. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with the opposite arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双脚与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。将手臂固定器固定在上臂位置，确保佩戴牢固。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将一只哑铃向肩部方向弯举。继续向上举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在收缩顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换另一只手臂重复动作。双臂交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Place the arm blaster on your upper arms, ensuring a secure fit.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双脚与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
将手臂固定器固定在上臂位置，确保佩戴牢固。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将一只哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
继续向上举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在收缩顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复动作。
双臂交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 哑铃交替锤式牧师凳弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended. Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌。继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃与肩平齐。在收缩的顶点位置短暂停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照建议的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌。
继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃与肩平齐。
在收缩的顶点位置短暂停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照建议的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on the pad of the preacher bench, allowing your arms to fully extend. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand as you contract your biceps. Continue to curl the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。将上臂放在牧师椅的垫子上，使手臂充分伸展。上臂保持不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将右手的哑铃向上弯举。继续弯举直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换左臂重复动作。交替双臂进行所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Rest your upper arms on the pad of the preacher bench, allowing your arms to fully extend.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand as you contract your biceps.
Continue to curl the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement with your left arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。
将上臂放在牧师椅的垫子上，使手臂充分伸展。
上臂保持不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将右手的哑铃向上弯举。
继续弯举直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换左臂重复动作。
交替双臂进行所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 哑铃交替坐姿锤式弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended down. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with your left arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，手臂自然下垂伸直。保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧。呼气时，将右手哑铃向肩部方向弯举，保持上臂不动。继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。稍作停顿后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。左手重复相同的动作。两侧手臂交替进行，完成所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended down.
Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement with your left arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，手臂自然下垂伸直。
保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧。
呼气时，将右手哑铃向肩部方向弯举，保持上臂固定不动。
继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
稍作停顿后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
左手重复相同的动作。
两侧手臂交替进行，完成所需重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height. Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height. Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃置于肩部高度。将一只哑铃向上推举过头顶，同时保持另一只哑铃在肩部高度。将推举的哑铃降回肩部高度，同时将另一只哑铃向上推举过头顶。按照所需的重复次数交替进行两侧动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height.
Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃置于肩部高度。
将一只哑铃向上推举过头顶，同时保持另一只哑铃在肩部高度。
将推举的哑铃降回肩部高度，同时将另一只哑铃向上推举过头顶。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行两侧动作。

name.en: dumbbell alternating bicep curl with leg raised on exercise ball
name.zh: 健身球上单腿支撑哑铃交替肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Place an exercise ball behind you and position one foot on top of it, keeping your balance. With your arms fully extended and elbows close to your sides, curl one dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将健身球放在身后，一只脚踩在球上保持平衡。手臂完全伸展，肘部靠近身体两侧，将一个哑铃向肩部弯举，同时保持上臂不动。将哑铃放回起始位置，换另一只手臂重复。继续交替双臂进行所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Place an exercise ball behind you and position one foot on top of it, keeping your balance.
With your arms fully extended and elbows close to your sides, curl one dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前。
将健身球放在身后，一只脚踩在球上保持平衡。
手臂完全伸展，肘部靠近身体两侧，将一个哑铃向肩部弯举，同时保持上臂不动。
将哑铃放回起始位置，换另一只手臂重复。
继续交替双臂进行所需的重复次数。

name.en: dumbbell alternating seated bicep curl on exercise ball
name.zh: 健身球坐姿哑铃交替弯举

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the curl with the other arm. Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。上臂保持固定不动，呼气时将一只哑铃弯举，同时前臂外旋直至掌心朝向肩部。吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换另一只手臂重复弯举动作。按照所需的重复次数交替进行弯举练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。
上臂保持固定不动，呼气时将一只哑铃弯举，同时前臂外旋直至掌心朝向肩部。
吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复弯举动作。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行弯举练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward. Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在有靠背的凳子上，双手各握一只哑铃置于肩部高度，手掌朝向身体，肘部弯曲。将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直，手掌朝前。在上推过程中旋转手腕，使手掌在动作顶端朝向前方。在顶端短暂停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在有靠背的凳子上，双手各握一只哑铃置于肩部高度，手掌朝向身体，肘部弯曲。
将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直，手掌朝前。
在上推过程中旋转手腕，使手掌在动作顶端朝向前方。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward. Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在有靠背的凳子上，双手各握一只哑铃，置于肩部高度，手掌朝向身体，肘部弯曲。然后将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直，手掌朝前。在上推的过程中旋转手腕，使手掌在动作顶端朝向前方。在顶端稍作停顿后，缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在有靠背的凳子上，双手各握一只哑铃置于肩部高度，手掌朝向身体，肘部弯曲。
将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直，手掌朝向前方。
在上推的过程中旋转手腕，使手掌在动作顶端朝向前方。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳的一端，双脚稳稳地踩在地面上。双手握住一个哑铃，将双臂伸直举至胸部正上方。保持手臂伸直，沿弧线轨迹将哑铃缓慢下放至头后。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳的一端，双脚稳稳地踩在地面上。
双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直举至胸部正上方。
保持手臂伸直，沿弧线轨迹将哑铃缓慢下放至头后。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴长凳。每只手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前，双臂伸直于胸部上方。将哑铃缓慢下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部90度角。停顿片刻，然后将哑铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸直。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest.
Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴长凳。
每只手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前，双臂伸直于胸部上方。
将哑铃缓慢下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部90度角。
停顿片刻，然后将哑铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸直。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，放在大腿上。身体微微后仰，将哑铃置于胸部两侧，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸展。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，放在大腿上。
身体微微后仰，将哑铃置于胸部两侧，手掌朝前。
将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸展。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Place a dumbbell on the ground in front of a bench. Stand facing away from the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend at the knees and hips to lower yourself down towards the bench, keeping your chest up and back straight. Once your glutes touch the bench, push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将一个哑铃放在凳子前方的地面上。背对凳子站立，双脚与肩同宽。屈膝屈髋向下靠近凳子，同时保持胸部挺起和背部平直。当臀部接触到凳子后，通过脚跟发力站起身，回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Place a dumbbell on the ground in front of a bench.
Stand facing away from the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend at the knees and hips to lower yourself down towards the bench, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Once your glutes touch the bench, push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将哑铃放在凳子前方的地面上。
背对凳子站立，双脚与肩同宽。
屈膝屈髋向下靠近凳子，同时保持胸部挺起和背部平直。
当臀部接触到凳子后，通过脚跟发力站起身，回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。臀部向前屈，上半身俯身，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。双臂自然垂向地面，肘部略微弯曲。将哑铃向上拉向胸部位置，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent.
Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
臀部向前屈，上半身俯身，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
双臂自然垂向地面，肘部略微弯曲。
将哑铃向上拉向胸部位置，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell bicep curl lunge with bowling motion
name.zh: 哑铃保龄球式弓步肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward. Take a step forward with your right foot, bending your right knee and lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge forward, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body. At the bottom of the lunge, rotate your torso to the right, as if you were bowling a ball. Reverse the motion, stepping back with your right foot and returning to the starting position while lowering the dumbbells back down. Repeat the lunge and curl motion, this time rotating your torso to the left. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向前方。右脚向前迈出一步，右膝弯曲，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。在向前弓步的同时，将哑铃弯举至肩部位置，保持肘部贴近身体。在弓步底部，将躯干向右侧旋转，就像在投掷保龄球一样。然后反向动作，右脚向后撤步回到起始位置，同时将哑铃放下还原。重复弓步和弯举动作，这次将躯干向左侧旋转。继续左右交替进行，直至完成目标次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Take a step forward with your right foot, bending your right knee and lowering your body into a lunge position.
As you lunge forward, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
At the bottom of the lunge, rotate your torso to the right, as if you were bowling a ball.
Reverse the motion, stepping back with your right foot and returning to the starting position while lowering the dumbbells back down.
Repeat the lunge and curl motion, this time rotating your torso to the left.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向前方。
右脚向前迈出一步，右膝弯曲，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。
在向前弓步的同时，将哑铃弯举至肩部位置，保持肘部贴近身体。
在弓步底部，将躯干向右侧旋转，就像在投掷保龄球一样。
然后反向动作，右脚向后撤步回到起始位置，同时将哑铃放下还原。
重复弓步和弯举动作，这次将躯干向左侧旋转。
继续左右交替进行，直至完成目标次数。

name.en: dumbbell bicep curl on exercise ball with leg raised
name.zh: 哑铃健身球肱二头肌弯举抬腿

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended. Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. While performing the bicep curl, raise one leg off the ground and hold it in the air for the duration of the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸展。缓慢将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，保持肘部贴近身体。动作到达顶端时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。在进行肱二头肌弯举的同时，将一条腿抬离地面，并在整个练习过程中保持腿部抬起。重复所需的次数后，换另一条腿继续练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
While performing the bicep curl, raise one leg off the ground and hold it in the air for the duration of the exercise.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸展。
缓慢将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，保持肘部贴近身体。
动作到达顶端时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
在进行肱二头肌弯举的同时，将一条腿抬离地面，并在整个练习过程中保持腿部抬起。
重复所需的次数后，换另一条腿继续练习。

name.en: dumbbell bicep curl with stork stance
name.zh: 哑铃单腿站立肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。将一条腿向后伸展，用该脚的脚尖保持平衡。上臂保持静止，呼气的同时弯举哑铃，收缩肱二头肌。继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平。保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，收紧肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按所需重复次数重复动作，然后换腿重复。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
将一条腿向后伸展，用该脚的脚尖保持平衡。
上臂保持静止，呼气的同时弯举哑铃，收缩肱二头肌。
继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平。
保持收缩姿势短暂停顿，收紧肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数重复动作，然后换腿重复。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸展。上臂保持固定，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续提升哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在肱二头肌充分挤压的状态下保持短暂停顿。吸气，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸展。
上臂保持固定，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续提升哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在肱二头肌充分挤压的状态下保持短暂停顿。
吸气，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃肱二头肌弯举（配臂托）

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前。保持肘部贴近躯干，上臂不动。呼气的同时向上弯举哑铃，收缩肱二头肌。继续将哑铃举起，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。保持顶峰收缩位置并挤压肱二头肌片刻。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前。
保持肘部贴近躯干，上臂固定不动。
呼气的同时向上弯举哑铃，收缩肱二头肌。
继续将哑铃举起，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
保持顶峰收缩位置，挤压肱二头肌片刻。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌向下，手臂自然下垂并充分伸展。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、哑铃与肩部齐平的位置。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌向下，手臂自然下垂并充分伸展。
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、哑铃与肩部齐平的位置。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward. Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前。保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧，呼气时将哑铃向上弯举至肩部。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气时慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧，呼气时将哑铃向上弯举至肩部。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气时慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell biceps curl v sit on bosu ball
name.zh: 哑铃二头肌弯举（坐姿波速球）

instructions.en: Sit on a bosu ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended down by your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在波速球上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前，双臂向下充分伸展置于身体两侧。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在肱二头肌充分收缩的位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肌肉。然后吸气，缓慢地将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bosu ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended down by your sides.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在波速球上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前，双臂向下充分伸展置于身体两侧。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在肱二头肌充分收缩的位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肌肉。
吸气，缓慢地将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart and a dumbbell in each hand. Lower your body into a squat position, placing the dumbbells on the ground in front of you. Kick your feet back into a push-up position, keeping your body in a straight line. Perform a push-up, bending your elbows and lowering your chest towards the ground. Jump your feet back towards your hands, landing in a squat position. Stand up explosively, lifting the dumbbells off the ground and bringing them to your shoulders. Press the dumbbells overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the dumbbells back to your shoulders and repeat the entire sequence for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为站立位，双脚与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃。将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势，同时将哑铃放在身体前方的地面上。双脚向后跳至俯卧撑姿势，保持身体呈一条直线。完成一个俯卧撑，屈肘将胸部靠近地面。双脚向前跳回至双手位置，落地时呈深蹲姿势。爆发性地站立起身，将哑铃从地面提拉至肩部位置。将哑铃向上推举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。将哑铃落回肩部，按照所需的重复次数重复整套动作。

en: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart and a dumbbell in each hand.
Lower your body into a squat position, placing the dumbbells on the ground in front of you.
Kick your feet back into a push-up position, keeping your body in a straight line.
Perform a push-up, bending your elbows and lowering your chest towards the ground.
Jump your feet back towards your hands, landing in a squat position.
Stand up explosively, lifting the dumbbells off the ground and bringing them to your shoulders.
Press the dumbbells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Lower the dumbbells back to your shoulders and repeat the entire sequence for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为站立位，双脚与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃。
将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势，同时将哑铃放在身体前方的地面上。
双脚向后跳至俯卧撑姿势，保持身体呈一条直线。
完成一个俯卧撑，屈肘将胸部靠近地面。
双脚向前跳回至双手位置，落地时呈深蹲姿势。
爆发性地站立起身，将哑铃从地面提拉至肩部位置。
将哑铃向上推举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。
将哑铃落回肩部，按照所需的重复次数重复整套动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground. As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body. Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up. Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握。弯曲膝盖并将臀部下降至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部上抬。爆发性地伸展髋部和膝盖，通过脚后跟发力跳离地面。跳跃时耸肩，将哑铃向上拉向肩膀位置，保持贴近身体。在肩部高度接住哑铃，手肘指向前方，掌心向上。通过反转动作将哑铃降至起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground.
As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body.
Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up.
Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握。
弯曲膝盖并将臀部下降至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部上抬。
爆发性地伸展髋部和膝盖，通过脚后跟发力跳离地面。
跳跃时耸肩，将哑铃向上拉向肩膀位置，保持贴近身体。
在肩部高度接住哑铃，手肘指向前方，掌心向上。
通过反转动作将哑铃降至起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width. Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position. As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest. As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells. After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平板凳上，双手各持一个哑铃放在大腿上。利用大腿的力量，依次将哑铃举起，使其位于肩部宽度的位置。到达起始位置后，将手腕向前旋转，使掌心朝外。这将是你的起始姿势。吸气时，缓慢将哑铃下放至身体两侧，大约与胸部平齐。呼气时，利用肱三头肌将哑铃向上推回起始位置。注意只能使用肱三头肌发力，不要借助前臂或肱二头肌辅助。在动作顶端收缩位置停顿约一秒钟后，按照规定的次数重复此动作。

en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells.
After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平板凳上，双手各持一个哑铃置于大腿上。
利用大腿的力量，依次将哑铃举起至肩部宽度位置。
到达起始位置后，将手腕向前旋转使掌心朝外。
吸气时，缓慢将哑铃下放至身体两侧，约与胸部平齐。
呼气时，利用肱三头肌将哑铃推回起始位置，注意只能使用肱三头肌发力，避免前臂或肱二头肌辅助。
在动作顶端收缩位置停顿约一秒钟后，按照规定的次数重复此动作。

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width. Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position. As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest. As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，放在大腿上。借助大腿的力量，依次将哑铃举起至胸前，握距与肩同宽。到达起始位置后，向前转动手腕，使掌心朝外，这就是动作的起始姿势。吸气时，慢慢将哑铃下放至身体两侧，大约与胸部齐平。呼气时，用肱三头肌发力将哑铃推回起始位置。重复上述动作至所需的次数。

en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，放在大腿上。
借助大腿的力量，依次将哑铃举起至胸前，握距与肩同宽。
到达起始位置后，向前转动手腕，使掌心朝外，这就是动作的起始姿势。
吸气时，慢慢将哑铃下放至身体两侧，大约与胸部齐平。
呼气时，用肱三头肌发力将哑铃推回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh. Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双腿分开，单手握哑铃，将肘部支撑在大腿内侧。手臂完全伸直，采用反握方式握住哑铃。保持上臂固定，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向肩部弯举。持续提升哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃达到肩部水平。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气后，缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh.
Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双腿分开，单手握哑铃，将肘部支撑在大腿内侧。
手臂完全伸直，采用反握方式握住哑铃。
保持上臂固定，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向肩部弯举。
持续提升哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃达到肩部水平。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气后，缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃。右脚向前迈出一步，保持背部挺直、核心收紧。通过弯曲双膝降低身体高度，直至右大腿与地面平行。然后通过右脚后跟发力蹬地，回到起始位置。换左腿重复动作。双腿交替进行所需次数的重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with your left leg.
Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃。
右脚向前迈出一步，保持背部挺直、核心收紧。
弯曲双膝降低身体高度，直至右大腿与地面平行。
通过右脚后跟发力蹬地，回到起始位置。
换左腿重复动作。
双腿交替进行所需次数的重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 直立站姿，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝内。保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌将哑铃弯举，将哑铃从身体一侧向对侧肩膀方向移动。持续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩膀高度。在动作顶端保持收缩位置片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 直立站姿，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌弯举哑铃，将哑铃从身体一侧向对侧肩膀方向移动。
持续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩膀高度。
在动作顶端保持收缩位置片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell cross body hammer curl v. 2
name.zh: 哑铃交叉锤式弯举 v.2

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells as close to your opposite shoulder as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 直立站好，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持大臂贴近躯干且固定不动。呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃弯举至对侧肩膀的位置。在顶峰位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells as close to your opposite shoulder as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 直立站好，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持大臂贴近躯干且固定不动。
呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃弯举至对侧肩膀的位置。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down. Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended. Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心向下。保持核心收紧，肘部微屈，将哑铃向上推举过头顶，直至手臂完全伸直。接着旋转手腕，使掌心朝前。然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将手腕转回原来的掌心向下姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心向下。
保持核心收紧，肘部微屈，将哑铃向上推举过头顶，直至手臂完全伸直。
旋转手腕，使掌心朝前。
缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将手腕转回原来的掌心向下姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended. Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心向下。保持核心收紧、背部挺直，将哑铃垂直向上推举直至手臂完全伸直。然后旋转手腕，使掌心向前。将哑铃下放至肩部高度，同时将手腕转回初始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心向下。
保持核心收紧、背部挺直，将哑铃垂直向上推举直至手臂完全伸直。
旋转手腕，使掌心向前。
将哑铃下放至肩部高度，同时将手腕转回初始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards. Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight. Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂自然下垂。屈髋屈膝，将哑铃下放至地面，同时保持背部挺直。通过脚后跟发力，伸展髋关节和膝关节，将哑铃提回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards.
Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂自然下垂。
屈髋屈膝，将哑铃下放至地面，同时保持背部挺直。
通过脚后跟发力，伸展髋关节和膝关节，将哑铃提回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward. Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定支撑，确保头部低于髋部。双手各握一个哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举至胸部正上方，掌心朝前。控制速度缓慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，同时保持肘部呈90度角。然后将哑铃向上推回起始位置，手臂充分伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward.
Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定支撑，确保头部低于髋部。
双手各握一个哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举至胸部正上方，掌心朝前。
控制速度缓慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，同时保持肘部呈90度角。
将哑铃向上推回起始位置，手臂充分伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 躺在下斜凳上，双脚固定，头部低于臀部。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对，手臂伸展于胸部上方。将哑铃向两侧以宽弧形放下，直到感到胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃带回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 躺在下斜凳上，双脚固定，头部低于臀部。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对，手臂伸展于胸部上方。
将哑铃向两侧以宽弧形放下，直到感到胸部有拉伸感。
稍作停顿，然后收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃带回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定，头部低于臀部。双手各持一只哑铃，手掌相对，手臂伸直举于胸部上方。将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部略微弯曲。然后将哑铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，双脚固定，头部低于臀部。
双手各持一只哑铃，手掌相对，手臂伸直举于胸部上方。
将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部略微弯曲。
将哑铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso. Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward. As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest. Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 躺在下斜凳上，一只手握住哑铃，放在大腿上。用大腿帮助抬起哑铃，将其举到与肩同宽的位置，手掌朝向身体。转动手腕，使手掌朝前。吸气时，慢慢将哑铃向侧面放下，直到感到胸部有拉伸感。呼气，用胸部肌肉将哑铃带回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数，然后换臂。

en: Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso.
Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward.
As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 躺在下斜凳上，一只手握住哑铃，放在大腿上。
用大腿帮助抬起哑铃，将其举到与肩同宽的位置，手掌朝向身体。
转动手腕，使手掌朝前。
吸气时，慢慢将哑铃向侧面放下，直到感到胸部有拉伸感。
呼气，用胸部肌肉将哑铃带回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数，然后换臂。

name.en: dumbbell decline one arm hammer press
name.zh: 哑铃下斜单臂锤式推举

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest. Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body. Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，单手握住哑铃置于胸部。手臂向上伸直，肘部保持微屈状态。将哑铃向肩部方向缓慢下放，同时保持肘部贴近身体。然后将哑铃向上推举回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，单手握住哑铃放在胸部位置。
手臂向上伸直，肘部保持微屈状态。
将哑铃向肩部方向缓慢下放，保持肘部贴近身体。
将哑铃向上推举回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂练习。

instructions.en: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor. Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将下斜凳设置成45度角。俯卧在凳子上，胸部和腹部贴住凳面。双手各握一只哑铃，双臂完全伸直朝向地面。保持手臂伸直，将肩膀尽可能高地向上耸起至耳朵方向。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor.
Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将下斜凳设置成45度角。
俯卧在凳子上，胸部和腹部贴住凳面。
双手各握一只哑铃，双臂完全伸直朝向地面。
保持手臂伸直，将肩膀尽可能高地向上耸起至耳朵方向。
保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复进行。

name.zh: 哑铃下斜耸肩 变体2

instructions.en: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting on it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms fully extended. Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders as high as possible while squeezing your shoulder blades together. Hold the contraction for a brief pause, then lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将下斜凳设置成45度角。俯卧在凳子上，胸部和腹部贴住凳面。每只手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对，手臂完全伸直。保持手臂伸直，尽可能高地抬起肩膀，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。保持收缩状态短暂停顿，然后将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting on it.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders as high as possible while squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Hold the contraction for a brief pause, then lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将下斜凳设置成45度角。
俯卧在凳子上，胸部和腹部贴住凳面。
每只手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对，手臂完全伸直。
保持手臂伸直，尽可能高地抬起肩膀，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
保持收缩状态短暂停顿，然后将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head. Lower the dumbbells slowly behind your head, bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，头部低于脚部，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。手臂完全伸直，手肘贴近头部。将哑铃缓慢下放至头后，弯曲手肘。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。按所需次数重复。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Lower the dumbbells slowly behind your head, bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，头部低于脚部，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。
手臂完全伸直，手肘贴近头部。
将哑铃缓慢下放至头后，弯曲手肘。
稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
按所需次数重复。

instructions.en: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight up over your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement. Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，头部低于臀部位置。双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对，双臂向上伸展举至胸部正上方。将哑铃向身体两侧以宽弧线轨迹放下，直至感受到胸部的拉伸感。在哑铃下放的同时转动手腕，使掌心在动作底部朝向前方。然后反向运动，将哑铃向上收回至起始位置，在动作顶端充分挤压胸肌。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement.
Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles at the top.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，头部低于臀部位置。
双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对，双臂向上伸展举至胸部正上方。
将哑铃向身体两侧以宽弧线轨迹放下，直至感受到胸部的拉伸感。
在哑铃下放的同时转动手腕，使掌心在动作底部朝向前方。
然后反向运动，将哑铃向上收回至起始位置，在动作顶端充分挤压胸肌。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh, palm facing up. Allow the dumbbell to roll down to your fingertips, then curl it back up by flexing your fingers. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放地面，背部挺直。单手握住哑铃，采用反握姿势，将前臂放在大腿上，掌心向上。让哑铃从手中滚到指尖位置，然后通过屈曲手指将其弯举回原位。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一只手进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh, palm facing up.
Allow the dumbbell to roll down to your fingertips, then curl it back up by flexing your fingers.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放地面，背部挺直。
单手握住哑铃，采用反握姿势，将前臂放在大腿上，掌心向上。
让哑铃从手中滚到指尖位置，然后通过屈曲手指将其弯举回原位。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一只手进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。将双臂向上伸展至胸部正上方，手肘保持微曲。保持手肘微曲的状态下，将手臂向身体两侧以宽弧形缓缓放下，直至感受到胸肌被充分拉伸。停顿片刻，然后沿原路径将哑铃向上举起，回归起始姿势。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。
将双臂向上伸展至胸部正上方，手肘保持微曲。
保持手肘微曲的状态下，将手臂向身体两侧以宽弧形缓缓放下，直至感受到胸肌被充分拉伸。
停顿片刻，然后沿原路径将哑铃向上举起，回归起始姿势。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported by the ball. Extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other. Bend your elbows slightly and lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and squeeze your chest muscles as you bring the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各持一个哑铃。双脚向前迈步，身体向后滚动下移，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。将双臂向上伸直举过头顶，手掌相对。肘部微微弯曲，双臂向身体两侧展开，形成宽阔的弧形下放动作，直到感觉胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后反向运动，在将哑铃举回起始位置的同时用力收缩胸肌。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported by the ball.
Extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other.
Bend your elbows slightly and lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and squeeze your chest muscles as you bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各握一个哑铃。
双脚向前移动，身体向后滚动下移，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。
将双臂向上伸直举过头顶，手掌相对。
肘部微微弯曲，双臂向身体两侧展开，形成宽阔的弧形下放动作，直到感觉胸部有拉伸感。
稍作停顿，然后反向运动，在将哑铃举回起始位置的同时用力收缩胸肌。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃向前弓步肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Keep your back straight and your chest up. Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears. Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。双臂向上伸直，手肘靠近耳朵。弯曲手肘，将哑铃放至头后。稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。按所需次数重复动作，然后换腿重复。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Keep your back straight and your chest up.
Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms to return to the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。
右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。
保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。
双臂向上伸直，手肘靠近耳朵。
弯曲手肘，将哑铃放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。
按所需次数重复动作，然后换腿重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs. Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。保持手臂伸直，呼气的同时将哑铃向前举起至肩部高度。在最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。
保持手臂伸直，呼气的同时将哑铃向前举起至肩部高度。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。保持背部挺直，收紧核心。慢慢将哑铃向前举起，手臂保持伸直，直至与肩部平齐。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据需要重复相应次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心。
慢慢将哑铃向前举起，手臂保持伸直，直至与肩部平齐。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据需要重复相应次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。将双臂向身体两侧举起，保持肘部略微弯曲，直至手臂与地面平行。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将双臂向身体两侧举起，保持肘部略微弯曲，直至手臂与地面平行。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell vertically against your chest with both hands. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住一个哑铃垂直置于胸前。保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过将臀部向后推并弯曲膝盖来降低身体进入深蹲姿势。继续下蹲直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能舒适地下蹲到底部。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell vertically against your chest with both hands.
Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住一个哑铃垂直置于胸前。
保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过将臀部向后推并弯曲膝盖来降低身体进入深蹲姿势。
继续下蹲直到大腿与地面平行，或尽可能舒适地下蹲到底部。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持肘部贴近身体两侧，转动手掌使其朝向前方，这便是起始姿势。动作过程中保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯举哑铃并收缩肱二头肌。继续将哑铃举高，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩部齐平。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。随后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照建议的重复次数完成动作。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
This will be your starting position.
Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持肘部贴近身体两侧，转动手掌使其朝向前方。
这便是起始姿势。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯举哑铃，收缩肱二头肌。
继续将哑铃举高，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩部齐平。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
随后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照建议的重复次数完成动作。

name.en: dumbbell hammer curl on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝内，手臂完全伸直。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续提升哑铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在收缩顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝内，手臂完全伸直。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续提升哑铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在收缩顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持肘部贴近身体两侧，同时旋转手腕使掌心朝前，这便是起始姿势。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯举哑铃并收缩肱二头肌。继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、哑铃与肩部齐平的位置。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。按照建议的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
This will be your starting position.
Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持肘部贴近身体两侧，同时旋转手腕使掌心朝前。
这就是动作的起始姿势。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时向上弯举哑铃并收缩肱二头肌。
继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、哑铃与肩部齐平的位置。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
然后吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照建议的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃锤式弯举（使用臂托器）

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, while holding your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持大臂贴近躯干，将手掌向外旋转至朝向前方。这将是你的起始姿势。现在，保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时弯举哑铃并收缩肱二头肌。继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩部齐平。在顶峰位置短暂停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。然后，吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照推荐次数重复练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
This will be your starting position.
Now, while holding your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持大臂贴近躯干，将手掌向外旋转至朝向前方。
这将是你的起始姿势。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时弯举哑铃并收缩肱二头肌。
继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩部齐平。
在顶峰位置短暂停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
然后，吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照推荐次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps.
