Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，直立站姿，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前。保持上臂固定，将哑铃弯举至最高点，同时用力收缩肱二头肌。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢下放哑铃至起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，直立站姿，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
保持上臂固定，将哑铃弯举至最高点，同时用力收缩肱二头肌。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢下放哑铃至起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lean back on the bench and use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Once at shoulder height, rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward. Push the dumbbells up with your chest and shoulders, extending your arms fully. Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃置于大腿上。身体向后靠在凳子上，利用大腿的力量帮助将哑铃举至肩部高度，手掌朝前。到达肩部高度后，转动手腕使掌心朝前。用胸部和肩部的力量向上推举哑铃，完全伸展手臂。将哑铃缓慢降回起始位置，保持肘部略微弯曲。按所需重复次数交替双臂进行。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Lean back on the bench and use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Once at shoulder height, rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward.
Push the dumbbells up with your chest and shoulders, extending your arms fully.
Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.
zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃置于大腿上。
身体向后靠在凳子上，利用大腿的力量帮助将哑铃举至肩部高度，手掌朝前。
到达肩部高度后，转动手腕使掌心朝前。
用胸部和肩部的力量向上推举哑铃，完全伸展手臂。
将哑铃缓慢降回起始位置，保持肘部略微弯曲。
按所需重复次数交替双臂进行。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height. Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将上斜凳调至45度角。坐在凳子上，双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前，将哑铃举至肩部高度。慢慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部弯曲90度。然后将哑铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height.
Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将上斜凳调至45度角。
坐在凳子上，双脚平放于地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前，将哑铃举至肩部高度。
慢慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部弯曲90度。
将哑铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在倾斜的凳子上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。保持上臂不动，呼气时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上举起。继续提升哑铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平位置。在肱二头肌收缩状态下保持短暂停顿。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在倾斜的凳子上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。
保持上臂不动，呼气时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上举起。
继续提升哑铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平位置。
在肱二头肌收缩状态下保持短暂停顿。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing forward. Start with your arms fully extended, perpendicular to the ground. Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜凳调整至45度角。坐在凳上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放于地面。双手各持一个哑铃，采用正握姿势，手掌朝前。起始姿势为双臂完全伸展，与地面垂直。将哑铃缓慢下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部90度弯曲。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃向上推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Start with your arms fully extended, perpendicular to the ground.
Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜凳调整至45度角
坐在凳上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放于地面
双手各持一个哑铃，采用正握姿势，手掌朝前
双臂完全伸展，与地面垂直
将哑铃缓慢下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部90度弯曲
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃向上推回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Rest your upper arms on the incline bench and let your elbows hang down, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，坐在凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。将上臂靠在倾斜凳上，让肘部自然下垂，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时向上弯举哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平位置。在顶峰位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Rest your upper arms on the incline bench and let your elbows hang down, fully extending your arms.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，坐在凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
将上臂靠在倾斜凳上，让肘部自然下垂，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时向上弯举哑铃，同时收缩肱二头肌。
继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平位置。
在顶峰位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在倾斜的健身凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂自然下垂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。保持收缩姿势稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在倾斜的健身凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂自然下垂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
保持收缩姿势稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板调至45度角。坐在凳子上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。向后躺在凳子上，将哑铃向上推至起始位置，位于胸部正上方。将哑铃向身体两侧以大弧度放下，直到感到胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后收紧胸部肌肉将哑铃抬起回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest.
Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板调至45度角。
坐在凳子上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。
向后躺在凳子上，将哑铃向上推至起始位置，位于胸部正上方。
将哑铃向身体两侧以大弧度放下，直到感到胸部有拉伸感。
稍作停顿，然后收紧胸部肌肉将哑铃抬起回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: dumbbell incline fly on exercise ball

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the incline bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板设置在45度角。坐在健身球上，身体向前滚动，直到上背部靠在斜板上。每只手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对，双臂在胸部上方伸直。将哑铃向两侧以大弧度放下，直到感觉胸部有拉伸感。稍作停顿，然后收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the incline bench.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板设置在45度角。
坐在健身球上，身体向前滚动，直到上背部靠在斜板上。
每只手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对，双臂在胸部上方伸直。
将哑铃向两侧以大弧度放下，直到感觉胸部有拉伸感。
稍作停顿，然后收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended. Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor. While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，手臂完全伸直。保持背部紧贴凳面，双脚平放在地面上。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在收缩的最高点稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor.
While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，手臂完全伸直。
保持背部紧贴凳面，双脚平放在地面上。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在收缩的最高点稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbells at shoulder level with your palms facing each other. Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜凳调至45度角，坐在凳上，双手各持一个哑铃放在大腿上。仰躺在凳子上，将哑铃置于肩部高度，双手掌心相对。向上推举哑铃，使其远离身体，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbells at shoulder level with your palms facing each other.
Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜凳调至45度角，坐在凳上，双手各持一个哑铃放在大腿上。
仰躺在凳子上，将哑铃置于肩部高度，双手掌心相对。
向上推举哑铃，使其远离身体，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell incline hammer press on exercise ball
name.zh: 哑铃健身球上斜锤式推举

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides. Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other. Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。双脚向前走动，身体沿球面向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部都支撑在健身球上。将哑铃保持在肩部高度，肘部弯曲并向身体两侧展开。向上推举哑铃，同时略微向内收拢，全程保持掌心相对。手臂完全伸展，在动作顶端充分挤压肱三头肌。然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other.
Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。
双脚向前走动，身体沿球面向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部都支撑在健身球上。
将哑铃保持在肩部高度，肘部弯曲并向身体两侧展开。
向上推举哑铃，同时略微向内收拢，全程保持掌心相对。
手臂完全伸展，在动作顶端充分挤压肱三头肌。
缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。将上臂放置在凳面上，让手肘自然下垂，掌心朝前。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在最高点保持短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢地将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。
将上臂放在凳面上，让手肘自然下垂，掌心朝前。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在最高点保持短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢地将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle. Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground. Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest. Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳调整至30-45度角。坐在凳子上，单手持哑铃放在大腿上。仰卧在凳上，双脚平放地面。将哑铃举起，手臂伸直垂直于胸部上方。手臂向侧面以大弧度缓慢下放，保持肘部略微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时稍作停顿，然后反向运动将哑铃回到起始位置。完成目标次数后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle.
Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest.
Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 将倾斜凳调整至30-45度角
坐在凳子上，单手持哑铃放在大腿上
仰卧在凳子上，双脚平放在地面
将哑铃举起，手臂伸直垂直于胸部上方
手臂向侧面以大弧度缓慢下放，保持肘部略微弯曲
当手臂与地面平行时稍作停顿，然后反向运动将哑铃回到起始位置
完成目标次数后换另一侧手臂进行

name.en: dumbbell incline one arm fly on exercise ball
name.zh: 哑铃上斜单臂飞鸟（健身球支撑）

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest, palm facing inwards. Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground. Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，单手握住一个哑铃。将双脚向前迈出，身体向后滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。将哑铃举起，手臂伸直垂直于胸部上方，手掌朝向身体内侧。慢慢将哑铃向身体侧方放下，同时保持肘部略微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时稍作停顿。收缩胸部肌肉，将哑铃举回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand.
Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest, palm facing inwards.
Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，单手握住一个哑铃。
将双脚向前迈出，身体向后滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。
将哑铃举起，手臂伸直垂直于胸部上方，手掌朝向身体内侧。
慢慢将哑铃向身体侧方放下，同时保持肘部略微弯曲。
当手臂与地面平行时稍作停顿。
收缩胸部肌肉，将哑铃举回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell incline one arm hammer press
name.zh: 哑铃斜板单臂锤式推举

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh. Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height. Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body. Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在倾斜的长椅上，一只手里握着哑铃，放在大腿上。向后靠在长椅上，用大腿帮助将哑铃举到肩部高度。旋转手腕，使掌心朝向身体内侧。向上并远离身体推起哑铃，手臂完全伸展。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作，然后换另一只手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height.
Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body.
Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在倾斜的长椅上，一只手里握着哑铃，放在大腿上
向后靠在长椅上，用大腿帮助将哑铃举到肩部高度
旋转手腕，使掌心朝向身体内侧
向上并远离身体推起哑铃，手臂完全伸展
在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数完成动作，然后换另一只手臂进行练习

name.en: dumbbell incline one arm hammer press on exercise ball
name.zh: 斜卧单臂哑铃锤式推举（健身球）

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing inward and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Press the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, straightening your arm. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双手握住一个哑铃。双脚向前迈步，身体向后滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。掌心朝内握住哑铃，手肘弯曲成90度。将哑铃向上推举至手臂伸直，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand.
Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing inward and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Press the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, straightening your arm.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，单手握住哑铃。
双脚向前迈步，身体向后滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。
掌心朝内握住哑铃，手肘弯曲成90度。
将哑铃向上推举至手臂伸直。
慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell incline one arm lateral raise

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh. Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down. Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在倾斜的凳子上，单手握住哑铃并放在大腿上。身体前倾，将上臂靠在大腿内侧。将哑铃向侧面举起，手臂保持微屈，掌心向下。继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh.
Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down.
Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在倾斜的凳子上，单手握住哑铃并放在大腿上。
身体前倾，将上臂靠在大腿内侧。
将哑铃向侧面举起，手臂保持微屈，掌心向下。
继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh. Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在斜凳上，单手握住哑铃放在大腿上。仰卧躺下后将哑铃置于肩部高度，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上并略微向内推举，充分伸展手臂。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习后，换另一侧手臂继续。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在斜凳上，单手握住哑铃放在大腿上。
仰卧躺下后将哑铃置于肩部高度，手掌朝前。
将哑铃向上并略微向内推举，充分伸展手臂。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习后，换另一侧手臂继续。

name.en: dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball
name.zh: 哑铃单臂斜身健身球推举

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，一只手握哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。慢慢向前走，脚推动健身球滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。将哑铃保持在肩部高度，掌心朝前。将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶部停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降低回到起始位置。重复所需的重复次数，然后换另一只手进行。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在健身球上，一只手握哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。
慢慢向前走，脚推动健身球滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。
将哑铃保持在肩部高度，掌心朝前。
将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶部停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降低回到起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数，然后换另一只手进行。

name.zh: 哑铃上斜掌心相对推举

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench. Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other. Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将上斜凳调至45度角。坐在凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。双脚稳踩地面，背部挺直紧贴凳面。起始时将哑铃置于肩部水平位置，肘部弯曲，掌心相对。将哑铃向上推离身体，直至手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench.
Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other.
Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将上斜凳调至45度角。
坐在凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。
双脚稳踩地面，背部挺直紧贴凳面。
起始时将哑铃置于肩部水平位置，肘部弯曲，掌心相对。
将哑铃向上推离身体，直至手臂完全伸展。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell incline press on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides. Press the dumbbells upward, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。双脚慢慢向前走动，身体沿着健身球向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。将哑铃保持在肩部高度，肘部弯曲并向两侧展开。将哑铃向上推起，完全伸直手臂。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复动作。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Press the dumbbells upward, extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
双脚慢慢向前走动，身体沿着健身球向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。
将哑铃保持在肩部高度，肘部弯曲并向两侧展开。
将哑铃向上推起，完全伸直手臂。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复动作。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Lean back on the bench and raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Keeping your back against the bench, exhale and raise the dumbbells above your head, fully extending your arms. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在倾斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，自然放置于大腿上。身体向后靠在凳面上，将哑铃举至与肩同高的位置，手掌朝前。保持背部贴紧凳面，呼气的同时将哑铃向上举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回至肩部高度。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Lean back on the bench and raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Keeping your back against the bench, exhale and raise the dumbbells above your head, fully extending your arms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在倾斜凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，自然放置于大腿上。
身体向后靠在凳面上，将哑铃举至与肩同高的位置，手掌朝前。
保持背部贴紧凳面，呼气的同时将哑铃向上举过头顶，手臂完全伸展。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回至肩部高度。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板调节至45度角。坐在凳子上，胸部贴靠靠背，双手各握一只哑铃。手臂向下伸直，掌心相对。保持肘部略微弯曲，将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。按所需次数重复。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板调节至45度角。
坐在凳子上，胸部贴靠靠背，双手各握一只哑铃。
手臂向下伸直，掌心相对。
保持肘部略微弯曲，将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。
按所需次数重复。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline. Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳设置成45度角，双手各握一个哑铃坐在凳子上，胸部紧贴倾斜的凳面。双臂完全伸直，让哑铃从肩膀正下方垂直悬挂。将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复设定的次数。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline.
Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders.
Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳设置成45度角
双手各握一个哑铃，坐在凳子上，胸部紧贴倾斜的凳面
双臂完全伸直，让哑铃从肩膀正下方垂直悬挂
将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，同时用力挤压肩胛骨
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置
重复设定的次数

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down. Rest the dumbbells on your thighs and lean back onto the bench. Use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Exhale and slowly raise the dumbbells above your head, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，双手各握一个哑铃，坐在凳上，手掌朝下。先将哑铃置于大腿上，然后向后靠在凳子上。借助大腿的力量将哑铃抬起至肩部高度，同时转动手腕使掌心朝前。呼气时缓慢将哑铃举过头顶，手肘保持轻微弯曲。在最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回肩部高度。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Rest the dumbbells on your thighs and lean back onto the bench.
Use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Exhale and slowly raise the dumbbells above your head, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，坐在凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝下。
将哑铃放在大腿上，然后向后靠在倾斜凳上。
借助大腿力量将哑铃举至肩部高度，同时转动手腕使掌心朝前。
呼气，缓慢将哑铃举过头顶，手肘保持轻微弯曲。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回肩部高度。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand. Place your feet flat on the ground and let your arms hang straight down with your palms facing your body. Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板调整至45度角，双手各握一个哑铃坐在上面，双脚平放在地面上，双臂自然下垂，掌心朝向身体。保持手臂伸直，将肩膀尽可能高地向上耸起，顶峰收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand.
Place your feet flat on the ground and let your arms hang straight down with your palms facing your body.
Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板调整至45度角，双手各握一个哑铃坐在上面。
双脚平放在地面上，双臂自然下垂，掌心朝向身体。
保持手臂伸直，将肩膀尽可能高地向上耸起。
顶峰收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, perpendicular to the floor. Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, forming a 'T' shape with your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳设置在45度角，坐于其上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝内。身体前倾，双臂垂直向下悬挂，与地面保持垂直。保持手臂伸直，将双臂向身体两侧举起至与地面平行的位置，使身体呈现T字形。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, perpendicular to the floor.
Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, forming a 'T' shape with your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳设置为45度角，双手各持一只哑铃坐于其上，手掌朝内相对。
身体前倾，双臂垂直向下自然悬挂，与地面保持垂直状态。
保持手臂伸直，将双臂向身体两侧举起至与地面平行的位置，使身体形成T字形。
在顶端位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃斜板肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head. Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。将手臂完全伸展举过头顶，手肘靠近头部。通过弯曲手肘将哑铃降至头后，保持上臂不动。暂停片刻，然后通过伸展手臂将哑铃举回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝内。
将手臂完全伸展举过头顶，手肘靠近头部。
通过弯曲手肘将哑铃降至头后，保持上臂不动。
暂停片刻，然后通过伸展手臂将哑铃举回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest, with your arms extended. Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. As you lower the dumbbells, rotate your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement. Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles together at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，双手各握一只哑铃坐在凳上，手掌相对。仰躺在凳子上，将哑铃向上推起至起始位置，双臂伸直，哑铃位于胸部正上方。双手向外侧以大弧度下放哑铃，直至胸部有拉伸感。在下放过程中转动手腕，使掌心在动作底部朝向正前方。反向运动将哑铃回到起始位置，在顶端时用力夹紧胸肌。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest, with your arms extended.
Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
As you lower the dumbbells, rotate your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement.
Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles together at the top.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，双手各握一只哑铃坐在凳上，手掌相对。
仰躺在凳子上，双臂伸直将哑铃向上推起至起始位置，哑铃位于胸部正上方。
双手向外侧以大弧度下放哑铃，直至胸部有拉伸感。
在下放过程中转动手腕，使掌心在动作底部朝向正前方。
反向运动将哑铃回到起始位置，在顶端时用力夹紧胸肌。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Slowly lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbells close to your chest. Once you are fully lying down, extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，大腿支撑住哑铃。慢慢向后靠躺在凳子上，保持哑铃靠近胸部。躺稳后，将双臂向上伸直指向天花板，肘部保持微微弯曲。在顶端暂停片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Slowly lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbells close to your chest.
Once you are fully lying down, extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在上斜凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，大腿支撑住哑铃。
慢慢向后靠躺在凳子上，保持哑铃靠近胸部。
躺稳后，将双臂向上伸直指向天花板，肘部保持微微弯曲。
在顶端暂停片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Lean forward slightly and let your arms hang straight down, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Raise your arms out to the sides and up in a Y shape until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，双手各握一只哑铃坐在上面，掌心相对。身体微微前倾，双臂自然垂下，肘部保持微屈。将双臂向两侧举起呈Y字形，直到与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Lean forward slightly and let your arms hang straight down, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Raise your arms out to the sides and up in a Y shape until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳调至45度角，双手各握一只哑铃坐在上面，掌心相对。
身体微微前倾，双臂自然垂下，肘部保持微屈。
将双臂向两侧举起呈Y字形，直到与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃放于身体两侧。将手臂向身体两侧举起，直至与地面平行，与身体形成T字形。稍作停顿，然后将手臂缓慢放回起始位置。按所需重复次数重复。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃放于身体两侧。
将手臂向身体两侧举起，直至与地面平行，与身体形成T字形。
稍作停顿，然后将手臂缓慢放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Bring your upper arms close to your sides, with your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。将上臂贴近身体两侧，肘部弯曲成90度角。手臂向后伸直，在动作顶点用力收缩肱三头肌。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Bring your upper arms close to your sides, with your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
将上臂贴近身体两侧，肘部弯曲成90度角。
手臂向后伸直，在动作顶点用力收缩肱三头肌。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝内，手臂弯曲成90度角。将手臂向后伸直，在动作顶端用力收紧肱三头肌。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝内，手臂弯曲成90度角。
将手臂向后伸直，在动作顶端用力收紧肱三头肌。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell kneeling bicep curl exercise ball
name.zh: 哑铃跪姿健身球肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Kneel on the floor with an exercise ball in front of you. Place your elbows on top of the exercise ball, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双膝跪在地板上，健身球放在身前。将双肘放在健身球顶部，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在动作顶点短暂停留并用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Kneel on the floor with an exercise ball in front of you.
Place your elbows on top of the exercise ball, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双膝跪在地板上，健身球放在身前。
将双肘放在健身球顶部，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在动作顶点短暂停留并用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，收紧核心。将双臂向身体两侧平举至与地面平行的位置，手肘保持微屈。在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心。
将双臂向身体两侧平举至与地面平行，手肘保持微屈。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，收紧核心。将双臂向身体两侧举起，直至与地面平行，手肘保持微屈。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。接着，将双臂向前举起至与地面平行，同样保持手肘微屈。在顶端停顿后，缓慢放下回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心。
将双臂向身体两侧举起至与地面平行，手肘保持微屈。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。
接着，将双臂向前举起至与地面平行，同样保持手肘微屈。
在顶端停顿后，缓慢放下回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下蹲进入弓步姿势。下蹲时保持背部挺直、胸部向上。右脚后跟用力蹬地，身体回到起始姿势。换左腿重复动作。双腿交替进行所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body.
Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with your left leg.
Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。
右脚向前迈出一步，身体下蹲进入弓步姿势。
下蹲时保持背部挺直、胸部向上。
右脚后跟用力蹬地，身体回到起始姿势。
换左腿重复动作。
双腿交替进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground. As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides. Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下蹲成弓步姿势，右膝弯曲呈90度，左膝悬空几乎触及地面。在弓步下蹲的同时，将哑铃向上弯举至肩部位置，保持肘部贴近身体。在弓步最低点稍作停顿，然后通过右脚后跟发力蹬地，身体回到起始姿势，哑铃随之放下回到身体两侧。换另一侧腿重复弓步和弯举动作，左脚向前迈出。继续左右交替进行，直到完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground.
As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides.
Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前。
右脚向前迈出一步，身体下蹲成弓步姿势，右膝弯曲呈90度，左膝悬空几乎触及地面。
在弓步下蹲的同时，将哑铃向上弯举至肩部位置，保持肘部贴近身体。
在弓步最低点稍作停顿，然后通过右脚后跟发力蹬地，身体回到起始姿势，哑铃随之放下回到身体两侧。
换另一侧腿重复弓步和弯举动作，左脚向前迈出。
继续左右交替进行，直到完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell in an arc behind your head until your forearms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then contract your triceps to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳子一端。双手握住一只哑铃，双臂伸直举于胸部上方，掌心相对。保持上臂固定不动，将哑铃沿弧线缓缓下放至头后侧，直到前臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后收缩肱三头肌将哑铃拉回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell in an arc behind your head until your forearms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then contract your triceps to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，头部位于凳子一端。
双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直举于胸部上方，掌心相对。
保持上臂固定不动，将哑铃沿弧线缓缓下放至头后侧，直到前臂与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后收缩肱三头肌将哑铃拉回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower one dumbbell down towards your head, bending at the elbow, while keeping the other arm extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。将双臂伸直举至胸部上方，手肘保持微曲。将一只哑铃向下放至头部方向，手肘弯曲，另一只手臂保持伸直。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。换另一只手臂重复动作，两侧交替进行所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower one dumbbell down towards your head, bending at the elbow, while keeping the other arm extended.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。
将双臂伸直举至胸部上方，手肘保持微曲。
将一只哑铃向下放至头部方向，手肘弯曲，另一只手臂保持伸直。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复动作，两侧交替进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up over your chest. Lower the dumbbells towards your shoulders by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position by extending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。通过弯曲手肘将哑铃下放至肩部两侧，同时保持上臂不动。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手肘将哑铃向上推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up over your chest.
Lower the dumbbells towards your shoulders by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。
通过弯曲手肘将哑铃下放至肩部两侧，同时保持上臂不动。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手肘将哑铃向上推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your side on a flat bench with your upper arm against your side and your elbow bent 90 degrees. Hold a dumbbell in your hand with your palm facing down. Keeping your upper arm against your side, slowly rotate your forearm upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 侧卧在平板凳上，上臂贴紧身体侧边，肘关节弯曲90度。握住哑铃，手掌朝下。在上臂保持贴紧身体侧边的同时，慢慢地将前臂向外上方旋转至最大幅度。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢地将前臂下落回起始位置。重复所需次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

en: Lie on your side on a flat bench with your upper arm against your side and your elbow bent 90 degrees.
Hold a dumbbell in your hand with your palm facing down.
Keeping your upper arm against your side, slowly rotate your forearm upward as far as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 侧卧在平板凳上，上臂贴紧身体侧边，肘关节弯曲90度。
握住哑铃，手掌朝下。
在上臂保持贴紧身体侧边的同时，慢慢地将前臂向外上方旋转至最大幅度。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢地将前臂下落回起始位置。
重复所需次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and a dumbbell resting on your lower abdomen. Bend your knees and bring the dumbbell towards your glutes, keeping your feet flat on the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，将哑铃放在下腹部。弯曲膝盖，将哑铃向臀部方向移动，同时保持脚掌平放在地面上。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and a dumbbell resting on your lower abdomen.
Bend your knees and bring the dumbbell towards your glutes, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，将哑铃放在下腹部。
弯曲膝盖，将哑铃向臀部方向移动，同时保持脚掌平放在地面上。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up. Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对，双臂向上伸直。将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部90度角。将哑铃推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在凳子上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对，双臂向上伸直。
将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部呈90度角。
将哑铃向上推回起始位置，双臂完全伸展。
重复所需次数。

name.en: dumbbell lying on floor rear delt raise
name.zh: 哑铃俯卧后三角肌侧举

instructions.en: Lie face down on the floor with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms up and out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下躺在地板上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。双臂向前伸直，肘部保持微屈。收紧肩部肌肉，将双臂向两侧抬起并向外展开，收缩肩胛骨。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie face down on the floor with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms up and out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下躺在地板上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。
双臂向前伸直，肘部保持微屈。
收紧肩部肌肉，将双臂向两侧抬起并向外展开，收缩肩胛骨。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂降回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.en: dumbbell lying one arm deltoid rear
name.zh: 哑铃俯卧单臂后侧平举

instructions.en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing inwards. Extend your arm straight down towards the floor, keeping it close to your body. Raise your arm up and back, squeezing your shoulder blade towards your spine. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下俯卧在平凳上，单手握住哑铃，掌心朝内。手臂向下伸直靠近身体垂向地面。向上向后抬起手臂，收缩肩胛骨靠向脊柱。在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将手臂放回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing inwards.
Extend your arm straight down towards the floor, keeping it close to your body.
Raise your arm up and back, squeezing your shoulder blade towards your spine.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 面部朝下俯卧在平凳上，单手握住哑铃，掌心朝内。
手臂向下伸直靠近身体垂向地面。
向上向后抬起手臂，收缩肩胛骨靠向脊柱。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将手臂放回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground. Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，单手持哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。将哑铃置于肩部高度位置，手掌朝向前方。将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward.
Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，单手持哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。
将哑铃置于肩部高度位置，手掌朝向前方。
将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell lying one arm press v. 2
name.zh: 哑铃仰卧单臂推举 v.2

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your back supported and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet. Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Slowly lower the dumbbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，背部紧贴凳面，双脚平稳踏地。单手持哑铃，手掌朝向脚部方向。将手臂向上伸直指向天花板，肘部保持微微弯曲的状态。缓慢将哑铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃向上推回起始位置。完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your back supported and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet.
Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Slowly lower the dumbbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，背部紧贴凳面，双脚平稳踏地。
单手持哑铃，手掌朝向脚部方向。
将手臂向上伸直指向天花板，肘部保持微微弯曲。
缓慢将哑铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后将哑铃向上推回起始位置。
完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell lying one arm pronated triceps extension
name.zh: 哑铃单臂俯身肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing down, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder. Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，背部和头部得到支撑，双脚平放在地面上。单手握住哑铃，掌心向下，将手臂伸直举至肩部上方。保持上臂不动，弯曲肘部，慢慢将哑铃降至头后。在最低点稍作停留，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing down, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，背部和头部得到支撑，双脚平放在地面上。
单手握住哑铃，掌心向下，将手臂伸直举至肩部上方。
保持上臂不动，弯曲肘部，慢慢将哑铃降至头后。
在最低点稍作停留，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell lying one arm rear lateral raise
name.zh: 哑铃俯卧单臂后侧平举

instructions.en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor. Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下俯卧在平板凳上，单手握住哑铃，手臂自然垂向地面。保持手臂伸直，将哑铃向身体侧面外展抬起。到达顶部时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成目标重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor.
Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 面部朝下俯卧在平板凳上，单手握住哑铃，手臂自然垂向地面。
保持手臂伸直，将哑铃向身体侧面抬起外展。
到达顶部位置时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成目标重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell lying one arm supinated triceps extension
name.zh: 哑铃仰卧单臂反握三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder. Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，背部和头部得到支撑，双脚平放在地面上。单手持哑铃，采用反握姿势，将手臂伸直举至肩部正上方。保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将哑铃降至头后。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。重复所需的重复次数，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，背部和头部得到支撑，双脚平放在地面上。
单手持哑铃，采用反握姿势，将手臂伸直举至肩部正上方。
保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将哑铃降至头后。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your chest facing down and your arms extended straight down, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Rotate your palms so they are facing up. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you rotate your palms to face down. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下平躺在训练凳上，双臂向下伸直，双手各握一只哑铃。将掌心转向朝上。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将哑铃向上弯举，同时将掌心转向朝下。吸气并将哑铃缓慢放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your chest facing down and your arms extended straight down, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Rotate your palms so they are facing up.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you rotate your palms to face down.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下平躺在训练凳上，双臂向下伸直，双手各握一只哑铃。
将掌心转向朝上。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将哑铃向上弯举，同时将掌心转向朝下。
吸气并将哑铃缓慢放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on the floor with your face down and your arms extended straight out in front of you, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Rotate your palms so they are facing down towards the floor. Keeping your arms straight, lift the dumbbells off the floor by contracting your forearms. Continue lifting until your forearms are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地板上，面部朝下，双臂向前伸直，每只手握住一个哑铃。将手掌旋转至朝向地板。保持手臂伸直，通过收缩前臂将哑铃抬离地面。继续抬起直至前臂完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。保持片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on the floor with your face down and your arms extended straight out in front of you, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Rotate your palms so they are facing down towards the floor.
Keeping your arms straight, lift the dumbbells off the floor by contracting your forearms.
Continue lifting until your forearms are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地板上，面朝下，双臂向前伸直，双手各持一个哑铃。
旋转手掌，使其朝向地板。
保持手臂伸直，通过收缩前臂将哑铃抬离地面。
继续抬起直至前臂完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
保持片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

name.en: dumbbell lying pullover on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the ball. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，身体向前滚动，直到上背部支撑在健身球上。双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。保持手臂伸直，将哑铃缓慢下放至头后部。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the ball.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，身体向前滚动，直到上背部支撑在健身球上。
双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直举至胸部上方。
保持手臂伸直，将哑铃缓慢下放至头后部。
稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Engaging your back muscles, lift the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部向下俯卧在平凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体内侧。手臂向下伸直朝向地面，手肘保持微弯。发力时收紧背部肌肉，将哑铃向胸部方向抬起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Engaging your back muscles, lift the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部向下俯卧在平凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体内侧。
手臂向下伸直朝向地面，手肘保持微弯。
收紧背部肌肉发力，将哑铃向胸部方向抬起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 俯卧在平板凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。将手臂向下伸直指向地面，手肘保持微微弯曲。收缩肩部肌肉，将手臂向两侧举起，直至与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂放下，回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 俯卧在平板凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。
将双臂向下伸直指向地面，手肘保持微屈。
收缩肩部肌肉，将双臂向两侧平举至与地面平行。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。
重复进行至目标次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm fully extended above your chest. Lower the dumbbell in a controlled manner towards your forehead, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 平躺在凳子上，一手握哑铃，手臂完全伸展垂直于胸部。控制哑铃向额头方向下落，保持上臂不动。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂回到起始位置。重复所需的重复次数，然后换臂。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm fully extended above your chest.
Lower the dumbbell in a controlled manner towards your forehead, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 平躺在凳子上，一手握哑铃，手臂完全伸展垂直于胸部。
控制哑铃向额头方向下落，保持上臂不动。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将手臂回到起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数，然后换臂。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders by contracting your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放地面。双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定，通过收缩前臂将哑铃向肩部弯举。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders by contracting your forearms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放地面。
双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定，通过收缩前臂将哑铃向肩部弯举。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your legs extended and your arms by your sides, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Rotate your palms to face up, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, squeezing your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地板上，双腿伸直，双手各握一只哑铃放于身体两侧。将掌心向上翻转，手肘贴近身体两侧。慢慢将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，同时收缩前臂肌肉。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your legs extended and your arms by your sides, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Rotate your palms to face up, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, squeezing your forearms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地板上，双腿伸直，双手各握一只哑铃放于身体两侧。
将掌心向上翻转，手肘贴近身体两侧。
慢慢将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，收缩前臂肌肉。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃仰卧肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在平板凳上，背部和头部得到支撑，双脚平放在地面上。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸直。上臂保持固定，呼气并弯曲手臂，收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上举起。持续向上举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平位置。在收缩的最高点停顿片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复以上动作至指定的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在平板凳上，背部和头部得到支撑，双脚平放在地面上。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸直。
上臂保持固定，呼气并弯曲手臂，收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上举起。
持续向上举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平位置。
在收缩的最高点停顿片刻，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复以上动作至指定的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸直。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在顶峰位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。根据需要重复上述动作次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸直。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据需要重复上述动作次数。

name.zh: 哑铃仰卧肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Lower the dumbbells down towards your forehead, bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。将双臂伸直举至胸部正上方，保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。将哑铃下放至额头附近，弯曲肘部。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。重复至所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Lower the dumbbells down towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。
将双臂伸直举至胸部正上方，保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。
将哑铃下放至额头附近，弯曲肘部。
稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
重复至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复以上动作至目标次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复以上动作至目标次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms extended straight up over your chest. Slowly lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手各持一只哑铃，采用中立握（掌心相对），手臂伸直垂直于胸部上方。慢慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部贴近身体。下放至底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Slowly lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
