Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手各持一只哑铃，采用中立握（掌心相对），手臂伸直垂直于胸部上方。
慢慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，保持肘部贴近身体。
下放至底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh. Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh. Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position. Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward. Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在平板凳上，一只手握住哑铃，放在大腿上部。仰卧在凳子上，保持哑铃压在大腿上。用另一只手帮助将哑铃举起至起始位置。手臂伸直，将哑铃举至肩部正上方，手掌朝向内侧。将哑铃向侧面以大弧度放下，保持肘部略微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时暂停，然后反向运动，将哑铃回到起始位置。按所需重复次数重复，然后换臂重复。

en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh.
Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh.
Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
zh: 坐在平板凳上，一只手握住哑铃，放在大腿上部。
仰卧在凳子上，保持哑铃压在大腿上。
用另一只手帮助将哑铃举起至起始位置。
手臂伸直，将哑铃举至肩部正上方，手掌朝向内侧。
将哑铃向侧面以大弧度放下，保持肘部略微弯曲。
当手臂与地面平行时暂停，然后反向运动，将哑铃回到起始位置。
按所需重复次数重复，然后换臂重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let the dumbbell hang straight down towards the floor, with your arm fully extended. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃，掌心朝向身体。膝盖略微弯曲，臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。手臂完全伸直，让哑铃垂直悬向地面。将哑铃向上拉向胸部，肘部贴近身体两侧，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按要求的次数重复后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Let the dumbbell hang straight down towards the floor, with your arm fully extended.
Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
膝盖略微弯曲，臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
手臂完全伸直，让哑铃垂直悬向地面。
将哑铃向上拉向胸部，肘部贴近身体两侧，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复后，换另一侧进行。

name.en: dumbbell one arm chest fly on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground. Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball. Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward. Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground. Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，单手握住哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。双脚向前迈步，滚动健身球直到上背部支撑在球上，头部、颈部和肩部悬空在球外。握住哑铃的手臂伸直，垂直于胸部上方，手掌朝向身体内侧。保持肘部略微弯曲，将哑铃缓慢向侧下方放下。当手臂与地面平行时稍作停顿，然后收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃举回起始位置。按照所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball.
Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward.
Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，单手握住哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。
双脚向前迈步，滚动健身球直到上背部支撑在球上，头部、颈部和肩部悬空在球外。
握住哑铃的手臂伸直，垂直于胸部上方，手掌朝向身体内侧。
保持肘部略微弯曲，将哑铃缓慢向侧下方放下。
当手臂与地面平行时稍作停顿。
收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃举回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm concentration curl (on stability ball)
name.zh: 哑铃单臂集中弯举（在健身球上）

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm extended down towards the floor. Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。单手握住哑铃，掌心向上，手臂向下伸展朝向地面。将肘部靠在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。保持上臂不动，呼气并将哑铃弯举向肩膀方向，同时收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧手臂重复。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm extended down towards the floor.
Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
单手握住哑铃，掌心向上，手臂向下伸展朝向地面。
将肘部靠在大腿内侧，膝盖上方。
保持上臂不动，呼气并将哑铃弯举向肩膀方向，同时收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧手臂重复。

name.en: dumbbell one arm decline chest press

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest. Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back pressed against the bench. Extend your arm and push the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, fully extending your elbow. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 躺在下斜凳上，单手握哑铃置于胸部上方。双脚平放在地面上，背部紧贴凳面。手臂向上伸展，将哑铃推向天花板方向，肘部完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back pressed against the bench.
Extend your arm and push the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, fully extending your elbow.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 躺在下斜凳上，单手握哑铃置于胸部上方。
双脚平放在地面上，背部紧贴凳面。
手臂向上伸展，将哑铃推向天花板方向，肘部完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell one arm fly on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball. Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards. Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，单手持哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。双脚向前移动，身体沿球面下落，直到上背部支撑在健身球上。持哑铃的手臂向上伸直，举至胸部上方，手掌朝向身体内侧。保持肘部略微弯曲的状态，将哑铃缓慢向身体侧方下放。稍作停顿后，收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃拉回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball.
Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards.
Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，单手持哑铃，双脚平放在地面上。
双脚向前移动，身体沿球面下落，直到上背部支撑在健身球上。
持哑铃的手臂向上伸直，举至胸部上方，手掌朝向身体内侧。
保持肘部略微弯曲的状态，将哑铃缓慢向身体侧方下放。
稍作停顿后，收缩胸部肌肉将哑铃拉回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm french press on exercise ball
name.zh: 哑铃单臂健身球臂屈伸

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary. Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。双手各持一只哑铃，掌心向上，肘关节弯曲成90度角。将手臂向上伸直指向天花板，保持肘关节固定不动。慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数完成后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary.
Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。
单手持哑铃，掌心向上，肘关节弯曲成90度角。
将手臂向上伸直指向天花板，保持肘关节固定不动。
慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数完成后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm hammer preacher curl
name.zh: 哑铃单臂锤式牧师椅弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your upper arm resting on the pad. Hold the dumbbell with a neutral grip (palms facing your body). Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，单手握住哑铃，上臂放在垫子上支撑。手掌朝向身体呈中立握姿。保持上臂固定不动，呼气并将哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your upper arm resting on the pad.
Hold the dumbbell with a neutral grip (palms facing your body).
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，单手握住哑铃，上臂放在垫子上支撑。
手掌朝向身体呈中立握姿握住哑铃。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气并将哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm hammer press on exercise ball
name.zh: 健身球单臂哑铃锤式推举

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your other hand on your hip for stability. Press the dumbbell upwards, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。双手握住一个哑铃，掌心朝内，手肘弯曲呈90度角。另一只手放在臀部以保持身体稳定。将哑铃向上推举，手臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂重复动作。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Press the dumbbell upwards, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。
单手握住哑铃，掌心朝内，手肘弯曲呈90度角。
另一只手放在臀部以保持身体稳定。
将哑铃向上推举，手臂完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂重复动作。

name.en: dumbbell one arm incline chest press

instructions.en: Adjust the incline bench to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, resting it on your shoulder. Push the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 将上斜凳调整至45度角。坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面。单手持哑铃，采用正握方式，将哑铃置于肩部上方。将哑铃向上推离身体，手臂完全伸展。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂继续练习。

en: Adjust the incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, resting it on your shoulder.
Push the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 将上斜凳调整至45度角
坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面
单手持哑铃，采用正握方式，将哑铃置于肩部上方
将哑铃向上推离身体，手臂完全伸展
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置
完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂继续练习

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握住哑铃。微微屈膝，髋部向前倾斜，保持背部挺直。将右肘抬至身体侧方，保持90度弯曲。将右臂向后伸直，在动作顶端充分挤压肱三头肌。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握住哑铃。
微微屈膝，髋部向前倾斜，保持背部挺直。
将右肘抬至身体侧方，保持90度弯曲。
将右臂向后伸直，在动作顶端充分挤压肱三头肌。
慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body. Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise. Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down. Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手握持哑铃，掌心朝向身体。保持背部挺直，全程收紧核心肌群。将哑铃向身体侧方举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心向下。继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手握持哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，全程收紧核心肌群。
将哑铃向身体侧方举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心向下。
继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

name.en: dumbbell one arm lateral raise with support
name.zh: 哑铃单臂侧平举（有支撑）

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body. Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down. Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手持哑铃，掌心朝向身体。另一只手扶在稳定的支撑物上（如长凳或墙壁）以保持平衡。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌肉。将哑铃向侧方举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心朝下。继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按要求的次数重复后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body.
Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手持哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
另一只手扶在稳定的支撑物上（如长凳或墙壁）以保持平衡。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌肉。
将哑铃向侧方举起，保持手臂伸直，掌心朝下。
继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复后，换另一侧进行。

name.en: dumbbell one arm press on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward. Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。单手握住哑铃，将其置于肩部高度，手肘弯曲，手掌朝前。保持核心肌群收紧，同时维持健身球上的平衡，慢慢将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。在顶端短暂停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward.
Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
单手握住哑铃，将其置于肩部高度，手肘弯曲，手掌朝前。
保持核心肌群收紧同时维持健身球上的平衡，慢慢将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down. Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下趴在平凳上，单手握住哑铃，手掌向下。将手臂完全伸直，让哑铃垂直悬向地面。上臂保持不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向上弯举至肩部。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 面部朝下趴在平凳上，单手握住哑铃，手掌向下。
将手臂完全伸直，让哑铃垂直悬向地面。
上臂保持不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向上弯举至肩部。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl
name.zh: 哑铃单臂俯卧锤式弯举

instructions.en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended. Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下俯卧在平板凳上，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝向身体方向，手臂完全伸直。上臂保持固定不动，将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按要求的次数重复动作后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 面部朝下俯卧在平板凳上，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝向身体方向，手臂完全伸直。
上臂保持固定不动，将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复动作后，换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell one arm pullover on exercise ball
name.zh: 哑铃单臂健身球仰卧上拉

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度。双手握住一个哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过胸部。保持手臂伸直，慢慢将哑铃下放至头后。停顿片刻，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度。
单手握住哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过胸部。
保持手臂伸直，慢慢将哑铃下放至头后。
停顿片刻，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm reverse wrist curl

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down. Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge. Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，双脚平放于地面。双手握住哑铃，采用反握姿势（掌心向下）。将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬空于膝盖边缘。慢慢屈腕将哑铃下放至最低点，在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手腕向上卷起回到起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down.
Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，双脚平放于地面。
单手握住哑铃，采用反握姿势，掌心向下。
将前臂放在大腿上，手腕悬空于膝盖边缘。
慢慢屈腕将哑铃下放至最低点。
在底部稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手腕向上卷起回到起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm reverse fly (with support)
name.zh: 哑铃单臂反向飞鸟（有支撑）

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards. Lean forward and place your free hand on the bench for support. Keep your arm slightly bent and raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。双手握住一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体内侧。身体前倾，用另一只手撑在长凳上以获得支撑。保持手臂微微弯曲，向侧面抬起手臂直至与地面平行。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards.
Lean forward and place your free hand on the bench for support.
Keep your arm slightly bent and raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
单手握住一个哑铃，手掌朝向身体内侧。
身体前倾，用另一只手撑在长凳上以获得支撑。
保持手臂微微弯曲，向侧面抬起手臂直至与地面平行。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手臂放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm reverse grip press

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body. Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight. Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body. Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在平板凳上，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝向身体方向。双脚平放在地面，保持背部挺直。将哑铃举至肩部高度，手肘贴近身体。上推哑铃至手臂完全伸展。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body.
Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight.
Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在平板凳上，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝向身体方向。
双脚平放在地面，保持背部挺直。
将哑铃举至肩部高度，手肘贴近身体。
上推哑铃至手臂完全伸展。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm reverse preacher curl
name.zh: 哑铃单臂反握牧师椅弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip. Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended. Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，胸部靠在垫子上，手臂伸展超出椅边，反握哑铃。慢慢放下哑铃直到手臂完全伸直。将哑铃弯举回到肩部位置，保持上臂固定不动。在动作顶端挤压肱二头肌，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数，然后换臂。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended.
Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，胸部靠在垫子上，手臂伸展超出椅边，反握哑铃。
慢慢放下哑铃直到手臂完全伸直。
将哑铃弯举回到肩部位置，保持上臂固定不动。
在动作顶端挤压肱二头肌，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数，然后换臂。

name.en: dumbbell one arm reverse spider curl
name.zh: 哑铃单臂反握蜘蛛弯举

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down and arm fully extended. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by flexing your elbow. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，单手握哑铃，手掌向下，手臂自然下垂完全伸直。保持大臂不动，仅通过弯曲肘部将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照要求的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down and arm fully extended.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by flexing your elbow.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 身体直立，单手握哑铃，手掌向下，手臂自然下垂完全伸直。
保持大臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘关节将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成规定的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm seated bicep curl on exercise ball
name.zh: 坐姿单臂哑铃健身球弯举

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。手臂完全伸展，手掌朝上握住哑铃。上臂保持固定，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成目标次数后换臂进行。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
手臂完全伸展，手掌朝上握住哑铃。
上臂保持固定，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成目标次数后换臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell one arm seated hammer curl
name.zh: 坐姿单臂哑铃锤式弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。单手握住哑铃，采用中立握法（掌心相对），将肘部靠在大腿内侧、膝盖上方的位置。上臂保持固定不动，呼气时将哑铃向上弯举至肩部高度。在动作顶峰稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行相同的练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
单手握住哑铃，采用中立握法（掌心相对）。
将肘部靠在大腿内侧、膝盖上方的位置。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时将哑铃向上弯举至肩部。
在动作顶峰稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm seated neutral wrist curl

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up. Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge. Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝上。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕自然悬垂在膝盖边缘。保持前臂固定不动，尽可能地将手腕向上弯举。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手腕放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习，然后换另一只手进行。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge.
Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝上。
将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕自然悬垂在膝盖边缘。
保持前臂固定不动，尽可能地将手腕向上弯举。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手腕放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习，然后换另一只手进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward. Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直于头顶上方。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。
将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直于头顶上方。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell one arm shoulder press v. 2
name.zh: 哑铃单臂肩部推举 V.2

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward. Engage your core and press the dumbbell straight up overhead, fully extending your arm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手持哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。收紧核心肌群，将哑铃垂直向上推举，手臂完全伸直。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回肩部高度。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Engage your core and press the dumbbell straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手持哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。
收紧核心肌群，将哑铃垂直向上推举，手臂完全伸直。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回肩部高度。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Lower the dumbbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body. Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the dumbbell upwards in a straight line. As the dumbbell reaches shoulder height, quickly rotate your hand and punch it overhead, fully extending your arm. Catch the dumbbell overhead with a slight bend in your knees and hips. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手正握哑铃。膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，背部保持挺直，胸部向上。哑铃沿身体贴近下放至地面。臀部、膝盖和踝关节爆发性伸展，将哑铃沿直线向上提拉。当哑铃到达肩部高度时，迅速转动手腕并将哑铃向上猛推，手臂完全伸直。在头顶上方用轻微弯曲的膝盖和髋部接住哑铃。控制哑铃下落回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Lower the dumbbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the dumbbell upwards in a straight line.
As the dumbbell reaches shoulder height, quickly rotate your hand and punch it overhead, fully extending your arm.
Catch the dumbbell overhead with a slight bend in your knees and hips.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手正握哑铃。
膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，背部保持挺直，胸部向上。
哑铃沿身体贴近下放至地面。
臀部、膝盖和踝关节爆发性伸展，将哑铃沿直线向上提拉。
当哑铃到达肩部高度时，迅速转动手腕并将哑铃向上猛推，手臂完全伸直。
在头顶上方用轻微弯曲的膝盖和髋部接住哑铃。
控制哑铃下落回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 直立站姿，单手握哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续向上举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩同高。在收缩位置短暂停顿并挤压肱二头肌。吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 直立站姿，单手握哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂完全伸展
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举
继续向上举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩同高
在收缩位置短暂停顿并挤压肱二头肌
吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行

name.en: dumbbell one arm standing hammer curl
name.zh: 哑铃单臂站姿锤式弯举

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体。保持肘部贴近身体，上臂固定不动。呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续提升哑铃直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在最高点保持收缩状态片刻，同时用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
保持肘部贴近身体，上臂固定不动。
呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续提升哑铃直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在最高点保持收缩状态片刻，同时用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

name.en: dumbbell one arm triceps extension (on bench)
name.zh: 哑铃单臂肱三头肌伸展（坐姿）

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on the bench for support. Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your upper arm close to your head and your elbow pointing forward. Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary. Extend your arm back up to the starting position, fully straightening your elbow. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住哑铃，另一只手撑在凳子上以保持身体稳定。将哑铃举过头顶，上臂贴近头部，肘部指向前方。通过弯曲肘部将哑铃下放至头后，同时保持上臂固定。将手臂向上伸展回到起始位置，完全伸直肘部。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂继续练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on the bench for support.
Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your upper arm close to your head and your elbow pointing forward.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Extend your arm back up to the starting position, fully straightening your elbow.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
单手握住哑铃，另一只手撑在凳子上以保持身体稳定。
将哑铃举过头顶，上臂贴近头部，肘部指向前方。
通过弯曲肘部将哑铃下放至头后，同时保持上臂固定。
将手臂向上伸展回到起始位置，完全伸直肘部。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂继续练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Let the dumbbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palm facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbow. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃，采用正握姿势。哑铃自然垂于大腿前侧，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，呼气时将哑铃垂直向上拉向下巴位置，手肘引领动作。顶端稍作停顿后，吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成目标重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Let the dumbbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palm facing your body.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbow.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃，采用正握姿势。
哑铃自然垂于大腿前侧，手掌朝向身体。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，呼气时将哑铃垂直向上拉向下巴，手肘引领动作。
顶端稍作停顿后，吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成目标重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行训练。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh. Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers. Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上。一只手反握哑铃，前臂放在大腿上支撑。让手腕向下伸展，使哑铃向手指方向滚动。慢慢将手腕向上弯举，将哑铃收回靠近前臂。按照需要的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一只手进行。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh.
Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers.
Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上。
一只手反握哑铃，前臂放在大腿上支撑。
让手腕向下伸展，使哑铃向手指方向滚动。
慢慢将手腕向上弯举，将哑铃收回靠近前臂。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一只手进行。

name.en: dumbbell one arm zottman preacher curl
name.zh: 哑铃单臂佐特曼牧师椅弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip. Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend. Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up. Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，单手持哑铃，采用反握方式握住。将上臂放置在牧师椅垫上，手臂完全伸展。然后将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，保持上臂固定不动。在弯举到顶峰时，旋转手腕使掌心朝上。缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将手腕转回初始姿势。完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip.
Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend.
Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up.
Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，单手持哑铃，采用反握方式握住。
将上臂放置在牧师椅垫上，使手臂完全伸展。
将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，保持上臂固定不动。
在弯举到顶峰时，旋转手腕使掌心朝上。
缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将手腕转回初始姿势。
完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you. Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。一只脚踩在地面上，另一条腿向前伸直。身体微微前倾，将双臂向身体两侧展开，肘部保持轻微弯曲。慢慢将哑铃向两侧下方降低，感受胸部肌肉的拉伸。在最低点稍作停顿，然后收紧胸部肌肉将哑铃拉回起始位置。按要求的次数重复动作，然后换腿继续练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心相对。
一只脚踩在地面上，另一条腿向前伸直。
身体微微前倾，将双臂向身体两侧展开，肘部保持轻微弯曲。
慢慢将哑铃向两侧下方降低，感受胸部肌肉的拉伸。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后收紧胸部肌肉将哑铃拉回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复动作，然后换腿继续练习。

name.en: dumbbell over bench neutral wrist curl

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向上。将前臂放在长凳上，使手腕悬在边缘外。保持上臂固定不动，呼气并将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向上。
将前臂放在长凳上，让手腕悬在边缘外。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气并将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.en: dumbbell over bench one arm neutral wrist curl
name.zh: 哑铃过凳单臂中立腕弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm extended over the bench, palm facing up. Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your wrist in a neutral position. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，单手握住哑铃，手臂伸直搭在凳面上，掌心朝上。保持上臂固定不动，将哑铃弯举至肩部高度，同时保持手腕处于中立位置。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm extended over the bench, palm facing up.
Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your wrist in a neutral position.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在长凳上，单手握住哑铃，手臂伸直搭在凳面上，掌心朝上。
保持上臂固定不动，将哑铃弯举至肩部高度，同时保持手腕处于中立位置。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell over bench one arm reverse wrist curl
name.zh: 单臂哑铃过凳反向腕弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down. Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge. Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放地面，单手握住哑铃，手掌向下。将前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬空于边缘。慢慢向上弯举手腕，将哑铃拉向小臂。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放地面，单手握住哑铃，手掌向下。
将前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬空于边缘。
慢慢向上弯举手腕，将哑铃拉向小臂。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell over bench one arm wrist curl

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down. Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge. Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，单手持哑铃，掌心向下。将前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬于边缘外。慢慢将手腕向上弯举，将哑铃拉向小臂。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放于地面，单手持哑铃，掌心向下。
将前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬于边缘外。
慢慢将手腕向上弯举，将哑铃拉向小臂。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell over bench revers wrist curl

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向下。将前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬在边缘外。慢慢向上弯曲手腕，将哑铃朝身体方向拉起。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向下。
将前臂放在长凳上，手腕悬在边缘外。
慢慢向上弯曲手腕，将哑铃朝身体方向拉起。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，将前臂放在凳子上，手掌朝上，双手各握一只哑铃。手腕悬垂在凳子边缘。慢慢将手腕向上弯举，在动作顶端收紧前臂。保持片刻，然后慢慢将手腕降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，将前臂放在凳子上，手掌朝上，双手各握一只哑铃。
手腕悬垂在凳子边缘。
慢慢将手腕向上弯举，在动作顶端收紧前臂。
保持片刻，然后慢慢将手腕降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell palm rotational bent over row
name.zh: 哑铃俯身掌心旋转划船

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Let your arms hang straight down, palms facing your body. Engage your core and pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. As you pull the dumbbells up, rotate your palms so they face away from your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your palms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握（手掌向下）握住哑铃。屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直，膝盖略微弯曲。双臂自然下垂，掌心朝向身体。收紧核心，将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，保持肘部贴近身体。在向上拉起哑铃的同时，旋转掌心使其朝向身体外侧。在动作顶端时，将肩胛骨夹紧。慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将掌心转回起始朝向。重复所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Let your arms hang straight down, palms facing your body.
Engage your core and pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
As you pull the dumbbells up, rotate your palms so they face away from your body.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your palms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握握住哑铃
屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直，膝盖略微弯曲
双臂自然下垂，掌心朝向身体
收紧核心，将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，保持肘部贴近身体
在向上拉起哑铃的同时，旋转掌心使其朝向身体外侧
在动作顶端时，将肩胛骨夹紧
慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将掌心转回起始朝向
重复所需的重复次数

name.en: dumbbell palms in incline bench press
name.zh: 哑铃掌心相对斜板卧推

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the backrest and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing inwards. Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the dumbbells slowly towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板调至45度角。坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。双手各持一个哑铃，采用正握方式，掌心相对。将手臂向上伸展至胸部上方，手肘保持微屈。慢慢将哑铃下放至肩部两侧，同时保持肘部贴近身体。在最低点停顿片刻，然后推举哑铃回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your back against the backrest and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing inwards.
Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower the dumbbells slowly towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板调至45度角
坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上
双手各持一个哑铃，采用正握方式，掌心相对
将手臂向上伸展至胸部上方，手肘保持微屈
慢慢将哑铃下放至肩部两侧，同时保持肘部贴近身体
在最低点停顿片刻，然后推举哑铃回到起始位置
按所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. This will be your starting position. Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持肘部贴近身体两侧，将手掌向前旋转至朝向正前方。此为起始姿势。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌向上弯举。继续举至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩同高。在顶峰收缩位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。按照建议的次数重复进行。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
This will be your starting position.
Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持肘部贴近身体两侧，将手掌向前旋转至朝向正前方。
此为起始姿势。
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌向上弯举。
继续举至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩同高。
在顶峰收缩位置稍作停顿并用力挤压肱二头肌。
然后吸气，缓缓将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照建议的次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upward, jumping off the ground. While in the air, quickly switch the position of your feet, landing with your opposite foot forward. Immediately lower your body back into a squat position and repeat the jump, switching your feet again. Continue alternating the position of your feet with each jump for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃置于身体两侧。屈膝并向后推臀部，将身体降至深蹲姿势。在深蹲至底部时，用力向上跳起。腾空时迅速交换双脚位置，落地时另一脚在前。紧接着再次将身体降至深蹲姿势，重复跳跃并交换双脚。持续在每次跳跃中交替双脚位置，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
As you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upward, jumping off the ground.
While in the air, quickly switch the position of your feet, landing with your opposite foot forward.
Immediately lower your body back into a squat position and repeat the jump, switching your feet again.
Continue alternating the position of your feet with each jump for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃置于身体两侧。
屈膝并向后推臀部，将身体降至深蹲姿势。
深蹲至底部时，用力向上跳起。
腾空时快速交换双脚位置，落地时另一脚在前。
立即将身体降回深蹲姿势，再次跳起并交换双脚。
继续在每次跳跃时交替双脚位置，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，上臂放在垫子上，胸部靠在椅背上。每只手握住一个哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸直。保持上臂固定，呼气时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌。继续举起哑铃直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩同高。保持收缩姿势片刻，然后吸气缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，上臂放在垫子上，胸部靠在椅背上。
每只手握住一个哑铃，掌心向上，手臂完全伸直。
保持上臂固定，呼气时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌。
继续举起哑铃直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩同高。
保持收缩姿势片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.en: dumbbell preacher curl over exercise ball
name.zh: 健身球上哑铃牧师椅弯举

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。单手持哑铃，采用反握姿势，将肘部靠在健身球上。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
单手持哑铃，采用反握姿势，将肘部靠在健身球上。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一只哑铃，放在大腿上。慢慢向前走动双脚，同时滚动健身球，直到下背部支撑在球上，膝盖呈90度角。将哑铃举至肩高，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一只哑铃，放在大腿上。
慢慢向前走动双脚，同时滚动健身球，直到下背部支撑在球上，膝盖呈90度角。
将哑铃举至肩高，手掌朝前。
将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃俯握肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead. Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。双手握住哑铃，掌心向下，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。保持上臂贴近头部，肘部朝前，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将哑铃下放至头后。保持片刻，然后向上伸直手臂回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。
双手握住哑铃，掌心向下，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。
保持上臂贴近头部，肘部朝前，通过弯曲肘部慢慢将哑铃下放至头后。
保持片刻，然后向上伸直手臂回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline. Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将训练凳调整至45度斜角。面部朝下俯卧在凳子上，使胸部和腹部贴靠在凳面上。每只手各握一只哑铃，掌心向下，手臂完全伸直。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举起，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在完全收缩位保持短暂停顿，并充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气后，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将训练凳调整至45度斜角。
面部朝下俯卧在凳子上，使胸部和腹部贴靠在凳面上。
每只手各握一只哑铃，掌心向下，手臂完全伸直。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举起，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在完全收缩位保持短暂停顿，同时充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气后，缓慢地将哑铃放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 俯卧斜躺哑铃锤式弯举

instructions.en: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline. Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将训练凳调整至45度斜角，俯卧在凳面上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。双臂自然垂直向下，肘部保持微屈。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续上举直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在顶峰位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将训练凳调整至45度斜角。
俯卧在凳面上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。
双臂自然垂直向下，肘部保持微屈。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续上举直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在顶峰位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head until you feel a stretch in your chest and shoulders. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在长凳上，头部位于一端，双脚自然落地。双手握住一个哑铃，将手臂伸直举至胸部上方。保持肘部微微弯曲，慢慢将哑铃下放至头后侧，直到感觉胸部和肩部有拉伸感。停顿片刻，然后将哑铃拉回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head until you feel a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在长凳上，头部位于一端，双脚自然落地。
双手握住哑铃，将手臂伸直举至胸部上方。
保持肘部微微弯曲，慢慢将哑铃下放至头后侧，直到感觉胸部和肩部有拉伸感。
停顿片刻，然后将哑铃拉回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.en: dumbbell pullover hip extension on exercise ball
name.zh: 健身球哑铃仰卧上拉髋部伸展

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core. Lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，哑铃放在大腿上。双脚慢慢向前走动，使健身球沿背部向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直举至胸部上方，手肘保持微微弯曲。将哑铃降至头后方，保持手臂伸直，控制好动作。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。保持双臂伸直，将髋部抬离地面，收紧臀部并激活核心肌群。将髋部放回起始位置。重复上述动作至所需次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core.
Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，哑铃放在大腿上。
双脚慢慢向前走动，使健身球沿背部向下滚动，直到头部、颈部和上背部支撑在健身球上。
双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直举至胸部上方，手肘保持微微弯曲。
将哑铃降至头后方，保持手臂伸直，控制好动作。
稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
保持双臂伸直，将髋部抬离地面，收紧臀部并激活核心肌群。
将髋部放回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双手握哑铃，手臂伸直举于胸前。保持手臂伸直，慢慢将哑铃下放至头后。稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双手握哑铃，手臂伸直举于胸前。
保持手臂伸直，慢慢将哑铃下放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level. Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead. Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃置于肩部水平位置。膝盖稍微弯曲，身体向下微蹲，然后利用腿部爆发力向上伸展，同时将哑铃向上推举过头顶。在动作顶端手臂完全伸直，然后慢慢将哑铃放回肩部水平位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead.
Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃置于肩部水平位置。
膝盖稍微弯曲，身体向下微蹲，然后利用腿部爆发力向上伸展，同时将哑铃向上推举过头顶。
在动作顶端手臂完全伸直，然后慢慢将哑铃放回肩部水平位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。双臂向身体两侧举起，直至与地面平行，肘部保持轻微弯曲。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢放下双臂回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
双臂向身体两侧举起，直至与地面平行，肘部保持轻微弯曲。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢放下双臂回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。膝盖微屈，以髋关节为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。将双臂向身体两侧举起，肘部保持微屈，直到双臂与地面平行。在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
膝盖微屈，以髋关节为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。
将双臂向身体两侧举起，肘部保持微屈，直到双臂与地面平行。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, with a slight bend in your elbows. Raise the dumbbells out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体。身体向前倾斜俯身，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。手臂向下伸直指向地面，肘部略微弯曲。将哑铃向身体两侧举起，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在动作最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Raise the dumbbells out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。
双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
身体向前倾斜俯身，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
手臂向下伸直指向地面，肘部略微弯曲。
将哑铃向身体两侧举起，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
在动作最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。膝盖微屈，髋关节前倾俯身，保持背部挺直。手臂向下伸直垂向地面，双手掌心相对。保持肘部微弯，将手臂向两侧举起，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂下落回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。
膝盖微屈，髋关节前倾俯身，保持背部挺直。
手臂向下伸直垂向地面，双手掌心相对。
保持肘部微弯，将手臂向两侧举起，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将手臂下落回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直并收紧核心。将双臂向身体两侧举起，手肘保持微屈状态，直到双臂与地面平行。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直并收紧核心。
将双臂向身体两侧举起，手肘保持微屈状态，直到双臂与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双臂放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃俯身后侧平举（支撑头部）

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。微微弯曲膝盖，臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直。将手臂向两侧举起，保持肘部略微弯曲，直至与地面平行。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手臂降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。
微微弯曲膝盖，臀部向前倾，保持背部挺直。
将手臂向两侧举起，保持肘部略微弯曲，直至与地面平行。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将手臂降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step backward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Bend your left knee and lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。右脚向后撤一步，身体下降进入弓步姿势。弯曲左膝，身体下沉直到左大腿与地面平行。保持片刻，然后通过左脚后跟发力蹬起，恢复起始姿势。换另一侧重复，左脚向后撤步。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Take a step backward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Bend your left knee and lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。
右脚向后撤一步，身体下降进入弓步姿势。
弯曲左膝，身体下沉直到左大腿与地面平行。
保持片刻，然后通过左脚后跟发力蹬起，恢复起始姿势。
换另一侧重复，左脚向后撤步。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
