instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心向下，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃与肩同高的位置。保持收缩姿势片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心向下，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃与肩同高的位置。
保持收缩姿势片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing towards your feet. Extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Slowly lower the dumbbells towards your chest, allowing your elbows to flare out to the sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在平板凳上，双脚踏实地面，膝盖微屈。双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向脚的方向握住哑铃。手臂向上伸直指向天花板，手肘保持微屈。慢慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，同时让手肘向身体两侧展开。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置。重复至目标次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing towards your feet.
Extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Slowly lower the dumbbells towards your chest, allowing your elbows to flare out to the sides.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在平板凳上，双脚踏实地面，膝盖微屈。
双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向脚的方向握住哑铃。
手臂向上伸直指向天花板，手肘保持微屈。
慢慢将哑铃下放至胸部两侧，同时让手肘向身体两侧展开。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后将哑铃推回起始位置。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一只哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。手臂向前下方伸直，双手掌心相对。保持肘部轻微弯曲，将双臂向两侧抬起至与地面平行的位置。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双臂放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一只哑铃
膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直
手臂向前下方伸直，双手掌心相对
保持肘部轻微弯曲，将双臂向两侧抬起至与地面平行的位置
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将双臂放回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

name.en: dumbbell reverse grip incline bench one arm row
name.zh: 哑铃反握单臂斜板划船

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Place a dumbbell on the floor next to the bench. Stand facing the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend at the waist and place your left knee and left hand on the bench for support. Pick up the dumbbell with your right hand using a reverse grip (palm facing down). Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your left arm.
instructions.zh: 将斜板凳调至45度角放置。在凳子旁边的地面上放一个哑铃。面向凳子站立，双脚分开与肩同宽。弯腰并将左膝和左手撑在凳子上以保持身体稳定。右手采用反握方式（掌心朝下）拿起哑铃。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体。到达动作顶端时用力挤压背部肌肉。然后在控制下将哑铃缓慢放回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧身体，用左手重复该练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Place a dumbbell on the floor next to the bench.
Stand facing the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend at the waist and place your left knee and left hand on the bench for support.
Pick up the dumbbell with your right hand using a reverse grip (palm facing down).
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your left arm.
zh: 将斜板凳调至45度角放置。
在凳子旁边的地面上放一个哑铃。
面向凳子站立，双脚分开与肩同宽。
弯腰并将左膝和左手撑在凳子上以保持身体稳定。
右手采用反握方式（掌心朝下）拿起哑铃。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将哑铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体。
到达动作顶端时用力挤压背部肌肉。
在控制下将哑铃缓慢放回起始位置。
完成所需次数后换另一侧重复练习。

name.en: dumbbell reverse grip incline bench two arm row

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip. Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, fully extended. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜板调节至45度角。坐在训练凳上，胸部紧贴靠背，双脚平放于地面。双手各持一只哑铃，采用反握（掌心向上）方式。身体前倾，让双臂自然下垂并完全伸展。将哑铃向上拉向胸部位置，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行训练。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip.
Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, fully extended.
Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜板调节至45度角
坐在训练凳上，胸部紧贴靠背，双脚平放于地面
双手各持一只哑铃，采用反握方式
身体前倾，双臂自然下垂并完全伸展
将哑铃向上拉向胸部位置，同时用力挤压肩胛骨
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置
按照所需重复次数进行训练

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing your body. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Let your arms hang straight down, fully extended, with a slight bend in your elbows. Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微弯。每只手各握一个哑铃，采用反握姿势，掌心朝向身体。向前弯腰，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。双臂向下自然下垂并完全伸展，手肘微弯。将哑铃向上拉向胸部方向，同时挤压肩胛骨。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing your body.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Let your arms hang straight down, fully extended, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微弯。
每只手各握一个哑铃，采用反握姿势，掌心朝向身体。
向前弯腰，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。
双臂向下自然下垂并完全伸展，手肘微弯。
将哑铃向上拉向胸部方向，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you contract your biceps. Continue to curl the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，上臂放在垫子上，胸部靠在支撑架上。每只手握住一个哑铃，采用反握姿势，掌心向上。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续弯举直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平。在收缩位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢地将哑铃降回起始位置。按照需要的重复次数重复练习。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you contract your biceps.
Continue to curl the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，上臂放在垫子上，胸部靠在支撑架上。
每只手握住一个哑铃，采用反握姿势，掌心向上。
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续弯举直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平。
在收缩位置短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢地将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照需要的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，双臂完全伸直。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续提升哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在收缩顶峰位置短暂停顿，同时用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，双臂完全伸直。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续提升哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在收缩顶峰位置短暂停顿，同时用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面。双手各握一只哑铃，采用反握姿势（掌心向下）。将前臂置于大腿上，让手腕悬空在膝盖边缘。慢慢向上弯曲手腕，将哑铃拉向身体。在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面。
双手各握一只哑铃，采用反握姿势（掌心向下）。
将前臂置于大腿上，让手腕悬空在膝盖边缘。
慢慢向上弯曲手腕，将哑铃拉向身体。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your knees to bend slightly. Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then push through your heels and engage your glutes to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，保持背部挺直、核心收紧。臀部向后推动，身体前倾，膝盖略微弯曲，将哑铃向地面方向下降。直到感觉腘绳肌有拉伸感后，通过脚跟发力、臀部收紧返回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your knees to bend slightly.
Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then push through your heels and engage your glutes to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，采用正握方式握住哑铃。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，臀部向后推动，将哑铃向地面方向下降，膝盖可略微弯曲。
将哑铃下降至感觉腘绳肌有拉伸感，然后通过脚跟发力、臀部收紧返回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor. Rotate your arms so that your palms are facing downwards. Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝内。膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。将双臂向身体两侧举起，肘部保持微屈，直至与地面平行。将双臂旋转，使手掌朝下。慢慢将双臂放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Rotate your arms so that your palms are facing downwards.
Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝内。
膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。
将双臂向身体两侧举起，肘部保持微屈，直至与地面平行。
将双臂旋转，使手掌朝下。
慢慢将双臂放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将哑铃举至肩部两侧高度，手肘弯曲且手掌朝前。然后将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿后，缓慢将哑铃降回至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前。
将哑铃举至肩部两侧高度，手肘弯曲且手掌朝前。
将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and arms extended down by your sides. Keeping your arms straight, raise one dumbbell in front of you until it is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂向下伸直于身体两侧。保持手臂伸直，将一只哑铃向前举起至与地面平行的位置。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换另一只手臂重复动作。交替进行双臂训练，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and arms extended down by your sides.
Keeping your arms straight, raise one dumbbell in front of you until it is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm.
Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂向下伸直于身体两侧。
保持手臂伸直，将一只哑铃向前举起至与地面平行的位置。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复动作。
交替进行双臂训练，完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: dumbbell seated alternate hammer curl on exercise ball
name.zh: 健身球坐姿交替哑铃锤式弯举

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your palm facing your body. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the movement with the opposite arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，背部保持挺直。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将一只哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向，保持掌心始终朝向身体。继续将哑铃举高，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在最高点短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换另一只手臂重复动作，持续交替进行至所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your palm facing your body.
Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，背部保持挺直。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将一只哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向，保持掌心朝向身体。
继续将哑铃举高，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在最高点短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复相同的动作。
持续交替进行至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press one dumbbell up overhead, fully extending your arm. Lower the dumbbell back down to shoulder height. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前。将哑铃举至肩部高度，保持肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。然后将一侧哑铃向上推举过头，手臂完全伸展。接着将哑铃降回至肩部高度。换另一侧手臂重复相同动作。交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Press one dumbbell up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Lower the dumbbell back down to shoulder height.
Repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，手掌朝前。
将哑铃举至肩部高度，保持肘部弯曲，手掌朝前。
将一侧哑铃向上推举过头，手臂完全伸展。
将哑铃降回至肩部高度。
换另一侧手臂重复相同动作。
交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards, and raise them to shoulder height. Press one dumbbell up overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height. Lower the raised dumbbell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other dumbbell up overhead. Continue alternating between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝内，将哑铃举至肩部高度。将一只哑铃向上推举至头顶，同时保持另一只哑铃在肩部高度。将推举的哑铃降至肩部高度，同时将另一只哑铃向上推举至头顶。交替双臂进行所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards, and raise them to shoulder height.
Press one dumbbell up overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Lower the raised dumbbell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other dumbbell up overhead.
Continue alternating between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝内，将哑铃举至肩部高度。
将一只哑铃向上推举至头顶，同时保持另一只哑铃在肩部高度。
将推举的哑铃降至肩部高度，同时将另一只哑铃向上推举至头顶。
交替双臂进行所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your head. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住一个哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。将哑铃缓慢下放至头后方的位置，同时保持手肘贴近耳朵。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your head.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。
将哑铃缓慢下放至头后方，同时保持手肘贴近耳朵。
稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated bent arm lateral raise

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle. Keeping your elbows bent, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂弯曲成90度角。保持肘部弯曲，将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Keeping your elbows bent, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂弯曲成90度角。
保持肘部弯曲，将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双臂放下回到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated bent over alternate kickback
name.zh: 哑铃坐姿俯身交替臂屈伸

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground. Extend one arm straight back, keeping it close to your body, until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌相对。身体向前弯曲俯身，保持背部挺直且与地面平行。将一只手臂向后伸直，贴近身体，直到手臂完全伸直。保持片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换另一只手臂重复上述动作。交替进行双臂训练，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Extend one arm straight back, keeping it close to your body, until your arm is fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌相对。
身体向前弯曲俯身，保持背部挺直且与地面平行。
将一只手臂向后伸直，贴近身体，直到手臂完全伸直。
保持片刻，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复上述动作。
交替进行双臂训练，完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: dumbbell seated bent over triceps extension
name.zh: 坐姿俯身哑铃肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your head up. Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your head. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃。腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，头部抬起。将双臂向后伸直，肘部靠近头部。保持片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃。
腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，头部抬起。
将双臂向后伸直，肘部靠近头部。
保持片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向上。保持背部挺直，肘部靠近身体。呼气，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放在地面上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心向上。
保持背部挺直，肘部靠近身体。
呼气，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated biceps curl (on stability ball)
name.zh: 坐姿哑铃肱二头肌弯举（坐健身球）

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。在整个动作过程中保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续提升哑铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在肱二头肌最收紧的状态下短暂停顿一下。吸气，然后缓慢地将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，背部保持挺直。
双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续提升哑铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在肱二头肌最收紧的状态下短暂停顿一下。
吸气，然后缓慢地将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated biceps curl to shoulder press
name.zh: 哑铃坐姿肱二头肌弯举至肩上推举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your elbows close to your sides, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Once your forearms are vertical, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward. Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are fully extended. Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。将肘部紧贴身体两侧，将哑铃向上弯举至肩部位置。当前臂与地面垂直时，向前旋转手腕使掌心朝前。然后将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。最后通过反向动作将哑铃缓慢降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Keeping your elbows close to your sides, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Once your forearms are vertical, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Press the dumbbells overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前，手臂完全伸直。
将肘部紧贴身体两侧，将哑铃向上弯举至肩部位置。
当前臂与地面垂直时，向前旋转手腕使掌心朝前。
将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。
通过反向动作将哑铃缓慢降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs. Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface such as a step or block, with your heels hanging off the edge. Hold onto the dumbbell for stability. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放于地面，将哑铃置于大腿上。将双脚前脚掌放在台阶或垫块等凸起的表面上，脚跟悬空垂下。握住哑铃以保持身体稳定。将脚跟尽量向上抬起，使身体重量落在前脚掌上。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复上述动作至所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface such as a step or block, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Hold onto the dumbbell for stability.
Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放于地面，将哑铃置于大腿上。
将双脚前脚掌放在台阶或垫块等凸起的表面上，脚跟悬空垂下。
双手握住哑铃以保持身体稳定。
将脚跟尽量向上抬起，使身体重量落在前脚掌上。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso. Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前。保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧。呼气时，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，感受肱二头肌的收缩。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝前。
保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体两侧。
呼气时，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，感受肱二头肌的收缩。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面上，双手各握一只哑铃置于大腿上。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将哑铃在身体前侧举起，掌心向下，直至与肩部齐平。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面上，双手各握一只哑铃置于大腿上。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将哑铃在身体前侧举起，掌心向下，直至与肩部齐平。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended straight down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂向下伸直。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩部齐平。在收缩位置短暂停顿，同时挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended straight down.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体，手臂向下伸直。
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。
继续举起哑铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃与肩部齐平。
在收缩位置短暂停顿，同时挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

name.zh: 哑铃坐姿内侧肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。将上臂放在大腿上，让哑铃自然下垂。保持上臂不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。
将上臂放在大腿上，让哑铃自然下垂。
保持上臂不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight. Bring your upper arms close to your sides and keep your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放于地面，双手各握一只哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，从髋部向前倾，保持背部挺直。将上臂贴近身体两侧，肘部弯曲成90度角。将手臂向后伸直，在动作顶端用力挤压肱三头肌。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Bring your upper arms close to your sides and keep your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放于地面，双手各握一只哑铃。
膝盖微微弯曲，从髋部向前倾，保持背部挺直。
将上臂贴近身体两侧，肘部弯曲成90度角。
将手臂向后伸直，在动作顶端用力挤压肱三头肌。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，双手各握一只哑铃置于大腿上方。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。将哑铃向身体两侧举起，肘部保持略微弯曲，直至双臂与地面平行。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，双手各握一只哑铃置于大腿上方。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将哑铃向身体两侧举起，肘部保持略微弯曲，直至双臂与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃，放在大腿上。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将哑铃向身体两侧举起，手肘略微弯曲，直至手臂与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃，放在大腿上。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将哑铃向身体两侧举起，手肘略微弯曲，直至手臂与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down. Keeping your wrists in a neutral position, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。将前臂置于大腿上，让哑铃自然下垂。保持手腕中立位置，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Keeping your wrists in a neutral position, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心相对。
将前臂置于大腿上，让哑铃自然下垂。
保持手腕中立位置，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: dumbbell seated one arm bicep curl on exercise ball with leg raised
name.zh: 坐姿单臂哑铃健身球弯举（抬腿）

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended. Place your other hand on your hip for stability. Slowly curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep. Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。单手握住哑铃，手掌朝上，手臂完全伸直。另一只手放在髋部以保持身体平衡。慢慢将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，同时抬起同侧腿，保持上臂固定不动。在动作最高点稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时放下腿。重复所需的次数后，换另一只手臂进行相同的练习。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended.
Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Slowly curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
单手握住哑铃，手掌朝上，手臂完全伸直。
另一只手放在髋部以保持身体平衡。
慢慢将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，同时抬起同侧腿，保持上臂固定不动。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时放下腿。
重复所需的次数后，换另一只手臂进行相同的练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend your torso forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground. Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放地面，单手握住哑铃。身体前倾，保持背部挺直并与地面平行。将手臂向后伸直，肘部贴近身体。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Bend your torso forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双脚平放地面，单手握住哑铃。
身体前倾，保持背部挺直并与地面平行。
将手臂向后伸直，肘部贴近身体。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.zh: 坐姿单臂哑铃前臂旋转

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh. Raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body. Rotate your forearm outward, away from your body, while keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your forearm back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，背部保持挺直，单手握住哑铃，手臂自然垂放在大腿侧面。将哑铃抬起至肩部高度，同时保持肘部紧贴身体。以肘部为支点，将前臂向外旋转，使哑铃远离身体，同时保持上臂固定不动。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将前臂转回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and hold a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Rotate your forearm outward, away from your body, while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your forearm back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 坐在长凳上，背部保持挺直，单手握住哑铃，手臂自然垂放在大腿侧面。
将哑铃抬起至肩部高度，同时保持肘部紧贴身体。
以肘部为支点，将前臂向外旋转，使哑铃远离身体，同时保持上臂固定不动。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将前臂转回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your right thigh. Extend your left leg straight out in front of you, keeping your foot flexed. Place the ball of your right foot on an elevated surface, such as a step or weight plate. Using your calf muscles, raise your right heel as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上，将哑铃放在右大腿上。左腿向前伸直，保持脚踝屈曲。将右脚前脚掌放在一个抬高的表面上，如踏板或杠铃片。收缩小腿肌肉，将右脚后跟尽可能抬高到最高位置。在顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将脚后跟降低回到起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换腿进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your right thigh.
Extend your left leg straight out in front of you, keeping your foot flexed.
Place the ball of your right foot on an elevated surface, such as a step or weight plate.
Using your calf muscles, raise your right heel as high as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面上，将哑铃放在右大腿上。
左腿向前伸直，保持脚踝屈曲。
将右脚前脚掌放在抬高的表面上，如踏板或杠铃片。
利用小腿肌肉发力，将右脚后跟尽可能抬高到最高位置。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚后跟降低回到起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换腿进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - hammer grip

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs. Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge. Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面，哑铃横置于大腿上方。将一只脚放在垫高的台阶或木块上，脚跟悬空在边缘外。采用锤式握法握住哑铃，即双手掌心相对，手指环绕哑铃握把。保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直，通过脚掌前侧发力，缓慢将脚跟向上抬至最高点。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放回起始位置。完成目标次数后，换另一条腿进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Place one foot on a raised surface, such as a step or block, with your heel hanging off the edge.
Hold the dumbbell with a hammer grip, meaning your palms are facing each other and your fingers are wrapped around the handle.
Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, slowly raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
zh: 坐在长凳或椅子上，双脚平放在地面，哑铃横置于大腿上方。
将一只脚放在垫高的台阶或木块上，脚跟悬空在边缘外。
采用锤式握法握住哑铃，双手掌心相对，手指环绕哑铃握把。
保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直，通过脚掌前侧发力，缓慢将脚跟向上抬至最高点。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
完成目标次数后，换另一条腿进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated one leg calf raise - palm up
name.zh: 坐姿单腿哑铃提踵（掌心向上）

instructions.en: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place it on top of your thigh, palm facing up. Lift one leg off the ground and extend it in front of you, keeping your knee slightly bent. Raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住哑铃放在大腿上方，掌心向上。将一条腿抬离地面并向前伸展，膝盖略微弯曲。通过前脚掌发力，尽可能高地抬起脚跟。在顶端短暂停留，然后慢慢放下脚跟。完成目标次数后，换腿重复。

en: Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place it on top of your thigh, palm facing up.
Lift one leg off the ground and extend it in front of you, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Raise your heel as high as possible by pushing through the ball of your foot.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
单手握住哑铃放在大腿上方，掌心向上。
抬起一条腿向前伸展，膝盖略微弯曲。
通过前脚掌发力，尽可能高地抬起脚跟。
在顶端短暂停留，然后慢慢放下脚跟。
完成目标次数后，换腿重复。

name.en: dumbbell seated palms up wrist curl

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then lower your wrists back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放地面，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬出膝部边缘。慢慢向上弯曲手腕，在动作顶端挤压前臂。保持片刻，然后放下手腕回到起始位置。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放地面，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心向上。
将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬出膝部边缘。
慢慢向上弯曲手腕，在动作顶端挤压前臂。
保持片刻，然后放下手腕回到起始位置。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，双脚平放在地面上。一只手握住哑铃，采用反握姿势，将上臂靠在牧师椅垫上。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将哑铃向上弯举至肩部位置。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需次数后，换另一只手臂进行训练。

en: Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，双脚平放在地面上。
一只手握住哑铃，采用反握姿势，将上臂靠在牧师椅垫上。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将哑铃向上弯举至肩部位置。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换另一只手臂进行训练。

name.en: dumbbell seated revers grip concentration curl
name.zh: 哑铃坐姿反握集中弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up. Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，单手握住哑铃，掌心向上。将肘部靠在大腿内侧、膝盖上方的位置。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，单手握住哑铃，掌心向上。
将肘部靠在大腿内侧、膝盖上方的位置。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell seated reverse grip one arm overhead tricep extension
name.zh: 坐姿单臂哑铃反握头上肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with an underhand grip and extend your arm straight up overhead. Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment, then extend your arm back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。采用反握姿势握住哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。通过弯曲肘关节将哑铃下放至头后侧，同时保持上臂固定不动。稍作停顿，然后利用肱三头肌发力将手臂向上伸展回到起始位置。完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行相同的练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell with an underhand grip and extend your arm straight up overhead.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 坐在长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
采用反握姿势握住哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。
通过弯曲肘关节将哑铃下放至头后侧，同时保持上臂固定不动。
稍作停顿，然后利用肱三头肌发力将手臂向上伸展回到起始位置。
完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂进行相同的练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双手各持一个哑铃，放在大腿上。将哑铃举起至肩部高度，手掌朝前。将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降至肩部高度。根据所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双手各持一个哑铃，放在大腿上。
将哑铃举起至肩部高度，手掌朝前。
将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降至肩部高度。
根据所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝内。将哑铃举至肩部高度，手肘弯曲，掌心朝前。将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直并位于头部上方。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回至肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝内。
将哑铃举至肩部高度，手肘弯曲，掌心朝前。
将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直并位于头部上方。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回至肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 哑铃坐姿肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up overhead. Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears. Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住哑铃，双臂向上伸直举过头顶。弯曲肘关节，将哑铃下放至头后侧，同时保持上臂贴近双耳。稍作停顿，然后伸直双臂回到起始位置。重复动作至所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住哑铃，双臂向上伸直举过头顶。
弯曲肘关节，将哑铃下放至头后侧，同时保持上臂贴近双耳。
稍作停顿，然后伸直双臂回到起始位置。
重复动作至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Keep your arms straight and let the dumbbells hang by your sides. Raise your shoulders as high as possible, as if you are trying to touch your ears with your shoulders. Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。手臂保持伸直，让哑铃自然垂于身体两侧。将肩膀尽量向上抬起，仿佛要用肩膀去触碰耳朵。保持顶峰收缩一秒钟，然后缓慢将肩膀放回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Keep your arms straight and let the dumbbells hang by your sides.
Raise your shoulders as high as possible, as if you are trying to touch your ears with your shoulders.
Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
手臂保持伸直，让哑铃自然垂于身体两侧。
将肩膀尽量向上抬起，仿佛要用肩膀去触碰耳朵。
保持顶峰收缩一秒钟，然后缓慢将肩膀放回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, letting it hang down by your side. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend sideways at the waist towards the opposite side of the dumbbell, lowering the weight as far as you comfortably can. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握一只哑铃垂于体侧。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，向握哑铃手的对侧腰部方向缓慢侧屈身体，在舒适范围内尽可能降低哑铃。保持片刻，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧重复同样的动作。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, letting it hang down by your side.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend sideways at the waist towards the opposite side of the dumbbell, lowering the weight as far as you comfortably can.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握一只哑铃垂于体侧。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，向握哑铃手的对侧腰部方向缓慢侧屈身体，在舒适范围内尽可能降低哑铃。
保持片刻，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧重复同样的动作。

name.en: dumbbell side lying one hand raise

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm. Hold a dumbbell in your top hand with your palm facing down. Keeping your arm straight, raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 侧卧在地上，双腿伸直，头部由下方手臂支撑。上方手持哑铃，掌心向下。保持手臂伸直，将哑铃向上举至肩部高度。在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm.
Hold a dumbbell in your top hand with your palm facing down.
Keeping your arm straight, raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 侧卧在地上，双腿伸直，头部由下方手臂支撑。
上方手持哑铃，掌心向下。
保持手臂伸直，将哑铃向上举至肩部高度。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell side plank with rear fly
name.zh: 哑铃侧平板支撑反向飞鸟

instructions.en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, keeping your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell in your top hand, with your arm extended straight down towards the ground. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. While maintaining the side plank position, lift the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 首先侧卧在地面上，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。将前臂置于肩膀正下方的地面上，手肘弯曲呈90度角。上侧手握住哑铃，手臂向下伸直朝向地面。收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使从头到脚跟形成一条直线。保持侧平板支撑的姿势，将哑铃向天花板方向举起，同时夹紧肩胛骨。将哑铃缓慢放回起始位置。按所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, keeping your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a dumbbell in your top hand, with your arm extended straight down towards the ground.
Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
While maintaining the side plank position, lift the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 首先侧卧在地面上，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。
将前臂置于肩膀正下方的地面上，手肘弯曲呈90度角。
上侧手握住哑铃，手臂向下伸直朝向地面。
收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使从头到脚跟形成一条直线。
保持侧平板支撑的姿势，将哑铃向天花板方向举起，同时夹紧肩胛骨。
将哑铃缓慢放回起始位置。
按所需次数重复动作，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand. Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm. Engage your core and keep your back straight as you walk forward, maintaining the dumbbell overhead. Continue walking for the desired distance or time. Switch hands and repeat the exercise.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃。将哑铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。收紧核心，保持背部挺直，边走边将哑铃保持在头顶位置。继续行走至所需距离或时间。换手并重复练习。

en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Engage your core and keep your back straight as you walk forward, maintaining the dumbbell overhead.
Continue walking for the desired distance or time.
Switch hands and repeat the exercise.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃。
将哑铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。
收紧核心，保持背部挺直，边走边将哑铃保持在头顶位置。
继续行走至所需距离或时间。
换手并重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand on the edge of a step or platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on a wall or railing for support. Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down below the step. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚站在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空，脚尖支撑在台阶上。双手握住哑铃置于身体两侧，另一只手扶住墙壁或栏杆以保持身体平衡。将脚跟尽量向上抬高，使身体重量转移到脚尖上。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟下放至低于台阶平面。完成目标次数后，换另一条腿进行练习。

en: Stand on the edge of a step or platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on a wall or railing for support.
Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down below the step.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
zh: 双脚站在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空，脚尖支撑在台阶上。
双手握住哑铃置于身体两侧，另一只手扶住墙壁或栏杆以保持身体平衡。
将脚跟尽量向上抬高，使身体重量转移到脚尖上。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟下放至低于台阶平面。
完成目标次数后，换另一条腿进行练习。

aliases: 哑铃单腿罗马尼亚硬拉

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand. Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot slightly off the ground. Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips and lower the dumbbell towards the ground. At the same time, extend your right leg straight behind you, maintaining a slight bend in your left knee. Lower the dumbbell until your torso and right leg are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，右手握住哑铃。将重心转移到左腿，右脚轻微抬离地面。保持背部挺直，通过髋关节铰链向前倾，将哑铃向地面方向下降。同时将右腿向后伸直，左膝保持微屈。继续下降直到躯干和右腿与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后收缩臀肌和腘绳肌发力返回起始姿势。按所需次数重复后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand.
Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot slightly off the ground.
Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips and lower the dumbbell towards the ground.
At the same time, extend your right leg straight behind you, maintaining a slight bend in your left knee.
Lower the dumbbell until your torso and right leg are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，右手握住哑铃。
将重心转移到左腿，右脚轻微抬离地面。
保持背部挺直，通过髋关节铰链向前倾，将哑铃向地面方向下降。
同时将右腿向后伸直，左膝保持微屈。
继续下降直到躯干和右腿与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后收缩臀肌和腘绳肌发力返回起始姿势。
按所需次数重复后换另一侧进行。

name.en: dumbbell single leg deadlift with stepbox support
name.zh: 哑铃单腿硬拉（踏板支撑）

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand. Place your left foot on a stepbox or elevated surface behind you. Keeping your back straight and core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, lowering the dumbbell towards the ground. As you lower the dumbbell, simultaneously lift your left leg behind you, maintaining a straight line from head to heel. Lower the dumbbell until you feel a stretch in your right hamstring, then return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，右手握住哑铃。将左脚放在身后踏板或较高平台上。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，将哑铃向地面方向放下。同时将左腿向后抬起，从头部到脚跟保持一条直线。下放哑铃直至右腿腘绳肌有拉伸感，然后回到起始姿势。完成所需重复次数后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand.
Place your left foot on a stepbox or elevated surface behind you.
Keeping your back straight and core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, lowering the dumbbell towards the ground.
As you lower the dumbbell, simultaneously lift your left leg behind you, maintaining a straight line from head to heel.
Lower the dumbbell until you feel a stretch in your right hamstring, then return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，右手握住哑铃。
将左脚放在身后踏板或较高的平台上。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，将哑铃向地面方向放下。
下放哑铃的同时将左腿向后抬起，从头部到脚跟保持一条直线。
下放哑铃直至右腿腘绳肌有拉伸感，然后回到起始姿势。
完成所需的重复次数后，换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Take a step forward with one foot and position your feet so that your front foot is flat on the ground and your back foot is elevated on a bench or step. Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, keeping your back knee slightly bent and your back heel off the ground. Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。一只脚向前迈出，调整双脚位置使前脚平放在地面上，后脚抬高放在长凳或台阶上。通过弯曲前腿的膝盖和髋关节降低身体，同时保持后腿膝盖微弯且后脚跟离地。继续下蹲直至前侧大腿与地面平行，然后通过前脚后跟用力向上推起，回到起始姿势。按所需次数重复后，换另一侧腿重复相同动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Take a step forward with one foot and position your feet so that your front foot is flat on the ground and your back foot is elevated on a bench or step.
Lower your body by bending your front knee and hip, keeping your back knee slightly bent and your back heel off the ground.
Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。
一只脚向前迈出，调整双脚位置使前脚平放在地面上，后脚抬高放在长凳或台阶上。
通过弯曲前腿的膝盖和髋关节降低身体，同时保持后腿膝盖微弯且后脚跟离地。
继续下蹲直至前侧大腿与地面平行，然后通过前脚后跟用力向上推起，回到起始姿势。
按所需次数重复后，换另一侧腿重复相同动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。将一条腿向前伸直抬起，保持该腿悬空离地。弯曲支撑腿，使身体下蹲，仿佛向后坐进一把椅子。保持胸部挺起、背部平直。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换腿进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise.
Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。
将一条腿向前伸直抬起，保持该腿在动作全程中悬空离地。
弯曲支撑腿，使身体下降，仿佛向后坐进一把椅子。
保持胸部挺起，背部平直。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换腿进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃置于身体两侧。保持胸部挺起、核心收紧，通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节向下降低身体重心，仿佛向后坐进椅子一般。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适的范围内尽可能低。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始姿势。按所需重复次数进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃置于身体两侧。
保持胸部挺起、核心收紧，通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节向下降低身体重心，仿佛向后坐进椅子一般。
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适的范围内尽可能低。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始姿势。
按所需重复次数进行。

name.en: dumbbell standing alternate hammer curl and press
name.zh: 哑铃站姿交替锤式弯举和推举

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your back straight. Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the curl with your left hand. After completing the curl with your left hand, exhale and press the dumbbell in your right hand overhead. Extend your arm fully and hold for a moment at the top. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat the press with your left hand. Continue alternating between curls and presses for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 直立站好，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝内。保持肘部贴近身体，背部挺直。呼气时，将右手哑铃弯举至肩部高度，同时保持上臂不动。继续上举直至肱二头肌充分收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平。吸气时，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。然后用左手进行相同的弯举动作。完成左手弯举后，呼气将右手哑铃向上推举过头顶。将手臂完全伸直，在顶部停顿片刻。吸气时，缓慢将哑铃放回肩部位置。接着用左手进行相同的推举动作。按照设定的次数要求，左右手交替进行弯举和推举动作。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your back straight.
Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the curl with your left hand.
After completing the curl with your left hand, exhale and press the dumbbell in your right hand overhead.
Extend your arm fully and hold for a moment at the top.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat the press with your left hand.
Continue alternating between curls and presses for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 直立站好，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
保持肘部贴近躯干，背部挺直。
呼气时，将右手哑铃弯举至肩部方向，上臂保持不动。
继续上举哑铃直至肱二头肌充分收缩，哑铃达到肩部水平。
吸气时，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换左手进行相同的弯举动作。
完成左手弯举后，呼气将右手哑铃向上推举过头顶。
手臂完全伸直，在顶端停顿片刻。
吸气时，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换左手进行相同的推举动作。
按照目标重复次数交替进行弯举和推举动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward. Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm. Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。将一只哑铃向上推举，手臂完全伸直。将哑铃放回肩部高度。换另一只手臂重复上述动作。持续交替双臂完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。
将一只哑铃向上推举，手臂完全伸直。
将哑铃放回肩部高度。
换另一只手臂重复上述动作。
持续交替双臂完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Raise one dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down. Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm. Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将一只哑铃向身体侧面抬起，手臂保持伸直，掌心向下。继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。在最高点稍作停留，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换另一侧手臂重复动作，两臂交替进行至目标次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Raise one dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm.
Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将一只哑铃向身体侧面抬起，手臂保持伸直，掌心向下。
继续上举直至手臂与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停留，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换另一侧手臂重复动作。
两臂交替进行至目标次数。

name.zh: 哑铃交替肱三头肌后踢

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides with each repetition.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直。手臂向后伸直，肘部贴近身体。在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。换另一侧手臂重复动作，每完成一次就交替进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides with each repetition.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。
膝盖微微弯曲，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直。
手臂向后伸直，肘部贴近身体。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
换另一侧手臂重复动作，每完成一次就交替进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Extend your arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height, palms facing down. Keeping your arms straight, slowly rotate your arms in a circular motion, bringing the dumbbells in front of your body and then overhead. Continue the circular motion, bringing the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。将手臂伸直向身体两侧展开，与肩同高，掌心向下。保持手臂伸直，慢慢以圆周运动旋转手臂，将哑铃从身体前侧带到头顶上方。继续圆周运动，将哑铃带回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Extend your arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height, palms facing down.
Keeping your arms straight, slowly rotate your arms in a circular motion, bringing the dumbbells in front of your body and then overhead.
Continue the circular motion, bringing the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只哑铃。
将手臂伸直向身体两侧展开，与肩同高，掌心向下。
保持手臂伸直，慢慢以圆周运动旋转手臂，将哑铃从身体前侧带到头顶上方。
继续圆周运动，将哑铃带回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: dumbbell standing bent over one arm triceps extension
name.zh: 哑铃单臂俯身肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground. Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body. Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住一个哑铃。身体向前弯曲俯身，保持背部挺直且与地面平行。将手臂向后伸直，肘部贴近身体。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and parallel to the ground.
Extend your arm straight back, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住一个哑铃。
身体向前弯曲俯身，保持背部挺直且与地面平行。
将手臂向后伸直，肘部贴近身体。
慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数完成动作，然后换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell standing bent over two arm triceps extension
name.zh: 哑铃俯身双臂肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body. Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃。腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，膝盖略微弯曲。将双臂向后伸直，保持肘部贴近身体。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃。
腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，膝盖略微弯曲。
将双臂向后伸直，保持肘部贴近身体。
慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 哑铃站姿肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 直立站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂完全伸展。保持上臂不动，呼气的同时弯曲哑铃并收缩肱二头肌。继续举起哑铃直到肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃与肩部齐平。在挤压肱二头肌的同时保持收缩姿势短暂停顿。吸气并慢慢开始将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 直立站立，双手各握一个哑铃，手掌朝前，手臂完全伸展。
保持上臂不动，呼气的同时弯曲哑铃并收缩肱二头肌。
继续举起哑铃直到肱二头肌完全收缩且哑铃与肩部齐平。
在挤压肱二头肌的同时保持收缩姿势短暂停顿。
吸气并慢慢开始将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。尽可能高地抬起脚跟，用小腿肌群发力。在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢地将脚跟放回起始位置。按要求的次数重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃。
尽可能高地抬起脚跟，主要依靠小腿肌群发力。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢地将脚跟放下回到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards. Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握哑铃，手臂自然下垂伸直，掌心向内。另一只手放在大腿上支撑身体。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在最高点保持短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards.
Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
