Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握哑铃，手臂自然下垂伸直，掌心向内。
另一只手放在大腿上支撑身体。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在最高点保持短暂停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell standing front raise above head
name.zh: 哑铃站姿前平举至头顶

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握哑铃。保持手臂伸直，将哑铃从身体前侧举起，直至头顶上方。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握哑铃。
保持手臂伸直，将哑铃从身体前侧举起，直至头顶上方。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: dumbbell standing inner biceps curl v. 2
name.zh: 哑铃站姿内侧肱二头肌弯举 v. 2

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward. While holding your upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in. Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开站立，保持身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。肘部紧贴身体两侧，将手掌向前旋转至朝前的位置。在保持上臂固定不动的状态下，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向上弯举。继续将哑铃举高，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩膀高度。在顶峰位置短暂停留，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后随着呼气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照建议的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
While holding your upper arms stationary, curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position as your breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开站立，保持身体直立，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
保持肘部紧贴身体两侧，将手掌向前旋转至掌心朝前的位置。
在保持上臂固定不动的状态下，收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向上弯举。
继续将哑铃举高，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩膀高度。
在顶峰位置短暂停留，用力挤压肱二头肌。
随着呼气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照建议的重复次数完成动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃。膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部平直。手臂向后伸直，在动作顶端充分挤压肱三头肌。稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃。
膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部平直。
手臂向后伸直，在动作顶端充分挤压肱三头肌。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell standing one arm concentration curl

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up. Place your free hand on your thigh for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝上。将另一只手放在大腿上以获得支撑。保持上臂不动，呼气并通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在肱二头肌完全收缩的位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肌肉。吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Place your free hand on your thigh for support.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃，手掌朝上。
将另一只手放在大腿上以获得支撑。
保持上臂不动，呼气并通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
继续向上举起哑铃，直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在肱二头肌完全收缩的位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肌肉。
吸气并慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell standing one arm curl (over incline bench)
name.zh: 哑铃单臂站姿弯举（倚靠斜凳）

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing forward. Place your other hand on an incline bench for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握哑铃，掌心朝前。另一只手撑在倾斜的凳子上以保持平衡。保持上臂不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向肩部弯举。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按要求的次数重复完成后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing forward.
Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握哑铃，掌心朝前。
另一只手撑在倾斜的凳子上以保持平衡。
保持上臂不动，呼气时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向肩部弯举。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复完成后，换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell standing one arm curl over incline bench

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand. Place your other hand on an incline bench for support. Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握一只哑铃。将另一只手撑在斜板上以保持身体稳定。上臂保持不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放下恢复至起始位置。按要求的次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Place your other hand on an incline bench for support.
Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握一只哑铃。
将另一只手撑在斜板上以保持身体稳定。
上臂保持不动，通过收缩肱二头肌将哑铃向肩部方向弯举。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放下恢复至起始位置。
按要求的次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand. Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm. Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握持一个哑铃。将哑铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。上臂贴近头部并与地面保持垂直。慢慢将哑铃下放至头后方，弯曲肘部。稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握持一个哑铃。
将哑铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。
上臂贴近头部并与地面保持垂直。
慢慢将哑铃下放至头后方，弯曲肘部。
稍作停顿，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: dumbbell standing one arm palm in press
name.zh: 哑铃单臂掌心朝内推举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards. Engage your core and keep your back straight. Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝向身体内侧。收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按要求的重复次数完成后，换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards.
Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝向身体内侧。
收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。
将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
完成规定次数后，换另一侧手臂进行。

name.en: dumbbell standing one arm reverse curl

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip. Keep your arm fully extended and close to your body, with your palm facing down. Slowly curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手持哑铃，采用反握姿势。保持手臂伸直并贴近身体，手掌朝下。慢慢将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，同时保持上臂不动。在顶点位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复规定的次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Keep your arm fully extended and close to your body, with your palm facing down.
Slowly curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手持哑铃，采用反握姿势。
保持手臂伸直并贴近身体，手掌朝下。
慢慢将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，同时保持上臂固定不动。
在顶点位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
完成规定次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部前方，掌心朝前。收缩核心并将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回至肩部水平。重复进行所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部前方，掌心朝前。
收缩核心并将哑铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回至肩部水平。
重复进行所需次数。

name.zh: 哑铃站姿掌心相对推举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards. Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心相对。保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直，将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards.
Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于肩部高度，掌心相对。
保持核心肌群收紧、背部挺直，将哑铃向上推举至手臂完全伸直。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立站立，双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。将上臂后侧靠在牧师凳或倾斜凳上，手肘略微弯曲。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上提起。继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在最高点保持收缩姿势片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按要求的重复次数重复练习。

en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立站立，双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
将上臂后侧靠在牧师凳或倾斜凳上，手肘略微弯曲。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时弯曲手臂收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上提起。
继续将哑铃举起，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。
在最高点保持收缩姿势片刻，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举。继续举起哑铃直至肱二头肌完全收缩，哑铃达到肩部高度。在肱二头肌充分挤压的状态下稍作停顿。吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.

Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将哑铃向上弯举，直至哑铃达到肩部高度。
在肱二头肌充分收缩的位置稍作停顿。
吸气，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

name.zh: 哑铃站姿肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your arm straight. Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm stationary. Extend your arm back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃。将哑铃举过头顶，手臂保持伸直。弯曲肘部，将哑铃降至头后方，同时保持上臂固定不动。将手臂向上伸展恢复至起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your arm straight.
Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，单手持哑铃
将哑铃举过头顶，手臂保持伸直
弯曲肘部，将哑铃降至头后方，同时保持上臂固定不动
将手臂向上伸展恢复至起始位置
重复完成所需的次数

name.zh: 哑铃站立式佐特曼牧师弯举

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent. Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary. At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前。将上臂靠在牧师凳上，保持肘部微屈。上臂保持固定，将哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向。在动作顶端，将手腕向外旋转，使掌心朝下。然后缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将手腕旋转回初始的掌心向前姿势。重复进行至所需的次数。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前。
将上臂靠在牧师凳上，保持肘部微屈。
保持上臂固定，将哑铃向上弯举至肩部方向。
在动作顶端，将手腕向外旋转，使掌心朝下。
缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置，同时将手腕旋转回初始的掌心向前姿势。
重复进行至所需的次数。

name.en: dumbbell step up single leg balance with bicep curl
name.zh: 哑铃单腿踏步平衡弯举

instructions.en: Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface. Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest. At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders. Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground. Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，站在稳固的踏板或平台前。将右脚放在踏板上，确保整个脚掌与踏板充分接触。收紧核心肌群，通过右脚后跟发力将身体撑起踏上踏板，同时将左膝向胸部方向抬起。动作到达顶端时进行肱二头肌弯举，弯曲手肘将哑铃拉向肩部。然后放下哑铃，同时将左脚放回地面。换另一侧重复动作，左脚踏上踏板的同时进行哑铃弯举。两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest.
At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground.
Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，站在踏板或平台前。
将右脚放在踏板上，确保整个脚掌与踏板表面充分接触。
收紧核心肌群，通过右脚后跟发力将身体撑起踏上踏板，同时将左膝向胸部方向抬起。
在动作顶端进行肱二头肌弯举，弯曲手肘将哑铃拉向肩部。
将哑铃放下，同时将左脚放回地面。
换另一侧重复动作，左脚踏上踏板的同时进行哑铃弯举。
两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface. Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the bench or step, straightening your right leg. Bring your left foot up onto the bench or step, standing fully upright. Step back down with your left foot, followed by your right foot, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双手各持一个哑铃，面对凳子或台阶站立，手掌朝向身体。将右脚放在凳子或台阶上，确保整只脚都与支撑面接触。通过右脚脚跟发力，将身体向上撑起，右腿伸直。然后将左脚也踏上凳子或台阶，完全站立。左脚先向下踏回地面，接着右脚也踏回，恢复起始姿势。重复所需次数后，换腿进行。

en: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the bench or step, straightening your right leg.
Bring your left foot up onto the bench or step, standing fully upright.
Step back down with your left foot, followed by your right foot, returning to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双手各持一个哑铃，面对凳子或台阶站立，手掌朝向身体。
将右脚放在凳子或台阶上，确保整只脚都与支撑面接触。
通过右脚脚跟发力，将身体向上撑起，右腿伸直。
将左脚也踏上凳子或台阶，完全站立。
左脚先向下踏回地面，接着右脚也踏回，恢复起始姿势。
重复所需次数后，换腿进行。

instructions.en: Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides. Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface. Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well. Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step. Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time. Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体两侧，站在踏板或平台前。将右脚放在踏板上，确保整个脚掌都踩在台面上。通过右脚后跟发力，将身体向上推起踏上踏板，同时将左脚顺势抬起踏上踏板。当双脚都稳稳站在踏板上后，将左脚缓缓放下回到起始位置，右脚保持在踏板上。重复进行动作，每次交替使用不同的脚踏上踏板。按照所需的重复次数继续练习。

en: Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface.
Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well.
Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step.
Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time.
Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝向身体两侧，站在踏板或平台前。
将右脚放在踏板上，确保整个脚掌都踩在台面上。
通过右脚后跟发力，将身体向上推起踏上踏板，同时将左脚顺势抬起踏上踏板。
当双脚都稳稳站在踏板上后，将左脚缓缓放下回到起始位置，右脚保持在踏板上。
重复进行动作，每次交替使用不同的脚踏上踏板。
按照所需的重复次数继续练习。

instructions.en: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface. Step up onto the bench or step with your right foot, pushing through your heel to lift your body up. As you step up, simultaneously lift your left knee towards your chest. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your left foot back to the ground while keeping your right foot on the bench or step. Repeat the movement with your left foot on the bench or step. Continue alternating between your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，站在长凳或踏板前。将右脚放在长凳或踏板上，确保整个脚掌都与支撑面接触。右脚发力向上踏上长凳或踏板，通过脚跟推动将身体抬起。踏上踏板的同时，左膝向胸部方向抬起。在动作最高点暂停，然后慢慢将左脚放回地面，同时保持右脚在长凳或踏板上。换左脚踏上长凳或踏板重复动作。持续左右脚交替进行至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand in front of a bench or step with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Place your right foot on the bench or step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step up onto the bench or step with your right foot, pushing through your heel to lift your body up.
As you step up, simultaneously lift your left knee towards your chest.
Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your left foot back to the ground while keeping your right foot on the bench or step.
Repeat the movement with your left foot on the bench or step.
Continue alternating between your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体，站在长凳或踏板前。
将右脚放在长凳或踏板上，确保整个脚掌都与支撑面接触。
右脚发力向上踏上长凳或踏板，通过脚跟推动将身体抬起。
踏上踏板的同时，左膝向胸部方向抬起。
在动作最高点暂停，然后慢慢将左脚放回地面，同时保持右脚在长凳或踏板上。
换左脚踏上长凳或踏板重复动作。
持续左右脚交替进行至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees. Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，采用正握方式。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，膝盖保持微屈。将哑铃下放至腘绳肌有拉伸感，然后收缩臀肌、脚跟蹬地发力，起身回到起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees.
Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个哑铃，采用正握方式。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，膝盖保持微屈。
将哑铃下放至腘绳肌有拉伸感，然后收缩臀肌、脚跟蹬地发力，起身回到起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳子一端，双脚稳固地踩在地面上。双手握住一个哑铃，双臂向上伸直举至胸部上方。保持手臂伸直，以弧形轨迹缓慢将哑铃下放至头后方。稍作停顿后，再将哑铃举回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet planted firmly on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc-like motion.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，头部位于凳子一端，双脚稳固地踩在地面上。
双手握住一个哑铃，双臂向上伸直举至胸部上方。
保持手臂伸直，以弧形轨迹缓慢将哑铃下放至头后方。
稍作停顿后，再将哑铃举回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward. Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，将哑铃下放至接近地面。随着哑铃下降，躯干逐渐向前倾斜，直到感觉腘绳肌有拉伸感，膝盖保持微微弯曲。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将躯干抬起回到起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward.
Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握方式握住哑铃。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，屈髋向前俯身，将哑铃下放至接近地面，躯干随之向前倾斜。
继续下放哑铃直至感觉腘绳肌有明显的拉伸感，膝盖保持微微弯曲。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后主动收缩臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将躯干抬起回到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards. Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended. Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight. Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight. Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body. Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖外展。双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直位于身体前侧。屈膝下蹲，臀部向后下方坐，使身体呈深蹲姿势，同时保持背部平直。将哑铃从双腿间放下，手臂保持伸直。通过脚后跟发力，伸展髋关节和膝关节，将哑铃从两腿间拉起至身体前侧。动作顶端用力夹紧臀部，然后控制速度将哑铃放回双腿间。重复至目标次数。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight.
Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body.
Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖外展。
双手握住哑铃，双臂伸直位于身体前侧。
屈膝下蹲，臀部向后下方坐，使身体呈深蹲姿势，同时保持背部平直。
将哑铃从双腿间放下，手臂保持伸直。
通过脚后跟发力，伸展髋关节和膝关节，将哑铃从两腿间拉起至身体前侧。
动作顶端用力夹紧臀部，然后控制速度将哑铃放回双腿间。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于身体两侧。保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推的方式缓慢下蹲。继续下降直到大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力起身，恢复到起始姿势。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃置于身体两侧。
保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推的方式缓慢下蹲。
继续下降直到大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力起身，恢复到起始姿势。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you. Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height. Rotate your wrists back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。将哑铃举至肩部高度，然后旋转手腕使掌心朝外。将哑铃向上推举直至手臂完全伸直，然后下降至肩部高度。再次旋转手腕回到起始位置，按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you.
Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height.
Rotate your wrists back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，掌心相对。
将哑铃举至肩部高度，然后旋转手腕使掌心朝外。
将哑铃向上推举直至手臂完全伸直，然后下降至肩部高度。
再次旋转手腕回到起始位置，按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: dumbbell tricep kickback with stork stance
name.zh: 哑铃单腿站立肱三头肌后伸

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps. Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握一只哑铃。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。将右肘抬至身侧，保持90度弯曲。将右臂向后伸直，收缩肱三头肌。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降至起始位置。重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps.
Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握一只哑铃。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
将右肘抬至身侧，保持90度弯曲。
将右臂向后伸直，收缩肱三头肌。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降至起始位置。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face towards you at the bottom of the movement. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then reverse the movement by pressing the dumbbells back up to the starting position. As you press the dumbbells up, twist your wrists back to the starting position with palms facing away from you. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手各握一只哑铃，采用正握方式，掌心朝外。将手臂伸直举至胸部上方，手肘保持微屈。将哑铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。在下放过程中旋转手腕，使掌心在动作底部朝向身体。在底部稍作停顿，然后反向发力将哑铃推回起始位置。推起时手腕再次旋转回起始位置，掌心恢复朝外。重复至所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you.
Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face towards you at the bottom of the movement.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then reverse the movement by pressing the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
As you press the dumbbells up, twist your wrists back to the starting position with palms facing away from you.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手各握一只哑铃，采用正握方式，掌心朝外。
将手臂伸直举至胸部上方，手肘保持微屈。
将哑铃下放至胸部，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
在下放过程中旋转手腕，使掌心在动作底部朝向身体。
在底部稍作停顿，然后反向发力将哑铃推回起始位置。
推起时手腕再次旋转回起始位置，掌心恢复朝外。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握方式。哑铃自然垂于大腿前侧，手臂完全伸直。保持背部挺直、核心收紧，呼气的同时将哑铃垂直向上提拉至下巴高度，手肘引领动作。到达顶峰位置时稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握方式。
哑铃自然垂于大腿前侧，手臂完全伸直。
保持背部挺直、核心收紧，呼气的同时将哑铃垂直向上提拉至下巴高度，手肘引领动作。
到达顶峰位置时稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip. Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body. Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握方式。哑铃自然垂于大腿前侧，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝向身体。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧，呼气的同时将哑铃垂直向上提拉至下巴高度，以肘部为主导发力。持续上提直到哑铃达到肩部高度，此时肘部应向身体两侧展开。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，采用正握方式。
哑铃自然垂于大腿前侧，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝向身体。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧，呼气的同时将哑铃垂直向上提拉至下巴高度，以肘部为主导发力。
持续上提直到哑铃达到肩部高度，此时肘部应向身体两侧展开。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。将双臂向身体两侧举起至与地面平行的位置，保持肘部微微弯曲。手臂保持原有位置进行外旋，将哑铃向上朝头部方向旋转。到达顶端时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。重复进行至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。
双臂向身体两侧举起至与地面平行，保持肘部微微弯曲。
保持肘部位置不变，手臂进行外旋，将哑铃向上朝头部方向旋转。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
重复进行至所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in. Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前。上臂贴近身体两侧，肘部内收。慢慢将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，保持手腕伸直。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in.
Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝前。
上臂贴近身体两侧，肘部内收。
慢慢将哑铃向肩部方向弯举，保持手腕伸直。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝前。将哑铃举至肩部高度，手肘弯曲，保持手掌朝前姿势。将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。慢慢将哑铃放回肩部高度。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝前。
将哑铃举至肩部高度，手肘弯曲，保持手掌朝前姿势。
将哑铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
慢慢将哑铃放回肩部高度。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body. Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward. Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary. At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体。保持大臂贴近躯干，同时将掌心旋转朝向前方。将哑铃弯举至肩部高度，全程保持上臂固定不动。在动作顶点时，旋转手腕使掌心朝向身体外侧。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时将掌心旋转回朝向身体。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward.
Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 身体直立，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心朝向身体
保持大臂贴近躯干，同时将掌心旋转朝向前方
将哑铃弯举至肩部高度，全程保持上臂固定不动
在动作顶点时，旋转手腕使掌心朝向身体外侧
慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时将掌心旋转回朝向身体
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

name.zh: 哑铃佐特曼牧师椅弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad. Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up. At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down. Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝上，手肘放在垫子上支撑。将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，保持上臂固定不动，手掌始终朝上。在弯举的最高点，旋转手腕使掌心朝下。慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时将手腕转回初始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad.
Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up.
At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝上，手肘放在垫子上支撑。
将哑铃向肩膀方向弯举，保持上臂固定不动，手掌始终朝上。
在弯举的最高点，旋转手腕使掌心朝下。
慢慢将哑铃放回起始位置，同时将手腕转回初始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 坐姿哑铃肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head. Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears. Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。双手握住哑铃，采用正握方式将其举过头顶。弯曲肘部，将哑铃下放至头后侧，保持上臂贴近耳朵。伸展手臂，将哑铃举回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head.
Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。
双手正握哑铃，将其举过头顶。
弯曲肘部，将哑铃下放至头后侧，保持上臂贴近耳朵。
伸展手臂，将哑铃举回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground. Slowly bring your arms forward, crossing them in front of your body. Feel the stretch in your chest muscles. Hold the stretch for 10-30 seconds. Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立。双臂向身体两侧伸直，与地面保持平行。缓慢将双臂向前移动，使其在胸前交叉。感受胸部肌肉的拉伸。保持该姿势10-30秒。恢复至起始位置，并根据需要的重复次数进行重复练习。

en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Slowly bring your arms forward, crossing them in front of your body.
Feel the stretch in your chest muscles.
Hold the stretch for 10-30 seconds.
Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立。
双臂向身体两侧伸直，与地面保持平行。
缓慢将双臂向前移动，使其在胸前交叉。
感受胸部肌肉的拉伸。
保持该姿势10-30秒。
恢复至起始位置，并根据需要的重复次数进行重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips. Slide your hips forward off the bench and straighten your legs, keeping your heels on the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子边缘，双手握住边缘，位于臀部两侧。将臀部向前滑动离开凳面，腿伸直，脚跟着地。弯曲肘关节，将身体向地面方向下降，同时保持背部靠近凳子。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过双手用力推直手臂，将身体抬起回到起始位置。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Slide your hips forward off the bench and straighten your legs, keeping your heels on the ground.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子边缘，双手握住位于臀部两侧的边缘。
将臀部向前滑动离开凳面，腿伸直，脚跟着地。
弯曲肘关节，将身体向地面方向下降，同时保持背部靠近凳子。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过双手用力推直手臂，将身体抬起回到起始位置。
重复进行所需的次数。

name.zh: 肘部提拉 - 反向俯卧撑

instructions.en: Start by lying face down on the ground with your legs extended and your hands placed directly under your shoulders. Engage your core and press through your palms to lift your upper body off the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause at the top for a moment, squeezing your upper back muscles. Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先俯卧在地面上，双腿伸直，双手放在肩膀正下方。收紧核心肌群，通过手掌发力将上半身抬离地面，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。在顶端位置稍作停顿，充分挤压上背部肌肉。然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by lying face down on the ground with your legs extended and your hands placed directly under your shoulders.
Engage your core and press through your palms to lift your upper body off the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Pause at the top for a moment, squeezing your upper back muscles.
Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先俯卧在地面上，双腿伸直，双手放在肩膀正下方。
收紧核心肌群，通过手掌发力将上半身抬离地面，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。
在顶端位置稍作停顿，充分挤压上背部肌肉。
缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee. At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and your right knee towards your left elbow. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面。双手放在头后，手肘向两侧展开。收紧腹肌，抬起上半身，同时将右肘向左侧膝盖靠拢，左膝向右侧手肘靠近，形成一个扭转的动作。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放下上半身，将双腿伸直回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复动作，将左肘向右侧膝盖靠近，右膝向左侧手肘靠拢。继续交替进行所需次数。

en: Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and your right knee towards your left elbow.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面。
双手放在头后，手肘向两侧展开。
收紧腹肌，抬起上半身，同时将右肘向左侧膝盖靠拢，左膝向右侧手肘靠近，形成扭转动作。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放下上半身，将双腿伸直回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复动作，将左肘向右侧膝盖靠近，右膝向左侧手肘靠拢。
继续交替进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Place your hands on your hips or cross them in front of your chest. Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the waist, lowering your upper body towards the ground. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your upper body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双手放在髋部或交叉放在胸前。保持背部挺直，慢慢向前弯腰，将上半身向地面方向降低。在底部稍停片刻，然后慢慢将上半身抬起回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Place your hands on your hips or cross them in front of your chest.
Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the waist, lowering your upper body towards the ground.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your upper body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手放在髋部或交叉放在胸前。
保持背部挺直，慢慢向前弯腰，将上半身向地面方向降低。
在底部稍停片刻，然后慢慢将上半身抬起回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides. Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，保持背部挺直。双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝内，手臂自然垂于身体两侧。收紧核心肌群，然后缓慢地将一只手臂向上抬起至肩部高度，保持肘部略微弯曲。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。换另一只手臂重复同样的动作。持续交替双臂完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides.
Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Repeat the movement with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，保持背部挺直。
双手各持一个哑铃，掌心朝内，手臂自然垂于身体两侧。
收紧核心肌群，然后缓慢地将一只手臂向上抬起至肩部高度，保持肘部略微弯曲。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将手臂放下回到起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复同样的动作。
持续交替双臂完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: exercise ball back extension with arms extended
name.zh: 健身球背伸展（手臂前伸）

aliases: 健身球背伸展手臂前伸

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, with your palms facing down. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight and your neck in line with your spine. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地面上，身体俯卧在球上，髋部靠在球上，双脚抵住墙壁以保持稳定。双臂向前伸直，手掌朝下。收紧核心，缓慢抬起上半身离开球面，保持背部挺直，颈部与脊柱保持一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身降低回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, with your palms facing down.
Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight and your neck in line with your spine.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球放在地面上，身体俯卧在球上，髋部靠在球上，双脚抵住墙壁以保持稳定。
双臂向前伸直，手掌朝下。
收紧核心，缓慢抬起上半身离开球面，保持背部挺直，颈部与脊柱保持一条直线。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身降低回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.en: exercise ball back extension with hands behind head
name.zh: 健身球俯卧背伸展（双手抱头）

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it with your hips resting on the ball. Position your feet against a wall or other stable surface for support. Cross your arms behind your head, with your hands touching the back of your head. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your hips. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地面上，俯卧在球上，使髋部支撑在球上。双脚抵住墙壁或其他稳固的表面以保持稳定。将双臂交叉放在头后，双手触碰头的后部。收紧核心肌群，缓慢地将上半身抬离健身球，伸展背部直至从头到髋部形成一条直线。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将上半身降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it with your hips resting on the ball.
Position your feet against a wall or other stable surface for support.
Cross your arms behind your head, with your hands touching the back of your head.
Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your hips.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球放在地面上，俯卧在球上，使髋部支撑在球上。
双脚抵住墙壁或其他稳固的表面以保持稳定。
将双臂交叉放在头后，双手触碰头的后部。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢地将上半身抬离健身球，伸展背部直至从头到髋部形成一条直线。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将上半身降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: exercise ball back extension with knees off ground
name.zh: 健身球俯卧背伸展（膝盖离地）

aliases: 健身球背伸展膝盖离地

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability. Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地面上，俯卧在球上，髋部置于球面上，双脚靠墙以保持稳定。双手置于头后或交叉放于胸前。收紧核心肌群，缓慢将上半身抬离健身球，充分伸展背部，直到从头到脚跟呈一条直线。在顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将上半身降回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest.
Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球放在地面上，俯卧在球上，髋部置于球面上，双脚靠墙以保持稳定。
双手置于头后或交叉放于胸前。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢将上半身抬离健身球，充分伸展背部，直到从头到脚跟呈一条直线。
在顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将上半身降回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

name.en: exercise ball back extension with rotation

instructions.en: Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable. Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side. Lower your upper body back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为俯卧在健身球上，髋部置于球上，双脚稳稳踩在地面。将双手置于头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将上半身抬离球面，伸展背部直至从头到脚跟呈一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将躯干向一侧旋转，同时保持髋部和腿部稳定。回到中心位置后，向另一侧重复旋转动作。将上半身慢慢放回起始位置，按要求的次数重复进行。

en: Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side.
Lower your upper body back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为俯卧在健身球上，髋部置于球上，双脚稳稳踩在地面。
将双手置于头后或交叉放在胸前。
收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将上半身抬离球面，伸展背部直至从头到脚跟呈一条直线。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将躯干向一侧旋转，同时保持髋部和腿部稳定。
回到中心位置后，向另一侧重复旋转动作。
将上半身慢慢放回起始位置，按要求的次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward. Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms. Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 端坐于健身球上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。将双手置于臀部两侧的球面上，手指朝前。收紧肱三头肌，通过手掌向下推球将身体撑起，手臂伸直。通过弯曲肘部将身体下降回球面，肘部紧贴身体两侧。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms.
Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 端坐于健身球上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。
将双手置于臀部两侧的球面上，手指朝前。
收紧肱三头肌，通过手掌向下推球将身体撑起，手臂伸直。
通过弯曲肘部将身体下降回球面，肘部紧贴身体两侧。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it. Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight. Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地上，跪在它前面。把右脚放在健身球上，膝盖弯曲呈90度。左腿向后伸直，保持腿部挺直。身体向前倾斜，臀部向健身球方向推压，直到感觉右髋屈肌有拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
zh: 将健身球放在地上，跪在它前面。
把右脚放在健身球上，膝盖弯曲呈90度。
左腿向后伸直，保持腿部挺直。
身体向前倾斜，臀部向健身球方向推压，直到感觉右髋屈肌有拉伸感。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复。

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold the stability ball with both hands, hugging it close to your chest. Engage your core muscles and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight and your feet planted on the ground. Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your back muscles. Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。双手握住健身球，将其紧贴胸部。收缩核心肌群，慢慢向后倾斜，保持背部挺直，双脚踩在地上。继续向后倾斜，直到感觉到背部肌肉被拉伸。保持该姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold the stability ball with both hands, hugging it close to your chest.
Engage your core muscles and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight and your feet planted on the ground.
Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your back muscles.
Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地上，背部挺直。
双手握住健身球，将其紧贴胸部。
收缩核心肌群，慢慢向后倾斜，保持背部挺直，双脚踩在地上。
继续向后倾斜，直到感觉到背部肌肉被拉伸。
保持该姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up overhead. Slowly lean to the opposite side, feeling a stretch in your lat muscle. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地面，背部挺直。一只手握住哑铃，将手臂伸直举过头顶。慢慢向相反方向倾斜，感受背阔肌的拉伸。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后回到起始位置。换另一侧重复。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up overhead.
Slowly lean to the opposite side, feeling a stretch in your lat muscle.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 坐在稳定球上，双脚平放在地面，背部挺直。
一只手握住哑铃，将手臂伸直举过头顶。
慢慢向相反方向倾斜，感受背阔肌的拉伸。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后回到起始位置。
换另一侧重复。

name.zh: 健身球下背部拉伸（金字塔式）

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball down your back until your lower back is resting on the ball. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, allowing your lower back to stretch over the ball. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双脚慢慢向前走动，使健身球沿背部向下滚动，直到下背部靠在球上。将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧核心肌群，慢慢将上半身向地面方向下降，让下背部在健身球上充分伸展。保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。根据需要重复动作。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball down your back until your lower back is resting on the ball.
Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, allowing your lower back to stretch over the ball.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
双脚慢慢向前走动，使健身球沿背部向下滚动，直到下背部靠在球上。
将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。
收紧核心肌群，慢慢将上半身向地面方向下降，让下背部在健身球上充分伸展。
保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: exercise ball lying side lat stretch
name.zh: 健身球侧卧背阔肌拉伸

aliases: 健身球侧卧背阔肌拉伸

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by the stability ball. Place your top arm on the ball for stability. Reach your top arm overhead and allow your torso to rotate slightly. Feel the stretch in your lat muscles on the side of your body. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
instructions.zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿伸直，头部靠在健身球上。上侧手臂放在球上以保持身体稳定。将上侧手臂举过头顶，同时让躯干轻微旋转。感受身体侧面背阔肌的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复。

en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by the stability ball.
Place your top arm on the ball for stability.
Reach your top arm overhead and allow your torso to rotate slightly.
Feel the stretch in your lat muscles on the side of your body.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿伸直，头部靠在健身球上。
将上侧手臂放在球上以保持身体稳定。
将上侧手臂举过头顶，同时让躯干轻微旋转。
感受身体侧面背阔肌的拉伸感。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复。

name.en: exercise ball on the wall calf raise

instructions.en: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall. Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides. Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 背靠墙站立，将健身球置于下背部和墙壁之间。双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖朝前。双手各持一个哑铃，手臂自然垂于身体两侧。将脚跟抬离地面，身体重量向上转移到前脚掌。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 背靠墙站立，将健身球置于下背部和墙壁之间。
双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖朝前。
双手各持一个哑铃，手臂自然垂于身体两侧。
将脚跟抬离地面，身体重量向上转移到前脚掌。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.en: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between ankles)
name.zh: 墙壁健身球提踵（踝间夹网球）

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides. Place a tennis ball between your ankles. Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向墙壁站立，双脚与肩同宽。将健身球放在墙壁与下背部之间，双手各持一个哑铃，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。在两脚踝之间夹一个网球。脚跟抬离地面，身体向上踮起脚尖。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下，恢复起始姿势。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Place a tennis ball between your ankles.
Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向墙壁站立，双脚与肩同宽。
将健身球放在墙壁与下背部之间。
双手各持一个哑铃，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。
在两脚踝之间夹一个网球。
脚跟抬离地面，身体向上踮起脚尖。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下，恢复起始姿势。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.en: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between knees)
name.zh: 靠墙健身球提踵（膝间夹网球）

instructions.en: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides. Place a tennis ball between your knees. Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 背靠墙站立，将健身球置于下背部与墙壁之间。双脚与肩同宽，稍向前分开。双手各持一只哑铃，手臂在身体两侧自然下垂。将网球夹在两膝之间。双脚踮起，将身体向上抬起，脚跟离地。顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢将脚跟放下，恢复至起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Place a tennis ball between your knees.
Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 背靠墙站立，将健身球置于下背部与墙壁之间。
双脚与肩同宽站立，稍向前分开。
双手各持一只哑铃，手臂在身体两侧自然下垂。
将网球夹在两膝之间。
双脚踮起，脚跟离地，身体向上抬起。
在顶部稍作停留，然后慢慢将脚跟放下，恢复至起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: exercise ball one leg prone lower body rotation
name.zh: 健身球单腿俯卧腿部旋转

instructions.en: Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you. Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support. Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body. Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor. Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position. Repeat the rotation with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面朝下趴在健身球上，髋部置于球上，双腿向后伸直。双手撑在地面前方以保持身体平衡。收紧臀部和核心肌群来稳定身体。慢慢抬起一条腿，保持伸直并与地面平行。在保持髋部和上半身稳定的同时，将腿向外旋转远离身体。旋转到最大限度时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将腿放回起始位置。换另一条腿重复旋转动作。双腿交替进行所需次数。

en: Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Repeat the rotation with the other leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面朝下趴在健身球上，髋部置于球上，双腿向后伸直。
双手撑在地面前方以保持身体平衡。
收紧臀部和核心肌群来稳定身体。
慢慢抬起一条腿，保持伸直并与地面平行。
在保持髋部和上半身稳定的同时，将腿向外旋转远离身体。
旋转到最大限度时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将腿放回起始位置。
换另一条腿重复旋转动作。
双腿交替进行所需次数。

name.en: exercise ball one legged diagonal kick hamstring curl
name.zh: 健身球单腿对角线踢腘绳肌弯举

aliases: 单腿健身球腘绳肌弯举

instructions.en: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball. Place your arms by your sides for stability. Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels. Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed. Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings. Slowly return your right leg to the starting position, maintaining control and stability. Repeat the movement with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为仰卧，双腿伸直，脚后跟放在健身球上。双手放在身体两侧以保持身体稳定。收紧臀肌和核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使肩部到脚后跟呈一条直线。弯曲右膝，将右膝向胸部靠拢，同时保持左腿伸直、脚背绷直。向右腿斜向踢出，完全伸展右腿，收紧腘绳肌。慢慢将右腿回到起始位置，保持对身体控制和稳定。换左腿重复同样的动作，左右腿交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball.
Place your arms by your sides for stability.
Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels.
Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed.
Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings.
Slowly return your right leg to the starting position, maintaining control and stability.
Repeat the movement with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧，双腿伸直，脚后跟放在健身球上。
双手放在身体两侧以保持身体稳定。
收紧臀肌和核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使肩部到脚后跟呈一条直线。
弯曲右膝，将右膝向胸部靠拢，同时保持左腿伸直、脚背绷直。
向右腿斜向踢出，完全伸展右腿，收紧腘绳肌。
慢慢将右腿回到起始位置，保持对身体控制和稳定。
换左腿重复同样的动作，左右腿交替进行所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands on the floor and your shins resting on the stability ball. Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, rolling the ball towards your hands. Keep your legs straight and your body in a pike position, forming an inverted V shape. Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the floor, keeping your head in line with your hands. Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑，双手撑地，小腿搭在健身球上。收紧核心肌群，将髋部向上抬起，同时将健身球向双手方向滚动。保持双腿伸直，身体呈倒V形的屈体姿势。弯曲手肘，将上半身向地面方向降低，保持头部与双手在同一直线上。双手发力推地，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。重复完成所需次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands on the floor and your shins resting on the stability ball.
Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, rolling the ball towards your hands.
Keep your legs straight and your body in a pike position, forming an inverted V shape.
Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the floor, keeping your head in line with your hands.
Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑，双手撑地，小腿搭在健身球上。
收紧核心肌群，将髋部向上抬起，同时将健身球向双手方向滚动。
保持双腿伸直，身体呈倒V形的屈体姿势。
弯曲手肘，将上半身向地面方向降低，保持头部与双手在同一直线上。
双手发力推地，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a mat with your legs extended and your toes resting on top of the stability ball. Place your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart, and engage your core muscles. Keeping your legs straight, slowly lift them off the ground, using your lower back and glutes to raise them as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下躺在垫子上，双腿伸直，脚尖搭在健身球顶部。双手撑地，与肩同宽，收紧核心肌群。保持双腿伸直，缓慢将双腿抬离地面，利用下背部和臀部肌肉尽可能抬到最高点。在最高点停留片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie face down on a mat with your legs extended and your toes resting on top of the stability ball.
Place your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart, and engage your core muscles.
Keeping your legs straight, slowly lift them off the ground, using your lower back and glutes to raise them as high as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下躺在垫子上，双腿伸直，脚尖搭在健身球顶部。
双手撑地，与肩同宽，收紧核心肌群。
保持双腿伸直，缓慢将双腿抬离地面，利用下背部和臀部肌肉尽可能抬到最高点。
在最高点停留片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.zh: 健身球坐姿腘绳肌拉伸

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you. Place your hands on your hips for support. Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted. Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds. Slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your heels and using your hamstrings to pull yourself back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。慢慢向前滚动健身球，同时双脚交替向前迈步，直到上背部支撑在球上，双腿在身前伸直。将双手放在髋部以保持支撑。收紧核心肌群，慢慢将上半身向地面方向下放，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起。当感觉到腘绳肌被拉伸时停止动作，保持该姿势20-30秒。通过脚后跟用力，并利用腘绳肌的力量将自己拉回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you.
Place your hands on your hips for support.
Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted.
Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds.
Slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your heels and using your hamstrings to pull yourself back up.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
慢慢向前滚动健身球，同时双脚交替向前迈步，直到上背部支撑在球上，双腿在身前伸直。
将双手放在髋部以保持支撑。
收紧核心肌群，慢慢将上半身向地面方向下放，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起。
当感觉到腘绳肌被拉伸时停止动作，保持该姿势20-30秒。
通过脚后跟用力，并利用腘绳肌的力量将自己拉回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 健身球坐姿肱三头肌拉伸

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head. Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat with the other arm.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。双手握住一个哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。弯曲肘部，将哑铃下放至头后方，同时保持上臂贴近耳朵。保持这个拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始位置。换另一只手臂重复上述动作。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head.
Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Repeat with the other arm.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，背部保持挺直。
一只手握住哑铃，将手臂向上伸直举过头顶。
弯曲肘部，将哑铃下放至头后方，同时保持上臂贴近耳朵。
保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始位置。
换另一只手臂重复上述动作。

name.zh: 健身球坐姿肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling. Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears. Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手握住哑铃，将双臂向上伸直指向天花板。慢慢将哑铃降低到头后侧，同时保持肘部紧贴耳朵。保持片刻，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
双手握住哑铃，将双臂向上伸直指向天花板。
慢慢将哑铃降低到头后侧，保持肘部紧贴耳朵。
保持片刻，然后将哑铃举回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

name.en: ez bar french press on exercise ball

instructions.en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold an EZ barbell with an overhand grip. Extend your arms straight up, keeping your elbows close to your head. Slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双手正握EZ杠铃。将手臂向上伸直，手肘靠近头部。通过弯曲手肘慢慢将杠铃下放至头后。稍作停顿，然后将手臂向上伸直回到起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Sit on an exercise ball and hold an EZ barbell with an overhand grip.
Extend your arms straight up, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双手正握EZ杠铃。
将手臂向上伸直，手肘靠近头部。
通过弯曲手肘慢慢将杠铃下放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后将手臂向上伸直回到起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: ez bar lying bent arms pullover

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor. Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows. Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，头部位于凳的一端，双脚平放于地面。双手以反握方式握住EZ杠铃，间距与肩同宽。将双臂伸直举至胸部上方，保持肘部微屈。沿弧线轨迹将杠铃下放至头后，注意全程保持肘部轻微弯曲。稍作停顿后，沿原弧线轨迹将杠铃返回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows.
