Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，头部位于凳的一端，双脚平放于地面。
双手以反握方式握住EZ杠铃，间距与肩同宽。
将双臂伸直举至胸部上方，保持肘部微屈。
沿弧线轨迹将杠铃下放至头后，保持肘部轻微弯曲。
稍作停顿后，沿原弧线轨迹将杠铃返回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

name.en: ez bar lying close grip triceps extension behind head

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench. Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在平板凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部位于凳端。双手窄握EZ杠铃，掌心向上，将手臂伸直举至胸部上方。保持上臂固定不动，屈肘将杠铃慢慢下放至头后。停顿片刻，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在平板凳上，双脚平放在地面，头部位于凳端。
双手窄握EZ杠铃，掌心向上，将手臂伸直举至胸部上方。
保持上臂固定不动，屈肘将杠铃慢慢下放至头后。
停顿片刻，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: ez bar reverse grip bent over row

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and hands shoulder-width apart. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor. Pull the ez barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双手采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，掌心向上，手间距与肩同宽。髋关节屈曲向前俯身，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，直到躯干几乎与地面平行。将EZ杠铃向身体方向拉向胸部下侧，充分挤压肩胛骨。在动作最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将EZ杠铃放回起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and hands shoulder-width apart.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Pull the ez barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，掌心向上，手间距与肩同宽。
髋关节屈曲向前俯身，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，直到躯干几乎与地面平行。
将EZ杠铃向身体方向拉向胸部下侧，充分挤压肩胛骨。
在动作最高点停顿片刻，然后缓慢将EZ杠铃放回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: ez bar seated close grip concentration curl
name.zh: EZ杠铃坐姿窄握集中弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip. Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee. Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary. Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，双手握住EZ杠铃，采用反握姿势。将肘部靠在大腿内侧，膝盖上方位置。保持上臂固定不动，将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向。在动作顶峰充分收缩肱二头肌，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip.
Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放于地面，双手握住EZ杠铃，采用反握姿势。
将肘部靠在大腿内侧，膝盖上方位置。
保持上臂固定不动，将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向。
在动作顶峰充分收缩肱二头肌，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip. Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握EZ杠铃。将杠铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。保持上臂贴近头部，屈肘将杠铃慢慢下放至头后。稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握EZ杠铃。
将杠铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。
保持上臂贴近头部，屈肘将杠铃慢慢下放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip. Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward. Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully. Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握EZ杠铃。将杠铃提至肩部高度，手肘微屈，掌心朝前。将杠铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。将杠铃落回肩部高度，重复至所需的次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward.
Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握EZ杠铃。
将杠铃提至肩部高度，手肘微屈，掌心朝前。
将杠铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。
将杠铃落回肩部高度，重复至所需的次数。

name.en: ez barbell close grip preacher curl

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip. Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight. Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师椅上，将上臂放在训练垫上，反握EZ杠铃。肱三头肌靠在垫子上，手臂完全伸展，保持背部挺直。慢慢将杠铃向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。在顶端稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师椅上，将上臂放在训练垫上，反握EZ杠铃。
肱三头肌靠在垫子上，手臂完全伸展，保持背部挺直。
慢慢将杠铃向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。
在顶端稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement. Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽，直立站好，采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，双手间距与肩同宽。动作全程保持肘部紧贴身体两侧，上臂固定不动。将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向，充分收缩肱二头肌。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，双手间距与肩同宽。
保持肘部紧贴身体两侧，上臂在动作全程保持固定。
将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向，同时收缩肱二头肌。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement. Exhale as you curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，手掌朝上。在整个动作过程中，保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向，充分收缩肱二头肌。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Exhale as you curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，手掌朝上。
动作全程保持肘部贴近躯干，上臂固定不动。
呼气的同时将杠铃向上弯举至肩部方向，充分收缩肱二头肌。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: ez barbell decline close grip face press

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet. Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 躺在下斜凳上，确保头部位置低于双脚。双手以窄握方式握住EZ杠铃，掌心相对。将手臂向上伸直举至胸部上方，同时保持肘部贴近身体。通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃下放至额头前方。短暂停顿后，将杠铃向上推回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet.
Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 躺在下斜凳上，确保头部位置低于双脚。
双手以窄握方式握住EZ杠铃，掌心相对。
将手臂向上伸直举至胸部上方，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃下放至额头前方。
短暂停顿后，将杠铃向上推回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: EZ杠铃下斜肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and your feet secured. Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head. Lower the barbell slowly towards your forehead, bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，确保头部低于脚部，双脚固定好。双手正握EZ杠铃，握距与肩同宽。将双臂完全伸直，肘部贴近头部。慢慢将杠铃向额头方向下放，弯曲肘部。稍作停顿，然后将双臂回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and your feet secured.
Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Lower the barbell slowly towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在下斜凳上，确保头部低于脚部，双脚固定好。
双手正握EZ杠铃，握距与肩同宽。
将双臂完全伸直，肘部贴近头部。
慢慢将杠铃向额头方向下放，弯曲肘部。
稍作停顿，然后将双臂回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: EZ杠铃斜板肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip. Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head. Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先将斜凳调至45度角，坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双手握住EZ杠铃，掌心朝下。手臂完全举过头顶，手肘贴近头部。通过弯曲手肘将杠铃下放至头后方，保持上臂固定不动。稍作停顿后，将手臂伸直回到起始位置。按照目标次数重复练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜凳调至45度角
坐在凳子上，背部紧贴靠垫，双手握住EZ杠铃，掌心朝下
手臂完全举过头顶，手肘贴近头部
弯曲手肘将杠铃下放至头后方，保持上臂固定不动
稍作停顿后将手臂伸直回到起始位置
按照目标次数重复练习

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the ez barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手反握EZ杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。收缩肱三头肌发力，将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂充分伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the ez barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手反握EZ杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
收缩肱三头肌发力，将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂充分伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise. Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as you inhale. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，反手握住EZ杠铃。练习过程中，始终保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂不要移动。呼气时，收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向上弯举。继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃达到肩部高度。在肱二头肌最大收缩位置短暂停顿并用力挤压。吸气时，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling.
Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立，反手握住EZ杠铃。
练习过程中，始终保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂保持固定不动。
呼气时，收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向上弯举。
继续将杠铃举至肱二头肌完全收缩、杠铃达到肩部高度。
在肱二头肌最大收缩位置短暂停顿，并用力挤压。
吸气时，缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: ez barbell reverse grip preacher curl

instructions.en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在牧师凳上，将胸部靠在垫子上，双脚平放在地面。双手反握EZ杠铃，握距与肩同宽。将上臂放在垫子上，让前臂自然下垂。上臂保持固定不动，呼气并将杠铃向上弯举至肩部。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在牧师凳上，将胸部靠在垫子上，双脚平放在地面。
双手反握EZ杠铃，握距与肩同宽。
将上臂放在垫子上，让前臂自然下垂。
上臂保持固定不动，呼气并将杠铃向上弯举至肩部。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the ez barbell to hang down in front of you. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the ez barbell upwards towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，保持背部挺直。采用反握姿势握住EZ杠铃，掌心朝上，双手与肩同宽。将上臂放在大腿上，让EZ杠铃自然垂于身体前侧。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将EZ杠铃向上弯举至肩膀高度。在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢地将EZ杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the ez barbell to hang down in front of you.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the ez barbell upwards towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，保持背部挺直。
采用反握姿势握住EZ杠铃，掌心朝上，双手与肩同宽。
将上臂放在大腿上，让EZ杠铃自然垂于身体前侧。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将EZ杠铃向上弯举至肩膀高度。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢地将EZ杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms stationary, lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。双手以肩同宽的正握姿势握住EZ杠铃。将杠铃举至头顶上方，手臂完全伸直。上臂保持固定不动，通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃下放至头后部。稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手臂将杠铃举回起始位置。按要求的次数重复练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面。
双手以肩同宽的正握姿势握住EZ杠铃。
将杠铃举至头顶上方，手臂完全伸直。
上臂保持固定不动，通过弯曲肘关节将杠铃下放至头后部。
稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手臂将杠铃举回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，反手握住EZ杠铃，掌心向上。将上臂支撑在牧师凳或健身球上，手肘自然下垂。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将杠铃向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，反手握住EZ杠铃，掌心向上。
将上臂支撑在牧师凳或健身球上，让手肘自然下垂。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将杠铃向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，掌心朝上。将上臂放在牧师凳或健身球上，使肘部自然下垂。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时将杠铃向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，采用反握方式握住EZ杠铃，掌心朝上。
将上臂靠在牧师凳或健身球上，使肘部自然下垂。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时将杠铃向肩膀方向弯举。
在动作顶点停顿片刻，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将杠铃降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping them stationary throughout the exercise. Keeping your elbows close to your body, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住EZ杆，采用反握姿势（掌心向上）。将上臂贴紧手臂固定器，在整个动作过程中保持上臂固定不动。将肘部贴近身体，呼气的同时将杠铃向肩膀方向弯举。在顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气并慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping them stationary throughout the exercise.
Keeping your elbows close to your body, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住EZ杆，采用反握姿势（掌心向上）。
将上臂贴紧手臂固定器，在整个动作过程中保持上臂固定不动。
将肘部贴近身体，呼气的同时将杠铃向肩膀方向弯举。
在顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气并慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench. Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing forward. Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended. Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放地面，背部紧贴凳面。双手握住EZ杠铃，采用窄握距，间距与肩同宽，手掌朝前。将杠铃从架子上取下，手臂完全伸展，将其置于胸部正上方。缓慢将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。当杠铃触碰到胸部时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃向上推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing forward.
Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在训练凳上，双脚平放地面，背部紧贴凳面。
双手握住EZ杠铃，采用窄握距，间距与肩同宽，手掌朝前。
将杠铃从架子上取下，手臂完全伸展，将其置于胸部正上方。
缓慢将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
当杠铃触碰到胸部时稍作停顿。
将杠铃向上推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: ez-barbell standing wide grip biceps curl
name.zh: EZ杆站姿宽握肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement. Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握方式握住EZ杆，手距比肩宽。练习过程中保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向肩部方向弯举。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用反握方式握住EZ杆，手距比肩宽。
练习过程中保持肘部贴近身体两侧，上臂固定不动。
通过收缩肱二头肌将杠铃向肩部方向弯举。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides. Keep your back straight and your shoulders back. Take small, controlled steps forward, maintaining an upright posture. Continue walking for the desired distance or time. To finish, stop walking and carefully lower the dumbbells to your sides.
instructions.zh: 双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体两侧，身体直立站好。保持背部挺直，肩部向后收紧。向前迈小步，保持直立姿势。按照要求的距离或时间继续行走。完成时，停止行走，然后将哑铃小心地放回身体两侧。

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Keep your back straight and your shoulders back.
Take small, controlled steps forward, maintaining an upright posture.
Continue walking for the desired distance or time.
To finish, stop walking and carefully lower the dumbbells to your sides.
zh: 双手各握一只哑铃，手掌朝向身体两侧，身体直立站好。
保持背部挺直，肩部向后收紧。
向前迈小步，保持直立姿势。
按照要求的距离或时间继续行走。
完成时，停止行走，然后将哑铃小心地放回身体两侧。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge. Slowly curl your fingers towards your palms, squeezing the barbell tightly. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly release your fingers back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，双脚平放在地面，采用反握方式握住杠铃（掌心朝上）。将前臂置于大腿上，使手腕悬空垂出凳沿。缓慢地将手指向掌心卷曲，同时用力握紧杠铃。保持收缩状态片刻，然后缓慢松开手指回到起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Slowly curl your fingers towards your palms, squeezing the barbell tightly.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly release your fingers back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双脚平放在地面，采用反握方式握住杠铃，掌心朝上。
将前臂放在大腿上，让手腕悬在凳沿外面。
缓慢地将手指向掌心卷曲，同时用力握紧杠铃。
保持收缩状态片刻，然后缓慢松开手指回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by gripping a vertical pole with both hands, palms facing each other, and arms fully extended. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Using your core and upper body strength, raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground. Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先，双手握住垂直杆，手掌相对，手臂完全伸直。收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。利用核心和上半身力量，将双腿抬起至与地面平行的位置。尽可能长时间保持这个姿势，维持身体的直线姿态。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Start by gripping a vertical pole with both hands, palms facing each other, and arms fully extended.
Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Using your core and upper body strength, raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground.
Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住垂直杆，手掌相对，手臂完全伸直。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。
利用核心和上半身力量，将双腿抬起至与地面平行的位置。
尽可能长时间保持这个姿势，维持身体的直线姿态。
慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. At the same time, lift your legs off the ground, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直至躯干与地面呈45度角。同时，将双腿抬离地面，屈膝并向胸部靠近。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将上半身和双腿放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
At the same time, lift your legs off the ground, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直至躯干与地面呈45度角。
同时，将双腿抬离地面，屈膝并向胸部靠近。
在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将上半身和双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and arms straight above your head. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground while simultaneously lifting your legs towards your chest. Reach your hands towards your toes as you lift your upper body and legs. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂向上伸直。收紧腹肌，同时将上半身抬离地面，并将双腿向胸部方向抬起。在抬起身体的过程中，双手向脚尖方向伸展。到达顶端时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身和双腿放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and arms straight above your head.
Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground while simultaneously lifting your legs towards your chest.
Reach your hands towards your toes as you lift your upper body and legs.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂向上伸直。
收紧腹肌，同时将上半身抬离地面，并将双腿向胸部方向抬起。
在抬起身体的过程中，双手向脚尖方向伸展。
到达顶端时稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身和双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, arms extended straight up over your chest. Slowly lower the barbell out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Lower the barbell until your arms are parallel to the floor, feeling a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。双手握住杠铃，采用正握方式，将手臂伸直举至胸部上方。慢慢将杠铃向身体两侧下放，保持肘部略微弯曲。当手臂与地面平行时停止，此时应感受到胸部的拉伸。保持片刻，然后收缩胸部肌肉将杠铃拉回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, arms extended straight up over your chest.
Slowly lower the barbell out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Lower the barbell until your arms are parallel to the floor, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
双手握住杠铃，采用正握方式，将手臂伸直举至胸部上方。
慢慢将杠铃向身体两侧下放，保持肘部略微弯曲。
将杠铃下放至手臂与地面平行，此时应感受到胸部的拉伸。
保持片刻，然后收缩胸部肌肉将杠铃拉回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your hands by your sides. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground about 6 inches. Keeping your legs straight, alternate lifting one leg slightly higher than the other. Continue this fluttering motion for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双手放在身体两侧。收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面约15厘米。保持双腿伸直，交替将一条腿略微抬高，然后换另一条腿。持续进行这种交替踢腿的动作，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your hands by your sides.
Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground about 6 inches.
Keeping your legs straight, alternate lifting one leg slightly higher than the other.
Continue this fluttering motion for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双手放在身体两侧。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面约15厘米。
保持双腿伸直，交替将一条腿略微抬高，然后换另一条腿。
持续进行这种交替踢腿的动作，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position. Swing your arms back for momentum. Jump forward explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next jump. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，将身体下蹲至半蹲姿势。双臂向后摆动以产生爆发力。集中腿部力量向前上方跳跃，髋部、膝盖和踝关节同时伸展。双脚前脚掌轻柔着地后，立即衔接下一次跳跃。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Swing your arms back for momentum.
Jump forward explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next jump.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立
弯曲膝盖，将身体下蹲至半蹲姿势
双臂向后摆动以产生爆发力
集中腿部力量向前上方跳跃，髋部、膝盖和踝关节同时伸展
双脚前脚掌轻柔着地后，立即衔接下一次跳跃
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips. Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle. Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，双手叉腰。右脚向前迈出一大步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。右膝弯曲至约90度角，保持膝盖与脚踝对齐。用右脚发力蹬地，恢复起始姿势。换成左腿重复动作，两侧交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，双手叉腰。
右脚向前迈出一大步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。
右膝弯曲至约90度角，保持膝盖与脚踝对齐。
用右脚发力蹬地，恢复起始姿势。
换成左腿重复动作，两侧交替进行所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your body with straight arms. Keeping your back straight, lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手在体前握住杠铃，手臂保持伸直。保持背部挺直，通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节来降低身体，仿佛向后坐在椅子上。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能地低蹲。稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力推起身体，回到起始姿势。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your body with straight arms.
Keeping your back straight, lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手在体前握住杠铃，手臂保持伸直。
保持背部挺直，通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节来降低身体，仿佛向后坐在椅子上。
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能地低蹲。
稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力推起身体，回到起始姿势。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back straight. As you lower your body, lift your feet off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest. Hold this position for a few seconds, then extend your legs back out and push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽放置，双脚并拢。弯曲双肘，将身体向地面方向下压，同时保持背部挺直。在下降的过程中，将双脚抬离地面并将膝盖收向胸部。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后双腿向后伸直，并将身体推回起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back straight.
As you lower your body, lift your feet off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest.
Hold this position for a few seconds, then extend your legs back out and push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽放置，双脚并拢。
弯曲双肘，将身体向地面方向下压，同时保持背部挺直。
在下降的过程中，将双脚抬离地面并将膝盖收向胸部。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后双腿向后伸直，并将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest. Simultaneously, lift your legs up and extend them straight out in front of you, keeping your body parallel to the ground. Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for a full front lever position. To release, slowly lower your legs back down and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始动作为双手正握单杠，握距与肩同宽。收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后收紧。弯曲膝盖并将膝盖向胸部收紧收拢。同时向上抬起双腿并向前伸直，使身体保持与地面平行的状态。尽可能长时间保持这个姿势，目标是完成标准的前水平动作。还原时，缓慢将双腿放下，恢复至起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest.
Simultaneously, lift your legs up and extend them straight out in front of you, keeping your body parallel to the ground.
Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for a full front lever position.
To release, slowly lower your legs back down and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握单杠，握距与肩同宽，从悬挂姿势开始。
收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后收紧。
弯曲膝盖并将膝盖向胸部方向收紧收拢。
同时向上抬起双腿并向前伸直，保持身体与地面平行。
尽可能长时间保持此姿势，目标是完成标准的前水平动作。
还原时缓慢将双腿放下，恢复至起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. Keeping your body straight, lift your legs up until they are parallel to the ground. Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for 10-20 seconds. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手正握悬挂在引体向上杆上，手掌朝外。收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后收紧。保持身体挺直，将双腿抬起至与地面平行的位置。尽可能长时间保持这个姿势，目标保持10-20秒。慢慢将双腿降回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行重复练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Keeping your body straight, lift your legs up until they are parallel to the ground.
Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for 10-20 seconds.
Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握悬挂在引体向上杆上，手掌朝外。
收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后收紧。
保持身体挺直，将双腿抬起至与地面平行的位置。
尽可能长时间保持这个姿势，目标保持10-20秒。
慢慢将双腿降回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行重复练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe. Engage your core and glutes to maintain a stable position. Rotate your torso to the right, lifting your right arm and extending it towards the ceiling. Keep your hips and legs stable as you twist. Hold for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the twist on the left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手位于肩膀正下方，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。收紧核心肌群和臀大肌以保持身体稳定。将躯干向右侧旋转，同时抬起右臂并向天花板方向伸展。在扭转过程中保持髋部和腿部稳定。保持片刻后回到起始位置，然后在左侧重复同样的扭转动作。继续左右交替进行，直到完成所需的重复次数。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Engage your core and glutes to maintain a stable position.
Rotate your torso to the right, lifting your right arm and extending it towards the ceiling.
Keep your hips and legs stable as you twist.
Hold for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the twist on the left side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手位于肩膀正下方，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
收紧核心肌群和臀大肌以保持身体稳定。
将躯干向右侧旋转，抬起右臂并向天花板方向伸展。
在扭转过程中保持髋部和腿部稳定。
保持片刻后回到起始位置。
在左侧重复同样的扭转动作。
继续左右交替进行，直到完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight out to the sides. Slowly lean forward, keeping your arms straight, until your upper body is parallel to the ground. Engage your core and hold this position for a few seconds. Return to the starting position by pushing through your feet and standing back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向身体两侧伸直。保持手臂伸直，慢慢向前倾身，直至上半身与地面平行。收紧核心肌群并保持这个姿势几秒钟。通过双脚发力推地，站直身体回到起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Slowly lean forward, keeping your arms straight, until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Engage your core and hold this position for a few seconds.
Return to the starting position by pushing through your feet and standing back up.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向身体两侧伸直。
保持手臂伸直，慢慢向前倾身，直至上半身与地面平行。
收紧核心肌群并保持这个姿势几秒钟。
通过双脚发力推地，站直身体回到起始姿势。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your fingers pointing forward. Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, lifting your feet off the ground. Continue shifting your weight forward until your body is parallel to the ground, balancing on your hands. Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line. Slowly lower your feet back to the ground and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，手指朝前。收紧核心肌群，缓慢将重心前移，同时抬起双脚离地。继续将重心前移，直到身体与地面平行，仅靠双手支撑保持平衡。尽可能长时间保持身体呈一条直线的姿态。缓慢将双脚放回地面，恢复起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your fingers pointing forward.
Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, lifting your feet off the ground.
Continue shifting your weight forward until your body is parallel to the ground, balancing on your hands.
Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Slowly lower your feet back to the ground and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，手指朝前。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢将重心前移，同时抬起双脚离地。
继续将重心前移，直到身体与地面平行，仅靠双手支撑保持平衡。
尽可能长时间保持身体呈一条直线的姿态。
缓慢将双脚放回地面，恢复起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands. Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground. Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position. Maintain a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩。收紧核心，屈肘将身体降至接近地面，同时身体前倾，双脚离地，仅用双手支撑平衡。继续下放身体至胸部接近地面，然后双手用力推起，伸直手臂将身体抬回起始位置。动作全程保持从头到脚呈一条直线。根据需要重复完成相应次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands.
Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground.
Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Maintain a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩。
收紧核心，屈肘将身体降至接近地面，同时身体前倾，双脚离地，仅用双手支撑平衡。
继续下放身体至胸部接近地面，然后双手用力推起，伸直手臂将身体抬回起始位置。
动作全程保持从头到脚呈一条直线。
根据需要重复完成相应次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对高杠。双手比肩稍宽、正握抓住杠铃，双臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上，身体保持笔直。收紧背阔肌和肱二头肌发力，将胸部向杠铃方向拉起，顶峰收缩时以胸骨领先向上。到达最高点后稍作停顿，然后缓慢下降回到起始姿势。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面对高杠。
双手比肩稍宽、正握抓住杠铃。
双臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上，身体保持笔直。
收紧背阔肌和肱二头肌发力，将胸部向杠铃方向拉起，顶峰收缩时以胸骨领先向上。
到达最高点后稍作停顿，然后缓慢下降回到起始姿势。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. While keeping your hips lifted, lift one foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest. Lower your foot back to the ground and repeat the movement with the other leg. Continue alternating legs in a marching motion while maintaining the bridge position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平贴地面。收紧臀肌并将髋部抬离地面，使膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在保持髋部抬高的状态下，抬起一只脚，将膝盖向胸部方向靠近。将脚放回地面后，换另一条腿重复同样的动作。在保持臀桥姿势的同时，双腿交替进行行进动作。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
While keeping your hips lifted, lift one foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Lower your foot back to the ground and repeat the movement with the other leg.
Continue alternating legs in a marching motion while maintaining the bridge position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平贴地面。
收紧臀肌并将髋部抬离地面，使膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
保持髋部抬高的状态下，抬起一只脚，将膝盖向胸部方向靠近。
将脚放回地面，换另一条腿重复同样的动作。
保持臀桥姿势，双腿交替进行行进动作。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: glute bridge two legs on bench (male)

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench with your back against it and your feet flat on the ground. Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子边缘，背部紧贴凳面，双脚平放在地面上。双手放在凳子上，位于髋部两侧以获得支撑。收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，然后将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将髋部降低回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench with your back against it and your feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then lift your hips off the bench until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子边缘，背部紧贴凳面，双脚平放在地面上。
双手放在凳子上，位于髋部两侧以获得支撑。
收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，然后将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将髋部降低回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the glute-ham raise machine to fit your body. Position yourself face down on the machine with your ankles secured. Place your hands on your chest or cross them over your chest. Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift your upper body up towards the ceiling. Continue lifting until your body is in a straight line from your head to your heels. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 根据自身身形调整臀腿弯举机的设置。俯卧在器械上，固定好脚踝位置。将双手置于胸前或交叉抱胸。收缩腘绳肌和臀肌发力，将上半身向上抬起。继续上抬直至身体从头到脚呈一条直线。在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体放下还原至起始姿势。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the glute-ham raise machine to fit your body.
Position yourself face down on the machine with your ankles secured.
Place your hands on your chest or cross them over your chest.
Engage your hamstrings and glutes to lift your upper body up towards the ceiling.
Continue lifting until your body is in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据自身身形调整臀腿弯举机的设置。
俯卧在器械上，固定好脚踝位置。
将双手置于胸前或交叉抱胸。
收缩腘绳肌和臀肌发力，将上半身向上抬起。
继续上抬直至身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体放下还原至起始姿势。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, bringing your chin above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。双手采用正握方式握住单杠，握距略宽于肩。双臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上，掌心朝外。收紧核心肌群，将身体向上拉起，直到下巴超过单杠。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将身体下放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, bringing your chin above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手采用正握方式握住单杠，握距略宽于肩。
双臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上，掌心朝外。
收紧核心肌群，将身体向上拉起，直到下巴超过单杠。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将身体下放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。双手置于头后，肘部向外展开。收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，膝盖向胸部靠拢。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
双手置于头后，肘部向外展开。
收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，膝盖向胸部靠拢。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight. Stand on the sled machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off. Hold onto the handles for stability. Raise your heels as high as possible by pushing through the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到合适的重量。双脚站在器械平台上，脚尖触地，脚跟悬空。握住手柄保持身体稳定。通过前脚掌用力，将脚跟尽可能抬高到最高点。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。重复动作至所需的重复次数。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Stand on the sled machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Hold onto the handles for stability.
Raise your heels as high as possible by pushing through the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到合适的重量。
双脚站在器械平台上，脚尖触地，脚跟悬空。
握住手柄保持身体稳定。
通过前脚掌用力，将脚跟尽可能抬高到最高点。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复动作至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight. Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground. Hold onto the handles for stability. Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Switch legs and repeat the exercise.
instructions.zh: 将滑轨机调整到适当的重量。单脚站在滑轨机上，另一只脚离开地面。握住把手以保持稳定。尽可能高地抬起脚后跟，用脚掌前部支撑身体向上。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚后跟降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复。换腿并重复练习。

en: Adjust the sled machine to an appropriate weight.
Stand on the sled machine with one foot, keeping the other foot off the ground.
Hold onto the handles for stability.
Raise your heel as high as possible, lifting your body up on the ball of your foot.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Switch legs and repeat the exercise.
zh: 将滑轨机调整到适当的重量
单脚站在滑轨机上，另一只脚离开地面
握住把手以保持稳定
尽可能高地抬起脚后跟，用脚掌前部支撑身体向上
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚后跟降回起始位置
按所需的重复次数重复
换腿并重复练习

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，向下降低身体，仿佛要坐进椅子一样。保持胸部挺起，重心落在脚后跟上。在最低点停顿片刻，然后通过脚后跟发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body down as if you were sitting back into a chair.
Keep your chest up and your weight in your heels.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
弯曲膝盖，向下降低身体，仿佛要坐进椅子一样。
保持胸部挺起，重心落在脚后跟上。
在最低点停顿片刻，然后通过脚后跟发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面。双手抱头，手肘向两侧展开。收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面。
双手抱头，手肘向两侧展开。
收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step forward with your right foot and shift your weight onto your right leg. Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the hips, reaching towards your right foot with both hands. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈一步，将重心移至右腿。保持背部挺直，慢慢向前屈髋，双手伸向右侧脚踝方向。保持拉伸姿势20-30秒，然后恢复起始姿势。换另一侧重复动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step forward with your right foot and shift your weight onto your right leg.
Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the hips, reaching towards your right foot with both hands.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。
右脚向前迈一步，将重心移至右腿。
保持背部挺直，慢慢向前屈髋，双手伸向右侧脚踝方向。
保持拉伸姿势20-30秒，然后恢复起始姿势。
换另一侧重复动作。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level. Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals. Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle. Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion. Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先将座椅高度和手柄位置调整到舒适的位置。坐上测力计，保持背部挺直，双脚放在脚踏板上。双手握住手柄，将手臂调整至90度角。开始用手进行踩踏动作，以可控的方式推拉手柄。按照所需的持续时间或重复次数继续进行训练。

en: Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level.
Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals.
Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle.
Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion.
Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
zh: 首先将座椅高度和手柄位置调整到舒适的位置。
坐上测力计，保持背部挺直，双脚放在脚踏板上。
双手握住手柄，将手臂调整至90度角。
开始用手进行踩踏动作，以可控的方式推拉手柄。
按照所需的持续时间或重复次数继续进行训练。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands clasped together in front of your chest. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Lower your hands towards your toes in a circular motion, reaching as far as you can without straining. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前握持。微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。以环形动作将双手向脚趾方向下移，在不勉强的范围内尽可能伸展。在最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands clasped together in front of your chest.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Lower your hands towards your toes in a circular motion, reaching as far as you can without straining.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前握持。
微微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
以环形动作将双手向脚趾方向下移，在不勉强的范围内尽可能伸展。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: hands reversed clasped circular toe touch (male)

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Reach down with your hands and clasp them together behind your legs. Slowly raise your hands up and over your head in a circular motion, keeping your legs straight. Continue the circular motion until your hands touch your toes. Reverse the motion and bring your hands back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双臂向身体两侧伸展。腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。双手向下伸到腿后并交叉握紧。保持双腿伸直，缓慢地将双手从身体后方向上、过头顶做环形运动。继续这个环形动作直到双手触碰到脚尖。然后反向运动，将双手带回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Reach down with your hands and clasp them together behind your legs.
Slowly raise your hands up and over your head in a circular motion, keeping your legs straight.
Continue the circular motion until your hands touch your toes.
Reverse the motion and bring your hands back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双臂向身体两侧伸展。
腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手向下伸到腿后并交叉握紧。
保持双腿伸直，缓慢地将双手从身体后方向上、过头顶做环形运动。
继续这个环形动作直到双手触碰到脚尖。
然后反向运动，将双手带回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Find an open space with enough room to perform a handstand. Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward. Kick your legs up towards the wall, using your core and shoulders to maintain balance. Once in a handstand position, engage your triceps to support your body weight. Hold the handstand for as long as you can maintain balance. To come down, slowly lower your legs back to the ground. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 找一个有足够空间进行倒立的开阔区域。将双手放在地面上，与肩同宽，手指朝前。踢腿靠墙，利用核心肌群和肩部保持平衡。处于倒立姿势后，收紧肱三头肌来支撑身体重量。尽可能长时间保持倒立以维持平衡。下落时，慢慢将双腿放回地面。根据需要的次数重复练习。

en: Find an open space with enough room to perform a handstand.
Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Kick your legs up towards the wall, using your core and shoulders to maintain balance.
Once in a handstand position, engage your triceps to support your body weight.
Hold the handstand for as long as you can maintain balance.
To come down, slowly lower your legs back to the ground.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 找一个有足够空间进行倒立的开阔区域。
将双手放在地面上，与肩同宽，手指朝前。
踢腿靠墙，利用核心肌群和肩部保持平衡。
处于倒立姿势后，收紧肱三头肌来支撑身体重量。
尽可能长时间保持倒立以维持平衡。
下落时，慢慢将双腿放回地面。
根据需要的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Find a wall and face away from it, standing a few feet away. Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart and kick your feet up against the wall, coming into a handstand position. Bend your elbows and lower your head towards the ground, keeping your body in a straight line. Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 找一面墙，背对墙壁站立，与墙保持一定距离。双手撑地，与肩同宽，然后将双腿踢向墙壁，进入倒立姿势。弯曲手肘，将头部向地面方向降低，同时保持身体呈一条直线。通过双手发力推地，伸直手臂回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Find a wall and face away from it, standing a few feet away.
Place your hands on the ground shoulder-width apart and kick your feet up against the wall, coming into a handstand position.
Bend your elbows and lower your head towards the ground, keeping your body in a straight line.
Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 背对墙壁站立，与墙壁保持一定距离。
双手撑地与肩同宽，双腿踢向墙壁进入倒立姿势。
弯曲手肘将头部向地面方向降低，保持身体呈一条直线。
通过双手发力推地，伸直手臂回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your legs up by flexing your hips and knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。收紧核心肌群，通过弯曲髋关节和膝关节抬起双腿，直至大腿与地面平行。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your legs up by flexing your hips and knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。
收紧核心肌群，通过弯曲髋关节和膝关节抬起双腿，直至大腿与地面平行。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，手掌朝向远离身体的方向。收紧核心肌肉，将双腿向前抬起，保持腿部伸直。持续抬腿直到双腿与地面平行或达到舒适的最大高度。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，手掌朝向远离身体的方向。
收紧核心肌肉，将双腿向前抬起，保持腿部伸直。
持续抬腿直到双腿与地面平行或达到舒适的最大高度。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，手掌朝外，悬挂于杠上。收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部抬起，同时将躯干向一侧扭转。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。换另一侧重复，躯干向相反方向扭转。按照所需的重复次数交替两侧进行训练。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，手掌朝外，悬挂于杠上。
收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部抬起，同时将躯干向一侧扭转。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
换另一侧重复，躯干向相反方向扭转。
按照所需的重复次数交替两侧进行训练。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground. Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住引体向上杠，双臂完全伸直，手掌朝外，背对横杠悬挂。收紧核心肌群，将双腿向横杠方向抬起，保持腿部伸直。继续抬起直到身体形成V字形，双腿与地面平行。保持该姿势片刻，然后慢慢将双腿放下回到起始位置。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your legs up towards the bar, keeping them straight.
Continue lifting until your body forms a 'V' shape, with your legs parallel to the ground.
Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住引体向上杠，双臂完全伸直，手掌朝外，背对横杠悬挂。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿向横杠方向抬起，保持腿部伸直。
继续抬起直到身体形成V字形，双腿与地面平行。
保持该姿势片刻，然后慢慢将双腿放下回到起始位置。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手正握（掌心朝外）挂在单杠上，双臂完全伸直。收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前抬起至与地面平行的位置。在最高点短暂停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握（掌心朝外）挂在单杠上，双臂完全伸直。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前抬起至与地面平行的位置。
在最高点短暂停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，双臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前上方抬起，保持腿部伸直。继续向上举腿，直至双腿与地面平行或达到个人舒适的最高点。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。按要求的次数重复练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or as high as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，双臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前上方抬起，保持腿部伸直。
继续向上举腿，直至双腿与地面平行或达到个人舒适的最高点。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复练习。

name.en: hanging straight twisting leg hip raise

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight. Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight. Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住引体向上杆，手臂完全伸直，双腿自然下垂。收紧核心肌群，将双腿向上抬起靠近胸部，保持腿部伸直。当双腿与地面平行时，扭动髋部向一侧转动，将双腿带向该侧。保持片刻，然后回到起始位置。换另一侧重复相同的动作，继续交替进行至所需次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your legs straight.
Engage your core and lift your legs up towards your chest, keeping them straight.
Once your legs are parallel to the ground, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards that side.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, but this time twist your hips to the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住引体向上杆，手臂完全伸直，双腿保持伸直状态。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿向上抬起靠近胸部，同时保持腿部伸直。
当双腿与地面平行时，向一侧扭转髋部，将双腿带向该侧。
保持片刻，然后回到起始位置。
换另一侧重复动作，这次将髋部向相反方向扭转。
继续交替进行左右两侧的动作，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart. Place your hands on the wall for support. Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground. Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down. Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible. Maintain a fast pace and keep your upper body stable throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面对墙壁站立，双脚与髋同宽。双手扶墙以保持平衡。收紧核心，将右膝向胸部抬起，同时左脚保持在地面。快速换腿，将左膝向胸部抬起，同时将右脚放下。继续以跑步的动作交替抬腿，尽可能将膝盖抬高。保持快速节奏，在整个动作过程中保持上半身稳定。根据需要的时长或重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Place your hands on the wall for support.
Engage your core and lift your right knee up towards your chest, while keeping your left foot on the ground.
Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee up towards your chest and lowering your right foot back down.
Continue alternating legs in a running motion, bringing your knees up as high as possible.
Maintain a fast pace and keep your upper body stable throughout the exercise.
Repeat for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
zh: 面对墙壁站立，双脚与髋同宽。
双手扶墙以保持平衡。
收紧核心，将右膝向胸部抬起，同时左脚保持在地面。
快速换腿，将左膝向胸部抬起，同时将右脚放下。
继续以跑步的动作交替抬腿，尽可能将膝盖抬高。
保持快速节奏，在整个动作过程中保持上半身稳定。
根据需要的时长或重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down. Engage your core and glutes, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平贴地面。双手放在身体两侧，掌心向下。收紧核心肌群和臀肌，然后将髋部向上挺起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将髋部落回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands by your sides, palms facing down.
Engage your core and glutes, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平贴地面。
双手放在身体两侧，掌心向下。
收紧核心肌群和臀肌，然后将髋部向上挺起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将髋部落回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position. As you squat down, bring your knees up towards your chest and hug them with your arms. Hold this position for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，下蹲至深蹲姿势。下蹲的同时将膝盖向胸部抬起，并用双臂抱住膝盖。保持这个姿势片刻，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body down into a squat position.
As you squat down, bring your knees up towards your chest and hug them with your arms.
Hold this position for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
弯曲膝盖，下蹲至深蹲姿势。
下蹲的同时将膝盖向胸部抬起，并用双臂抱住膝盖。
保持这个姿势片刻，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows. Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest. Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心相对。将双臂伸直举至胸部正上方，肘部略微弯曲。保持肘部微屈的状态下，将哑铃沿宽阔的弧线向身体两侧缓缓放下，直至胸部产生明显的拉伸感。稍作停顿后，沿原路径将哑铃收回至起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，双手各持一只哑铃，掌心相对。
将双臂伸直举至胸部正上方，肘部略微弯曲。
保持肘部微屈，将哑铃沿宽阔的弧线向身体两侧缓缓放下，直至胸部产生明显的拉伸感。
稍作停顿后，沿原路径将哑铃收回至起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your upper thighs are resting on the pad and your feet are secured. Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head. Lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整背伸展凳的角度，使大腿上部放在垫子上，双脚固定住。将双臂交叉放在胸前，或将双手放在头后。保持背部挺直，将上半身向地面方向下降。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过髋部发力，将上半身向上抬起，直到与腿部呈一条直线。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your upper thighs are resting on the pad and your feet are secured.
Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head.
Lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整背伸展凳，使大腿上部置于垫子上，双脚固定。
将双臂交叉放在胸前，或将双手放在头后。
保持背部挺直，将上半身向地面方向下降。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过髋部发力将上半身向上抬起，直到与腿部呈一条直线。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your hips are resting comfortably on the pad and your feet are secured. Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head. Slowly lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整俯卧背伸展凳的高度，使臀部舒适地靠在垫子上，双脚固定好。双手交叉放于胸前，或将双手置于头后。保持背部挺直，慢慢将上半身向地面方向下降。在底部稍作停顿，然后将上半身抬起直至与双腿呈一条直线。重复进行至所需的次数。

en: Adjust the hyperextension bench so that your hips are resting comfortably on the pad and your feet are secured.
Cross your arms over your chest or place your hands behind your head.
Slowly lower your upper body towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise your upper body back up until it is in line with your legs.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整俯卧背伸展凳，使臀部舒适地靠在垫子上，双脚固定好。
双手交叉放于胸前，或将双手置于头后。
保持背部挺直，慢慢将上半身向地面方向下降。
在底部稍作停顿，然后将上半身抬起直至与双腿呈一条直线。
重复进行至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air. Bend your knees and cross your ankles. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手撑在双杠上，手臂完全伸直，身体悬空在地面上方。屈膝并将双脚交叉。弯曲肘关节使身体下降，直到上臂与地面平行。保持片刻，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Bend your knees and cross your ankles.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手撑在双杠上，手臂完全伸直，身体悬空在地面上方。
屈膝并将双脚交叉。
弯曲肘关节使身体下降，直到上臂与地面平行。
保持片刻，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart. Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you. Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe. Pause for a moment, then walk your hands back towards your feet, keeping your legs as straight as possible. Once your hands reach your feet, stand back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从双脚与髋同宽的站立姿势开始。向前弯腰，将双手放在身前的地面上。双手向前行走，直到身体呈高位平板姿势，身体从头到脚成一条直线。稍作停顿，然后双手向双脚方向走回，尽可能保持双腿伸直。双手回到双脚位置后，站起身回到起始姿势。重复所需次数。

en: Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
