Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Pause for a moment, then walk your hands back towards your feet, keeping your legs as straight as possible.
Once your hands reach your feet, stand back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立。
向前弯腰，将双手放在身前的地面上。
双手向前行走，直到身体呈高位平板姿势，身体从头到脚成一条直线。
稍作停顿，然后双手向双脚方向走回，尽可能保持双腿伸直。
双手回到双脚位置后，站起身回到起始姿势。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart. Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you. Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe. Keeping your legs straight, walk your feet towards your hands, bringing your hips up towards the ceiling. Continue walking your hands forward, repeating the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为直立站立，双脚与髋同宽。身体向前弯曲，将双手放在前方的地面上。双手交替向前移动，直到身体呈现高位平板支撑姿势，从头到脚呈一条直线。保持双腿伸直，双脚交替向双手的方向移动，将髋部向上推向天花板。继续保持双手向前移动，按照所需的重复次数重复这个动作。

en: Start in a standing position with your feet hip-width apart.
Bend forward at the waist and place your hands on the ground in front of you.
Walk your hands forward until you are in a high plank position, with your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Keeping your legs straight, walk your feet towards your hands, bringing your hips up towards the ceiling.
Continue walking your hands forward, repeating the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 直立站立，双脚与髋同宽。
从髋部向前弯曲，将双手放在前方的地面上。
双手交替向前移动，直到身体呈现高位平板支撑姿势，从头到脚呈一条直线。
保持双腿伸直，双脚交替向双手的方向移动，将髋部向上推向天花板。
继续保持双手向前移动，按照所需的重复次数重复这个动作。

instructions.en: Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, with your body forming a straight line from head to heels. Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将双手放在凳子或台阶等高于地面的平面上，双手间距比肩稍窄。双腿向后伸直，用前脚掌撑地，身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将胸部靠近平面，手肘贴近身体两侧。在最低点稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, with your body forming a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将双手放在凳子或台阶等高于地面的平面上，双手间距比肩稍宽。
双腿向后伸直，用前脚掌撑地，身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线。
通过弯曲手肘将胸部靠近平面，手肘贴近身体两侧。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie on an incline bench with your back flat against the bench and your legs extended straight out in front of you. Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support. Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the bench, raising them as high as you can while keeping them straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在斜凳上，背部平贴凳面，双腿向前伸直。双手放在凳子两侧用于支撑。收紧腹肌，将双腿抬起离开凳面，在保持双腿伸直的前提下尽量抬到最高点。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie on an incline bench with your back flat against the bench and your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the bench, raising them as high as you can while keeping them straight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在斜凳上，背部平贴凳面，双腿向前伸直。
双手放在凳子两侧用于支撑身体。
收紧腹肌，将双腿抬起离开凳面，在保持双腿伸直的前提下尽量抬到最高点。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Find an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, and place your hands shoulder-width apart on the edge. Step your feet back, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels. Lower your chest towards the edge of the surface, bending your elbows and keeping your body aligned. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Jump off the edge of the surface, landing softly with your knees slightly bent. Repeat the push-up and depth jump for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 找到一个升高的平面，例如长凳或踏板，将双手放在边缘，间距与肩同宽。双脚向后撤步，保持从头到脚跟的身体呈一条直线。将胸部向平面边缘的方向下移，弯曲肘部，同时保持身体对齐。通过手掌发力推起，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。从平面边缘跳下，膝盖略微弯曲，落地轻柔。按照所需的重复次数，重复进行俯卧撑和跳深动作。

en: Find an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, and place your hands shoulder-width apart on the edge.
Step your feet back, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest towards the edge of the surface, bending your elbows and keeping your body aligned.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Jump off the edge of the surface, landing softly with your knees slightly bent.
Repeat the push-up and depth jump for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 找一个升高的平面，例如长凳或踏板，双手间距与肩同宽放在边缘上。
双脚向后撤步，保持从头到脚跟的身体呈一条直线。
将胸部向平面边缘的方向下移，弯曲肘部，同时保持身体对齐。
通过手掌发力推起，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。
从平面边缘跳下，膝盖略微弯曲，落地轻柔。
按照所需的重复次数，重复进行俯卧撑和跳深动作。

instructions.en: Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将双手撑在一个抬高的平面上，如长凳或踏板，两手间距比肩稍宽。双腿向后伸直，用脚尖支撑，使身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将胸部向平面方向下压，同时保持身体平直。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将双手撑在抬高的平面上，如长凳或踏板，两手间距比肩稍宽。
双腿向后伸直，用脚尖支撑，使身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线。
弯曲手肘将胸部向平面方向下压，同时保持身体平直。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将双手放在箱子或高台的边缘上，双手间距略宽于肩部。双腿向后伸展，用双脚脚尖着地支撑，使从头到脚跟保持一条直线。通过弯曲肘部将胸部向箱子方向下降，同时保持身体呈一条直线。在最低点停顿片刻，然后通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Place your hands on the edge of a box or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Lower your chest towards the box by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将双手放在箱子或高台的边缘上，双手间距略宽于肩部。
双腿向后伸展，用双脚脚尖着地支撑，使从头到脚跟保持一条直线。
通过弯曲肘部将胸部向箱子方向下降，同时保持身体呈一条直线。
在最低点停顿片刻，然后通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Place your hands on the edge of a bench or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. Lower your chest towards the bench by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将双手放在长凳或升高的平面边缘，间距略宽于肩部。将双腿向后伸展，脚尖着地，从头部到脚跟保持一条直线。屈肘将胸部向长凳方向下移，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手臂将身体推回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Place your hands on the edge of a bench or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Lower your chest towards the bench by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将双手放在长凳或升高的平面边缘，间距略宽于肩部。
将双腿向后伸展，脚尖着地，从头部到脚跟保持一条直线。
屈肘将胸部向长凳方向下移，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手臂将身体推回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Place your hands on the bench slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Position your feet on the ground, hip-width apart. Lower your chest towards the bench, keeping your elbows tucked in. As you lower, retract your shoulder blades, squeezing your scapulae together. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将倾斜凳设置在45度角。双手放在凳子上，间距略宽于肩宽。双脚与髋同宽踩在地面上。胸部向凳面方向下沉，保持肘部收紧控制下降幅度。下降过程中主动收缩肩胛骨，使两侧肩胛骨向中间夹紧。推起时手掌发力伸直手臂，恢复到起始姿势。按目标次数重复练习。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Place your hands on the bench slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Position your feet on the ground, hip-width apart.
Lower your chest towards the bench, keeping your elbows tucked in.
As you lower, retract your shoulder blades, squeezing your scapulae together.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将倾斜凳设置在45度角
双手放在凳子上，间距略宽于肩宽
双脚与髋同宽踩在地面上
胸部向凳面方向下沉，保持肘部收紧控制下降幅度
下降过程中主动收缩肩胛骨，使两侧肩胛骨向中间夹紧
推起时手掌发力伸直手臂，恢复到起始姿势
按目标次数重复练习

instructions.en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward. As you curl up, twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time twisting your torso to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将斜凳角度调整至45度。仰躺在凳面上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。双手可以放在头后或交叉置于胸前。收紧腹部肌肉，上半身离开凳面，向前卷起身体。卷起的同时向一侧扭转躯干，让肘部尽量靠近对侧的膝盖。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。换另一侧扭转躯干重复动作，继续左右交替进行至目标次数。

en: Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward.
As you curl up, twist your torso to one side, bringing your elbow towards the opposite knee.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time twisting your torso to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将斜凳角度调整至45度。
仰躺在凳面上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。
双手放在头后或交叉置于胸前。
收紧腹肌，上半身离开凳面向前卷起。
卷起时向一侧扭转躯干，让肘部靠近对侧膝盖。
在顶峰位置稍停，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。
换另一侧扭转躯干重复动作。
继续左右交替进行至目标次数。

name.en: intermediate hip flexor and quad stretch
name.zh: 中级髋屈肌和股四头肌拉伸

instructions.en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold onto a stable object for support. Bend your right knee and bring your right foot towards your glutes, grabbing the rope with your right hand. Slowly pull your right foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your right quad. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat on the left side.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。抓住稳定的物体以获得支撑。弯曲右膝，将右脚向臀部方向拉起，同时用右手抓住绳索。慢慢将右脚向臀部方向拉，感受右腿股四头肌的拉伸。保持拉伸20-30秒。放松并换另一侧重复动作。

en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold onto a stable object for support.
Bend your right knee and bring your right foot towards your glutes, grabbing the rope with your right hand.
Slowly pull your right foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your right quad.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release the stretch and repeat on the left side.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
抓住稳定的物体以获得支撑。
弯曲右膝，将右脚向臀部方向拉起，同时用右手抓住绳索。
慢慢将右脚向臀部方向拉，感受右腿股四头肌的拉伸。
保持拉伸20-30秒。
放松并换另一侧重复动作。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a bench with your hips at the edge and your legs extended straight behind you. Hold onto the bench for support. Keeping your upper body still, bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下俯卧在训练凳上，髋部位于凳子边缘，双腿在身后伸直。双手握住凳子以保持身体稳定。上半身保持不动，弯曲膝盖将双腿向臀部方向卷起。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿伸展回起始位置。重复至所需次数。

en: Lie face down on a bench with your hips at the edge and your legs extended straight behind you.
Hold onto the bench for support.
Keeping your upper body still, bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下俯卧在训练凳上，髋部位于凳子边缘，双腿在身后伸直。
双手握住凳子以保持身体稳定。
上半身保持不动，弯曲膝盖将双腿向臀部方向卷起。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿伸展回起始位置。
重复至所需次数。

name.en: inverse leg curl (on pull-up cable machine)
name.zh: 反向腿弯举（在引体向上绳索器械上）

instructions.en: Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting. Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet. Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability. Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索器械的踝带调整至最低位置。面部朝下俯卧在长凳上，双腿伸直，踝带固定在脚部。握住长凳把手以保持稳定。弯曲膝盖，将双腿向臀部方向卷起，收紧腘绳肌。在动作顶点暂停片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数。

en: Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索器械的踝带调整至最低位置。
面部朝下俯卧在长凳上，双腿伸直，踝带固定在脚部。
握住长凳把手以保持稳定。
弯曲膝盖，将双腿向臀部方向卷起，收紧腘绳肌。
在动作顶点暂停片刻，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer. Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground. Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃杆调整至腰部高度，或使用悬吊训练器。面向杠铃杆或悬吊训练器站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用比肩宽略宽的正握方式握住杠铃杆或手柄。身体向后倾斜，保持身体挺直，脚跟着地。将胸部向杠铃杆或手柄方向拉近，同时收紧肩胛骨。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer.
Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃杆调整至腰部高度，或使用悬吊训练器。
面向杠铃杆或悬吊训练器站立，双脚与肩同宽。
采用比肩宽略宽的正握方式握住杠铃杆或手柄。
身体向后倾斜，保持身体挺直，脚跟着地。
将胸部向杠铃杆或手柄方向拉近，同时收紧肩胛骨。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up a bar at waist height and lie underneath it. Grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your body is straight. Pull your chest up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃架设在腰部高度，人仰卧于杠铃下方。采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。调整身体位置，使脚跟着地，身体保持平直。通过收紧肩胛骨将胸部向杠铃方向拉起。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体下落回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up a bar at waist height and lie underneath it.
Grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your body is straight.
Pull your chest up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃架设在腰部高度，人仰卧于杠铃下方
采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽
调整身体位置，使脚跟着地，身体保持平直
通过收紧肩胛骨将胸部向杠铃方向拉起
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体下落回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Set up a bench at a height that allows your body to hang freely underneath it. Lie face up on the ground with your head towards the bench. Reach up and grab the bench with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your arms are fully extended. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull your chest up towards the bench. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将长凳调整到合适的高度，使身体可以在长凳下方自由悬垂。仰卧平躺在地上，头部朝向长凳方向，双手向上伸直并用正握抓住长凳，握距略宽于肩宽。调整身体位置，使脚跟着地，手臂完全伸直。收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，同时将胸部向上拉向长凳方向。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up a bench at a height that allows your body to hang freely underneath it.
Lie face up on the ground with your head towards the bench.
Reach up and grab the bench with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your arms are fully extended.
Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull your chest up towards the bench.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将长凳调整到合适的高度，使身体可以在长凳下方自由悬垂。
仰卧平躺在地上，头部朝向长凳方向。
双手向上伸直并用正握抓住长凳，握距略宽于肩宽。
调整身体位置，使脚跟着地，手臂完全伸直。
收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，同时将胸部向上拉向长凳方向。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up a bar at waist height on a Smith machine or use a suspension trainer. Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer and grab it with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at a slight angle. Keep your body straight and pull your chest up towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃设置在史密斯机腰部高度，或者使用悬吊训练器。面朝杠铃或悬吊训练器站立，双手采用正握握法，握距与肩同宽。双脚向前迈步，身体向后倾斜，直到身体与地面呈一定角度。保持身体挺直，将胸部向上拉向杠铃或手柄，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢下放身体回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up a bar at waist height on a Smith machine or use a suspension trainer.
Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer and grab it with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at a slight angle.
Keep your body straight and pull your chest up towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃设置在史密斯机的腰部高度，或者使用悬吊训练器。
面朝杠铃或悬吊训练器站立，双手采用正握握法，握距与肩同宽。
双脚向前迈步，身体向后倾斜，直到身体与地面呈一定角度。
保持身体挺直，将胸部向上拉向杠铃或手柄，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢下放身体回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up a suspension trainer or straps at chest height. Stand facing the anchor point and grab the handles with an overhand grip. Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at an angle. Keep your body straight and engage your core. Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将悬垂训练器或绳索设备固定在与胸部齐平的高度。面向固定点站立，采用正握方式握住把手。脚向前迈步，身体向后倾斜，直到身体与地面形成一定角度。保持身体挺直，收紧核心肌群。将胸部向把手方向拉近，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。在动作顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up a suspension trainer or straps at chest height.
Stand facing the anchor point and grab the handles with an overhand grip.
Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at an angle.
Keep your body straight and engage your core.
Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将悬垂训练器或绳索设备固定在与胸部齐平的高度。
面向固定点站立，采用正握方式握住把手。
脚向前迈步，身体向后倾斜，直到身体与地面形成一定角度。
保持身体挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将胸部向把手方向拉近，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
在动作顶端保持片刻，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides. Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight. Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position. Repeat the stretch on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂向两侧平伸。双腿向天花板方向抬起，保持腿部伸直。慢慢将双腿向身体一侧下放，努力用脚触碰地面。保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始位置。换另一侧重复拉伸动作。按照需要的重复次数交替进行两侧练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended out to the sides.
Raise your legs up towards the ceiling, keeping them straight.
Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the floor with your feet.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return your legs to the starting position.
Repeat the stretch on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂向两侧平伸。
双腿向天花板方向抬起，保持腿部伸直。
慢慢将双腿向身体一侧下放，努力用脚触碰地面。
保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始位置。
换另一侧重复拉伸动作。
按照需要的重复次数交替进行两侧练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground, with your palms facing each other. Squeeze your chest muscles together as hard as you can, while keeping your arms straight. Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your chest muscles. Release the squeeze and relax your chest muscles. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂向前伸直，与地面平行，掌心相对。尽可能用力挤压胸部肌肉，同时保持手臂伸直。保持这个姿势几秒钟专注于收缩胸部肌肉。松开挤压并放松胸部肌肉。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground, with your palms facing each other.
Squeeze your chest muscles together as hard as you can, while keeping your arms straight.
Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your chest muscles.
Release the squeeze and relax your chest muscles.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双臂向前伸直与地面保持平行，掌心相对。
在保持手臂伸直的同时，尽可能用力挤压胸部肌肉。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，专注于收缩胸部肌肉。
松开挤压并放松胸部肌肉。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by lying flat on your back on a mat or bench. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, perpendicular to your body. Engage your core and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them together and straight. Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your feet while maintaining control. Pause for a moment, then use your core to lift your legs back to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time lowering your legs to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在垫子或长凳上，双臂向身体两侧伸展与身体垂直。收紧核心肌群，将双腿并拢抬起离开地面，保持腿部伸直。控制地将双腿向一侧下落，尝试让双脚触碰地面。稍作停顿后，利用核心力量将双腿抬回起始位置。然后将双腿向另一侧下落，重复之前的动作。持续交替左右两侧进行至所需的重复次数。

en: Start by lying flat on your back on a mat or bench.
Extend your arms straight out to the sides, perpendicular to your body.
Engage your core and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them together and straight.
Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your feet while maintaining control.
Pause for a moment, then use your core to lift your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time lowering your legs to the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在垫子或长凳上，保持身体平直。
将双臂向身体两侧伸展，与身体呈垂直角度。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿并拢抬起离开地面，保持伸直状态。
控制地将双腿向一侧下落，尝试让双脚触碰地面。
稍作停顿，然后利用核心力量将双腿抬回起始位置。
将双腿向另一侧下落，重复相同的动作。
持续交替左右两侧进行至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you. Kick your feet back, landing in a push-up position. Perform a push-up, lowering your chest to the ground and then pushing back up. Jump your feet forward, landing in a squat position. Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead. Land softly and immediately lower back into the squat position to begin the next repetition.
instructions.zh: 从站立姿势开始，双脚与肩同宽。将身体下蹲，双手放在身前的地面上。双脚向后跳，成俯卧撑姿势。完成一个俯卧撑，将胸部降低到地面，然后向上推起。双脚向前跳回，成蹲姿。爆发向上跳起，双臂向上伸直。轻轻落地后立即下蹲回到起始姿势，开始下一次重复。

en: Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you.
Kick your feet back, landing in a push-up position.
Perform a push-up, lowering your chest to the ground and then pushing back up.
Jump your feet forward, landing in a squat position.
Jump up explosively, reaching your arms overhead.
Land softly and immediately lower back into the squat position to begin the next repetition.
zh: 从站立姿势开始，双脚与肩同宽。
将身体下蹲，双手放在身前的地面上。
双脚向后跳，成俯卧撑姿势。
做俯卧撑，将胸部降低至地面，然后向上推起。
双脚向前跳回，成蹲姿。
爆发向上跳起，双臂向上伸直。
轻轻落地后立即下蹲回到起始姿势，开始下一次重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet together and your arms by your sides. Jump up, spreading your feet apart and raising your arms above your head. As you land, quickly jump back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚并拢站立，双臂自然垂放于身体两侧。向上跳起，双脚跳开的同时双臂上举过头顶。落地后，迅速跳回起始姿势。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet together and your arms by your sides.
Jump up, spreading your feet apart and raising your arms above your head.
As you land, quickly jump back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚并拢站立，双臂自然垂放于身体两侧。
向上跳起，双脚跳开的同时双臂上举过头顶。
落地后，迅速跳回起始姿势。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms overhead. Engage your core and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂举过头顶。收紧核心肌群，同时向上抬起双腿和上半身，双手尽量向脚尖方向伸展。在动作的最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿和上半身放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms overhead.
Engage your core and lift your legs and upper body simultaneously, reaching your hands towards your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂举过头顶。
收紧核心肌群，同时向上抬起双腿和上半身，双手向脚尖方向伸展。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿和上半身放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲，直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲，直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet. Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again. Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住跳绳手柄，手掌朝向身体内侧。双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。将绳索从头顶甩过，当绳子转向脚部方向时跳跃穿过。前脚掌轻柔着地，绳子再次转过来时重复跳跃动作。按照预期时长或重复次数持续跳绳。

en: Hold the handles of the jump rope with your hands, palms facing inward.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Swing the rope over your head and jump over it as it comes towards your feet.
Land softly on the balls of your feet and repeat the jump as the rope comes around again.
Continue jumping for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住跳绳手柄，手掌朝向身体内侧。
双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
将绳索从头顶甩过，当绳子转向脚部方向时跳跃穿过。
前脚掌轻柔着地，绳子再次转过来时重复跳跃动作。
按照预期时长或重复次数持续跳绳。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Jump explosively off the ground, extending your hips, knees, and ankles. While in mid-air, quickly bring your arms forward for balance. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。屈膝并将臀部向后推，使身体下降至深蹲姿势。然后用力向上跳起，充分伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节。在空中时，迅速将双臂向前摆动以保持身体平衡。落地时用前脚掌轻柔着地，然后立即进入下一次重复动作。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Jump explosively off the ground, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
While in mid-air, quickly bring your arms forward for balance.
Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
屈膝并将臀部向后推，使身体下降至深蹲姿势。
用力向上跳起，充分伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节。
在空中时，迅速将双臂向前摆动以保持身体平衡。
落地时用前脚掌轻柔着地，然后立即进入下一次重复动作。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees fully. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately lower your body back into a squat position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。屈膝并向后推髋部，将身体降至深蹲姿势。爆发性地向上跳起，髋部和膝盖完全伸展。双脚前脚掌轻柔着地后，立即将身体降至深蹲姿势。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees fully.
Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately lower your body back into a squat position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
屈膝并向后推髋部，将身体降至深蹲姿势。
爆发性地向上跳起，髋部和膝盖完全伸展。
双脚前脚掌轻柔着地后，立即将身体降至深蹲姿势。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a kettlebell in your right hand, with your arm extended overhead and your palm facing forward. Rotate your left foot slightly to the right, and shift your weight onto your left leg. Bend your left knee and hinge at the hip, lowering your torso towards the left side. Keep your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell. As you lower your torso, allow your right leg to straighten and your right foot to pivot slightly. Lower your torso until you feel a stretch in your left hamstring and your right arm is pointing towards the ground. Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。右手握住壶铃，手臂向上伸直，掌心朝前。左脚略微向右旋转，将身体重心移至左腿。左膝弯曲，以髋部为轴心向前倾，躯干向左侧下沉。保持右臂向上伸直，眼睛注视壶铃。随着躯干下沉，右腿逐渐伸直，右脚微微转动。继续降低躯干，直到左腿后侧感到充分拉伸，此时右臂应指向地面。短暂停顿，然后收紧核心肌群，左脚后跟用力蹬地，身体还原至起始姿势。按照要求的重复次数进行练习，然后换侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold a kettlebell in your right hand, with your arm extended overhead and your palm facing forward.
Rotate your left foot slightly to the right, and shift your weight onto your left leg.
Bend your left knee and hinge at the hip, lowering your torso towards the left side.
Keep your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
As you lower your torso, allow your right leg to straighten and your right foot to pivot slightly.
Lower your torso until you feel a stretch in your left hamstring and your right arm is pointing towards the ground.
Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。
右手握住壶铃，手臂向上伸直，掌心朝前。
左脚略微向右旋转，将身体重心移至左腿。
左膝弯曲，以髋部为轴心向前倾，躯干向左侧下沉。
保持右臂向上伸直，眼睛注视壶铃。
随着躯干下沉，右腿逐渐伸直，右脚微微转动。
继续降低躯干，直到左腿后侧感到充分拉伸，此时右臂应指向地面。
短暂停顿，然后收紧核心肌群，左脚后跟用力蹬地，身体还原至起始姿势。
按照要求的重复次数进行练习，然后换侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended. In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders. As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms. Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat the movement with the opposite arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个壶铃，采用正握。微微屈膝，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部挺起。让壶铃在身体前侧自然悬垂，手臂完全伸直。接着，以一个连贯流畅的动作，爆发性地伸展髋关节、耸起双肩，同时将壶铃向上拉至肩部高度。当壶铃到达肩高时，转动手腕，将壶铃接住置于架位，手掌朝内，壶铃位于前臂外侧。然后将壶铃放回起始位置，换另一侧手臂重复动作。持续左右手臂交替进行，直至完成目标次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Allow the kettlebells to hang in front of your body with your arms fully extended.
In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips, shrug your shoulders, and pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.
As the kettlebells reach shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebells in the rack position, with your palms facing inward and the kettlebells resting on the outside of your forearms.
Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个壶铃，采用正握姿势。
微微屈膝，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部向上挺起。
让壶铃在身体前侧自然悬垂，手臂完全伸直。
以连贯流畅的动作，爆发性地伸展髋关节、耸起双肩，同时将壶铃向上拉至肩部高度。
当壶铃到达肩部高度时，转动手腕，将壶铃接住置于架位，手掌朝内，壶铃位于前臂外侧。
将壶铃放回起始位置，换另一侧手臂重复动作。
持续左右手臂交替进行，直至完成目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height. Press one kettlebell overhead, fully extending your arm. Lower the kettlebell back to shoulder height. Repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个壶铃置于肩部高度。将一只壶铃向上推举，手臂完全伸直。将壶铃落回肩部高度。换另一只手臂重复动作。按照所需的重复次数交替进行双臂练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Press one kettlebell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Lower the kettlebell back to shoulder height.
Repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个壶铃置于肩部高度。
将一只壶铃向上推举，手臂完全伸直。
将壶铃落回肩部高度。
换另一只手臂重复动作。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行双臂练习。

instructions.en: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling. Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up. Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder. Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在地板上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手各握一个壶铃，掌心朝向脚部，双臂向上伸直朝向天花板。将一个壶铃下放至肩部位置，同时保持另一个壶铃向上伸直。将下放的壶铃向上推回起始位置，同时将另一个壶铃下放至肩部。交替进行推举动作，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up.
Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder.
Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在地板上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手各握一个壶铃，掌心朝向脚部，双臂向上伸直朝向天花板。
将一个壶铃下放至肩部位置，同时保持另一个壶铃向上伸直。
将下放的壶铃向上推回起始位置，同时将另一个壶铃下放至肩部。
交替进行推举动作，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands gripping the kettlebells and your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels. Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以高位平板姿势开始，双手握住壶铃，双脚与髋同宽。收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚跟呈一条直线。将一只壶铃拉向胸部，手肘贴近身体。将壶铃放回起始位置，换另一只手臂重复。交替双臂完成所需次数。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands gripping the kettlebells and your feet hip-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板姿势开始，双手握住壶铃，双脚与髋同宽。
收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚跟呈一条直线。
将一只壶铃拉向胸部，手肘贴近身体。
将壶铃放回起始位置，换另一只手臂重复。
交替双臂完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm. Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，双手各持一个壶铃，手掌朝向身体。屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将一个壶铃向胸部方向拉起，保持手肘贴近身体，收缩肩胛骨。将壶铃放回起始位置，然后换另一只手臂重复。持续交替手臂进行所需次数的重复。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull one kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，双手各持一个壶铃，手掌朝向身体。
屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将一个壶铃向胸部方向拉起，保持手肘贴近身体，收缩肩胛骨。
将壶铃放回起始位置，然后换另一只手臂重复。
持续交替手臂进行所需次数的重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you. Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃置于肩部高度，手心朝向身体。收紧核心肌群，将壶铃向上推举，同时转动手掌使掌心朝前，手臂完全伸展。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将壶铃降回起始位置。重复规定的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing towards you.
Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, rotating your palms to face forward as you extend your arms.
Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃置于肩部高度，手心朝向身体。
收紧核心肌群，将壶铃向上推举，同时转动手掌使掌心朝前，手臂完全伸展。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将壶铃降回起始位置。
重复规定的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand. Bend your knees slightly and press the kettlebell overhead with your right arm, keeping your elbow locked. Rotate your torso to the left, shifting your weight onto your left foot. Bend your left knee and lower your torso towards the ground, keeping your right arm extended overhead. As you lower, keep your eyes on the kettlebell and your chest lifted. Once your left hand touches the ground, push through your left foot and straighten your left leg, driving your hips forward. As you drive your hips forward, use your core and right arm to press the kettlebell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握住一个壶铃。微微屈膝，用右手将壶铃举过头顶，保持肘部锁紧。向左旋转躯干，将重心转移到左脚。屈左膝，让躯干向地面方向下降，保持右臂伸直举过头顶。下降过程中，目视壶铃，保持胸部抬起。当左手触地时，通过左脚发力，伸直左腿，推动臀部向前。当臀部向前推动时，利用核心和右臂将壶铃推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Bend your knees slightly and press the kettlebell overhead with your right arm, keeping your elbow locked.
Rotate your torso to the left, shifting your weight onto your left foot.
Bend your left knee and lower your torso towards the ground, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
As you lower, keep your eyes on the kettlebell and your chest lifted.
Once your left hand touches the ground, push through your left foot and straighten your left leg, driving your hips forward.
As you drive your hips forward, use your core and right arm to press the kettlebell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握住一个壶铃。
微微屈膝，用右手将壶铃举过头顶，保持肘部锁紧。
向左旋转躯干，将重心转移到左脚。
屈左膝，让躯干向地面方向下降，保持右臂伸直举过头顶。
下降过程中，目视壶铃，保持胸部抬起。
当左手触地时，通过左脚发力，伸直左腿，推动臀部向前。
当臀部向前推动时，利用核心和右臂将壶铃推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行，然后换另一侧进行。

name.en: kettlebell bottoms up clean from the hang position
name.zh: 壶铃悬垂位底部朝上抓举

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Allow the kettlebell to hang down between your legs, with your arm fully extended. In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while pulling the kettlebell up towards your shoulder. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist so that the bottom of the kettlebell is facing up. Catch the kettlebell at shoulder height with your elbow bent and your palm facing up. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住壶铃，手掌朝下。微屈膝盖，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部上抬。手臂完全伸展，将壶铃悬垂于双腿之间。以一个流畅的动作，爆发性地伸展髋关节和膝盖，同时将壶铃向上拉向肩部。当壶铃到达肩部高度时，翻转手腕使壶铃底部朝上。在肩部高度处接住壶铃，手肘弯曲，手掌朝上。通过反向动作将壶铃放回起始位置。重复所需的次数，然后换侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Allow the kettlebell to hang down between your legs, with your arm fully extended.
In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while pulling the kettlebell up towards your shoulder.
As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist so that the bottom of the kettlebell is facing up.
Catch the kettlebell at shoulder height with your elbow bent and your palm facing up.
Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住壶铃，手掌朝下。
微屈膝盖，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直，胸部上抬。
手臂完全伸展，将壶铃悬垂于双腿之间。
以一个流畅的动作，爆发性地伸展髋关节和膝盖，同时将壶铃向上拉向肩部。
当壶铃到达肩部高度时，翻转手腕使壶铃底部朝上。
在肩部高度处接住壶铃，手肘弯曲，手掌朝上。
通过反向动作将壶铃放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数，然后换侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Allow the kettlebells to hang straight down in front of your body. In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while shrugging your shoulders. As the kettlebells rise, pull them up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows high and out to the sides. Catch the kettlebells at shoulder height, with your palms facing inward and your elbows pointing forward. Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手正握各持一个壶铃。膝盖略微弯曲，屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直、胸部向上。壶铃垂直悬挂于身体前侧。紧接着，通过一个流畅的动作，猛然伸展髋关节和膝关节，同时耸肩。当壶铃向上升起时，将其拉向肩膀位置，保持肘部向外侧展开。在肩膀高度接住壶铃，手掌朝内，肘部指向前方。将壶铃放回起始位置，按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Allow the kettlebells to hang straight down in front of your body.
In one fluid motion, explosively extend your hips and knees while shrugging your shoulders.
As the kettlebells rise, pull them up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows high and out to the sides.
Catch the kettlebells at shoulder height, with your palms facing inward and your elbows pointing forward.
Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手正握各持一个壶铃。
膝盖略微弯曲，屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直、胸部向上。
壶铃垂直悬挂于身体前侧。
紧接着，通过一个流畅的动作，猛然伸展髋关节和膝关节，同时耸肩。
当壶铃向上升起时，将其拉向肩膀位置，保持肘部向外侧展开。
在肩膀高度接住壶铃，手掌朝内，肘部指向前方。
将壶铃放回起始位置，按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Bend your knees and quickly drop into a partial squat. Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving the kettlebells overhead. Lock out your arms and catch the kettlebells overhead with your knees slightly bent. Stand up straight and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个壶铃置于肩部高度。略微屈膝，收紧核心肌群。将壶铃向上推举，双臂完全伸直。屈膝快速进入半蹲姿势。通过臀部和大腿的爆发式伸展向上推动壶铃。双臂完全伸直锁定，在膝关节微屈的状态下接住头顶的壶铃。身体直立恢复至起始姿势。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Bend your knees and quickly drop into a partial squat.
Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving the kettlebells overhead.
Lock out your arms and catch the kettlebells overhead with your knees slightly bent.
Stand up straight and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个壶铃置于肩部高度。
略微屈膝，收紧核心肌群。
将壶铃向上推举，双臂完全伸直。
屈膝快速进入半蹲姿势。
通过臀部和大腿的爆发式伸展向上推动壶铃。
双臂完全伸直锁定，在膝关节微屈的状态下接住头顶的壶铃。
身体直立恢复至起始姿势。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Initiate the movement by explosively extending your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the kettlebells overhead. As the kettlebells reach the top, press them fully overhead, locking out your arms. Lower the kettlebells back to the starting position by bending your elbows and bringing them back down to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃置于肩部高度。膝盖微屈，收紧核心肌群。通过爆发性地伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节，将壶铃向上推起。在壶铃到达顶端时，完全伸展手臂将其锁定在头顶上方。然后弯曲肘部，将壶铃缓慢下放回肩部高度的起始位置。根据需要的次数重复此动作。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Initiate the movement by explosively extending your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the kettlebells overhead.
As the kettlebells reach the top, press them fully overhead, locking out your arms.
Lower the kettlebells back to the starting position by bending your elbows and bringing them back down to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃置于肩部高度。
膝盖微屈，收紧核心肌群。
通过爆发性地伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节，将壶铃向上推起。
在壶铃到达顶端时，完全伸展手臂将其锁定在头顶上方。
弯曲肘部，将壶铃缓慢下放回肩部高度的起始位置。
根据需要的次数重复此动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arm's length in front of your thighs. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back flat and chest up. In one explosive motion, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, and simultaneously pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders. As the kettlebells reach shoulder level, rotate your wrists and punch the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃，壶铃置于大腿前方，手臂自然伸直。膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾，背部保持平直，胸部挺起。通过一个爆发性的动作，同时伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节，将壶铃向上拉向肩部。当壶铃到达肩部高度时，转动手腕并将壶铃向上推举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。将壶铃下放回起始位置，重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back flat and chest up.
In one explosive motion, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, and simultaneously pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.
As the kettlebells reach shoulder level, rotate your wrists and punch the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃，壶铃置于大腿前方，手臂自然伸直。
膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾，背部保持平直，胸部挺起。
通过一个爆发性的动作，同时伸展髋关节、膝关节和踝关节，将壶铃向上拉向肩部。
当壶铃到达肩部高度时，转动手腕并将壶铃向上推举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。
将壶铃下放回起始位置，重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand. Extend your right arm overhead, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell. Rotate your left foot 45 degrees to the left and your right foot 90 degrees to the right. Bend at the waist to the left, keeping your right arm extended overhead. Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, reaching towards your left foot. Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your right foot to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握住一只壶铃。将右臂垂直上举，目视壶铃。左脚向左转45度，右脚向右转90度。身体向左侧弯腰，同时保持右臂垂直向上伸直，将壶铃向下放，伸向左侧脚的方向。稍作停顿，然后收紧核心肌群，右脚用力蹬地，身体恢复起始姿势。按要求的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand.
Extend your right arm overhead, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell.
Rotate your left foot 45 degrees to the left and your right foot 90 degrees to the right.
Bend at the waist to the left, keeping your right arm extended overhead.
Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, reaching towards your left foot.
Pause for a moment, then engage your core and push through your right foot to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握住一只壶铃。
将右臂垂直上举，目视壶铃。
左脚向左转45度，右脚向右转90度。
身体向左侧弯腰，同时保持右臂垂直向上伸直。
将壶铃向下放，伸向左侧脚的方向。
稍作停顿，然后收紧核心肌群，右脚用力蹬地恢复起始姿势。
按要求的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧进行练习。

name.en: kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor
name.zh: 壶铃单臂伸展推举（地面）

instructions.en: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet. Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight. Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。单手持壶铃，掌心朝向脚部。将手臂伸直向上举至最高点，保持肘关节锁定、手腕挺直。然后缓慢将壶铃下放回起始位置，全程保持对动作的控制。重复完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
单手持壶铃，掌心朝向脚部。
将手臂伸直向上举至最高点，保持肘关节锁定、手腕挺直。
缓慢将壶铃下放回起始位置，全程保持对动作的控制。
重复完成所需次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Pass the kettlebell between your legs, switching hands as it reaches the back of your legs. As the kettlebell comes forward, pass it to the other hand between your legs. Continue passing the kettlebell between your legs in a figure 8 motion. Maintain a steady pace and engage your core throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住壶铃。膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。将壶铃从双腿间穿过，当壶铃到达腿后侧时换手。当壶铃向前摆动时，在双腿间将其传递给另一只手。继续以8字形的动作在双腿间传递壶铃。保持稳定的节奏，并在整个动作过程中收紧核心肌群。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Pass the kettlebell between your legs, switching hands as it reaches the back of your legs.
As the kettlebell comes forward, pass it to the other hand between your legs.
Continue passing the kettlebell between your legs in a figure 8 motion.
Maintain a steady pace and engage your core throughout the exercise.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住壶铃。
膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
将壶铃从双腿间穿过，当壶铃到达腿后侧时换手。
当壶铃向前摆动时，在双腿间将其传递给另一只手。
继续以8字形的动作在双腿间传递壶铃。
保持稳定的节奏，并在整个动作过程中收紧核心肌群。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your chest, close to your body. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。双手握住壶铃，放在胸前贴近身体。收紧核心，挺胸，然后屈髋向下向后蹲，模拟坐椅子的动作。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适范围内尽可能低。通过脚后跟发力站起，在顶部用力挤压臀部。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your chest, close to your body.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。
双手握住壶铃，放在胸前贴近身体。
收紧核心，挺胸，然后屈髋向下向后蹲，模拟坐椅子的动作。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在你舒适范围内尽可能低。
通过脚后跟发力站起，在顶部用力挤压臀部。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前托住壶铃。保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过弯曲膝关节和髋关节将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或尽可能舒适地降低至最低点。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands.
Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前托住壶铃。
保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过弯曲膝关节和髋关节将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势。
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或尽可能舒适地降低至最低点。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, allowing it to swing between your legs. Quickly extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbow tucked in and the kettlebell resting on your forearm. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position between your legs, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于大腿前侧。微微屈膝，以髋关节为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。将壶铃下放至两腿之间，使其在胯下自由摆动。迅速伸展髋关节和膝关节，借助惯性将壶铃向前上方摆动至肩部高度。当壶铃摆至肩部高度时，转动手腕，将壶铃接至胸前架式位置，手肘贴近身体，壶铃稳定在手臂上。然后将壶铃下落回初始位置，即两腿之间，完成一次动作。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, allowing it to swing between your legs.
Quickly extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbow tucked in and the kettlebell resting on your forearm.
Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position between your legs, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于大腿前侧。
微微屈膝，以髋关节为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。
将壶铃下放至两腿之间，使其在胯下自由摆动。
迅速伸展髋关节和膝关节，借助惯性将壶铃向前上方摆动至肩部高度。
当壶铃摆至肩部高度时，转动手腕，将壶铃接至胸前架式位置，手肘贴近身体，壶铃稳定在手臂上。
将壶铃下落回初始位置，即两腿之间，完成一次动作，根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge forward, pass the kettlebell under your right thigh and transfer it to your left hand. Push off with your right foot to return to the starting position, while simultaneously passing the kettlebell back to your right hand. Repeat the lunge on the opposite side, passing the kettlebell under your left thigh. Continue alternating lunges and passing the kettlebell between hands for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于胸前。右脚向前迈出，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。向前弓步的同时，将壶铃从右大腿下方传递到左手。然后右脚用力蹬地回到起始位置，同时将壶铃递回右手。换左腿重复同样的弓步动作，将壶铃从左大腿下方传递。持续交替进行弓步和壶铃换手，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands.
Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
As you lunge forward, pass the kettlebell under your right thigh and transfer it to your left hand.
Push off with your right foot to return to the starting position, while simultaneously passing the kettlebell back to your right hand.
Repeat the lunge on the opposite side, passing the kettlebell under your left thigh.
Continue alternating lunges and passing the kettlebell between hands for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于胸前。
右脚向前迈出，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。
向前弓步的同时，将壶铃从右大腿下方传递到左手。
右脚用力蹬地回到起始位置，同时将壶铃递回右手。
换左腿重复同样的弓步动作，将壶铃从左大腿下方传递。
持续交替进行弓步和壶铃换手，完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: kettlebell one arm clean and jerk

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell between your legs. Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist and punch your hand straight up, locking out your arm overhead. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手正握壶铃。膝盖微微弯曲，屈髋俯身，将壶铃置于双腿之间。借助髋、膝、踝三关节的爆发式伸展产生的惯性，将壶铃向上摆动至肩部高度。当壶铃到达肩部位置时，迅速翻转手腕，同时向上推举手臂直至手臂完全伸直过头顶。将壶铃缓慢放回起始位置，按要求的次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell between your legs.
Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist and punch your hand straight up, locking out your arm overhead.
Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手正握壶铃。
膝盖微微弯曲，屈髋俯身，将壶铃置于双腿之间。
借助髋、膝、踝三关节的爆发式伸展产生的惯性，将壶铃向上摆动至肩部高度。
当壶铃到达肩部位置时，迅速翻转手腕，同时向上推举手臂直至手臂完全伸直过头顶。
将壶铃缓慢放回起始位置，按要求的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the kettlebell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet and your arm extended straight up towards the ceiling. Slowly lower the kettlebell towards your chest by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm close to your body. Pause for a moment when the kettlebell is just above your chest, then push it back up to the starting position by extending your elbow. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。单手握住壶铃，掌心朝向脚的方向，手臂垂直向上伸直。屈肘将壶铃缓慢下放至胸部位置，保持上臂贴近身体。当壶铃下放至胸部上方时稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将壶铃推回起始位置。完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂继续练习。

en: Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the kettlebell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet and your arm extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Slowly lower the kettlebell towards your chest by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the kettlebell is just above your chest, then push it back up to the starting position by extending your elbow.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。
单手握住壶铃，掌心朝向脚的方向，手臂垂直向上伸直。
屈肘将壶铃缓慢下放至胸部位置，保持上臂贴近身体。
在壶铃下放至胸部上方时稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将壶铃推回起始位置。
完成目标次数后，换另一侧手臂继续练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Press the kettlebell overhead in a straight line, fully extending your arm. As you press the kettlebell overhead, simultaneously dip your knees and quickly straighten them to generate momentum. As the kettlebell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it by bending your knees and hips. Catch the kettlebell with a slight bend in your knees and hips, and your arm fully extended overhead. Stand up straight, fully extending your knees and hips, and stabilize the kettlebell overhead. Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and hips, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，单手握住壶铃置于肩部高度。膝盖微屈，收紧核心力量。将壶铃沿直线向上推举，手臂完全伸展。在推举过程中，膝盖同时下沉并快速蹬直以产生向上惯性。当壶铃到达最高点时，迅速屈膝屈髋下蹲，将身体置于壶铃下方。屈膝屈髋接住壶铃，手臂完全伸展。双腿蹬直，完全伸展膝盖和髋关节，在头顶上方稳住壶铃。屈膝屈髋将壶铃放回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Press the kettlebell overhead in a straight line, fully extending your arm.
As you press the kettlebell overhead, simultaneously dip your knees and quickly straighten them to generate momentum.
As the kettlebell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it by bending your knees and hips.
Catch the kettlebell with a slight bend in your knees and hips, and your arm fully extended overhead.
Stand up straight, fully extending your knees and hips, and stabilize the kettlebell overhead.
Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and hips, and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，单手握住壶铃置于肩部高度。
膝盖微屈，收紧核心力量。
将壶铃沿直线向上推举，手臂完全伸展。
在推举过程中，膝盖同时下沉并快速蹬直以产生向上惯性。
当壶铃到达最高点时，迅速屈膝屈髋下蹲，将身体置于壶铃下方。
屈膝屈髋接住壶铃，手臂完全伸展。
双腿蹬直，完全伸展膝盖和髋关节，在头顶上方稳住壶铃。
屈膝屈髋将壶铃放回起始位置，重复至所需次数。

name.en: kettlebell one arm military press to the side

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height. Engage your core and keep your back straight. Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，单手握住壶铃置于肩部高度。收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。将壶铃向上推举，手臂完全伸展。在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将壶铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行相同的动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，单手握住壶铃置于肩部高度。
收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。
将壶铃向上推举，手臂完全伸展。
在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将壶铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder level. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Press the kettlebell overhead by extending your arm and fully extending your legs. Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and bringing the kettlebell back to your shoulder. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住壶铃置于肩部高度。微微弯曲膝盖，收紧核心肌群。通过手臂向上伸展和双腿完全伸直，将壶铃向上推举过头顶。然后弯曲膝盖，将壶铃带回肩部高度，回到起始位置。重复所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder level.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Press the kettlebell overhead by extending your arm and fully extending your legs.
Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by bending your knees and bringing the kettlebell back to your shoulder.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住壶铃置于肩部高度。
微微弯曲膝盖，收紧核心肌群。
通过手臂向上伸展和双腿完全伸直，将壶铃向上推举过头顶。
弯曲膝盖，将壶铃带回肩部高度，回到起始位置。
重复所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手持壶铃，采用正握。略微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将壶铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将壶铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂重复。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the kettlebell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，单手持壶铃，采用正握。
略微弯曲膝盖，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将壶铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将壶铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧手臂重复。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand between your legs. Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground. Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up towards your shoulder. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your hand and punch it straight up overhead, fully extending your arm. Lower the kettlebell back down between your legs and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手握住壶铃置于双腿之间。膝盖略微弯曲，屈髋向前倾，将壶铃下放至身体前方。通过髋部和膝关节的快速爆发式伸展，利用惯性将壶铃向前上方摆动。当壶铃摆动至肩部高度时，迅速翻转手腕并将壶铃向上推举，手臂完全伸直过头顶。然后将壶铃下放回双腿之间，按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand between your legs.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground.
Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up towards your shoulder.
As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your hand and punch it straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Lower the kettlebell back down between your legs and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住壶铃置于双腿之间。
膝盖微曲，屈髋向前倾，将壶铃下放至身体前下方。
通过髋关节和膝关节快速爆发式伸展，利用惯性将壶铃向前上方摆动。
当壶铃摆动至肩部高度时，迅速翻转手腕并向上推举，手臂完全伸直过头顶。
将壶铃下放回双腿之间，按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise the kettlebell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body. Extend your arm fully overhead, straightening your elbow. Lower the kettlebell back down to shoulder height, then return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住一只壶铃。膝盖微微弯曲，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直。将壶铃提拉至肩部高度，手肘靠近身体。手臂完全伸直举过头顶，肘关节打直。将壶铃下落回至肩部高度，然后恢复起始姿势。重复所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Raise the kettlebell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Extend your arm fully overhead, straightening your elbow.
Lower the kettlebell back down to shoulder height, then return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住一只壶铃。
膝盖微微弯曲，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直。
将壶铃提拉至肩部高度，手肘靠近身体。
手臂完全伸直举过头顶，肘关节打直。
将壶铃下落回至肩部高度，然后恢复起始姿势。
重复所需次数后，换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands. Lift your left foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground. Slowly lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your right foot flat on the ground and your left leg extended. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于胸前。将左脚抬离地面并向前伸展，保持与地面平行。缓慢下蹲至深蹲姿势，右脚平放于地面，左腿保持伸展。在深蹲底部稍作停留，然后通过右脚后跟用力蹬地返回起始姿势。完成所需次数后换腿进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands.
Lift your left foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground.
Slowly lower your body down into a squat position, keeping your right foot flat on the ground and your left leg extended.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于胸前。
将左脚抬离地面并向前伸展，保持与地面平行。
缓慢下蹲至深蹲姿势，右脚平放于地面，左腿保持伸展。
在深蹲底部稍作停留，然后通过右脚后跟用力蹬地返回起始姿势。
完成所需次数后换腿进行。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the kettlebells, shoulder-width apart. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. Push through your hands explosively, lifting your hands off the kettlebells and extending your arms fully. Land softly back on the kettlebells and immediately lower your chest back down for the next repetition. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为高位平板支撑，双手撑在壶铃上，间距与肩同宽。将胸部向地面方向下降，保持肘部靠近身体。通过双手爆发性地向上推起，将双手完全离地并伸展手臂。然后轻柔地落回壶铃上，立即将胸部下降进行下一次重复。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the kettlebells, shoulder-width apart.
Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Push through your hands explosively, lifting your hands off the kettlebells and extending your arms fully.
Land softly back on the kettlebells and immediately lower your chest back down for the next repetition.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为高位平板支撑，双手撑在壶铃上，间距与肩同宽。
将胸部向地面方向下降，保持肘部靠近身体。
通过双手爆发性地向上推起，将双手完全离地并伸展手臂。
轻柔地落回壶铃上，立即将胸部下降进行下一次重复。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward. Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放于地面。双手各持一只壶铃，位于肩部高度，掌心朝前。将壶铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。然后将壶铃缓慢下落至肩部高度。按照目标次数重复练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在训练凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放于地面。
双手各持一只壶铃，位于肩部高度，掌心朝前。
将壶铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。
将壶铃缓慢下落至肩部高度。
按照目标次数重复练习。

name.en: kettlebell seated two arm military press
name.zh: 壶铃坐姿双臂实力推举

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward. Press the kettlebells overhead by extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手各持一个壶铃，放在肩部高度，手掌朝前。将壶铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将壶铃降回肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Press the kettlebells overhead by extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手各持一个壶铃，放在肩部高度，手掌朝前。
通过手臂完全伸直将壶铃向上推举。
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢将壶铃降回肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height. Press one kettlebell overhead while keeping the other kettlebell at shoulder height. Lower the pressed kettlebell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other kettlebell overhead. Continue alternating the pressing motion, creating a seesaw-like movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃，壶铃置于肩部高度。将一只壶铃向上推举至头顶，同时保持另一只壶铃在肩部高度。将推举的壶铃下落回至肩部高度，同时将另一只壶铃向上推举至头顶。持续交替进行推举动作，形成类似跷跷板的运动模式。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Press one kettlebell overhead while keeping the other kettlebell at shoulder height.
Lower the pressed kettlebell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other kettlebell overhead.
Continue alternating the pressing motion, creating a seesaw-like movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只壶铃，壶铃置于肩部高度。
将一只壶铃向上推举至头顶，同时保持另一只壶铃在肩部高度。
将推举的壶铃下落回至肩部高度，同时将另一只壶铃向上推举至头顶。
持续交替进行推举动作，形成类似跷跷板的运动模式。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards. Hold a kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended downwards. Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight. Drive through your heels and explosively extend your hips and knees, pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin. As you pull the kettlebell up, keep your elbows high and wide, and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖向外。双手握住壶铃置于身体前方，手臂向下伸直。屈膝并将臀部下降至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直。通过脚后跟发力，爆发性地伸展髋关节和膝关节，将壶铃向你的下巴方向拉起。在上拉壶铃的过程中，保持肘部高而宽，并将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。将壶铃放下回到起始位置，按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Hold a kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended downwards.
Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Drive through your heels and explosively extend your hips and knees, pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin.
As you pull the kettlebell up, keep your elbows high and wide, and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖向外。
双手握住壶铃置于身体前下方，手臂向下伸直。
屈膝并将臀部下降至深蹲姿势，保持背部挺直。
通过脚后跟发力，爆发性地伸展髋关节和膝关节，将壶铃向下巴方向拉起。
上拉壶铃时，保持肘部高而宽，并将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
将壶铃放回起始位置，按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward. Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended. Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, pushing your butt back. Swing the kettlebell back between your legs, keeping your arms straight and maintaining a flat back. Drive your hips forward and swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height, using the momentum generated by your hips. Allow the kettlebell to swing back down between your legs and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展站立。双手握住壶铃置于身体前方，双臂伸直。膝盖微屈，屈髋向后坐，将臀部向后推。保持手臂伸直和背部平直，将壶铃向后摆动至双腿之间。利用髋部爆发的力量向前顶胯，将壶铃摆动至肩部高度。壶铃自由下落回双腿之间，然后重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward.
Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, pushing your butt back.
Swing the kettlebell back between your legs, keeping your arms straight and maintaining a flat back.
