Drive your hips forward and swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height, using the momentum generated by your hips.
Allow the kettlebell to swing back down between your legs and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展站立。
双手握住壶铃置于身体前方，双臂伸直。
膝盖微屈，屈髋向后坐，将臀部向后推。
保持手臂伸直和背部平直，将壶铃向后摆动至双腿之间。
利用髋部爆发的力量向前顶胯，将壶铃摆动至肩部高度。
壶铃自由下落回双腿之间，然后重复上述动作至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other. Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead. Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows. Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于胸前，掌心相对。屈膝下蹲，同时臀部向后推，保持胸部挺直和背部挺直。到达蹲底后，通过脚跟爆发性发力向上站起，同时将壶铃向上推举过头顶。在动作顶端，手臂完全伸直，肘部充分伸展。通过反向动作将壶铃降至起始位置，弯曲肘部将重量放回胸前。按目标次数重复练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your chest with both hands, palms facing each other.
Lower into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your heels to stand up, simultaneously pressing the kettlebell overhead.
Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, fully extending your elbows.
Lower the kettlebell back to the starting position by reversing the movement, bending your elbows and lowering the weight back to your chest.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于胸前，掌心相对。
屈膝下蹲，同时臀部向后推，保持胸部挺直和背部挺直。
到达蹲底后，通过脚跟爆发性发力向上站起，同时将壶铃向上推举过头顶。
在动作顶端，手臂完全伸直，肘部充分伸展。
通过反向动作将壶铃降至起始位置，弯曲肘部将重量放回胸前。
按目标次数重复练习。

name.zh: 壶铃土耳其起立（深蹲式）

instructions.en: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and the kettlebell held in your right hand, arm fully extended above your shoulder. Bend your right knee and place your right foot flat on the ground, keeping your left leg extended. Pressing through your right foot, lift your hips off the ground, coming into a bridge position. Slide your left leg underneath your body, bending your left knee and placing your left foot flat on the ground. Rotate your torso to the left, bringing your left hand to the ground for support. Pressing through your right foot and left hand, lift your torso off the ground, coming into a kneeling position. From the kneeling position, stand up, keeping the kettlebell extended overhead. Reverse the movement to return to the starting position. Repeat the exercise on the other side, starting with the kettlebell in your left hand.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为仰卧在地面上，双腿伸直，右手握住壶铃，手臂完全伸展举过头顶。弯曲右膝，将右脚平放在地面上，左腿保持伸直。通过右脚发力，将臀部抬离地面，进入桥式姿势。将左腿滑至身体下方，弯曲左膝并将左脚平放在地面上。向左旋转躯干，将左手放在地面上支撑。通过右脚和左手发力，将躯干抬离地面，进入跪姿。从跪姿站起身，同时将壶铃保持在头顶上方。反向执行动作回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复练习，这次用左手握住壶铃。

en: Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and the kettlebell held in your right hand, arm fully extended above your shoulder.
Bend your right knee and place your right foot flat on the ground, keeping your left leg extended.
Pressing through your right foot, lift your hips off the ground, coming into a bridge position.
Slide your left leg underneath your body, bending your left knee and placing your left foot flat on the ground.
Rotate your torso to the left, bringing your left hand to the ground for support.
Pressing through your right foot and left hand, lift your torso off the ground, coming into a kneeling position.
From the kneeling position, stand up, keeping the kettlebell extended overhead.
Reverse the movement to return to the starting position.
Repeat the exercise on the other side, starting with the kettlebell in your left hand.
zh: 起始姿势为仰卧在地面上，双腿伸直，右手握住壶铃，手臂完全伸展举过头顶。
弯曲右膝，将右脚平放在地面上，左腿保持伸直。
通过右脚发力，将臀部抬离地面，进入桥式姿势。
将左腿滑至身体下方，弯曲左膝并将左脚平放在地面上。
向左旋转躯干，将左手放在地面上支撑。
通过右脚和左手发力，将躯干抬离地面，进入跪姿。
从跪姿站起身，同时将壶铃保持在头顶上方。
反向执行动作回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复练习，这次用左手握住壶铃。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs with both hands, palms facing towards you. Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground. Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to pull the kettlebell up towards your shoulders. As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbows tucked in and the kettlebell resting on the back of your forearm. Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于大腿前侧，掌心朝向身体。膝盖微屈，臀部向后推，将壶铃向下放低至起始位置。然后通过臀部和腿部的爆发力蹬地，利用惯性将壶铃向上拉起。当壶铃到达肩部高度时，迅速翻转手腕，将壶铃稳稳接在肩部位置，手肘内收，壶铃落在前臂后侧。最后将壶铃放回起始位置，按要求的重复次数进行训练。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in front of your thighs with both hands, palms facing towards you.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell towards the ground.
Explosively extend your hips and knees, using the momentum to pull the kettlebell up towards your shoulders.
As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrists and catch the kettlebell in the rack position, with your elbows tucked in and the kettlebell resting on the back of your forearm.
Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住壶铃置于大腿前侧，掌心朝向身体。
膝盖微屈，臀部向后推，将壶铃向下放低至起始位置。
通过臀部和腿部的爆发力蹬地，利用惯性将壶铃向上拉起。
当壶铃到达肩部高度时，迅速翻转手腕，将壶铃稳稳接在肩部位置，手肘内收，壶铃落在前臂后侧。
将壶铃放回起始位置，按要求的重复次数进行训练。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward. Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只壶铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。收紧核心肌群，将壶铃向上推举直至手臂完全伸展。在顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将壶铃降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各握一只壶铃置于肩部高度，掌心朝前。
收紧核心肌群，将壶铃向上推举直至手臂完全伸展。
在顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将壶铃降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the kettlebells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，双手各持一只壶铃，掌心朝向身体。屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将壶铃向上拉向胸部方向，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将壶铃放回起始位置。重复至所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a kettlebell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the kettlebells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，双手各持一只壶铃，掌心朝向身体。
屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将壶铃向上拉向胸部方向，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将壶铃放回起始位置。
重复至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand overhead. Rotate your left foot outwards about 45 degrees and keep your right foot pointing forward. Bend your torso to the left side, keeping your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell. Lower your torso as far as you can while keeping your right arm straight and your left arm extended to the side. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by pushing through your right foot and engaging your obliques. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握壶铃举过头顶。将左脚向外旋转约45度，右脚保持朝前。向左倾斜躯干，保持右臂伸直举过头顶，目视壶铃。在保持右臂伸直、左臂向侧面伸展的同时，尽可能降低躯干。稍作停顿，然后通过右脚发力并收紧腹斜肌回到起始姿势。重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in your right hand overhead.
Rotate your left foot outwards about 45 degrees and keep your right foot pointing forward.
Bend your torso to the left side, keeping your right arm extended overhead and your eyes on the kettlebell.
Lower your torso as far as you can while keeping your right arm straight and your left arm extended to the side.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position by pushing through your right foot and engaging your obliques.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，右手握壶铃举过头顶。
将左脚向外旋转约45度，右脚保持朝前。
向左倾斜躯干，保持右臂伸直举过头顶，目视壶铃。
在保持右臂伸直、左臂向侧面伸展的同时，尽可能降低躯干。
稍作停顿，然后通过右脚发力并收紧腹斜肌回到起始姿势。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Lean back slightly and place your hands on the edge of the bench or chair for support. Engaging your hamstrings, lift your feet off the ground and extend your legs straight out in front of you. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees and bring your feet back towards your body. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子的边缘，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度。身体微微后倾，双手放在凳子或椅子边缘以保持支撑。收紧腘绳肌，将双脚抬离地面并向前伸直双腿。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢弯曲膝盖，将双脚收回到身体附近。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Lean back slightly and place your hands on the edge of the bench or chair for support.
Engaging your hamstrings, lift your feet off the ground and extend your legs straight out in front of you.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees and bring your feet back towards your body.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子的边缘，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度。
身体微微后倾，双手放在凳子或椅子边缘以保持支撑。
收紧腘绳肌，将双脚抬离地面并向前伸直双腿。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢弯曲膝盖，将双脚收回到身体附近。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and use a swinging motion to generate momentum. As you swing forward, pull your chest towards the bar, using your lats and biceps to initiate the movement. Continue the upward motion until your chest reaches the bar, then transition into a dip position by pushing down on the bar and extending your arms. Lower yourself back down to the starting position by bending your arms and controlling the descent. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双手正握单杠，握距略宽于肩宽。收紧核心肌群，通过身体摆动产生向上的动力。向前摆动时，利用背阔肌和肱二头肌发力，将胸部向单杠方向拉起。持续向上直到胸部接触单杠，然后过渡到双杠臂屈伸姿势，双手撑住单杠并将手臂伸直撑起身体。通过弯曲手臂和控制下降速度，缓缓回到起始姿势。重复上述动作至目标次数。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and use a swinging motion to generate momentum.
As you swing forward, pull your chest towards the bar, using your lats and biceps to initiate the movement.
Continue the upward motion until your chest reaches the bar, then transition into a dip position by pushing down on the bar and extending your arms.
Lower yourself back down to the starting position by bending your arms and controlling the descent.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握单杠，握距略宽于肩宽，从悬挂姿势开始。
收紧核心肌群，通过身体摆动产生向上的动力。
向前摆动时，利用背阔肌和肱二头肌发力，将胸部向单杠方向拉起。
持续向上直到胸部接触单杠，然后双手撑住单杠并将手臂伸直，过渡到双杠臂屈伸姿势。
通过弯曲手臂和控制下降速度，缓缓回到起始悬挂姿势。
重复上述动作至目标次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and reach your right hand towards your left knee. Return to the starting position and repeat, this time reaching your left hand towards your right knee. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地。将双手置于头后，手肘向两侧展开。收紧腹肌，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时用右手去触碰左膝。回到起始姿势，然后换另一侧，用左手去触碰右膝。继续左右交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and reach your right hand towards your left knee.
Return to the starting position and repeat, this time reaching your left hand towards your right knee.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地。
将双手置于头后，手肘向两侧展开。
收紧腹肌，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时用右手去触碰左膝。
回到起始姿势，然后换另一侧，用左手去触碰右膝。
继续左右交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your feet hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders. Engage your core and glutes, then explosively jump up into the air, extending your hips and knees. As you jump, push through your toes and fully extend your ankles, knees, and hips. Land softly back on the ground, bending your knees to absorb the impact. Immediately go into the next repetition, repeating the jump squat motion.
instructions.zh: 首先双膝跪地，双脚分开与髋同宽，脚尖朝前。将杠铃横跨在上背部，置于肩膀上。收紧核心和臀肌，然后爆发性地向上跳起，伸展髋关节和膝关节。跳跃时，用脚尖发力，充分伸展踝关节、膝关节和髋关节。轻柔地落回地面，弯曲膝盖以吸收冲击力。立即进行下一次重复，连续进行跳深蹲动作。

en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your feet hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your shoulders.
Engage your core and glutes, then explosively jump up into the air, extending your hips and knees.
As you jump, push through your toes and fully extend your ankles, knees, and hips.
Land softly back on the ground, bending your knees to absorb the impact.
Immediately go into the next repetition, repeating the jump squat motion.
zh: 首先双膝跪地，双脚分开与髋同宽，脚尖朝前。
将杠铃横跨在上背部，置于肩膀上。
收紧核心和臀肌，然后爆发性地向上跳起，伸展髋关节和膝关节。
跳跃时，用脚尖发力，充分伸展踝关节、膝关节和髋关节。
轻柔地落回地面，弯曲膝盖以吸收冲击力。
立即进行下一次重复，连续进行跳深蹲动作。

instructions.en: Kneel on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing back. Extend your arms overhead and interlace your fingers. Keeping your back straight, slowly lean to the right side, feeling a stretch in your left lat muscle. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat the stretch on the left side, leaning to the left and feeling a stretch in your right lat muscle. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双膝跪地，膝盖与髋同宽，脚尖向后。双臂向上伸直并十指交叉。保持背部挺直，慢慢向右侧倾斜，感受左侧背阔肌的拉伸。保持20-30秒，然后回到起始位置。换到左侧重复同样的拉伸动作，向左侧倾斜并感受右侧背阔肌的拉伸。继续左右交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Kneel on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing back.
Extend your arms overhead and interlace your fingers.
Keeping your back straight, slowly lean to the right side, feeling a stretch in your left lat muscle.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the stretch on the left side, leaning to the left and feeling a stretch in your right lat muscle.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双膝跪地，膝盖与髋同宽，脚尖向后。
双臂向上伸直并十指交叉。
保持背部挺直，慢慢向右侧倾斜，感受左侧背阔肌的拉伸。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后回到起始位置。
换到左侧重复同样的拉伸动作，向左侧倾斜并感受右侧背阔肌的拉伸。
继续左右交替进行所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 跪姿平板支撑触肩（男性）

instructions.en: Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position. Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder. Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为跪姿，双手撑地，间距与肩同宽。将双腿向后伸展，以脚尖支撑，将身体抬起成平板支撑姿势。保持核心收紧和髋部稳定，将一只手抬离地面并触碰对侧肩膀。将手放回地面，换另一只手重复动作。继续交替进行所需次数的重复。

en: Start in a kneeling position with your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart.
Extend your legs behind you, resting on your toes, and lift your body into a plank position.
Keeping your core engaged and your hips stable, lift one hand off the ground and tap the opposite shoulder.
Return the hand to the ground and repeat with the other hand.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为跪姿，双手放在地面上，间距与肩同宽。
将双腿向后伸展，以脚尖支撑，将身体抬起成平板支撑姿势。
保持核心收紧和髋部稳定，将一只手抬离地面并触碰对侧肩膀。
将手放回地面，换另一只手重复动作。
继续交替进行所需次数的重复。

instructions.en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your hands shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward. Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, so that your body forms a straight line from head to heels. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Continue lowering until your chest is just above the ground, then push back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双膝跪地，双手与肩同宽放置，手指朝前。双腿向后伸直，用脚尖着地，使身体从头到脚跟呈一条直线。收紧核心，通过弯曲手肘将身体向地面下降，手肘贴近身体两侧。继续下降直到胸部刚刚高于地面，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your hands shoulder-width apart, fingers pointing forward.
Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, so that your body forms a straight line from head to heels.
Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Continue lowering until your chest is just above the ground, then push back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双膝跪地，双手与肩同宽，手指朝前放置。
双腿向后伸直，用脚尖着地，使身体从头到脚跟呈一条直线。
收紧核心，通过弯曲手肘将身体向地面下降，手肘贴近身体两侧。
继续下降直到胸部刚刚高于地面，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms extended and supporting your body weight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手撑在双杠上，双臂伸直支撑身体重量。弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。重复完成目标次数。

en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms extended and supporting your body weight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手撑在双杠上，双臂伸直支撑身体重量。
弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
重复完成目标次数。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your lats and biceps to pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手正握单杠，间距略宽于肩部。双臂完全伸直，身体保持笔直悬挂。收缩背阔肌和肱二头肌发力，将身体向上拉起，同时保持肘部靠近身体，继续向上拉，直至下巴超过单杠。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将身体下放回起始位置，重复至目标次数。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your lats and biceps to pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握单杠，间距略宽于肩部。
双臂完全伸直，身体保持笔直悬挂。
收缩背阔肌和肱二头肌发力，将身体向上拉起，同时保持肘部靠近身体。
继续向上拉，直至下巴超过单杠。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将身体下放回起始位置。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you. Place your hands on the floor beside your hips, fingers pointing forward. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Try to bring your legs parallel to the floor, forming an 'L' shape with your body. Hold this position for as long as you can. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地板上，双腿伸直放在身前。将双手放在臀部两侧的地板上，手指朝前。收紧核心并将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。尽量将双腿抬至与地面平行的位置，使身体形成L形。尽可能长时间保持这个姿势。慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Place your hands on the floor beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Try to bring your legs parallel to the floor, forming an 'L' shape with your body.
Hold this position for as long as you can.
Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地板上，双腿伸直放在身前。
将双手放在臀部两侧的地板上，手指朝前。
收紧核心并将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。
尽量将双腿抬至与地面平行的位置，使身体形成L形。
尽可能长时间保持这个姿势。
慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your chest. Bend your knees slightly and rotate your torso to the right, swinging the barbell down towards your right hip. As you reach the bottom of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and rotate your torso to the left, swinging the barbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder. Continue this twisting motion, alternating sides, for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃置于胸前。膝盖微屈，躯干向右扭转，将杠铃向下挥动至右髋部。动作到达底部时，迅速反向运动，躯干向左旋转，将杠铃向上挥动穿过身体至左肩部。持续交替进行扭转动作，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell with both hands in front of your chest.
Bend your knees slightly and rotate your torso to the right, swinging the barbell down towards your right hip.
As you reach the bottom of the movement, quickly reverse the motion and rotate your torso to the left, swinging the barbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder.
Continue this twisting motion, alternating sides, for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住杠铃置于胸前。
膝盖微屈，躯干向右扭转，将杠铃向下挥动至右髋部。
动作到达底部时，迅速反向运动，躯干向左旋转，将杠铃向上挥动穿过身体至左肩部。
持续交替进行扭转动作，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders. Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双手正握杠铃，将杠铃置于肩部前侧。保持核心收紧、背部挺直，将杠铃向上向外举起，抬升至肩部高度。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。重复进行至所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders.
Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手正握杠铃，将杠铃置于肩部前侧。
保持核心收紧、背部挺直，将杠铃向上向外举起，抬升至肩部高度。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。
重复进行至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body straight. Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders past your hands. Keep your elbows slightly bent and your body straight as you lean forward. Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体保持笔直。收紧核心肌群，缓慢将重心前移，让肩膀超过双手的位置。前倾时保持肘部微微弯曲，身体呈一条直线。保持该姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body straight.
Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders past your hands.
Keep your elbows slightly bent and your body straight as you lean forward.
Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体保持笔直。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢将重心前移，让肩膀超过双手的位置。
前倾时保持肘部微微弯曲，身体呈一条直线。
保持该姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Keep your left hand up to protect your face and your right hand by your chin. Rotate your hips and pivot on your left foot as you extend your left arm forward in a punching motion. Twist your torso and engage your core muscles to generate power in the punch. Snap your arm back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。左手抬起护住面部，右手置于下巴处。在出拳时旋转髋部，以左脚为轴心脚，同时向前伸展左臂完成勾拳动作。通过扭转躯干并收紧核心肌群来为出拳提供力量。快速将手臂收回至起始位置，按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Keep your left hand up to protect your face and your right hand by your chin.
Rotate your hips and pivot on your left foot as you extend your left arm forward in a punching motion.
Twist your torso and engage your core muscles to generate power in the punch.
Snap your arm back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。
左手抬起保护面部，右手置于下巴位置。
旋转髋部，以左脚为轴心脚，同时向前伸展左臂完成勾拳动作。
扭转躯干并收紧核心肌群，为出拳提供力量。
快速将手臂收回至起始位置，按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you. Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support. Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平板凳上，双腿向前伸直。双手放在臀部两侧的凳子上以支撑身体。收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，同时将膝盖向胸部靠拢。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放下，恢复到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平板凳上，双腿向前伸直。
双手放在臀部两侧的凳子上以支撑身体。
收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，同时将膝盖向胸部靠拢。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放下，恢复到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended. Bend one knee and bring it towards your chest, holding onto your thigh or shin. Straighten your leg as much as possible while keeping it elevated. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Repeat with the other leg.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直。弯曲一侧膝盖，将其向胸部靠拢，同时用手握住大腿或小腿。尽可能伸直抬起的那条腿。保持拉伸姿势20-30秒。换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended.
Bend one knee and bring it towards your chest, holding onto your thigh or shin.
Straighten your leg as much as possible while keeping it elevated.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Repeat with the other leg.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直。
弯曲一侧膝盖，将其向胸部靠拢，同时用手握住大腿或小腿。
尽可能伸直抬起的那条腿。
保持拉伸姿势20-30秒。
换另一条腿重复同样的动作。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat and foot platform of the leverage machine to your desired position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the foot platform. Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability. Push one foot against the foot platform, extending your leg until it is almost fully straight. Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your leg and return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整器械的座椅和脚踏板到适合自己的位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚踩在脚踏板上。双手握住器械把手或两侧以保持身体稳定。用一只脚用力蹬向脚踏板，将腿伸直到几乎完全伸直的状态。保持片刻，然后慢慢屈膝回到起始位置。换另一条腿重复上述动作。两侧腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Adjust the seat and foot platform of the leverage machine to your desired position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the foot platform.
Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Push one foot against the foot platform, extending your leg until it is almost fully straight.
Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your leg and return to the starting position.
Repeat with the other leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先调整器械的座椅和脚踏板到适合自己的位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚踩在脚踏板上。
双手握住器械把手或两侧以保持身体稳定。
用一只脚用力蹬向脚踏板，将腿伸直到几乎完全伸直的状态。
保持片刻，然后慢慢屈膝回到起始位置。
换另一条腿重复上述动作。
两侧腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: lever alternating narrow grip seated row
name.zh: 器械交替窄握坐姿划船

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment. Sit on the machine with your back straight and feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other. Keep your chest up and shoulders back throughout the exercise. Pull one handle towards your torso while keeping the other handle stationary. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement. Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat with the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置，确保身体处于正确的对齐姿势。坐在器械上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在脚踏板上。用较窄的握距握住把手，掌心相对。在整个动作过程中保持胸部挺起，肩部向后。将一只手柄向身体方向拉，同时保持另一只手柄不动。在动作末端时，将肩胛骨夹紧。慢慢将手柄回到起始位置，然后用另一侧重复相同的动作。继续交替两侧，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Sit on the machine with your back straight and feet flat on the footplate.
Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Keep your chest up and shoulders back throughout the exercise.
Pull one handle towards your torso while keeping the other handle stationary.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Slowly return the handle to the starting position and repeat with the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置以确保正确的身体对齐。
坐在器械上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在脚踏板上。
用窄握方式握住把手，掌心相对。
在整个动作过程中保持胸部挺起、肩部向后。
向身体方向拉动一侧把手，同时保持另一侧把手不动。
在动作结束时挤压肩胛骨。
慢慢将把手返回起始位置，然后换另一侧重复。
交替进行两侧动作，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level. Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到合适的力量辅助档位。双脚站立在踏板上，采用正握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。手臂完全伸直悬垂，身体保持直立。发力时集中注意力在背部肌群，将身体向上拉起，以胸部为先导。继续向上拉直至下巴超过把手。到达顶峰位置时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the leverage machine to your desired resistance level.
Stand on the foot platform and grip the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang with your arms fully extended, keeping your body straight.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the handles, leading with your chest.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the handles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到所需的力量辅助档位。
双脚站立在踏板上，采用正握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。
手臂完全伸直悬垂，身体保持直立。
集中背部肌群发力，将身体向上拉起，以胸部为先导。
继续向上拉直至下巴超过把手。
到达顶峰位置时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to fit your body size and range of motion. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured. Place your hands on the handles or grip bars. Engage your core and slowly lean forward, allowing your back to round slightly. Pause for a moment at the bottom position, feeling a stretch in your lower back. Using your back muscles, slowly raise your torso back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械以适应您的身体尺寸和运动范围。坐在器械上，背部靠在垫子上，双脚固定。双手放在把手或握把上。收紧核心肌群，慢慢向前倾，让背部微微弯曲。在最低位置稍作停顿，感受下背部的拉伸。用背部肌肉慢慢将躯干抬回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the machine to fit your body size and range of motion.
Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured.
Place your hands on the handles or grip bars.
Engage your core and slowly lean forward, allowing your back to round slightly.
Pause for a moment at the bottom position, feeling a stretch in your lower back.
Using your back muscles, slowly raise your torso back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械以适应您的身体尺寸和运动范围。
坐在器械上，背部靠在垫子上，双脚固定。
双手放在把手或握把上。
收紧核心肌群，慢慢向前倾，让背部微微弯曲。
在最低位置稍作停顿，感受下背部的拉伸。
用背部肌肉慢慢将躯干抬回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双手正握杠铃，握距略宽于肩。屈髋俯身，保持背部挺直，胸部向上。将杠铃拉向胸部下方，收缩肩胛骨。顶峰收缩片刻，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手正握杠铃，握距略宽于肩。
屈髋俯身，保持背部挺直，胸部向上。
将杠铃拉向胸部下方，收缩肩胛骨。
顶峰收缩片刻，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine. Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Pull the v-bar towards your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the weight back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整好器械座椅的高度，面对器械站好。双手握住V形杆，采用正握方式，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。将V形杆向腹部方向拉，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将重量放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Pull the v-bar towards your abdomen, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the weight back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整好器械座椅的高度，面对器械站好。
双手握住V形杆，采用正握方式，保持背部挺直，膝盖微微弯曲。
将V形杆向腹部方向拉，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将重量放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides. Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠垫坐在器械上。双手握住手柄，采用反握姿势，掌心向上，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。呼气时向上弯举手柄，收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。吸气时缓慢将手柄放回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides.
Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠垫坐在器械上。
双手握住手柄，采用反握姿势，掌心向上，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
呼气时向上弯举手柄，收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气时缓慢将手柄放回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the leverage machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad. Place your toes on the lever pad, with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the handles or side supports for stability. Push the lever pad down by extending your ankles, contracting your calf muscles. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement. Slowly return to the starting position by allowing your heels to rise back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械座椅的高度，使你的肩膀与杠杆垫保持对齐。将脚趾放在杠杆垫上，脚跟悬空在边缘之外。握住把手或侧面的支撑杆以保持身体稳定。通过伸展脚踝向下推动杠杆垫，同时收缩小腿肌肉。在动作的最低点稍作停顿。然后慢慢回到起始位置，让脚跟向上抬起。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Adjust the seat of the leverage machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Place your toes on the lever pad, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Grasp the handles or side supports for stability.
Push the lever pad down by extending your ankles, contracting your calf muscles.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Slowly return to the starting position by allowing your heels to rise back up.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械座椅的高度，使肩膀与杠杆垫保持对齐。
将脚趾放在杠杆垫上，脚跟悬空在边缘之外。
握住把手或侧面的支撑杆以保持身体稳定。
通过伸展脚踝向下推动杠杆垫，同时收缩小腿肌肉。
在动作的最低点稍作停顿。
慢慢回到起始位置，让脚跟向上抬起。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement. Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，背部平贴靠垫坐在器械上。双手握住把手，采用正握方式，将肘部弯曲至90度角。向前推动把手直至手臂完全伸直，在推的过程中呼气。在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置，同时吸气。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部平贴靠垫坐在器械上。
双手正握把手，将肘部弯曲至90度角。
向前推动把手直至手臂完全伸直，同时呼气。
在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置，同时吸气。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement. Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，背部平贴靠垫坐在器械上。双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，将肘部弯曲至90度角。将手柄向前推，直到手臂完全伸展，同时呼气。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄回到起始位置，同时吸气。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部平贴靠垫坐在器械上。
双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，将肘部弯曲至90度角。
将手柄向前推，直到手臂完全伸展，同时呼气。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄回到起始位置，同时吸气。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and foot platform to your desired position. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform. Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and push through your heels to lift the weight up. Keep your back straight and avoid rounding your shoulders. Extend your hips fully at the top of the movement, squeezing your glutes. Lower the weight back down in a controlled manner, keeping tension on your glutes and hamstrings. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板至合适位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。握住把手或座椅两侧以保持稳定。发力收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，通过脚跟发力将重物举起。保持背部挺直，避免耸肩。在动作顶端充分伸展髋部，收紧臀肌。以可控的速度将重量放下，保持对臀肌和腘绳肌的张力。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and foot platform to your desired position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform.
Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and push through your heels to lift the weight up.
Keep your back straight and avoid rounding your shoulders.
Extend your hips fully at the top of the movement, squeezing your glutes.
Lower the weight back down in a controlled manner, keeping tension on your glutes and hamstrings.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板至合适位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。
握住把手或座椅两侧以保持稳定。
发力收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，通过脚跟发力将重物举起。
保持背部挺直，避免耸肩。
在动作顶端充分伸展髋部，收紧臀肌。
以可控的速度将重量放下，保持对臀肌和腘绳肌的张力。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended. Slowly lower the handles back towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整力量器械的座椅高度和靠背至舒适的位置。坐上器械，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，双手间距略宽于肩部。将手柄向前推离身体，直至手臂完全伸直。然后慢慢将手柄下落至胸部位置，保持肘部略微弯曲。在最低点稍作停顿后，再将手柄推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Slowly lower the handles back towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将力量器械的座椅高度和靠背调整至舒适的位置。
端坐于器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放于地面。
采用正握方式握住手柄，双手间距略宽于肩部。
将手柄向前推离身体，直至手臂完全伸直。
慢慢将手柄下落至胸部位置，保持肘部略微弯曲。
在最低点稍作停顿后，再将手柄推回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the leverage machine to the appropriate height for your body. Position yourself facing the machine, with your toes on the foot platform and your heels hanging off the edge. Place your hands on the handles or the support bars for stability. Engage your calves and lift your heels as high as possible, using the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先将器械调整到适合自己身高的位置。面向器械站立，脚尖踩在脚踏平台上，脚跟悬空。双手握住把手或支撑杆以保持身体稳定。发力时收紧小腿肌，用脚掌前侧着地，将脚跟尽可能向上抬起。在最高点稍作停顿后，缓慢地将脚跟放回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Adjust the leverage machine to the appropriate height for your body.
Position yourself facing the machine, with your toes on the foot platform and your heels hanging off the edge.
Place your hands on the handles or the support bars for stability.
Engage your calves and lift your heels as high as possible, using the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到适合自己身高的位置。
面向器械站立，脚尖踩在脚踏平台上，脚跟悬空。
双手握住把手或支撑杆以保持身体稳定。
收紧小腿肌，用脚掌前侧着地，将脚跟尽可能向上抬起。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，以膝盖位于护垫下方、双脚平放在地面上为基准坐在器械上。双手采用正握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。保持躯干直立，胸部挺起，双肩后收，下背部维持轻微弓形。收缩背阔肌发力，将把手向下拉至胸部位置，同时将肩胛骨向脊柱中央夹紧。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将把手释放回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行训练。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，以膝盖位于护垫下方、双脚平放在地面上为基准坐在器械上。
双手采用正握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。
保持躯干直立，胸部挺起，双肩后收，下背部维持轻微弓形。
收缩背阔肌发力，将把手向下拉至胸部位置，同时将肩胛骨向脊柱中央夹紧。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将把手释放回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行训练。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine. Grasp the handles with your palms facing inwards and your arms fully extended. Keeping your back straight, exhale and elevate your shoulders as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，然后坐在杠杆器械上。双手握住手柄，掌心朝内，手臂完全伸直。保持背部挺直，呼气的同时将肩膀尽可能高地向上耸起。保持收缩状态片刻，然后吸气并慢慢将肩膀降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Grasp the handles with your palms facing inwards and your arms fully extended.
Keeping your back straight, exhale and elevate your shoulders as high as possible.
Hold the contraction for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先调整座椅高度，坐在杠杆器械上。
双手握住手柄，掌心朝内，手臂完全伸直。
保持背部挺直，呼气的同时将肩膀尽可能高地向上耸起。
保持收缩状态片刻，然后吸气并慢慢将肩膀降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles or bars with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight. Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，以背部紧贴靠垫的姿势坐好在器械上。采用正握方式握住把手或杠杆，保持手臂伸直。保持背部挺直，将肩膀向上提至尽可能高的位置，接近耳部。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Grasp the handles or bars with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight.
Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，以背部紧贴靠垫的姿势坐好在器械上。
采用正握方式握住把手或杠杆，保持手臂伸直。
保持背部挺直，将肩膀向上提至尽可能高的位置，接近耳部。
保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将肩膀降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and grip the handles of the leverage machine. Keep your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Exhale and squeeze the handles, contracting your forearms. Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，双手握住杠杆器械的手柄。保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。呼气时挤压手柄，收缩前臂肌肉。保持收缩状态一秒钟，然后缓慢释放，回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and grip the handles of the leverage machine.
Keep your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Exhale and squeeze the handles, contracting your forearms.
Hold the contraction for a second, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，双手握住杠杆器械的手柄。
保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
呼气时挤压手柄，收缩前臂肌肉。
保持收缩状态一秒钟，然后缓慢释放，回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 器械锤式握法牧师椅弯举

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine. Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it. Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other). Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整器械座椅的高度，然后坐在器械上。将上臂放置在牧师椅垫上，确保胸部紧贴椅垫以保持身体稳定。双手采用锤式握法握住手柄，掌心相对。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将手柄向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压收缩肱二头肌。然后吸气，缓慢地将手柄放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数重复以上动作。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it.
Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other).
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械座椅的高度，坐在器械上。
将上臂放置在牧师椅垫上，确保胸部紧贴椅垫。
采用锤式握法握住手柄，掌心相对。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气并将手柄向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气并缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数重复以上动作。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and foot platform to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板至舒适位置。坐在器械上，胸部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。双手正握把手，握距略宽于肩。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。将把手拉向身体，肩胛骨向中线收紧。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将把手放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and foot platform to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板至舒适位置。
坐在器械上，胸部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。
双手正握把手，握距略宽于肩。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将把手拉向身体，肩胛骨向中线收紧。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将把手放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest. Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 根据身体尺寸调整器械，坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背。将双脚放在脚踏板上，握住把手以保持稳定。收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，然后通过脚踏板推动以伸展髋部并将双腿向后抬起。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据身体尺寸调整器械，坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背。
将双脚放在脚踏板上，握住把手以保持稳定。
收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，然后通过脚踏板推动以伸展髋部并将双腿向后抬起。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability. Push the footplate away from your body by extending your leg, keeping your back against the backrest. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your leg to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 调整器械座椅，使双脚放在踏板上时膝盖呈90度角。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚分开与肩同宽踩在踏板上。双手握住把手或器械两侧以保持稳定。通过伸腿将踏板远离身体，同时保持背部紧贴靠背。在腿部完全伸直的位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢弯曲腿部回到起始位置。按照所需次数重复动作，然后换腿进行。

en: Adjust the seat of the machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Push the footplate away from your body by extending your leg, keeping your back against the backrest.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your leg to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 调整器械座椅，使双脚放在踏板上时膝盖呈90度角。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚分开与肩同宽踩在踏板上。
双手握住把手或器械两侧以保持稳定。
通过伸腿将踏板远离身体，同时保持背部紧贴靠背。
在腿部完全伸直的位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢弯曲腿部回到起始位置。
按照所需次数重复动作，然后换腿进行。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械的座椅和靠背调整到舒适的位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住手柄，采用正握，手间距略宽于肩宽。将手柄向前推离身体，直到手臂完全伸展。稍作停顿，然后慢慢弯曲手肘，将手柄放回至胸部位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械的座椅和靠背调整到舒适的位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住手柄，采用正握，手间距略宽于肩宽。
将手柄向前推离身体，直到手臂完全伸展。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢弯曲手肘，将手柄放回至胸部位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and backrest angle on the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended, but without locking your elbows. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械座椅高度和靠背角度调整至舒适的位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。双手采用正握握住把手，手间距略宽于肩宽。将把手向前推离身体，直到手臂完全伸直，但不要锁死肘关节。在手臂完全伸直的位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢弯曲肘关节，将把手放回胸部位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and backrest angle on the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended, but without locking your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械座椅高度和靠背角度调整至舒适的位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。
双手采用正握握住把手，手间距略宽于肩宽。
将把手向前推离身体，直到手臂完全伸直，但不要锁死肘关节。
在手臂完全伸直的位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢弯曲肘关节，将把手放回胸部位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight. Kneel on the machine facing downwards, with your knees resting on the pad and your feet secured under the footpads. Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability. Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings. Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position, fully extending your knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先根据自身身体尺寸调整器械并选择合适的重量。然后面朝下跪在器械上，膝盖放在垫子上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。双手握住手柄或器械两侧以保持身体稳定。上身保持不动，呼气的同时弯曲膝盖，将小腿向上卷起至臀部方向。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压腘绳肌。然后吸气，缓慢地将双腿放回起始位置，膝盖完全伸直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Kneel on the machine facing downwards, with your knees resting on the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes by flexing your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your hamstrings.
Inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position, fully extending your knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据自身身体尺寸调整器械并选择合适的重量。
面朝下跪在器械上，膝盖放在垫子上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。
双手握住手柄或器械两侧以保持身体稳定。
上身保持不动，呼气的同时弯曲膝盖，将小腿向上卷起至臀部方向。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压腘绳肌。
吸气，缓慢地将双腿放回起始位置，膝盖完全伸直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees resting on the pads and your upper body facing forward. Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability. Keeping your core engaged, twist your torso to one side as far as comfortably possible. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，跪在器械垫上，使上半身保持挺直并面向前方。双手握住器械的手柄或器械两侧以保持身体稳定。收紧核心肌群，将躯干尽可能舒适地向一侧扭转。稍作停顿后，缓慢地回到起始位置，然后向另一侧进行同样的扭转动作。两侧交替进行，按照所需的重复次数完成训练。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees resting on the pads and your upper body facing forward.
Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Keeping your core engaged, twist your torso to one side as far as comfortably possible.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat the twist to the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，跪在器械垫上，上身挺直面向前方。
握住器械手柄或器械两侧以保持稳定。
收紧核心肌群，将躯干尽可能舒适地向一侧扭转。
稍作停顿后，缓慢地回到起始位置。
向另一侧重复同样的扭转动作。
两侧交替进行，按照所需的重复次数完成训练。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight. Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴器械垫坐好。双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，并保持手臂伸直。呼气时将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并将双臂缓慢放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴器械垫坐好。
双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，并保持手臂伸直。
呼气时将双臂向身体两侧抬起，直至与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并将双臂缓慢放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the machine to fit your body. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footpad. Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability. Extend your legs forward by straightening your knees, lifting the weight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械的座椅高度和靠背，使其适合你的身体。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚放在脚踏板上。握住把手或侧边支撑杆以保持稳定。通过伸直膝盖将腿部向前伸展举起负重。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将负重放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the machine to fit your body.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footpad.
Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Extend your legs forward by straightening your knees, lifting the weight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械的座椅高度和靠背，使其适合你的身体。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚放在脚踏板上。
握住把手或侧边支撑杆以保持稳定。
通过伸直膝盖将腿部向前伸展举起负重。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将负重放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight. Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever. Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability. Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings. Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械以适应你的身体并选择所需的重量。俯卧在器械上，双腿伸直，脚后跟靠在带垫的杠杆上。握住把手或器械两侧以保持稳定。保持上半身固定，呼气并尽可能将双腿向上弯曲，同时不要将臀部抬离垫子。在挤压腘绳肌的同时，保持收缩位置短暂停顿。吸气并慢慢将杠杆降低回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever.
Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械以适应你的身体并选择所需的重量。
俯卧在器械上，双腿伸直，脚后跟靠在带垫的杠杆上。
握住把手或器械两侧以保持稳定。
保持上半身固定，呼气并尽可能将双腿向上弯曲，同时不要将臀部抬离垫子。
在挤压腘绳肌的同时，保持收缩位置短暂停顿。
吸气并慢慢将杠杆降低回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest. Place your legs on the lever pad, just above your ankles. Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support. Keeping your upper body still, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械至适合您的体型，背部紧贴靠背坐好后，将双腿放在杠杆垫上，位置在脚踝上方。握住器械两侧的把手以保持身体稳定。保持上半身不动，呼气时将双腿向上弯举至臀部方向。在顶端稍作停顿后，吸气并缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复至所需的次数。

en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Place your legs on the lever pad, just above your ankles.
Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Keeping your upper body still, exhale and curl your legs up towards your glutes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械至适合您的体型，背部紧贴靠背坐好。
将双腿放在杠杆垫上，位置略高于脚踝。
握住器械两侧的把手以保持身体稳定。
保持上半身不动，呼气时将双腿向上弯举靠近臀部。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠背坐在器械上。双手正握把手，手间距略宽于肩宽。将把手向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直，但不要锁死肘关节。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将把手下降至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠背坐在器械上。
双手正握把手，手间距略宽于肩宽。
将把手向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直，但不要锁死肘关节。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将把手下降至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form. Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward. Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement. Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板，确保动作姿势正确。坐在器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。采用窄握方式握住把手，掌心相对。保持背部挺直，身体略微前倾。将把手拉向身体，同时将肩胛骨夹紧。在动作顶点稍作停顿。慢慢释放把手，恢复到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板，确保动作姿势正确。
坐在器械上，双脚平放在脚踏板上，膝盖略微弯曲。
采用窄握方式握住把手，掌心相对。
保持背部挺直，身体略微前倾。
将把手拉向身体，同时将肩胛骨夹紧。
在动作顶点稍作停顿。
慢慢释放把手，恢复到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: lever one arm bent over row

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head up. Let the barbell hang in front of you with your arms fully extended. Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，双手正握杠铃。屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，头部抬起。手臂完全伸直，让杠铃垂于身前。将杠铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体两侧。在动作最高点时，收缩肩胛骨。控制速度将杠铃下放回起始位置。按照目标重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Let the barbell hang in front of you with your arms fully extended.
Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲，双手正握杠铃
屈髋向前倾，保持背部挺直，头部抬起
手臂完全伸直，让杠铃垂于身前
将杠铃向胸部方向拉起，手肘贴近身体两侧
在动作最高点时，收缩肩胛骨
控制速度将杠铃下放回起始位置
按照目标重复次数进行练习

name.en: lever one arm lateral high row

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine. Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your back straight. Pull the handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side. Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement. Slowly release the handle back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，面朝器械坐好。单手握住把手，保持背部挺直。将把手向身体方向拉回，肘部贴近身体两侧。在动作顶峰位置用力收缩背部肌肉。慢慢将把手放回起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your back straight.
Pull the handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side.
Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement.
Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，面朝器械坐好。
单手握住把手，保持背部挺直。
将把手向身体方向拉回，肘部贴近身体两侧。
在动作顶峰位置用力收缩背部肌肉。
慢慢将把手放回起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

name.en: lever one arm lateral wide pulldown
name.zh: 器械单臂侧向宽距下拉

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow. Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement. Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，以胸部抵住垫子、双脚平放在地面上的姿势坐在器械上。采用正握握住手柄，手臂完全伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。将手柄向下并向身体对侧臀部方向拉动，在动作底部挤压背阔肌。缓慢将手柄返回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement.
Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 调整座椅高度，以胸部抵住垫子、双脚平放在地面上的姿势坐在器械上。
采用正握握住手柄，手臂完全伸展，肘部保持轻微弯曲。
将手柄向下并向身体对侧臀部方向拉动，在动作底部挤压背阔肌。
缓慢将手柄返回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the lever handle with one hand and position your elbow at a 90-degree angle. Press the lever upward until your arm is fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the lever back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠垫坐好。单手握住杠杆手柄，将手肘弯曲至90度角。将杠杆向上推举，直至手臂完全伸展过头顶。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠杆放回起始位置。按要求的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Grasp the lever handle with one hand and position your elbow at a 90-degree angle.
Press the lever upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the lever back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠垫坐好。
单手握住杠杆手柄，将手肘弯曲至90度角。
将杠杆向上推举，直至手臂完全伸展过头顶。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠杆放回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to the appropriate height and secure your body in position. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your body so that your arms are fully extended. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your sides. Continue lowering until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到合适的高度，固定好身体姿势。反手握住手柄，将身体放置到位，使手臂完全伸直。通过弯曲肘部降低身体，保持上臂贴近身体两侧。继续下降直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后通过伸展肘部将身体推回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the machine to the appropriate height and secure your body in position.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your body so that your arms are fully extended.
Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your sides.
Continue lowering until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到合适的高度，固定好身体姿势。
反手握住手柄，将身体放置到位，使手臂完全伸直。
通过弯曲肘部降低身体，保持上臂贴近身体两侧。
继续下降直到上臂与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后通过伸展肘部将身体推回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine. Place your upper arms on the pad and grip the handles with an underhand grip. Keep your back straight and your elbows positioned on the pad. Exhale and curl your forearms towards your upper arms, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，坐在杠杆器械上。将上臂放在专用垫子上，采用反握方式握住把手。保持背部挺直，肘部紧贴在垫子上。呼气时，将前臂向上臂方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶点稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。吸气时，缓慢将把手放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Place your upper arms on the pad and grip the handles with an underhand grip.
Keep your back straight and your elbows positioned on the pad.
Exhale and curl your forearms towards your upper arms, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，坐在杠杆器械上。
将上臂放在垫子上，反握握住把手。
保持背部挺直，肘部紧贴在垫子上。
呼气，将前臂向上臂方向弯举，收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，缓慢将把手放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale as you slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，坐在器械上，使上臂靠在垫子上，胸部贴紧靠背支撑面。采用反握姿势握住手柄，握距略宽于肩宽。保持上臂固定不动，呼气时将手柄向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气时缓慢将手柄放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale as you slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，坐在器械上，使上臂靠在垫子上，胸部贴紧靠背支撑面。
采用反握姿势握住手柄，握距略宽于肩宽。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气时将手柄向肩部方向弯举，充分收缩肱二头肌。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压肱二头肌。
吸气时缓慢将手柄放回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat and handles of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and grasp the handles with an overhand grip. Keep your arms slightly bent and your core engaged. Slowly pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your lats. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整器械的座椅和把手至舒适的位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双手采用正握握住把手。保持双臂微微弯曲，核心肌群收紧。缓慢地将把手拉向胸部，充分挤压背阔肌。在动作顶点停顿片刻，感受背阔肌的收缩，然后缓慢地将把手放回起始位置。按照设定的次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the seat and handles of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and grasp the handles with an overhand grip.
Keep your arms slightly bent and your core engaged.
Slowly pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your lats.
Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先调整器械的座椅和把手至舒适的位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双手采用正握握住把手。
保持双臂微微弯曲，核心肌群收紧。
缓慢地将把手拉向胸部，充分挤压背阔肌。
在动作顶点停顿片刻，感受背阔肌的收缩，然后缓慢地将把手放回起始位置。
按照设定的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，将膝盖放在垫子下方，双脚平放在地面上，坐好后双手握住手柄，掌心向下，握距略宽于肩部。挺胸收肩，下背部保持略微弓起的姿态。将手柄向下拉向胸部，以肘部引导，同时将肩胛骨向内夹紧。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，将膝盖放在垫子下方，双脚平放在地面上，坐好后双手握住手柄，掌心向下，握距略宽于肩部。
挺胸收肩，下背部保持略微弓起的姿态。
将手柄向下拉向胸部，以肘部引导，同时将肩胛骨向内夹紧。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄释放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度后在器械上摆好姿势。反握握住把手，手掌朝上。将上臂放在牧师垫上，确保肘关节完全伸展。上臂保持固定，呼气的同时将把手向肩部方向弯举。在动作顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气并将把手缓慢下放至起始位置，肘关节完全伸展。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度后在器械上摆好姿势。
反握握住把手，手掌朝上。
将上臂放在牧师垫上，确保肘关节完全伸展。
上臂保持固定，呼气的同时将把手向肩部方向弯举。
在动作顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气并将把手缓慢下放至起始位置，肘关节完全伸展。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置，确保身体处于正确的对齐状态。坐上器械，胸部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。采用反握方式握住把手，掌心朝上。保持背部挺直，同时收紧核心肌群。将把手向胸部方向拉回，感受肩胛骨向中间夹紧。在动作顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放力量，将手臂伸展回到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
