Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置，确保身体处于正确的对齐状态。
坐上器械，胸部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。
采用反握方式握住把手，掌心朝上。
保持背部挺直，同时收紧核心肌群。
将把手向胸部方向拉回，感受肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
在动作顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢释放力量，将手臂伸展回到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the leverage machine to fit your body and secure your feet in the foot pads. Lie face down on the machine with your upper body hanging off the edge and your hips resting on the pad. Cross your arms over your chest or place them behind your head. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your legs upward until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整器械以适应身体尺寸，将双脚稳稳固定在脚垫上。然后俯卧在器械上，让上半身自然悬垂于器械边缘，髋部贴靠在垫子上。双臂可以交叉放在胸前，或者置于头后支撑。发力时主要依靠臀肌和腘绳肌的收缩，将双腿向上抬起至与地面平行的位置。在动作顶端保持片刻收缩，然后缓慢控制双腿下放回到起始姿势。重复上述动作至所需次数。

en: Adjust the leverage machine to fit your body and secure your feet in the foot pads.
Lie face down on the machine with your upper body hanging off the edge and your hips resting on the pad.
Cross your arms over your chest or place them behind your head.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your legs upward until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械至适合自己身体的位置，并将双脚固定在脚垫上。
俯卧在器械上，上半身悬垂于器械边缘，髋部贴靠在垫子上。
双臂交叉放在胸前或置于头后。
收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，将双腿向上抬起至与地面平行。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿降回起始位置。
重复至所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position on the leverage machine. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整器械的座椅高度和脚踏板位置。坐上器械，将胸部贴紧靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。双手握住把手，采用比肩宽稍宽的反握方式。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。将把手向胸部方向拉，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松并将手臂伸展回到起始位置。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position on the leverage machine.
Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械的座椅高度和脚踏板位置。
坐在器械上，胸部贴紧靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。
双手握住把手，采用比肩宽稍宽的反握方式。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将把手向胸部方向拉，同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢放松并将手臂伸展回到起始位置。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate. Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability. Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，使膝盖略微弯曲，双脚平放在脚踏板上。将脚尖放在脚踏板上，脚跟悬空在边缘外。握住把手或器械两侧以保持稳定。通过前脚掌发力，将脚跟尽可能高地抬起。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，使膝盖略微弯曲，双脚平放在脚踏板上。
将脚尖放在脚踏板上，脚跟悬空在边缘外。
握住把手或器械两侧以保持稳定。
通过前脚掌发力，将脚跟尽可能高地抬起。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad. Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad. Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械座椅高度，使肩部与杠杆垫保持水平。将脚趾放在踏板下方，膝盖置于杠杆垫下方。握住座椅两侧的把手以保持身体稳定。通过伸展踝关节向下压杠杆垫，同时将脚跟尽可能抬高。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟下降至起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad.
Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械座椅，使肩部与杠杆垫对齐。
将脚趾放在踏板下方，膝盖置于杠杆垫下方。
握住座椅两侧的把手以保持身体稳定。
通过伸展踝关节向下压杠杆垫，将脚跟尽可能抬高。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟下降至起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate. Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability. Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，使膝盖略微弯曲，双脚平放在踏板上。将脚趾放在踏板上，脚跟悬在边缘外。握住把手或座椅两侧以保持稳定。通过脚掌前侧发力，将脚跟尽可能抬高。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge.
Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，使膝盖略微弯曲，双脚平放在踏板上。
将脚趾放在踏板上，脚跟悬在边缘外。
握住把手或座椅两侧以保持稳定。
通过脚掌前侧发力，将脚跟尽可能抬高。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles or place your hands on the side pads for support. Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the pad to move with you. Once your upper body is at a 45-degree angle, contract your abs and crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面上。握住把手或将双手放在侧面的垫子上作为支撑。收紧腹肌，然后慢慢向后倾斜，让靠垫随着身体移动。当上半身倾斜到45度角时，收缩腹肌向前卷腹，将胸部拉向膝盖。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢放松并回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles or place your hands on the side pads for support.
Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the pad to move with you.
Once your upper body is at a 45-degree angle, contract your abs and crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面上。
握住把手或将双手放在侧面的垫子上作为支撑。
收紧腹肌，然后慢慢向后倾斜，让靠垫随着身体移动。
当上半身倾斜到45度角时，收缩腹肌向前卷腹，将胸部拉向膝盖。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢放松并回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and chest pad position according to your comfort. Sit on the machine with your back against the chest pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles or side bars for stability. Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the chest pad to move with you. Pause for a moment at the maximum contraction, feeling the tension in your abs. Slowly return to the starting position by contracting your abs and pulling yourself back up. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 根据个人舒适度调整座椅高度和胸垫位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴胸垫，双脚平放在地面上。握住把手或侧边扶手以保持稳定。收紧腹肌，然后慢慢向后倾斜，让胸垫随身体一起移动。在最大收缩点停顿片刻，感受腹肌的张力。通过收缩腹肌并将自己拉回，缓慢返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and chest pad position according to your comfort.
Sit on the machine with your back against the chest pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles or side bars for stability.
Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the chest pad to move with you.
Pause for a moment at the maximum contraction, feeling the tension in your abs.
Slowly return to the starting position by contracting your abs and pulling yourself back up.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据个人舒适度调整座椅高度和胸垫位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴胸垫，双脚平放在地面上。
握住把手或侧边扶手以保持稳定。
收紧腹肌，然后慢慢向后倾斜，让胸垫随身体一起移动。
在最大收缩点停顿片刻，感受腹肌的张力。
通过收缩腹肌并将自己拉回，缓慢返回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured under the footpads. Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the seat for support. Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs. Slowly return to the starting position, allowing your back to round slightly. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在杠杆器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚固定在脚踏板下方。双手握住把手或座椅两侧以保持支撑。收紧腹肌，然后慢慢向前卷腹，将胸部靠近膝盖。在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压腹肌。慢慢回到起始位置，允许背部略微弯曲。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the seat for support.
Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Slowly return to the starting position, allowing your back to round slightly.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在杠杆器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚固定在脚踏板下方。
双手握住把手或座椅两侧以保持支撑。
收紧腹肌，然后慢慢向前卷腹，将胸部靠近膝盖。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，充分挤压腹肌。
慢慢回到起始位置，允许背部略微弯曲。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle. Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended. Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，使双脚平放在地面上，膝盖呈90度角。双手手掌向下握住器械手柄，手臂完全伸展。通过弯曲手肘慢慢下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，使双脚平放在地面上，膝盖呈90度角
双手手掌向下握住器械手柄，手臂完全伸展
通过弯曲手肘慢慢下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行
稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent. Exhale and push the handles forward, bringing them together in front of your chest. Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles. Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整好座椅高度，坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫。双手握住把手，采用手掌向下的握法，保持肘部微屈。呼气时向前推动把手，使两侧把手在胸前合拢，停顿片刻并用力挤压胸部肌肉。吸气时缓慢回到起始位置，让胸部肌肉充分伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Exhale and push the handles forward, bringing them together in front of your chest.
Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles.
Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫。
双手握住把手，采用手掌向下的握法，保持肘部微屈。
呼气时向前推动把手，使两侧把手在胸前合拢。
停顿片刻，用力挤压胸部肌肉。
吸气时缓慢回到起始位置，让胸部肌肉充分伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height so that your hips are slightly higher than your knees. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the footrests. Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability. Keeping your back straight, slowly lean forward from your hips until your upper body is parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your glutes and hamstrings. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，使髋关节略高于膝关节。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏上。握住把手或座椅两侧以保持稳定。保持背部挺直，从髋关节处缓慢前倾，直到上半身与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后通过臀肌和腘绳肌发力，缓慢回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height so that your hips are slightly higher than your knees.
Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the footrests.
Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Keeping your back straight, slowly lean forward from your hips until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your glutes and hamstrings.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，使髋关节略高于膝关节。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏上。
握住把手或座椅两侧以保持稳定。
保持背部挺直，从髋关节处缓慢前倾，直到上半身与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后通过臀肌和腘绳肌发力，缓慢回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests. Place your hands on the side handles for stability. Engage your abductors and slowly push your legs apart, away from the midline of your body. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your legs back together to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将座椅高度调整至膝盖弯曲呈90度。坐上器械，背部紧贴靠背，双脚踩在脚踏板上，双手握住侧边手柄以保持身体稳定。收紧髋外展肌发力，将双腿向外侧缓慢撑开，离开身体中线。在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿收回至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Place your hands on the side handles for stability.
Engage your abductors and slowly push your legs apart, away from the midline of your body.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your legs back together to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将座椅高度调整至膝盖弯曲呈90度。
坐上器械，背部紧贴靠背，双脚踩在脚踏板上。
双手握住侧边手柄以保持身体稳定。
收紧髋外展肌发力，将双腿向外侧缓慢撑开，离开身体中线。
在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿收回至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest. Place your feet on the footrests and grasp the handles for stability. Engage your adductor muscles and slowly bring your legs together, squeezing your inner thighs. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整好座椅高度后，背部紧贴靠背坐在器械上。将双脚放在脚踏板上，双手握住手柄以保持身体稳定。收缩内收肌群，缓慢将双腿向中间靠拢，同时用力夹紧大腿内侧。在动作顶点短暂停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Place your feet on the footrests and grasp the handles for stability.
Engage your adductor muscles and slowly bring your legs together, squeezing your inner thighs.
Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠背坐在器械上。
将双脚放在脚踏板上，双手握住手柄以保持身体稳定。
收缩内收肌群，缓慢将双腿向中间靠拢，同时用力夹紧大腿内侧。
在动作顶点短暂停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest. Place your lower legs under the padded lever, just above your ankles. Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support. Keeping your upper legs stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings. Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械以适应身体，坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背。将小腿放在垫杠下方，刚好位于脚踝上方。握住器械两侧的手柄以保持支撑。保持大腿静止，呼气并尽可能向上弯举小腿。在收缩位置短暂停留，同时挤压腘绳肌。吸气并慢慢将垫杠降至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Place your lower legs under the padded lever, just above your ankles.
Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Keeping your upper legs stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械以适应身体，坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背。
将小腿放在垫杠下方，刚好位于脚踝上方。
握住器械两侧的手柄以保持支撑。
保持大腿静止，呼气并尽可能向上弯举小腿。
在收缩位置短暂停留，同时挤压腘绳肌。
吸气并慢慢将垫杠降至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests. Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability. Engage your abs and slowly raise your legs up towards your chest, curling your torso forward at the same time. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and torso back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚踩在脚踏上。双手握住把手或侧边扶手以保持身体稳定。收紧腹部肌肉，缓慢地将双腿向胸部抬起，同时顺势将躯干向前卷曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿和躯干放回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Engage your abs and slowly raise your legs up towards your chest, curling your torso forward at the same time.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and torso back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚踩在脚踏上。
双手握住把手或侧边扶手以保持身体稳定。
收紧腹部肌肉，缓慢地将双腿向胸部抬起，同时顺势将躯干向前卷曲。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿和躯干放回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent. Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，以胸部紧贴靠垫、双脚平放于地面的姿势坐在器械上。用正握的方式握住把手，保持手臂微微弯曲。呼气的同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，将把手向后外侧拉离身体。在动作的顶峰收缩位置停顿片刻，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent.
Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，以胸部紧贴靠垫、双脚平放于地面的姿势坐在器械上。
用正握的方式握住把手，保持手臂微微弯曲。
呼气的同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，将把手向后外侧拉离身体。
在动作的顶峰收缩位置停顿片刻，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 坐姿器械反向飞鸟（平行握）

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent. Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，坐在器械上，使胸部贴紧靠垫，双脚平放于地面。双手握住手柄，采用平行握法，掌心相对，保持手臂微微弯曲。呼气的同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，将手柄向后向外拉动，使其远离身体。在动作顶点感受肌肉强烈收缩后稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent.
Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，坐在器械上，使胸部贴紧靠垫，双脚平放于地面。
双手握住手柄，采用平行握法，掌心相对，保持手臂微微弯曲。
呼气的同时将肩胛骨向中间夹紧，将手柄向后向外拉动，使其远离身体。
在动作顶点感受肌肉强烈收缩后稍作停顿，然后吸气并缓慢回到起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet on the footrests. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement. Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度和脚踏板至舒适的位置。坐在器械上，胸部紧贴靠垫，双脚踩在脚踏板上。采用肩同宽的正握方式握住把手。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将把手向身体方向拉近，同时将肩胛骨用力夹紧。在动作最高点暂停片刻。缓慢松开把手，恢复至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet on the footrests.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板至舒适的位置
坐在器械上，胸部紧贴靠垫，双脚踩在脚踏板上
采用肩同宽的正握方式握住把手
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧
将把手向身体方向拉近，同时将肩胛骨用力夹紧
在动作最高点暂停片刻
缓慢松开把手，恢复至起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

name.en: lever seated squat calf raise on leg press machine

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the footplate. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the footplate, shoulder-width apart. Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the footplate, keeping your heels off the edge. Release the safety handles and push the footplate away from you by extending your knees. Once your knees are fully extended, slowly lower your heels by flexing your calves. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the footplate back up by extending your calves. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整蹬腿机的座椅位置，使双脚放在踏板上时膝盖略微弯曲。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在踏板上，间距与肩同宽。将脚尖和脚掌前部放在踏板上，脚后跟悬空在边缘之外。松开安全把手，通过伸直膝盖将踏板向前推出。当膝盖完全伸直后，通过屈曲小腿慢慢放下脚后跟。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸展小腿将踏板推回。重复所需次数。

en: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the footplate.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the footplate, shoulder-width apart.
Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the footplate, keeping your heels off the edge.
Release the safety handles and push the footplate away from you by extending your knees.
Once your knees are fully extended, slowly lower your heels by flexing your calves.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the footplate back up by extending your calves.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整蹬腿机的座椅位置，使双脚放在踏板上时膝盖略微弯曲。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在踏板上，间距与肩同宽。
将脚尖和脚掌前部放在踏板上，脚后跟悬空在边缘之外。
松开安全把手，通过伸直膝盖将踏板向前推出。
当膝盖完全伸直后，通过屈曲小腿慢慢放下脚后跟。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸展小腿将踏板推回。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at shoulder level. Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整好座椅高度，坐在器械上并保持背部紧贴靠背。用正握方式握住手柄，将双手放在与肩同高的位置。将手柄向上推起，直到手臂完全伸展，但注意不要锁死肘关节。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at shoulder level.
Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整好座椅高度，坐在器械上并保持背部紧贴靠背。
用正握方式握住手柄，将双手放在与肩同高的位置。
将手柄向上推起，直到手臂完全伸展，但注意不要锁死肘关节。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先将固定器械的座椅高度和靠背调整到舒适的位置。端坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住手柄，采用比肩稍宽的正握握法。然后将手柄向上向前推举，直至手臂完全伸展，但不要锁死。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，接着缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将固定器械的座椅高度和靠背调整到舒适的位置。
端坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住手柄，采用比肩稍宽的正握握法。
将手柄向上向前推举，直至手臂完全伸展，但不要锁死。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，接着缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械的座椅高度和靠背调整至舒适的位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放于地面。双手握住器械手柄，采用正握方式，握距略宽于肩宽。将手柄向上向前推起，直至手臂完全伸直，但注意不要锁死关节。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄降至起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械的座椅高度和靠背调整至舒适的位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚平放于地面。
双手握住器械手柄，采用正握方式，握距略宽于肩宽。
将手柄向上向前推起，直至手臂完全伸直，但注意不要锁死关节。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄降至起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight. Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，以背部靠在垫子上的姿势坐上力量器械。用正握握住把手，保持手臂伸直。保持背部挺直，将肩膀向上提升至耳朵的高度。保持收缩片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数重复动作。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine with your back against the pad.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Keeping your back straight, lift your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，以背部靠在垫子上的姿势坐上力量器械。
用正握握住把手，保持手臂伸直。
保持背部挺直，将肩膀向上提升至耳朵的高度。
保持收缩片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数重复动作。

instructions.en: Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability. Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 根据自身身高调节器械，然后双脚与肩同宽站立。将肩部置于护垫下方，双手握住手柄以保持身体稳定。通过伸展踝关节将脚跟尽可能抬高。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟下降至起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability.
Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据自身身高调节器械，然后双脚与肩同宽站立。
将肩部置于护垫下方，双手握住手柄以保持身体稳定。
通过伸展踝关节将脚跟尽可能抬高。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟下降至起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，以双脚平放在地面上坐在器械上。双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，将双手置于胸部水平位置。向前推动手柄，直到手臂完全伸展，同时保持肘部略微弯曲。稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄收回至胸部位置，在整个动作过程中保持控制。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level.
Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，双脚平放在地面上坐在器械上。
双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，将双手置于胸部水平位置。
向前推动手柄，直到手臂完全伸展，同时保持肘部略微弯曲。
稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄收回至胸部位置，在整个动作过程中保持控制。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment. Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置，确保身体处于正确的对齐状态。坐上器械，将胸部贴紧靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。双手采用反握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩部。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。将把手向身体方向拉近，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶峰稍作停留，感受目标肌群的充分收缩，然后缓慢地将把手放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚踏板位置，确保身体处于正确的对齐状态。
坐上器械，将胸部贴紧靠垫，双脚平放在脚踏板上。
双手采用反握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩部。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将把手向身体方向拉近，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶峰稍作停留，然后缓慢地将把手放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and engage your core. Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，以胸部靠在垫子上、双脚平放在地板上的姿势坐在器械上。反手握住手柄，握距略宽于肩部。保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。将手柄向胸部方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨收紧。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢放下并伸展手臂回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，以胸部靠在垫子上、双脚平放在地板上的姿势坐在器械上。
反手握住手柄，握距略宽于肩部。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心肌群。
将手柄向胸部方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨收紧。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢放下并伸展手臂回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you. Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠垫坐在器械上。用正握的方式握住把手，将手臂完全向前伸展。保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘部缓慢将把手向额头方向下放。在动作底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手臂将把手推回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先调整座椅高度，背部紧贴靠垫坐在器械上。
用正握的方式握住把手，将手臂完全向前伸展。
保持上臂固定不动，通过弯曲肘部缓慢将把手向额头方向下放。
在动作底部稍作停顿，然后通过伸展手臂将把手推回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your back straight. Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，以面对器械的姿势坐好。采用正握方式握住手柄，同时保持背部挺直。将手柄向身体方向拉近，肩胛骨用力夹紧。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂放回起始位置并充分伸展。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your back straight.
Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，以面对器械的姿势坐好。
采用正握方式握住手柄，同时保持背部挺直。
将手柄向身体方向拉近，肩胛骨用力夹紧。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂放回起始位置并充分伸展。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the rope to a high anchor point. Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将绳索固定在高位锚点上，背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用正握（掌心向下）握住绳索。身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧。将绳索向身体方向拉动，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置。按需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach the rope to a high anchor point.
Stand facing away from the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将绳索固定在高位锚点上
背对锚点站立，双脚与肩同宽
正握（掌心向下）握住绳索
身体略微前倾，保持背部挺直，核心收紧
将绳索向身体方向拉动，挤压肩胛骨
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放张力，恢复到起始位置
按需要的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your arms by your sides, palms facing down. Engage your glutes and core, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。将双臂放在身体两侧，掌心向下。收紧臀肌和核心肌群，然后向上抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压臀肌。然后慢慢将臀部降回起始位置。按要求的次数重复练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your arms by your sides, palms facing down.
Engage your glutes and core, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
将双臂放在身体两侧，掌心向下。
收紧臀肌和核心肌群，然后向上抬起臀部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
在顶端稍作停顿，充分挤压臀肌。
慢慢将臀部降回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 俯卧在地板上，双腿伸直，双臂放在身体两侧。收紧臀肌和腘绳肌，然后慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向上卷曲背部。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 俯卧在地板上，双腿伸直，双臂放在身体两侧。
收紧臀肌和腘绳肌，然后慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向上卷曲背部。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Push off with your right foot and jump into the air, switching the position of your feet mid-air. Land softly with your left foot forward and immediately lower your body into a lunge position. Continue alternating between lunges and jumps for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。右脚用力蹬地向上跳跃，在空中交换双脚位置。轻盈落地，左脚在前，立即进入弓步姿势。继续交替进行弓步跳，完成所需重复次数。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Push off with your right foot and jump into the air, switching the position of your feet mid-air.
Land softly with your left foot forward and immediately lower your body into a lunge position.
Continue alternating between lunges and jumps for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。
右脚用力蹬地向上跳跃，在空中交换双脚位置。
轻盈落地，左脚在前，立即进入弓步姿势。
继续交替进行弓步跳，完成所需重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge, twist your torso to the right, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping forward with your left foot and twisting your torso to the left. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下蹲成弓步姿势。在弓步的同时，躯干向右扭转，将左肘靠向右膝。保持片刻后，回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复，左脚向前迈出并向左扭转躯干。按照所需的重复次数交替进行。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
As you lunge, twist your torso to the right, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, stepping forward with your left foot and twisting your torso to the left.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。
右脚向前迈出一步，身体下蹲成弓步姿势。
在弓步的同时，躯干向右扭转，将左肘靠向右膝。
保持片刻后，回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复，左脚向前迈出并向左扭转躯干。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs straight. Bend your top leg and grab your ankle or foot with your hand. Gently pull your ankle or foot towards your glutes until you feel a stretch in your quads. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 侧卧在地面上，双腿伸直。弯曲上方腿，用手握住脚踝或脚。轻轻地向上拉动脚，使其靠近臀部，直到感觉到股四头肌有拉伸感。保持拉伸30秒，然后放松，换另一侧重复。

en: Lie on your side with your legs straight.
Bend your top leg and grab your ankle or foot with your hand.
Gently pull your ankle or foot towards your glutes until you feel a stretch in your quads.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release the stretch and repeat on the other side.
zh: 侧卧在地面上，双腿伸直。
弯曲上方腿，用手握住脚踝或脚。
轻轻地向上拉动脚，使其靠近臀部，直到感觉到股四头肌有拉伸感。
保持拉伸30秒。
放松，换另一侧重复。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee. At the same time, extend your right leg straight out and lift it off the ground. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and extending your left leg. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，同时将右肘向左侧膝盖方向靠近。同时，将右腿伸直并抬离地面。暂停片刻，然后回到起始位置。重复动作，这次将左肘向右侧膝盖方向靠近，并伸直左腿。继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
At the same time, extend your right leg straight out and lift it off the ground.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and extending your left leg.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，同时将右肘向左侧膝盖方向靠近。
同时，将右腿伸直并抬离地面。
暂停片刻，然后回到起始位置。
重复动作，这次将左肘向右侧膝盖方向靠近，并伸直左腿。
继续交替进行所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在平凳上，确保背部紧贴凳面。双手放在臀部下方以获得支撑。保持双腿并拢伸直，然后向上举起指向天花板。在动作顶端稍作停顿，再缓缓将双腿放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it.
Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在平凳上，确保背部紧贴凳面。
双手放在臀部下方以获得支撑。
保持双腿并拢伸直，然后向上举起指向天花板。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，再缓缓将双腿放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂置于身体两侧。将双手放在臀部下方支撑。收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面，朝天花板方向举起。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, raising them towards the ceiling.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂置于身体两侧。
将双手放在臀部下方支撑。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿抬离地面，朝天花板方向举起。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle. Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，背部平贴靠垫坐在器械上。双手正握把手，将肘部弯曲至90度角。呼气时向前推把手，直到手臂完全伸直。在动作末端稍作停顿，然后吸气时慢慢回到起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，背部平贴靠垫坐在器械上。
双手正握把手，将肘部弯曲至90度角。
呼气时向前推把手，直到手臂完全伸直。
在动作末端稍作停顿，然后吸气时慢慢回到起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your back against a wall and your feet hip-width apart. Slowly slide your back down the wall until your knees are bent at a 90-degree angle. Lift your right foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest. Lower your right foot back down and lift your left foot off the ground, bringing your knee towards your chest. Continue alternating between lifting your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 背靠墙站立，双脚与髋同宽。沿着墙壁缓慢向下滑动身体，直到膝盖弯曲呈90度角。抬起右脚离地，将膝盖向胸部方向收拢。将右脚放回地面，然后抬起左脚离地，同样将膝盖向胸部方向收拢。按照所需重复次数，持续交替抬腿。

en: Stand with your back against a wall and your feet hip-width apart.
Slowly slide your back down the wall until your knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
Lift your right foot off the ground and bring your knee towards your chest.
Lower your right foot back down and lift your left foot off the ground, bringing your knee towards your chest.
Continue alternating between lifting your right and left foot for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 背靠墙站立，双脚与髋同宽。
沿着墙壁缓慢向下滑动身体，直到膝盖弯曲呈90度角。
抬起右脚离地，将膝盖向胸部方向收拢。
将右脚放回地面，然后抬起左脚离地，同样将膝盖向胸部方向收拢。
按照所需重复次数，持续交替抬腿。

name.en: medicine ball catch and overhead throw

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball in both hands at chest level. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up. Explosively extend your hips and legs, while simultaneously throwing the medicine ball overhead. Release the ball at the top of the movement and catch it on the way down. Lower your body back into the squat position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手在胸前握住药球。膝盖微微弯曲，收紧核心。身体下降至半蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起。髋部和腿部爆发性伸展，同时将药球举过头顶。在动作最高点释放药球，并在下落过程中接住。身体回到半蹲姿势，按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball in both hands at chest level.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Explosively extend your hips and legs, while simultaneously throwing the medicine ball overhead.
Release the ball at the top of the movement and catch it on the way down.
Lower your body back into the squat position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手在胸前握住药球
膝盖微微弯曲，收紧核心
身体下降至半蹲姿势，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起
髋部和腿部爆发性伸展，同时将药球举过头顶
在动作最高点释放药球，并在下落过程中接住
身体回到半蹲姿势，按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level. Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest with force. As you release the ball, follow through with your arms and torso, transferring your weight from your back foot to your front foot. Catch the ball as it rebounds off the wall or partner, and immediately repeat the movement. Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将药球置于胸前位置。双臂向前伸展，用力将药球从胸前推出。出手时，手臂和躯干顺势前送，重心从后脚转移到前脚。接住从墙壁或搭档反弹回来的药球后，立即重复动作。按照所需次数持续练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest with force.
As you release the ball, follow through with your arms and torso, transferring your weight from your back foot to your front foot.
Catch the ball as it rebounds off the wall or partner, and immediately repeat the movement.
Continue for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将药球置于胸前位置。
双臂向前伸展，用力将药球从胸前推出。
出手时，手臂和躯干顺势前送，重心从后脚转移到前脚。
接住从墙壁或搭档反弹回来的药球后，立即重复动作。
按照所需次数持续练习。

name.en: medicine ball chest push from 3 point stance

instructions.en: Start in a 3 point stance with one hand on the medicine ball and the other hand on the ground. Extend your legs and position your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground while keeping your back straight. Push the medicine ball away from your body, extending your arm fully. Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以三点支撑姿势开始，一只手撑在药球上，另一只手撑地。双腿伸直，使身体呈一条直线。保持背部挺直，将胸部向地面方向下压。手臂完全伸展，将药球推离身体。然后回到起始姿势，按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a 3 point stance with one hand on the medicine ball and the other hand on the ground.
Extend your legs and position your body in a straight line.
Lower your chest towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Push the medicine ball away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以三点支撑姿势开始，一只手撑在药球上，另一只手撑地。
双腿伸直，使身体呈一条直线。
保持背部挺直，将胸部向地面方向下压。
手臂完全伸展，将药球推离身体。
回到起始姿势，按所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: medicine ball chest push multiple response

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level. Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将药球置于胸前。双臂向前伸展，将药球从胸前推出。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将药球收回胸前。重复进行所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将药球置于胸前。
双臂向前伸展，将药球从胸前推出。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将药球收回胸前。
重复进行所需次数。

name.en: medicine ball chest push single response

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level. Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest. Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将药球置于胸前。双臂向前伸展，将药球从胸前推出。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将药球收回至胸前。重复至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将药球置于胸前。
双臂向前伸展，将药球从胸前推出。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将药球收回至胸前。
重复至所需次数。

name.en: medicine ball chest push with run release
name.zh: 药球胸前推传跑动接球

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level. Step forward with your right foot and simultaneously push the medicine ball forward, extending your arms fully. As you push the ball forward, release it and let it roll forward. Quickly run forward and catch the ball before it hits the ground. Once you catch the ball, bring it back to your chest and repeat the movement with your left foot forward. Continue alternating legs and repeating the exercise for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将药球置于胸前。右脚向前迈步，同时将药球向前推出，完全伸展手臂。向前推动药球时松手，让球向前滚动。快速向前奔跑，在球落地前将其接住。接球后将其收回胸前，然后左脚向前迈步重复同样的动作。交替迈步并按所需次数持续进行此练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Step forward with your right foot and simultaneously push the medicine ball forward, extending your arms fully.
As you push the ball forward, release it and let it roll forward.
Quickly run forward and catch the ball before it hits the ground.
Once you catch the ball, bring it back to your chest and repeat the movement with your left foot forward.
Continue alternating legs and repeating the exercise for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手将药球置于胸前。
右脚向前迈步，同时将药球向前推出，完全伸展手臂。
向前推动药球时松手，让球向前滚动。
快速向前奔跑，在球落地前将其接住。
接球后将其收回胸前，然后左脚向前迈步重复同样的动作。
交替迈步并按所需次数持续进行此练习。

name.en: medicine ball close grip push up

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为高位平板支撑，双手放在药球上，间距与肩同宽。通过弯曲手臂将身体向地面方向下移，保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。发力将身体推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Push back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为高位平板支撑，双手放在药球上，间距与肩同宽。
通过弯曲手臂将身体向地面方向下移，保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。
发力将身体推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball with both hands above your head. Engage your core and keep your back straight. Bend your knees slightly and forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground in front of you. As you slam the ball down, use your entire body to generate power, including your shoulders and core. Catch the ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在头顶上方握住药球。收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。膝盖微微弯曲，用力将药球猛砸到面前的地面上。砸球时要利用全身发力，包括肩部和核心肌群。接住弹起的药球，按要求的次数重复动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball with both hands above your head.
Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Bend your knees slightly and forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground in front of you.
As you slam the ball down, use your entire body to generate power, including your shoulders and core.
Catch the ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在头顶上方握住药球。
收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。
膝盖微微弯曲，用力将药球猛砸到面前的地面上。
砸球时要利用全身发力，包括肩部和核心肌群。
接住弹起的药球，按要求的次数重复动作。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on a bench with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold the medicine ball with both hands, extending your arms straight up above your chest. Lower the medicine ball towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Explosively push the medicine ball upwards, extending your arms fully and throwing the ball as high as possible. Catch the medicine ball and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住药球，双臂伸直举于胸部上方。将药球向胸部方向下放，保持肘部贴近身体。然后用爆发力将药球向上推，双臂完全伸展，尽可能将球抛到最高点。接住落下的药球，按照目标重复次数重复以上动作。

en: Lie flat on your back on a bench with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the medicine ball with both hands, extending your arms straight up above your chest.
Lower the medicine ball towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Explosively push the medicine ball upwards, extending your arms fully and throwing the ball as high as possible.
Catch the medicine ball and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在卧推凳上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住药球，双臂伸直举于胸部上方。
将药球向胸部方向下放，保持肘部贴近身体。
用爆发力将药球向上推，双臂完全伸展，尽可能将球抛到最高点。
接住落下的药球，按照目标重复次数重复以上动作。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手采用混合握法握住单杠（一只手掌心朝内反握，另一只掌心朝外正握），手距略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸直悬垂，双脚离开地面。收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，胸部领先。持续向上发力，直到下巴超过单杠。在最高点稍作停留，然后控制好速度缓慢将身体下放回起始位置。根据需要的次数重复练习。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 采用混合握法握住单杠（一只手反握掌心朝内，另一只手正握掌心朝外），双手间距略宽于肩宽。
双臂完全伸直悬垂，双脚离开地面。
收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，以胸部领先。
持续向上发力，直到下巴超过单杠。
在最高点稍作停留，然后控制速度缓慢下放身体回到起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart. Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged. As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body. Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑姿势，双手间距略宽于肩，双脚与髋同宽。弯曲手肘并收紧核心肌群，将身体向地面下降。随着身体下降，将重心后移并将髋部向上推起，使身体呈倒V字形。继续下降直到胸部接近地面，然后反向动作，将髋部向下推并伸直手臂，恢复到起始姿势。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart.
Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged.
As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body.
Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑姿势，双手间距略宽于肩，双脚与髋同宽。
弯曲手肘并收紧核心肌群，将身体向地面下降。
随着身体下降，将重心后移并将髋部向上推起，使身体呈倒V字形。
继续下降直到胸部接近地面，然后反向动作，将髋部向下推并伸直手臂，恢复到起始姿势。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.en: modified push up to lower arms

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Lower your body down towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Once your elbows are at a 90-degree angle, lower your forearms to the ground, keeping your elbows directly under your shoulders. Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to lift your forearms back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手位于肩膀正下方，身体保持一条直线。通过弯曲肘部将身体下降，肘部紧贴身体两侧。当肘部弯曲至90度时，将前臂降至地面，保持肘部位于肩膀正下方。稍作停留，然后通过手掌发力将前臂撑起，恢复到起始姿势。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Lower your body down towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Once your elbows are at a 90-degree angle, lower your forearms to the ground, keeping your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to lift your forearms back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手位于肩膀正下方，身体保持一条直线。
通过弯曲肘部将身体下降，肘部紧贴身体两侧。
当肘部弯曲至90度时，将前臂降至地面，保持肘部位于肩膀正下方。
稍作停留，然后通过手掌发力将前臂撑起，恢复到起始姿势。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Place a resistance band around your ankles. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees. Take a step to the side with your right foot, maintaining tension on the resistance band. Follow with your left foot, stepping to the side to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带套在脚踝处，双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。右脚向侧面迈出一步，保持弹力带的张力。左脚跟随向侧面迈步，回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧进行。

en: Place a resistance band around your ankles.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Take a step to the side with your right foot, maintaining tension on the resistance band.
Follow with your left foot, stepping to the side to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 将弹力带套在脚踝处。
双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
右脚向侧面迈出一步，保持弹力带的张力。
左脚跟随向侧面迈步，回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and bring your right knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring your left knee towards your chest. Continue alternating legs in a running motion, keeping your hips low and your core engaged. Maintain a steady pace and breathe evenly throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手撑地，位于肩部正下方，身体保持一条直线。收紧核心肌群，将右膝向胸部方向抬起，然后迅速切换，将左膝向胸部抬起。继续以跑步的动作交替双腿，臀部保持低位，核心肌群全程收紧。保持稳定的节奏，均匀呼吸。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Engage your core and bring your right knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring your left knee towards your chest.
Continue alternating legs in a running motion, keeping your hips low and your core engaged.
Maintain a steady pace and breathe evenly throughout the exercise.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手撑地，位于肩部正下方，身体保持一条直线。
收紧核心肌群，将右膝向胸部方向抬起，然后迅速切换，将左膝向胸部抬起。
继续以跑步的动作交替双腿，臀部保持低位，核心肌群全程收紧。
保持稳定的节奏，均匀呼吸。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you. Continue pulling yourself up until your chest is above the bar and your arms are fully flexed. Reverse the movement by slowly lowering yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双手反握单杠，手臂完全伸直悬挂。收紧核心肌群，将身体向上拉起，胸部朝杠的方向移动。当身体上升到最高点时，将握姿从反握切换为正握。继续向上拉，直到胸部越过单杠，手臂完全弯曲。最后反向动作，缓慢将身体下放回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you.
Continue pulling yourself up until your chest is above the bar and your arms are fully flexed.
Reverse the movement by slowly lowering yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为双手反握单杠，手臂完全伸直悬挂。
收紧核心肌群，将身体向上拉起，胸部朝杠的方向移动。
当身体上升到最高点时，将握姿从反握切换为正握。
继续向上拉，直到胸部越过单杠，手臂完全弯曲。
反向动作，缓慢将身体下放回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a vertical bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. As you pull yourself up, lean back slightly and bring your elbows towards your sides. Continue pulling until your chest reaches the bar and your elbows are fully bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双手反握单杠，双臂完全伸直，身体悬挂。收紧核心肌群，将身体向上拉起，以胸部先行的方式向上移动。拉起的同时身体微微后仰，将肘部向身体两侧收拢。持续向上发力，直到胸部触及单杠，双臂完全弯曲。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢下放身体回到起始姿势。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Start by hanging from a vertical bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
As you pull yourself up, lean back slightly and bring your elbows towards your sides.
Continue pulling until your chest reaches the bar and your elbows are fully bent.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为双手反握单杠，双臂完全伸直，身体悬挂。
收紧核心肌群，以胸部先行的方式将身体向上拉起。
拉起的同时身体微微后仰，将肘部向身体两侧收拢。
持续向上发力，直到胸部触及单杠，双臂完全弯曲。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢下放身体回到起始姿势。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the ball, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe. Lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地面上，双手撑在球上，间距略窄于肩宽，摆好俯卧撑姿势。收紧核心肌群，保持从头到脚呈一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将胸部向球的方向下移，手肘贴近身体两侧。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the ball, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球放在地面上，双手撑在球上，间距略窄于肩宽，摆好俯卧撑姿势。
收紧核心肌群，保持身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
通过弯曲手肘将胸部向球的方向下移，手肘贴近身体两侧。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed. Tilt your head to one side, bringing your ear towards your shoulder. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Repeat on the other side. Perform 2-4 sets on each side.
instructions.zh: 站直或坐直，保持肩膀放松。将头部向一侧倾斜，使耳朵靠近肩膀。保持拉伸姿势15-30秒。然后换另一侧重复动作。每侧进行2-4组练习。

en: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed.
Tilt your head to one side, bringing your ear towards your shoulder.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Repeat on the other side.
Perform 2-4 sets on each side.
zh: 站直或坐直，保持肩膀放松。
将头部向一侧倾斜，使耳朵靠近肩膀。
保持拉伸姿势15-30秒。
换另一侧重复动作。
每侧进行2-4组练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹，直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹，直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the ground, rotating your torso to one side. Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。将双手放在头后或交叉置于胸前。收紧腹部肌肉，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时将躯干向一侧旋转。稍作停顿，然后将肩胛骨降回起始位置。另一侧重复相同动作。两侧交替进行，重复所需的次数。

en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the ground, rotating your torso to one side.
Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
将双手放在头后或交叉置于胸前。
收紧腹肌，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时将躯干向一侧旋转。
稍作停顿，然后将肩胛骨降回起始位置。
另一侧重复相同动作。
两侧交替进行，重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the floor, rotating your torso to one side. Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the floor. Repeat on the other side, alternating sides with each repetition.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹肌，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时将躯干向一侧旋转。稍作停顿，然后将肩胛骨放回地面。换另一侧重复动作，每次重复交替进行。

en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the floor, rotating your torso to one side.
Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the floor.
Repeat on the other side, alternating sides with each repetition.
zh: 仰卧在地面上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
将双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。
收紧腹肌，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时将躯干向一侧旋转。
稍作停顿，然后将肩胛骨放回地面。
换另一侧重复动作，每次重复交替进行。

name.zh: 奥林匹克杠铃锤式弯举

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold an Olympic barbell with an overhand grip. Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing your body. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps. Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽直立站立，双手采用正握方式握住奥林匹克杠铃。将杠铃垂放于大腿前，手掌朝向身体。上臂保持固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将杠铃向上弯举。继续向上举起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部高度。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold an Olympic barbell with an overhand grip.
Let the barbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palms facing your body.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Inhale and slowly begin to lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽直立站立，双手采用正握方式握住奥林匹克杠铃。
将杠铃垂放于大腿前，手掌朝向身体。
上臂保持固定不动，呼气的同时收缩肱二头肌，将杠铃向上弯举。
继续向上举起杠铃，直到肱二头肌完全收缩，杠铃达到肩部高度。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，用力挤压肱二头肌。
吸气，慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

name.zh: 奥林匹克杠铃肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the barbell with an overhand grip. Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms. Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握方式握住杠铃。将杠铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。上臂紧贴头部，慢慢弯曲肘部将杠铃下放至头后。稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the barbell with an overhand grip.
Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手采用正握方式握住杠铃。
将杠铃举过头顶，手臂完全伸直。
上臂紧贴头部，慢慢弯曲肘部将杠铃下放至头后。
稍作停顿，然后将手臂伸直回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall. Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat. Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles. Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，面对墙壁站立。伸直一只手臂，将手掌放在墙上。收紧核心，身体向前倾，保持手臂伸直且背部平直。用手掌慢慢向墙壁推压，激活背阔肌。保持该姿势几秒钟，然后放松，换另一只手臂重复动作。

en: Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend one arm straight out in front of you and place your palm against the wall.
Engage your core and lean your body forward, keeping your arm straight and your back flat.
Slowly push against the wall with your palm, activating your lat muscles.
Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and repeat with the other arm.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，面对墙壁站立。
伸直一只手臂，将手掌放在墙上。
收紧核心，身体向前倾，保持手臂伸直且背部平直。
用手掌慢慢向墙壁推压，激活背阔肌。
保持该姿势几秒钟，然后放松，换另一只手臂重复动作。

instructions.en: Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support. Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged. Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向引体向上杆。伸手向上握住单杠，采用反握方式，一只手握住杠铃，另一只手握住手腕以提供支撑。手臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上，保持身体挺直，核心肌群收紧。通过弯曲手肘同时挤压背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起。持续向上直到下巴超过杠铃高度，然后缓慢下降回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂重复上述过程。

en: Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support.
Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向引体向上杆。
伸手向上握住单杠，采用反握方式，一只手握住杠铃，另一只手握住手腕以提供支撑。
手臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上，保持身体挺直，核心肌群收紧。
通过弯曲手肘同时挤压背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起。
持续向上直到下巴超过杠铃高度，然后缓慢下降回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧手臂重复上述过程。

instructions.en: Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.
instructions.zh: 背对长凳或椅子站立，双脚与肩同宽。将一只手放在身后的长凳或椅子上，手指朝向身体方向。双腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。弯曲肘关节，将身体向地面方向下降，保持背部靠近长凳或椅子。在最低点稍作停顿，然后双手发力推起，将手臂伸直恢复至起始位置。按照要求的重复次数完成动作，然后换另一侧手臂重复练习。

en: Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.
zh: 背对长凳或椅子站立，双脚与肩同宽。
将一只手放在身后的长凳或椅子上，手指朝向身体方向。
双腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。
弯曲肘关节，将身体向地面方向下降，保持背部靠近长凳或椅子。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后双手发力推起，将手臂伸直恢复至起始位置。
按照要求的重复次数完成动作，然后换另一侧手臂重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball with one hand in front of your waist. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Raise the medicine ball above your head, fully extending your arm. Forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground, using your core and shoulders to generate power. Catch the medicine ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住药球置于腰部前方。膝盖微屈，收紧核心力量。将药球高举过头，手臂充分伸直。运用核心和肩部肌群发力，猛然将药球重重砸向地面。接住弹起的药球，按要求的次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball with one hand in front of your waist.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Raise the medicine ball above your head, fully extending your arm.
Forcefully slam the medicine ball down to the ground, using your core and shoulders to generate power.
Catch the medicine ball on the bounce and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住药球置于腰部前方。
膝盖微屈，收紧核心肌群。
将药球高举过头，手臂充分伸展。
运用核心和肩部力量，猛然将药球砸向地面。
接住弹起的药球，按要求的重复次数继续练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Extend your arm fully, allowing the towel to hang in front of you. Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，单手握住毛巾。腰部前屈，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。手臂完全伸直，让毛巾垂于身前。将毛巾拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨靠拢。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将毛巾放回起始位置。重复所需次数后换另一侧手臂进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Extend your arm fully, allowing the towel to hang in front of you.
Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈，单手握住毛巾。
腰部前屈，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
手臂完全伸直，让毛巾垂于身前。
将毛巾拉向胸部，同时挤压肩胛骨靠拢。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将毛巾放回起始位置。
重复所需次数后换另一侧手臂进行。
