instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Place your hands on a stable surface for support, such as a wall or a bar. Lift one leg off the ground, keeping your knee slightly bent. Raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖朝前站立。双手扶在稳定的支撑物上以保持平衡，如墙壁或横杆。将一条腿抬离地面，膝盖保持微屈。用小腿肌发力尽可能高地抬起脚跟，在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚跟放下。按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一条腿继续练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Place your hands on a stable surface for support, such as a wall or a bar.
Lift one leg off the ground, keeping your knee slightly bent.
Raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖朝前站立。
双手扶在稳定的支撑物上以保持平衡，如墙壁或横杆。
将一条腿抬离地面，膝盖保持微屈。
用小腿肌发力尽可能高地抬起脚跟。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚跟放下。
按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一条腿继续练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place your hands on a wall or sturdy object for balance. Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot. Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto the ball of your foot. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，双手扶墙或稳固的物体以保持平衡。抬起一只脚离地，单腿支撑保持平衡。慢慢将脚跟抬离地面，身体向上提至前脚掌支撑。在最高点稍停，然后慢慢将脚跟放下，恢复起始姿势。按照目标次数重复，然后换腿进行相同的动作。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and place your hands on a wall or sturdy object for balance.
Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Slowly raise your heel off the ground, lifting your body up onto the ball of your foot.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，双手扶墙或稳固的物体以保持平衡。
抬起一只脚离地，单腿支撑保持平衡。
慢慢将脚跟抬离地面，身体向上提至前脚掌支撑。
在最高点稍停，然后慢慢将脚跟放下，恢复起始姿势。
按照目标次数重复，然后换腿进行相同的动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight. Push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。将一条腿向前伸直，保持悬空。弯曲支撑腿，身体向下蹲，仿佛向后坐到椅子上。保持胸部挺直，背部挺直。通过脚后跟发力，回到起始位置。换另一条腿重复动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend one leg forward, keeping it off the ground.
Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with the other leg.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
将一条腿向前伸直悬空。
弯曲支撑腿，像坐椅子一样下蹲。
保持胸部挺起，背部挺直。
通过脚后跟发力返回起始姿势。
换另一条腿重复。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
将双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收缩腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged. As you push back up, kick one leg out to the side, extending it fully and engaging your glutes. Return your leg to the starting position and repeat the push-up, alternating legs with each repetition. Continue alternating leg kicks and push-ups for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩，双脚并拢。弯曲手肘将身体下压至地面，同时保持背部挺直、核心收紧。向上推起身体时，将一条腿向侧方踢出，充分伸展并激活臀部肌肉。将腿收回起始位置，然后重复俯卧撑动作，每次换另一条腿踢出。持续交替进行腿部侧踢和俯卧撑，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
As you push back up, kick one leg out to the side, extending it fully and engaging your glutes.
Return your leg to the starting position and repeat the push-up, alternating legs with each repetition.
Continue alternating leg kicks and push-ups for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手略宽于肩，双脚并拢。
弯曲手肘将身体下压至地面，同时保持背部挺直、核心收紧。
向上推起身体时，将一条腿向侧方踢出，充分伸展并激活臀部肌肉。
将腿收回起始位置，然后重复俯卧撑动作，每次换另一条腿踢出。
持续交替进行腿部侧踢和俯卧撑，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade. With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽，站立或坐直。将一只手臂向上伸直，屈肘使手触碰到对侧的肩胛骨。用另一只手轻轻向头部对侧拉动伸直手臂的肘部，感受到肱三头肌的拉伸。保持15-30秒，然后放松。换另一侧重复以上动作。

en: Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade.
With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽，站立或坐直。
将一只手臂向上伸直，屈肘使手触碰到对侧的肩胛骨。
用另一只手轻轻向头部对侧拉动伸直手臂的肘部，感受到肱三头肌的拉伸。
保持15-30秒的拉伸，然后放松。
换另一侧重复以上动作。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands by your sides. Engage your abs and tilt your pelvis upward, pressing your lower back into the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your abs. Release the tilt and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿屈膝，双脚踩实地面，双手自然放在身体两侧。收紧腹部肌肉，将骨盆向上倾斜，使下背部紧贴地面。保持这个姿势几秒钟，注意感受腹部的收缩。然后放松骨盆，恢复到起始姿势。按照需要的次数重复进行。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands by your sides.
Engage your abs and tilt your pelvis upward, pressing your lower back into the ground.
Hold this position for a few seconds, focusing on contracting your abs.
Release the tilt and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿屈膝，双脚踩实地面。
双手自然放在身体两侧。
收紧腹部肌肉，将骨盆向上倾斜，使下背部紧贴地面。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，注意感受腹部的收缩。
放松骨盆，恢复到起始姿势。
按照需要的次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground. Hold the bridge position for a few seconds. Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。双臂放在身体两侧，掌心向下。收紧臀肌和核心肌群。将骨盆向上倾斜，使臀部抬离地面。保持臀桥姿势几秒钟。慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground.
Hold the bridge position for a few seconds.
Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
双臂放在身体两侧，掌心向下。
收紧臀肌和核心肌群。
将骨盆向上倾斜，使臀部抬离地面。
保持臀桥姿势几秒钟。
慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands. Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Release the tension on the rope and repeat the stretch on the other leg. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿在身前伸直。将绳索套在脚掌前部，双手握住绳索两端。轻轻向身体方向拉动绳索，同时屈踝拉伸小腿肌肉。保持拉伸15-30秒。释放绳索的张力，然后换另一条腿重复拉伸。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Release the tension on the rope and repeat the stretch on the other leg.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿在身前伸直
将绳索套在脚掌前部，双手握住绳索两端
轻轻向身体方向拉动绳索，同时屈踝拉伸小腿肌肉
保持拉伸15-30秒
释放绳索的张力，然后换另一条腿重复拉伸
按所需次数重复练习

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, forming an inverted V shape with your body. Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. As you lower down, shift your weight forward and transition into a cobra pose by straightening your arms and lifting your chest up. Reverse the movement by bending your elbows and lowering your chest back down towards the ground. Push through your hands to return to the inverted V position. Continue the movement by lowering your hips back down towards the ground, returning to the starting push-up position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑，双手比肩宽略宽，双脚并拢。收紧核心肌群，将臀部向上抬起，身体形成倒V字形。通过弯曲手肘将上半身向地面靠近，手肘贴近身体。下落过程中，身体重心前移，手臂伸直抬起胸部，进入眼镜蛇式姿势。反向动作，弯曲手肘将胸部向地面方向放下。通过双手推地，回到倒V姿势。继续将臀部向下放回初始俯卧撑姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, forming an inverted V shape with your body.
Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
As you lower down, shift your weight forward and transition into a cobra pose by straightening your arms and lifting your chest up.
Reverse the movement by bending your elbows and lowering your chest back down towards the ground.
Push through your hands to return to the inverted V position.
Continue the movement by lowering your hips back down towards the ground, returning to the starting push-up position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势起始，双手比肩宽略宽，双脚并拢。
收紧核心肌群，将臀部向上抬起，身体形成倒V字形。
通过弯曲手肘将上半身向地面靠近，手肘贴近身体。
下落过程中，身体重心前移，手臂伸直抬起胸部，进入眼镜蛇式姿势。
反向动作，弯曲手肘将胸部向地面方向放下。
通过双手推地，回到倒V姿势。
继续将臀部向下放回初始俯卧撑姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Push explosively off the ground, using your chest muscles to propel your upper body off the ground. Land softly with your hands back in the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩略宽。弯曲手肘，将胸部向地面降低，同时保持身体呈一条直线。利用胸部肌肉的力量，快速有力地将上半身推离地面。双手轻缓落地，恢复到起始姿势。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Push explosively off the ground, using your chest muscles to propel your upper body off the ground.
Land softly with your hands back in the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩略宽。
弯曲手肘将胸部向地面降低，同时保持身体呈一条直线。
利用胸部肌肉快速有力地将上半身推离地面。
双手轻缓落地，恢复到起始姿势。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your arms by your sides. Take a step back with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot. Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position. As you lower into the lunge, simultaneously reach your arms overhead. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then return to the starting position by pushing through your left heel and bringing your right foot forward. Repeat the movement on the other side, stepping back with your left foot and bending your right knee. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，双手自然垂放于身体两侧。右脚向后撤一步，以前脚掌着地。左膝弯曲，身体下降至弓步姿势。在下降的同时，双臂向上伸展举过头顶。在弓步最低点稍作停顿，然后通过左脚跟发力推地，将右脚收回，恢复到起始姿势。换另一侧重复动作，左脚向后撤步，右膝弯曲。持续交替进行所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Take a step back with your right foot, landing on the ball of your foot.
Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position.
As you lower into the lunge, simultaneously reach your arms overhead.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then return to the starting position by pushing through your left heel and bringing your right foot forward.
Repeat the movement on the other side, stepping back with your left foot and bending your right knee.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，双手自然垂放于身体两侧。
右脚向后撤一步，以前脚掌着地。
左膝弯曲，身体下降至弓步姿势。
在下降的同时，双臂向上伸展举过头顶。
在弓步最低点稍作停顿，然后通过左脚跟发力，将右脚收回，恢复到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复动作，左脚向后撤步，右膝弯曲。
持续交替进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands. Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the tension on the rope and relax your foot. Repeat the stretch on the other leg.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿伸直放在身前。将绳索套在脚掌前部，双手握住绳索的两端。轻轻向身体方向拉动绳索，同时屈脚并拉伸小腿肌肉。保持拉伸20-30秒。放松绳索的张力，让脚放松。换另一条腿重复上述拉伸动作。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Loop the rope around the ball of your foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Gently pull the rope towards you, flexing your foot and stretching your calf muscles.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release the tension on the rope and relax your foot.
Repeat the stretch on the other leg.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿伸直放在身前。
将绳索套在脚掌前部，双手握住绳索的两端。
轻轻向身体方向拉动绳索，同时屈脚并拉伸小腿肌肉。
保持拉伸20-30秒。
放松绳索的张力，让脚放松。
换另一条腿重复上述拉伸动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if you were sitting on a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微向外。弯曲膝盖的同时将臀部向后推，如同坐在椅子上一样降低身体。保持胸部挺起，背部全程挺直。将身体下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if you were sitting on a chair.
Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微向外。
弯曲膝盖的同时将臀部向后推，如同坐在椅子上一样降低身体。
保持胸部挺起，背部全程挺直。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold onto a stable support, such as a chair or wall, for balance. Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。握住稳定的支撑物（如椅子或墙壁）以保持平衡。通过弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推来降低身体至深蹲姿势。在整个动作过程中保持胸部挺起、背部挺直。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold onto a stable support, such as a chair or wall, for balance.
Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
握住稳定的支撑物（如椅子或墙壁）以保持平衡。
通过弯曲膝盖并将臀部向后推来降低身体至深蹲姿势。
在整个动作过程中保持胸部挺起、背部挺直。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start with the barbell on the ground in front of you, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and chest up as you lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees. As the barbell reaches your mid-thigh, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides. As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, rotating your elbows around and catching the barbell on your shoulders in a front squat position. Stand up with the barbell, fully extending your hips and knees. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position, keeping control of the weight throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于身前地面上。屈膝弯腰，双手正握杠铃，握距略宽于肩。保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，同时伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃拉离地面。当杠铃上升至大腿中部时，爆发性地向上提拉，耸肩并将肘部向两侧和上方提起。杠铃到达最高点后，迅速向下蹲至杠铃下方，将肘部外旋，接住杠铃并保持前蹲姿势。双腿发力站起，充分伸展髋关节和膝关节。最后控制性地将杠铃放回起始位置，整个动作过程中保持对重量的控制。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start with the barbell on the ground in front of you, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and chest up as you lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
As the barbell reaches your mid-thigh, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, rotating your elbows around and catching the barbell on your shoulders in a front squat position.
Stand up with the barbell, fully extending your hips and knees.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position, keeping control of the weight throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于身前地面上。
屈膝弯腰，双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。
保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，同时伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃拉离地面。
当杠铃上升至大腿中部时，爆发性地向上提拉，耸肩并将肘部向两侧和上方提起。
杠铃到达最高点后，迅速向下蹲至杠铃下方，将肘部外旋，接住杠铃并保持前蹲姿势。
双腿发力站起，充分伸展髋关节和膝关节。
控制性地将杠铃放回起始位置，整个动作过程中保持对重量的控制。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe. Engage your core and squeeze your glutes to maintain a stable position. Lower your body down onto your forearms, one arm at a time, maintaining a straight line from head to toe. Hold this position for the desired amount of time, keeping your core and glutes engaged. To return to the starting position, push through your forearms and lift your body back up into a high plank position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为高位平板撑，双手正对肩关节下方，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。收紧核心肌群并夹紧臀部以保持身体稳定。将身体依次降至前臂支撑位置，双臂交替进行，同时保持从头到脚的笔直姿态。按所需时间保持该姿势，保持核心和臀部持续发力。返回起始位置时，通过前臂发力将身体推起，恢复到高位平板撑姿势。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Engage your core and squeeze your glutes to maintain a stable position.
Lower your body down onto your forearms, one arm at a time, maintaining a straight line from head to toe.
Hold this position for the desired amount of time, keeping your core and glutes engaged.
To return to the starting position, push through your forearms and lift your body back up into a high plank position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板撑作为起始姿势，双手正对肩关节下方，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
收紧核心肌群并夹紧臀部以保持身体稳定。
将身体依次降至前臂支撑位置，双臂交替进行，同时保持从头到脚的笔直姿态。
按所需时间保持该姿势，保持核心和臀部持续发力。
返回起始位置时，通过前臂发力将身体推起，恢复到高位平板撑姿势。
按所需次数重复练习。

name.zh: 囚徒式半仰卧起坐（男性）

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹，直到躯干与地面成45度角。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹，直到躯干与地面成45度角。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by lying face down on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes touching the ground. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core muscles and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight. Rotate your torso to one side, bringing your shoulder towards your hip. Keep your hips and legs stable throughout the movement. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the rotation to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为面部朝下俯卧在健身球上，双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖点地。双手可以放在头后或交叉置于胸前。收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将上半身抬离健身球，同时保持背部挺直。接着将躯干向一侧旋转，肩膀向臀部方向靠拢。在整个动作过程中，保持臀部和腿部的稳定。稍作停顿后，回到起始姿势。然后向另一侧进行相同的旋转动作。继续交替进行两侧的扭转，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Start by lying face down on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes touching the ground.
Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Engage your core muscles and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight.
Rotate your torso to one side, bringing your shoulder towards your hip. Keep your hips and legs stable throughout the movement.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下俯卧在健身球上，双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖点地。
将双手放在头后或交叉置于胸前。
收紧核心肌群，慢慢将上半身抬离健身球，同时保持背部挺直。
将躯干向一侧旋转，肩膀向臀部方向靠拢，保持臀部和腿部的稳定。
稍作停顿，然后回到起始姿势。
向另一侧重复相同的旋转动作。
继续交替进行两侧的扭转，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your hips. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手掌心相对握住单杠，双臂完全伸直，收紧核心肌群并将肩胛骨向中间靠拢。通过弯曲手肘并将肘部向下拉动至髋部方向，将身体向上拉向单杠。持续向上拉，直到下巴超过单杠。在顶点稍作停顿，然后有控制地缓慢将身体下降回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms fully extended.
Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your hips.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手掌心相对握住单杠，双臂完全伸直。
收紧核心肌群并将肩胛骨向中间靠拢。
通过弯曲手肘并将肘部向下拉动至髋部方向，将身体向上拉向单杠。
持续向上拉，直到下巴超过单杠。
在顶点稍作停顿，然后有控制地缓慢将身体下降回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by sitting on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands on the sides of the stability ball for support. Engage your abs and slowly roll your hips forward, bringing your knees towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手放在健身球两侧以保持身体平衡。收紧腹肌，缓慢将臀部向前滚动，同时将膝盖向胸部方向拉近。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将腿伸直回到起始位置。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Start by sitting on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Place your hands on the sides of the stability ball for support.
Engage your abs and slowly roll your hips forward, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
双手放在健身球两侧以保持身体平衡。
收紧腹肌，缓慢将臀部向前滚动，同时将膝盖向胸部方向拉近。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将腿伸直回到起始位置。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and bringing your chest towards the bar. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，手掌朝外，手臂完全伸直。收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。通过弯曲手肘将身体向上拉起，使胸部靠近单杠。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and bringing your chest towards the bar.
Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，手掌朝外，手臂完全伸直。
收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向中间夹紧。
弯曲手肘将身体向上拉起，使胸部靠近单杠。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. From the push-up position, pull your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手比肩稍宽，身体保持一条直线。弯曲手臂将胸部下压靠近地面，同时保持身体平直。推起时手掌用力，将手臂伸直恢复到起始姿势。重复此动作至目标次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
From the push-up position, pull your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手比肩稍宽，身体保持一条直线。
弯曲手臂将胸部下压靠近地面，保持身体平直。
手掌推地，将手臂伸直恢复到起始姿势。
重复此动作至目标次数。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight. Push through your hands to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Quickly bring one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring the other knee towards your chest. Continue alternating knees as fast as you can while maintaining good form. Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体保持一条直线。通过弯曲手臂将胸部靠近地面，保持身体平直。双手发力推直手臂，回到起始姿势。快速将一只膝盖收向胸部，然后迅速换另一只膝盖收向胸部。在保持良好姿势的前提下，尽可能快速地交替收膝。继续进行到规定的时长或次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Push through your hands to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Quickly bring one knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring the other knee towards your chest.
Continue alternating knees as fast as you can while maintaining good form.
Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体保持一条直线。
弯曲手臂将胸部靠近地面，同时保持身体平直。
双手发力推直手臂，回到起始姿势。
快速将一只膝盖收向胸部，然后迅速换另一只膝盖收向胸部。
在保持良好姿势的前提下，尽可能快速地交替收膝。
继续进行到规定的时长或重复次数。

instructions.en: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up. Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball. Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将BOSU球平放在地面上，平面朝上。摆好俯卧撑姿势，双手放在BOSU球的外缘。收紧核心肌群，通过弯曲手肘将身体向下降低靠近BOSU球。通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将BOSU球平放在地面上，平面朝上。
摆好俯卧撑姿势，双手放在BOSU球的外缘。
收紧核心肌群，通过弯曲手肘将身体向下降低靠近BOSU球。
通过伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 采用高位平板撑姿势，双手比肩略宽，双脚并拢。收紧核心肌群，屈肘将身体向地面方向下压，保持身体呈一条直线。当胸部接近地面时稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 采用高位平板撑姿势，双手比肩略宽，双脚并拢。
收紧核心肌群，屈肘将身体向地面方向下压，保持身体呈一条直线。
当胸部接近地面时稍作停顿，然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up. Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball. Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将波速球平放在地面上，有弧度的一面朝上。双手放在波速球的外侧边缘，摆好俯卧撑的起始姿势。收紧核心肌群，通过弯曲手肘将身体向波速球的方向下压。然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。根据需要重复完成规定次数。

en: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将波速球平放在地面上，有弧度的一面朝上。
双手放在波速球的外侧边缘，摆好俯卧撑的姿势。
收紧核心肌群，通过弯曲手肘将身体向波速球的方向下压。
通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
根据需要重复完成规定次数。

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes. Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地面上，双手撑在健身球上，身体俯卧向下，双手与肩同宽。双腿向后伸直，用脚尖支撑身体保持平衡。收紧核心肌群，屈肘将胸部向健身球方向下移，同时保持身体呈一条直线。在最低点稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart.
Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes.
Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球放在地面上，双手撑在球上，身体俯卧向下，双手与肩同宽。
双腿向后伸直，用脚尖支撑身体保持平衡。
收紧核心肌群，屈肘将胸部向健身球方向下移，同时保持身体呈一条直线。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart. Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes. Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将健身球放在地上，身体俯卧，双手放在球上，间距与肩同宽。双腿向后伸直，用脚尖支撑身体保持平衡。收紧核心，弯曲手肘将胸部向球靠近，同时保持身体呈一条直线。在最低点稍停片刻，然后伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart.
Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes.
Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将健身球放在地上，身体俯卧，双手放在球上，间距与肩同宽。
双腿向后伸直，用脚尖支撑身体保持平衡。
收紧核心，弯曲手肘将胸部向球靠近，同时保持身体呈一条直线。
在最低点稍停片刻，然后伸直手臂将自己推回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away. Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart. Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line. Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面对墙壁站立，约一臂长的距离。将双手放在墙上与肩同高的位置，双手间距略宽于肩宽。双脚向后移动几英尺，保持身体挺直，双脚与髋同宽。弯曲手肘，将胸部向墙壁方向靠近，同时保持身体呈一条直线。将身体推回起始位置，手臂伸直。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart.
Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line.
Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面对墙壁站立，约一臂长的距离。
将双手放在墙上与肩同高的位置，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
双脚向后移动几英尺，保持身体挺直，双脚与髋同宽。
弯曲手肘，将胸部向墙壁方向靠近，同时保持身体呈一条直线。
将身体推回起始位置，手臂伸直。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away. Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back with your feet, keeping them hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels. Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body straight. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面对墙壁站立，大约一臂距离。将双手放在墙上，与肩同高，双手间距略宽于肩宽。双脚向后迈出，双脚与髋同宽。收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚跟成一条直线。弯曲手肘，将胸部向墙壁方向靠近，同时保持身体挺直。稍作停顿，然后将身体推回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step back with your feet, keeping them hip-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body straight.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面对墙壁站立，大约一臂距离。
将双手放在墙上，与肩同高，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
双脚向后迈出，双脚与髋同宽。
收紧核心，保持身体从头到脚跟成一条直线。
弯曲手肘，将胸部向墙壁方向靠近，同时保持身体挺直。
稍作停顿，然后将身体推回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, resting them on the ground. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手靠近并直接放在肩膀下方。每只手握住一个哑铃，哑铃放在地面上。通过弯曲肘部将身体向地面降低，保持肘部靠近身体两侧。通过手掌向上推，伸展手臂并返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复动作。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands placed close together, directly under your shoulders.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, resting them on the ground.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手靠近并直接放在肩膀下方。
每只手握住一个哑铃，哑铃放在地面上。
通过弯曲肘部将身体向地面降低，保持肘部靠近身体两侧。
通过手掌向上推，伸展手臂并返回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复动作。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. As you push back up, lift one leg off the ground and kick it out to the side, keeping it straight. Lower your leg back down and repeat the push-up, then switch to the other leg. Continue alternating leg kicks with each push-up repetition.
instructions.zh: 双手比肩稍宽撑地，双脚并拢，呈俯卧撑姿势。弯曲手肘将身体下压，同时保持背部挺直、核心收紧。向上推起身体时，将一条腿抬离地面并向侧面踢出，保持腿部伸直。将腿放下，再次完成俯卧撑，然后换另一条腿。两腿交替进行，每完成一次俯卧撑就换边踢腿。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
As you push back up, lift one leg off the ground and kick it out to the side, keeping it straight.
Lower your leg back down and repeat the push-up, then switch to the other leg.
Continue alternating leg kicks with each push-up repetition.
zh: 双手比肩稍宽撑地，双脚并拢，呈俯卧撑起始姿势。
弯曲手肘将身体向地面方向下压，保持背部挺直、核心收紧。
向上推起身体时，将一条腿抬离地面并向侧面踢出，腿部保持伸直。
将腿放下，再次完成俯卧撑动作，然后换另一条腿进行。
每完成一次俯卧撑就交替踢腿，持续重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以双手撑在药球上，间距与肩同宽，呈高位平板姿势准备。收紧核心，屈肘将身体下降至接近地面，同时保持背部挺直。通过手掌用力推压，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。根据目标次数重复此动作。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以双手撑在药球上，间距与肩同宽，呈高位平板姿势准备。
收紧核心，屈肘将身体下降至接近地面，同时保持背部挺直。
通过手掌用力推压，伸直手臂回到起始姿势。
根据目标次数重复此动作。

instructions.en: Start in a plank position with your forearms on the ground and elbows directly below your shoulders. Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势以前臂支撑于地面，呈平板支撑状态，确保肘关节垂直位于肩关节下方。收紧核心肌群，保持从头到脚尖的身体呈一条直线。通过弯曲肘关节将胸部向地面方向降低，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。在最低点稍作停顿，然后推起身体回到起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a plank position with your forearms on the ground and elbows directly below your shoulders.
Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以前臂支撑于地面呈平板支撑姿势，确保肘关节垂直位于肩关节下方。
收紧核心肌群，保持身体从头到脚尖呈一条直线。
通过弯曲肘关节将胸部向地面方向降低，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后推起身体回到起始姿势。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Once your chest is just above the ground, push through your hands to extend your arms and lift your upper body up. At the top of the movement, protract your shoulder blades by pushing your upper back towards the ceiling. Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement by retracting your shoulder blades and lowering your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势采用高位平板支撑，双手间距略宽于肩宽，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将身体向地面下降，手肘贴近身体两侧。当胸部接近地面时，双手推地伸直手臂，将上半身撑起。在动作顶端，通过将上背部向天花板方向推来进行肩胛骨前伸。保持片刻，然后反方向收回肩胛骨，将身体降回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Once your chest is just above the ground, push through your hands to extend your arms and lift your upper body up.
At the top of the movement, protract your shoulder blades by pushing your upper back towards the ceiling.
Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement by retracting your shoulder blades and lowering your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 采用高位平板支撑姿势，双手间距略宽于肩宽，身体从头到脚保持一条直线。
弯曲手肘将身体向地面下降，手肘贴近身体两侧。
当胸部接近地面时，双手推地发力伸直手臂，将上半身撑起。
在动作顶端，通过将上背部向天花板方向推来实现肩胛骨前伸。
保持片刻，然后反方向收回肩胛骨，将身体缓慢降回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged. Push back up to the starting position. Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling. Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position. Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体呈一条直线。通过弯曲手肘将身体下降至地面，保持核心收紧。然后推起回到起始姿势。接着将重心转移至左手，身体向右旋转，将右臂向天花板方向抬起。保持侧板支撑姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复俯卧撑和侧板支撑动作，继续交替进行直至完成所需的重复次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Push back up to the starting position.
Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling.
Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，身体保持平直
弯曲手肘将身体下降至地面，保持核心收紧
向上推起回到起始姿势
将重心转移至左手，身体向右旋转，右臂向天花板方向抬起
保持侧板支撑姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始姿势
换另一侧重复俯卧撑和侧板支撑动作
继续交替进行直至完成所需的重复次数

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if sitting on a chair. Keep your chest up and your back straight. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。屈膝并向后推髋部，降低身体重心，仿佛要坐在椅子上。保持胸部挺起、背部挺直。一直下蹲直到大腿与地面平行。通过脚跟发力，蹬地返回起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back as if sitting on a chair.
Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立
屈膝并向后推髋部，降低身体重心，仿佛要坐在椅子上
保持胸部挺起、背部挺直
下蹲直到大腿与地面平行
通过脚跟发力，蹬地返回起始姿势
根据需要的重复次数重复进行

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面呈45度角。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地上。
双手放在头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面呈45度角。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides. Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place. Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet. Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂自然置于身体两侧。开始快速上下交替抬动双脚，就像原地跑步一样。保持动作轻快敏捷，将重心放在前脚掌上。根据设定的时长或重复次数持续进行训练。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Begin by rapidly moving your feet up and down, as if you were running in place.
Keep your movements quick and light, focusing on staying on the balls of your feet.
Continue for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂自然置于身体两侧。
快速上下交替抬动双脚，就像原地跑步一样。
保持动作轻快敏捷，将重心放在前脚掌上。
根据设定的时长或重复次数持续进行训练。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Push back up to the starting position, using your chest muscles to lift your body. Repeat with the other arm extended.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑位，双手比肩稍宽，双脚并拢。将一只手臂向侧面伸直，与地面保持平行。通过弯曲肘部将身体向地面方向下降，同时保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧。利用胸部肌肉发力将身体推回起始位置。换另一只手臂伸直后重复动作。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Push back up to the starting position, using your chest muscles to lift your body.
Repeat with the other arm extended.
zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑位，双手比肩稍宽，双脚并拢。
将一只手臂向侧面伸直，与地面保持平行。
通过弯曲肘部将身体向地面方向下降，同时保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧。
利用胸部肌肉发力将身体推回起始位置。
换另一只手臂伸直后重复动作。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent. Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down. Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲。双手放在身体两侧，掌心向下。收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将髋部放下回到起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie on your back with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地上，双脚平放于地面，膝盖弯曲。
双手放在身体两侧，掌心向下。
收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，将髋部向上抬起，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将髋部放下回到起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your right arm across your chest, placing your left hand on your right elbow. Gently pull your right arm towards your left shoulder, feeling a stretch in your right shoulder. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。伸直右臂横过胸部，左手放在右肘上。轻轻将右臂向左肩方向拉动，感受右肩部的拉伸。保持15-30秒，然后放松。换另一侧重复。

en: Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend your right arm across your chest, placing your left hand on your right elbow.
Gently pull your right arm towards your left shoulder, feeling a stretch in your right shoulder.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
伸直右臂横过胸部，左手放在右肘上。
轻轻将右臂向左肩方向拉动，感受右肩部的拉伸。
保持15-30秒，然后放松。
换另一侧重复。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手以正握方式抓住单杠，握距略宽于肩宽。双臂完全伸直，身体保持直立，悬挂于单杠上。收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。继续向上拉动，直到下巴超过单杠。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢控制地将身体降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手以正握方式抓住单杠，握距略宽于肩宽
双臂完全伸直，身体保持直立，悬挂于单杠上
收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，保持肘部贴近身体
继续向上拉动，直到下巴超过单杠
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢控制地将身体降回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

name.en: reclining big toe pose with rope

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Loop the rope around the ball of your right foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands. Slowly raise your right leg towards your chest, keeping your knee straight and your foot flexed. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直放松，双手自然放在身体两侧。将绳索套在右脚的前脚掌处，双手分别握住绳索的两端。保持膝盖伸直、脚踝勾起的状态，慢慢将右腿向胸部方向抬起。保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢地将腿放回起始位置。换左腿重复同样的动作。双腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Lie on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Loop the rope around the ball of your right foot and hold the ends of the rope with your hands.
Slowly raise your right leg towards your chest, keeping your knee straight and your foot flexed.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Repeat with your left leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直放松，双手自然放在身体两侧。
将绳索套在右脚的前脚掌处，双手分别握住绳索的两端。
保持膝盖伸直、脚踝勾起的状态，慢慢将右腿向胸部方向抬起。
保持拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢地将腿放回起始位置。
换左腿重复同样的动作。
双腿交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: resistance band hip thrusts on knees (female)

instructions.en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your feet flexed. Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees. Place your hands on your hips or extend them out in front of you for balance. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Push your hips forward and squeeze your glutes as you lift your knees off the ground, extending your hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 跪在地面上，双膝与髋同宽，脚尖绷直。将弹力带套在大腿上方、膝盖以上的位置。双手叉腰或向前伸直以保持身体平衡。收紧臀肌和核心肌群。向前推髋并用力挤压臀肌，同时将双膝抬离地面，伸展髋部直至大腿与地面平行。保持该姿势片刻，然后缓慢将双膝落回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your feet flexed.
Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Place your hands on your hips or extend them out in front of you for balance.
Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Push your hips forward and squeeze your glutes as you lift your knees off the ground, extending your hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 跪在地面上，双膝与髋同宽，脚尖绷直。
将弹力带套在大腿上方、膝盖以上的位置。
双手叉腰或向前伸直以保持身体平衡。
收紧臀肌和核心肌群。
向前推髋并用力挤压臀肌，同时将双膝抬离地面，伸展髋部直至大腿与地面平行。
保持该姿势片刻，然后缓慢将双膝落回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Attach the resistance band to a sturdy anchor point and secure it around your ankle. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Keeping your core engaged and your upper body stable, extend your leg straight out in front of you. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return your leg to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 将弹力带固定在稳固的锚点上，并将其套在脚踝处。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向锚点。保持核心肌群收紧、上身稳定，将腿部向前直伸。顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将腿收回起始位置。重复所需次数后换腿进行。

en: Attach the resistance band to a sturdy anchor point and secure it around your ankle.
Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Keeping your core engaged and your upper body stable, extend your leg straight out in front of you.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 将弹力带固定在稳固的锚点上，并将其套在脚踝处。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向锚点。
保持核心肌群收紧、上身稳定，将腿部向前直伸。
顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将腿收回起始位置。
重复所需次数后换腿进行。

name.zh: 弹力带坐姿肱二头肌弯举

instructions.en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the resistance band with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms extended down by your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the resistance band up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the resistance band back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住弹力带，采用反握姿势（掌心向上），手臂向下伸直置于身体两侧。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将弹力带向上弯举至肩部方向。在顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。然后吸气，慢慢将弹力带放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the resistance band with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms extended down by your sides.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the resistance band up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the resistance band back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住弹力带，采用反握姿势（掌心向上），手臂向下伸直置于身体两侧。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将弹力带向上弯举至肩部方向。
在顶端稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气，慢慢将弹力带放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the resistance band handles in each hand, with your palms facing down and elbows bent at a 90-degree angle. Extend your arms forward, pushing the resistance band away from your chest. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部保持挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住弹力带手柄，掌心向下，肘部弯曲成90度角。将双臂向前伸展，将弹力带从胸前推开。动作结束时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the resistance band handles in each hand, with your palms facing down and elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Extend your arms forward, pushing the resistance band away from your chest.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部保持挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住弹力带手柄，掌心向下，肘部弯曲成90度角。
将双臂向前伸展，将弹力带从胸前推开。
动作结束时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees. Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support. Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 端坐在椅子或凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。将弹力带套在大腿膝盖上方位置，双手握住椅子或凳子两侧以保持身体稳定。收缩髋外展肌（大腿外侧肌肉），同时在弹力带的阻力下缓慢将双膝向两侧打开。动作达到最大幅度时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双膝回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复这个动作。

en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support.
Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 端坐在椅子或凳子上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
将弹力带套在大腿膝盖上方位置。
双手握住椅子或凳子两侧以保持身体稳定。
收缩髋外展肌（大腿外侧肌肉），同时在弹力带的阻力下缓慢将双膝向两侧打开。
动作达到最大幅度时稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双膝回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数重复这个动作。

instructions.en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground. Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level. Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，保持背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住弹力带，掌心朝前，将弹力带拉至肩部高度。然后将弹力带向上推举，双臂完全伸直。在顶端稍作停顿后，缓慢将弹力带降回肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Hold the resistance band with both hands, palms facing forward, and bring it up to shoulder level.
Press the band overhead, extending your arms fully.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back down to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在椅子或长凳上，背部挺直，双脚平放在地面上
双手握住弹力带，掌心朝前，将弹力带拉至肩部高度
将弹力带向上推举，双臂完全伸直
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将弹力带降回肩部高度
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

name.en: resistance band seated straight back row

instructions.en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended and loop the resistance band around your feet. Hold the ends of the resistance band with your hands, palms facing each other. Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, engaging your core. Pull the resistance band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地板上，双腿伸直，将弹力带绕过脚部。双手握住弹力带两端，手掌相对。保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜，收紧核心肌群。将弹力带向胸部方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放力量，恢复到起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended and loop the resistance band around your feet.
Hold the ends of the resistance band with your hands, palms facing each other.
Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, engaging your core.
Pull the resistance band towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地板上，双腿伸直，将弹力带绕过脚部。
双手握住弹力带两端，手掌相对。
保持背部挺直，微微向后倾斜，收紧核心肌群。
将弹力带向胸部方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后缓慢释放力量，恢复到起始姿势。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended along your sides. Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs perpendicular to the floor. Contract your abs and curl your hips off the floor, bringing your knees towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂沿身体两侧伸展。弯曲膝盖并抬起双脚，使大腿垂直于地面。收缩腹肌，将臀部抬离地面，膝盖向胸部方向卷动。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。根据所需重复次数重复以上动作。

en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended along your sides.
Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs perpendicular to the floor.
Contract your abs and curl your hips off the floor, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂沿身体两侧伸展。
弯曲膝盖并抬起双脚，使大腿垂直于地面。
收缩腹肌，将臀部抬离地面，膝盖向胸部方向卷动。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将臀部放回起始位置。
根据所需重复次数重复以上动作。

instructions.en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手撑在双杠上，身体保持直立，手臂完全伸直。屈肘下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿后，伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。重复上述动作至所需次数。

en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手撑在双杠上，身体保持直立，手臂完全伸直。
屈肘下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行。
稍作停顿后，伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
重复上述动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back. Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，屈膝坐在器械上，膝盖置于垫板下方，双脚平放于地面。然后采用反握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。保持躯干直立挺胸，肩胛骨略微后收，下背部维持适度的弓形。接着将把手向下拉向胸部位置，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。在动作最低点停顿片刻，随后缓慢将把手释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，屈膝坐在器械上，膝盖置于垫板下方，双脚平放于地面。
采用反握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。
保持躯干直立挺胸，肩胛骨略微后收，下背部维持适度的弓形。
将把手向下拉向胸部位置，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
在动作最低点停顿片刻，随后缓慢将把手释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手以反握姿势握住单杠，间距与肩同宽。双臂完全伸直，身体保持直立悬挂。收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉起，胸部朝上带动身体。继续向上拉直至下巴超过单杠。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将身体降回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手以反握姿势握住单杠，间距与肩同宽。
双臂完全伸直，身体保持直立悬挂。
收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉起，胸部朝上带动身体。
继续向上拉直至下巴超过单杠。
在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将身体降回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.zh: 健身球反向超人式伸展

instructions.en: Lie face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you. Place your hands on the ground in front of you for stability. Engaging your glutes and hamstrings, lift your legs up towards the ceiling as high as you can. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下躺在健身球上，髋部置于球上，双腿在身后伸直。双手放在前方的地面上以保持身体稳定。收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，将双腿向天花板方向尽可能高高抬起。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Place your hands on the ground in front of you for stability.
Engaging your glutes and hamstrings, lift your legs up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下躺在健身球上，髋部置于球上，双腿在身后伸直。
双手放在前方的地面上以保持身体稳定。
收缩臀肌和腘绳肌，将双腿向天花板方向尽可能高高抬起。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a flat bench with your hips at the edge and your legs hanging off the bench. Hold onto the bench for stability. Keeping your legs straight, raise them up towards the ceiling as high as you can. Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement. Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将身体俯卧在平凳上，髋部置于凳缘处，双腿自然垂下悬空。双手握住凳子以保持身体稳定。保持双腿伸直，向天花板方向尽可能高地抬起。动作顶端时用力收紧臀肌。然后缓慢将双腿放下回至起始位置。重复进行至目标次数。

en: Lie face down on a flat bench with your hips at the edge and your legs hanging off the bench.
Hold onto the bench for stability.
Keeping your legs straight, raise them up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将身体俯卧在平凳上，髋部置于凳缘处，双腿自然垂下悬空。
双手握住凳子以保持身体稳定。
保持双腿伸直，向天花板方向尽可能高地抬起。
动作顶端时用力收紧臀肌。
缓慢将双腿放下回至起始位置。
重复进行至目标次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your hands resting on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet. Press through your hands and lift your hips off the ground, coming into a reverse plank position. Engage your core and lift one leg off the ground, extending it straight up towards the ceiling. Hold for a moment, then lower your leg back down. Repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直，双手放在身体后方的地面上，手指朝向脚的方向。用手掌按压地面，将臀部抬离地面，使身体进入反向平板支撑姿势。收紧核心肌群，将一条腿抬离地面，向上伸直指向天花板。保持片刻，然后将腿放下回到地面。换另一条腿重复同样的动作。继续交替抬腿，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your hands resting on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet.
Press through your hands and lift your hips off the ground, coming into a reverse plank position.
Engage your core and lift one leg off the ground, extending it straight up towards the ceiling.
Hold for a moment, then lower your leg back down.
Repeat with the other leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直，双手放在身体后方的地面上，手指朝向脚的方向。
用手掌按压地面，将臀部抬离地面，使身体进入反向平板支撑姿势。
收紧核心肌群，将一条腿抬离地面，向上伸直指向天花板。
保持片刻，然后将腿放下回到地面。
换另一条腿重复同样的动作。
继续交替抬腿，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from the rings with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双臂撑在吊环上充分伸直，身体保持直立姿势。通过弯曲肘关节缓缓下降身体，直至肩膀下降到低于肘部的位置。然后伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。重复进行至所需次数。

en: Start by hanging from the rings with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双臂撑在吊环上充分伸直，身体保持直立姿势。
弯曲肘关节缓缓下降身体，直至肩膀下降到低于肘部的位置。
伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
重复进行至所需次数。

instructions.en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart. Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support. Slowly lean forward, shifting your weight onto your hands and extending your legs behind you. Keep your back straight and engage your glutes as you push your hips back and up towards the ceiling. Hold this position for a few seconds, feeling a stretch in your glutes. Slowly return to the starting position by bending your knees and lowering your hips back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为跪在地面上，双膝与髋同宽，双手放在身前的地面上支撑身体。慢慢向前倾斜身体，将重心转移到双手上，同时将双腿向后伸展。保持背部挺直，收紧臀肌，将髋部向上向后推，感觉臀部有拉伸感。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后通过弯曲膝盖和髋部下沉慢慢回到起始姿势。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart.
Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Slowly lean forward, shifting your weight onto your hands and extending your legs behind you.
Keep your back straight and engage your glutes as you push your hips back and up towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for a few seconds, feeling a stretch in your glutes.
Slowly return to the starting position by bending your knees and lowering your hips back down.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 跪在地面上，双膝与髋同宽。
双手放在身前的地面上支撑身体。
慢慢向前倾斜身体，将重心转移到双手上，同时将双腿向后伸展。
保持背部挺直，收紧臀肌，将髋部向上向后推。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，感受臀部的拉伸感。
通过弯曲膝盖和髋部下沉慢慢回到起始姿势。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand in front of a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立在引体向上杆下方。双手正握抓杆，握距略宽于肩。手臂完全伸直，身体保持直立悬挂在单杠上。收紧背部肌群，将身体向单杠方向拉起，胸部朝向单杠方向。在最高点稍作停留，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand in front of a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立在引体向上杆下方。
双手正握抓杆，握距略宽于肩。
手臂完全伸直，身体保持直立悬挂在单杠上。
收紧背部肌群，将身体向单杠方向拉起，胸部朝向单杠方向。
在最高点稍作停留，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Place the roller perpendicular to your body, just below your glutes. Slowly roll your body backwards, allowing the roller to move up your back. Continue rolling until the roller reaches your upper back. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。将滚轮垂直放置于身体下方，位置在臀部下方一点。然后身体慢慢向后滚动，让滚轮沿着背部向上移动。继续滚动直到滚轮到达上背部。暂停片刻，再缓慢滚回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Place the roller perpendicular to your body, just below your glutes.
Slowly roll your body backwards, allowing the roller to move up your back.
Continue rolling until the roller reaches your upper back.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。
将滚轮垂直放置于身体下方，位置在臀部下方一点。
身体慢慢向后滚动，让滚轮沿着背部向上移动。
继续滚动直到滚轮到达上背部。
暂停片刻，再缓慢滚回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a plank position with your forearms on the roller and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and slowly roll the roller forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control. Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the roller back towards your starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为平板支撑式，前臂撑在滚轮上，身体保持一条直线。收紧核心肌群，缓慢将滚轮向前滚动，同时伸展身体，在保持控制的前提下尽可能向前延伸。在最远点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将滚轮滚回起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Start in a plank position with your forearms on the roller and your body in a straight line.
Engage your core and slowly roll the roller forward, extending your body as far as you can while maintaining control.
Pause for a moment at the furthest point, then slowly roll the roller back towards your starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为平板支撑式，前臂撑在滚轮上，身体保持一条直线。
收紧核心肌群，缓慢将滚轮向前滚动，同时伸展身体，在保持控制的前提下尽可能向前延伸。
在最远点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将滚轮滚回起始位置。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Start by kneeling on the ground with the roller positioned under your hips. Place your hands on the roller for support. Slowly roll the roller forward, extending your hips and stretching your glutes. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then roll back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先跪在地上，将滚轴放置在髋部下方。将双手放在滚轴上以获得支撑。慢慢将滚轴向前滚动，伸展髋部并拉伸臀肌。保持拉伸几秒钟，然后滚回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行重复。

en: Start by kneeling on the ground with the roller positioned under your hips.
Place your hands on the roller for support.
Slowly roll the roller forward, extending your hips and stretching your glutes.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then roll back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先跪在地上，将滚轴放置在髋部下方。
将双手放在滚轴上以获得支撑。
慢慢将滚轴向前滚动，伸展髋部并拉伸臀肌。
保持拉伸几秒钟，然后滚回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行重复。

instructions.en: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Place the roller under your glutes, just above your knees. Lean back and place your hands on the ground behind you for support. Engage your glutes and slowly roll the roller forward, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling a stretch in your glutes. Slowly roll the roller back to the starting position, extending your legs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先坐在地面上，双腿伸直放在身前。将滚筒放在臀部下方，正好位于膝盖上方。向后倾斜，双手放在身后的地面上作为支撑。收紧臀部肌肉，慢慢将滚筒向前滚动，弯曲膝盖并将膝盖向胸部靠近。在动作结束时暂停片刻，感受臀部的拉伸。慢慢将滚筒滚回起始位置，双腿伸直。根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Place the roller under your glutes, just above your knees.
Lean back and place your hands on the ground behind you for support.
Engage your glutes and slowly roll the roller forward, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling a stretch in your glutes.
Slowly roll the roller back to the starting position, extending your legs.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先坐在地面上，双腿伸直放在身前。
将滚筒放在臀部下方，正好位于膝盖上方。
向后倾斜，双手放在身后的地面上作为支撑。
收紧臀部肌肉，慢慢将滚筒向前滚动，弯曲膝盖并将膝盖向胸部靠近。
在动作结束时暂停片刻，感受臀部的拉伸。
慢慢将滚筒滚回起始位置，双腿伸直。
根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended straight above your head and your legs straight out in front of you. Place the roller between your feet and grip it with your toes. Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground and curl your knees towards your chest, rolling the roller towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position, rolling the roller away from your body. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂向上伸直指向天花板，双腿向前伸直。将滚轮放在双脚之间，用脚趾夹住滚轮。收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，屈膝向胸部卷起，同时将滚轮向身体方向滚动。在动作顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置，滚轮随之远离身体。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your arms extended straight above your head and your legs straight out in front of you.
Place the roller between your feet and grip it with your toes.
Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground and curl your knees towards your chest, rolling the roller towards your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position, rolling the roller away from your body.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双臂向上伸直指向天花板，双腿向前伸直。
将滚轮放在双脚之间，用脚趾夹住滚轮。
收紧腹肌，将双腿抬离地面，屈膝向胸部卷起，同时将滚轮向身体方向滚动。
在动作顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置，滚轮随之远离身体。
按所需次数重复练习。

name.en: roller seated shoulder flexor depresor retractor

instructions.en: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you. Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs. Lean forward slightly and roll the roller away from your body, extending your arms straight in front of you. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the roller back towards your body, bending your arms and bringing the roller back to your thighs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平坦的地面上，双腿向前伸直。双手握住滚轮，掌心向下，将滚轮放在大腿上。身体微微前倾，将滚轮向前推出，手臂向前伸直。停顿片刻，然后慢慢将滚轮拉回身体方向，弯曲手臂，将滚轮放回大腿上。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you.
Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs.
Lean forward slightly and roll the roller away from your body, extending your arms straight in front of you.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the roller back towards your body, bending your arms and bringing the roller back to your thighs.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平坦的地面上，双腿向前伸直。
双手握住滚轮，掌心向下，将滚轮放在大腿上。
身体微微前倾，将滚轮向前推出，手臂向前伸直。
停顿片刻，然后慢慢将滚轮拉回身体方向，弯曲手臂，将滚轮放回大腿上。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: roller seated single leg shoulder flexor depresor retractor
name.zh: 坐姿单腿滚轮肩部复合训练

instructions.en: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you. Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs. Lean back slightly and engage your core muscles. Raise the roller up to shoulder level, keeping your arms straight. Slowly lower the roller back down to your thighs. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平坦的地面上，双腿向前伸直。双手握住滚轮，掌心向下，放在大腿上。略微向后倾斜，收紧核心肌群。将滚轮举至肩部高度，保持手臂伸直。慢慢将滚轮放回大腿上。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you.
Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs.
Lean back slightly and engage your core muscles.
Raise the roller up to shoulder level, keeping your arms straight.
Slowly lower the roller back down to your thighs.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平坦的地面上，双腿向前伸直。
双手握住滚轮，掌心向下，放在大腿上。
略微向后倾斜，收紧核心肌群。
将滚轮举至肩部高度，保持手臂伸直。
慢慢将滚轮放回大腿上。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the roller with both hands in front of your body.
