Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Extend your arms forward and roll the roller down towards your feet, feeling a stretch in your lats. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly roll the roller back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在体前握住滚轮。膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。双臂向前伸展，将滚轮向脚的方向滚压，感受背阔肌的拉伸。保持这个拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢将滚轮滚回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the roller with both hands in front of your body.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Extend your arms forward and roll the roller down towards your feet, feeling a stretch in your lats.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly roll the roller back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手在体前握住滚轮。
膝盖微微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
双臂向前伸展，将滚轮向脚的方向滚压，感受到背阔肌被拉伸。
保持这个拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后缓慢将滚轮滚回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand facing the rope with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grab the rope with both hands, palms facing towards you. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Begin pulling yourself up the rope by alternating hand-over-hand movements. Use your legs to assist in the upward movement. Continue climbing until you reach the desired height or the top of the rope. To descend, reverse the hand-over-hand movement while controlling your descent. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面对绳索站立，双脚与肩同宽。双手握住绳索，掌心朝向身体方向。膝盖稍微弯曲，收紧核心肌群。通过交替的上下手动作开始向上拉起身体，同时用腿部辅助向上移动。继续攀爬直到达到预期高度或绳索顶端。下降时，反向进行手部交替动作并控制下降速度。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand facing the rope with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grab the rope with both hands, palms facing towards you.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Begin pulling yourself up the rope by alternating hand-over-hand movements.
Use your legs to assist in the upward movement.
Continue climbing until you reach the desired height or the top of the rope.
To descend, reverse the hand-over-hand movement while controlling your descent.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面对绳索站立，双脚与肩同宽。
双手握住绳索，掌心朝向身体方向。
膝盖稍微弯曲，收紧核心肌群。
通过交替的上下手动作开始向上拉起身体。
用腿部辅助向上移动。
继续攀爬直到达到预期高度或绳索顶端。
下降时，反向进行手部交替动作，同时控制下降速度。
按要求的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed. Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet. Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance. Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽直立站好，收紧核心肌群，上身保持放松。开始原地慢跑，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，用脚前掌轻轻落地。保持稳定的节奏，按照设定的时间或距离持续慢跑。整个练习过程中注意深呼吸并保持良好的身体姿态。

en: Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed.
Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet.
Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance.
Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽直立站好
收紧核心肌群，上身保持放松
开始原地慢跑，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，用脚前掌轻轻落地
保持稳定的节奏，按照设定的时间或距离持续慢跑
整个练习过程中注意深呼吸并保持良好的身体姿态

instructions.en: Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart. Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed. Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet. Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance. Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，保持身体直立。收紧核心肌群，上身保持放松。开始原地慢跑，膝盖向胸部方向抬起，用脚前掌轻轻落地。保持稳定的节奏，持续进行所需时长或距离的跑步。始终保持深呼吸和良好的姿势。

en: Start by standing upright with your feet hip-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your upper body relaxed.
Begin jogging in place, lifting your knees up towards your chest and landing softly on the balls of your feet.
Maintain a steady pace and continue jogging for the desired duration or distance.
Remember to breathe deeply and maintain good posture throughout the exercise.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，保持身体直立。
收紧核心肌群，上身保持放松。
开始原地慢跑，膝盖向胸部方向抬起，用脚前掌轻轻落地。
保持稳定的节奏，持续进行所需时长或距离的跑步。
始终保持深呼吸和良好的姿势。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted. Bend your right knee and lower your body down, keeping your left leg straight. Place your hands on your right thigh for support. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立。右脚向前迈一步，左脚保持原地不动。弯曲右膝并下蹲，保持左腿伸直。双手放在右大腿上支撑。保持这个拉伸姿势20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复动作。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Bend your right knee and lower your body down, keeping your left leg straight.
Place your hands on your right thigh for support.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立。
右脚向前迈一步，左脚保持原地不动。
弯曲右膝并下蹲，保持左腿伸直。
双手放在右大腿上支撑。
保持这个拉伸姿势20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复动作。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Hold your hands together in front of your chest or hold a weight if desired. Lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your sit bones. Twist your torso to the right, bringing your hands or weight towards the right side of your body. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing your hands or weight towards the left side of your body. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。保持背部挺直并收紧核心，身体微微后倾。双手在胸前合十，如有需要可手持重物。将双脚抬离地面，以坐骨为支点保持平衡。将躯干向右侧扭转，同时将双手或重物带向身体右侧。稍作停顿后，将躯干向左侧扭转，将双手或重物带向身体左侧。按照所需的重复次数，两侧交替进行。

en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Lean back slightly while keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Hold your hands together in front of your chest or hold a weight if desired.
Lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your sit bones.
Twist your torso to the right, bringing your hands or weight towards the right side of your body.
Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing your hands or weight towards the left side of your body.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
保持背部挺直，收紧核心，身体微微后倾。
双手在胸前合十，如有需要可手持重物。
将双脚抬离地面，以坐骨为支点保持平衡。
将躯干向右侧扭转，同时将双手或重物带向身体右侧。
稍作停顿后，将躯干向左侧扭转，将双手或重物带向身体左侧。
按照所需的重复次数，两侧交替进行。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows and retracting your shoulder blades, as if you are trying to squeeze a pencil between them. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to extend your elbows and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双脚分开与肩同宽，双臂在身前伸展。膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部平直。通过弯曲手肘并后缩肩胛骨来降低身体，仿佛试图在两块肩胛骨之间夹住一支铅笔。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后通过双手向上推，伸直手肘，恢复到起始姿势。按所需次数重复进行。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows and retracting your shoulder blades, as if you are trying to squeeze a pencil between them.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to extend your elbows and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双臂在身前伸展。
膝盖略微弯曲，髋部前倾，保持背部平直。
通过弯曲手肘并后缩肩胛骨来降低身体，仿佛试图在两块肩胛骨之间夹住一支铅笔。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后通过双手向上推，伸直手肘，恢复到起始姿势。
按所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手垂直位于肩膀下方，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。保持手肘贴近身体两侧，将胸部向地面方向下放。在下放过程中，主动夹紧肩胛骨并将胸部向前推出。在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后推回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手垂直位于肩膀下方，身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
保持手肘贴近身体两侧，将胸部向地面方向下放。
在下放过程中，主动夹紧肩胛骨并将胸部向前推出。
在动作最低点稍作停顿，然后推回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended. Retract your shoulder blades by pulling them down and back. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, focusing on squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双手掌心朝外握住单杠，双臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上。收缩肩胛骨，将其向下向后拉动。发力收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉向单杠，注意在动作顶端挤压肩胛骨。到达顶点稍作停顿，然后控制速度缓慢将身体放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Retract your shoulder blades by pulling them down and back.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, focusing on squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手掌心朝外握住单杠，双臂完全伸直悬挂于杠上
收缩肩胛骨，将其向下向后拉动
发力收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉向单杠，注意挤压肩胛骨
到达顶点稍作停顿，然后控制速度缓慢将身体放回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Jump off the ground and simultaneously cross your right leg in front of your left leg. As you land, quickly switch legs, crossing your left leg in front of your right leg. Continue alternating legs and jumping as quickly as possible. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。跳起的同时，将右腿交叉到左腿前方。落地时迅速换腿，将左腿交叉到右腿前方。继续尽可能快速地交替双腿跳跃。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Jump off the ground and simultaneously cross your right leg in front of your left leg.
As you land, quickly switch legs, crossing your left leg in front of your right leg.
Continue alternating legs and jumping as quickly as possible.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
跳起的同时，将右腿交叉到左腿前方。
落地时迅速换腿，将左腿交叉到右腿前方。
继续尽可能快速地交替双腿跳跃。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your feet flat on the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground. Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your calf muscle. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子或凳子边缘，双脚平放在地面上。将一条腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。身体轻轻向前倾，感受小腿肌肉的拉伸。保持20-30秒。换另一条腿重复相同的拉伸动作。

en: Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground.
Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your calf muscle.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Switch legs and repeat the stretch.
zh: 坐在椅子或凳子边缘，双脚平放在地面上。
将一条腿向前伸直，脚跟着地。
身体轻轻向前倾，感受小腿肌肉的拉伸。
保持拉伸20-30秒。
换另一条腿重复相同的拉伸动作。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your right knee and cross your right ankle over your left thigh. Place your right hand on the ground behind you for support. With your left hand, gently press down on your right knee to deepen the stretch. Hold the stretch for 30 seconds to 1 minute. Switch sides and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。弯曲右膝，将右脚踝交叉放在左大腿上。右手放在身后的地上以支撑身体。左手轻轻向下按压右膝，以加深拉伸。保持拉伸30秒到1分钟。换另一侧重复。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Bend your right knee and cross your right ankle over your left thigh.
Place your right hand on the ground behind you for support.
With your left hand, gently press down on your right knee to deepen the stretch.
Hold the stretch for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Switch sides and repeat.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。
弯曲右膝，将右脚踝交叉放在左大腿上。
右手放在身后的地上以支撑身体。
左手轻轻向下按压右膝，以加深拉伸。
保持拉伸30秒到1分钟。
换另一侧重复。

instructions.en: Sit on a flat bench with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground. Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support. Keeping your legs straight, slowly raise them up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在平坦的长凳上，背部保持挺直，双脚平放在地面上。双手放在凳子两侧以保持身体平衡。保持双腿伸直，慢慢将双腿抬起至与地面平行的位置。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Sit on a flat bench with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands on the sides of the bench for support.
Keeping your legs straight, slowly raise them up in front of you until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在平坦的长凳上，背部保持挺直，双脚平放在地面上。
双手放在凳子两侧以保持身体平衡。
保持双腿伸直，慢慢将双腿抬起至与地面平行的位置。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a chair with your feet flat on the ground. Place your hands on your thighs or on the sides of the chair for support. Slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight. Feel the stretch in your lower back and hold for 20-30 seconds. Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子边缘，双脚平放在地面上。将双手放在大腿上或椅子两侧以获得支撑。慢慢地从髋部开始向前倾斜，保持背部挺直。感受下背部的拉伸，保持20-30秒。慢慢回到起始位置，并根据需要的重复次数重复练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands on your thighs or on the sides of the chair for support.
Slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Feel the stretch in your lower back and hold for 20-30 seconds.
Slowly return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在椅子边缘，双脚平放在地面上。
将双手放在大腿上或椅子两侧以获得支撑。
慢慢地从髋部开始向前倾斜，保持背部挺直。
感受下背部的拉伸，保持20-30秒。
慢慢回到起始位置，并根据需要的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your right knee and place your right foot on the outside of your left knee. Place your left elbow on the outside of your right knee and gently twist your torso to the right. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。弯曲右膝，将右脚放在左膝外侧。将左肘放在右膝外侧，然后轻轻向右扭转躯干。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Bend your right knee and place your right foot on the outside of your left knee.
Place your left elbow on the outside of your right knee and gently twist your torso to the right.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。
弯曲右膝，将右脚放在左膝外侧。
将左肘放在右膝外侧，然后轻轻向右扭转躯干。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后换另一侧重复。

instructions.en: Sit on the floor with your back against a wall and your legs extended in front of you. Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and lean to one side, bringing your elbow towards your hip. Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，背部靠墙，双腿向前伸直。屈膝，双脚平放在地面上，与髋同宽。双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，身体向一侧倾斜，将该侧肘部向髋部方向靠拢。保持片刻，然后回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复动作。两侧交替进行至所需次数。

en: Sit on the floor with your back against a wall and your legs extended in front of you.
Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engage your abs and lean to one side, bringing your elbow towards your hip.
Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，背部靠墙，双腿向前伸直。
屈膝，双脚平放在地面上，与髋同宽。
双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，身体向一侧倾斜，将该侧肘部向髋部方向靠拢。
保持片刻，然后回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复动作。
两侧交替进行至所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in a wide angle. Flex your feet and engage your quadriceps. Place your hands on the ground behind you for support. Keeping your back straight, lean forward from your hips. Continue leaning forward until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings. Hold this position for a few breaths. Slowly release the stretch and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿大幅张开呈宽角姿势。勾起脚尖，收紧股四头肌。双手放在身后地面上以支撑身体。保持背部挺直，从髋部开始向前俯身。继续前倾直至感受到腘绳肌的拉伸感。保持这个姿势，自然呼吸数次。慢慢释放拉伸，恢复到起始姿势。根据需要重复以上动作。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in a wide angle.
Flex your feet and engage your quadriceps.
Place your hands on the ground behind you for support.
Keeping your back straight, lean forward from your hips.
Continue leaning forward until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.
Hold this position for a few breaths.
Slowly release the stretch and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿宽幅伸直，呈宽角姿势。
勾起脚尖，收紧股四头肌。
双手放在身后地面上以支撑身体。
保持背部挺直，从髋部向前倾身。
继续前倾直至感觉腘绳肌有拉伸感。
保持此姿势，自然呼吸数次。
慢慢放松拉伸，恢复至起始姿势。
根据所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back on a mat or bench with your legs extended. Place your hands by your sides or under your glutes for support. Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs towards your chest. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在垫子或长凳上，双腿伸直。将双手放在身体两侧或臀部下方以支撑身体。弯曲膝盖并将双脚抬离地面，使大腿向胸部靠拢。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数。

en: Lie flat on your back on a mat or bench with your legs extended.
Place your hands by your sides or under your glutes for support.
Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在垫子或长凳上，双腿伸直。
将双手放在身体两侧或臀部下方以支撑身体。
弯曲膝盖并将双脚抬离地面，使大腿向胸部靠拢。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将腿放回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a leg curl machine with your legs extended and your ankles hooked under the padded lever. Place your hands on the side handles of the machine for support. Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs upward as far as possible. Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings. Slowly lower your legs back to the starting position while inhaling. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下躺在腿弯举器械上，双腿伸直，脚踝勾在垫板杠杆下方。将双手放在器械侧面的手柄上支撑身体。上半身保持静止，呼气的同时将双腿尽可能向上弯曲。当挤压腘绳肌时，保持收缩姿势短暂停顿。吸气的同时慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie face down on a leg curl machine with your legs extended and your ankles hooked under the padded lever.
Place your hands on the side handles of the machine for support.
Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs upward as far as possible.
Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Slowly lower your legs back to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下躺在腿弯举器械上，双腿伸直，脚踝勾在垫板杠杆下方。
将双手放在器械侧面的手柄上支撑身体。
上半身保持静止，呼气的同时将双腿尽可能向上弯曲。
挤压腘绳肌时，保持收缩姿势短暂停顿。
吸气的同时慢慢将双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: self assisted inverse leg curl (on floor)
name.zh: 自助式反向腿弯举（地面）

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart. Lift your hips off the ground, engaging your glutes and hamstrings. Slowly curl your legs towards your glutes, keeping your hips lifted. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position. Lower your hips back down to the ground. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂放在身体两侧。屈膝，双脚平放在地面上，与髋同宽。臀部发力将髋部抬离地面，同时收紧臀肌和腘绳肌。保持髋部抬起的姿势，缓慢将双腿向臀部方向弯举。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿伸展回起始位置。将髋部放回地面。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Lift your hips off the ground, engaging your glutes and hamstrings.
Slowly curl your legs towards your glutes, keeping your hips lifted.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Lower your hips back down to the ground.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂放在身体两侧。
屈膝，双脚平放在地面上，与髋同宽。
臀部发力将髋部抬离地面，同时收紧臀肌和腘绳肌。
保持髋部抬起的姿势，缓慢将双腿向臀部方向弯举。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿伸展回起始位置。
将髋部放回地面。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position. Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees while swinging your arms for momentum. Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。弯曲膝盖，下蹲至半蹲姿势。然后爆发式向上跳起，髋关节和膝关节同时伸展，手臂向后摆动以获得向上的惯性。落地时前脚掌先着地，缓冲后立即进入下一次重复动作。按照所需次数重复完成。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees while swinging your arms for momentum.
Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next repetition.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
弯曲膝盖，下蹲至半蹲姿势。
爆发式向上跳起，髋关节和膝关节同时伸展，手臂向后摆动以获得向上的惯性。
落地时前脚掌先着地，缓冲后立即进入下一次重复动作。
按照所需次数重复完成。

instructions.en: Find an open space or a treadmill to perform the exercise. Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart. Start jogging in place, lifting your knees high and pumping your arms. After a few seconds, start taking short strides forward, maintaining a quick pace. Continue running with short strides for the desired duration or distance.
instructions.zh: 找一个空旷的场地或跑步机进行这项练习。保持直立站姿，双脚与髋同宽。先开始原地慢跑，抬膝要高，手臂摆动有力。几秒后，开始向前迈小步前进，保持较快的速度。按照所需的时间或距离继续以小步幅跑步。

en: Find an open space or a treadmill to perform the exercise.
Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart.
Start jogging in place, lifting your knees high and pumping your arms.
After a few seconds, start taking short strides forward, maintaining a quick pace.
Continue running with short strides for the desired duration or distance.
zh: 找一个空旷的场地或跑步机进行这项练习。
保持直立站姿，双脚与髋同宽。
先开始原地慢跑，抬膝要高，手臂摆动有力。
几秒后，开始向前迈小步前进，保持较快的速度。
按照所需的时间或距离继续以小步幅跑步。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with a shoulder-width grip, palms facing away from you. Hang freely with your arms fully extended. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手正握单杠，握距与肩同宽，手掌朝外。身体自然悬垂，双臂完全伸直。收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，直至下巴超过单杠高度。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体下放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with a shoulder-width grip, palms facing away from you.
Hang freely with your arms fully extended.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握单杠，握距与肩同宽，手掌朝外
身体自然悬垂，双臂完全伸直
收紧背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起，直至下巴超过单杠高度
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体下放回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line. Engage your core and lift your right hand off the ground, reaching across to tap your left shoulder. Place your right hand back on the ground and repeat with your left hand tapping your right shoulder. Continue alternating shoulder taps while keeping your hips and torso stable. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以高位平板撑姿势开始，双手位于肩膀正下方，身体呈一条直线。收紧核心肌群，将右手抬离地面，伸向左侧触碰肩膀。将右手放回地面，然后换左手触碰右肩膀。在保持臀部和躯干稳定的情况下交替进行触肩动作。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Engage your core and lift your right hand off the ground, reaching across to tap your left shoulder.
Place your right hand back on the ground and repeat with your left hand tapping your right shoulder.
Continue alternating shoulder taps while keeping your hips and torso stable.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板撑姿势开始，双手位于肩膀正下方，身体呈一条直线。
收紧核心肌群，将右手抬离地面，伸向左侧触碰肩膀。
将右手放回地面，然后换左手触碰右肩膀。
在保持臀部和躯干稳定的情况下交替进行触肩动作。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels. Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. As you push back up, lift your right hand off the ground and tap your left shoulder. Return your right hand to the ground and repeat the push-up, this time lifting your left hand and tapping your right shoulder. Continue alternating shoulder taps with each push-up repetition. Maintain a stable core and avoid excessive hip rotation throughout the exercise. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为高位平板支撑，双手比肩略宽，身体从头到脚跟呈一条直线。屈肘将身体下降靠近地面，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。向上推起时，将右手抬离地面并轻触左肩。将右手放回地面后重复俯卧撑动作，这次抬起左手轻触右肩。在每次俯卧撑过程中交替进行触肩动作。保持核心稳定，避免髋部过度扭转。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
As you push back up, lift your right hand off the ground and tap your left shoulder.
Return your right hand to the ground and repeat the push-up, this time lifting your left hand and tapping your right shoulder.
Continue alternating shoulder taps with each push-up repetition.
Maintain a stable core and avoid excessive hip rotation throughout the exercise.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩略宽，身体从头到脚跟保持一条直线。
屈肘将身体向地面下降，保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
向上推起时，将右手抬离地面并轻触左肩。
将右手放回地面后进行俯卧撑，这次抬起左手轻触右肩。
在每次俯卧撑过程中交替进行触肩动作。
保持核心稳定，避免整个动作过程中髋部过度扭转。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. While keeping your core engaged, lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips. Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your leg back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 侧卧在地面上，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。以下侧前臂支撑身体，保持肘部位于肩部正下方。收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使身体从头到脚呈一条直线。保持核心收紧的同时，将上方腿尽可能高地向上抬起，注意避免髋部发生旋转。在最高点稍作停留，然后慢慢将腿放下。重复完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder.
Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
While keeping your core engaged, lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips.
Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your leg back down.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 侧卧在地面上，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。
以下侧前臂支撑身体，保持肘部位于肩部正下方。
收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
保持核心收紧的同时，将上方腿尽可能高地向上抬起，注意避免髋部发生旋转。
在最高点稍作停留，然后慢慢将腿放下。
重复完成所需次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. Hold this position for the desired amount of time. Lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿伸直并叠放。将前臂置于肩部正下方的地面上，手肘弯曲成90度角。收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使身体从头到脚呈一条直线。保持该姿势至规定时间，然后缓慢将髋部落回起始位置。换另一侧重复练习。

en: Lie on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, with your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 侧卧，双腿伸直叠放在一起。
将前臂置于肩部正下方的地面上，手肘弯曲成90度角。
收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
保持该姿势至规定时间。
缓慢将髋部落回起始位置。
换另一侧重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand between two parallel bars with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place your hands on the bars and lift your body off the ground, supporting your weight on your arms. Engage your abs and slowly lift your legs to the side, keeping them straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手撑住双杠，身体悬空，双脚与肩同宽悬于空中。收紧核心肌群，保持双腿伸直，慢慢将双腿向身体侧方抬起。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand between two parallel bars with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Place your hands on the bars and lift your body off the ground, supporting your weight on your arms.
Engage your abs and slowly lift your legs to the side, keeping them straight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手撑住双杠，身体悬空，双脚与肩同宽悬于空中
收紧核心肌群，保持双腿伸直，慢慢将双腿向身体侧方抬起
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置
按照所需次数重复练习

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips. Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg out to the side, keeping it straight. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手叉腰站立。将重心移至一条腿上，同时将另一条腿向侧方抬起，保持腿部伸直。在最高点稍作停留，然后慢慢将腿放下还原至起始位置。换另一侧重复动作，两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg out to the side, keeping it straight.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手叉腰站立。
将重心移至一条腿上，同时将另一条腿向侧方抬起，保持腿部伸直。
在最高点稍作停留，然后慢慢将腿放下还原至起始位置。
换另一侧重复动作。
两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and your bottom arm extended straight overhead. Bend your top knee and place your foot on the ground in front of your bottom leg. Reach your top arm over your head and grab onto something stable, like a wall or a piece of furniture. Slowly lift your bottom leg off the ground, keeping it straight, until you feel a stretch in your side. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 身体侧卧于地面，双腿保持伸直，靠近地面的手臂向上伸直举过头顶。弯曲上侧的膝盖，将脚放置在下侧腿前方的地面上。上侧手臂向上伸展，抓住一个稳定的物体，如墙壁或家具。慢慢抬起下侧腿部离开地面，保持腿部伸直，直到身体侧面有明显的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后慢慢放下腿部。换另一侧重复相同的动作。

en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and your bottom arm extended straight overhead.
Bend your top knee and place your foot on the ground in front of your bottom leg.
Reach your top arm over your head and grab onto something stable, like a wall or a piece of furniture.
Slowly lift your bottom leg off the ground, keeping it straight, until you feel a stretch in your side.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then slowly lower your leg back down.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 身体侧卧于地面，双腿伸直，靠近地面的手臂向上伸直举过头顶。
弯曲上侧的膝盖，将脚放置在下侧腿前方的地面上。
上侧手臂向上伸展，抓住一个稳定的物体，如墙壁或家具。
慢慢抬起下侧腿部离开地面，保持腿部伸直，直到身体侧面有明显的拉伸感。
保持拉伸20-30秒，然后慢慢放下腿部。
换另一侧重复相同的动作。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other. Place your bottom arm under your head for support. Engage your adductors and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿伸直并上下叠放。将下方的手臂垫在头下作为支撑。收紧内收肌群，将上方腿尽可能高地抬起，同时保持髋部不旋转、身体不后倾。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将腿放回起始位置。按要求的次数重复后换另一侧进行。

en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Place your bottom arm under your head for support.
Engage your adductors and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿伸直并上下叠放。
将下方的手臂垫在头下作为支撑。
收紧内收肌群，将上方腿尽可能高地抬起，同时保持髋部不旋转、身体不后倾。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将腿放回起始位置。
按要求的次数重复后换另一侧进行。

instructions.en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder. Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet. While maintaining the side plank position, lift your top leg towards the ceiling, keeping it straight. Slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 动作起始于侧卧姿势，双腿并拢伸直。用手肘支撑身体，手肘位于肩膀正下方。收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使身体从头到脚呈一条直线。保持侧平板支撑的姿势，将上方腿向天花板方向抬起，腿部保持伸直。然后慢慢将腿放下回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习后，换到身体另一侧继续训练。

en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder.
Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
While maintaining the side plank position, lift your top leg towards the ceiling, keeping it straight.
Slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 侧卧于地面，双腿并拢伸直堆叠在一起。
用手肘支撑身体，手肘位于肩膀正下方。
收紧核心肌群，将髋部抬离地面，使身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
保持侧平板支撑姿势，将上方腿向天花板方向抬起，腿部保持伸直。
慢慢将腿放下回到起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换到身体另一侧继续练习。

instructions.en: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed. Tilt your head to the right, bringing your right ear towards your right shoulder. Place your right hand on the left side of your head and gently apply pressure to increase the stretch. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Repeat on the other side, tilting your head to the left and applying pressure with your left hand. Repeat the stretch 2-3 times on each side.
instructions.zh: 身体直立或坐姿保持脊柱中立，双肩自然放松。将头部向右侧倾斜，使右耳靠近右肩。右手轻轻放在头部左侧，适当施加向下的压力以加强拉伸效果。保持该拉伸姿势15-30秒。换另一侧重复动作，将头部向左侧倾斜，左手放在头部右侧施加压力。每侧重复拉伸2-3次。

en: Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed.
Tilt your head to the right, bringing your right ear towards your right shoulder.
Place your right hand on the left side of your head and gently apply pressure to increase the stretch.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Repeat on the other side, tilting your head to the left and applying pressure with your left hand.
Repeat the stretch 2-3 times on each side.
zh: 身体直立或坐姿保持脊柱中立，双肩自然放松。
将头部向右侧倾斜，使右耳靠近右肩。
右手轻轻放在头部左侧，适当施加向下的压力以加强拉伸效果。
保持该拉伸姿势15-30秒。
换另一侧重复动作，将头部向左侧倾斜，左手放在头部右侧施加压力。
每侧重复拉伸2-3次。

instructions.en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other. Place your bottom hand on the ground directly under your shoulder, fingers pointing forward. Press through your bottom hand to lift your body off the ground, keeping your legs straight and your core engaged. Extend your top arm straight up towards the ceiling, creating a straight line from your head to your heels. Lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 首先侧卧，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。将下方手掌放在肩膀正下方的地面上，手指指向前方。通过下方手掌发力将身体抬离地面，保持双腿伸直、核心收紧。上方手臂向上伸直指向天花板，使身体从头到脚形成一条直线。然后控制地将身体降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧进行练习。

en: Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Place your bottom hand on the ground directly under your shoulder, fingers pointing forward.
Press through your bottom hand to lift your body off the ground, keeping your legs straight and your core engaged.
Extend your top arm straight up towards the ceiling, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 首先侧卧，双腿伸直并叠放在一起。
将下方手掌放在肩膀正下方的地面上，手指指向前方。
通过下方手掌发力将身体抬离地面，保持双腿伸直、核心收紧。
上方手臂向上伸直指向天花板，使身体从头到脚形成一条直线。
然后控制地将身体降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you. Extend your right arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with your palm facing down. With your left hand, grab your right hand and gently pull it towards your body, feeling a stretch in your right forearm. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release. Repeat on the other side.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向前伸直。将右臂向侧方伸展，平行于地面，掌心向下。左手握住右手，轻轻向身体方向拉动，感受右前臂的拉伸感。保持拉伸15-30秒，然后放松。换另一侧重复动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you.
Extend your right arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with your palm facing down.
With your left hand, grab your right hand and gently pull it towards your body, feeling a stretch in your right forearm.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Repeat on the other side.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向前伸直。
将右臂向侧方伸展，平行于地面，掌心向下。
左手握住右手，轻轻向身体方向拉动，感受右前臂的拉伸感。
保持拉伸15-30秒，然后放松。
换另一侧重复动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed. Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight. Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。双手正握引体向上杆，握距略宽于肩。手臂完全伸直悬挂于单杠上，身体保持放松。通过弯曲手肘将身体向上拉起，使下巴靠近单杠，同时保持身体挺直。当下巴过杆后，慢慢将身体放下恢复至起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight.
Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。
双手正握引体向上杆，握距略宽于肩。
手臂完全伸直悬挂于单杠上，身体保持放松。
通过弯曲手肘将身体向上拉起，使下巴靠近单杠，同时保持身体挺直。
当下巴过杆后，慢慢将身体放下恢复至起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides. Bend at the waist to the right, reaching your right hand towards your right foot while keeping your left hand extended to the side. Return to the starting position and then bend at the waist to the left, reaching your left hand towards your left foot while keeping your right hand extended to the side. Repeat the side-to-side bending motion for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向身体两侧伸直。身体向右侧屈，同时用右手去触碰右脚，左臂保持向侧伸展。回到起始姿势，然后身体向左侧屈，用左手去触碰左脚，右臂保持向侧伸展。重复左右侧屈的动作，完成所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended to the sides.
Bend at the waist to the right, reaching your right hand towards your right foot while keeping your left hand extended to the side.
Return to the starting position and then bend at the waist to the left, reaching your left hand towards your left foot while keeping your right hand extended to the side.
Repeat the side-to-side bending motion for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向身体两侧伸直。
身体向右侧屈，右手去触碰右脚，左臂保持向侧伸展。
回到起始姿势，然后身体向左侧屈，左手去触碰左脚，右臂保持向侧伸展。
重复左右侧屈的动作，完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and one hand placed slightly wider than the other. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight. As you lower yourself, shift your weight to one side and lift the opposite arm off the ground, extending it straight out to the side. Push through your chest and triceps to raise your body back up to the starting position, while simultaneously lowering your extended arm back to the ground. Repeat the movement, alternating the arm you extend with each repetition.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑，双手与肩同宽，其中一只手略宽于另一只。收紧核心，屈肘将身体下压，同时保持背部挺直。下压过程中，将重心移向一侧，将另一侧手臂抬离地面，向侧方伸直。通过胸肌和肱三头肌发力将身体推回起始位置，同时将伸出的手臂放回地面。换另一只手臂伸出，重复以上动作。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and one hand placed slightly wider than the other.
Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight.
As you lower yourself, shift your weight to one side and lift the opposite arm off the ground, extending it straight out to the side.
Push through your chest and triceps to raise your body back up to the starting position, while simultaneously lowering your extended arm back to the ground.
Repeat the movement, alternating the arm you extend with each repetition.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势起始，双手与肩同宽，其中一只手略宽于另一只。
收紧核心，屈肘将身体下压，同时保持背部挺直。
下压过程中，将重心移向一侧，将另一侧手臂抬离地面，向侧方伸直。
通过胸肌和肱三头肌发力将身体推回起始位置，同时将伸出的手臂放回地面。
换另一只手臂伸出，重复以上动作。

name.en: single leg bridge with outstretched leg

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Extend one leg straight out in front of you. Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。将一条腿向前伸直。收紧臀肌，将髋部向上抬起，使膝盖到肩膀呈一条直线。保持片刻，然后慢慢将髋部回落至起始位置。完成所需次数后，换腿进行。

en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Extend one leg straight out in front of you.
Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 仰卧在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。
将一条腿向前伸直。
收紧臀肌，将髋部向上抬起，使膝盖到肩膀呈一条直线。
保持片刻，然后慢慢将髋部回落至起始位置。
完成所需次数后，换腿进行。

name.en: single leg calf raise (on a dumbbell)

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot. Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，单手握住一个哑铃。将一只脚抬离地面，用另一只脚保持身体平衡。慢慢用小腿肌肉将脚跟尽可能抬高。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下。重复所需的次数，然后换另一条腿进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Lift one foot off the ground and balance on the other foot.
Slowly raise your heel as high as possible, using your calf muscles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other leg.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立，单手握住哑铃。
将一只脚抬离地面，用另一只脚保持平衡。
慢慢用小腿肌肉将脚跟尽可能抬高。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放下。
重复所需的次数，然后换另一条腿进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with one foot on a platform or slide board. Bend your knee slightly and slide the foot on the platform backward, extending your leg. Keep your core engaged and maintain a straight posture throughout the movement. Slowly return to the starting position by sliding your foot back to the initial position. Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为单脚站在平台或滑板上。略微屈膝，将平台上的脚向后滑动，同时伸展腿部。保持核心肌群收紧，整个动作过程中维持直立姿势。缓慢地将脚滑回初始位置，恢复起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数完成动作，然后换腿进行练习。

en: Start by standing with one foot on a platform or slide board.
Bend your knee slightly and slide the foot on the platform backward, extending your leg.
Keep your core engaged and maintain a straight posture throughout the movement.
Slowly return to the starting position by sliding your foot back to the initial position.
Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 单脚站立于平台或滑板上
微微屈膝，将平台上的脚向后滑动并伸展腿部
保持核心肌群收紧，整个动作过程中维持直立姿势
缓慢将脚滑回初始位置
按所需重复次数完成后换腿

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended in front of you. Lift your right foot off the ground and extend it forward. Slowly lower your body down by bending your left knee and pushing your hips back. Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower yourself down. Lower until your left thigh is parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂在身前伸直。将右脚抬离地面并向前伸直。通过弯曲左膝并将臀部向后推来缓慢下降身体。下降时保持胸部挺起，背部挺直。下蹲至左大腿与地面平行，或在舒适的范围内尽可能降低。在底部停顿片刻，然后通过左脚跟发力返回起始位置。重复所需的次数，然后换腿进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended in front of you.
Lift your right foot off the ground and extend it forward.
Slowly lower your body down by bending your left knee and pushing your hips back.
Keep your chest up and your back straight as you lower yourself down.
Lower until your left thigh is parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂在身前伸直
将右脚抬离地面并向前伸直
通过弯曲左膝并将臀部向后推来缓慢下降身体
下降时保持胸部挺起，背部挺直
下蹲至左大腿与地面平行，或在舒适的范围内尽可能降低
在底部停顿片刻，然后通过左脚跟发力返回起始位置
重复所需的次数，然后换腿进行

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward. Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed. Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。如需要保持平衡，可握住一个稳定的物体。缓慢屈膝并向后倾斜身体，同时保持躯干直立，以此降低身体。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或达到舒适的范围。稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始姿势。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
如需要保持平衡，可握住一个稳定的物体。
缓慢屈膝并向后倾斜身体，同时保持躯干直立，以此降低身体。
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或达到舒适的范围。
稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始姿势。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。双手放在头后，手肘外展。收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面成45度角。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。
双手放在头后，手肘外展。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将上半身抬离地面，向前卷腹直到躯干与地面成45度角。
在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Cross your arms over your chest. Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。双手交叉放在胸前。收缩腹肌，将上半身抬起向膝盖方向靠拢。在顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Cross your arms over your chest.
Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧平躺在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
双手交叉放在胸前。
收紧腹肌，将上半身从地面抬起，向膝盖方向靠拢。
在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and jump to the right, landing on your right foot. As you land, swing your left leg behind your right leg and tap the ground with your left toes. Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot. As you land, swing your right leg behind your left leg and tap the ground with your right toes. Continue alternating sides, jumping and tapping the ground with each leg. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。向右侧跳起，落在右脚上。落地时，将左腿摆动到右腿后方，用左脚脚尖轻触地面。紧接着向左跳起，落在左脚上。落地时，将右腿摆动到左腿后方，用右脚脚尖轻触地面。保持左右交替跳跃，两腿轮流轻触地面。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and jump to the right, landing on your right foot.
As you land, swing your left leg behind your right leg and tap the ground with your left toes.
Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot.
As you land, swing your right leg behind your left leg and tap the ground with your right toes.
Continue alternating sides, jumping and tapping the ground with each leg.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立
膝盖微微弯曲，向右侧跳起，落在右脚上
落地时将左腿摆动到右腿后方，用左脚脚尖轻触地面
紧接着向左跳起，落在左脚上
落地时将右腿摆动到左腿后方，用右脚脚尖轻触地面
保持左右交替跳跃，两腿轮流轻触地面
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down. Sit up straight with your feet flat on the footrests. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Engage your triceps and push the handles down towards your thighs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度和脚蹬至舒适位置。双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，手掌向下。保持坐姿挺直，双脚平放在脚蹬上。将双臂向前伸直，肘部略微弯曲。收缩肱三头肌发力，将手柄向下推至大腿方向。在最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢返回起始位置。按照所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Sit up straight with your feet flat on the footrests.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Engage your triceps and push the handles down towards your thighs.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度和脚蹬至舒适位置。
双手握住手柄，采用正握方式，手掌向下。
保持坐姿挺直，双脚平放在脚蹬上。
将双臂向前伸直，肘部略微弯曲。
收缩肱三头肌发力，将手柄向下推至大腿方向。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后缓慢返回起始位置。
按照所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and keep your back straight. Jump to the right, landing on your right foot while swinging your left leg behind your right leg. Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot while swinging your right leg behind your left leg. Continue alternating jumps from side to side, mimicking a skiing motion. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲，保持背部挺直。向右侧跳起，落在右脚上，同时将左腿摆动到右腿后方。随即向左跳起，落在左脚上，同时将右腿摆动到左腿后方。持续左右交替跳跃，模仿滑雪动作。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and keep your back straight.
Jump to the right, landing on your right foot while swinging your left leg behind your right leg.
Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot while swinging your right leg behind your left leg.
Continue alternating jumps from side to side, mimicking a skiing motion.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。
膝盖微微弯曲，保持背部挺直。
向右侧跳起，落在右脚上，同时将左腿摆动到右腿后方。
随即向左跳起，落在左脚上，同时将右腿摆动到左腿后方。
持续左右交替跳跃，模仿滑雪动作。
按所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed. Engage your core and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest. Continue to lift your legs up and over your head, allowing your body to pass through the arms. Once your legs are fully extended over your head, begin to lower them back down towards the starting position. As you lower your legs, allow your body to pass back through the arms until you are hanging with your arms fully extended again. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双手正握单杠，手臂完全伸直，身体自然悬挂放松。收紧核心肌群发力抬起双腿，膝盖向胸部方向靠近。继续将双腿向上抬起并绕过头部，让身体从双臂之间穿过。当双腿完全伸展并处于头部上方时，开始缓慢有控制地将双腿降回起始位置。下降过程中，身体再次从双臂之间穿过，直到恢复手臂完全伸直的悬挂姿势。按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Start by hanging from a bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Engage your core and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Continue to lift your legs up and over your head, allowing your body to pass through the arms.
Once your legs are fully extended over your head, begin to lower them back down towards the starting position.
As you lower your legs, allow your body to pass back through the arms until you are hanging with your arms fully extended again.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为双手正握单杠，手臂完全伸直，身体自然悬挂放松。
收紧核心肌群发力抬起双腿，膝盖向胸部方向靠近。
继续将双腿向上抬起并绕过头部，让身体从双臂之间穿过。
当双腿完全伸展并处于头部上方时，开始缓慢有控制地将双腿降回起始位置。
下降过程中，身体再次从双臂之间穿过，直到恢复手臂完全伸直的悬挂姿势。
按照所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate. Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you. Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position. Repeat with the other leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将腿举机调整至45度角。坐在腿举机上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚放在踏板上。将一只脚放在踏板上，伸直腿部，将踏板推离身体。慢慢弯曲膝盖，将踏板放回起始位置。换另一条腿重复动作。双腿交替进行至所需次数。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate.
Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Repeat with the other leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将腿举机调整至45度角。
坐在腿举机上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚放在踏板上。
将一只脚放在踏板上，伸直腿部，将踏板推离身体。
慢慢弯曲膝盖，将踏板放回起始位置。
换另一条腿重复动作。
双腿交替进行至所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle. Place your feet on the sled platform with your toes pointing forward. Push the sled platform away from you by extending your ankles and calves. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled platform back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整至45度角。双脚踩在平台踏板上，脚尖朝前。通过伸展踝关节和小腿发力，将平台向前推离。在顶端位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将平台放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Place your feet on the sled platform with your toes pointing forward.
Push the sled platform away from you by extending your ankles and calves.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled platform back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整至45度角。
双脚踩在平台踏板上，脚尖朝前。
通过伸展踝关节和小腿发力，将平台向前推离。
在顶端位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将平台放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat and footplate of the sled machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate. Continue pushing until your legs are almost fully extended, but without locking your knees. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the footplate back towards your body by bending your knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整腿举机的座椅和脚踏板至舒适位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上。握住座椅两侧的把手以保持稳定。通过伸直双腿将脚踏板向身体外侧推出，脚后跟始终保持在脚踏板上。继续推压直至双腿几乎完全伸展，但不要完全锁住膝盖。在动作顶点短暂停顿，然后通过弯曲膝盖慢慢将脚踏板向身体方向降低。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat and footplate of the sled machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Continue pushing until your legs are almost fully extended, but without locking your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the footplate back towards your body by bending your knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整腿举机的座椅和脚踏板至舒适位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上。
握住座椅两侧的把手以保持稳定。
通过伸直双腿将脚踏板向身体外侧推出，脚后跟始终保持在脚踏板上。
继续推压直至双腿几乎完全伸展，但不要完全锁住膝盖。
在动作顶点短暂停顿，然后通过弯曲膝盖慢慢将脚踏板向身体方向降低。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 45-degree angle. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position. Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards your body, controlling the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整器械座椅角度，使膝盖弯曲呈45度。坐上器械，背部紧贴靠背，双脚与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上。握住座椅两侧的把手以保持身体稳定。通过伸直双腿将脚踏板向前推出，保持脚跟着地。在腿完全伸直的位置稍作停顿。然后慢慢弯曲膝盖，控制脚踏板缓慢回到起始位置。按所需次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards your body, controlling the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整器械座椅角度，使膝盖弯曲呈45度
坐上器械，背部紧贴靠背，双脚与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上
握住座椅两侧的把手以保持身体稳定
通过伸直双腿将脚踏板向前推出，保持脚跟着地
在腿完全伸直的位置稍作停顿
慢慢弯曲膝盖，控制脚踏板缓慢回到起始位置
按所需次数重复练习

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate. Sit on the sled machine with your back flat against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability. Push against the footplate to extend your legs, straightening them completely. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees to lower the footplate back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整腿举器械的座椅角度，使双脚踩在脚踏板上时膝盖保持90度弯曲。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上。双手握住座椅两侧的把手以保持身体稳定。双脚用力蹬踏脚踏板，将双腿完全伸直。在动作顶端稍作停留，然后屈膝缓缓将脚踏板放回起始位置。按所需次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Sit on the sled machine with your back flat against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Push against the footplate to extend your legs, straightening them completely.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees to lower the footplate back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整腿举器械的座椅，使双脚踩在脚踏板上时膝盖呈90度弯曲。
端坐在器械上，背部平贴靠背，双脚与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上。
双手握住座椅两侧的把手以保持身体稳定。
双脚用力推踏脚踏板，将双腿完全伸展伸直。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后屈膝缓缓将脚踏板放回起始位置。
按设定的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform. Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart. Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将腿推器械调整至45度角。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚踩在踏板上。双脚分开，比肩宽更宽。用力蹬踏板，伸展双腿并伸直膝盖。在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢弯曲膝盖回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform.
Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将腿推器械调整至45度角。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚踩在踏板上。
双脚分开，比肩宽更宽。
用力蹬踏板，伸展双腿并伸直膝盖。
在动作末端稍作停顿，然后缓慢弯曲膝盖回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: sled calf press on leg press

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled. Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the sled, with your toes pointing forward. Release the safety handles and push the sled away from you by extending your knees and ankles. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the sled back down by bending your knees and ankles. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整腿举机的座椅位置，使双脚踩在踏板上时膝盖略微弯曲。将双脚与肩同宽踩在踏板上，脚尖朝前。松开安全手柄，通过伸展膝盖和踝关节将踏板向前推开。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲膝盖和踝关节慢慢将踏板放回原位。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the sled, with your toes pointing forward.
Release the safety handles and push the sled away from you by extending your knees and ankles.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the sled back down by bending your knees and ankles.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整腿举机的座椅位置，使双脚踩在踏板上时膝盖略微弯曲。
将双脚与肩同宽踩在踏板上，脚尖朝前。
松开安全手柄，通过伸展膝盖和踝关节将踏板向前推开。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲膝盖和踝关节慢慢将踏板放回原位。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself with your back against the pad. Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards. Grip the handles on the sides of the machine for stability. Engage your core and slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to extend your legs and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将哈克深蹲机调整到合适的重量，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚与肩同宽踩在踏板上，脚尖略微外展。握住机器两侧的手柄以保持身体稳定。收紧核心，屈膝屈髋缓慢下蹲，保持背部挺直。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力向上蹬伸双腿，恢复到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself with your back against the pad.
Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Grip the handles on the sides of the machine for stability.
Engage your core and slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to extend your legs and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将哈克深蹲机调整到合适的重量，背部紧贴靠垫
双脚与肩同宽踩在踏板上，脚尖略微外展
握住机器两侧的手柄以保持身体稳定
收紧核心，屈膝屈髋缓慢下蹲，保持背部挺直
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力向上蹬伸双腿，恢复到起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off. Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support. Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将雪橇机调整到合适的重量，然后站在机器上，脚尖踩在平台上，脚后跟悬空。双手握住把手或机器两侧以保持支撑。发力收缩小腿肌群，缓慢地将脚后跟尽可能抬高，对抗雪橇机的阻力。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚后跟放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support.
Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将雪橇机调整到合适的重量，站在机器上，脚尖踩在平台边缘，脚后跟悬空。
双手握住把手或机器两侧以保持身体稳定。
收缩小腿肌群，缓慢地将脚后跟尽可能向上抬起，对抗雪橇机的阻力。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚后跟放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable position for your height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards. Hold onto the handles or bars for stability. Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight and chest up. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to raise your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 根据身高调整腿举机至舒适的位置。双脚与肩同宽站在踏板上，脚尖略微外展。握住把手或扶手以保持稳定。通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节来降低身体，同时保持背部挺直、胸部抬起。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或略低于此位置。稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable position for your height.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Hold onto the handles or bars for stability.
Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to raise your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 根据身高调整腿举机至舒适的位置。
双脚与肩同宽站在踏板上，脚尖略微外展。
握住把手或扶手以保持稳定。
通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节来降低身体，同时保持背部挺直、胸部抬起。
继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行或略低于此位置。
稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight. Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the platform. Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the edge of the platform, with your heels hanging off. Push the platform away from you by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent. Continue pushing until your calves are fully contracted. Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the platform back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到舒适的重量。坐在蹬踏机上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚踩在踏板上。将脚趾和脚掌前部放在踏板边缘，脚跟悬空。保持膝盖略微弯曲，通过伸展踝关节将踏板向上推起。继续推动直到小腿充分收缩。保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将踏板放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the platform.
Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the edge of the platform, with your heels hanging off.
Push the platform away from you by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Continue pushing until your calves are fully contracted.
Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the platform back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到舒适的重量。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚踩在踏板上。
将脚趾和脚掌前部放在踏板边缘，脚跟悬空。
保持膝盖略微弯曲，通过伸展踝关节将踏板向上推起。
继续推动直到小腿充分收缩。
保持收缩片刻，然后慢慢将踏板放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight. Lie on your back on the sled machine with your feet on the footplate. Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly angled outwards. Grip the handles of the sled machine for stability. Engage your glutes and core muscles. Push through your heels and extend your legs to lift the sled. Lower the sled back down by bending your knees and hips. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将器械调整到舒适的重量。仰卧在器械上，双脚踩在踏板上。双脚与肩同宽放置，稍微向外展开。握住器械手柄以保持稳定。收紧臀肌和核心肌群。通过脚后跟发力，蹬直双腿将器械抬起。通过弯曲膝盖和髋部将器械放下回到起始位置。按需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Lie on your back on the sled machine with your feet on the footplate.
Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly angled outwards.
Grip the handles of the sled machine for stability.
Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Push through your heels and extend your legs to lift the sled.
Lower the sled back down by bending your knees and hips.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将器械调整到舒适的重量。
仰卧在器械上，双脚踩在踏板上。
双脚与肩同宽放置，稍微向外展开。
握住器械手柄以保持稳定。
收紧臀肌和核心肌群。
通过脚后跟发力，蹬直双腿将器械抬起。
通过弯曲膝盖和髋部将器械放下回到起始位置。
按需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: sled one leg calf press on leg press
name.zh: 单腿小腿推举（腿举器械）

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart. Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off. Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整腿举器械的座椅位置，使双脚放在滑板上时膝盖略微弯曲。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚放在滑板上，间距与肩同宽。将脚尖和脚掌前部置于滑板上，脚跟保持悬空。通过伸展踝关节向前推动滑板，同时保持膝盖略微弯曲。在顶端稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲踝关节缓慢将滑板下放。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart.
Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off.
Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整腿举器械的座椅位置，使双脚放在滑板上时膝盖略微弯曲。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚放在滑板上，间距与肩同宽。
将脚尖和脚掌前部置于滑板上，脚跟保持悬空。
通过伸展踝关节向前推动滑板，同时保持膝盖略微弯曲。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后通过弯曲踝关节缓慢将滑板下放。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the sledge hammer with both hands. Engage your core and keep your back straight. Swing the sledge hammer down towards the ground, using your core and upper body strength. As you swing down, pivot your hips and transfer the force to the hammer. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住大锤。收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。利用核心和上半身力量将大锤向下挥击。在挥击过程中转动髋部，将力量传递到锤头上。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the sledge hammer with both hands.
Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Swing the sledge hammer down towards the ground, using your core and upper body strength.
As you swing down, pivot your hips and transfer the force to the hammer.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住大锤。
收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。
利用核心和上半身力量将大锤向下挥击。
在挥击过程中转动髋部，将力量传递到锤头上。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your arms straight and allow the barbell to hang in front of your thighs. Lift your shoulders straight up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top. Hold for a moment, then lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈。双手握住杠铃，手掌朝下，握距略宽于肩。手臂保持伸直，让杠铃自然垂于大腿前方。将肩膀垂直向上提，接近耳部位置，充分收缩斜方肌。保持顶峰收缩片刻，然后缓缓放下肩膀回到起始位置。按照目标次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your arms straight and allow the barbell to hang in front of your thighs.
Lift your shoulders straight up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top.
Hold for a moment, then lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微屈
双手握住杠铃，手掌朝下，握距略宽于肩
手臂保持伸直，让杠铃自然垂于大腿前方
将肩膀垂直向上提至耳部位置，充分收缩斜方肌
在顶峰位置保持片刻，然后缓缓放下肩膀回到起始位置
按照目标次数重复练习

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance. Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward. Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整史密斯机的座椅高度，使杠铃与肩部平齐。双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。将杠铃从架子上提起并后撤一步，保持稳定的站姿。将杠铃下放至颈后，同时保持肘部指向前方。将杠铃向上推举至头顶，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward.
Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整史密斯机的座椅高度，使杠铃与肩部平齐。
双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。
将杠铃从架子上提起并后撤一步，保持稳定的站姿。
将杠铃下放至颈后，同时保持肘部指向前方。
将杠铃向上推举至头顶，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level. Lie flat on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground. Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the bar touches your chest. Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整至胸部水平位置。平躺在卧推凳上，双脚稳稳踏在地面。双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。从架子上取下杠铃，将其下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Lie flat on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the bar and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment when the bar touches your chest.
Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整至胸部水平位置。
平躺在卧推凳上，双脚稳稳踏在地面。
双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。
从架子上取下杠铃，将其下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。
当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿。
将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings. Engage your glutes and hamstrings to raise your torso back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。将杠铃置于上背部，落在斜方肌上。膝盖微屈，髋部铰链前倾，保持背部挺直。将躯干前倾至与地面平行的位置，感受腘绳肌的拉伸。然后收紧臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将躯干抬回起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Engage your glutes and hamstrings to raise your torso back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。
将杠铃置于上背部，落在斜方肌上。
膝盖微屈，髋部铰链前倾，保持背部挺直。
将躯干前倾至与地面平行的位置，感受腘绳肌的拉伸。
收紧臀肌和腘绳肌发力，将躯干抬回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height. Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整至髋部高度。面向杠铃站立，双脚与肩同宽。微微弯曲膝盖，以髋关节为轴心向前俯身，保持背部挺直。双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，手距比肩稍宽。将杠铃向胸部下方拉动，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整至髋部高度
面向杠铃站立，双脚与肩同宽
微微弯曲膝盖，以髋关节为轴心向前俯身，保持背部挺直
双手采用正握方式握住杠铃，手距比肩稍宽
将杠铃向胸部下方拉动，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨
在动作顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置
根据所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to a comfortable position. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整到舒适的位置。双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。将杠铃横放在上背部，杠铃靠在斜方肌上。收紧核心，保持胸部挺起，缓慢屈膝屈髋降低身体。持续下降至大腿与地面平行，或降至个人可舒适完成的最低点。短暂停顿后，通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to a comfortable position.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整到舒适的位置。
双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。
将杠铃横放在上背部，杠铃靠在斜方肌上。
收紧核心，保持胸部挺起，缓慢屈膝屈髋降低身体。
持续下降至大腿与地面平行，或降至个人可舒适完成的最低点。
短暂停顿后，通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。
