instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，仰卧在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面上。双手以窄握距握住杠铃，握距比肩宽略窄。将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。在最低点稍作停顿，然后用力将杠铃推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先调整座椅高度，仰卧在卧推凳上，双脚平放在地面上。
双手以窄握距握住杠铃，握距比肩宽略窄。
将杠铃下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Bend at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight and chest up, and grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and lift the bar by extending your hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body. Stand up straight, fully extending your hips and knees. Lower the bar back down by bending at the hips and knees, maintaining control and keeping your back straight. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整至髋部高度。双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。屈髋屈膝，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，以略宽于肩的正握方式握杠。收紧核心肌群，通过伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃拉起，保持杠铃贴近身体。直立站定，髋关节和膝关节完全伸展。然后通过屈髋屈膝控制性地将杠铃下放至起始位置，保持背部挺直。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Bend at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight and chest up, and grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and lift the bar by extending your hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body.
Stand up straight, fully extending your hips and knees.
Lower the bar back down by bending at the hips and knees, maintaining control and keeping your back straight.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整至髋部高度。
双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。
屈髋屈膝，保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，以略宽于肩的正握方式握杠。
收紧核心肌群，通过伸展髋关节和膝关节将杠铃拉起，保持杠铃贴近身体。
直立站定，髋关节和膝关节完全伸展。
通过屈髋屈膝控制性地将杠铃下放至起始位置，保持背部挺直。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将下斜凳调整至所需角度。仰卧于凳上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。采用比肩宽略宽的正握握住杠铃。卸下杠铃后，缓慢将其下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将下斜凳调整至所需角度
仰卧于凳上，双脚固定在脚垫下方
采用比肩宽略宽的正握握住杠铃
卸下杠铃后缓慢将其下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回至起始位置
按照所需的重复次数重复进行

name.zh: 史密斯机下斜反握推举

instructions.en: Adjust the smith machine to a decline position. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机调整到下斜位置，仰卧在凳子上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。反握杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩宽。卸下杠铃并将其下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。在底部位置停顿片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机调整到下斜位置。
仰卧在凳子上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。
反握杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩宽。
卸下杠铃并将其下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。
在底部位置停顿片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 史密斯机颈前深蹲（力量举握法）

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height. Stand facing the barbell with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back and position the barbell on your front shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and deltoids. Keep your chest up, back straight, and core engaged. Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在肩部高度。双脚与肩同宽站立，面对杠铃。采用略宽于肩部的正握方式握住杠铃。后退一步，将杠铃放置在前肩部，支撑在锁骨和三角肌上。保持胸部挺直、背部直立、核心收紧。通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节降低身体重量，仿佛向后坐到椅子上。继续下降直到大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置。稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Stand facing the barbell with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step back and position the barbell on your front shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and deltoids.
Keep your chest up, back straight, and core engaged.
Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在肩部高度
双脚与肩同宽站立，面对杠铃
采用略宽于肩部的正握方式握住杠铃
后退一步，将杠铃放置在前肩部，支撑在锁骨和三角肌上
保持胸部挺直、背部直立、核心收紧
通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节降低身体重量，仿佛向后坐到椅子上
继续下降直到大腿与地面平行或略低于平行位置
稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数重复进行

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps. Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance. Keeping your chest up and core engaged, initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as your flexibility allows. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在肩部高度。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。站在杠铃下方，将杠铃置于上背部，搭在斜方肌上。双手比肩略宽握住杠铃。将杠铃从架上取下，后退一步，保持稳定的站姿。挺胸，收紧核心，通过臀部后移和膝盖弯曲开始下蹲。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在柔韧性允许的范围内尽可能降低。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps.
Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Keeping your chest up and core engaged, initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as your flexibility allows.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在肩部高度。
双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外旋。
站在杠铃下方，将杠铃置于上背部，搭在斜方肌上。
双手比肩略宽握住杠铃。
将杠铃从架上取下，后退一步，保持稳定的站姿。
挺胸，收紧核心，通过臀部后移和膝盖弯曲开始下蹲。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在柔韧性允许的范围内尽可能降低。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力返回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards. Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell. Take a step back and position your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees and lower your body down, keeping your chest up and back straight. Continue descending until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃调整到史密斯机上适合你身高的位置。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。身体置于杠铃下方，将杠铃放置在上斜方肌和肩部位置。双手采用正握，握距略宽于肩宽。收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，将杠铃从器械架上取下。向后退一步，双脚略宽于肩站立。屈膝下蹲，保持胸部挺起、背部平直。继续下降直到大腿与地面平行或略低。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell.
Take a step back and position your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees and lower your body down, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Continue descending until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃调整到史密斯机上适合你身高的位置。
双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
身体置于杠铃下方，将杠铃放置在上斜方肌和肩部位置。
双手采用正握，握距略宽于肩宽。
收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，将杠铃从器械架上取下。
向后退一步，双脚略宽于肩站立。
屈膝下蹲，保持胸部挺起、背部平直。
继续下降直到大腿与地面平行或略低。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart. Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground. Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 在史密斯机上调整好姿势，背部紧贴垫子，双脚与肩同宽站立。双手握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。收紧核心肌群和臀肌，然后通过脚跟发力将髋部抬离地面。继续提升髋部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀呈一条直线。在顶峰位置保持片刻，然后缓慢将髋部降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground.
Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 在史密斯机上调整好姿势，背部紧贴垫子，双脚与肩同宽站立。
双手握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
收紧核心肌群和臀肌，然后通过脚跟发力将髋部抬离地面。
继续提升髋部，直到身体从膝盖到肩膀呈一条直线。
在顶峰位置保持片刻，然后缓慢将髋部降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline. Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将训练凳调整至30-45度倾斜角度。坐于凳上，背部平贴靠垫，双脚踏实地面。掌心向下握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。从器械上取下杠铃，手肘微收，缓慢下放至胸部上方。到达底部后稍作停顿，然后向上推举至手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将训练凳调整至30-45度倾斜角度。
坐于凳上，背部平贴靠垫，双脚踏实地面。
掌心向下握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩。
从器械上取下杠铃，手肘微收，缓慢下放至胸部上方。
到达底部后稍作停顿，然后向上推举至手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 史密斯机斜板反握卧推

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest. Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的座椅调整到舒适的上斜角度。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面上。双手采用反握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。将杠铃从架子上取下，缓慢向下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部内收。当杠铃降至胸部上方时稍作停顿。然后将杠铃向上推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle.
Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest.
Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的座椅调整到舒适的上斜角度。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放在地面上。
双手采用反握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。
将杠铃从架子上取下，缓慢向下放至胸部位置，同时保持肘部内收。
当杠铃降至胸部上方时稍作停顿。
然后将杠铃向上推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 史密斯机斜板前锯肌训练

instructions.en: Adjust the smith machine to an incline position. Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Raise the barbell up towards the ceiling, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机调整至倾斜位置。面对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。通过肘部引导，将杠铃向天花板方向举起。在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Adjust the smith machine to an incline position.
Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Raise the barbell up towards the ceiling, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机调整至倾斜位置
面对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽
采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧
通过肘部引导将杠铃举起
在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢下放杠铃回起始位置
按照所需次数重复练习

instructions.en: Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position. Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate. Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability. Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest. Pause for a moment at the fully extended position. Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先将史密斯机的座椅和脚踏板调整到舒适的位置。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚分开与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上。握住器械两侧的手柄以保持身体稳定。然后通过伸直双腿将脚踏板向前推，同时保持背部始终靠在靠背上。在双腿完全伸直的位置稍作停顿。接着缓慢弯曲膝盖，将脚踏板向回拉，恢复到起始位置。按要求的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position.
Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest.
Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的座椅和脚踏板调整到舒适的位置。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠背，双脚分开与肩同宽踩在脚踏板上。
握住器械两侧的手柄以保持身体稳定。
通过伸直双腿将脚踏板向前推，同时保持背部靠在靠背上。
在双腿完全伸直的位置稍作停顿。
缓慢弯曲膝盖，将脚踏板向回拉，恢复到起始位置。
按要求的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at a height that allows you to comfortably rest it on your upper back. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned outwards. Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting it on your traps. Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the bar by straightening your legs and stepping back from the rack. Take a deep breath and brace your core. Initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement. Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在适合的高度，使其能够舒适地放在上背部。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微向外。站在杠铃下方，将杠铃横放在上背部，位于斜方肌上。双手比肩稍宽握住杠铃。通过伸直双腿并向后迈步将杠铃从架子上卸下。深吸一口气并收紧核心。通过臀部向后推并弯曲膝盖来启动深蹲。下蹲直到大腿与地面平行或略低。在整个动作过程中保持胸部挺起和背部挺直。通过脚跟发力站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。按所需的重复次数重复。

en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at a height that allows you to comfortably rest it on your upper back.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned outwards.
Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the bar by straightening your legs and stepping back from the rack.
Take a deep breath and brace your core.
Initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在适合的高度，使其能够舒适地放在上背部。
双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微向外。
站在杠铃下方，将杠铃横放在上背部，位于斜方肌上。
双手比肩稍宽握住杠铃。
通过伸直双腿并向后迈步将杠铃从架子上卸下。
深吸一口气并收紧核心。
通过臀部向后推并弯曲膝盖来启动深蹲。
下蹲直到大腿与地面平行或略低。
在整个动作过程中保持胸部挺起和背部挺直。
通过脚跟发力站起，伸展臀部和膝盖。
按所需的重复次数重复。

instructions.en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level. Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整到腰部水平位置。双脚分开与肩同宽站立，正面朝向史密斯机。采用反握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。保持大臂贴近身体两侧固定不动。呼气时向上弯举杠铃至肩部位置，充分收缩肱二头肌。在动作顶端稍作停顿，感受肱二头肌的顶峰收缩。然后吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level.
Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整到腰部水平位置
双脚与肩同宽站立，正面朝向史密斯机
采用反握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩
保持大臂贴近身体两侧固定不动
呼气时向上弯举杠铃至肩部位置，充分收缩肱二头肌
在动作顶端稍作停顿，感受肱二头肌的顶峰收缩
吸气并缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

name.en: smith machine decline close grip bench press
name.zh: 史密斯机下斜窄握卧推

instructions.en: Adjust the bench on the smith machine to a decline position. Lie down on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body. Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机上的凳子调整至下斜位置。平躺在凳子上，双脚稳固地踩在地面上。用窄握握住杠铃，握距略窄于肩宽。将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢向下放至胸部，同时保持肘部靠近身体。当杠铃接近胸部时稍作停顿。将杠铃向上推回起始位置，充分伸展手臂。根据所需的重复次数重复以上动作。

en: Adjust the bench on the smith machine to a decline position.
Lie down on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机上的凳子调整至下斜位置。
平躺在凳子上，双脚稳固地踩在地面上。
用窄握握住杠铃，握距略窄于肩宽。
将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢向下放至胸部，同时保持肘部靠近身体。
当杠铃接近胸部时稍作停顿。
将杠铃向上推回起始位置，充分伸展手臂。
根据所需的重复次数重复以上动作。

name.zh: 史密斯机斜卧肱三头肌伸展

instructions.en: Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height. Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest. Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整史密斯机的座椅，使杠铃处于肩部高度。坐在凳子上，背部靠紧靠垫，双脚平放在地面。双手采用正握握法握住杠铃，比肩宽稍宽。完全伸直双臂，将杠铃从支架上抬起，置于胸部正上方。慢慢将杠铃向额头方向下放，同时保持肘部靠近头部。在底部停顿片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height.
Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest.
Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整史密斯机的座椅，使杠铃处于肩部高度。
坐在凳子上，背部靠紧靠垫，双脚平放在地面。
双手采用正握握法握住杠铃，比肩宽稍宽。
完全伸直双臂，将杠铃从支架上抬起，置于胸部正上方。
慢慢将杠铃向额头方向下放，同时保持肘部靠近头部。
在底部停顿片刻，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: smith machine reverse decline close grip bench press
name.zh: 史密斯机反向下斜窄距卧推

instructions.en: Adjust the smith machine to a decline position. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机调整至下斜位置。平躺在凳子上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。双手以窄距握住杠铃，间距略窄于肩宽。将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机调整至下斜位置。
双脚固定在脚垫下方，平躺在凳子上。
双手以窄距握住杠铃，间距略窄于肩宽。
将杠铃从架上取下，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部内收。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your chest up as you pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，双脚平放于地面，坐在器械上。双手采用正握方式握住手柄，握距略窄于肩宽。保持背部挺直、胸部挺起，将手柄向身体方向拉回，同时用力夹挤肩胛骨。在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your chest up as you pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，双脚平放于地面，坐在器械上。
双手采用正握方式握住手柄，握距略窄于肩宽。
保持背部挺直、胸部挺起，将手柄向身体方向拉回，同时用力夹挤肩胛骨。
在动作最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手柄放回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level. Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down. Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整至腰部水平。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向史密斯机。膝盖微微弯曲，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直。单手采用正握方式握住杠铃，掌心向下。将肘部贴近身体，将杠铃向腰部方向拉起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level.
Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down.
Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整至腰部水平。
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向史密斯机。
膝盖微微弯曲，髋关节前倾，保持背部挺直。
单手采用正握方式握住杠铃，掌心向下。
将肘部贴近身体，将杠铃向腰部方向拉起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
完成所需重复次数后，换另一侧手臂进行练习。

name.en: smith one leg floor calf raise

instructions.en: Position yourself on the floor under the smith machine bar, facing away from the machine. Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface, such as a weight plate or block. Position the smith machine bar across your lower legs, just above your ankles. Hold onto the bar with your hands for stability. Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles, lifting your body up. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 背对史密斯机，站在器械杠铃下方的地面上。将双脚脚掌置于一个垫高的平台上，如杠铃片或垫块。将史密斯机的杠铃横放在小腿位置，恰好位于脚踝上方。双手握住杠铃以保持身体稳定。通过伸展踝关节将脚跟抬离地面，使身体向上提起。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Position yourself on the floor under the smith machine bar, facing away from the machine.
Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface, such as a weight plate or block.
Position the smith machine bar across your lower legs, just above your ankles.
Hold onto the bar with your hands for stability.
Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles, lifting your body up.
Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 背对史密斯机，站在器械杠铃下方的地面上。
将双脚脚掌置于一个垫高的平台上，如杠铃片或垫块。
将史密斯机的杠铃横放在小腿位置，恰好位于脚踝上方。
双手握住杠铃以保持身体稳定。
通过伸展踝关节将脚跟抬离地面，使身体向上提起。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.zh: 史密斯机后三角肌划船

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged as you pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，以胸部抵住靠垫、双脚平放在地面上的姿势坐在器械上。双手采用正握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧，将把手向胸部方向拉起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将把手释放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged as you pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先调整座椅高度，以胸部抵住靠垫、双脚平放在地面上的姿势坐在器械上。
双手采用正握方式握住把手，握距略宽于肩宽。
保持背部挺直、核心肌群收紧，将把手向胸部方向拉起，同时用力夹紧肩胛骨。
在动作顶点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将把手释放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders. Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward. Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off. Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整到略低于肩膀的高度。面向杠铃站立，双脚与髋同宽，脚尖朝前。将双脚前脚掌放在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空。握住杠铃保持支撑，背部挺直，核心收紧。尽可能高地抬起脚跟，将身体重量提至前脚掌。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚跟降回起始位置。按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整到略低于肩膀的高度。
面向杠铃站立，双脚与髋同宽，脚尖朝前。
将双脚前脚掌放在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空。
握住杠铃保持支撑，背部挺直，核心收紧。
尽可能高地抬起脚跟，将身体重量提至前脚掌。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢地将脚跟降回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders. Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward. Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off. Hold onto the bar for support. Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整史密斯机杠铃的高度，使其略低于肩部。双脚与髋同宽站立，脚尖朝前，面向杠铃。将脚掌放在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空。握住杠铃保持身体平衡。将脚跟尽可能抬高，身体向上踮起脚尖。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放下，恢复到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Hold onto the bar for support.
Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整史密斯机杠铃高度，使其略低于肩部。
双脚与髋同宽站立，脚尖朝前，面向杠铃。
将脚掌放在台阶或平台边缘，脚跟悬空。
握住杠铃以保持身体平衡。
尽可能高地抬起脚跟，身体向上踮起脚尖。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放下，恢复到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.en: smith reverse grip bent over row
name.zh: 史密斯机反握俯身划船

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height. Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在髋部高度。双脚与肩同宽，面对杠铃站立。膝盖微屈，以髋部为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。采用反握姿势握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。将杠铃拉向胸部下方，收缩肩胛骨。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将杠铃下放至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在髋部高度。
双脚与肩同宽，面对杠铃站立。
膝盖微屈，以髋部为轴向前俯身，保持背部挺直。
采用反握姿势握住杠铃，双手与肩同宽。
将杠铃拉向胸部下方，收缩肩胛骨。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将杠铃下放至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level. Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees. Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise. Lower the bar towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整至胸部水平位置。面向杠铃站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用正握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。向后迈步，保持膝盖微屈。挺胸并始终收紧核心肌群。将杠铃下放至胸部高度，同时保持肘部贴近身体。杠铃下放至底部后稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees.
Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Lower the bar towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃高度调整至胸部水平位置。
面向杠铃站立，双脚与肩同宽。
采用正握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。
向后迈步，保持膝盖微屈。
挺胸并始终收紧核心肌群。
将杠铃下放至胸部高度，同时保持肘部贴近身体。
杠铃下放至底部后稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: smith seated one leg calf raise

instructions.en: Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footrest. Place one leg on the footrest and keep the other leg off the footrest. Using your calf muscles, raise your heel as high as possible. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚放在脚踏板上。将一条腿放在脚踏板上，另一条腿悬空。利用小腿肌的力量，尽可能高地抬起脚跟。在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟放下回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换腿重复。

en: Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footrest.
Place one leg on the footrest and keep the other leg off the footrest.
Using your calf muscles, raise your heel as high as possible.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚放在脚踏板上。
将一条腿放在脚踏板上，另一条腿悬空。
利用小腿肌的力量，尽可能高地抬起脚跟。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟放下回到起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习，然后换腿重复。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level. Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully. Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整座椅高度，使手柄与肩部平齐。坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放于地面。双手采用正握握住手柄，将其从支架上抬起，手臂完全伸直。将手柄下放至肩部高度，肘部保持微微弯曲。将手柄向上推举至头顶，直到手臂完全伸直。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将手柄下放回肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，使手柄与肩部平齐。
坐在器械上，背部紧贴靠垫，双脚平放于地面。
双手采用正握握住手柄，将其从支架上抬起，手臂完全伸直。
将手柄下放至肩部高度，肘部保持微微弯曲。
将手柄向上推举至头顶，直到手臂完全伸直。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将手柄下放回肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off. Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上,双脚平放于地面,面对史密斯机。用反握姿势握住杠铃,双手与肩同宽。将前臂放在大腿上,手腕悬垂于膝盖之外。慢慢向上弯举手腕,将杠铃拉向你的前臂。在最高点稍作停顿,然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off.
Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上,双脚平放于地面,面对史密斯机。
用反握姿势握住杠铃,双手与肩同宽。
将前臂放在大腿上,手腕悬垂于膝盖之外。
慢慢向上弯举手腕,将杠铃拉向你的前臂。
在最高点稍作停顿,然后慢慢将杠铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward. Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅高度，双脚分开与肩同宽站立在史密斯机上。双手正握杠铃，握距略宽于肩。将杠铃从架子上抬起，使其位于肩部高度，肘关节微屈，掌心朝前。将杠铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃下放至肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，双脚分开与肩同宽站立在史密斯机上。
双手正握杠铃，握距略宽于肩。
将杠铃从架子上抬起，使其位于肩部高度，肘关节微屈，掌心朝前。
将杠铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直。
在顶端短暂停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃下放至肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your arms straight and your shoulders relaxed. Lift your shoulders up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top. Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。采用正握握住杠铃，双手比肩稍宽。保持手臂伸直，肩膀放松。将肩膀向上耸起至耳朵位置，在最高点用力收缩斜方肌。保持片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀放下恢复至起始姿势。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your arms straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Lift your shoulders up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top.
Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。
采用正握握住杠铃，双手比肩稍宽。
保持手臂伸直，肩膀放松。
将肩膀向上耸起至耳朵位置，在最高点用力收缩斜方肌。
保持片刻，然后缓慢将肩膀放下恢复至起始姿势。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand in front of the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Place one foot behind you on a bench or step, with your toes pointing forward. Hold onto the smith machine bar for stability. Bend your front knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 站在史密斯器械前，双脚与肩同宽站立。将一只脚放在身后的凳子或台阶上，脚尖朝前。双手握住史密斯器械的杠铃杆以保持身体平衡。弯曲前腿膝盖，身体下沉至弓步姿势，保持背部挺直。在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过前脚脚跟发力将身体推起回到起始位置。按所需的重复次数完成动作，然后换腿继续练习。

en: Stand in front of the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Place one foot behind you on a bench or step, with your toes pointing forward.
Hold onto the smith machine bar for stability.
Bend your front knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 面向史密斯器械，双脚与肩同宽站立。
将一只脚放在身后的凳子或台阶上，脚尖朝前。
双手握住史密斯器械的杠铃杆以保持身体平衡。
弯曲前腿膝盖，身体下沉至弓步姿势，保持背部挺直。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后通过前脚脚跟发力将身体推起回到起始位置。
按所需的重复次数完成动作，然后换腿继续练习。

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height. Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar. Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight. Push through your left heel to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整至髋部高度。背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。右脚向后迈步，将脚背放在杠铃上。左膝弯曲，身体下降进入弓步姿势，保持背部挺直。左脚后跟用力蹬地，回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复，左脚向后迈步。交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar.
Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整至髋部高度。
背对器械站立，双脚与肩同宽。
右脚向后迈步，将脚背放在杠铃上。
左膝弯曲，身体下降进入弓步姿势，保持背部挺直。
左脚后跟用力蹬地，回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复，左脚向后迈步。
交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out. Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders. Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack. Keeping your chest up and back straight, initiate the squat by bending at the hips and knees. Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整到适合你做深蹲的高度。双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。身体置于杠铃下方，将杠铃放置在上斜方肌和肩部。双手握距略宽于肩握住杠铃。收紧核心，将杠铃从架上取出，向后退一步清除固定架。保持胸部抬起、背部挺直，通过屈髋和屈膝开始下蹲。下蹲至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行线。在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力蹲起回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack.
Keeping your chest up and back straight, initiate the squat by bending at the hips and knees.
Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整到适合你做深蹲的高度。
双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
身体置于杠铃下方，将杠铃放置在上斜方肌和肩部。
双手握距略宽于肩握住杠铃。
收紧核心，将杠铃从架上取出，向后退一步清除固定架。
保持胸部抬起、背部挺直，通过屈髋和屈膝开始下蹲。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行或略低于平行线。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力蹲起回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

name.zh: 史密斯机站姿反握腕弯举

instructions.en: Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body. Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面向史密斯机站立，双脚与肩同宽。采用反握握住杠铃，双手间距与肩同宽。保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体。缓慢向上弯曲手腕，将杠铃拉向身体。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body.
Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面向史密斯机站立，双脚与肩同宽
采用反握握住杠铃，双手间距与肩同宽
保持背部挺直，肘部贴近身体
缓慢向上弯曲手腕，将杠铃拉向身体
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后缓慢将杠铃放回起始位置
重复完成所需的次数

name.en: smith standing behind head military press

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance. Position the bar behind your head, resting on your upper traps. Keep your core engaged and your chest lifted throughout the exercise. Press the bar overhead by extending your arms, fully straightening them. Pause briefly at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整史密斯机的座椅高度，使杠铃处于肩部水平位置。双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。采用反握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上抬起并后退，保持稳定的站姿。将杠铃置于头后，搭在上斜方肌上。整个动作过程中保持核心收紧，胸部挺起。通过伸直手臂将杠铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将杠铃下降至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Position the bar behind your head, resting on your upper traps.
Keep your core engaged and your chest lifted throughout the exercise.
Press the bar overhead by extending your arms, fully straightening them.
Pause briefly at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整史密斯机的座椅高度，使杠铃处于肩部水平位置。
双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。
采用反握握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃从架子上抬起并后退，保持稳定的站姿。
将杠铃置于头后，搭在上斜方肌上。
整个动作过程中保持核心收紧，胸部挺起。
通过伸直手臂将杠铃向上推举，直到手臂完全伸直。
在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将杠铃下降至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to stand with your feet flat on the ground and your shoulders under the bar. Position yourself under the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward. Place your hands on the bar for stability. Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯器械的杠铃调整到合适的高度，使你能够双脚平放在地面上，肩膀位于杠铃下方。站在杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽，脚尖朝前，双手握住杠铃保持身体稳定。收缩小腿肌群，缓慢将脚跟抬离地面，身体向上踮起脚尖。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to stand with your feet flat on the ground and your shoulders under the bar.
Position yourself under the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Place your hands on the bar for stability.
Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯器械的杠铃调整到合适的高度，使你能够双脚平放在地面上，肩膀位于杠铃下方。
站在杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽，脚尖朝前。
双手握住杠铃保持身体稳定。
收缩小腿肌群，缓慢将脚跟抬离地面，身体向上踮起脚尖。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将脚跟放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward. Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。双手采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩宽。将杠铃从架子上取下，下放至肩部高度，掌心朝前。将杠铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直举过头顶。在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃下放回至肩部高度。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward.
Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩宽。
将杠铃从架子上取下，下放至肩部高度，掌心朝前。
将杠铃向上推举，直至手臂完全伸直举过头顶。
在顶端稍作停留，然后慢慢将杠铃下放回至肩部高度。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height. Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards. Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整至与髋部平齐。双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖向外展开。站在杠铃下方，将杠铃置于上背部和肩部。收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，同时将身体下蹲，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。继续下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。在底部稍作停顿后，通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃设置在与髋部同高的位置。
双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖向外展开。
站在杠铃下方，将杠铃置于上背部和肩部。
收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，同时将身体下蹲，臀部向后推，膝盖弯曲。
下蹲直至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。
在底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚跟发力将身体推回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to comfortably stand with your feet flat on the ground. Position yourself under the bar with your shoulders directly below it and your feet shoulder-width apart. Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform or weight plates, with your heels hanging off the edge. Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise. Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整到适合的高度，使你能够舒适地站立，双脚平放在地面上。将身体置于杠铃下方，双肩正对杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽。将双脚前脚掌放在升高的平台或杠铃片上，脚跟悬空在边缘。双手采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩。在动作全程中收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。慢慢将脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量转移到前脚掌。在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟降回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to comfortably stand with your feet flat on the ground.
Position yourself under the bar with your shoulders directly below it and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform or weight plates, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将史密斯机的杠铃调整到适合的高度，使你能够舒适地站立，双脚平放在地面上。
将身体置于杠铃下方，双肩正对杠铃下方，双脚与肩同宽。
将双脚前脚掌放在升高的平台或杠铃片上，脚跟悬空在边缘。
双手采用正握方式握杠，握距略宽于肩。
在动作全程中收紧核心肌群，保持背部挺直。
慢慢将脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量转移到前脚掌。
在顶峰位置停顿片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟降回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the smith machine. Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your back straight and your core engaged. Pull the barbell up towards your chin, leading with your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向史密斯机。采用正握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。将杠铃向颈部方向拉起，以肘部为主导。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃降至起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the smith machine.
Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Pull the barbell up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向史密斯机。
采用正握方式握住杠铃，双手间距略宽于肩。
保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
将杠铃向颈部方向拉起，以肘部为主导。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将杠铃降至起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine. Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将凳子调整到史密斯机上舒适的位置，平躺在凳子上，双脚平放于地面。双手以宽握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。从架上取下杠铃，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部向身体两侧打开。当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine.
Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将凳子调整到史密斯机上舒适的位置。
平躺在凳子上，双脚平放于地面。
双手以宽握方式握住杠铃，握距略宽于肩部。
从架上取下杠铃，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部向身体两侧打开。
当杠铃触及胸部时稍作停顿。
将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: smith wide grip decline bench press
name.zh: 史密斯机宽握下斜卧推

instructions.en: Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle. Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows pointed outwards. Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest. Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将下斜凳调整到合适的角度，平躺在凳子上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。以宽握方式握住杠铃，握距比肩宽稍宽。从架上取下杠铃，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部向外展开。当杠铃触胸时稍作停顿，然后将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展。按所需重复次数进行训练。

en: Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将下斜凳调整到合适的角度
平躺在凳子上，双脚固定在脚垫下方
以宽握方式握住杠铃，握距比肩宽稍宽
从架上取下杠铃，缓慢下放至胸部，同时保持肘部向外展开
杠铃触胸时稍作停顿
将杠铃推回起始位置，手臂完全伸展
按所需重复次数进行训练

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees. As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides. As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position. Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your knees bent. Stand up by extending your hips and knees, keeping the barbell overhead. Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于身前地面。屈膝屈髋以下蹲姿势，双手正握杠铃。保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，通过脚后跟发力将杠铃从地面拉起，同时伸展髋关节和膝关节。当杠铃上升至髋部高度时，快速爆发性地向上提拉，耸肩并将肘部向两侧上方拉起。当杠铃到达最高点时，迅速下蹲至深蹲姿势，在头顶上方接住杠铃，双臂完全伸直，膝关节弯曲。通过伸展髋关节和膝关节站立，保持杠铃在头顶上方。然后反向动作将杠铃放回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position.
Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your knees bent.
Stand up by extending your hips and knees, keeping the barbell overhead.
Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将杠铃置于身前地面上。
屈膝屈髋以下蹲姿势，双手正握杠铃。
保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，通过脚后跟发力将杠铃从地面拉起，同时伸展髋关节和膝关节。
当杠铃上升至髋部高度时，快速爆发性地向上提拉，耸肩并将肘部向两侧上方拉起。
当杠铃到达最高点时，迅速下蹲至深蹲姿势，在头顶上方接住杠铃。
双臂完全伸直，膝关节弯曲。
通过伸展髋关节和膝关节站立，保持杠铃在头顶上方。
反向动作将杠铃放回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the waist, keeping your back straight. Extend your arm with the dumbbell towards the opposite foot, rotating your torso as you do so. Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃。膝盖微微弯曲，屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直。持哑铃的手臂向对侧脚的方向伸展，同时旋转躯干。回到起始姿势，换另一侧重复动作。两侧交替进行至所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the waist, keeping your back straight.
Extend your arm with the dumbbell towards the opposite foot, rotating your torso as you do so.
Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，单手握住哑铃。
膝盖微微弯曲，屈髋向前俯身，保持背部挺直。
持哑铃的手臂向对侧脚的方向伸展，同时旋转躯干。
回到起始姿势，换另一侧重复动作。
两侧交替进行至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders. Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor. Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position. Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 俯卧在地面上，前臂平放在地板上，手肘正对肩关节下方。收紧核心肌群，将胸部抬离地面，同时保持前臂和脚尖着地。保持这个姿势几秒钟，确保颈部保持中立位置。慢慢将胸部放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor.
Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position.
Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 俯卧在地面上，前臂平放在地板上，手肘正对肩关节下方。
收紧核心肌群，将胸部抬离地面，同时保持前臂和脚尖着地。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，确保颈部保持中立位置。
慢慢将胸部放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Bring your right knee towards your right elbow, keeping it off the ground. As you bring your right knee back, simultaneously lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows. Push back up to the starting position and repeat with your left knee towards your left elbow. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为俯卧撑，双手略宽于肩，双脚并拢。将右膝向右侧肘部靠拢，保持膝盖离地。右膝收回的同时，弯曲肘部将身体下压靠近地面，然后推起回到起始姿势，换左膝向左侧肘部靠拢。两侧交替进行，重复完成所需的次数。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Bring your right knee towards your right elbow, keeping it off the ground.
As you bring your right knee back, simultaneously lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows.
Push back up to the starting position and repeat with your left knee towards your left elbow.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势起始，双手略宽于肩，双脚并拢。
将右膝向右侧肘部靠拢，保持膝盖离地。
右膝收回的同时，弯曲肘部将身体下压靠近地面。
推起回到起始姿势，换左膝向左侧肘部靠拢。
两侧交替进行，重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Place your hands on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Engage your core and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight. Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your spine. Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。将双手放在身体后方的地面上，手指朝向身体方向。收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢向后倾斜，保持背部挺直。继续向后倾斜直到感觉到脊柱有拉伸感。保持这个拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。根据需要重复动作。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Place your hands on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Engage your core and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight.
Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your spine.
Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿向前伸直。
将双手放在身体后方的地面上，手指朝向身体方向。
收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢向后倾斜，保持背部挺直。
继续向后倾斜直到感觉到脊柱有拉伸感。
保持这个拉伸姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
根据需要重复动作。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you. Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee. Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the twist to the left side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双腿伸直向前。弯曲膝盖，双脚平放在地面上，与髋同宽。双手置于头后，手肘向两侧展开。收紧腹肌，慢慢将躯干向右侧扭转，使右肘靠近左膝。在扭转末端稍作停留，然后慢慢回到起始位置。向左侧重复扭转动作，使左肘靠近右膝。按照所需的重复次数交替进行两侧动作。

en: Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat the twist to the left side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双腿伸直向前。
弯曲膝盖，双脚平放在地面上，与髋同宽。
双手置于头后，手肘向两侧展开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢将躯干向右侧扭转，使右肘靠近左膝。
在扭转末端稍作停留，然后慢慢回到起始位置。
向左侧重复扭转动作，使左肘靠近右膝。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行两侧动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with one foot and place it about two feet in front of the other foot. Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight. Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, and your back knee is hovering just above the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。将一只脚向前迈出约两步的距离，使两脚前后分开。保持背部挺直，屈膝屈髋向下蹲，直至前侧大腿与地面平行，后侧膝盖悬停在地面上方。保持片刻，然后通过前脚跟发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。按照要求的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧腿重复进行。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Take a step forward with one foot and place it about two feet in front of the other foot.
Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, and your back knee is hovering just above the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。
将一只脚向前迈出约两步的距离，使两脚前后分开。
保持背部挺直，屈膝屈髋向下蹲。
继续下蹲直至前侧大腿与地面平行，后侧膝盖悬停在地面上方。
保持片刻，然后通过前脚跟发力蹬地，回到起始姿势。
按照要求的重复次数完成动作后，换另一侧腿重复进行。

instructions.en: Start with the barbell resting on your shoulders, with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your knees tracking over your toes. As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your legs and push the barbell overhead. As the barbell reaches its peak, quickly drop into a split position, with one foot forward and one foot back. Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your back knee slightly touching the ground. Stand up from the split position, bringing your feet back together. Lower the barbell back to your shoulders and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将杠铃置于肩部上方，双脚与肩同宽站立。身体下沉进入深蹲姿势，保持胸部挺起，膝盖与脚尖方向一致。在深蹲底部位置，通过腿部快速向上爆发用力，将杠铃向上推举。当杠铃到达最高点时，迅速转换到分腿姿势，一腿向前，一腿向后。双臂完全伸直接住杠铃置于头顶，后腿膝盖轻触地面。从分腿姿势起身，双脚并拢。将杠铃缓慢放下至肩部，根据训练目标重复相应次数。

en: Start with the barbell resting on your shoulders, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your knees tracking over your toes.
As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your legs and push the barbell overhead.
As the barbell reaches its peak, quickly drop into a split position, with one foot forward and one foot back.
Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your back knee slightly touching the ground.
Stand up from the split position, bringing your feet back together.
Lower the barbell back to your shoulders and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将杠铃置于肩部上方，双脚与肩同宽站立。
身体下沉进入深蹲姿势，保持胸部挺起，膝盖与脚尖方向一致。
在深蹲底部位置，通过腿部快速向上爆发用力，将杠铃向上推举。
当杠铃到达最高点时，迅速转换到分腿姿势，一腿向前，一腿向后。
双臂完全伸直接住杠铃置于头顶，后腿膝盖轻触地面。
从分腿姿势起身，双脚并拢。
将杠铃缓慢放下至肩部，根据训练目标重复相应次数。

instructions.en: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side up. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and position yourself on top of the bosu ball. Lower your body down by bending your knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair. Keep your chest up and your weight on your heels. Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将BOSU球平放在地面上，有平面的一面朝上。双脚与肩同宽站立在BOSU球上。屈膝屈髋向下蹲，好像要坐到椅子上一样。保持胸部挺起，重心放在脚后跟上。下蹲直到大腿与地面平行。稍停片刻，然后通过脚后跟发力回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side up.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and position yourself on top of the bosu ball.
Lower your body down by bending your knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Keep your chest up and your weight on your heels.
Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将BOSU球平放在地面上，有平面的一面朝上。
双脚与肩同宽站立在BOSU球上。
屈膝屈髋向下蹲，好像要坐到椅子上一样。
保持胸部挺起，重心放在脚后跟上。
下蹲直到大腿与地面平行。
稍停片刻，然后通过脚后跟发力回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you come up from the squat, extend your arms overhead, reaching towards the ceiling. Return to the starting position by lowering your arms and bending your knees to squat down again. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。屈膝并向后推髋，将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势。当从深蹲中起身时，手臂向上伸展举过头顶，朝天花板方向延伸。通过放下手臂、屈膝下蹲回到起始姿势。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
As you come up from the squat, extend your arms overhead, reaching towards the ceiling.
Return to the starting position by lowering your arms and bending your knees to squat down again.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展站立。
屈膝并向后推髋，将身体下蹲至深蹲姿势。
从深蹲中起身时，手臂向上伸展举过头顶，朝天花板方向延伸。
放下手臂并屈膝下蹲，回到起始姿势。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.en: squat to overhead reach with twist

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out. Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back. As you come up from the squat, raise your arms overhead and twist your torso to one side. Return to the starting position and repeat the squat, this time twisting your torso to the opposite side. Continue alternating sides with each squat repetition.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽、脚尖略微外展站立。弯曲膝盖并向后推髋部，身体下蹲成深蹲姿势。从深蹲起身时，双臂向上举过头顶，同时将躯干向一侧扭转。恢复到起始姿势后重复深蹲动作，这次向相反方向扭转躯干。每次深蹲重复时交替扭转方向。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
As you come up from the squat, raise your arms overhead and twist your torso to one side.
Return to the starting position and repeat the squat, this time twisting your torso to the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides with each squat repetition.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽、脚尖略微外展站立。
弯曲膝盖并向后推髋部，身体下蹲成深蹲姿势。
从深蹲起身时，双臂向上举过头顶，同时将躯干向一侧扭转。
恢复到起始姿势后重复深蹲动作，这次向相反方向扭转躯干。
每次深蹲重复时交替扭转方向。

name.en: stability ball crunch (full range hands behind head)
name.zh: 健身球卷腹（全程双手置于头后）

instructions.en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手置于头后，肘部向外展开。收紧腹肌，慢慢向前卷曲上半身，将胸部靠近膝盖。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。按所需次数重复进行。

en: Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
双手置于头后，肘部向外展开。
收紧腹肌，慢慢向前卷曲上半身，将胸部靠近膝盖。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身放回起始位置。
按所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended overhead. Bend your knees slightly and engage your core. Lower your body down into a squat position while keeping your arms extended overhead. As you squat down, press your arms down towards the ground, engaging your triceps. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to stand back up while simultaneously raising your arms back overhead. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向上伸直。微微弯曲膝盖，收紧核心肌群。保持双臂向上伸直的同时，身体下蹲成深蹲姿势。在下蹲过程中，手臂向下压向地面，充分激活肱三头肌。在深蹲底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力站起，同时将双臂举回头顶。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended overhead.
Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Lower your body down into a squat position while keeping your arms extended overhead.
As you squat down, press your arms down towards the ground, engaging your triceps.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to stand back up while simultaneously raising your arms back overhead.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向上伸直。
微微弯曲膝盖，收紧核心肌群。
保持双臂向上伸直的同时，身体下蹲成深蹲姿势。
在下蹲过程中，手臂向下压向地面，充分激活肱三头肌。
在深蹲底部稍作停顿，然后通过脚后跟发力站起，同时将双臂举回头顶。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height, parallel to the ground. Rotate your torso to the right, keeping your arms extended and your back straight. As you rotate, extend your right arm forward and your left arm back, mimicking the motion of drawing a bowstring. Hold the position for a moment, then return to the starting position. Repeat the motion, this time rotating your torso to the left and extending your left arm forward and your right arm back. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。手臂向前伸直至肩部高度，与地面平行。保持手臂伸直、背部挺直的同时向右旋转躯干。旋转时，右臂向前伸展，左臂向后展开，模拟拉弓的动作。保持该姿势片刻，然后回到起始位置。换边重复动作，向左旋转躯干，左臂向前伸展，右臂向后展开。按照所需的重复次数交替进行两侧练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height, parallel to the ground.
Rotate your torso to the right, keeping your arms extended and your back straight.
As you rotate, extend your right arm forward and your left arm back, mimicking the motion of drawing a bowstring.
Hold the position for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Repeat the motion, this time rotating your torso to the left and extending your left arm forward and your right arm back.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
手臂向前伸直至肩部高度，与地面保持平行。
保持手臂伸直、背部挺直的同时向右旋转躯干。
旋转时右臂向前伸展，左臂向后展开，模拟拉弓的动作。
保持该姿势片刻，然后回到起始位置。
换边重复动作，向左旋转躯干，左臂向前伸展，右臂向后展开。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行两侧练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and core engaged. Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃置于颈后。保持背部挺直，核心收紧。通过手臂伸展将杠铃向上推举，直到肘部完全伸直。在顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。重复进行所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手正握杠铃置于颈后。
保持背部挺直，核心收紧。
通过手臂伸展将杠铃向上推举，直到肘部完全伸直。
在顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将杠铃下放回起始位置。
重复进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand on the edge of a step or a sturdy platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step. Hold onto a railing or wall for balance if needed. Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 站在台阶或稳固平台的边缘，脚跟悬空，脚尖踩在台阶上。如果需要的话，抓住栏杆或墙壁以保持平衡。慢慢将脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量抬起至脚掌前端。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟降至起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand on the edge of a step or a sturdy platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Hold onto a railing or wall for balance if needed.
Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 站在台阶或稳固平台的边缘，脚跟悬空，脚尖踩在台阶上。
如果需要的话，抓住栏杆或墙壁以保持平衡。
慢慢将脚跟尽可能抬高，将身体重量抬起至脚掌前端。
在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将脚跟降至起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward. Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, standing on your toes. Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。尽可能高地抬起脚跟，用脚尖支撑身体。保持该姿势片刻，然后缓慢地将脚跟放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, standing on your toes.
Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，脚尖朝前。
尽可能高地抬起脚跟，用脚尖支撑身体。
保持该姿势片刻，然后缓慢地将脚跟放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away. Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height. Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground. Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight. You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Repeat on the other leg.
instructions.zh: 面朝墙壁或其他稳固的物体站立，距离约一臂长。将双手放在墙壁或物体上，高度与肩齐平。一只脚向后迈一步，保持脚跟着地。轻轻弯曲前腿膝盖，身体向前倾斜，同时保持后腿伸直。此时应该感觉到小腿肌肉被拉伸。保持这个姿势20-30秒，然后换另一条腿重复进行。

en: Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away.
Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height.
Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground.
Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight.
You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Repeat on the other leg.
zh: 面朝墙壁或其他稳固的物体站立，距离约一臂长。
将双手放在墙壁或物体上，高度与肩齐平。
一只脚向后迈一步，保持脚跟着地。
