轻轻弯曲前腿膝盖，身体向前倾斜，同时保持后腿伸直。
此时应该感觉到小腿肌肉被拉伸。
保持这个姿势20-30秒。
换另一条腿重复进行。

name.en: standing hamstring and calf stretch with strap
name.zh: 站立腿后侧和小腿拉伸（使用弹力带）

instructions.en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the strap with both hands and place it around the ball of your foot. Keep your leg straight and slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight. Feel the stretch in your hamstring and calf muscles. Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds. Release the stretch and repeat with the other leg. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手握住弹力带并将其套在脚掌前部。保持腿部伸直，从髋部缓慢向前倾斜，背部保持平直。感受腘绳肌和小腿肌的拉伸感。保持拉伸20-30秒，然后放松，换另一条腿重复动作。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the strap with both hands and place it around the ball of your foot.
Keep your leg straight and slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Feel the stretch in your hamstring and calf muscles.
Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Release the stretch and repeat with the other leg.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
双手握住弹力带并将其套在脚掌前部。
保持腿部伸直，从髋部缓慢向前倾斜，背部保持平直。
感受腘绳肌和小腿肌的拉伸感。
保持拉伸20-30秒。
放松拉伸，换另一条腿重复动作。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground. Slowly lean your upper body to one side, feeling a stretch in your side and lats. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds. Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。将双臂向身体两侧伸直，与地面保持平行。慢慢将上半身向一侧倾斜，感受侧腰和背阔肌的拉伸。保持这个姿势15-30秒，然后回到起始位置，换另一侧重复。重复进行所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Slowly lean your upper body to one side, feeling a stretch in your side and lats.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
将双臂向身体两侧伸直，与地面保持平行。
慢慢将上半身向一侧倾斜，感受侧腰和背阔肌的拉伸。
保持这个姿势15-30秒。
回到起始位置，换另一侧重复。
重复进行所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Place your hands on your hips or let them hang by your sides. Engage your core muscles and tilt your pelvis forward, pushing your lower back towards the wall behind you. Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双手放在髋部两侧或自然垂放。收紧核心肌群，将骨盆向前倾斜，推动下背部向身后的墙面靠拢。保持该姿势几秒钟，然后放松回到起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Place your hands on your hips or let them hang by your sides.
Engage your core muscles and tilt your pelvis forward, pushing your lower back towards the wall behind you.
Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
双手放在髋部两侧或自然垂放。
收紧核心肌群，将骨盆向前倾斜，推动下背部向身后的墙面靠拢。
保持该姿势几秒钟，然后放松回到起始姿势。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your hands on your hips. Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot off the ground, bending your knee. Slowly curl your right heel towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstring. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your right foot back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，双手叉腰。将重心转移至左腿，屈膝抬起右脚离地。慢慢将右脚跟向臀部方向卷起，充分收缩腘绳肌。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将右脚放回起始位置。重复所需次数后换腿进行。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot off the ground, bending your knee.
Slowly curl your right heel towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstring.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your right foot back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 双脚分开与髋同宽站立，双手叉腰。
将重心转移至左腿，屈膝抬起右脚离地。
慢慢将右脚跟向臀部方向卷起，充分收缩腘绳肌。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将右脚放回起始位置。
重复所需次数后换腿进行。

instructions.en: Start by standing tall with your feet shoulder-width apart and the wheel roller in front of you. Bend at your waist and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Continue rolling forward until you feel a stretch in your abs and your body is extended as far as possible. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your body, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将滚轮置于身前。屈髋俯身，保持背部挺直、核心收紧，慢慢将滚轮向前推。持续前推直至感受到腹肌被充分拉伸，身体伸展至极限位置。保持片刻，然后慢慢将滚轮拉回身体，恢复起始姿势。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by standing tall with your feet shoulder-width apart and the wheel roller in front of you.
Bend at your waist and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Continue rolling forward until you feel a stretch in your abs and your body is extended as far as possible.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your body, returning to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将滚轮放在身前。
屈髋俯身，保持背部挺直、核心收紧，慢慢将滚轮向前推。
持续前推直至感受到腹肌被充分拉伸，身体伸展至极限位置。
保持片刻，然后慢慢将滚轮拉回身体，恢复起始姿势。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees slightly and jump up explosively. As you jump, spread your legs and extend your arms out to the sides, forming a star shape with your body. Land softly on the balls of your feet with your knees slightly bent. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。膝盖略微弯曲，然后用力向上爆发性跳起。跳起的同时，双腿向外分开，双臂向身体两侧伸展，使身体呈现星形。落地时，双脚前脚掌着地，膝盖保持微弯。根据所需重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms by your sides.
Bend your knees slightly and jump up explosively.
As you jump, spread your legs and extend your arms out to the sides, forming a star shape with your body.
Land softly on the balls of your feet with your knees slightly bent.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂自然垂于身体两侧。
膝盖略微弯曲，然后用力向上爆发性跳起。
跳起的同时，双腿向外分开，双臂向身体两侧伸展，使身体呈现星形。
落地时，双脚前脚掌着地，膝盖保持微弯。
根据所需重复次数重复上述动作。

name.zh: 室内有氧自行车训练 v. 3

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position to ensure proper alignment. Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available. Start pedaling at a comfortable pace. Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance as desired. Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and proper posture. Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your workout. Gradually decrease the resistance and slow down before coming to a complete stop. Stretch your legs and cool down after the workout.
instructions.zh: 首先调整座椅的高度和位置，确保骑行时身体能够保持正确的对齐姿势。将双脚放置在踏板上，如果有绑带的话将其固定好。以舒适的节奏开始骑行，保持稳定的踏频，并根据需要逐步增加阻力。在整个运动过程中，注意收紧核心肌群以维持身体稳定和良好的姿势。根据你的训练计划持续骑行达到预定的时间。训练接近尾声时，逐渐降低阻力并放慢速度，直到完全停止。训练结束后，记得对腿部进行拉伸放松，完成整个降温过程。

en: Adjust the seat height and position to ensure proper alignment.
Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Start pedaling at a comfortable pace.
Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance as desired.
Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and proper posture.
Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your workout.
Gradually decrease the resistance and slow down before coming to a complete stop.
Stretch your legs and cool down after the workout.
zh: 调整座椅的高度和位置，确保骑行时身体能够保持正确的对齐姿势。
将双脚放置在踏板上，如果有绑带的话将其固定好。
以舒适的节奏开始骑行。
保持稳定的踏频，并根据需要逐步增加阻力。
在整个运动过程中，注意收紧核心肌群以维持身体稳定和良好的姿势。
根据你的训练计划持续骑行达到预定的时间。
训练接近尾声时，逐渐降低阻力并放慢速度，直到完全停止。
训练结束后，记得对腿部进行拉伸放松，完成整个降温过程。

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position on the stationary bike to ensure proper alignment. Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available. Start pedaling at a comfortable pace, keeping your back straight and core engaged. Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance level if desired. Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout. Cool down by gradually reducing your pace and resistance level. Stretch your leg muscles after the workout to prevent tightness and promote recovery.
instructions.zh: 首先调整固定自行车的座椅高度和位置，确保身体处于正确的对齐状态。将双脚放在踏板上，如果有绑带的话将其固定好。以舒适的节奏开始骑行，保持背部挺直并收紧核心肌群。维持稳定的节奏，如需要可增加阻力水平。按照所需的训练时长持续骑行。通过逐渐降低骑行速度和阻力水平来进行放松。训练结束后拉伸腿部肌肉，以防止肌肉紧张并促进恢复。

en: Adjust the seat height and position on the stationary bike to ensure proper alignment.
Place your feet on the pedals and secure them with the straps if available.
Start pedaling at a comfortable pace, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Maintain a steady rhythm and increase the resistance level if desired.
Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Cool down by gradually reducing your pace and resistance level.
Stretch your leg muscles after the workout to prevent tightness and promote recovery.
zh: 调整固定自行车的座椅高度和位置，确保身体处于正确的对齐状态。
将双脚放在踏板上，如果有绑带的话将其固定好。
以舒适的节奏开始骑行，保持背部挺直并收紧核心肌群。
维持稳定的节奏，如需要可增加阻力水平。
按照所需的训练时长持续骑行。
通过逐渐降低骑行速度和阻力水平来进行放松。
训练结束后拉伸腿部肌肉，以防止肌肉紧张并促进恢复。

name.zh: 分腿马尔泰斯吊环支撑

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pair of rings with your arms fully extended and your body in a straight line. Spread your legs wide apart, forming a straddle position. Engage your core and slowly lower your body until your arms are parallel to the ground. Hold this position for a few seconds, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双臂完全伸展、身体呈一条直线的吊环悬垂状态。将双腿尽量分开呈分腿姿势，收紧核心肌群后，慢慢将身体下降直到双臂与地面平行。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后用力向上推回起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by hanging from a pair of rings with your arms fully extended and your body in a straight line.
Spread your legs wide apart, forming a straddle position.
Engage your core and slowly lower your body until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Hold this position for a few seconds, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双臂完全伸展，身体保持一条直线，在吊环上处于悬垂状态。
将双腿尽量分开，呈分腿姿势。
收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将身体下降至双臂与地面平行的位置。
保持该姿势几秒钟，随后用力向上推回起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复以上动作。

instructions.en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet spread wide apart. Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders over your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，双脚尽量分开。收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将重心向前移动，使肩膀超过双手的位置。弯曲手肘，将身体向地面方向降低，同时保持手肘靠近身体两侧。在最低点停顿片刻，然后双手用力推直手臂，将身体抬起回到起始姿势。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet spread wide apart.
Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, bringing your shoulders over your hands.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以俯卧撑姿势开始，双手与肩同宽，双脚尽量分开。
收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将重心向前移动，使肩膀超过双手的位置。
弯曲手肘，将身体向地面方向降低，同时保持手肘靠近身体两侧。
在最低点停顿片刻，然后双手用力推直手臂，将身体抬起回到起始姿势。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other. Place your bottom arm under your head for support. Engage your core and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 侧卧在垫子上，双腿伸直并上下叠放。将下方的手臂放在头下支撑，以保持身体稳定。收紧核心肌群，将上侧腿尽可能高地抬起，同时保持髋部不发生旋转或身体不向后倾斜。在动作顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将腿放下回到起始位置。重复所需的次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

en: Lie on your side with your legs straight and stacked on top of each other.
Place your bottom arm under your head for support.
Engage your core and lift your top leg as high as possible without rotating your hips or leaning backward.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 侧卧在垫子上，双腿伸直并上下叠放。
将下方的手臂放在头下支撑，以保持身体稳定。
收紧核心肌群，将上侧腿尽可能高地抬起，同时保持髋部不发生旋转或身体不向后倾斜。
在动作顶端保持片刻，然后慢慢将腿放下回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数后，换另一侧进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides. As you lower your body, simultaneously lift your right arm and left leg off the ground, extending them straight out. Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your arm and leg back down while pushing yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time lifting your left arm and right leg. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩略宽，双脚并拢。收紧核心肌群，将身体向地面下降，同时保持肘部靠近身体两侧。在身体下降的过程中，同时抬起右臂和左腿，将它们伸直抬起。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后将手臂和腿放下，同时推起身体回到起始位置。重复动作，这次抬起左臂和右腿。按要求的重复次数继续交替进行。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
As you lower your body, simultaneously lift your right arm and left leg off the ground, extending them straight out.
Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your arm and leg back down while pushing yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time lifting your left arm and right leg.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 从高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩略宽，双脚并拢。
收紧核心肌群，将身体向地面下降，同时保持肘部靠近身体两侧。
在身体下降的过程中，同时抬起右臂和左腿，将它们伸直抬起。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后将手臂和腿放下，同时推起身体回到起始位置。
重复动作，这次抬起左臂和右腿。
按要求的重复次数继续交替进行。

instructions.en: Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height. Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you. Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged. Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将悬吊训练器固定在高处锚点上，调整绑带至腰部高度。背对锚点站立，双手握住手柄，双臂向前伸直。身体从腰部开始前倾，保持身体挺直、核心收紧。在控制好腹部肌肉张力的前提下，尽可能降低身体。到达底部时短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体抬回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Attach a suspension trainer to a high anchor point and adjust the straps to waist height.
Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with your arms extended in front of you.
Lean forward at the waist, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Lower your body as far as you can while maintaining control and tension in your abs.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your body back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将悬吊训练器固定在高处锚点上，调整绑带至腰部高度。
背对锚点站立，双手握住手柄，双臂向前伸直。
身体从腰部开始前倾，保持身体挺直、核心收紧。
在控制好腹部肌肉张力的前提下，尽可能降低身体。
到达底部时短暂停顿，然后缓慢将身体抬回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Find a suspension trainer and adjust it to an appropriate height. Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with an overhand grip. Walk your feet forward, leaning your body forward until your weight is supported by the suspension trainer. Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and lower your chest towards the handles. Push through your chest and arms to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 找一个悬吊训练器，将其调整到适当的高度。背对固定点站立，双手采用正握握住把手。双脚向前迈步，身体前倾，使身体重量由悬吊训练器支撑。保持从头到脚跟呈一条直线，收紧核心肌群，将胸部下降至把手附近。推胸发力，同时带动手臂发力，使身体回到起始姿势。根据需要重复完成相应次数。

en: Find a suspension trainer and adjust it to an appropriate height.
Stand facing away from the anchor point and hold the handles with an overhand grip.
Walk your feet forward, leaning your body forward until your weight is supported by the suspension trainer.
Keep your body straight from head to heels, engage your core, and lower your chest towards the handles.
Push through your chest and arms to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 找一个悬吊训练器，将其调整到适当的高度。
背对固定点站立，双手采用正握握住把手。
双脚向前迈步，身体前倾，使身体重量由悬吊训练器支撑。
保持从头到脚跟呈一条直线，收紧核心肌群，将胸部下降至把手附近。
推胸发力，同时带动手臂发力，使身体回到起始姿势。
根据需要重复完成相应次数。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your knees up towards your chest, curling your pelvis towards your ribcage. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，同时将骨盆向肋骨方向卷动。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将膝盖放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your knees up towards your chest, curling your pelvis towards your ribcage.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，手臂完全伸直，掌心朝外。
收紧核心肌群，将膝盖向胸部方向抬起，同时将骨盆向肋骨方向卷动。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将膝盖放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Set up a suspension trainer at an appropriate height. Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other. Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground. Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将悬吊训练器安装到合适的高度。双脚与肩同宽站立，面向固定点。双手握住手柄，采用正握姿势，掌心相对。身体向后倾斜，保持身体挺直，脚跟着地。将胸部向手柄方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨。在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢下降到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Set up a suspension trainer at an appropriate height.
Stand facing the anchor point with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将悬吊训练器安装到合适的高度
双脚与肩同宽站立，面向固定点
双手握住手柄，采用正握姿势，掌心相对
身体向后倾斜，保持身体挺直，脚跟着地
将胸部向手柄方向拉，同时挤压肩胛骨
在顶端停顿片刻，然后慢慢下降到起始姿势
按照所需的重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Stand facing away from a suspension trainer with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend one leg forward and place the top of your foot in the foot cradle of the suspension trainer. Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your chest up and your knee in line with your toes. Push through your heel to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
instructions.zh: 背对悬挂训练器站立，双脚与肩同宽。将一条腿向前伸展，将脚背放在悬挂训练器的脚挂带中。弯曲支撑腿，将身体降低至弓步姿势，保持胸部挺直，膝盖与脚尖对齐。通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。重复所需的重复次数，然后换腿。

en: Stand facing away from a suspension trainer with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend one leg forward and place the top of your foot in the foot cradle of the suspension trainer.
Bend your standing leg and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your chest up and your knee in line with your toes.
Push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
zh: 背对悬挂训练器站立，双脚与肩同宽。
将一条腿向前伸展，将脚背放在悬挂训练器的脚挂带中。
弯曲支撑腿，将身体降低至弓步姿势，保持胸部挺直，膝盖与脚尖对齐。
通过脚后跟发力返回起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数，然后换腿。

instructions.en: Lie face down on a mat with your arms extended overhead. Engage your core and lift your chest and legs off the ground simultaneously. Kick your legs up and down in a fluttering motion, as if you were swimming. Continue kicking for the desired number of repetitions. Lower your chest and legs back down to the starting position.
instructions.zh: 俯卧在垫子上，双臂向前伸直。收紧核心肌群，同时将胸部和双腿抬离地面。模仿游泳的动作，上下交替踢腿，保持轻盈的频率。重复规定的次数后，将胸部和双腿放回起始位置。

en: Lie face down on a mat with your arms extended overhead.
Engage your core and lift your chest and legs off the ground simultaneously.
Kick your legs up and down in a fluttering motion, as if you were swimming.
Continue kicking for the desired number of repetitions.
Lower your chest and legs back down to the starting position.
zh: 俯卧在垫子上，双臂向前伸直。
收紧核心肌群，同时将胸部和双腿抬离地面。
模仿游泳的动作，上下交替踢腿。
重复规定的次数。
将胸部和双腿放回起始位置。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent. Hold your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Engage your core and swing your arms in a circular motion, rotating your torso as you do so. Continue the circular motion, swinging your arms and rotating your torso for the desired number of repetitions. Remember to breathe throughout the exercise.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。收紧核心肌群，双臂做圆周摆动，同时转动躯干。保持圆周运动节奏，持续摆动双臂并转动躯干，完成所需的重复次数。注意在整个练习过程中保持呼吸均匀。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Hold your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Engage your core and swing your arms in a circular motion, rotating your torso as you do so.
Continue the circular motion, swinging your arms and rotating your torso for the desired number of repetitions.
Remember to breathe throughout the exercise.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，膝盖微微弯曲。
双臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。
收紧核心肌群，双臂做圆周摆动，同时转动躯干。
保持圆周运动节奏，持续摆动双臂并转动躯干，完成所需的重复次数。
注意在整个练习过程中保持呼吸均匀。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双手撑住凳子边缘，手指朝前。将臀部滑离凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。弯曲肘部，下降身体直到上臂与地面平行。将身体推回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双手撑住凳子边缘，手指朝前。
将臀部滑离凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。
弯曲肘部，下降身体直到上臂与地面平行。
将身体推回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the tire. Bend your knees and hinge at the hips, lowering into a squat position. Reach down and grab the bottom edge of the tire with both hands, fingers facing towards you. Engage your glutes and leg muscles, and explosively drive through your legs to lift the tire off the ground. As the tire flips over, use your upper body strength to guide it and maintain control. Once the tire is fully flipped, quickly step back and reset your stance. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向轮胎。屈膝并以髋关节为轴心，降低身体进入深蹲姿势。弯腰用双手抓住轮胎的底部边缘，手指朝向自己。收紧臀部和腿部肌肉，通过腿部的爆发力将轮胎从地面抬起。当轮胎翻转时，利用上半身力量引导并保持控制。轮胎完全翻转后，快速后退并调整站姿。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the tire.
Bend your knees and hinge at the hips, lowering into a squat position.
Reach down and grab the bottom edge of the tire with both hands, fingers facing towards you.
Engage your glutes and leg muscles, and explosively drive through your legs to lift the tire off the ground.
As the tire flips over, use your upper body strength to guide it and maintain control.
Once the tire is fully flipped, quickly step back and reset your stance.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，面向轮胎。
屈膝并以髋关节为轴心，降低身体进入深蹲姿势。
弯腰用双手抓住轮胎的底部边缘，手指朝向自己。
收紧臀部和腿部肌肉，通过腿部的爆发力将轮胎从地面抬起。
轮胎翻转时，利用上半身力量引导并保持控制。
轮胎完全翻转后，快速后退并调整站姿。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the trap bar on the ground in front of you. Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the handles of the trap bar with an overhand grip. Keep your back straight and chest up as you begin to lift the trap bar off the ground by extending your hips and knees. As you lift, focus on driving through your heels and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement. Lower the trap bar back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将六角杠铃置于身体前方地面上。屈髋屈膝下蹲，双手正握六角杠铃的把手。保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，通过伸展髋关节和膝关节将六角杠铃从地面拉起。在上提过程中，注意用脚后跟发力，并在动作顶端用力收缩臀肌。按照屈髋屈膝的方式将六角杠铃放回地面，全程保持背部挺直。根据所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the trap bar on the ground in front of you.
Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the handles of the trap bar with an overhand grip.
Keep your back straight and chest up as you begin to lift the trap bar off the ground by extending your hips and knees.
As you lift, focus on driving through your heels and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Lower the trap bar back down to the ground by bending at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，将六角杠铃置于身体前方的地面上。
屈髋屈膝下蹲，双手正握六角杠铃的把手。
保持背部挺直、胸部抬起，通过伸展髋关节和膝关节将六角杠铃从地面拉起。
在上提过程中，注意用脚后跟发力，并在动作顶端用力收缩臀肌。
屈髋屈膝将六角杠铃放回地面，全程保持背部挺直。
根据所需次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子或椅子的边缘，双手握住边缘，手指朝前。将臀部滑出凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。弯曲手肘，将身体向地面方向下降，同时保持背部靠近凳子。在最低点稍作停留，然后将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子或椅子的边缘，双手握住边缘，手指朝前。
将臀部滑出凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。
弯曲手肘，将身体向地面方向下降，同时保持背部靠近凳子。
在最低点稍作停留，然后将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench, and straighten your arms. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子边缘，双手握住凳子边缘，手指朝前。双脚向前滑动，将臀部移出凳子外，并伸直手臂。弯曲肘部，将身体向地面方向下降，保持背部靠近凳子。通过手掌向下推压，伸直手臂，回到起始姿势。根据所需的重复次数重复进行。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench, and straighten your arms.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子边缘，双手握住凳子边缘，手指朝前。
双脚向前滑动，将臀部移出凳子外，并伸直手臂。
弯曲肘部，将身体向地面方向下降，保持背部靠近凳子。
通过手掌向下推压，伸直手臂，回到起始姿势。
根据所需的重复次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双手抓住凳子边缘，手指朝前。将臀部滑离凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。弯曲肘部降低身体，保持背部紧贴凳子。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将身体推回起始位置。重复完成所需的次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge of the bench, fingers pointing forward.
Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双手抓住凳子边缘，手指朝前。
将臀部滑离凳子，用双手支撑身体重量。
弯曲肘部降低身体，保持背部紧贴凳子。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将身体推回起始位置。
重复完成所需的次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your hands next to your hips, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the front of the chair with your legs extended in front of you. Straighten your arms, keeping a little bend in your elbows to keep tension on your triceps and off your elbow joints. Slowly bend your elbows to lower your body toward the floor until your elbows are at about a 90-degree angle. Once you reach the bottom of the movement, press down into the chair to straighten your elbows, returning to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子或长凳边缘，双手放在臀部两侧，手指朝前。将臀部滑到椅子前方，双腿在身前伸直。伸直手臂，肘部略微弯曲以保持对肱三头肌的张力，同时减少对肘关节的压力。慢慢弯曲肘部，将身体向地面方向下降，直到肘部大约成90度角。下降到最低点后，双手下压椅子，伸直肘部，回到起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your hands next to your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Slide your butt off the front of the chair with your legs extended in front of you.
Straighten your arms, keeping a little bend in your elbows to keep tension on your triceps and off your elbow joints.
Slowly bend your elbows to lower your body toward the floor until your elbows are at about a 90-degree angle.
Once you reach the bottom of the movement, press down into the chair to straighten your elbows, returning to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在椅子或长凳边缘，双手放在臀部两侧，手指朝前。
将臀部滑到椅子前方，双腿在身前伸直。
伸直手臂，肘部略微弯曲以保持对肱三头肌的张力，同时减少对肘关节的压力。
慢慢弯曲肘部，将身体向地面方向下降，直到肘部大约成90度角。
下降到最低点后，双手下压椅子，伸直肘部，回到起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent. Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground. Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your upper arms close to your sides. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。双臂向前伸直与地面保持平行。弯曲肘部，将身体向下降低，同时保持上臂贴近身体两侧。在最低点稍作停顿，然后用力向上推起身体，恢复到起始姿势。按照需要的次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Extend your arms straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your upper arms close to your sides.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，膝盖微微弯曲。
双臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。
弯曲肘部，将身体向下降低，保持上臂贴近身体两侧。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后用力向上推起身体，恢复到起始姿势。
按照需要的次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Stand or sit upright with your back straight. Extend one arm overhead, bending it at the elbow. Place your opposite hand on the bent elbow and gently pull it towards your head. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, feeling a gentle stretch in your triceps. Release the stretch and repeat on the other arm.
instructions.zh: 身体直立或坐姿，保持背部挺直。将一只手臂向上伸直，弯曲肘部。用另一只手握住弯曲的肘部，轻轻向头部方向拉动。保持拉伸15-30秒，感受肱三头肌的轻微拉伸感。放松拉伸，换另一只手臂重复动作。

en: Stand or sit upright with your back straight.
Extend one arm overhead, bending it at the elbow.
Place your opposite hand on the bent elbow and gently pull it towards your head.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, feeling a gentle stretch in your triceps.
Release the stretch and repeat on the other arm.
zh: 身体直立或坐姿，保持背部挺直。
将一只手臂向上伸直，弯曲肘部。
用另一只手握住弯曲的肘部，轻轻向头部方向拉动。
保持拉伸15-30秒，感受肱三头肌的轻微拉伸感。
放松拉伸，换另一只手臂重复动作。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards. Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest, simultaneously curling your upper body towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulder blades and extend your legs back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。收紧腹肌，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时将膝盖向胸部靠拢，上身顺势向膝盖方向卷起。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢放下肩胛骨，将双腿放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest, simultaneously curling your upper body towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulder blades and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地面。
双手置于头后，手肘向外展开。
收紧腹肌，将肩胛骨抬离地面，同时将膝盖向胸部靠拢，上身顺势向膝盖方向卷起。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢放下肩胛骨，将双腿放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

name.en: twin handle parallel grip lat pulldown
name.zh: 双把手平行握高位下拉

instructions.en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the cable machine. Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Sit down and position your thighs under the thigh pads, keeping your feet flat on the floor. Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a neutral spine. Pull the handles down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats. Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 调整好座椅高度，面朝绳索训练器坐好。采用正握方式握住双把手，双手与肩同宽。坐下后将大腿放置于大腿垫下方，双脚平放在地面上。略微向后倾斜，挺起胸部，保持脊柱自然中立位。将把手向下拉至胸部上侧，同时用力挤压肩胛骨内收。动作到底部时稍作停顿，充分感受背阔肌的收缩。然后缓慢释放把手，匀速返回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the cable machine.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Sit down and position your thighs under the thigh pads, keeping your feet flat on the floor.
Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a neutral spine.
Pull the handles down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the contraction in your lats.
Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 调整座椅高度，面朝绳索训练器坐好。
采用正握方式握住双把手，双手与肩同宽。
坐下后将大腿放置于大腿垫下方，双脚平放在地面上。
略微向后倾斜，挺起胸部，保持脊柱自然中立位。
将把手向下拉至胸部上侧，同时用力挤压肩胛骨。
动作到底部时稍作停顿，充分感受背阔肌的收缩。
缓慢释放把手，匀速返回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Place your hands by your sides for support. Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders. While keeping your hips lifted, twist your lower body to the right side, bringing your knees towards the ground. Return to the starting position and repeat the twist to the left side. Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 仰卧在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放。双手放在身体两侧以保持支撑。收紧臀肌并将髋部抬离地面，使膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。在保持髋部抬起的同时，将下半身向右侧扭转，膝盖向地面靠近。然后恢复到起始位置，再向左侧进行同样的扭转动作。按照所需的重复次数交替进行左右扭转。

en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands by your sides for support.
Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
While keeping your hips lifted, twist your lower body to the right side, bringing your knees towards the ground.
Return to the starting position and repeat the twist to the left side.
Continue alternating twists for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 仰卧在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放。
双手放在身体两侧以保持支撑。
收紧臀肌并将髋部抬离地面，使膝盖到肩膀形成一条直线。
在保持髋部抬起的同时，将下半身向右侧扭转，膝盖向地面靠近。
恢复到起始位置，再向左侧进行同样的扭转动作。
按照所需的重复次数交替进行左右扭转。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Place your hands under your glutes for support. Engage your abs and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them straight. As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards your opposite shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放在身体两侧。将双手放在臀部下方以提供支撑。收紧腹肌，将双腿同时抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。抬腿的同时，将髋部向一侧扭转，带动双腿朝向对侧肩膀方向移动。在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。换另一侧重复相同的扭转动作，按照设定的次数交替进行。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Engage your abs and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your legs towards your opposite shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放在身体两侧。
将双手放在臀部下方以提供支撑。
收紧腹肌，将双腿同时抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。
抬腿的同时，将髋部向一侧扭转，带动双腿朝向对侧肩膀方向移动。
在动作顶端稍作停留，然后缓慢将双腿放回起始位置。
换另一侧重复相同的扭转动作。
按照设定的次数交替进行。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, bringing them towards your chest. As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your knees towards your opposite shoulder. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放在身体两侧。弯曲膝盖，将双腿抬离地面并向胸部靠近。在抬腿的同时扭转髋部，使膝盖朝向对侧肩膀方向移动。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放下恢复至起始姿势。换另一侧扭转髋部重复上述动作，持续交替进行所需次数。

en: Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, bringing them towards your chest.
As you lift your legs, twist your hips to one side, bringing your knees towards your opposite shoulder.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat the movement, this time twisting your hips to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双腿伸直，双臂自然放在身体两侧。
弯曲膝盖，将双腿抬离地面并向胸部靠近。
在抬腿的同时扭转髋部，使膝盖朝向对侧肩膀方向移动。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将双腿放下恢复至起始姿势。
换另一侧扭转髋部重复上述动作。
持续交替进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended out to the sides. Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent. Reach down towards your toes with both hands, keeping your legs straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向两侧伸直。腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，膝盖略微弯曲。双手向下触碰脚趾，同时保持双腿伸直。在最低处稍作停留，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended out to the sides.
Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Reach down towards your toes with both hands, keeping your legs straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂向两侧伸直。
腰部向前弯曲，保持背部挺直，膝盖略微弯曲。
双手向下触碰脚趾，同时保持双腿伸直。
在最低处稍作停留，然后缓慢回到起始姿势。
按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart. Extend your arms straight in front of you, parallel to the ground. Interlace your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body. Slowly raise your arms overhead, keeping them straight and parallel to each other. As you raise your arms, squeeze your shoulder blades together. Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release and repeat.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立。双臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行。十指交叉，然后将手掌向外翻转。慢慢将双臂举过头顶，同时保持双臂伸直且相互平行。在上举的过程中，收缩肩胛骨。保持这个拉伸姿势15-30秒，然后放松回到起始位置，重复动作。

en: Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend your arms straight in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Interlace your fingers and rotate your palms away from your body.
Slowly raise your arms overhead, keeping them straight and parallel to each other.
As you raise your arms, squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release and repeat.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，保持身体直立
双臂向前伸直，与地面保持平行
十指交叉，然后将手掌向外翻转
慢慢将双臂举过头顶，同时保持双臂伸直且相互平行
在上举的过程中，收缩肩胛骨
保持这个拉伸姿势15-30秒，然后放松回到起始位置，重复动作

instructions.en: Lie face down on the floor with your legs extended behind you. Place your hands on the floor next to your lower ribs, fingers pointing forward. Press your hands firmly into the floor and straighten your arms, lifting your torso and thighs off the ground. Roll your shoulders back and down, opening your chest and lifting your gaze towards the ceiling. Hold this position for a few breaths, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下躺在地板上，双腿在身后伸直。将双手放在下肋骨两侧的地板上，手指指向前方。双手用力按压地面并伸直手臂，将躯干和腿部抬离地面。肩胛骨向后向下滚动，打开胸部并向上凝视天花板。保持这个姿势呼吸几次，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie face down on the floor with your legs extended behind you.
Place your hands on the floor next to your lower ribs, fingers pointing forward.
Press your hands firmly into the floor and straighten your arms, lifting your torso and thighs off the ground.
Roll your shoulders back and down, opening your chest and lifting your gaze towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for a few breaths, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下躺在地板上，双腿在身后伸直。
将双手放在下肋骨两侧的地板上，手指指向前方。
双手用力按压地面并伸直手臂，将躯干和腿部抬离地面。
肩胛骨向后向下滚动，打开胸部并向上凝视天花板。
保持这个姿势呼吸几次，然后慢慢将身体放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you. Lean back slightly and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight. Simultaneously, lift your upper body off the ground and reach your arms towards your legs. Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地面上，双腿向前伸直。身体微微向后倾斜，同时将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。接着将上半身也抬离地面，双手伸向双腿方向。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将上半身和双腿放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front of you.
Lean back slightly and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Simultaneously, lift your upper body off the ground and reach your arms towards your legs.
Hold this position for a few seconds, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地面上，双腿向前伸直。
身体微微向后倾斜，同时将双腿抬离地面，保持腿部伸直。
接着将上半身也抬离地面，双手伸向双腿方向。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后慢慢将上半身和双腿放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Hang from the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 悬挂在双杠上，手臂完全伸直，身体保持直线。收紧核心，将双腿在身前抬起，保持腿部伸直。继续抬起直到双腿与地面平行或略高。在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将双腿降回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Hang from the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 悬挂在双杠上，手臂完全伸直，身体保持直线。
收紧核心，将双腿在身前抬起，保持腿部伸直。
继续抬起直到双腿与地面平行或略高。
在顶端暂停片刻，然后慢慢将双腿降回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings. Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly. Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body. Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion. Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise. Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout. Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.
instructions.zh: 将椭圆机的阻力和坡度调整到适合您的设置。踏上踏板，轻握把手。开始时用脚向下踩踏，同时将把手向身体方向拉。持续这个动作，交替进行推和拉的动作，模拟步行或跑步的动作。保持稳定的节奏，并在整个练习过程中保持核心肌群收紧。按照您想要的有氧训练时长持续进行。在下器械之前，逐渐降低机器的强度和速度。

en: Adjust the resistance level and incline of the elliptical machine to your desired settings.
Step onto the pedals of the machine and grip the handles lightly.
Begin by pushing down with your feet and pulling the handles towards your body.
Continue this motion, alternating between pushing and pulling, to simulate a walking or running motion.
Maintain a steady pace and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Continue for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Gradually decrease the intensity and speed of the machine before stepping off.
zh: 将椭圆机的阻力和坡度调整到适合您的设置。
踏上踏板，轻握把手。
开始时用脚向下踩踏，同时将把手向身体方向拉。
持续这个动作，交替进行推和拉的动作，模拟步行或跑步的动作。
保持稳定的节奏，并在整个练习过程中保持核心肌群收紧。
按照您想要的有氧训练时长持续进行。
在下器械之前，逐渐降低机器的强度和速度。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart. Lift your right knee up towards your chest as high as you can while balancing on your left leg. Step forward with your right foot and lower your body into a lunge position, bending both knees to a 90-degree angle. Push off with your right foot and bring your left knee up towards your chest. Step forward with your left foot and lower your body into a lunge position. Continue alternating legs and lunging forward, keeping your core engaged and maintaining a steady pace. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立。保持左腿支撑平衡，将右膝尽可能抬高向胸部靠拢。右脚向前迈步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势，双膝弯曲成90度角。右脚发力蹬地，将左膝抬起向胸部靠拢。左脚向前迈步，身体再次下沉进入弓步姿势。继续交替双腿向前弓步行进，保持核心肌群收紧，维持稳定的速度和节奏。重复进行至目标次数。

en: Stand with your feet hip-width apart.
Lift your right knee up towards your chest as high as you can while balancing on your left leg.
Step forward with your right foot and lower your body into a lunge position, bending both knees to a 90-degree angle.
Push off with your right foot and bring your left knee up towards your chest.
Step forward with your left foot and lower your body into a lunge position.
Continue alternating legs and lunging forward, keeping your core engaged and maintaining a steady pace.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与髋同宽站立。
左腿支撑保持平衡，右膝尽量向胸部抬高。
右脚向前迈出，身体下沉成弓步，双膝弯至90度。
右脚蹬地发力，将左膝向胸部抬起。
左脚向前迈出，身体下沉成弓步。
双腿交替向前弓步，保持核心收紧，节奏稳定。
重复至目标次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right leg, lowering your body into a lunge position. Keep your torso upright and your front knee aligned with your ankle. Push off with your right foot and bring your left foot forward, stepping into a lunge position with your left leg. Continue alternating legs and walking forward, maintaining a controlled and steady pace. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。右腿向前迈出一步，身体下降进入弓步姿势。保持躯干直立，前侧膝盖与脚踝保持对齐。用右脚发力蹬地，左腿向前收拢，左脚向前迈出进入弓步姿势。继续交替双腿向前行进，保持控制且稳定的节奏。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Take a step forward with your right leg, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Keep your torso upright and your front knee aligned with your ankle.
Push off with your right foot and bring your left foot forward, stepping into a lunge position with your left leg.
Continue alternating legs and walking forward, maintaining a controlled and steady pace.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立。
右腿向前迈出一步，身体下降进入弓步姿势。
保持躯干直立，前侧膝盖与脚踝保持对齐。
用右脚发力蹬地，左腿向前收拢，左脚向前迈出进入弓步姿势。
继续交替双腿向前行进，保持控制且稳定的节奏。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Adjust the incline level on the treadmill to your desired intensity. Stand on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart. Start walking at a comfortable pace, ensuring that you maintain proper form. Engage your core muscles and keep your back straight throughout the exercise. Continue walking on the incline treadmill for the desired duration of your cardio workout. Gradually decrease the incline and speed of the treadmill to cool down before stopping.
instructions.zh: 将跑步机的坡度调整到所需的强度。双脚与肩同宽站在跑步机上。以舒适的速度开始行走，保持正确的姿势。收紧核心肌群，在整个动作过程中保持背部挺直。在坡度跑步机上持续行走，直到完成设定的有氧训练时间。逐渐降低跑步机的坡度和速度进行放松，然后再停止。

en: Adjust the incline level on the treadmill to your desired intensity.
Stand on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Start walking at a comfortable pace, ensuring that you maintain proper form.
Engage your core muscles and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Continue walking on the incline treadmill for the desired duration of your cardio workout.
Gradually decrease the incline and speed of the treadmill to cool down before stopping.
zh: 将跑步机的坡度调整到所需的强度。
双脚与肩同宽站在跑步机上。
以舒适的速度开始行走，保持正确的姿势。
收紧核心肌群，在整个动作过程中保持背部挺直。
在坡度跑步机上持续行走，直到完成设定的有氧训练时间。
逐渐降低跑步机的坡度和速度进行放松，然后再停止。

instructions.en: Adjust the stepmill machine to a comfortable level. Step onto the machine and place your hands on the handrails for support. Start walking by placing one foot on a step and then the other, alternating between legs. Maintain an upright posture and engage your core muscles. Continue walking for the desired duration or distance. Gradually increase the intensity or speed as you become more comfortable with the exercise. Remember to cool down and stretch after completing the exercise.
instructions.zh: 将踏步机调整到适宜的阻力水平。踏上机器，双手握住扶手以保持平衡。通过将一只脚放在踏板上然后换另一只脚的方式开始行走，双腿交替发力。保持身体直立，并激活核心肌群。按照所需的时长或距离持续行走。随着对动作的熟悉，逐渐增加运动强度或速度。完成训练后记得进行放松和拉伸。

en: Adjust the stepmill machine to a comfortable level.
Step onto the machine and place your hands on the handrails for support.
Start walking by placing one foot on a step and then the other, alternating between legs.
Maintain an upright posture and engage your core muscles.
Continue walking for the desired duration or distance.
Gradually increase the intensity or speed as you become more comfortable with the exercise.
Remember to cool down and stretch after completing the exercise.
zh: 将踏步机调整到适宜的阻力水平。
踏上机器，双手握住扶手以保持平衡。
通过将一只脚放在踏板上然后换另一只脚的方式开始行走，双腿交替发力。
保持身体直立，并激活核心肌群。
按照所需的时长或距离持续行走。
随着对动作的熟悉，逐渐增加运动强度或速度。
完成训练后记得进行放松和拉伸。

instructions.en: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子上，双手握住凳子边缘，手指朝前。将臀部滑出凳子外，用双手支撑身体重量。通过弯曲肘部逐渐下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行。然后通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。重复完成所需次数。

en: Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子上，双手握住凳子边缘，手指朝前。
将臀部滑出凳子外，用双手支撑身体重量。
通过弯曲肘部逐渐下降身体，直到上臂与地面平行。
通过伸直手臂将身体推回起始位置。
重复完成所需次数。

name.en: weighted close grip chin-up on dip cage
name.zh: 负重窄握反手引体向上

instructions.en: Stand in front of the dip cage and grab the parallel bars with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended, feet off the ground, and body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your sides. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars, then pause for a moment. Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position, fully extending your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 站在双杠训练架前，采用反手握法握住平行杠，双手间距与肩同宽。双臂完全伸直悬挂在杠上，双脚离地，身体保持直立。收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉起，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。持续向上拉动直到下巴超过杠子高度，然后短暂停顿。慢慢将身体下降至起始位置，双臂完全伸直。根据所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

en: Stand in front of the dip cage and grab the parallel bars with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bars with your arms fully extended, feet off the ground, and body straight.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bars, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bars, then pause for a moment.
Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 站在双杠训练架前，采用反手握法握住平行杠，双手间距与肩同宽。
双臂完全伸直悬挂在杠上，双脚离地，身体保持直立。
收紧背部肌群，将身体向上拉起，同时保持肘部贴近身体两侧。
持续向上拉动直到下巴超过杠子高度，然后短暂停顿。
慢慢将身体下降至起始位置，双臂完全伸直。
根据所需的重复次数重复上述动作。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands. Shift your weight to one side and lower your body by bending the knee of the side you shifted towards, while keeping the other leg straight. Go as low as you can while maintaining balance and keeping your chest up. Push through the heel of the bent leg to return to the starting position. Repeat on the other side, alternating between legs.
instructions.zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖略微外展。双手在胸前握住负重物。将重心移向一侧，弯曲该侧膝盖下蹲，同时保持另一侧腿伸直。在保持平衡和胸部挺起的前提下尽可能下蹲。通过弯曲腿的脚跟发力推起身体回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复，轮流进行双腿练习。

en: Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands.
Shift your weight to one side and lower your body by bending the knee of the side you shifted towards, while keeping the other leg straight.
Go as low as you can while maintaining balance and keeping your chest up.
Push through the heel of the bent leg to return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side, alternating between legs.
zh: 双脚比肩宽站立，脚尖略微外展。
双手在胸前握住负重物。
将重心移向一侧，弯曲该侧膝盖下蹲，同时保持另一侧腿伸直。
在保持平衡和胸部挺起的前提下尽可能下蹲。
通过弯曲腿的脚跟发力推起身体回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复，轮流进行双腿练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground. Hold a weight plate or dumbbell on your chest. Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your shoulder blades are off the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。将杠铃片或哑铃置于胸前。收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至肩胛骨离开地面。在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身降回起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Hold a weight plate or dumbbell on your chest.
Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your shoulder blades are off the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在地面上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放于地。
将杠铃片或哑铃置于胸前。
收紧腹肌，将上半身抬离地面，向前卷曲至肩胛骨离开地面。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后缓慢将上半身降回起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Lie flat on a decline bench with your feet secured under the foot pads. Place your hands behind your head or across your chest. Engage your abs and slowly lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward until your torso is perpendicular to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。收紧腹部，缓慢将上半身抬离凳面，向前卷曲直到躯干与地面垂直。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Lie flat on a decline bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Engage your abs and slowly lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward until your torso is perpendicular to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 平躺在下斜凳上，双脚固定在脚垫下方。
双手放在头后或交叉放在胸前。
收紧腹部，缓慢将上半身抬离凳面，向前卷曲直到躯干与地面垂直。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身放回起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand on a raised platform with your toes on the edge and your heels hanging off. Hold onto a stable object for support. Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚站在一个抬高的平台上，脚趾位于边缘，脚跟悬空。握住一个稳定的物体以保持支撑。通过伸展踝关节尽可能高地抬起脚跟。在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟降低回到起始位置。重复所需的重复次数。

en: Stand on a raised platform with your toes on the edge and your heels hanging off.
Hold onto a stable object for support.
Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚站在抬高的平台上，脚趾位于边缘，脚跟悬空。
握住一个稳定的物体以保持支撑。
通过伸展踝关节尽可能高地抬起脚跟。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后慢慢将脚跟降低回到起始位置。
重复所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together. Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body. Once your chest is just above the ground, explosively push yourself up, lifting your hands off the ground. As you push up, quickly move your hands out to the sides and slightly forward, allowing your body to drop down towards the ground. Catch yourself with your hands in the wider position and immediately lower your chest towards the ground again. Repeat the push-up motion, dropping down and catching yourself with your hands in the narrower position. Continue alternating between the wider and narrower hand positions for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以高平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩宽稍宽，双脚并拢。将胸部向地面降低，保持肘部靠近身体。当胸部接近地面时，用爆发力向上推起，将双手抬离地面。在向上推起时，迅速将双手向外展开并略微向前移动，让身体下落回到地面。用更宽的手部位置接住自己，并立即再次将胸部向地面降低。重复俯卧撑动作，在下落时用手更窄的位置接住自己。继续在宽手位和窄手位之间交替，进行所需次数的重复。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Once your chest is just above the ground, explosively push yourself up, lifting your hands off the ground.
As you push up, quickly move your hands out to the sides and slightly forward, allowing your body to drop down towards the ground.
Catch yourself with your hands in the wider position and immediately lower your chest towards the ground again.
Repeat the push-up motion, dropping down and catching yourself with your hands in the narrower position.
Continue alternating between the wider and narrower hand positions for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高平板支撑姿势开始，双手比肩宽稍宽，双脚并拢。
将胸部向地面降低，保持肘部靠近身体。
当胸部接近地面时，用爆发力向上推起，将双手抬离地面。
在向上推起时，迅速将双手向外展开并略微向前移动，让身体下落回到地面。
用更宽的手部位置接住自己，并立即再次将胸部向地面降低。
重复俯卧撑动作，在下落时用手更窄的位置接住自己。
继续在宽手位和窄手位之间交替，进行所需次数的重复。

instructions.en: Start by lying face down on the floor. Place your forearms on the ground, with your elbows directly under your shoulders. Extend your legs straight out behind you, with your toes on the ground. Engage your core and lift your body off the ground, balancing on your forearms and toes. Keep your body in a straight line from your head to your heels. Hold this position for the desired amount of time. Lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 首先面朝下俯卧在地面上。将前臂放在地上，确保肘关节正好位于肩关节正下方。将双腿向后伸直，脚尖着地。收紧核心肌群，将身体抬离地面，以前臂和脚尖为支撑点保持身体平衡。在整个动作过程中，保持从头到脚呈一条直线。保持此姿势至规定时间，然后将身体慢慢降回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by lying face down on the floor.
Place your forearms on the ground, with your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Extend your legs straight out behind you, with your toes on the ground.
Engage your core and lift your body off the ground, balancing on your forearms and toes.
Keep your body in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 首先面朝下俯卧在地面上。
将前臂放在地上，确保肘关节正好位于肩关节正下方。
将双腿向后伸直，脚尖着地。
收紧核心肌群，将身体抬离地面，以前臂和脚尖为支撑点保持身体平衡。
在整个动作过程中，保持从头到脚呈一条直线。
保持此姿势至规定时间。
然后将身体慢慢降回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs. Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。保持手臂伸直，呼气的同时将哑铃向前举起，直至与肩部齐平。在最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一只哑铃，手掌朝向大腿。
保持手臂伸直，呼气的同时将哑铃向前举起，直至与肩部齐平。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后吸气，缓慢将哑铃降回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you. Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight. Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双臂完全伸直悬挂在引体向上杆上，掌心朝向身体外侧。收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前抬起，保持腿部伸直。继续抬腿直至双腿与地面平行或略高于平行位置。在最高点暂停片刻，然后缓慢将双腿降回起始位置。重复至所需的重复次数。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Engage your core and lift your legs up in front of you, keeping them straight.
Continue lifting until your legs are parallel to the ground or slightly higher.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双臂完全伸直悬挂在引体向上杆上，掌心朝向身体外侧。
收紧核心肌群，将双腿向前抬起，保持腿部伸直。
继续抬腿直至双腿与地面平行或略高于平行位置。
在最高点暂停片刻，然后缓慢将双腿降回起始位置。
重复至所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Position yourself face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability. Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest. Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 面部朝下趴在健身球上，髋部置于球面，双脚靠墙以保持稳定。双手置于头后或交叉放于胸前。收紧核心肌群，慢慢将上半身抬离球面，背部伸展至身体呈一条直线。在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。按所需次数重复。

en: Position yourself face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 面部朝下趴在健身球上，髋部置于球面，双脚靠墙以保持稳定。
双手置于头后或交叉放于胸前。
收紧核心肌群，慢慢将上半身抬离球面，背部伸展至身体呈一条直线。
在顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将上半身降回起始位置。
按所需次数重复。

instructions.en: Start in a kneeling position with your knees hip-width apart and your back straight. Hold a weight in each hand, with your arms extended straight down in front of you. Engage your core and swing the weights up and overhead, keeping your arms straight. Lower the weights back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为跪姿，膝盖与髋同宽，背部保持挺直。双手各持一个负重，双臂向前伸直垂直于地面。收紧核心肌群，将负重向前上方摆动至头顶位置，保持手臂伸直。将负重缓慢下落回起始位置，重复完成所需次数。

en: Start in a kneeling position with your knees hip-width apart and your back straight.
Hold a weight in each hand, with your arms extended straight down in front of you.
Engage your core and swing the weights up and overhead, keeping your arms straight.
Lower the weights back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 跪姿准备，膝盖与髋同宽，背部保持挺直。
双手各持一个负重，双臂向前伸直垂直于地面。
收紧核心肌群，将负重向前上方摆动至头顶位置，手臂保持伸直。
将负重缓慢下落回起始位置，重复完成所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand. Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight. Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down. Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个负重。右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。向前弓步的同时，将负重向前上方摆动，手臂保持伸直。右脚发力蹬地，身体回至起始位置，负重随势向下摆回。换左脚重复动作，双腿交替进行至所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand.
Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight.
Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down.
Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手各持一个负重。
右脚向前迈出一步，身体下沉进入弓步姿势。
向前弓步的同时，将负重向前上方摆动，手臂保持伸直。
右脚发力蹬地，身体回至起始位置，负重随势向下摆回。
换左脚重复动作，双腿交替进行至所需次数。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you. Continue pulling yourself up until your chest reaches the bar, then pause for a moment. Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为双手握住单杠，手掌朝外，双手间距略宽于肩宽，身体自然悬垂。收紧核心肌群发力向上拉起，身体略微向前倾，胸部朝单杠方向移动。当身体上拉至最高点时转换握法，使手掌朝向身体方向。继续将身体拉起直到胸部触及单杠，保持片刻。然后缓慢有控制地将身体下降回到起始位置，保持动作全程的稳定性。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
As you reach the top of the movement, transition your grip so that your palms are facing towards you.
Continue pulling yourself up until your chest reaches the bar, then pause for a moment.
Slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住单杠，手掌朝外，握距略宽于肩宽，身体自然悬垂。
收紧核心肌群发力向上拉起，胸部朝向单杠方向移动。
上拉至最高点时转换握法，使手掌朝向身体方向。
继续向上拉直到胸部触及单杠，保持片刻。
缓慢有控制地将身体下降回到起始位置，保持动作全程的稳定性。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back. Bend your elbows and pull your chest towards the bar, keeping your body straight. Once your chest reaches the bar, push down with your hands and drive your elbows back, lifting your body above the bar. Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手正握单杠，握距略宽于肩部。收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后收紧。弯曲手肘，将胸部拉向单杠，同时保持身体挺直。当胸部触杠时，双手向下推压，肘部向后收，将身体撑起至单杠上方。在动作顶点稍停，然后缓慢下降回起始位置。按照需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Bend your elbows and pull your chest towards the bar, keeping your body straight.
Once your chest reaches the bar, push down with your hands and drive your elbows back, lifting your body above the bar.
Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握单杠，握距略宽于肩部
收紧核心肌群，将肩胛骨向下向后收紧
弯曲手肘，将胸部向单杠方向拉起，同时保持身体挺直
当胸部接触单杠时，双手向下推压，肘部向后收，将身体撑起至单杠上方
在动作最高点稍停，然后缓慢将身体下降回起始位置
按所需重复次数进行练习

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight. Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手正握抓住单杠，握距比肩稍宽。手臂完全伸直，身体保持直立悬挂。收紧核心，通过弯曲手肘并挤压背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起。持续向上直到下巴超过单杠。然后控制好速度将身体下放回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握抓住单杠，握距比肩稍宽。
手臂完全伸直，身体保持直立悬挂。
收紧核心，通过弯曲手肘并挤压背部肌肉，将身体向上拉起。
持续向上直到下巴超过单杠。
控制好速度将身体下放回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms overhead. Engage your abs and slowly curl your torso forward, bringing your chest towards your knees. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your torso back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。双手握住杠铃片或哑铃，双臂伸直举过头顶。收紧腹肌，然后慢慢将躯干向前卷起，胸部向膝盖方向靠近。在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将躯干降低回起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms overhead.
Engage your abs and slowly curl your torso forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your torso back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲成90度角。
双手握住杠铃片或哑铃，双臂伸直举过头顶。
收紧腹肌，然后慢慢将躯干向前卷起，胸部向膝盖方向靠近。
在动作顶端稍作停顿，然后慢慢将躯干降低回起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手正握单杠，握距略宽于肩宽。手臂完全伸直，身体悬垂于杠下，保持身体挺直。收紧背部肌群发力，将身体向上拉起，手肘贴近身体两侧。继续向上拉直至下巴过杆。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手正握单杠，握距略宽于肩宽。
手臂完全伸直悬垂于杠下，保持身体挺直。
收紧背部肌群发力，将身体向上拉起，手肘贴近身体两侧。
继续向上拉直至下巴过杆。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体降回起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand. Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight. Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows. Continue lifting your arms until they are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃。膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。手臂向身体两侧展开，肘部保持轻微弯曲。继续将手臂上举至与地面平行的位置。在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂放下至起始位置。按所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Continue lifting your arms until they are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个哑铃。
膝盖微屈，髋部前倾，保持背部挺直。
手臂向身体两侧展开，肘部保持轻微弯曲。
继续将手臂上举至与地面平行的位置。
在最高点稍作停顿，然后缓慢将手臂放下至起始位置。
按所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor. Hold a weight or medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest. Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged. Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your right side. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。双手握住哑铃或药球，将其置于胸前。身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。慢慢将躯干向右侧扭转，将哑铃或药球移向右侧地面的方向。稍作停顿后，将躯干向左侧扭转，将哑铃或药球移向左侧地面的方向。两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor.
Hold a weight or medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest.
Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your right side.
Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your left side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，双膝弯曲，双脚平放在地面上。
双手握住哑铃或药球，将其置于胸前。
身体微微后倾，保持背部挺直，核心肌群收紧。
慢慢将躯干向右侧扭转，将哑铃或药球移向右侧地面的方向。
稍作停顿后，将躯干向左侧扭转，将哑铃或药球移向左侧地面的方向。
两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

name.zh: 负重俄式转体（双腿抬起）

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet lifted off the ground, keeping your legs together. Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent. Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles. Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the ground on your right side. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the ground on your left side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚抬离地面，双腿并拢。双手在胸前握住重物，保持肘部略微弯曲。身体略微向后倾斜以激活核心肌群。将躯干向右扭转，将重物移向右侧地面。短暂停顿，然后将躯干向左扭转，将重物移向左侧地面。继续交替进行所需次数。

en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet lifted off the ground, keeping your legs together.
Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles.
Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the ground on your right side.
Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the ground on your left side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在地上，膝盖弯曲，双脚抬离地面，双腿并拢。
双手在胸前握住重物，保持肘部略微弯曲。
身体略微向后倾斜以激活核心肌群。
将躯干向右扭转，将重物移向右侧地面。
短暂停顿，然后将躯干向左扭转，将重物移向左侧地面。
继续交替进行所需次数。

instructions.en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor. Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest. Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles. Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the right side of your body. Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the left side of your body. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐于地面，双膝弯曲，双脚平放。双手握住负重物置于胸前。身体微微后倾以激活核心肌群。将躯干向右侧扭转，将负重物移向身体右侧。稍作停顿，然后将躯干向左侧扭转，将负重物移向身体左侧。交替左右两侧进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Hold the weight with both hands in front of your chest.
Lean back slightly to engage your core muscles.
Twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight towards the right side of your body.
Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight towards the left side of your body.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐于地面，双膝弯曲，双脚平放。
双手握住负重物置于胸前。
身体微微后倾以激活核心肌群。
将躯干向右侧扭转，将负重物移向身体右侧。
稍作停顿，然后将躯干向左侧扭转，将负重物移向身体左侧。
交替左右两侧进行，完成所需的重复次数。

name.en: weighted seated bicep curl (on stability ball)
name.zh: 坐姿负重二头肌弯举（使用健身球）

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight. Hold a medicine ball with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and let your arms hang down by your sides. Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the medicine ball up towards your shoulders. Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the medicine ball back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，保持背部挺直。用反握方式握住药球，手掌朝上，让双臂自然垂放在身体两侧。保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将药球向上弯举至肩部方向。在动作顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。吸气，然后缓慢将药球放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Hold a medicine ball with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and let your arms hang down by your sides.
Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the medicine ball up towards your shoulders.
Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the medicine ball back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面上，保持背部挺直。
用反握方式握住药球，手掌朝上，让双臂自然垂放在身体两侧。
保持上臂固定不动，呼气的同时将药球向上弯举至肩部方向。
在动作顶峰位置稍作停顿，充分收缩肱二头肌。
吸气，然后缓慢将药球放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle. Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands close to your chest. Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable. Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat the rotation to the other side. Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。双手握住一个杠铃片或哑铃，贴近胸部放置。收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将躯干向一侧旋转，同时保持髋部稳定。在旋转到最大幅度时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。接着向另一侧重复扭转动作。两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands close to your chest.
Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable.
Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚平放在地面，膝盖弯曲呈90度角。
双手握住杠铃片或哑铃，贴近胸部放置。
收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将躯干向一侧旋转，保持髋部稳定。
在旋转到最大幅度时稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
向另一侧重复扭转动作。
两侧交替进行，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and flat on the ground. Hold a weight in one hand and place your other hand on your hip. Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the weighted side, keeping your back straight. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
instructions.zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚与肩同宽平放在地面上。一手握住负重，另一只手放在髋部。收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢向负重一侧做侧弯动作，保持背部挺直。在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。重复所需次数后，换到另一侧继续。
