en: Sit on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and flat on the ground.
Hold a weight in one hand and place your other hand on your hip.
Engage your core and slowly bend sideways towards the weighted side, keeping your back straight.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
zh: 坐在健身球上，双脚与肩同宽平放在地面上。
一只手握住负重，另一只手放在髋部。
收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢向负重一侧做侧弯动作，保持背部挺直。
在底部稍作停顿，然后缓慢回到起始位置。
重复所需次数后，换到另一侧继续。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands, or place a barbell across your upper back. Keeping your chest up and your core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips. Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。双手在胸前握住重物，或将杠铃置于上背部。保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节缓慢下蹲。下蹲至大腿与地面平行或尽可能舒适的位置。在最低点稍作停留，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始位置。重复所需的次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold a weight in front of your chest with both hands, or place a barbell across your upper back.
Keeping your chest up and your core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips.
Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as low as you can comfortably go.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。
双手在胸前握住重物，或将杠铃置于上背部。
保持胸部挺起、核心肌群收紧，通过弯曲膝盖和髋关节缓慢下蹲。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行或尽可能舒适的位置。
在最低点稍作停留，然后通过脚跟发力回到起始位置。
重复所需的次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward. Hold a weight in front of your chest or on your shoulders. Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair. Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go. Push through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。将负重置于胸前或扛在肩上。收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，臀部向后向下蹲，模仿坐椅子的动作。下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。通过脚跟发力站起，在顶端充分收缩臀肌。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Hold a weight in front of your chest or on your shoulders.
Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair.
Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Push through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，脚尖略微外展。
将负重置于胸前或扛在肩上。
收紧核心肌群，保持胸部挺起，臀部向后向下蹲，模仿坐椅子的动作。
下蹲至大腿与地面平行，或在舒适范围内尽可能降低。
通过脚跟发力站起，在顶端充分收缩臀肌。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights up to shoulder level. Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前。保持肘部贴近身体，呼气时将哑铃弯举至肩部高度。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气时缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。重复所需次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your elbows close to your torso and exhale as you curl the weights up to shoulder level.
Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the weights back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立，双手各握一个哑铃，掌心朝前。
保持肘部贴近身体，呼气时将哑铃弯举至肩部高度。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后吸气时缓慢将哑铃放回起始位置。
重复所需次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight in each hand. Extend your arms straight in front of you, palms facing each other. Squeeze your hands together as hard as you can, engaging your forearms. Hold the squeeze for a few seconds, then release. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个重物。将双臂向前伸直，掌心相对。尽全力挤压双手以充分锻炼前臂。保持挤压状态几秒后放松，按照所需次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight in each hand.
Extend your arms straight in front of you, palms facing each other.
Squeeze your hands together as hard as you can, engaging your forearms.
Hold the squeeze for a few seconds, then release.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽，双手各持一个重物
将双臂向前伸直，掌心相对
尽全力挤压双手以充分锻炼前臂
保持挤压状态几秒后放松
按照所需次数重复练习

instructions.en: Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手撑在双杠上，双臂伸直，身体保持直立。弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。稍作停顿，然后通过伸直双臂将自己推回起始位置。按照所需次数重复进行。

en: Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手撑在双杠上，双臂伸直，身体保持直立。
弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。
稍作停顿，然后通过伸直双臂将自己推回起始位置。
按照所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight. Lower your body by bending your knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground. Push through your right heel to return to the starting position. Repeat with your left leg. Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。右脚向前迈一步，同时保持背部挺直。弯曲膝盖降低身体，直到右大腿与地面平行。通过右脚脚跟发力蹬地，恢复起始位置。换左腿重复动作。继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight.
Lower your body by bending your knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Repeat with your left leg.
Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚与肩同宽站立。
右脚向前迈一步，保持背部挺直。
弯曲膝盖降低身体，直到右大腿与地面平行。
通过右脚脚跟发力蹬地，恢复起始位置。
换左腿重复同样的动作。
继续交替双腿，完成所需的重复次数。

instructions.en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight plate in front of your chest with both hands. Keep your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing each other. Press the weight plate straight out in front of you, fully extending your arms. Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring the weight plate back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前握住一个杠铃片。保持肘部轻微弯曲，双手掌心相对。将杠铃片向前直推出去，手臂完全伸展。在动作末端稍停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃片回到起始位置。根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

en: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a weight plate in front of your chest with both hands.
Keep your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing each other.
Press the weight plate straight out in front of you, fully extending your arms.
Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring the weight plate back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双脚分开与肩同宽站立，双手在胸前握住一个杠铃片。
保持肘部轻微弯曲，双手掌心相对。
将杠铃片向前直推出去，手臂完全伸展。
在动作末端稍停片刻，然后慢慢将杠铃片回到起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数重复练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward. Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench and supporting your weight with your arms. Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back close to the bench. Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在凳子边缘，双手握住凳面，手指朝前。双脚向前迈出，臀部滑离凳子，用手臂支撑身体重量。弯曲肘部下降身体，后背尽量贴近凳子。在最低点稍作停顿，然后将身体推回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench and supporting your weight with your arms.
Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back close to the bench.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在凳子边缘，双手握住凳面，手指朝前。
双脚向前迈出，臀部滑离凳子，用手臂支撑身体重量。
弯曲肘部下降身体，后背尽量贴近凳子。
在最低点稍作停顿，然后将身体推回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips. Slide your butt off the front of the bench with your legs extended in front of you. Keep your back close to the bench and your elbows slightly bent. Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor. Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 坐在椅子或长凳边缘，双手握住边缘，与臀部齐平。将臀部滑出凳子前方，双腿在身前伸直。保持背部靠近凳子，肘部微微弯曲。通过弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。通过伸直手臂推起身体回到起始位置。按所需重复次数进行练习。

en: Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Slide your butt off the front of the bench with your legs extended in front of you.
Keep your back close to the bench and your elbows slightly bent.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 坐在椅子或长凳边缘，双手握住边缘，与臀部齐平。
将臀部滑出凳子前方，双腿在身前伸直。
保持背部靠近凳子，肘部微微弯曲。
通过弯曲肘部降低身体，直到上臂与地面平行。
通过伸直手臂推起身体回到起始位置。
按所需重复次数进行练习。

name.en: weighted triceps dip on high parallel bars
name.zh: 负重肱三头肌屈伸（高双杠）

instructions.en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your hands gripping the bars and your arms fully extended. Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground. Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手握住双杠，将身体撑起，手臂完全伸直。弯曲肘关节，逐渐下降身体直到上臂与地面平行。保持片刻后，通过手掌发力推起身体，回到起始位置。根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Position yourself between two parallel bars with your hands gripping the bars and your arms fully extended.
Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手握住双杠，将身体撑起，手臂完全伸直。
弯曲肘关节，逐渐下降身体直到上臂与地面平行。
保持片刻后，通过手掌发力推起身体，回到起始位置。
根据所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Kneel on the floor and place the wheel roller in front of you. Place your hands on the handles of the wheel roller and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Engage your core muscles and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your abs tight. Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees, maintaining control and keeping your abs engaged. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 跪在地面上，将健身滚轮放在身前。双手握住滚轮把手，双臂向前伸直。收紧核心肌群，然后慢慢将滚轮向前滚动，保持背部挺直、腹部紧绷。继续向前滚动直到身体完全伸展、双臂举过头顶。稍作停顿，然后慢慢将滚轮滚回膝盖方向，保持控制并维持腹部收紧。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Kneel on the floor and place the wheel roller in front of you.
Place your hands on the handles of the wheel roller and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Engage your core muscles and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your abs tight.
Continue rolling forward until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your knees, maintaining control and keeping your abs engaged.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 跪在地面上，将健身滚轮放在身前。
双手握住滚轮把手，双臂向前伸直。
收紧核心肌群，慢慢将滚轮向前滚动，保持背部挺直、腹部紧绷。
继续向前滚动直到身体完全伸展、双臂举过头顶。
稍作停顿，然后慢慢将滚轮滚回膝盖方向，保持控制并维持腹部收紧。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Start in a plank position with your hands on the wheel and your body straight. Engage your core and start rolling the wheel forward by extending your arms. Continue rolling until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead. Reverse the movement by pulling the wheel back towards your body, using your core and arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 起始姿势为平板支撑，双手握住滚轮，身体保持一条直线。收紧核心肌群，通过伸展手臂将滚轮向前滚动。继续滚动直到身体完全伸展，双臂举过头顶。然后利用核心和手臂的力量将滚轮拉回身体，重复完成动作。根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a plank position with your hands on the wheel and your body straight.
Engage your core and start rolling the wheel forward by extending your arms.
Continue rolling until your body is fully extended and your arms are overhead.
Reverse the movement by pulling the wheel back towards your body, using your core and arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 起始姿势为平板支撑，双手握住滚轮，身体保持一条直线。
收紧核心肌群，通过伸展手臂将滚轮向前滚动。
继续滚动直到身体完全伸展，双臂举过头顶。
利用核心和手臂的力量将滚轮拉回身体。
根据需要的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together. Pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar. Lower your body back down to the starting position with control. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手以反握方式握住单杠，双手间距比肩宽。收紧核心肌群，并将肩胛骨向中间靠拢。将身体向上拉起，直至下巴超过单杠。然后有控制地将身体下放回起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar.
Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手以反握方式握住单杠，双手间距比肩宽。
收紧核心肌群，并将肩胛骨向中间靠拢。
将身体向上拉起，直至下巴超过单杠。
有控制地将身体下放回起始位置。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

instructions.en: Grab the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight. Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest. Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手采用宽握正握姿势握住单杠，双手间距略宽于肩部。双臂完全伸直，身体悬挂于单杠下方并保持直立。收缩背部肌群，将身体向单杠方向拉起，发力时以胸部为主导。持续向上拉直至下巴越过单杠。在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体放下回到起始姿势。按所需次数重复进行。

en: Grab the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手采用宽握正握姿势握住单杠，双手间距略宽于肩部。
双臂完全伸直，身体悬挂于单杠下方并保持直立。
收缩背部肌群，将身体向单杠方向拉起，发力时以胸部为主导。
持续向上拉直至下巴越过单杠。
在顶峰位置稍作停顿，然后缓慢将身体放下回到起始姿势。
按所需次数重复进行。

instructions.en: Start in a high plank position with your hands wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe. Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides. Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手距离比肩宽略宽。保持身体从头到脚呈一条直线。弯曲手肘，将胸部向地面方向降低，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。通过手掌向上推直手臂，回到起始姿势。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Start in a high plank position with your hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 以高位平板支撑姿势开始，双手距离比肩宽略宽。
保持身体从头到脚呈一条直线。
弯曲手肘，将胸部向地面方向降低，同时保持肘部紧贴身体两侧。
通过手掌向上推直手臂，回到起始姿势。
按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

name.en: wide-grip chest dip on high parallel bars

instructions.en: Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air. Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars. Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 双手支撑在双杠上，手臂完全伸直，身体悬空。微微前倾，屈肘下降身体，直到胸部接近双杠位置。稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂撑起身体回到起始位置。按照所需的重复次数进行练习。

en: Position yourself on the parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body suspended in the air.
Lean forward slightly and lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is just above the bars.
Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 双手支撑在双杠上，手臂完全伸直，身体悬空。
微微前倾，屈肘下降身体直到胸部接近双杠位置。
稍作停顿，然后伸直手臂撑起身体回到起始位置。
重复以上动作至所需次数。

instructions.en: Find an open space or a track to perform the exercise. Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart. Begin running as fast as you can, pumping your arms and driving your knees up. Continue sprinting for a specific distance or time period. Rest and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 找一个空旷的场地或跑道进行此项训练。起始姿势为双脚与肩同宽站立，然后以最快速度开始冲刺，同时配合手臂摆动和抬膝动作。持续冲刺至规定的距离或时间后，休息片刻，按照要求的重复次数继续练习。

en: Find an open space or a track to perform the exercise.
Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Begin running as fast as you can, pumping your arms and driving your knees up.
Continue sprinting for a specific distance or time period.
Rest and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 找一个空旷的场地或跑道进行此项训练。
起始姿势为双脚与肩同宽站立。
以最快速度开始冲刺，同时配合手臂摆动和抬膝动作。
持续冲刺至规定的距离或时间。
休息片刻后，按照要求的重复次数继续练习。

instructions.en: Start in a lunge position with your right foot forward and your left foot back. Place your hands on the ground on either side of your right foot. Lower your left knee to the ground and extend your right leg, keeping your right foot flat on the ground. Rotate your torso to the right, reaching your right arm up towards the ceiling. Hold this position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position. Switch sides and repeat the stretch with your left foot forward.
instructions.zh: 从右脚在前、左脚在后的弓步姿势开始。将双手放在右脚两侧的地面上支撑身体。将左膝降低触地，伸直右腿，保持右脚平放在地面上。将躯干向右侧旋转，同时右臂向上伸展指向天花板。保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始姿势。换另一侧重复，以左脚在前继续这个拉伸动作。

en: Start in a lunge position with your right foot forward and your left foot back.
Place your hands on the ground on either side of your right foot.
Lower your left knee to the ground and extend your right leg, keeping your right foot flat on the ground.
Rotate your torso to the right, reaching your right arm up towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Switch sides and repeat the stretch with your left foot forward.
zh: 从右脚在前、左脚在后的弓步姿势开始。
将双手放在右脚两侧的地面上。
将左膝降低触地，伸直右腿，保持右脚平放在地面上。
将躯干向右侧旋转，同时右臂向上伸展指向天花板。
保持这个姿势几秒钟，然后回到起始姿势。
换另一侧重复，以左脚在前继续这个拉伸动作。

instructions.en: Extend your arms straight out in front of you. Make a fist with both hands. Rotate your wrists in a circular motion, keeping your arms still. Continue the wrist circles for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将双臂向前伸直，双手握拳。保持手臂不动，手腕做画圈动作。按照所需的重复次数继续进行手腕画圈训练。

en: Extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Make a fist with both hands.
Rotate your wrists in a circular motion, keeping your arms still.
Continue the wrist circles for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将双臂向前伸直
双手握拳
保持手臂不动，手腕做画圈动作
按照所需的重复次数继续进行手腕画圈训练

instructions.en: Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar. Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down. Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you. Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists. Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
instructions.zh: 将负重连接在绳索或杠铃的一端。双手掌心向下握住另一端，双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂在身前完全伸直。通过屈腕慢慢将重物向手部方向卷起，在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将重物降回起始位置。根据需要的重复次数重复练习。

en: Attach a weight to one end of a rope or bar.
Hold the other end of the rope or bar with both hands, palms facing down.
Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms fully extended in front of you.
Slowly roll the weight up towards your hands by flexing your wrists.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
zh: 将负重连接在绳索或杠铃的一端。
双手掌心向下握住另一端。
双脚与肩同宽站立，双臂在身前完全伸直。
通过屈腕慢慢将重物向手部方向卷起。
在最高点停顿片刻，然后慢慢将重物降回起始位置。
根据需要的重复次数重复练习。
